```prisma
  email     Email    @relation("EmailAttachments", fields: [emailId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  emailId   String
  createdAt DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt DateTime @updatedAt
}

model Tag {
  id             String        @id @default(cuid())
  name           String
  description    String?
  priority       Int           @default(0)

  emailAccountId String?
  emailAccount   EmailAccount? @relation("EmailAccountTags", fields: [emailAccountId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  emails         Email[]       @relation("EmailTags")

  @@unique([name, emailAccountId])
}

model EmailAccountSyncState {
  id              String   @id @default(cuid())
  emailAccountId  String
  emailAccount    EmailAccount @relation(fields: [emailAccountId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  provider        String   // "gmail" | "outlook" | "mailcow"
  scope           String   // "inbox" | "sentitems" | "archive" | "deleteditems" | "drafts"
  cursor          String?  // Gmail historyId, Graph deltaLink, or equivalent
  lastSyncAt      DateTime?
  lastFullSyncAt  DateTime?
  errorCount      Int      @default(0)
  lastErrorAt     DateTime?
  lastErrorMsg    String?
  backoffUntil    DateTime?
  createdAt       DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt       DateTime @updatedAt

  @@unique([emailAccountId, provider, scope])
  @@index([emailAccountId])
}


// Best-effort updated schema section based on the uploaded note.prisma snippet.
// This version adds list-level categories and item-level categories for lists.

enum NoteSharePermission {
  VIEWER
  EDITOR
}

enum NoteCategoryScope {
  USER
  ORGANIZATION
  GLOBAL
}

enum TaskPriority {
  LOW
  MEDIUM
  HIGH
  URGENT
}

enum ListKind {
  CHECKLIST
  GROCERY
}

enum ListMode {
  SINGLE_USE
  TEMPLATE
}

enum ListShareScope {
  PRIVATE
  ORGANIZATION
  SELECTED_USERS
  ORGANIZATION_LINK
}

model Note {
  id             String        @id @default(uuid())
  title          String
  isOrganization Boolean       @default(false)
  isGlobal       Boolean       @default(false)
  pinned         Boolean       @default(false)
  lastOpenedAt   DateTime?
  userId         String?
  organizationId String?
  categoryId     String?
  projectId      String?

  keywordsJson   String         @default("[]")

  user           User?         @relation("UserNotes", fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  organization   Organization? @relation("OrganizationNotes", fields: [organizationId], references: [id])
  category       NoteCategory? @relation("NoteCategoryNotes", fields: [categoryId], references: [id])
  project        Project?      @relation(fields: [projectId], references: [id])

  snippets       NoteSnippet[] @relation("NoteSnippets")
  shares         NoteShare[]
  createdAt      DateTime      @default(now())
  updatedAt      DateTime      @updatedAt

  @@index([userId])
  @@index([organizationId])
  @@index([projectId])
  @@index([pinned])
  @@index([lastOpenedAt])
}

model NoteShare {
  id          String              @id @default(cuid())
  noteId      String
  userId      String
  permission  NoteSharePermission @default(VIEWER)
  createdAt   DateTime            @default(now())
  updatedAt   DateTime            @updatedAt

  note        Note                @relation(fields: [noteId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  user        User                @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@unique([noteId, userId])
  @@index([noteId])
  @@index([userId])
}

model NoteSnippet {
  id         String   @id @default(uuid())
  content    String
  title      String?
  source     String?
  aiSummary  String?
  userId     String
  orderIndex Int
  noteId     String
  note       Note     @relation("NoteSnippets", fields: [noteId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  createdAt  DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt  DateTime @updatedAt

  @@index([noteId])
}

model Task {
  id             String        @id @default(cuid())
  title          String?
  description    String?
  isCompleted    Boolean       @default(false)
  startDate      DateTime?
  dueDate        DateTime?
  reminderAt     DateTime?
  reminderSentAt DateTime?
  projectId      String?
  userId         String
  assignedUsers  User[]        @relation("TaskAssignedUsers")
  categoryId     String?
  dependencyId   String?
  priority       TaskPriority  @default(MEDIUM)
  position       Int           @default(0)

  user           User          @relation("UserTasks", fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  category       TaskCategory? @relation("TaskCategoryTasks", fields: [categoryId], references: [id])
  project        Project?      @relation(fields: [projectId], references: [id])
  dependency     Task?         @relation("TaskDependency", fields: [dependencyId], references: [id])
  dependents     Task[]        @relation("TaskDependency")

  createdAt      DateTime      @default(now())
  updatedAt      DateTime      @updatedAt

  @@index([userId])
  @@index([projectId])
  @@index([projectId, position])
  @@index([isCompleted, reminderAt])
  @@index([reminderSentAt])
}

model Project {
  id             String        @id @default(cuid())
  name           String
  description    String?
  ownerId        String
  organizationId String?
  tasks          Task[]
  notes          Note[]

  createdAt      DateTime      @default(now())
  updatedAt      DateTime      @updatedAt
  archived       Boolean       @default(false)
  memberRoles    Json?

  owner          User          @relation("UserProjects", fields: [ownerId], references: [id])
  organization   Organization? @relation("OrganizationProjects", fields: [organizationId], references: [id])
  members        User[]        @relation("ProjectMembers")

  @@index([organizationId, archived])
}

model NoteCategory {
  id          String            @id @default(cuid())
  name        String
  keywordsJson String           @default("[]")
  scopeType   NoteCategoryScope @default(USER)
  scopeId     String?
  createdById String?
  notes       Note[]            @relation("NoteCategoryNotes")
  createdAt   DateTime          @default(now())
  updatedAt   DateTime          @updatedAt

  @@unique([name, scopeType, scopeId])
  @@index([scopeType, scopeId])
}

model TaskCategory {
  id             String       @id @default(cuid())
  name           String
  keywordsJson   String       @default("[]")
  organizationId String       @default("cm5et7qse0000yqc7m6p8e500")

  organization   Organization @relation(fields: [organizationId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  tasks          Task[]       @relation("TaskCategoryTasks")

  createdAt      DateTime     @default(now())
  updatedAt      DateTime     @updatedAt

  @@unique([organizationId, name])
  @@index([organizationId])
}

model List {
  id                String         @id @default(cuid())
  title             String
  description       String?
  categoriesJson    String         @default("[]")
  keywordsJson      String         @default("[]")
  kind              ListKind       @default(CHECKLIST)
  mode              ListMode       @default(SINGLE_USE)
  shareScope        ListShareScope @default(PRIVATE)
  shareToken        String         @unique @default(cuid())
  sharedUserIdsJson String         @default("[]")
  ownerUserId       String
  organizationId    String
  sourceTemplateId  String?
  archived          Boolean        @default(false)
  useHtmlEditor     Boolean        @default(false)
  createdAt         DateTime       @default(now())
  updatedAt         DateTime       @updatedAt

  owner             User           @relation("UserOwnedLists", fields: [ownerUserId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  organization      Organization   @relation("OrganizationLists", fields: [organizationId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  sourceTemplate    List?          @relation("ListTemplateInstances", fields: [sourceTemplateId], references: [id])
  templateInstances List[]         @relation("ListTemplateInstances")
  items             ListItem[]

  @@index([organizationId, mode, archived])
  @@index([ownerUserId, mode, archived])
  @@index([shareScope, organizationId, archived])
  @@index([sourceTemplateId])
}

model ListItem {
  id                 String    @id @default(cuid())
  listId             String
  text               String
  imageUrl           String?
  note               String?
  quantity           String?
  itemCategoriesJson String    @default("[]")
  level              Int       @default(0)
  isCompleted        Boolean   @default(false)
  completedAt        DateTime?
  completedByUserId  String?
  sortOrder          Int       @default(0)
  createdAt          DateTime  @default(now())
  updatedAt          DateTime  @updatedAt

  list               List      @relation(fields: [listId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  completedByUser    User?     @relation("CompletedListItems", fields: [completedByUserId], references: [id])

  @@index([listId, sortOrder])
  @@index([completedByUserId])
}



model Room {
  id                String       @id @default(cuid())
  name              String       @unique
  
  // Relation to Table: "RoomTables"
  tables            Table[]      @relation("RoomTables")

  // Named relation to Organization
  organization      Organization @relation("OrganizationRooms", fields: [organizationId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  organizationId    String
  
  createdAt         DateTime     @default(now())
  updatedAt         DateTime     @updatedAt
}

model Table {
  id          String @id @default(cuid())
  number      Int
  seats       Int
  orders      Order[]

  organization Organization @relation("OrganizationTables", fields: [organizationId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  organizationId String

  room       Room    @relation("RoomTables", fields: [roomId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  roomId     String

  positionX  Int     @default(0) 
  positionY  Int     @default(0) 
  width      Int     @default(1) // Width in grid units
  height     Int     @default(1) // Height in grid units

  createdAt  DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt  DateTime @updatedAt

  @@unique([number, organizationId], name: "number_organizationId")
}

model Order {
  id               String      @id @default(cuid())
  table            Table?      @relation(fields: [tableId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  tableId          String?
  seatNumber       Int
  user             User?       @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  userId           String?
  status           String      @default("ORDERED")
  paymentStatus    Boolean     @default(false)
  paymentMethod    String?
  orderItems       OrderItem[]
  organization     Organization @relation(fields: [organizationId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  organizationId   String
  createdAt        DateTime    @default(now())
  updatedAt        DateTime    @updatedAt
  hidden           Boolean     @default(false)
  contactId        String?
  contact          Contact?    @relation("ContactOrderRelation", fields: [contactId], references: [id])
  bookingId        String?
  booking          Booking?    @relation("BookingOrderRelation", fields: [bookingId], references: [id])
  notes            String?
  phoneNumber      String?
  emailAddress     String?
  customerName     String?
  squarePaymentId  String?
  squareOrderId    String?     @unique
  salesTransaction SalesTransaction?
  
  // NEW: Added a dedicated, unique field for the Uber Eats Order ID
  uberEatsOrderId  String?     @unique

  @@index([tableId])
  @@index([bookingId])
}
model ProductCategory {
  id             String         @id @default(cuid())
  name           String
  organization   Organization   @relation("OrganizationProductCategories", fields: [organizationId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  organizationId String
  products       Product[]      @relation("CategoryProducts")
  createdAt      DateTime       @default(now())
  updatedAt      DateTime       @updatedAt

  hiddenOnPOS    Boolean        @default(false)
  hiddenOnPublic Boolean        @default(false)

  @@unique([name, organizationId], name: "name_organizationId")
}

model Product {
  id             String           @id @default(cuid())
  name           String
  sku            String           @unique
  description    String?
  price          Float
  inStock        Boolean          @default(true)
  active         Boolean          @default(true)
  public         Boolean          @default(true)
  canBuyOnline   Boolean          @default(true)
  
  category       ProductCategory  @relation("CategoryProducts", fields: [categoryId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  categoryId     String

  variants       ProductVariant[] @relation("ProductVariants")

  organization   Organization     @relation("OrganizationProducts", fields: [organizationId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  organizationId String

  image          String?
  createdAt      DateTime         @default(now())
  updatedAt      DateTime         @updatedAt
  orderItems     OrderItem[]

  taxable      Boolean  @default(true)
  tippable     Boolean  @default(true)
  uberEatsId   String? 

  isMultiVariant    Boolean  @default(false)
  variantGroupOrder String   @default("")
  comboRules        Json?

  @@unique([name, categoryId, organizationId])
}

model ProductVariant {
  id                   String                       @id @default(cuid())
  name                 String
  sku                  String                       @unique
  additionalPrice      Float                        @default(0.0)
  inStock              Boolean                      @default(true)
  active               Boolean                      @default(true)
  public               Boolean                      @default(true)
  canBuyOnline         Boolean                      @default(true)
  product              Product                      @relation("ProductVariants", fields: [productId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  productId            String
  description          String?
  image                String?
  createdAt            DateTime                     @default(now())
  updatedAt            DateTime                     @default(now())
  orderItems           OrderItem[]                  @relation("LegacyOrderItemVariant")
  orderItemsSelectedIn OrderItemSelectedVariant[]

  taxable              Boolean                      @default(true)
  tippable             Boolean                      @default(true)
  uberEatsId           String?
  groupName            String?
  isDefault            Boolean                      @default(false)

  @@unique([name, productId])
}

model OrderItem {
  id               String                       @id @default(cuid())
  order            Order                        @relation(fields: [orderId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  orderId          String
  product          Product?                     @relation(fields: [productId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  productId        String?
  variant          ProductVariant?              @relation("LegacyOrderItemVariant", fields: [variantId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  variantId        String?
  customName       String?
  notes            String?
  quantity         Int                          @default(1)
  seatNumber       Int
  price            Float
  taxable          Boolean?
  tippable         Boolean?
  createdAt        DateTime                     @default(now())
  updatedAt        DateTime                     @updatedAt
  status           String                       @default("ACTIVE")
  selectedVariants OrderItemSelectedVariant[]
}

model OrderItemSelectedVariant {
  id          String         @id @default(cuid())
  orderItem   OrderItem      @relation(fields: [orderItemId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  orderItemId String
  variant     ProductVariant @relation(fields: [variantId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  variantId   String

  @@unique([orderItemId, variantId])
}

// Full path: /home/luan_ngo/boss/server/prisma/schemas/receipt.prisma
model Receipt {
  id                 String             @id @default(cuid())
  date               DateTime?
  companyName        String?
  imgName            String?
  total              Float?
  hst                Float?
  notes              String?
  text               String?
  filePath           String?
  paymentType        String?
  paymentSourceId    String?
  paymentSource      Source?            @relation("ReceiptPaymentSource", fields: [paymentSourceId], references: [id])

  imageRelativePath  String?
  imageStorageStatus String             @default("ACTIVE")
  imageArchivedAt    DateTime?
  imageArchiveBatchId String?
  imageStorageChecksum String?
  imageStorageSize   Int?
  originalImageRelativePath String?
  originalImageChecksum String?
  originalImageSize   Int?
  compressedImageRelativePath String?
  compressedImageChecksum String?
  compressedImageSize Int?
  activeImageVariant String?
  compressionStatus String @default("NOT_OPTIMIZED")
  compressionProfile String?
  compressionScore Float?
  compressionSavedBytes Int?
  legibilityStatus String?
  legibilityCheckedAt DateTime?
  legibilityReportJson Json?
  autoCropApplied Boolean @default(false)
  autoCropReportJson Json?
  optimizedAt DateTime?
  optimizedByUserId String?

  createdAt          DateTime           @default(now())
  updatedAt          DateTime           @updatedAt
  organization       Organization       @relation(fields: [organizationId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  organizationId     String
  user               User               @relation("UserReceipts", fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  userId             String
  items              ReceiptItem[]
  active             Boolean            @default(true)
  bankTransactions   BankTransaction[]  @relation("ReceiptBankTransactions")
  matchCandidates    ReceiptMatchCandidate[] @relation("ReceiptCandidates")

  @@index([organizationId, imageStorageStatus])
  @@index([organizationId, imageArchivedAt])
  @@index([organizationId, active, createdAt])
}

model ReceiptItem {
  id        String   @id @default(cuid())
  name      String
  quantity  Int
  price     Float
  receipt   Receipt  @relation(fields: [receiptId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  receiptId String
  createdAt DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt DateTime @updatedAt
}

model Source {
  id               String            @id @default(cuid())
  name             String            @unique
  type             String            @default("")
  scriptPath       String
  organization     Organization      @relation(fields: [organizationId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  organizationId   String
  ledgerAccount    AccountingCategory? @relation("SourceLedgerAccount", fields: [ledgerAccountId], references: [id], onDelete: SetNull)
  ledgerAccountId  String?
  importRecords    ImportRecord[]
  bankTransactions BankTransaction[]
  receipts         Receipt[]         @relation("ReceiptPaymentSource")

  @@index([name, organizationId])
  @@index([organizationId, ledgerAccountId])
}

  bankTransactions     BankTransaction[]
  conversations        AIConversation[]
  aiInstructionCaches  AIInstructionCache[]

  bookingManagerIntelligence BookingManagerIntelligence[] @relation("UserBookingManagerIntelligence")

  phoneMessage         PhoneMessage[]       @relation("UserPhoneMessage")

  pushSubscription     PushSubscription[]   @relation("WebPush")
  notifications        Notification[]
  status               String               @default("OFFLINE")

  projects             Project[]            @relation("UserProjects")

  contacts             Contact[]
  active               Boolean              @default(true)

  availabilityWindows  UserAvailabilityWindow[] @relation("AvailabilityEmployee")
  timeOffRequests         UserTimeOff[]                           @relation("TimeOffEmployee")
  reviewedTimeOff         UserTimeOff[]                           @relation("TimeOffReviewedBy")
  cancelledTimeOff        UserTimeOff[]                           @relation("TimeOffCancelledBy")
  availabilityChangeRequests UserAvailabilityChangeRequest[]      @relation("AvailabilityRequestEmployee")

  cancelledAvailReqs      UserAvailabilityChangeRequest[]         @relation("AvailReqCancelledBy")

  settings             Settings[]           @relation("UserSettings")

  scheduleChangeLogs   ScheduleChangeLog[]  @relation("LogActor")

  payrollRecords       PayrollRecord[]      @relation("UserPayrollRecords")

  givenFeedback        EmployeeFeedback[]   @relation("ManagerFeedback")

  authoredManagementNotes   ManagementNote[] @relation("NoteAuthor")

  @@unique([organizationId, email])
}

  uploadedAt     DateTime     @default(now())
  organization   Organization @relation("OrganizationFiles", fields: [organizationId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  organizationId String

  @@index([organizationId])
}

model Service {
  id             String          @id @default(cuid())

  organizations  Organization[]  @relation("OrganizationServices")

  @@map("Services")
}

model Permission {
  id    String         @id @default(cuid())
  name  String         @unique
  users User[]         @relation("UserPermissions")
  organizations Organization[] @relation("OrganizationPermissions")

  @@map("Permissions")
}

  token     String   @id @default(uuid())
  userId    String
  expiresAt DateTime?
  user      User     @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
}

model Shift {
  id                         String                   @id @default(cuid())
  employee                   User                     @relation("UserShifts", fields: [employeeId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  employeeId                 String
  templateId                 String?
  template                   ShiftTemplate?           @relation(fields: [templateId], references: [id], onDelete: SetNull)
  date                       DateTime
  startTime                  DateTime
  endTime                    DateTime
  shiftType                  String
  status                     String                   @default("draft")
  notes                      String?
  cancellationReason         String?
  requiredQualificationNames Json?
  requiredCertificationNames Json?
  minAge                     Int?
  alcoholServiceRequired     Boolean                  @default(false)
  maxDailyHoursOverride      Float?
  maxWeeklyHoursOverride     Float?
  minimumRestHoursOverride   Float?
  constraintWarnings         Json?
  auditReason                String?
  clockIn                    DateTime?
  clockOut                   DateTime?
  attendanceNotes            String?
  paidBreakMinutes           Int                      @default(0)
  unpaidBreakMinutes         Int                      @default(0)
  clockInMethod              String?
  clockOutMethod             String?
  clockInDeviceId            String?
  clockOutDeviceId           String?
  clockInLocation            Json?
  clockOutLocation           Json?
  attendanceStatus           String?
  actualWorkedMinutes        Int?

  updatedAt                  DateTime                 @updatedAt

  @@index([deletedAt])
}
```

```prisma
// Full path: /home/luanngo/boss-dev/server/prisma/schemas/accounting.prisma
enum StatementGroup {
  REVENUE
  COST_OF_GOODS_SOLD
  EXPENSES
  OTHER_INCOME
  OTHER_EXPENSES
  UNMAPPED
}

enum TransactionPostingType {
  BANK_EXPENSE
  BANK_REVENUE
  TRANSFER
  CREDIT_CARD_PAYMENT
  PAYROLL_PAYMENT
  TAX_REMITTANCE
  OWNER_DRAW
  OWNER_CONTRIBUTION
}

enum AccountingRuleStatus {
  DRAFT
  ACTIVE
  PAUSED
  DEPRECATED
  NEEDS_REVIEW
}

enum RiskLevel {
  LOW
  MEDIUM
  HIGH
}

enum RuleSuggestionStatus {
  PENDING
  APPROVED
  REJECTED
  APPLIED
}

enum ProposalStatus {
  PENDING
  APPROVED
  REJECTED
  APPLIED
  SUPERSEDED
}

model BankTransaction {
  id                      Int                    @id @default(autoincrement())
  date                    DateTime
  description             String
  amount                  Float
  taxes                   Float?
  type                    String?
  balance                 Float?
  categoryId              String?
  receiptId               String?
  organizationId          String
  sourceId                String?
  userId                  String
  notes                   String?
  postingType             TransactionPostingType?
  createdAt               DateTime               @default(now())
  updatedAt               DateTime               @updatedAt
  deductionRate           Float?
  taxCreditClaim          Float?
  confirmed               Boolean?
  externalId              Int?
  receiptMatchStatus      String                 @default("UNMATCHED")
  receiptMatchConfidence  Float?
  receiptMatchReviewed    Boolean                @default(false)
  receiptMatchReviewedAt  DateTime?
  receiptMatchReviewedBy  String?

  user                    User                   @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  source                  Source?                @relation(fields: [sourceId], references: [id])
  organization            Organization           @relation("OrgBankTransactions", fields: [organizationId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  category                AccountingCategory?    @relation("CategoryTransactions", fields: [categoryId], references: [id])
  receipt                 Receipt?               @relation("ReceiptBankTransactions", fields: [receiptId], references: [id])
  journalEntry            JournalEntry?          @relation("BankTxToJournalEntry")
  proposals               AccountingProposal[]   @relation("BankTxProposals")
  matchCandidates         ReceiptMatchCandidate[] @relation("BankTxMatchCandidates")
  groupMemberships        TransactionGroupMember[] @relation("BankTxGroupMembers")

  @@index([organizationId])
  @@index([organizationId, postingType])
  @@index([organizationId, receiptMatchStatus])
  @@index([receiptId])
}

model ReceiptMatchCandidate {
  id                String   @id @default(cuid())
  organizationId    String
  receiptId         String
  bankTransactionId Int

  status            String   @default("CANDIDATE")
  confidence        Float
  confidenceLabel   String

  amountScore       Float    @default(0)
  dateScore         Float    @default(0)
  vendorScore       Float    @default(0)
  descriptionScore  Float    @default(0)
  keywordScore      Float    @default(0)
  taxScore          Float    @default(0)
  sourceScore       Float    @default(0)
  priorMatchScore   Float    @default(0)

  amountDelta       Float?
  dateDeltaDays     Int?
  matchReasons      Json?

  createdAt         DateTime @default(now())
  reviewedAt        DateTime?
  reviewedBy        String?

  receipt           Receipt        @relation("ReceiptCandidates", fields: [receiptId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  bankTransaction   BankTransaction @relation("BankTxMatchCandidates", fields: [bankTransactionId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  organization      Organization   @relation("OrgMatchCandidates", fields: [organizationId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@index([organizationId, bankTransactionId])
  @@index([organizationId, receiptId])
  @@index([organizationId, status])
}

model AccountingCategory {
  id             String              @id @default(cuid())

  @@index([statementGroup, sortOrder])
  @@map("AccountingCategories")
}

}

}

model AccountingRule {
  id              String               @id @default(cuid())
  name            String
  sql             String
  organization    Organization         @relation(fields: [organizationId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  organizationId  String
  patterns        String?
  autoApplyTaxes  Boolean?             @default(false)
  requiredReceipt Boolean?             @default(false)
  autoCategory    Boolean?             @default(false)
  categoryId      String?
  category        AccountingCategory?  @relation("RuleCategory", fields: [categoryId], references: [id])
  status          AccountingRuleStatus @default(ACTIVE)
  priority        Int                  @default(500)
  riskLevel       RiskLevel?
  confidence      Float?
  approvedCount   Int                  @default(0)
  overrideCount   Int                  @default(0)
  lastMatchedAt   DateTime?
  lastAppliedAt   DateTime?
  createdAt       DateTime             @default(now())
  updatedAt       DateTime             @updatedAt

  transactionGroupId String?  @unique
  transactionGroup   TransactionGroup? @relation("GroupLinkedRule", fields: [transactionGroupId], references: [id])

  suggestions     AccountingRuleSuggestion[] @relation("ApprovedRuleToSuggestion")

  @@index([transactionGroupId])
  @@map("AccountingRules")
}

model AccountingProposal {

  updatedAt                DateTime       @updatedAt

  organization  Organization       @relation("OrgAccountingProposals", fields: [organizationId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  bankTx        BankTransaction    @relation("BankTxProposals", fields: [transactionId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  suggestedAccount AccountingCategory? @relation("ProposalAccount", fields: [suggestedAccountId], references: [id])

  @@index([organizationId, status])
  @@index([transactionId])
}

model TransactionGroup {
  id                  String   @id @default(cuid())
  organizationId      String
  groupKey            String
  normalizedMerchant  String
  sourceId            String?
  sourceType          String
  direction           String
  amountSign          String
  transactionCount    Int      @default(0)
  incompleteCount     Int      @default(0)
  totalAmount         Float    @default(0)
  dateRangeStart      DateTime?
  dateRangeEnd        DateTime?
  status              String   @default("ACTIVE")
  linkedRuleId        String?  @unique
  linkedSuggestionId  String?
  lastComputedAt      DateTime @default(now())
  createdAt           DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt           DateTime @updatedAt

  semanticType        String?

  organization        Organization              @relation("OrgTransactionGroups", fields: [organizationId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  members             TransactionGroupMember[]
  suggestions         AccountingRuleSuggestion[] @relation("GroupRuleSuggestions")
  linkedRule          AccountingRule?            @relation("GroupLinkedRule")

  @@index([organizationId, status])
  @@index([organizationId, groupKey])
  @@index([organizationId, semanticType])
  @@map("TransactionGroups")
}

model TransactionGroupMember {

  transaction         BankTransaction  @relation("BankTxGroupMembers", fields: [bankTransactionId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@unique([transactionGroupId, bankTransactionId])
  @@index([transactionGroupId])
  @@index([bankTransactionId])
  @@map("TransactionGroupMembers")
}

model AccountingRuleSuggestion {
  id                        String               @id @default(cuid())
  organizationId            String
  status                    RuleSuggestionStatus @default(PENDING)
  suggestedRuleJson         String
  matchedTransactionIdsJson String?
  impactSummaryJson         String?
  confidence                Float?
  riskLevel                 RiskLevel?
  reason                    String?
  approvedRuleId            String?
  transactionGroupId        String?
  createdAt                 DateTime             @default(now())
  approvedAt                DateTime?
  rejectedAt                DateTime?
  approvedByUserId          String?

  organization    Organization        @relation("OrgRuleSuggestions", fields: [organizationId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  approvedRule    AccountingRule?     @relation("ApprovedRuleToSuggestion", fields: [approvedRuleId], references: [id])
  transactionGroup TransactionGroup?  @relation("GroupRuleSuggestions", fields: [transactionGroupId], references: [id])

  @@index([organizationId, status])
  @@index([transactionGroupId])
}

model ImportRecord {
  id             String       @id @default(cuid())
  source         Source?      @relation(fields: [sourceId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  sourceId       String?
  filePath       String
  scriptPath     String?
  jsonPath       String?
  transactions   String
  status         String       @default("PENDING_VERIFICATION")
  organization   Organization @relation("OrganizationImportRecords", fields: [organizationId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  organizationId String
  user           User         @relation("UserImportRecords", fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  userId         String
  createdAt      DateTime     @default(now())
  updatedAt      DateTime     @updatedAt
  importedAt     DateTime?
}

model PayrollRecord {
  id                String              @id @default(cuid())
  user              User                @relation("UserPayrollRecords", fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  userId            String
  payrollSchedule   PayrollSchedule     @relation(fields: [payrollScheduleId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  payrollScheduleId String
  weekStart         DateTime
  weekEnd           DateTime
  hourlyWage        Float
  allowableHours    Float
  bonus             Float               @default(0)
  tips              Float               @default(0)
  totalPay          Float               @default(0)
  notes             String?
  createdAt         DateTime            @default(now())
  updatedAt         DateTime            @updatedAt
  scheduledHours    Float               @default(0)
  actualHours       Float               @default(0)
  visible           Boolean             @default(false)

  adjustments       PayrollAdjustment[]

  @@unique([userId, weekStart])
}

model PayrollAdjustment {
  id               String         @id @default(cuid())
  payrollRecord    PayrollRecord  @relation(fields: [payrollRecordId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  payrollRecordId  String
  name             String
  amount           Float
  date             DateTime
  notes            String?
  createdAt        DateTime       @default(now())
  updatedAt        DateTime       @updatedAt
}

model PayrollSchedule {
  id              String           @id @default(cuid())
  organization    Organization     @relation("OrganizationPayrollSchedules", fields: [organizationId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  organizationId  String
  startWeek       DateTime
  endWeek         DateTime
  status          String
  notes           String?
  payrollRecords  PayrollRecord[]
  createdAt       DateTime         @default(now())
  updatedAt       DateTime         @updatedAt
}

model AccountingSuggestionMemory {
  id                 String   @id @default(cuid())
  organizationId     String
  vendorNormalized   String?
  sourceType         String?
  descriptionPattern String?
  receiptMerchant    String?
  accountCode        String?
  taxTreatment       String?
  transactionType    String?
  createdBy          String?
  usageCount         Int      @default(1)
  createdAt          DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt          DateTime @updatedAt

  @@index([organizationId, vendorNormalized])
  @@index([organizationId, descriptionPattern])
  @@index([organizationId, sourceType])
}
```

```prisma
model Contact {
  id             String       @id @default(cuid())
  name           String
  phone          String?
  email          String?
  address        String?

  organizationId String
  organization   Organization @relation(fields: [organizationId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  userId         String

  phoneCalls     PhoneCall[]  @relation("ContactPhoneCalls")
  phoneMessages  PhoneMessage[]

  categoryId     String?

  bookings       Booking[]    @relation("BookingContacts")

  orders         Order[]      @relation("ContactOrderRelation")

  emails         Email[]      @relation("ContactEmails")

  createdAt      DateTime     @default(now())
  updatedAt      DateTime     @updatedAt

  @@index([organizationId])
}

model PhoneCall {
  id             String      @id @default(cuid())
  from           String
  to             String
  callUUID       String      @unique
  direction      String
  status         String?
  recordingUrl   String?
  transcription  String?

  contactId      String?

  organizationId String      @default("defaultOrg")

  bookingId      String?
  booking        Booking?    @relation("BookingPhoneCalls", fields: [bookingId], references: [id])

  createdAt      DateTime    @default(now())
  updatedAt      DateTime    @updatedAt

  @@index([bookingId])
  @@index([organizationId])
  @@map("PhoneCalls")
}

  id        String    @id @default(cuid())

  contacts  Contact[]
  createdAt DateTime  @default(now())
}
model Booking {
  id             String      @id @default(cuid())
  eventTitle     String?
  eventStartTime DateTime?
  eventEndTime   DateTime?

  eventStartLocal String?
  eventEndLocal   String?
  eventTimezone   String?     @default("America/Toronto")

  partyType      String?
  attendance     String?
  services       Json?       @default("[]")
  status         Json?       @default("[]")
  rentalRate     Float?
  rentalFee      Float?
  minSpend       Float?
  price          Float?
  customFields   Json?

  contacts       Contact[]   @relation("BookingContacts")

  organizationId String
  organization   Organization @relation("BookingOrganization", fields: [organizationId], references: [id])

  userId         String
  user           User        @relation("BookingUser", fields: [userId], references: [id])

  orders         Order[]     @relation("BookingOrderRelation")

  emails         Email[]     @relation("BookingEmails")
  phoneCalls     PhoneCall[] @relation("BookingPhoneCalls")
  phoneMessages  PhoneMessage[] @relation("BookingPhoneMessages")

  createdAt      DateTime    @default(now())
  updatedAt      DateTime    @updatedAt
}
```

```prisma
// Full path: /home/luanngo/boss-dev/server/prisma/schemas/chat.prisma
// server/prisma/schemas/chat.prisma

model ChatRoom {
  id             String        @id @default(cuid())
  name           String
  description    String?
  isPrivate      Boolean       @default(false)
  organization   Organization? @relation("OrganizationChatRooms", fields: [organizationId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  organizationId String?
  createdAt      DateTime      @default(now())
  updatedAt      DateTime      @updatedAt
  shiftNotify      Boolean      @default(false)
  chats          Chat[]        @relation("ChatRoomChats")
  threads        Thread[]      @relation("ChatRoomThreads")
  participants   User[]        @relation("ChatRoomParticipants") 
  mutedBy        UserMutedChatRoom[]

  @@index([organizationId])
}

model Thread {
  id          String    @id @default(cuid())
  title       String
  chatRoom    ChatRoom  @relation("ChatRoomThreads", fields: [chatRoomId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  chatRoomId  String
  chats       Chat[]    @relation("ThreadChats")
  createdAt   DateTime  @default(now())
  updatedAt   DateTime  @updatedAt
}

model Chat {
  id                   String             @id @default(cuid())
  content              String
  sender               User               @relation("SenderChats", fields: [senderId], references: [id],onDelete: Cascade)
  senderId             String
  chatRoom             ChatRoom           @relation("ChatRoomChats", fields: [chatRoomId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  chatRoomId           String
  thread               Thread             @relation("ThreadChats", fields: [threadId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  threadId             String
  updatedAt            DateTime           @updatedAt
  attachments          ChatAttachment[] 
  requiresConfirmation Boolean            @default(false)
  isImportant          Boolean            @default(false)
  importantExpiresAt   DateTime?
  isPinned             Boolean            @default(false)

  readReceipts         ChatReadReceipt[]
  dismissedBy          UserDismissedChat[]
  taggedUsers          ChatTaggedUser[]
  chatReactions        ChatReaction[]
}

model ChatAttachment {
  id        String   @id @default(cuid())
  url       String
  filename  String
  mimetype  String
  size      Int
  chat      Chat?    @relation(fields: [chatId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  chatId    String?
  createdAt DateTime @default(now())
}

model ChatReadReceipt {
  id               String    @id @default(cuid())
  chat             Chat      @relation(fields: [chatId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  chatId           String
  user             User      @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  userId           String
  readAt           DateTime?
  confirmedAt      DateTime?
  popupConfirmedAt DateTime?

  createdAt        DateTime  @default(now())
  updatedAt        DateTime  @updatedAt

  @@unique([chatId, userId])
}

model UserDismissedChat {
  id        String   @id @default(cuid())
  user      User     @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  userId    String
  chat      Chat     @relation(fields: [chatId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  chatId    String
  createdAt DateTime @default(now())

  @@unique([userId, chatId])
}

model UserMutedChatRoom {
  id          String   @id @default(cuid())
  user        User     @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  userId      String
  chatRoom    ChatRoom @relation(fields: [chatRoomId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  chatRoomId  String
  createdAt   DateTime @default(now())

  @@unique([userId, chatRoomId])
}

model ChatTaggedUser {
  id        String   @id @default(cuid())
  user      User     @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  userId    String
  chat      Chat     @relation(fields: [chatId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  chatId    String
  createdAt DateTime @default(now())

  @@unique([userId, chatId])
}

model ChatReaction {
  id        String   @id @default(cuid())
  chat      Chat     @relation(fields: [chatId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  chatId    String
  user      User     @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  userId    String
  emoji     String
  createdAt DateTime @default(now())

  @@unique([chatId, userId, emoji])
  @@index([chatId])
}
```

```prisma
// Full path: /home/luanngo/boss-dev/server/prisma/schemas/email.prisma
model EmailAccount {
  id               String         @id @default(cuid())
  accountType      String
  emailAddress     String
  accessToken      String?
  refreshToken     String?
  active           Boolean        @default(true)
  googleId         String?        @unique
  microsoftId      String?        @unique
  userId           String?
  user             User?          @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  organizationId   String?
  organization     Organization?  @relation("OrganizationEmailAccounts", fields: [organizationId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  mailcowMailboxId String?        @unique
  mailcowMailbox   MailcowMailbox? @relation("MailcowMailboxEmailAccount", fields: [mailcowMailboxId], references: [id], onDelete: SetNull)
  mailcowPasswordEncrypted String? @map("mailcowPassword")
  allowedUsers     User[]         @relation("AllowedEmailAccounts")
  tenantId         String?
  emails           Email[]
  backgroundInfo   BackgroundInfo? @relation("EmailAccountBackgroundInfo", fields: [backgroundInfoId], references: [id])
  backgroundInfoId String?         @unique

  tags             Tag[]          @relation("EmailAccountTags")
  syncStates       EmailAccountSyncState[]

  createdAt        DateTime       @default(now())
  updatedAt        DateTime       @updatedAt

  @@unique([emailAddress, userId, organizationId])
}

model BackgroundInfo {
  id           String        @id @default(cuid())
  info         String
  emailAccount EmailAccount? @relation("EmailAccountBackgroundInfo")
  createdAt    DateTime      @default(now())
  updatedAt    DateTime      @updatedAt
}

model Email {
  id                String         @id @default(cuid())
  providerId        String
  subject           String
  sender            String
  recipients        String
  date              DateTime
  account           EmailAccount   @relation(fields: [accountId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  accountId         String
  isRead            Boolean        @default(false)
  hasReplied        Boolean        @default(false)
  isProcessed       Boolean        @default(false)
  threadId          String?
  summary           String?
  content           String?
  isImportant       Boolean        @default(false)
  isPinned          Boolean        @default(false)
  createdAt         DateTime       @default(now())
  updatedAt         DateTime       @updatedAt
  folder            String         @default("INBOX")
  attachments       Attachment[]   @relation("EmailAttachments")
  tags              Tag[]          @relation("EmailTags")
  requiresReply     Boolean        @default(false)
  unsubscribeType   String?
  unsubscribeLink   String?
  fromHeader        String?
  replyToHeader     String?
  inReplyToHeader   String?
  referencesHeader  String?
  messageIdHeader   String?
  bookingId         String?
  booking           Booking?       @relation("BookingEmails", fields: [bookingId], references: [id])
  contactId         String?
  contact           Contact?       @relation("ContactEmails", fields: [contactId], references: [id])

  @@unique([providerId, accountId])
}

model Attachment {
  id        String   @id @default(cuid())
  filename  String
  mimeType  String
  url       String
  email     Email    @relation("EmailAttachments", fields: [emailId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  emailId   String
  createdAt DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt DateTime @updatedAt
}

model Tag {
  id             String        @id @default(cuid())
  name           String
  description    String?
  priority       Int           @default(0)

  emailAccountId String?
  emailAccount   EmailAccount? @relation("EmailAccountTags", fields: [emailAccountId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  emails         Email[]       @relation("EmailTags")

  @@unique([name, emailAccountId])
}

model EmailAccountSyncState {
  id              String   @id @default(cuid())
  emailAccountId  String
  emailAccount    EmailAccount @relation(fields: [emailAccountId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  provider        String   // "gmail" | "outlook" | "mailcow"
  scope           String   // "inbox" | "sentitems" | "archive" | "deleteditems" | "drafts"
  cursor          String?  // Gmail historyId, Graph deltaLink, or equivalent
  lastSyncAt      DateTime?
  lastFullSyncAt  DateTime?
  errorCount      Int      @default(0)
  lastErrorAt     DateTime?
  lastErrorMsg    String?
  backoffUntil    DateTime?
  createdAt       DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt       DateTime @updatedAt

  @@unique([emailAccountId, provider, scope])
  @@index([emailAccountId])
}
```

```prisma
// Full path: /home/luanngo/boss-dev/server/prisma/schemas/note.prisma
// Best-effort updated schema section based on the uploaded note.prisma snippet.
// This version adds list-level categories and item-level categories for lists.

enum NoteSharePermission {
  VIEWER
  EDITOR
}

enum NoteCategoryScope {
  USER
  ORGANIZATION
  GLOBAL
}

enum TaskPriority {
  LOW
  MEDIUM
  HIGH
  URGENT
}

enum ListKind {
  CHECKLIST
  GROCERY
}

enum ListMode {
  SINGLE_USE
  TEMPLATE
}

enum ListShareScope {
  PRIVATE
  ORGANIZATION
  SELECTED_USERS
  ORGANIZATION_LINK
}

model Note {
  id             String        @id @default(uuid())
  title          String
  isOrganization Boolean       @default(false)
  isGlobal       Boolean       @default(false)
  pinned         Boolean       @default(false)
  lastOpenedAt   DateTime?
  userId         String?
  organizationId String?
  categoryId     String?
  projectId      String?

  user           User?         @relation("UserNotes", fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  organization   Organization? @relation("OrganizationNotes", fields: [organizationId], references: [id])
  category       NoteCategory? @relation("NoteCategoryNotes", fields: [categoryId], references: [id])
  project        Project?      @relation(fields: [projectId], references: [id])

  snippets       NoteSnippet[] @relation("NoteSnippets")
  shares         NoteShare[]
  createdAt      DateTime      @default(now())
  updatedAt      DateTime      @updatedAt

  @@index([userId])
  @@index([organizationId])
  @@index([projectId])
  @@index([pinned])
  @@index([lastOpenedAt])
}

model NoteShare {
  id          String              @id @default(cuid())
  noteId      String
  userId      String
  permission  NoteSharePermission @default(VIEWER)
  createdAt   DateTime            @default(now())
  updatedAt   DateTime            @updatedAt

  note        Note                @relation(fields: [noteId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  user        User                @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@unique([noteId, userId])
  @@index([noteId])
  @@index([userId])
}

model NoteSnippet {
  id         String   @id @default(uuid())
  content    String
  title      String?
  source     String?
  aiSummary  String?
  userId     String
  orderIndex Int
  noteId     String
  note       Note     @relation("NoteSnippets", fields: [noteId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  createdAt  DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt  DateTime @updatedAt

  @@index([noteId])
}

model Task {
  id             String        @id @default(cuid())
  title          String?
  description    String?
  isCompleted    Boolean       @default(false)
  startDate      DateTime?
  dueDate        DateTime?
  reminderAt     DateTime?
  reminderSentAt DateTime?
  projectId      String?
  userId         String
  assignedUsers  User[]        @relation("TaskAssignedUsers")
  categoryId     String?
  dependencyId   String?
  priority       TaskPriority  @default(MEDIUM)
  position       Int           @default(0)

  user           User          @relation("UserTasks", fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  category       TaskCategory? @relation("TaskCategoryTasks", fields: [categoryId], references: [id])
  project        Project?      @relation(fields: [projectId], references: [id])
  dependency     Task?         @relation("TaskDependency", fields: [dependencyId], references: [id])
  dependents     Task[]        @relation("TaskDependency")

  createdAt      DateTime      @default(now())
  updatedAt      DateTime      @updatedAt

  @@index([userId])
  @@index([projectId])
  @@index([projectId, position])
  @@index([isCompleted, reminderAt])
  @@index([reminderSentAt])
}

model Project {
  id             String        @id @default(cuid())
  name           String
  description    String?
  ownerId        String
  organizationId String?
  tasks          Task[]
  notes          Note[]

  createdAt      DateTime      @default(now())
  updatedAt      DateTime      @updatedAt
  archived       Boolean       @default(false)
  memberRoles    Json?

  owner          User          @relation("UserProjects", fields: [ownerId], references: [id])
  organization   Organization? @relation("OrganizationProjects", fields: [organizationId], references: [id])
  members        User[]        @relation("ProjectMembers")

  @@index([organizationId, archived])
}

model NoteCategory {
  id          String            @id @default(cuid())
  name        String
  scopeType   NoteCategoryScope @default(USER)
  scopeId     String?
  createdById String?
  notes       Note[]            @relation("NoteCategoryNotes")
  createdAt   DateTime          @default(now())
  updatedAt   DateTime          @updatedAt

  @@unique([name, scopeType, scopeId])
  @@index([scopeType, scopeId])
}

model TaskCategory {
  id             String       @id @default(cuid())
  name           String
  organizationId String       @default("cm5et7qse0000yqc7m6p8e500")

  organization   Organization @relation(fields: [organizationId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  tasks          Task[]       @relation("TaskCategoryTasks")

  createdAt      DateTime     @default(now())
  updatedAt      DateTime     @updatedAt

  @@unique([organizationId, name])
  @@index([organizationId])
}

model List {
  id                String         @id @default(cuid())
  title             String
  description       String?
  categoriesJson    String         @default("[]")
  kind              ListKind       @default(CHECKLIST)
  mode              ListMode       @default(SINGLE_USE)
  shareScope        ListShareScope @default(PRIVATE)
  shareToken        String         @unique @default(cuid())
  sharedUserIdsJson String         @default("[]")
  ownerUserId       String
  organizationId    String
  sourceTemplateId  String?
  archived          Boolean        @default(false)
  useHtmlEditor     Boolean        @default(false)
  createdAt         DateTime       @default(now())
  updatedAt         DateTime       @updatedAt

  owner             User           @relation("UserOwnedLists", fields: [ownerUserId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  organization      Organization   @relation("OrganizationLists", fields: [organizationId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  sourceTemplate    List?          @relation("ListTemplateInstances", fields: [sourceTemplateId], references: [id])
  templateInstances List[]         @relation("ListTemplateInstances")
  items             ListItem[]

  @@index([organizationId, mode, archived])
  @@index([ownerUserId, mode, archived])
  @@index([shareScope, organizationId, archived])
  @@index([sourceTemplateId])
}

model ListItem {
  id                 String    @id @default(cuid())
  listId             String
  text               String
  imageUrl           String?
  note               String?
  quantity           String?
  itemCategoriesJson String    @default("[]")
  level              Int       @default(0)
  isCompleted        Boolean   @default(false)
  completedAt        DateTime?
  completedByUserId  String?
  sortOrder          Int       @default(0)
  createdAt          DateTime  @default(now())
  updatedAt          DateTime  @updatedAt

  list               List      @relation(fields: [listId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  completedByUser    User?     @relation("CompletedListItems", fields: [completedByUserId], references: [id])

  @@index([listId, sortOrder])
  @@index([completedByUserId])
}
```

```prisma
// Full path: /home/luanngo/boss-dev/server/prisma/schemas/onboarding.prisma

model PaymentProvider {
  id               String           @id @default(cuid())
  name             String           @unique
  displayName      String
  active           Boolean          @default(true)
  configSchema     Json?            // JSON schema for provider-specific config fields
  merchantAccounts MerchantAccount[]
  createdAt        DateTime         @default(now())
  updatedAt        DateTime         @updatedAt
}

model MerchantAccount {
  id               String           @id @default(cuid())
  provider         PaymentProvider  @relation(fields: [providerId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  providerId       String
  organization     Organization     @relation(fields: [organizationId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  organizationId   String
  label            String?          // user-friendly name
  currency         String           @default("USD")
  enabled          Boolean          @default(true)
  isActive         Boolean          @default(false)   // marked active after successful test
  config           Json?            // provider-specific credentials/config (encrypted ideally)
  testPassed       Boolean          @default(false)
  lastTestedAt     DateTime?
  createdAt        DateTime         @default(now())
  updatedAt        DateTime         @updatedAt

  @@unique([providerId, organizationId])
}

model OnboardingState {
  id               String       @id @default(cuid())
  organization     Organization @relation(fields: [organizationId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  organizationId   String       @unique

  // Completion flags (computed from actual data)
  roomCreated      Boolean      @default(false)
  tableCreated     Boolean      @default(false)
  tablesArranged   Boolean      @default(false)
  productCreated   Boolean      @default(false)
  orderCreated     Boolean      @default(false)
  posOrderCreated  Boolean      @default(false)
  merchantSetup    Boolean      @default(false)

  // Steps the user explicitly skipped
  skippedSteps     String       @default("[]") // JSON array of step names

  // Overall completion
  completed        Boolean      @default(false)
  completedAt      DateTime?

  createdAt        DateTime     @default(now())
  updatedAt        DateTime     @updatedAt
}
```

```prisma
// Full path: /home/luanngo/boss-dev/server/prisma/schemas/pos.prisma

model Room {
  id                String       @id @default(cuid())
  name              String       @unique
  
  // Relation to Table: "RoomTables"
  tables            Table[]      @relation("RoomTables")

  // Named relation to Organization
  organization      Organization @relation("OrganizationRooms", fields: [organizationId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  organizationId    String
  
  createdAt         DateTime     @default(now())
  updatedAt         DateTime     @updatedAt
}

model Table {
  id          String @id @default(cuid())
  number      Int
  seats       Int
  orders      Order[]

  organization Organization @relation("OrganizationTables", fields: [organizationId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  organizationId String

  room       Room    @relation("RoomTables", fields: [roomId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  roomId     String

  positionX  Int     @default(0) 
  positionY  Int     @default(0) 
  width      Int     @default(1) // Width in grid units
  height     Int     @default(1) // Height in grid units

  createdAt  DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt  DateTime @updatedAt

  @@unique([number, organizationId], name: "number_organizationId")
}

model Order {
  id               String      @id @default(cuid())
  table            Table?      @relation(fields: [tableId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  tableId          String?
  seatNumber       Int
  user             User?       @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  userId           String?
  status           String      @default("ORDERED")
  paymentStatus    Boolean     @default(false)
  paymentMethod    String?
  orderItems       OrderItem[]
  organization     Organization @relation(fields: [organizationId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  organizationId   String
  createdAt        DateTime    @default(now())
  updatedAt        DateTime    @updatedAt
  hidden           Boolean     @default(false)
  contactId        String?
  contact          Contact?    @relation("ContactOrderRelation", fields: [contactId], references: [id])
  bookingId        String?
  booking          Booking?    @relation("BookingOrderRelation", fields: [bookingId], references: [id])
  notes            String?
  phoneNumber      String?
  emailAddress     String?
  customerName     String?
  squarePaymentId  String?
  squareOrderId    String?     @unique
  salesTransaction SalesTransaction?
  
  // NEW: Added a dedicated, unique field for the Uber Eats Order ID
  uberEatsOrderId  String?     @unique

  @@index([tableId])
  @@index([bookingId])
}
model ProductCategory {
  id             String         @id @default(cuid())
  name           String
  organization   Organization   @relation("OrganizationProductCategories", fields: [organizationId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  organizationId String
  products       Product[]      @relation("CategoryProducts")
  createdAt      DateTime       @default(now())
  updatedAt      DateTime       @updatedAt

  hiddenOnPOS    Boolean        @default(false)
  hiddenOnPublic Boolean        @default(false)

  @@unique([name, organizationId], name: "name_organizationId")
}

model Product {
  id             String           @id @default(cuid())
  name           String
  sku            String           @unique
  description    String?
  price          Float
  inStock        Boolean          @default(true)
  active         Boolean          @default(true)
  public         Boolean          @default(true)
  canBuyOnline   Boolean          @default(true)
  
  category       ProductCategory  @relation("CategoryProducts", fields: [categoryId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  categoryId     String

  variants       ProductVariant[] @relation("ProductVariants")

  organization   Organization     @relation("OrganizationProducts", fields: [organizationId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  organizationId String

  image          String?
  createdAt      DateTime         @default(now())
  updatedAt      DateTime         @updatedAt
  orderItems     OrderItem[]

  taxable      Boolean  @default(true)
  tippable     Boolean  @default(true)
  uberEatsId   String? 

  isMultiVariant    Boolean  @default(false)
  variantGroupOrder String   @default("")
  comboRules        Json?

  @@unique([name, categoryId, organizationId])
}

model ProductVariant {
  id                   String                       @id @default(cuid())
  name                 String
  sku                  String                       @unique
  additionalPrice      Float                        @default(0.0)
  inStock              Boolean                      @default(true)
  active               Boolean                      @default(true)
  public               Boolean                      @default(true)
  canBuyOnline         Boolean                      @default(true)
  product              Product                      @relation("ProductVariants", fields: [productId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  productId            String
  description          String?
  image                String?
  createdAt            DateTime                     @default(now())
  updatedAt            DateTime                     @default(now())
  orderItems           OrderItem[]                  @relation("LegacyOrderItemVariant")
  orderItemsSelectedIn OrderItemSelectedVariant[]

  taxable              Boolean                      @default(true)
  tippable             Boolean                      @default(true)
  uberEatsId           String?
  groupName            String?
  isDefault            Boolean                      @default(false)

  @@unique([name, productId])
}

model OrderItem {
  id               String                       @id @default(cuid())
  order            Order                        @relation(fields: [orderId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  orderId          String
  product          Product?                     @relation(fields: [productId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  productId        String?
  variant          ProductVariant?              @relation("LegacyOrderItemVariant", fields: [variantId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  variantId        String?
  customName       String?
  notes            String?
  quantity         Int                          @default(1)
  seatNumber       Int
  price            Float
  taxable          Boolean?
  tippable         Boolean?
  createdAt        DateTime                     @default(now())
  updatedAt        DateTime                     @updatedAt
  status           String                       @default("ACTIVE")
  selectedVariants OrderItemSelectedVariant[]
}

model OrderItemSelectedVariant {
  id          String         @id @default(cuid())
  orderItem   OrderItem      @relation(fields: [orderItemId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  orderItemId String
  variant     ProductVariant @relation(fields: [variantId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  variantId   String

  @@unique([orderItemId, variantId])
}
```

```prisma
model Receipt {
  id                 String             @id @default(cuid())
  date               DateTime?
  companyName        String?
  imgName            String?
  total              Float?
  hst                Float?
  notes              String?
  text               String?
  filePath           String?
  paymentType        String?
  paymentSourceId    String?
  paymentSource      Source?            @relation("ReceiptPaymentSource", fields: [paymentSourceId], references: [id])

  imageRelativePath  String?
  imageStorageStatus String             @default("ACTIVE")
  imageArchivedAt    DateTime?
  imageArchiveBatchId String?
  imageStorageChecksum String?
  imageStorageSize   Int?
  originalImageRelativePath String?
  originalImageChecksum String?
  originalImageSize   Int?
  compressedImageRelativePath String?
  compressedImageChecksum String?
  compressedImageSize Int?
  activeImageVariant String?
  compressionStatus String @default("NOT_OPTIMIZED")
  compressionProfile String?
  compressionScore Float?
  compressionSavedBytes Int?
  legibilityStatus String?
  legibilityCheckedAt DateTime?
  legibilityReportJson Json?
  autoCropApplied Boolean @default(false)
  autoCropReportJson Json?
  optimizedAt DateTime?
  optimizedByUserId String?

  createdAt          DateTime           @default(now())
  updatedAt          DateTime           @updatedAt
  organization       Organization       @relation(fields: [organizationId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  organizationId     String
  user               User               @relation("UserReceipts", fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  userId             String
  items              ReceiptItem[]
  active             Boolean            @default(true)
  bankTransactions   BankTransaction[]  @relation("ReceiptBankTransactions")
  matchCandidates    ReceiptMatchCandidate[] @relation("ReceiptCandidates")

  @@index([organizationId, imageStorageStatus])
  @@index([organizationId, imageArchivedAt])
  @@index([organizationId, active, createdAt])
}

model ReceiptItem {
  id        String   @id @default(cuid())
  name      String
  quantity  Int
  price     Float
  receipt   Receipt  @relation(fields: [receiptId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  receiptId String
  createdAt DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt DateTime @updatedAt
}

model Source {
  id               String            @id @default(cuid())
  name             String            @unique
  type             String            @default("")
  scriptPath       String
  organization     Organization      @relation(fields: [organizationId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  organizationId   String
  ledgerAccount    AccountingCategory? @relation("SourceLedgerAccount", fields: [ledgerAccountId], references: [id], onDelete: SetNull)
  ledgerAccountId  String?
  importRecords    ImportRecord[]
  bankTransactions BankTransaction[]
  receipts         Receipt[]         @relation("ReceiptPaymentSource")

  @@index([name, organizationId])
  @@index([organizationId, ledgerAccountId])
}
```

```prisma
// Full path: /home/luanngo/boss-dev/server/prisma/schemas/user.prisma
model User {
  id                   String               @id @default(cuid())
  username             String
  email                String
  password             String
  phoneNumber          String?
  role                 String               @default("USER")
  firstName            String?
  lastName             String?
  dateOfBirth          DateTime?
  address              String?
  sin                  String?
  pay                  Float?
  payType              String?
  rank                 Float?

  organization         Organization         @relation(fields: [organizationId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  organizationId       String

  receipts             Receipt[]            @relation("UserReceipts")
  bankTransactions     BankTransaction[]
  conversations        AIConversation[]
  aiInstructionCaches  AIInstructionCache[]
  emailAccounts        EmailAccount[]
  importRecords        ImportRecord[]       @relation("UserImportRecords")
  createdAt            DateTime             @default(now())
  updatedAt            DateTime             @default(now())
  orders               Order[]

  sentChats            Chat[]               @relation("SenderChats")
  chatRooms            ChatRoom[]           @relation("ChatRoomParticipants")
  chatReadReceipts     ChatReadReceipt[]
  dismissedChats       UserDismissedChat[]
  mutedChatRooms       UserMutedChatRoom[]
  taggedInChats        ChatTaggedUser[]

  permissions          Permission[]         @relation("UserPermissions")
  notes                Note[]               @relation("UserNotes")
  noteShares           NoteShare[]
  tasks                Task[]               @relation("UserTasks")
  assignedTasks        Task[]               @relation("TaskAssignedUsers")

  phoneMessage         PhoneMessage[]       @relation("UserPhoneMessage")
  phoneCall            PhoneCall[]          @relation("UserPhoneCall")

  pushSubscription     PushSubscription[]   @relation("WebPush")
  notifications        Notification[]
  status               String               @default("OFFLINE")

  projects             Project[]            @relation("UserProjects")
  memberProjects       Project[]            @relation("ProjectMembers")

  contacts             Contact[]
  active               Boolean              @default(true)
  deletedAt            DateTime?
  deletionRequestedAt  DateTime?
  timezone             String?

  ownedLists         List[]     @relation("UserOwnedLists")
  completedListItems ListItem[] @relation("CompletedListItems")

  bookings             Booking[]            @relation("BookingUser")
  allowedEmailAccounts EmailAccount[]       @relation("AllowedEmailAccounts")

  passwordRecoveries   PasswordRecovery[]
  shifts               Shift[]              @relation("UserShifts")
  shiftTemplates       ShiftTemplate[]      @relation("TemplateEmployee")
  approvedAttendanceShifts Shift[]          @relation("AttendanceApprovedBy")
  attendanceEditedShifts Shift[]            @relation("AttendanceEditedBy")
  publishedShifts      Shift[]              @relation("ShiftPublishedBy")
  deletedShifts        Shift[]              @relation("ShiftDeletedBy")
  scheduleWeeksPublished ScheduleWeek[]     @relation("ScheduleWeekPublishedBy")

  availabilityWindows  UserAvailabilityWindow[] @relation("AvailabilityEmployee")
  timeOffRequests      UserTimeOff[]        @relation("TimeOffEmployee")

  scheduleChangeLogs   ScheduleChangeLog[]  @relation("LogActor")

  payrollRecords       PayrollRecord[]      @relation("UserPayrollRecords")

  givenFeedback        EmployeeFeedback[]   @relation("ManagerFeedback")
  receivedFeedback     EmployeeFeedback[]   @relation("EmployeeFeedback")

  authoredManagementNotes   ManagementNote[] @relation("NoteAuthor")
  receivedManagementNotes   ManagementNote[] @relation("NoteEmployee")

  @@unique([organizationId, username])
  @@unique([organizationId, email])
}

model Shift {
  id                         String                   @id @default(cuid())
  employee                   User                     @relation("UserShifts", fields: [employeeId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  employeeId                 String
  templateId                 String?
  template                   ShiftTemplate?           @relation(fields: [templateId], references: [id], onDelete: SetNull)
  date                       DateTime
  startTime                  DateTime
  endTime                    DateTime
  shiftType                  String
  status                     String                   @default("draft")
  notes                      String?
  cancellationReason         String?
  requiredQualificationNames Json?
  requiredCertificationNames Json?
  minAge                     Int?
  alcoholServiceRequired     Boolean                  @default(false)
  maxDailyHoursOverride      Float?
  maxWeeklyHoursOverride     Float?
  minimumRestHoursOverride   Float?
  constraintWarnings         Json?
  auditReason                String?
  clockIn                    DateTime?
  clockOut                   DateTime?
  attendanceNotes            String?
  paidBreakMinutes           Int                      @default(0)
  unpaidBreakMinutes         Int                      @default(0)
  clockInMethod              String?
  clockOutMethod             String?
  clockInDeviceId            String?
  clockOutDeviceId           String?
  clockInLocation            Json?
  clockOutLocation           Json?
  attendanceStatus           String?
  actualWorkedMinutes        Int?
  lateMinutes                Int?
  earlyDepartureMinutes      Int?
  attendanceNeedsApproval    Boolean                  @default(false)
  attendanceApprovalNote     String?
  attendanceApprovedAt       DateTime?
  attendanceApprovedById     String?
  attendanceApprovedBy       User?                    @relation("AttendanceApprovedBy", fields: [attendanceApprovedById], references: [id], onDelete: SetNull)
  geofenceViolation          Boolean                  @default(false)
  geofenceDistanceMeters     Float?
  lastAttendanceEditById     String?
  lastAttendanceEditedBy     User?                    @relation("AttendanceEditedBy", fields: [lastAttendanceEditById], references: [id], onDelete: SetNull)
  publishedAt                DateTime?
  publishedById              String?
  publishedBy                User?                    @relation("ShiftPublishedBy", fields: [publishedById], references: [id], onDelete: SetNull)
  deletedAt                  DateTime?
  deletedById                String?
  deletedBy                  User?                    @relation("ShiftDeletedBy", fields: [deletedById], references: [id], onDelete: SetNull)
  breaks                     ShiftBreak[]
  notificationLogs           ScheduleNotificationLog[]
  createdAt                  DateTime                 @default(now())
  updatedAt                  DateTime                 @updatedAt

  @@index([employeeId, startTime])
  @@index([employeeId, date])
  @@index([status])
  @@index([templateId])
  @@index([deletedAt])
}

model Settings {
  id             String    @id @default(cuid())
  userId         String?
  organizationId String?

  settingValue   String

  @@unique([userId, settingName], name: "userSetting_unique")
  @@unique([organizationId, settingName], name: "orgSetting_unique")
}

  id             String        @id @default(cuid())
  action         String
  before         Json?
  after          Json?

  @@index([createdAt])
}

model EmployeeFeedback {
  id                 String                  @id @default(cuid())
  employee           User                    @relation("EmployeeFeedback", fields: [employeeId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  employeeId         String
  manager            User                    @relation("ManagerFeedback", fields: [managerId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  managerId          String
  type               String // "compliment" or "concern"
  rating             Int // 1 to 5
  details            String
  incidentDateTime   DateTime
  feedbackDateTime   DateTime                @default(now())
  employeeResponse   String?
  managementResponse String?
  photos             EmployeeFeedbackPhoto[]

  organizationId     String
  organization       Organization            @relation(fields: [organizationId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  createdAt          DateTime                @default(now())
  updatedAt          DateTime                @updatedAt

  @@index([employeeId])
  @@index([managerId])
  @@index([organizationId])
}

model ManagementNote {
  id             String       @id @default(cuid())
  content        String
  employee       User         @relation("NoteEmployee", fields: [employeeId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  employeeId     String
  author         User         @relation("NoteAuthor", fields: [authorId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  organizationId String

  updatedAt      DateTime     @updatedAt

  @@index([organizationId])
}
```

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
FILE: server/src/middleware/auth.js
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
```js
// Full path: /home/luanngo/boss-dev/server/src/middleware/auth.js
// server/src/middleware/auth.js

import { getSession } from '#shared/utils/auth.js';
import { extractBearerToken } from '#shared/utils/bearerToken.js';
import jwt from 'jsonwebtoken';

const buildRequestUser = (decoded = {}) => {
  const normalizedUserId = decoded.userId || decoded.id || null;

  return {
    ...decoded,
    id: normalizedUserId,
    userId: normalizedUserId,
  };
};

const authenticate = async (req, res, next) => {
  if (req.headers['x-internal-request'] === 'true') {
    // For internal requests, set a minimal user context if none exists
    if (!req.user) {
      req.user = { organizationId: null, id: null, role: 'INTERNAL' };
    }
    return next();
  }

  const authHeader = req.headers.authorization;
  const hasBearerToken = authHeader && /^Bearer\s+/i.test(authHeader);

  if (hasBearerToken) {
    const token = extractBearerToken(authHeader);

    try {
      if (!process.env.JWT_SECRET) {
        console.error('JWT_SECRET is not defined in environment variables.');
        return res.status(500).json({ error: 'Server Configuration Error' });
      }

      const decoded = jwt.verify(token, process.env.JWT_SECRET);
      req.user = buildRequestUser(decoded);
      return next();
    } catch (err) {
      console.warn(`[Auth] JWT verification failed, attempting cookie/session fallback: ${err.message}`);
    }
  }

  const session = await getSession(req);
  if (session?.user) {
    req.user = session.user;
    req.session = session;
    return next();
  }

  if (hasBearerToken) {
    return res.status(401).json({
      error: 'Invalid or Expired Token',
      needsReauth: true,
    });
  }

  return res.status(401).json({ error: 'Unauthorized' });
};

export default authenticate;

```

FILE: server/src/middleware/errorHandler.js
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
```js
// Full path: /home/luanngo/boss-dev/server/src/middleware/errorHandler.js
// server/src/middleware/errorHandler.js
import { extractRequestContext, logAndReportError } from '../utils/logError.js';

export const errorHandler = (err, req, res, next) => {
  logAndReportError('Error:', err, extractRequestContext(req));

  if (err.code && err.code.startsWith('P')) {
    switch (err.code) {
      case 'P2002':
        return res.status(409).json({ error: 'Unique constraint failed on the fields: ' + err.meta.target });
      case 'P2003':
        return res.status(400).json({ error: 'Foreign key constraint failed on the field: ' + err.meta.field_name });
      default:
        return res.status(500).json({ error: 'Database error occurred.' });
    }
  }

  const statusCode = err.status || 500;
  res.status(statusCode).json({
    error: err.message || 'Internal Server Error',
  });
};

export const sendErrorResponse = (res, error, context = null) => {
  logAndReportError('Error:', error, context);
  const statusCode = error.status || 500;
  res.status(statusCode).json({
    error: error.message || 'Internal Server Error',
  });
};

```
