```js
// Full path: /home/luanngo/boss-dev/server/src/server.js
import { performance, PerformanceObserver } from 'perf_hooks';
import fs from 'fs';
import path from 'path';
import dotenv from 'dotenv';
import { logAndReportError } from './utils/logError.js';
import { flushConsoleCaptureWrites, setupConsoleCapture } from './utils/consoleCapture.js';

setupConsoleCapture();

// --- Global Unhandled Error Logging ---
process.on('unhandledRejection', (reason, promise) => {
  logAndReportError('Unhandled Rejection:', reason instanceof Error ? reason : new Error(String(reason)), {
    promise: String(promise),
  })
    .then(async () => {
      await flushConsoleCaptureWrites();
      if (process.env.NODE_ENV === 'production') process.exit(1);
    })
    .catch(async (error) => {
      console.error('Failed to log unhandled rejection:', error);
      await flushConsoleCaptureWrites();
      if (process.env.NODE_ENV === 'production') process.exit(1);
    });
});

process.on('uncaughtException', (err, origin) => {
  logAndReportError(`Caught exception (origin: ${origin}):`, err, { origin })
    .then(async () => {
      await flushConsoleCaptureWrites();
      if (process.env.NODE_ENV === 'production') process.exit(1);
    })
    .catch(async (error) => {
      console.error('Failed to log uncaught exception:', error);
      await flushConsoleCaptureWrites();
      if (process.env.NODE_ENV === 'production') process.exit(1);
    });
});

// Load environment variables based on NODE_ENV
const envFile = process.env.NODE_ENV === 'development' ? '.env.development' : '.env';
const envPath = path.resolve(process.cwd(), envFile);
if (fs.existsSync(envPath)) {
  dotenv.config({ path: envPath, override: true });
  console.log(`Loaded environment variables from ${envFile}`);
} else {
  dotenv.config();
  console.log('Loaded environment variables from default .env');
}

// Set a performance observer to log measurements
const obs = new PerformanceObserver((items) => {
  items.getEntries().forEach((entry) => {
    console.log(`${entry.name}: ${entry.duration.toFixed(2)}ms`);
  });
});
obs.observe({ entryTypes: ['measure'] });

// Mark the start of our initialization

// --- VAPID Setup ---
const VAPID_PUBLIC_KEY = process.env.VAPID_PUBLIC_KEY;

if (VAPID_PUBLIC_KEY && VAPID_PRIVATE_KEY) {
  webPush.setVapidDetails(
    process.env.VAPID_MAILTO || 'mailto:your_email@example.com',
    VAPID_PUBLIC_KEY,
    VAPID_PRIVATE_KEY
  );
  console.log('VAPID details set for web push notifications.');
} else {
  console.warn('VAPID keys not found in environment variables. Web push notifications will not work.');
}

// Mark before initializing Socket.IO
performance.mark('before-socket-io');
const allowedOrigins = process.env.CORS_ORIGINS
  ? process.env.CORS_ORIGINS.split(',').map((origin) => origin.trim())
  : ['http://localhost:3000'];

const io = new Server(server, {
  cors: {
    origin: allowedOrigins,
    methods: ['GET', 'POST'],
    credentials: true,
  },
});

// Mark after Socket.IO initialization
performance.mark('after-socket-io');
performance.measure('Socket.IO Initialization', 'before-socket-io', 'after-socket-io');

// Initialize shared socket module BEFORE loading services that might use it
performance.mark('before-socket-init');

performance.mark('after-socket-init');
performance.measure('Shared Socket Module Initialization', 'before-socket-init', 'after-socket-init');

const registerShutdownHook = (hook) => {
  if (typeof hook === 'function') {
    shutdownHooks.push(hook);
  }
};

const runMaybeAsync = async (fn, label) => {
  try {
    await fn();
    console.log(`${label} completed.`);
  } catch (error) {
    await logAndReportError(`${label} failed:`, error, { label });
  }
};

const registerModuleShutdownHooks = (moduleRef, moduleLabel) => {
  if (!moduleRef) return;

  const candidateFns = [
    { key: 'stop', label: `${moduleLabel}.stop` },
    { key: 'shutdown', label: `${moduleLabel}.shutdown` },
    { key: 'close', label: `${moduleLabel}.close` },
    { key: 'dispose', label: `${moduleLabel}.dispose` },
  ];

  for (const candidate of candidateFns) {
    if (typeof moduleRef[candidate.key] === 'function') {
      registerShutdownHook(async () => {
        await moduleRef[candidate.key]();
        console.log(`${candidate.label} completed.`);
      });
    }
  }

  if (typeof moduleRef.default === 'function') {
    registerShutdownHook(async () => {
      await moduleRef.default();
      console.log(`${moduleLabel}.default completed.`);
    });
  }
};

// --- Load Background Services/Jobs (Dynamic Imports) ---
(async () => {
  try {
    const emailSyncModule = await import('#services/email/services/emailSync.js');
    backgroundServiceModules.push({ label: 'emailSync', moduleRef: emailSyncModule });
    registerModuleShutdownHooks(emailSyncModule, 'emailSync');
    console.log('Email sync service loaded.');

    const shiftCheckInReminderModule = await import('./jobs/shiftCheckInReminder.js');
    backgroundServiceModules.push({ label: 'shiftCheckInReminder', moduleRef: shiftCheckInReminderModule });
    registerModuleShutdownHooks(shiftCheckInReminderModule, 'shiftCheckInReminder');
    console.log('Shift check-in reminder job loaded.');

    const aiManagerCronModule = await import('./jobs/aiManagerCron.js');
    backgroundServiceModules.push({ label: 'aiManagerCron', moduleRef: aiManagerCronModule });
    registerModuleShutdownHooks(aiManagerCronModule, 'aiManagerCron');
    console.log('AI manager cron job loaded.');

    const taskReminderCronModule = await import('./jobs/taskReminderCron.js');
    backgroundServiceModules.push({ label: 'taskReminderCron', moduleRef: taskReminderCronModule });
    registerModuleShutdownHooks(taskReminderCronModule, 'taskReminderCron');
    console.log('Task reminder cron job loaded.');
  } catch (err) {
    await logAndReportError('Failed to load background services:', err);
  }
})();

console.log('Allowed Origins:', allowedOrigins);

app.use(
  cors({
    origin(origin, callback) {
      if (!origin) return callback(null, true);

      if (!allowedOrigins.includes(origin)) {
        const msg = `The CORS policy for this site does not allow access from the specified Origin: ${origin}`;
        return callback(new Error(msg), false);
      }

      return callback(null, true);
    },
    methods: ['GET', 'POST', 'PUT', 'PATCH', 'DELETE', 'OPTIONS'],
    credentials: true,
    optionsSuccessStatus: 200,
  })
);

// --- Global Rate Limiter ---
const limiter = rateLimit({
  windowMs: 15 * 60 * 1000,
  max: 1000,
  message: 'Too many requests from this IP, please try again later.',
  standardHeaders: true,
  legacyHeaders: false,
});
app.use(limiter);

// --- Bot Rejector Middleware ---
app.use((req, res, next) => {
  const suspiciousKeywords = ['.env', '.yaml', '.php', '/debug', '.git', 'config.js'];

  if (suspiciousKeywords.some((keyword) => req.originalUrl.toLowerCase().includes(keyword))) {
    return res.status(403).end();
  }

  next();
});

// --- Logging Middleware ---
app.use((req, res, next) => {
  const start = process.hrtime();
  const startMemory = process.memoryUsage().heapUsed;
  console.log(`[${new Date().toISOString()}] --> ${req.method} ${req.originalUrl}`);

  res.on('finish', () => {
    const diff = process.hrtime(start);
    const duration = (diff[0] * 1000 + diff[1] / 1000000).toFixed(2);
    const endMemory = process.memoryUsage().heapUsed;
    const memoryDiff = ((endMemory - startMemory) / 1024 / 1024).toFixed(3);

    console.log(
      `[${new Date().toISOString()}] <-- ${req.method} ${req.originalUrl} ${res.statusCode} (${duration}ms, Mem: ${memoryDiff}MB)`
    );
  });

  next();
});

app.use('/ubereats', uberEatsRouter);

// Body Parsers
app.use(express.json({ limit: '10mb' }));
app.use(express.urlencoded({ extended: true, limit: '10mb' }));

// --- Utility Routes ---
performance.mark('before-global-css');
app.get('/global.css', async (req, res) => {
  const clientDir = path.resolve(process.cwd(), '../client');
  const cssDirs = [
    path.join(clientDir, 'dist', 'static', 'css'),
    path.join(clientDir, '.next', 'static', 'css'),
  ];

  try {
    const cssDir = cssDirs.find((dir) => fsExtra.pathExistsSync(dir));

    if (!cssDir) {
      return res.status(404).send('/* CSS directory not found */');
    }

    const files = await fsExtra.readdir(cssDir);
    let combinedCss = '';

    for (const file of files) {
      if (path.extname(file) === '.css') {
        const filePath = path.join(cssDir, file);
        const cssContent = await fsExtra.readFile(filePath, 'utf-8');
        combinedCss += `/* ${file} */\n${cssContent}\n\n`;
      }
    }

    res.setHeader('Content-Type', 'text/css');
    res.send(combinedCss);
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Error combining CSS:', error);
    res.status(500).json({ error: 'Failed to combine CSS files.', details: error.message });
  }
});
performance.mark('after-global-css');
performance.measure('Global CSS Endpoint Setup', 'before-global-css', 'after-global-css');

// --- File serving endpoint by Organization Slug ---
app.get('/uploads/bySlug/:orgSlug/:filePath(*)', async (req, res, next) => {
  const { orgSlug, filePath } = req.params;

  if (!orgSlug || !filePath) {
    return res.status(400).json({ error: 'Required params missing.' });
  }

  try {
    const organization = await prisma.organization.findUnique({
      where: { slug: orgSlug },
      select: { id: true },
    });

    if (!organization) {
      return res.status(404).json({ error: 'Organization not found.' });
    }

    const organizationId = organization.id;
    const baseUploadsDir = path.resolve(process.cwd(), 'uploads');
    const orgUploadsDir = path.join(baseUploadsDir, organizationId);
    const fullPath = path.join(orgUploadsDir, filePath);
    const normalizedFullPath = path.normalize(fullPath);
    const normalizedOrgDir = path.normalize(orgUploadsDir);

    if (!normalizedFullPath.startsWith(normalizedOrgDir)) {
      return res.status(403).json({ error: 'Access forbidden: Invalid file path.' });
    }

    const fileExists = await fsExtra.pathExists(normalizedFullPath);
    if (!fileExists) {
      return res.status(404).json({ error: 'File not found.' });
    }

    const stats = await fsExtra.stat(normalizedFullPath);
    if (!stats.isFile()) {
      return res.status(404).json({ error: 'Not a file.' });
    }

    return res.sendFile(normalizedFullPath, (err) => {
      if (err && !res.headersSent) next(err);
    });
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Error serving file by slug:', error);
    if (!res.headersSent) {
      res.status(500).json({ error: 'Internal server error.' });
    }
  }
});

// --- File serving endpoint by Organization ID ---
app.use('/uploads', async (req, res) => {
  const isInternal = req.headers['x-internal-request'] === 'true';
  let organizationId;

  let relativePath = req.path;
  const segments = relativePath.split('/').filter(Boolean);

  if (segments.length > 0) {
    relativePath = segments.slice(1).join('/');
    organizationId = segments[0];
  }

  if (!relativePath || relativePath === '/') {
    return res.status(400).json({ error: 'File path is missing.' });
  }

  const baseUploadsDir = path.resolve(process.cwd(), 'uploads');
  let fullPath;

  if (isInternal) {
    fullPath = path.join(baseUploadsDir, organizationId, relativePath);
  } else {
    const orgUploadsDir = path.join(baseUploadsDir, organizationId);
    fullPath = path.join(orgUploadsDir, relativePath);
    const normalizedFullPath = path.normalize(fullPath);
    const normalizedOrgDir = path.normalize(orgUploadsDir);

    if (!normalizedFullPath.startsWith(normalizedOrgDir)) {
      return res.status(403).json({ error: 'Access forbidden.' });
    }
  }

  return res.sendFile(fullPath, (err) => {
    if (err && !res.headersSent) {
      res.status(500).json({ error: 'Failed to send file.' });
    }
  });
});

// --- Seed Payment Providers ---
(async () => {
  try {
    const providers = [
      { name: 'square', displayName: 'Square', active: true, configSchema: JSON.stringify({ accessToken: 'string', locationId: 'string', applicationId: 'string' }) },
      { name: 'stripe', displayName: 'Stripe', active: true, configSchema: JSON.stringify({ secretKey: 'string', publishableKey: 'string' }) },
    ];

    for (const provider of providers) {
      await prisma.paymentProvider.upsert({
        where: { name: provider.name },
        create: provider,
        update: { displayName: provider.displayName, active: provider.active, configSchema: provider.configSchema },
      });
    }
    console.log('Payment providers seeded successfully.');
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Failed to seed payment providers:', error);
  }
})();

// --- Initialize Socket.IO Namespaces ---
performance.mark('before-sockets');
setupChatSockets();
setupPOSockets();
setupCallSockets();
setupEmailSockets();
setupAISockets();

const audioStreamSocketCleanup = setupAudioStreamSockets(server);
if (typeof audioStreamSocketCleanup === 'function') {
  registerShutdownHook(async () => {
    await audioStreamSocketCleanup();
    console.log('Audio stream sockets cleanup completed.');
  });
} else if (audioStreamSocketCleanup && typeof audioStreamSocketCleanup.close === 'function') {
  registerShutdownHook(async () => {
    await audioStreamSocketCleanup.close();
    console.log('Audio stream sockets close completed.');
  });
}

performance.mark('after-sockets');
performance.measure('Socket Namespaces Setup', 'before-sockets', 'after-sockets');

// --- 404 Handler ---
app.use((req, res) => {
  res.status(404).json({ error: `Endpoint not found: ${req.method} ${req.originalUrl}` });
});

app.use(errorHandler);

// --- Start Server ---
const PORT = process.env.PORT || 3008;
performance.mark('before-server-listen');
server.listen(PORT, () => {
  performance.mark('server-listen');
  performance.measure('Server Listen Start', 'before-server-listen', 'server-listen');
  performance.measure('Total Initialization Time', 'start', 'server-listen');
  console.log(`🚀 Server is running on port ${PORT} in ${process.env.NODE_ENV || 'not set'} mode.`);
});

const closeHttpServer = () =>
  new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
    server.close((error) => {
      if (error) {
        reject(error);
        return;
      }

      resolve();
    });
  });

const closeSocketIoServer = () =>
  new Promise((resolve) => {
    io.close(() => {
      resolve();
    });
  });

const destroyOpenSockets = () => {
  for (const socket of openSockets) {
    try {
      socket.destroy();
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Failed to destroy socket:', error);
    }
  }
};

const logShutdownState = () => {
  server.getConnections((error, count) => {
    if (error) {
      console.error('Failed to get open HTTP connections:', error);
      return;
    }

    console.log(`Open HTTP connections during shutdown: ${count}`);
  });

  console.log(`Open raw sockets during shutdown: ${openSockets.size}`);
  console.log(`Socket.IO clients during shutdown: ${io.engine.clientsCount}`);
};

const gracefulShutdown = async (signal) => {
  if (isShuttingDown) {
    console.log(`Shutdown already in progress. Ignoring ${signal}.`);
    return;
  }

  isShuttingDown = true;
  console.log(`Signal received (${signal}): closing server...`);
  logShutdownState();

  forceShutdownTimer = setTimeout(async () => {
    console.error('Forced shutdown timeout reached. Destroying lingering sockets.');

    destroyOpenSockets();

    try {
      await prisma.$disconnect();
      console.log('Prisma disconnected during forced shutdown.');
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Failed to disconnect Prisma during forced shutdown:', error);
    }

    await flushConsoleCaptureWrites();
    process.exit(1);
  }, 10000);

  if (typeof forceShutdownTimer.unref === 'function') {
    forceShutdownTimer.unref();
  }

  try {
    await closeSocketIoServer();
    console.log('Socket.IO server closed');

    await runMaybeAsync(async () => {
      for (const hook of shutdownHooks) {
        await hook();
      }
    }, 'Registered shutdown hooks');

    await closeHttpServer();
    console.log('HTTP server closed');

    destroyOpenSockets();
    obs.disconnect();

    await prisma.$disconnect();
    console.log('Prisma disconnected');

    if (forceShutdownTimer) {
      clearTimeout(forceShutdownTimer);
      forceShutdownTimer = null;
    }

    await flushConsoleCaptureWrites();
    process.exit(0);
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Error during graceful shutdown:', error);

    destroyOpenSockets();

    try {
      await prisma.$disconnect();
      console.log('Prisma disconnected after shutdown error');
    } catch (disconnectError) {
      console.error('Failed to disconnect Prisma after shutdown error:', disconnectError);
    }

    if (forceShutdownTimer) {
      clearTimeout(forceShutdownTimer);
      forceShutdownTimer = null;
    }

    await flushConsoleCaptureWrites();
    process.exit(1);
  }
};

process.on('SIGTERM', () => {
  void gracefulShutdown('SIGTERM');
});

process.on('SIGINT', () => {
  void gracefulShutdown('SIGINT');
});

```

```js
// server/src/shared/socket.js

let ioInstance;

export const initializeSocket = (serverIO) => {
  ioInstance = serverIO;
};

export const getIO = () => {
  if (!ioInstance) {
    throw new Error('Socket.io not initialized!');
  }
  return ioInstance;
};

export const getNamespace = (namespaceName) => {
  if (!ioInstance) {
    throw new Error('Socket.io not initialized!');
  }
  return ioInstance.of(namespaceName);
};
```

FILE: server/src/shared/utils/asyncHandler.js

```js
// Full path: /home/luanngo/boss-dev/server/src/shared/utils/asyncHandler.js
//--- File: server/src/shared/utils/asyncHandler.js ---
import { extractRequestContext, logAndReportError } from '../../utils/logError.js';

/**
 * A higher-order function to wrap asynchronous route handlers.
 * It catches any errors and passes them to the next middleware.
 *
 * @param {Function} fn - The asynchronous route handler function.
 * @returns {Function} A new function that wraps the original handler.
 */
const asyncHandler = (fn) => {
    // Ensure that fn is a function
    if (typeof fn !== 'function') {
      throw new TypeError('Expected a function as the argument');
    }
  
    // Return a new function that wraps the original handler
    return function asyncUtilWrap(req, res, next) {
      // Call the handler and catch any errors
      Promise.resolve(fn(req, res, next)).catch((error) => {
        logAndReportError('Async route handler error:', error, extractRequestContext(req));
        next(error);
      });
    };
  };
  
  export default asyncHandler;
  

```

FILE: server/src/shared/utils/auth.js
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
```js
// Full path: /home/luanngo/boss-dev/server/src/shared/utils/auth.js
import { parse } from 'cookie';
import jwt from 'jsonwebtoken';
import prisma from '#shared/database/prismaClient.js';

const JWT_SECRET = process.env.JWT_SECRET || 'your_jwt_secret_here';

export const getTokenFromRequest = (req) => {
  const cookies = req.headers.cookie ? parse(req.headers.cookie) : {};
  const cookieToken = cookies.token;

  if (cookieToken) {
    return cookieToken;
  }

  const authHeader = req.headers.authorization;
  if (typeof authHeader === 'string' && authHeader.startsWith('Bearer ')) {
    const bearerToken = authHeader.slice('Bearer '.length).trim();
    return bearerToken || null;
  }

  return null;
};

export async function getSession(req) {
  try {
    const token = getTokenFromRequest(req);

    if (!token) {
      console.log('No auth token found in cookies or Authorization header.');
      return null;
    }

    const decoded = jwt.verify(token, JWT_SECRET);
    const normalizedUserId = decoded?.userId || decoded?.id || null;

    if (!normalizedUserId) {
      console.warn('Session token missing userId/id.', {
        sessionId: decoded?.sessionId || null,
        username: decoded?.username || null,
      });
      return null;
    }

    const user = await prisma.user.findUnique({
      where: { id: normalizedUserId },
      include: {
        organization: {
          select: { id: true, name: true, phoneNumber: true, slug: true },
        },
        permissions: {
          select: { name: true },
        },
      },
    });

    if (!user) {
      console.log('User not found in database.');
      return null;
    }

    if (user.deletedAt || !user.active) {
      console.log('User account has been deactivated or deleted:', user.id);
      return null;
    }

    if (!user.organization) {
      console.log('Organization not found for user:', user.id);
      return null;
    }

    const sessionUser = {
      ...user,
      id: user.id,
      userId: user.id,
      organizationId: user.organization.id,
      organizationName: user.organization.name,
      organizationSlug: user.organization.slug,
      permissions: user.permissions.map((p) => p.name),
      sessionId: decoded?.sessionId || null,
    };

    return { user: sessionUser };
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Session Error:', error);
    return null;
  }
}

```

FILE: server/src/shared/utils/bearerToken.js

```js
// Full path: /home/luanngo/boss-dev/server/src/shared/utils/bearerToken.js
export function extractBearerToken(authHeader = "") {
  const rawHeader = String(authHeader || "").trim();
  const match = rawHeader.match(/^Bearer\s+([\s\S]+)$/i);
  if (!match) return "";

  let token = match[1].trim();
  token = token.replace(/^["'`]+|["'`]+$/g, "");

  if (token.startsWith("<") && token.endsWith(">")) {
    token = token.slice(1, -1).trim();
  }

  return token;
}

export function isLikelyJwt(value = "") {
  return /^[A-Za-z0-9_-]+\.[A-Za-z0-9_-]+\.[A-Za-z0-9_-]+$/.test(String(value || "").trim());
}

```

```js
// Full path: /home/luanngo/boss-dev/server/src/shared/utils/clientPlatform.js
export const IOS_BLOCKED_ERROR_CODE = 'NEW_ORGANIZATION_NOT_AVAILABLE_ON_IOS';
export const IOS_PURCHASE_BLOCKED_ERROR_CODE = 'PURCHASE_NOT_AVAILABLE_ON_IOS';
export const IOS_UNKNOWN_OAUTH_ERROR_CODE = 'NO_WORKSMRT_ACCOUNT_FOR_OAUTH_ON_IOS';

export const isNativeIOSRequest = (req) => {
  const platform = String(req.headers?.['x-worksmrt-client-platform'] || '').toLowerCase();
  return platform === 'native-ios';
};

export const rejectNativeIOSAction = (req, res, {
  code = IOS_BLOCKED_ERROR_CODE,
  message = 'This action is not available in the WorkSmrt iOS app.',
} = {}) => {
  if (!isNativeIOSRequest(req)) return false;

  res.status(403).json({
    error: message,
    code,
  });
  return true;
};
```

```js
// Full path: /home/luanngo/boss-dev/server/src/shared/utils/permissionManager.js
import prisma from '#shared/database/prismaClient.js';

export const hasPermission = async (userId, requiredPermission) => {
  if (!userId || !requiredPermission) {
    return false;
  }

  // This query efficiently checks if the user has EITHER the specific permission
  // OR the global 'permission:editAll' override.
  const count = await prisma.user.count({
    where: {
      id: userId,
      permissions: {
        some: {
          name: {
            in: [requiredPermission, 'permission:editAll'],
          },
        },
      },
    },
  });

  return count > 0;
};
```

FILE: server/src/shared/utils/withHandler.js
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
```js
// Full path: /home/luanngo/boss-dev/server/src/shared/utils/withHandler.js
import { getSession } from './auth.js';
import { extractBearerToken } from './bearerToken.js';
import { sendErrorResponse } from '#middleware/errorHandler.js';
import { extractRequestContext, logAndReportError } from '../../utils/logError.js';
import jwt from 'jsonwebtoken';

/**
 * Higher-Order Function to handle API route common logic.
 * Updated to support Bearer Token authentication for M2M communication.
 *
 * @param {Object} options - Configuration options.
 * @param {Function} options.handler - The main handler function for the route.
 * @param {Array} options.allowedMethods - List of allowed HTTP methods.
 * @param {Array} [options.requiredRoles=[]] - List of roles required to access the route.
 * @param {Object} [options.schema={}] - Object containing Zod schemas for different methods.
 * @param {Object} [options.requiredBodyParams={}] - Required body parameters per method.
 * @param {Object} [options.requiredQueryParams={}] - Required query parameters per method.
 * @param {Object} [options.requiredBodyParamTypes={}] - Expected types for body parameters per method.
 * @param {Object} [options.requiredQueryParamTypes={}] - Expected types for query parameters per method.
 * @param {boolean} [options.requiresAuth=true] - Whether authentication is required.
 *
 * @returns {Function} - Wrapped API route handler.
 */
const withHandler = ({
  handler,
  allowedMethods = [],
  requiredRoles = [],
  schema = {},
  requiredBodyParams = {},
  requiredQueryParams = {},
  requiredBodyParamTypes = {},
  requiredQueryParamTypes = {},
  requiresAuth = true,
}) => {
  return async (req, res) => {
    try {
      const { method } = req;

      // **1. Method Validation**
      if (!allowedMethods.includes(method)) {
        res.setHeader('Allow', allowedMethods);
        return res.status(405).end(`Method ${method} Not Allowed`);
      }

      // **2. Authentication (Session OR Bearer Token)**
      if (requiresAuth) {
        let user = null;

        // A. Check for Bearer Token (API/M2M Access)
        const authHeader = req.headers.authorization;
        if (authHeader && /^Bearer\s+/i.test(authHeader)) {
          const token = extractBearerToken(authHeader);
          try {
            const secret = process.env.JWT_SECRET;
            if (!secret) throw new Error('JWT_SECRET not configured');
            
            const decoded = jwt.verify(token, secret);
            const normalizedUserId = decoded?.id || decoded?.userId || null;
            user = {
              ...decoded,
              ...(normalizedUserId ? { id: normalizedUserId, userId: normalizedUserId } : {}),
            };
          } catch (err) {
            console.warn(`[Auth] Invalid Bearer token: ${err.message}`);
            // We continue to check session as a fallback, or fail here.
          }
        }

        // B. Check for Cookie Session (Browser Access)
        if (!user) {
          const session = await getSession(req);
          if (session && session.user) {
            user = session.user;
          }
        }

        // C. Final Auth Check
        if (!user) {
          return res.status(401).json({ error: 'Unauthorized: No valid session or token found.' });
        }

        req.user = user;
        
        // Implement permissions check here if needed based on requiredRoles
        if (requiredRoles.length > 0) {
            // Example simple role check
            if (!req.user.role || !requiredRoles.includes(req.user.role)) {
                return res.status(403).json({ error: 'Forbidden: Insufficient permissions' });
            }
        }
      }

      // **3. Schema Validation with Zod**
      const methodSchema = schema[method];
      if (methodSchema) {
        // Determine which part to validate based on HTTP method
        let validationTarget = method === 'GET' ? req.query : req.body;
        const validation = methodSchema.safeParse(validationTarget);

        if (!validation.success) {
          // Extract and format Zod validation errors
          const errorMessages = validation.error.errors.map(err => ({
            path: err.path.join('.'),
            message: err.message,
          }));
          console.log('Validation Errors:', errorMessages);
          return res.status(400).json({ error: errorMessages });
        }

        // Attach validated data to the request object for use in the handler
        req.validated = validation.data;
      } else {
        // **4. Existing Manual Validation (Legacy support)**
        // Validate required body parameters
        const bodyParams = requiredBodyParams[method] || [];
        if (bodyParams.length > 0) {
          const missingParams = bodyParams.filter(
            (param) => !(param in req.body)
          );
          if (missingParams.length > 0) {
            return res.status(400).json({
              error: `Missing required fields: ${missingParams.join(', ')}`,
            });
          }
        }

        // Validate required query parameters
        const queryParams = requiredQueryParams[method] || [];
        if (queryParams.length > 0) {
          const missingParams = queryParams.filter(
            (param) => !(param in req.query)
          );
          if (missingParams.length > 0) {
            return res.status(400).json({
              error: `Missing required query parameters: ${missingParams.join(
                ', '
              )}`,
            });
          }
        }

        // **Type Validation for Body Params**
        const bodyTypes = requiredBodyParamTypes[method] || {};
        for (const [param, type] of Object.entries(bodyTypes)) {
          if (type === 'string' && typeof req.body[param] !== 'string') {
            return res.status(400).json({ error: `${param} must be a string.` });
          }
          if (type === 'number' && typeof req.body[param] !== 'number') {
            return res.status(400).json({ error: `${param} must be a number.` });
          }
          if (type === 'boolean' && typeof req.body[param] !== 'boolean') {
            return res.status(400).json({ error: `${param} must be a boolean.` });
          }
        }

        // **Type Validation for Query Params**
        const queryTypes = requiredQueryParamTypes[method] || {};
        for (const [param, type] of Object.entries(queryTypes)) {
          if (type === 'string' && typeof req.query[param] !== 'string') {
            return res.status(400).json({ error: `${param} must be a string.` });
          }
          if (type === 'number' && isNaN(Number(req.query[param]))) {
            return res.status(400).json({ error: `${param} must be a number.` });
          }
          if (type === 'boolean') {
            const val = req.query[param].toLowerCase();
            if (val !== 'true' && val !== 'false') {
              return res.status(400).json({ error: `${param} must be a boolean.` });
            }
          }
        }
      }

      // **5. Execute the Main Handler**
      return handler(req, res);
    } catch (error) {
      logAndReportError('withHandler error:', error, extractRequestContext(req));
      sendErrorResponse(res, error, extractRequestContext(req));
    }
  };
};

export default withHandler;

```

```jsx
// Full path: /home/luanngo/boss-dev/client/pages/accounting/index.jsx
'use client';
import React, { useEffect, useState, useContext, lazy, Suspense, useMemo, useCallback } from 'react';
import withAuth from '../../shared/hocs/withAuth';
import { AuthContext } from '../../shared/context/AuthContext';
import { toast } from 'react-toastify';
import UploadTransactions from '../../services/accounting/components/UploadTransactions';
import TransactionsList from '../../services/accounting/components/TransactionsList';
import VerifiedTransactions from '../../services/accounting/components/VerifiedTransactions';
import { fetchWithAuth } from '@/shared/utils/fetchWithAuth';
import SalesDashboardContent from '../../services/accounting/sales';
import T2Dashboard from '../../services/accounting/t2';
import PayrollDashboard from '../../services/accounting/components/PayrollDashboard';
import PayrollScheduleManager from '../../services/accounting/components/PayrollScheduleManager';
import {
  BarChart2, List, UploadCloud, DollarSign, FileText, Users, Settings,
  Box, BookOpen, Database, Copy, LayoutList, ChevronDown,
  PanelRightClose, PanelRightOpen, RefreshCw, Clock3, CheckCircle2,
  AlertCircle, FileClock, Sparkles, Bot, ArrowRight, Receipt,
} from 'lucide-react';
import LedgerTab from '../../services/accounting/components/LedgerTab';
import JournalEntries from '../../services/accounting/components/JournalEntries';
import TrialBalanceTab from '../../services/accounting/components/TrialBalanceTab';
import ProfitLossBetaTab from '../../services/accounting/components/ProfitLossBetaTab';
import RulesAndAIReview from '../../services/accounting/components/RulesAndAIReview';
import ReceiptMatchingQueue from '../../services/accounting/components/ReceiptMatchingQueue';
import InlineHelpModalButton from '../../shared/components/help/InlineHelpModalButton';
import { formatCurrency, formatDateTime } from '../../services/accounting/utils/formatAccounting';

const AccountingRulesManagerLazy = lazy(() => import('../../services/accounting/components/AccountingRules'));
const DuplicateTransactionsLazy = lazy(() => import('../../services/accounting/components/DuplicateTransactions'));
const AccountingChartManagerLazy = lazy(() => import('../../services/accounting/components/AccountingChartManager'));

const Modal = ({ modalId, title, children, large = false }) => (
  <dialog id={modalId} className="modal">
    <div className={`modal-box ${large ? 'w-11/12 max-w-5xl' : ''}`}>
      <h3 className="font-bold text-lg mb-4">{title}</h3>
      {children}
      <div className="modal-action">
        <form method="dialog">
          <button className="btn btn-sm btn-circle btn-ghost absolute right-2 top-2">✕</button>
          <button className="btn">Close</button>
        </form>
      </div>
    </div>
    <form method="dialog" className="modal-backdrop">
      <button>close</button>
    </form>
  </dialog>
);

const PANEL_WIDTH_PX = 420;

const getImportStatusMeta = (status) => {
  switch (status) {
    case 'IMPORTED': return { badge: 'badge-success', label: 'Imported', Icon: CheckCircle2 };
    case 'PENDING_VERIFICATION': return { badge: 'badge-warning', label: 'Pending verification', Icon: FileClock };
    case 'FAILED': return { badge: 'badge-error', label: 'Failed', Icon: AlertCircle };
    default: return { badge: 'badge-ghost', label: status || 'Unknown', Icon: Clock3 };
  }
};

const SourceImportStatusTable = ({ rows, loading, onRefresh }) => (
  <div className="card bg-base-100 shadow-xl border border-base-300">
    <div className="card-body gap-4">
      <div className="flex flex-col gap-3 md:flex-row md:items-center md:justify-between">
        <div>
          <h2 className="card-title text-xl">Latest transaction by source</h2>
          <p className="text-sm text-base-content/70">
            Use this to see which bank or card source is behind and what the newest imported transaction is.
          </p>
        </div>
        <button type="button" className={`btn btn-sm btn-outline ${loading ? 'btn-disabled' : ''}`} onClick={onRefresh}>
          <RefreshCw size={16} className={loading ? 'animate-spin' : ''} />
          Refresh
        </button>
      </div>
      <div className="overflow-x-auto rounded-box border border-base-300">
        <table className="table table-zebra table-sm md:table-md">
          <thead>
            <tr>
              <th>Source</th><th>Type</th><th>Latest transaction</th><th>Latest transaction date</th><th className="text-right">Total imported</th>
            </tr>
          </thead>
          <tbody>
            {loading ? (
              <tr><td colSpan={5} className="py-10 text-center"><span className="loading loading-spinner loading-md" /></td></tr>
            ) : !rows.length ? (
              <tr><td colSpan={5} className="py-10 text-center text-base-content/60">No source data found yet.</td></tr>
            ) : (
              rows.map((row) => (
                <tr key={row.sourceId}>
                  <td><div className="font-semibold">{row.sourceName || 'Unnamed source'}</div></td>
                  <td><span className="badge badge-outline">{row.sourceType || '—'}</span></td>
                  <td className="max-w-[360px]">
                    <div className="truncate font-medium">{row.latestTransactionDescription || 'No transactions imported yet'}</div>
                    {row.latestTransactionAmount !== null && row.latestTransactionAmount !== undefined && (
                      <div className={`text-xs mt-1 ${Number(row.latestTransactionAmount) >= 0 ? 'text-success' : 'text-error'}`}>
                        {formatCurrency(row.latestTransactionAmount)}
                      </div>
                    )}
                  </td>
                  <td>{formatDateTime(row.latestTransactionDate)}</td>
                  <td className="text-right">{row.transactionCount || 0}</td>
                </tr>
              ))
            )}
          </tbody>
        </table>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
);

const BeginnerAiWorkflowCard = ({ onOpenImports, onOpenChartManager, onOpenReviewQueue, onOpenRuleSuggestions }) => (
  <div className="card bg-base-100 shadow-xl border border-base-300">
    <div className="card-body gap-4">
      <div className="flex flex-col gap-3 md:flex-row md:items-start md:justify-between">
        <div>
          <h2 className="card-title text-xl flex items-center gap-2"><Bot size={20} /> AI bookkeeping workflow</h2>
          <p className="text-sm text-base-content/70">The full beginner walkthrough is available on demand so the workspace stays focused.</p>
        </div>
        <InlineHelpModalButton title="Beginner AI bookkeeping workflow" ariaLabel="AI bookkeeping help" buttonClassName="shrink-0">
          <div className="space-y-4">
            <div><div className="font-semibold mb-1">1. Import and verify</div><p>Upload bank or card activity first so the AI has clean transactions to work from.</p></div>
            <div><div className="font-semibold mb-1">2. Ask AI to set up the chart</div><p>Use plain English in Manage Categories &amp; Accounts to create accounts and categories without bookkeeping jargon.</p></div>
            <div><div className="font-semibold mb-1">3. Review AI proposals</div><p>Approve suggestions from the Manual Proposals tab instead of letting automation post blindly.</p></div>
          </div>
        </InlineHelpModalButton>
      </div>
      <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2">
        <button type="button" className="btn btn-sm btn-outline" onClick={onOpenImports}><UploadCloud size={16} /> Go to Imports</button>
        <button type="button" className="btn btn-sm btn-outline" onClick={onOpenChartManager}><Box size={16} /> Open AI Chart Manager</button>
        <button type="button" className="btn btn-sm btn-outline" onClick={onOpenRuleSuggestions}><Bot size={16} /> AI Rule Suggestions</button>
        <button type="button" className="btn btn-sm btn-primary" onClick={onOpenReviewQueue}><ArrowRight size={16} /> Review AI proposals</button>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
);

const AccountingDashboard = () => {
  const { organization } = useContext(AuthContext);
  const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState('transactions');
  const [accountingData, setAccountingData] = useState({ profitAndLoss: {}, taxInfo: {} });
  const [loadingSummary, setLoadingSummary] = useState(true);
  const [importId, setImportId] = useState(null);
  const [selectedPayrollSchedule, setSelectedPayrollSchedule] = useState(null);
  const [selectedIds, setSelectedIds] = useState(new Set());
  const [showRulesPanel, setShowRulesPanel] = useState(false);
  const [focusedChartRecord, setFocusedChartRecord] = useState(null);
  const [importOverview, setImportOverview] = useState({ importRecords: [], sourceStatuses: [] });
  const [loadingImportOverview, setLoadingImportOverview] = useState(false);
  const [accountingWorkflow, setAccountingWorkflow] = useState(null);

  const selectedIdsArray = useMemo(() => Array.from(selectedIds), [selectedIds]);

  const tabGroups = [
    { label: 'Overview', tabs: [
      { id: 'summary', label: 'Dashboard', Icon: BarChart2 },
    ]},
    { label: 'Activity', tabs: [
      { id: 'transactions', label: 'Transactions', Icon: List },
      { id: 'rules-ai-review', label: 'Rules & AI Review', Icon: Sparkles },
      { id: 'imports', label: 'Imports', Icon: UploadCloud },
      { id: 'receipt-matching', label: 'Receipts', Icon: Receipt },
    ]},
    { label: 'Revenue', tabs: [
      { id: 'sales', label: 'Sales', Icon: DollarSign },
      { id: 'payroll', label: 'Payroll', Icon: Users },
    ]},
    { label: 'Reports', tabs: [
      { id: 'profit-loss-beta', label: 'P&L / Income Statement', Icon: FileText },
      { id: 'trial', label: 'Trial Balance', Icon: LayoutList },
      { id: 'ledger', label: 'Ledger', Icon: Database },
      { id: 'journal', label: 'Journal', Icon: BookOpen },
    ]},
    { label: 'Tax', tabs: [
      { id: 't2', label: 'T2', Icon: FileText },
    ]},
  ];

  const flatTabs = tabGroups.flatMap((g) => g.tabs);

  const fetchAccountingData = async () => {
    setLoadingSummary(true);
    try {
      const res = await fetchWithAuth(`${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL}/accounting`);
      if (!res.ok) throw new Error('Failed to fetch accounting data.');
      const data = await res.json();
      setAccountingData(data);
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Fetch Accounting Data Error:', error);
      toast.error('Failed to load accounting data.');
    } finally {
      setLoadingSummary(false);
    }
  };

  const handleOpenChartManager = useCallback((record = null) => {
    setFocusedChartRecord(record ? { id: record.id || null, code: record.code || null } : null);
    document.getElementById('chart-manager-modal')?.showModal();
  }, []);

  const handleOpenAccountingWorkflow = useCallback((workflow = {}) => {
    const affectedIds = Array.isArray(workflow.affectedRecords)
      ? workflow.affectedRecords.map((value) => Number(value)).filter((value) => Number.isFinite(value))
      : [];
    setAccountingWorkflow({
      ...workflow,
      affectedRecords: affectedIds,
      activatedAt: Date.now(),
    });
    setSelectedIds(new Set(affectedIds));
    setActiveTab(workflow.primaryTab || workflow.tab || 'transactions');
  }, []);

  const fetchImportOverview = useCallback(async () => {
    setLoadingImportOverview(true);
    try {
      const res = await fetchWithAuth(`${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL}/accounting/imports`);
      if (!res.ok) throw new Error('Failed to fetch import overview.');
      const data = await res.json();
      setImportOverview({
        importRecords: Array.isArray(data.importRecords) ? data.importRecords : [],
        sourceStatuses: Array.isArray(data.sourceStatuses) ? data.sourceStatuses : [],
      });
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Fetch Import Overview Error:', error);
      toast.error('Failed to load import overview.');
    } finally {
      setLoadingImportOverview(false);
    }
  }, []);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (organization && activeTab === 'summary') fetchAccountingData();
  }, [organization, activeTab]);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (organization && activeTab === 'imports') fetchImportOverview();
  }, [organization, activeTab, fetchImportOverview]);

  const handleUploadSuccess = (newImportId) => {
    setImportId(newImportId);
    setActiveTab('imports');
    fetchImportOverview();
  };

  const handleVerificationComplete = () => {
    setImportId(null);
    fetchImportOverview();
    window.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent('refetchTransactions'));
  };

  const handleScheduleSelect = (schedule) => setSelectedPayrollSchedule(schedule);

  useEffect(() => {
    const refetch = () => { if (activeTab === 'imports') fetchImportOverview(); };
    window.addEventListener('refetchTransactions', refetch);
    return () => window.removeEventListener('refetchTransactions', refetch);
  }, [activeTab, fetchImportOverview]);

  const renderSummary = () => {
    if (loadingSummary) {
      return <div className="flex justify-center items-center p-10"><span className="loading loading-spinner loading-lg"></span></div>;
    }
    return (
      <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-6">
        <div className="card bg-base-100 shadow-xl"><div className="card-body"><h2 className="card-title">Profit & Loss</h2><p>Revenue: <span className="font-semibold text-success">{formatCurrency(accountingData.profitAndLoss?.revenue || 0)}</span></p><p>Expenses: <span className="font-semibold text-error">{formatCurrency(accountingData.profitAndLoss?.expenses || 0)}</span></p><p>Profit: <span className="font-semibold">{formatCurrency(accountingData.profitAndLoss?.profit || 0)}</span></p></div></div>
        <div className="card bg-base-100 shadow-xl"><div className="card-body"><h2 className="card-title">Tax Information</h2><p>Total Tax Recorded: <span className="font-semibold">{formatCurrency(accountingData.taxInfo?.totalTax || 0)}</span></p></div></div>
      </div>
    );
  };

  const renderTransactions = () => (
    <div className="space-y-6">
      <BeginnerAiWorkflowCard
        onOpenImports={() => setActiveTab('imports')}
        onOpenChartManager={() => handleOpenChartManager()}
        onOpenReviewQueue={() => setActiveTab('review-queue')}
        onOpenRuleSuggestions={() => setActiveTab('ai-rule-suggestions')}
      />
      <div className="alert alert-info shadow-sm border border-info/20"><span>Receipt-backed hints are surfaced directly in the transactions grid, and higher-risk items can be sent through the Proposals tab for suggestion-first review before you accept them.</span></div>
      <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2 p-4 bg-base-200 rounded-box shadow">
        <button onClick={() => handleOpenChartManager()} className="btn btn-sm btn-outline"><Box size={16} className="mr-1" /> Manage Categories & Accounts</button>
        <div className="dropdown dropdown-hover">
          <label tabIndex={0} className="btn btn-sm btn-outline"><Settings size={16} className="mr-1" /> Tools</label>
          <ul tabIndex={0} className="dropdown-content z-[1] menu p-2 shadow bg-base-100 rounded-box w-56">
            <li><button onClick={() => document.getElementById('duplicates-modal')?.showModal()}><Copy size={14} /> Find Duplicates</button></li>
          </ul>
        </div>
        <button onClick={() => setShowRulesPanel((s) => !s)} className="btn btn-sm btn-primary ml-auto" title="Toggle Accounting Rules side panel">
          {showRulesPanel ? <PanelRightClose size={16} className="mr-1" /> : <PanelRightOpen size={16} className="mr-1" />}
          {showRulesPanel ? 'Hide Rules' : 'Show Rules'}
        </button>
      </div>
      <div className="relative">
        <div className="transition-all" style={{ marginRight: showRulesPanel ? `${PANEL_WIDTH_PX + 16}px` : '0px' }}>
          <TransactionsList selectedIds={selectedIds} setSelectedIds={setSelectedIds} workflow={accountingWorkflow} onNavigate={setActiveTab} />
        </div>
        {showRulesPanel && (
          <aside className="fixed top-[88px] md:top-[140px] right-4 md:right-6 z-40 bg-base-100 rounded-box shadow-xl border border-base-300" style={{ width: `${PANEL_WIDTH_PX}px`, maxHeight: 'calc(100vh - 120px)' }}>
            <div className="flex items-center justify-between px-4 py-2 border-b border-base-300">
              <div className="font-semibold flex items-center gap-2"><BookOpen size={18} /> Accounting Rules</div>
              <button className="btn btn-ghost btn-sm" onClick={() => setShowRulesPanel(false)}><PanelRightClose size={16} /></button>
            </div>
            <div className="p-3 overflow-y-auto" style={{ maxHeight: 'calc(100vh - 170px)' }}>
              <Suspense fallback={<div className="p-4 text-center"><span className="loading loading-spinner loading-sm" /></div>}>
                <AccountingRulesManagerLazy selectedIds={selectedIdsArray} />
              </Suspense>
            </div>
          </aside>
        )}
      </div>
      <Suspense fallback={<div className="text-center p-4">Loading Categories & Accounts...</div>}>
        <Modal modalId="chart-manager-modal" title="Manage Categories & Accounts" large={true}><AccountingChartManagerLazy focusRecord={focusedChartRecord} /></Modal>
      </Suspense>
      <Suspense fallback={<div className="text-center p-4">Loading Duplicate Transactions Tool...</div>}>
        <Modal modalId="duplicates-modal" title="Find Duplicate Transactions" large={true}><DuplicateTransactionsLazy /></Modal>
      </Suspense>
    </div>
  );

  const renderImports = () => {
    const importRecords = importOverview.importRecords || [];
    const sourceStatuses = importOverview.sourceStatuses || [];
    const pendingImports = importRecords.filter((record) => record.status === 'PENDING_VERIFICATION');
    const importedCount = importRecords.filter((record) => record.status === 'IMPORTED').length;
    const failedCount = importRecords.filter((record) => record.status === 'FAILED').length;
    const latestImport = importRecords[0] || null;
    const latestMeta = getImportStatusMeta(latestImport?.status);
    const LatestIcon = latestMeta.Icon;

    return (
      <div className="space-y-6">
        <BeginnerAiWorkflowCard
          onOpenImports={() => setActiveTab('imports')}
          onOpenChartManager={() => document.getElementById('chart-manager-modal')?.showModal()}
          onOpenReviewQueue={() => setActiveTab('review-queue')}
        />
        <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 xl:grid-cols-4 gap-4">
          <div className="stat bg-base-100 shadow border border-base-300 rounded-box"><div className="stat-figure text-primary"><UploadCloud size={24} /></div><div className="stat-title">Total import files</div><div className="stat-value text-3xl">{importRecords.length}</div><div className="stat-desc">All uploaded bank files</div></div>
          <div className="stat bg-base-100 shadow border border-base-300 rounded-box"><div className="stat-figure text-warning"><FileClock size={24} /></div><div className="stat-title">Pending review</div><div className="stat-value text-3xl">{pendingImports.length}</div><div className="stat-desc">Files waiting for verification</div></div>
          <div className="stat bg-base-100 shadow border border-base-300 rounded-box"><div className="stat-figure text-success"><CheckCircle2 size={24} /></div><div className="stat-title">Imported</div><div className="stat-value text-3xl">{importedCount}</div><div className="stat-desc">Completed successfully</div></div>
          <div className="stat bg-base-100 shadow border border-base-300 rounded-box"><div className="stat-figure text-error"><AlertCircle size={24} /></div><div className="stat-title">Failed</div><div className="stat-value text-3xl">{failedCount}</div><div className="stat-desc">Need script fix or retry</div></div>
        </div>
        <SourceImportStatusTable rows={sourceStatuses} loading={loadingImportOverview} onRefresh={fetchImportOverview} />
        <div className="grid grid-cols-1 xl:grid-cols-[1.2fr_0.8fr] gap-6">
          <div className="space-y-6">
            <div className="card bg-base-100 shadow-xl border border-base-300"><div className="card-body"><h2 className="card-title">Better import workflow</h2><p className="text-base-content/70">Upload, review, and import with fewer surprises.</p><p className="text-sm text-base-content/70">The server now keeps import state cleaner, validates parsed rows more aggressively, and preserves the generated parser script for easier revisions.</p><UploadTransactions onUploadSuccess={handleUploadSuccess} /></div></div>
            <div className="card bg-base-100 shadow-xl border border-base-300"><div className="card-body"><h2 className="card-title">Verification</h2>{importId ? <VerifiedTransactions importId={importId} onVerificationComplete={handleVerificationComplete} /> : <p className="text-sm text-base-content/70">Upload a file to open the verification step here.</p>}</div></div>
          </div>
          <div className="space-y-6">
            <div className="card bg-base-100 shadow-xl border border-base-300"><div className="card-body"><h2 className="card-title">Workflow</h2><ul className="steps steps-vertical"><li className="step step-primary">Upload CSV from a bank or credit card source</li><li className="step step-primary">Auto-parse and validate row structure</li><li className="step">Review duplicates and categories</li><li className="step">Import clean rows into transactions</li></ul></div></div>
            <div className="card bg-base-100 shadow-xl border border-base-300"><div className="card-body"><h2 className="card-title">Recent import history</h2><div className="space-y-3">{importRecords.slice(0, 6).map((record) => {const meta = getImportStatusMeta(record.status); const StatusIcon = meta.Icon; return (<div key={record.id} className="flex items-start justify-between gap-3 rounded-box bg-base-200 p-3"><div className="min-w-0"><div className={`badge ${meta.badge} gap-1 mb-2`}><StatusIcon size={12} />{meta.label}</div><div className="font-medium truncate">{record.source?.name || 'Unknown source'}</div><div className="text-xs text-base-content/70">Uploaded {formatDateTime(record.createdAt, true)}</div></div></div>);})}</div></div></div>
            {latestImport && <div className="card bg-base-100 shadow-xl border border-base-300"><div className="card-body"><h2 className="card-title">Latest file snapshot</h2><div className="space-y-2"><div className="font-semibold">{latestImport.source?.name || 'Unknown source'}</div><div className={`badge ${latestMeta.badge} gap-1`}><LatestIcon size={12} />{latestMeta.label}</div><div className="text-sm text-base-content/70">Created {formatDateTime(latestImport.createdAt, true)}</div><div className="text-sm text-base-content/70">Updated {formatDateTime(latestImport.updatedAt, true)}</div></div><div className="divider my-2" /><div className="text-sm text-base-content/70">Why this is more reliable now</div><p className="text-sm">Import scripts are validated against parsed output, import records stay in the right status, and failed runs keep their script path so you can revise instead of starting over.</p></div></div>}
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    );
  };

  const renderTabContent = () => {
    switch (activeTab) {
      case 'summary': return renderSummary();
      case 'rules-ai-review': return <RulesAndAIReview onNavigate={setActiveTab} onOpenWorkflow={handleOpenAccountingWorkflow} />;
      case 'profit-loss-beta': return <ProfitLossBetaTab />;
      case 'transactions': return renderTransactions();
      case 'receipt-matching': return <ReceiptMatchingQueue />;
      case 'imports': return renderImports();
      case 'ledger': return <LedgerTab />;
      case 'trial': return <TrialBalanceTab />;
      case 'journal': return <JournalEntries />;
      case 'sales': return <SalesDashboardContent />;
      case 't2': return <T2Dashboard />;
      case 'payroll': return (
        <div className="flex flex-col gap-6 max-w-full">
          <PayrollScheduleManager onSelectSchedule={handleScheduleSelect} />
          <PayrollDashboard selectedSchedule={selectedPayrollSchedule} />
        </div>
      );
      default: return null;
    }
  };

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-slate-50">
      <div className="sticky top-0 z-30 bg-white border-b border-slate-200 shadow-sm">
        <div className="max-w-full px-4 md:px-8 py-4">
          <h1 className="text-xl md:text-2xl font-bold text-slate-900 tracking-tight">
            {activeTab === 'journal' ? 'Journal' : 'Accounting Dashboard'}
          </h1>
        </div>

        <div className="overflow-x-auto max-w-full px-4 md:px-8 pb-2 -mt-1">
          <div className="flex gap-1 min-w-max pb-1" role="tablist">
            {flatTabs.map(({ id, label, Icon }) => (
              <button
                key={id}
                role="tab"
                className={`flex items-center gap-1.5 px-3.5 py-2 text-sm font-medium rounded-lg transition-all whitespace-nowrap ${
                  activeTab === id
                    ? 'bg-indigo-50 text-indigo-700 shadow-sm'
                    : 'text-slate-500 hover:text-slate-700 hover:bg-slate-100'
                }`}
                onClick={() => setActiveTab(id)}
                aria-selected={activeTab === id}
              >
                <Icon size={16} />
                <span>{label}</span>
              </button>
            ))}
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div className="md:hidden px-4 pt-4 pb-0">
        <div className="dropdown w-full">
          <label tabIndex={0} className="btn btn-primary w-full justify-between">
            <span>{flatTabs.find((t) => t.id === activeTab)?.label}</span>
            <ChevronDown size={20} />
          </label>
          <ul tabIndex={0} className="dropdown-content menu p-2 shadow bg-base-100 rounded-box w-full z-[1]">
            {flatTabs.map(({ id, label, Icon }) => (
              <li key={id}>
                <button className={`w-full text-left flex items-center ${activeTab === id ? 'active' : ''}`} onClick={() => { setActiveTab(id); if (document.activeElement instanceof HTMLElement) document.activeElement.blur(); }}>
                  <Icon size={18} className="mr-2" /> {label}
                </button>
              </li>
            ))}
          </ul>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div className="px-4 md:px-8 py-6">
        {renderTabContent()}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
};

export default withAuth(AccountingDashboard);

```

FILE: client/services/accounting/components/AccountAutocomplete.jsx
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
```jsx
// Full path: /home/luanngo/boss-dev/client/services/accounting/components/AccountAutocomplete.jsx
import React from 'react';
import Select from 'react-select';

const accountLabel = (account) => {
  if (!account) return '';
  const description = account?.description || account?.name || account?.accountName || '';
  return description ? `${account.code} — ${description}` : String(account.code || '');
};

const toOption = (account) => ({
  value: account.id,
  label: accountLabel(account),
  code: account.code,
});

export default function AccountAutocomplete({
  value,
  onChange,
  accounts = [],
  placeholder = 'Search account…',
  className = '',
  disabled = false,
}) {
  const options = React.useMemo(() => accounts.map(toOption), [accounts]);
  const selected = React.useMemo(
    () => options.find((o) => o.value === value) || null,
    [options, value],
  );

  return (
    <Select
      className={className}
      classNamePrefix="acct-autocomplete"
      isClearable
      isSearchable
      isDisabled={disabled}
      placeholder={placeholder}
      noOptionsMessage={() => 'No accounts found'}
      options={options}
      value={selected}
      onChange={(opt) => onChange(opt ? opt.value : '')}
      styles={{
        control: (base, state) => ({
          ...base,
          minHeight: '34px',
          borderRadius: '0.5rem',
          borderColor: state.isFocused ? '#6366f1' : '#e2e8f0',
          boxShadow: state.isFocused ? '0 0 0 2px rgba(99,102,241,0.2)' : 'none',
          '&:hover': { borderColor: '#cbd5e1' },
          fontSize: '0.875rem',
          cursor: 'text',
        }),
        input: (base) => ({ ...base, fontSize: '0.875rem' }),
        placeholder: (base) => ({ ...base, fontSize: '0.875rem', color: '#94a3b8' }),
        menu: (base) => ({ ...base, zIndex: 9999, borderRadius: '0.5rem', fontSize: '0.875rem' }),
        option: (base, state) => ({
          ...base,
          backgroundColor: state.isFocused ? '#eef2ff' : 'white',
          color: '#1e293b',
          cursor: 'pointer',
        }),
        singleValue: (base) => ({ ...base, fontSize: '0.875rem', color: '#1e293b' }),
        clearIndicator: (base) => ({ ...base, padding: '4px', cursor: 'pointer' }),
        dropdownIndicator: (base) => ({ ...base, padding: '4px', cursor: 'pointer' }),
      }}
      theme={(theme) => ({
        ...theme,
        colors: {
          ...theme.colors,
          primary: '#6366f1',
          primary25: '#eef2ff',
          primary50: '#e0e7ff',
        },
      })}
    />
  );
}
```

FILE: client/services/accounting/components/AccountingAuditTab.jsx
