```jsx
// Full path: /home/luanngo/boss-dev/client/services/accounting/components/AccountingAuditTab.jsx
import React, { useEffect, useMemo, useState } from 'react';
import { toast } from 'react-toastify';
import { fetchWithAuth } from '@/shared/utils/fetchWithAuth';
import {
  AlertTriangle,
  Bot,
  CheckCircle2,
  ClipboardList,
  ExternalLink,
  RefreshCw,
  ShieldAlert,
} from 'lucide-react';
import { formatCurrency } from '../utils/formatAccounting';

const todayIso = () => new Date().toISOString().slice(0, 10);

const monthStartIso = () => {
  const today = new Date();
  return new Date(today.getFullYear(), today.getMonth(), 1).toISOString().slice(0, 10);
};

const severityClass = (severity) => {
  switch (String(severity || '').toUpperCase()) {
    case 'HIGH':
      return 'badge-error';
    case 'MEDIUM':
      return 'badge-warning';
    case 'LOW':
      return 'badge-info';
    default:
      return 'badge-ghost';
  }
};

const riskTone = (risk) => {
  switch (String(risk || '').toUpperCase()) {
    case 'HIGH':
      return 'text-error';
    case 'MEDIUM':
      return 'text-warning';
    case 'LOW':
      return 'text-success';
    default:
      return 'text-base-content';
  }
};

const MetricCard = ({ title, value, detail }) => (
  <div className="stat rounded-box border border-base-300 bg-base-100">
    <div className="stat-title">{title}</div>
    <div className="stat-value text-2xl">{value}</div>
    {detail && <div className="stat-desc">{detail}</div>}
  </div>
);

const auditFixGuides = [
  {
    match: (todo) => /categor/i.test(todo.task) || todo.actionLinkTarget === 'transactions',
    toolName: 'Transactions and Manual Proposals',
    steps: [
      'Open Transactions to identify blank categories.',
      'Select transactions that need AI help, then generate proposals or open Manual Proposals.',
      'Approve only the suggested account, tax treatment, and journal lines that match the bank description and receipt.',
      'Refresh P&L Beta to confirm categorized activity is reporting correctly.',
    ],
  },
  {
    match: (todo) => /post|journal|reconcile|unreconciled|unposted/i.test(`${todo.task} ${todo.reason}`) || todo.actionLinkTarget === 'review-queue',
    toolName: 'Manual Proposals, Ledger, and Trial Balance',
    steps: [
      'Open Manual Proposals.',
      'Generate proposals for the unposted bank transactions if they are not already listed.',
      'Review the suggested posting type, account, tax treatment, and journal lines.',
      'Approve correct proposals so the app syncs the bank transaction into a journal entry.',
      'Open Ledger or Trial Balance to confirm the transaction is posted and balanced.',
    ],
  },
  {
    match: (todo) => /receipt|support/i.test(`${todo.task} ${todo.reason}`) || todo.actionLinkTarget === 'receipt-matching',
    toolName: 'Receipt Matching',
    steps: [
      'Open Receipt Matching.',
      'Approve exact or high-confidence matches after checking amount, date, and vendor.',
      'Review weak matches manually.',
      'Upload or import missing receipts for transactions with no candidate.',
    ],
  },
  {
    match: (todo) => /duplicate/i.test(`${todo.task} ${todo.reason}`),
    toolName: 'Transactions > Tools > Find Duplicates',
    steps: [
      'Open Transactions.',
      'Open Tools, then Find Duplicates.',
      'Compare date, source, amount, description, receipt, and journal history.',
      'Keep the best-supported transaction and remove or hide only confirmed duplicates.',
    ],
  },
  {
    match: (todo) => /import|gap|missing transaction period/i.test(`${todo.task} ${todo.reason}`) || todo.actionLinkTarget === 'imports',
    toolName: 'Imports',
    steps: [
      'Open Imports.',
      'Check Latest transaction by source to identify the missing account and date range.',
      'Download that statement range from the bank or card provider.',
      'Upload it to the correct source and review verification before importing.',
    ],
  },
  {
    match: (todo) => /hst|tax/i.test(`${todo.task} ${todo.reason}`),
    toolName: 'Estimate candidates, Transactions, and Receipt Matching',
    steps: [
      'Review HST estimate candidates in AI Manager.',
      'Open the related transaction or receipt.',
      'Confirm tax against receipt, invoice, or vendor history.',
      'Apply tax only after confirmation; keep uncertain values marked for review.',
    ],
  },
  {
    match: (todo) => /account|mapping|statement group|statement line/i.test(`${todo.task} ${todo.reason}`),
    toolName: 'Manage Categories & Accounts',
    steps: [
      'Open Transactions.',
      'Click Manage Categories & Accounts.',
      'Find the unmapped account.',
      'Set statement group and statement line, then save.',
      'Refresh P&L Beta to confirm it moved out of Unmapped Accounts.',
    ],
  },
  {
    match: (todo) => /payroll/i.test(`${todo.task} ${todo.reason}`) || todo.actionLinkTarget === 'payroll',
    toolName: 'Payroll',
    steps: [
      'Open Payroll.',
      'Review zero-pay records in the selected schedule.',
      'Open adjustments and confirm advances, tips, and manual corrections.',
      'Change payroll records only after confirming source data.',
    ],
  },
];

const getAuditFixGuide = (todo) => auditFixGuides.find((guide) => guide.match(todo)) || null;

export default function AccountingAuditTab({ onNavigate }) {
  const [dateRange, setDateRange] = useState({ from: monthStartIso(), to: todayIso() });
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);
  const [loadingLatest, setLoadingLatest] = useState(true);
  const [audit, setAudit] = useState(null);

  const report = audit?.report || null;
  const facts = audit?.facts || null;
  const problems = Array.isArray(report?.problems) ? report.problems : [];
  const todoList = Array.isArray(report?.todoList) ? report.todoList : [];
  const possibleMissingPeriods = Array.isArray(facts?.imports?.possibleMissingPeriods)
    ? facts.imports.possibleMissingPeriods
    : [];
  const duplicateGroups = Array.isArray(facts?.bankTransactions?.duplicateGroups)
    ? facts.bankTransactions.duplicateGroups
    : [];

  const issueCounts = useMemo(() => problems.reduce((acc, problem) => {
    const key = String(problem?.severity || 'UNKNOWN').toUpperCase();
    acc[key] = (acc[key] || 0) + 1;
    return acc;
  }, {}), [problems]);

  useEffect(() => {
    let cancelled = false;

    const loadLatestAudit = async () => {
      setLoadingLatest(true);
      try {
        const res = await fetchWithAuth(`${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL}/accounting/audit/latest`);
        if (!res.ok) return;
        const data = await res.json();
        if (cancelled || !data.audit) return;
        setAudit(data.audit);
        if (data.audit.period?.startDate || data.audit.period?.endDate) {
          setDateRange((current) => ({
            from: data.audit.period.startDate || current.from,
            to: data.audit.period.endDate || current.to,
          }));
        }
      } catch (error) {
        console.error('Latest accounting audit load error:', error);
      } finally {
        if (!cancelled) setLoadingLatest(false);
      }
    };

    loadLatestAudit();

    return () => {
      cancelled = true;
    };
  }, []);

  const runAudit = async () => {
    setLoading(true);
    try {
      const params = new URLSearchParams({
        startDate: dateRange.from,
        endDate: dateRange.to,
      });
      const res = await fetchWithAuth(`${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL}/accounting/audit?${params}`);
      if (!res.ok) {
        const body = await res.json().catch(() => ({}));
        throw new Error(body.error || 'Failed to run accounting audit.');
      }
      const data = await res.json();
      setAudit(data);
      toast.success('Accounting audit complete.');
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Accounting audit error:', error);
      toast.error(error.message || 'Failed to run accounting audit.');
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  };

  const navigateTo = (target) => {
    if (!target || typeof onNavigate !== 'function') return;
    onNavigate(target);
  };

  return (
    <div className="space-y-6">
      <div className="flex flex-col gap-4 lg:flex-row lg:items-end lg:justify-between">
        <div>
          <h2 className="text-xl font-semibold flex items-center gap-2">
            <Bot size={22} /> AI Accounting Audit
          </h2>
          <p className="text-sm text-base-content/70 mt-1">
            Checks your accounting data, highlights problems, and turns them into a prioritized fix list.
          </p>
        </div>

        <div className="flex flex-wrap items-end gap-3">
          <label className="form-control">
            <span className="label-text">From</span>
            <input
              type="date"
              className="input input-bordered input-sm"
              value={dateRange.from}
              onChange={(event) => setDateRange((current) => ({ ...current, from: event.target.value }))}
            />
          </label>
          <label className="form-control">
            <span className="label-text">To</span>
            <input
              type="date"
              className="input input-bordered input-sm"
              value={dateRange.to}
              onChange={(event) => setDateRange((current) => ({ ...current, to: event.target.value }))}
            />
          </label>
          <button type="button" className="btn btn-primary btn-sm" onClick={runAudit} disabled={loading}>
            <RefreshCw size={16} className={loading ? 'animate-spin' : ''} />
            Run audit
          </button>
        </div>
      </div>

      {loadingLatest && !audit && (
        <div className="rounded-box border border-base-300 bg-base-100 p-6 text-sm text-base-content/70">
          Loading saved audit report...
        </div>
      )}

      {!loadingLatest && !audit && (
        <div className="rounded-box border border-base-300 bg-base-100 p-6 text-sm text-base-content/70">
          Run the audit to inspect transactions, journal entries, receipts, imports, HST, payroll, chart mappings, rules, and pending AI proposals.
        </div>
      )}

      {audit && (
        <>
          <div className="grid grid-cols-1 gap-4 md:grid-cols-2 xl:grid-cols-4">
            <MetricCard title="Overall risk" value={<span className={riskTone(report?.overallRisk)}>{report?.overallRisk || 'UNKNOWN'}</span>} detail={report?.generatedBy === 'AI' ? 'AI reviewed facts' : 'Rules fallback'} />
            <MetricCard title="Problems" value={problems.length} detail={`${issueCounts.HIGH || 0} high priority`} />
            <MetricCard title="Bank activity" value={facts?.bankTransactions?.count || 0} detail={formatCurrency(facts?.bankTransactions?.totalAmount || 0)} />
            <MetricCard title="Close readiness" value={facts?.overview?.closeInfo?.readiness || 'unknown'} detail={facts?.overview?.closeInfo?.bankReconciliation?.status || 'bank status unknown'} />
          </div>

          <div className="rounded-box border border-base-300 bg-base-100 p-5">
            <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
              <ShieldAlert className={riskTone(report?.overallRisk)} size={22} />
              <div>
                <div className="font-semibold">Audit summary</div>
                <p className="mt-1 text-sm text-base-content/80">{report?.summary}</p>
                <div className="mt-3 text-xs text-base-content/50">
                  Generated {audit.generatedAt ? new Date(audit.generatedAt).toLocaleString() : 'unknown'}
                  {audit.savedAt ? `; saved ${new Date(audit.savedAt).toLocaleString()}` : ''}
                </div>
                {report?.fallbackUsed && (
                  <div className="badge badge-outline mt-3">AI unavailable, showing deterministic checks</div>
                )}
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>

          <section className="rounded-box border border-base-300 bg-base-100 p-5">
            <div className="flex items-center gap-2 font-semibold">
              <AlertTriangle size={18} /> Import Diagnostics
            </div>
            <div className="mt-4 grid grid-cols-1 gap-4 lg:grid-cols-2">
              <div>
                <div className="text-sm font-semibold">Possible missing periods</div>
                {!possibleMissingPeriods.length ? (
                  <p className="mt-2 text-sm text-base-content/60">No source date gaps found in the saved audit facts.</p>
                ) : (
                  <div className="mt-3 space-y-2">
                    {possibleMissingPeriods.slice(0, 5).map((gap, index) => (
                      <div key={`${gap.sourceId || gap.sourceName}-${gap.startDate}-${index}`} className="rounded border border-base-300 p-3 text-sm">
                        <div className="font-medium">{gap.sourceName || 'Unknown source'}</div>
                        <div className="text-base-content/70">
                          {gap.startDate} to {gap.endDate} | {gap.gapDays} days
                        </div>
                        <div className="mt-1 text-xs text-base-content/50">{gap.reason}</div>
                      </div>
                    ))}
                  </div>
                )}
              </div>
              <div>
                <div className="text-sm font-semibold">Possible duplicates</div>
                {!duplicateGroups.length ? (
                  <p className="mt-2 text-sm text-base-content/60">No duplicate-looking transaction groups found in the saved audit facts.</p>
                ) : (
                  <div className="mt-3 space-y-2">
                    {duplicateGroups.slice(0, 5).map((group, index) => {
                      const first = group.sample?.[0] || {};
                      return (
                        <div key={`${first.id || index}-${group.count}`} className="rounded border border-base-300 p-3 text-sm">
                          <div className="font-medium">{group.count} matching transactions</div>
                          <div className="text-base-content/70">
                            {first.date} | {formatCurrency(first.amount)} | {first.source || 'Unknown source'}
                          </div>
                          <div className="mt-1 truncate text-xs text-base-content/50">{first.description}</div>
                        </div>
                      );
                    })}
                  </div>
                )}
              </div>
            </div>
          </section>

          <div className="grid grid-cols-1 gap-6 xl:grid-cols-[1.1fr_0.9fr]">
            <section className="space-y-3">
              <div className="flex items-center gap-2 font-semibold">
                <AlertTriangle size={18} /> Problems
              </div>
              {!problems.length ? (
                <div className="rounded-box border border-success/30 bg-success/10 p-4 text-sm flex items-center gap-2">
                  <CheckCircle2 size={18} /> No major problems found for this period.
                </div>
              ) : (
                problems.map((problem, index) => (
                  <div key={`${problem.title}-${index}`} className="rounded-box border border-base-300 bg-base-100 p-4">
                    <div className="flex flex-wrap items-center gap-2">
                      <span className={`badge ${severityClass(problem.severity)}`}>{problem.severity}</span>
                      <span className="badge badge-outline">{problem.area}</span>
                    </div>
                    <h3 className="mt-3 font-semibold">{problem.title}</h3>
                    <p className="mt-2 text-sm text-base-content/80">{problem.evidence}</p>
                    {problem.whyItMatters && (
                      <p className="mt-2 text-xs text-base-content/60">{problem.whyItMatters}</p>
                    )}
                    {Array.isArray(problem.affectedRecords) && problem.affectedRecords.length > 0 && (
                      <div className="mt-3 text-xs text-base-content/60">
                        Affected records: {problem.affectedRecords.slice(0, 8).join(', ')}
                        {problem.affectedRecords.length > 8 ? '...' : ''}
                      </div>
                    )}
                  </div>
                ))
              )}
            </section>

            <section className="space-y-3">
              <div className="flex items-center gap-2 font-semibold">
                <ClipboardList size={18} /> To-do List
              </div>
              {todoList.map((todo, index) => (
                <div key={`${todo.task}-${index}`} className="rounded-box border border-base-300 bg-base-100 p-4">
                  {(() => {
                    const guide = getAuditFixGuide(todo);
                    return (
                      <>
                  <div className="flex items-start justify-between gap-3">
                    <div className="min-w-0">
                      <span className={`badge ${severityClass(todo.priority)} mb-2`}>{todo.priority}</span>
                      <div className="font-semibold">{todo.task}</div>
                    </div>
                    {todo.actionLinkTarget && (
                      <button
                        type="button"
                        className="btn btn-ghost btn-sm"
                        onClick={() => navigateTo(todo.actionLinkTarget)}
                        title="Open related accounting tab"
                      >
                        <ExternalLink size={16} />
                      </button>
                    )}
                  </div>
                  {todo.reason && <p className="mt-2 text-sm text-base-content/70">{todo.reason}</p>}
                  {guide && (
                    <div className="mt-3 rounded border border-base-300 bg-base-200/50 p-3">
                      <div className="text-sm font-semibold">How to fix this</div>
                      <div className="mt-1 text-xs text-base-content/60">Use: {guide.toolName}</div>
                      <ol className="mt-2 list-decimal space-y-1 pl-4 text-sm text-base-content/75">
                        {guide.steps.map((step) => (
                          <li key={step}>{step}</li>
                        ))}
                      </ol>
                    </div>
                  )}
                  {todo.estimatedEffort && <div className="mt-3 text-xs text-base-content/50">{todo.estimatedEffort}</div>}
                      </>
                    );
                  })()}
                </div>
              ))}
            </section>
          </div>
        </>
      )}
    </div>
  );
}

```

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
FILE: client/services/accounting/components/AccountingChartManager.jsx
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
```jsx
// Full path: /home/luanngo/boss-dev/client/services/accounting/components/AccountingChartManager.jsx

import React, { useEffect, useMemo, useState } from 'react';
import { toast } from 'react-toastify';
import { fetchWithAuth } from '@/shared/utils/fetchWithAuth';
import { Bot, Copy, Download, Pencil, PlusCircle, RefreshCw, Save, Trash2 } from 'lucide-react';

const DEFAULT_FORM = {
  id: null,
  code: '',
  description: '',
  category: 'EXPENSES',
  normalSide: 'DEBIT',
  statementLine: '',
  sortOrder: '500',
  isPLAccount: true,
};

const PL_CATEGORIES = new Set(['REVENUE', 'OTHER_INCOME', 'EXPENSES', 'EXPENSE', 'OTHER_EXPENSES', 'COST OF GOODS SOLD', 'COGS']);

const serializeClipboardRows = (rows = []) => rows.map((row) => [
  row.id || '',
  row.code || '',
  row.description || '',
  row.category || '',
  row.normalSide || '',
  row.statementLine || '',
  row.sortOrder ?? '',
  row.isPLAccount ? 'true' : 'false',
].join('\t')).join('\n');

const AccountingChartManager = ({ focusRecord = null }) => {
  const [view, setView] = useState('all');
  const [items, setItems] = useState([]);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
  const [saving, setSaving] = useState(false);
  const [filterText, setFilterText] = useState('');
  const [form, setForm] = useState(DEFAULT_FORM);
  const [aiPrompt, setAiPrompt] = useState('');
  const [aiLoading, setAiLoading] = useState(false);
  const [aiSuggestLoading, setAiSuggestLoading] = useState(false);
  const [aiSuggestionCount, setAiSuggestionCount] = useState('6');
  const [aiSuggestions, setAiSuggestions] = useState([]);
  const [selectedSuggestionIndexes, setSelectedSuggestionIndexes] = useState(new Set());
  const [savingSuggestions, setSavingSuggestions] = useState(false);

  const fetchItems = async () => {
    setLoading(true);
    try {
      const res = await fetchWithAuth(`${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL}/accounting/categories?view=all`);
      const data = await res.json().catch(() => ([]));
      if (!res.ok) throw new Error(data.error || 'Failed to load chart records.');
      setItems(Array.isArray(data) ? data : []);
    } catch (error) {
      toast.error(error.message || 'Failed to load chart records.');
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  };

  useEffect(() => {
    fetchItems();
  }, []);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!focusRecord || loading || !items.length) return;

    const focusedItem = items.find((item) => (
      (focusRecord.id && item.id === focusRecord.id) ||
      (focusRecord.code && String(item.code || '') === String(focusRecord.code))
    ));

    const nextFilter = focusedItem?.code || focusRecord.code || focusRecord.id || '';
    setView('all');
    setFilterText(String(nextFilter));

    if (focusedItem) {
      handleEdit(focusedItem);
    }
  }, [focusRecord, items, loading]);

  const displayedItems = useMemo(() => {
    const keyword = filterText.trim().toLowerCase();
    return items
      .filter((item) => {
        if (view === 'categories' && !PL_CATEGORIES.has(String(item.category || '').toUpperCase()) && !item.isPLAccount) return false;
        if (view === 'accounts' && (PL_CATEGORIES.has(String(item.category || '').toUpperCase()) || item.isPLAccount)) return false;
        if (!keyword) return true;
        return [item.id, item.code, item.description, item.category, item.normalSide, item.statementLine]
          .filter(Boolean)
          .join(' ')
          .toLowerCase()
          .includes(keyword);
      })
      .sort((a, b) => String(a.code || '').localeCompare(String(b.code || '')) || String(a.description || '').localeCompare(String(b.description || '')));
  }, [filterText, items, view]);

  const resetForm = () => setForm(DEFAULT_FORM);

  const handleSave = async () => {
    if (!form.code.trim() || !form.description.trim() || !form.category.trim()) {
      toast.error('Code, description, and type are required.');
      return;
    }

    const payload = {
      code: form.code.trim(),
      description: form.description.trim(),
      category: form.category.trim(),
      normalSide: form.normalSide || 'DEBIT',
      statementLine: form.statementLine.trim() || null,
      sortOrder: Number.isFinite(Number(form.sortOrder)) ? Number(form.sortOrder) : 500,
      isPLAccount: Boolean(form.isPLAccount),
    };

    try {
      setSaving(true);
      const url = form.id
        ? `${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL}/accounting/categories/${form.id}`
        : `${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL}/accounting/categories`;
      const method = form.id ? 'PUT' : 'POST';
      const res = await fetchWithAuth(url, {
        method,
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
        body: JSON.stringify(payload),
      });
      const data = await res.json().catch(() => ({}));
      if (!res.ok) throw new Error(data.error || 'Failed to save chart record.');
      toast.success(form.id ? 'Chart record updated.' : 'Chart record created.');
      resetForm();
      fetchItems();
    } catch (error) {
      toast.error(error.message || 'Failed to save chart record.');
    } finally {
      setSaving(false);
    }
  };

  const handleEdit = (item) => {
    setForm({
      id: item.id,
      code: item.code || '',
      description: item.description || '',
      category: item.category || 'EXPENSES',
      normalSide: item.normalSide || 'DEBIT',
      statementLine: item.statementLine || '',
      sortOrder: item.sortOrder != null ? String(item.sortOrder) : '500',
      isPLAccount: Boolean(item.isPLAccount),
    });
  };

  const handleDelete = async (item) => {
    if (!window.confirm(`Delete ${item.code} — ${item.description}?`)) return;
    try {
      const res = await fetchWithAuth(`${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL}/accounting/categories/${item.id}`, { method: 'DELETE' });
      const data = await res.json().catch(() => ({}));
      if (!res.ok) throw new Error(data.error || 'Failed to delete chart record.');
      toast.success('Chart record deleted.');
      if (form.id === item.id) resetForm();
      fetchItems();
    } catch (error) {
      toast.error(error.message || 'Failed to delete chart record.');
    }
  };

  const copyDisplayed = async () => {
    try {
      await navigator.clipboard.writeText(serializeClipboardRows(displayedItems));
      toast.success(`Copied ${displayedItems.length} chart record${displayedItems.length === 1 ? '' : 's'} to the clipboard.`);
    } catch (error) {
      toast.error('Failed to copy chart records.');
    }
  };

  const copyDisplayedJson = async () => {
    try {
      await navigator.clipboard.writeText(JSON.stringify(displayedItems, null, 2));
      toast.success(`Copied ${displayedItems.length} chart record${displayedItems.length === 1 ? '' : 's'} as JSON.`);
    } catch (error) {
      toast.error('Failed to copy chart records as JSON.');
    }
  };

  const downloadCsv = () => {
    if (!displayedItems.length) {
      toast.error('No chart records to download.');
      return;
    }
    const headers = ['Code', 'Description', 'Type', 'Normal Side', 'Statement Line', 'Sort Order', 'P&L'];
    const rows = displayedItems.map((item) => [
      item.code || '',
      item.description || '',
      item.category || '',
      item.normalSide || '',
      item.statementLine || '',
      item.sortOrder ?? '',
      item.isPLAccount ? 'Yes' : 'No',
    ]);
    const csv = [headers.join(','), ...rows.map((r) => r.map((c) => `"${String(c).replace(/"/g, '""')}"`).join(','))].join('\n');
    const blob = new Blob([csv], { type: 'text/csv;charset=utf-8;' });
    const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
    const a = document.createElement('a');
    a.href = url;
    a.download = 'chart-of-accounts.csv';
    a.click();
    URL.revokeObjectURL(url);
    toast.success(`Downloaded ${displayedItems.length} chart record${displayedItems.length === 1 ? '' : 's'} as CSV.`);
  };

  const handleAiDraft = async () => {
    if (!aiPrompt.trim()) {
      toast.error('Enter instructions for the AI chart draft.');
      return;
    }
    try {
      setAiLoading(true);
      toast.info('AI is drafting a chart record...');
      const aiView = view === 'accounts' ? 'accounts' : 'categories';
      const res = await fetchWithAuth(`${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL}/accounting/categories/ai-draft`, {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
        body: JSON.stringify({ prompt: aiPrompt.trim(), view: aiView }),
      });
      const data = await res.json().catch(() => ({}));
      if (!res.ok) throw new Error(data.error || 'Failed to draft chart record.');
      const record = data?.suggestedRecord || {};
      setForm({
        id: null,
        code: record.code || '',
        description: record.description || '',
        category: record.category || (aiView === 'accounts' ? 'ASSET' : 'EXPENSES'),
        normalSide: record.normalSide || 'DEBIT',
        statementLine: record.statementLine || '',
        sortOrder: record.sortOrder != null ? String(record.sortOrder) : '500',
        isPLAccount: typeof record.isPLAccount === 'boolean' ? record.isPLAccount : aiView !== 'accounts',
      });
      toast.success('AI draft loaded into the form.');
    } catch (error) {
      toast.error(error.message || 'Failed to generate AI chart draft.');
    } finally {
      setAiLoading(false);
    }
  };

  const handleAiSuggestAccounts = async () => {
    if (!aiPrompt.trim()) {
      toast.error('Enter instructions for the AI chart suggestions.');
      return;
    }

    try {
      setAiSuggestLoading(true);
      toast.info('AI is suggesting chart records...');
      const aiView = view === 'accounts' ? 'accounts' : 'categories';
      const res = await fetchWithAuth(`${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL}/accounting/categories/ai-suggestions`, {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
        body: JSON.stringify({
          prompt: aiPrompt.trim(),
          view: aiView,
          count: Number.isFinite(Number(aiSuggestionCount)) ? Number(aiSuggestionCount) : 6,
        }),
      });
      const data = await res.json().catch(() => ({}));
      if (!res.ok) throw new Error(data.error || 'Failed to suggest chart records.');
      const records = Array.isArray(data?.suggestedRecords) ? data.suggestedRecords : [];
      setAiSuggestions(records);
      setSelectedSuggestionIndexes(new Set(records.map((_, index) => index)));
      toast.success(`AI suggested ${records.length} chart record${records.length === 1 ? '' : 's'}.`);
    } catch (error) {
      toast.error(error.message || 'Failed to generate AI chart suggestions.');
    } finally {
      setAiSuggestLoading(false);
    }
  };

  const toggleAiSuggestion = (index) => {
    setSelectedSuggestionIndexes((current) => {
      const next = new Set(current);
      if (next.has(index)) next.delete(index);
      else next.add(index);
      return next;
    });
  };

  const updateAiSuggestion = (index, patch) => {
    setAiSuggestions((current) => current.map((record, recordIndex) => (
      recordIndex === index ? { ...record, ...patch } : record
    )));
  };

  const saveSelectedAiSuggestions = async () => {
    const selected = aiSuggestions.filter((_, index) => selectedSuggestionIndexes.has(index));
    if (!selected.length) {
      toast.error('Select at least one AI suggestion to save.');
      return;
    }

    try {
      setSavingSuggestions(true);
      const res = await fetchWithAuth(`${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL}/accounting/categories/batch`, {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
        body: JSON.stringify({ categories: selected }),
      });
      const data = await res.json().catch(() => ({}));
      if (!res.ok) throw new Error(data.error || 'Failed to save AI suggestions.');
      toast.success(data.message || `Saved ${selected.length} chart records.`);
      setAiSuggestions([]);
      setSelectedSuggestionIndexes(new Set());
      fetchItems();
    } catch (error) {
      toast.error(error.message || 'Failed to save AI suggestions.');
    } finally {
      setSavingSuggestions(false);
    }
  };

  return (
    <div className="space-y-5 bg-base-100 p-4 rounded-box">
      <div className="flex flex-col gap-3 lg:flex-row lg:items-center lg:justify-between">
        <p className="text-sm text-base-content/70">Create, edit, delete, and copy chart-of-accounts records. You can also use AI to draft new records.</p>
        <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2">
          <button type="button" className="btn btn-outline btn-sm" onClick={fetchItems}><RefreshCw size={14} /> Refresh</button>
          <button type="button" className="btn btn-outline btn-sm" onClick={copyDisplayed}><Copy size={14} /> Copy all shown</button>
          <button type="button" className="btn btn-outline btn-sm" onClick={copyDisplayedJson}><Copy size={14} /> Copy JSON</button>
          <button type="button" className="btn btn-outline btn-sm" onClick={downloadCsv}><Download size={14} /> Download CSV</button>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div className="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-3">
        <select className="select select-bordered" value={view} onChange={(e) => setView(e.target.value)}>
          <option value="all">All accounts & categories</option>
          <option value="categories">P&amp;L categories</option>
          <option value="accounts">Balance sheet accounts</option>
        </select>
        <input className="input input-bordered lg:col-span-2" value={filterText} onChange={(e) => setFilterText(e.target.value)} placeholder="Filter by code, description, type, or statement line" />
      </div>

      <div className="rounded-box border border-base-300 bg-base-200/50 p-4 space-y-3">
        <div className="font-semibold flex items-center gap-2"><Bot size={16} /> AI chart draft</div>
        <textarea className="textarea textarea-bordered w-full h-24" value={aiPrompt} onChange={(e) => setAiPrompt(e.target.value)} placeholder="Example: Suggest useful restaurant bookkeeping accounts for delivery fees, travel, software, merchant fees, payroll liabilities, and HST." />
        <div className="flex flex-wrap items-center gap-2">
          <button type="button" className="btn btn-outline btn-sm" onClick={handleAiDraft} disabled={aiLoading}>
            {aiLoading ? <span className="loading loading-spinner loading-sm" /> : <Bot size={14} />} Draft with AI
          </button>
          <input
            className="input input-bordered input-sm w-20"
            value={aiSuggestionCount}
            onChange={(e) => setAiSuggestionCount(e.target.value)}
            inputMode="numeric"
            aria-label="Number of AI suggestions"
          />
          <button type="button" className="btn btn-outline btn-sm" onClick={handleAiSuggestAccounts} disabled={aiSuggestLoading}>
            {aiSuggestLoading ? <span className="loading loading-spinner loading-sm" /> : <Bot size={14} />} Suggest accounts
          </button>
        </div>
        {aiSuggestions.length ? (
          <div className="overflow-x-auto rounded-box border border-base-300 bg-base-100">
            <table className="table table-sm">
              <thead>
                <tr>
                  <th className="w-10"></th>
                  <th>Code</th>
                  <th>Description</th>
                  <th>Type</th>
                  <th>Normal side</th>
                  <th>Statement line</th>
                  <th>Sort</th>
                  <th>P&amp;L</th>
                </tr>
              </thead>
              <tbody>
                {aiSuggestions.map((record, index) => {
                  const code = String(record.code || '');
                  return (
                    <tr key={`${code}-${index}`}>
                      <td>
                        <input
                          type="checkbox"
                          className="checkbox checkbox-sm"
                          checked={selectedSuggestionIndexes.has(index)}
                          onChange={() => toggleAiSuggestion(index)}
                        />
                      </td>
                      <td><input className="input input-bordered input-xs w-24 font-mono" value={record.code || ''} onChange={(e) => updateAiSuggestion(index, { code: e.target.value })} /></td>
                      <td><input className="input input-bordered input-xs min-w-56" value={record.description || ''} onChange={(e) => updateAiSuggestion(index, { description: e.target.value })} /></td>
                      <td><input className="input input-bordered input-xs w-36" value={record.category || ''} onChange={(e) => updateAiSuggestion(index, { category: e.target.value.toUpperCase() })} /></td>
                      <td>
                        <select className="select select-bordered select-xs w-28" value={record.normalSide || 'DEBIT'} onChange={(e) => updateAiSuggestion(index, { normalSide: e.target.value })}>
                          <option value="DEBIT">Debit</option>
                          <option value="CREDIT">Credit</option>
                        </select>
                      </td>
                      <td><input className="input input-bordered input-xs min-w-44" value={record.statementLine || ''} onChange={(e) => updateAiSuggestion(index, { statementLine: e.target.value })} /></td>
                      <td><input className="input input-bordered input-xs w-20" value={record.sortOrder ?? '500'} onChange={(e) => updateAiSuggestion(index, { sortOrder: e.target.value })} /></td>
                      <td><input type="checkbox" className="checkbox checkbox-sm" checked={Boolean(record.isPLAccount)} onChange={(e) => updateAiSuggestion(index, { isPLAccount: e.target.checked })} /></td>
                    </tr>
                  );
                })}
              </tbody>
            </table>
            <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2 border-t border-base-300 p-3">
              <button type="button" className="btn btn-primary btn-sm" onClick={saveSelectedAiSuggestions} disabled={savingSuggestions}>
                {savingSuggestions ? <span className="loading loading-spinner loading-sm" /> : <Save size={14} />} Save selected
              </button>
              <button type="button" className="btn btn-ghost btn-sm" onClick={() => { setAiSuggestions([]); setSelectedSuggestionIndexes(new Set()); }}>Clear suggestions</button>
            </div>
          </div>
        ) : null}
      </div>

      <div className="rounded-box border border-base-300 bg-base-200/50 p-4 space-y-3">
        <div className="font-semibold flex items-center gap-2"><PlusCircle size={16} /> {form.id ? 'Edit chart record' : 'Add chart record'}</div>
        <div className="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-2 gap-3">
          <input className="input input-bordered" value={form.code} onChange={(e) => setForm((current) => ({ ...current, code: e.target.value }))} placeholder="Code" />
          <input className="input input-bordered" value={form.description} onChange={(e) => setForm((current) => ({ ...current, description: e.target.value }))} placeholder="Description" />
          <input className="input input-bordered" value={form.category} onChange={(e) => setForm((current) => ({ ...current, category: e.target.value.toUpperCase() }))} placeholder="Type / category" />
          <select className="select select-bordered" value={form.normalSide} onChange={(e) => setForm((current) => ({ ...current, normalSide: e.target.value }))}>
            <option value="DEBIT">Debit</option>
            <option value="CREDIT">Credit</option>
          </select>
          <input className="input input-bordered" value={form.statementLine} onChange={(e) => setForm((current) => ({ ...current, statementLine: e.target.value }))} placeholder="Statement line" />
          <input className="input input-bordered" value={form.sortOrder} onChange={(e) => setForm((current) => ({ ...current, sortOrder: e.target.value }))} placeholder="Sort order" />
        </div>
        <label className="label cursor-pointer justify-start gap-2 w-fit"><input className="checkbox checkbox-sm" type="checkbox" checked={form.isPLAccount} onChange={(e) => setForm((current) => ({ ...current, isPLAccount: e.target.checked }))} /><span className="label-text">Profit &amp; loss account</span></label>
        <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2">
          <button type="button" className="btn btn-primary btn-sm" onClick={handleSave} disabled={saving}>{saving ? <span className="loading loading-spinner loading-sm" /> : <Save size={14} />} Save</button>
          {form.id ? <button type="button" className="btn btn-ghost btn-sm" onClick={resetForm}>Cancel edit</button> : null}
        </div>
      </div>

      <div className="overflow-x-auto rounded-box border border-base-300">
        <table className="table table-sm table-zebra w-full">
          <thead>
            <tr>
              <th>Code</th>
              <th>Description</th>
              <th>Type</th>
              <th>Normal side</th>
              <th>Statement line</th>
              <th>Sort</th>
              <th>P&amp;L</th>
              <th className="text-right">Actions</th>
            </tr>
          </thead>
          <tbody>
            {loading ? (
              <tr><td colSpan="8" className="text-center py-10"><span className="loading loading-spinner loading-lg" /></td></tr>
            ) : displayedItems.length === 0 ? (
              <tr><td colSpan="8" className="text-center py-8 text-base-content/70">No chart records found.</td></tr>
            ) : displayedItems.map((item) => (
              <tr key={item.id}>
                <td className="font-mono">{item.code}</td>
                <td>{item.description}</td>
                <td>{item.category}</td>
                <td>{item.normalSide || '—'}</td>
                <td>{item.statementLine || '—'}</td>
                <td>{item.sortOrder ?? '—'}</td>
                <td>{item.isPLAccount ? 'Yes' : 'No'}</td>
                <td>
                  <div className="flex justify-end gap-2">
                    <button type="button" className="btn btn-ghost btn-xs" onClick={() => handleEdit(item)}><Pencil size={14} /> Edit</button>
                    <button type="button" className="btn btn-ghost btn-xs text-error" onClick={() => handleDelete(item)}><Trash2 size={14} /> Delete</button>
                  </div>
                </td>
              </tr>
            ))}
          </tbody>
        </table>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
};

export default AccountingChartManager;

```

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
FILE: client/services/accounting/components/AccountingPromptsTab.jsx
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
```jsx
// Full path: /home/luanngo/boss-dev/client/services/accounting/components/AccountingPromptsTab.jsx
import React, { useState, useEffect, useContext, useRef } from 'react';
import { toast } from 'react-toastify';
import { fetchWithAuth } from '@/shared/utils/fetchWithAuth';
import { AuthContext } from '@/shared/context/AuthContext';
import Loader from '@/shared/components/Loader';
import {
  RotateCcw,
  Save,
  ChevronDown,
} from 'lucide-react';

const promptMeta = {
  accounting_generateRuleSQL_system: {
    label: 'Accounting rule SQL system',
    description: 'Generates accounting rule SQL from instruction and transaction context.',
  },
  accounting_convertFormulaToSQL_system: {
    label: 'Accounting formula to SQL system',
    description: 'Converts plain-language formulas into accounting SQL updates.',
  },
  accounting_convertCommandToSQL_system: {
    label: 'Accounting command to SQL system',
    description: 'Converts accounting commands into SQL.',
  },
  accounting_guessCategory_user: {
    label: 'Accounting category guess user',
    description: 'Guesses an accounting category from a transaction description.',
  },
  accounting_review_queue_system: {
    label: 'Accounting review queue system',
    description: 'Creates safe bookkeeping proposals for review queue items.',
  },
  accounting_suggestRuleForGroup_system: {
    label: 'Accounting rule suggestion system',
    description: 'Builds AI accounting rule suggestions from recurring transaction groups.',
  },
};

const PromptEditor = ({ name, value, onSave, onReset, description }) => {
  const displayName = promptMeta[name]?.label || name.replace(/_/g, ' ');
  const [localValue, setLocalValue] = useState(value);
  const [expanded, setExpanded] = useState(false);
  const [isDirty, setIsDirty] = useState(false);

  useEffect(() => {
    setLocalValue(value);
    setIsDirty(false);
  }, [value]);

  const handleChange = (e) => {
    setLocalValue(e.target.value);
    setIsDirty(e.target.value !== value);
  };

  return (
    <div className="collapse collapse-arrow bg-base-100 border border-base-200 rounded-lg shadow-sm">
      <input type="checkbox" checked={expanded} onChange={() => setExpanded(!expanded)} />
      <div className="collapse-title flex items-center justify-between pr-12">
        <div className="flex flex-col">
          <span className="font-semibold text-sm sm:text-base">{displayName}</span>
          <span className="text-xs text-base-content/60 font-normal truncate max-w-xs">
            {description || 'AI System Prompt'}
          </span>
        </div>
        {isDirty && <span className="badge badge-warning badge-xs">Unsaved</span>}
      </div>
      <div className="collapse-content">
        <textarea
          className="textarea textarea-bordered w-full font-mono text-sm leading-relaxed h-64 mt-2 overflow-y-auto"
          value={localValue || ''}
          onChange={handleChange}
        />
        <div className="flex justify-end gap-2 mt-3">
          <button
            className="btn btn-sm btn-ghost"
            onClick={() => {
              onReset(name);
              setIsDirty(false);
            }}
            disabled={!isDirty && !value}
          >
            <RotateCcw size={14} /> Reset
          </button>
          <button className="btn btn-sm btn-primary" onClick={() => onSave(name, localValue)} disabled={!isDirty}>
            <Save size={14} /> Save
          </button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
};

const AccountingPromptsTab = () => {
  const { organization } = useContext(AuthContext);
  const [prompts, setPrompts] = useState({});
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!organization?.id) return;

    setLoading(true);
    fetchWithAuth(`${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL}/settings/prompts`)
      .then(async (r) => {
        if (!r.ok) throw new Error('Failed to load prompts');
        return r.json();
      })
      .then((data) => {
        const filtered = {};
        Object.keys(promptMeta).forEach((key) => {
          filtered[key] = data[key] || '';
        });
        setPrompts(filtered);
      })
      .catch((error) => {
        console.error(error);
        toast.error(error.message || 'Failed to load AI prompts');
      })
      .finally(() => setLoading(false));
  }, [organization?.id]);

  const handleSave = async (name, val) => {
    try {
      const res = await fetchWithAuth(`${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL}/settings/prompts`, {
        method: 'PUT',
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
        body: JSON.stringify({ promptName: name, promptValue: val }),
      });

      if (!res.ok) {
        const data = await res.json().catch(() => ({}));
        throw new Error(data.error || 'Failed to save prompt');
      }

      toast.success('Saved');
      setPrompts((prev) => ({ ...prev, [name]: val }));
    } catch (error) {
      toast.error(error.message);
    }
  };

  const handleReset = async (name) => {
    if (!confirm('Reset to system default?')) return;

    try {
      const res = await fetchWithAuth(
        `${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL}/settings/prompts/${name}`,
        { method: 'DELETE' }
      );

      if (!res.ok) {
        const data = await res.json().catch(() => ({}));
        throw new Error(data.error || 'Failed to reset prompt');
      }

      toast.info('Prompt reset (refresh to see default)');
    } catch (error) {
      toast.error(error.message);
    }
  };

  if (loading) return <Loader />;

  const items = Object.entries(prompts);

  if (!items.length) {
    return (
      <div className="card bg-base-100 shadow-sm border border-base-200">
        <div className="card-body p-6 text-center text-base-content/60">
          No accounting prompts found.
        </div>
      </div>
    );
  }

  return (
    <div className="card bg-base-100 shadow-sm border border-base-200">
      <div className="card-body p-4 sm:p-6">
        <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-4">
          <h3 className="card-title text-lg text-primary">Accounting AI Prompts</h3>
        </div>
        <div className="space-y-3">
          {items.map(([key, value]) => (
            <PromptEditor
              key={key}
              name={key}
              value={value}
              onSave={handleSave}
              onReset={handleReset}
              description={promptMeta[key]?.description}
            />
          ))}
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
};

export default AccountingPromptsTab;

```

```jsx
// Full path: /home/luanngo/boss-dev/client/services/accounting/components/AccountingRuleDraftReview.jsx
import React from 'react';
import { BookOpen, Save } from 'lucide-react';
import { JournalTemplateDraftTable } from '../utils/AccountingJournalTemplateView';
import { formatAmount } from '../utils/formatAccounting';

export const formatRuleDraftSummary = (draft) => {
  if (!draft) return '';
  const parts = [draft.group, draft.transactionType, draft.categoryCode || draft.categoryDescription].filter(Boolean);
  return parts.join(' · ');
};

export default function AccountingRuleDraftReview({
  draft,
  matchedTransactionCount = 1,
  onDismiss,
  onApprove,
  approving = false,
  formatAmount: propsFormatAmount,
  className = 'rounded-box border border-base-300 bg-base-200/60 p-4 space-y-3',
  title = 'Suggested rule awaiting approval',
  matchedLabelPrefix = 'This suggestion matches about',
}) {
  if (!draft) return null;

  const summary = formatRuleDraftSummary(draft);
  const matchCount = matchedTransactionCount || 1;
  const journalLines = Array.isArray(draft.journalTemplateLines) ? draft.journalTemplateLines : [];
  const fmtAmount = propsFormatAmount || formatAmount;

  return (
    <div className={className}>
      <div className="flex flex-col gap-2 lg:flex-row lg:items-center lg:justify-between">
        <div>
          <div className="font-semibold flex items-center gap-2"><BookOpen size={16} /> {title}</div>
          <div className="text-sm text-base-content/70">{draft.name}</div>
          {summary ? <div className="text-xs text-base-content/60">{summary}</div> : null}
        </div>
        <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2">
          {onDismiss ? (
            <button type="button" className="btn btn-ghost btn-sm" onClick={onDismiss}>Dismiss</button>
          ) : null}
          {onApprove ? (
            <button type="button" className="btn btn-primary btn-sm" onClick={onApprove} disabled={approving}>
              {approving ? <span className="loading loading-spinner loading-sm" /> : <Save size={14} />}
              Approve & save rule
            </button>
          ) : null}
        </div>
      </div>

      {draft.llmSummary ? <div className="text-sm text-base-content/80">{draft.llmSummary}</div> : null}

      {Array.isArray(draft.patterns) && draft.patterns.length ? (
        <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2">
          {draft.patterns.map((pattern) => <span key={pattern} className="badge badge-ghost">{pattern}</span>)}
        </div>
      ) : null}

      <div className="text-xs text-base-content/60">
        {matchedLabelPrefix} {matchCount} transaction{matchCount === 1 ? '' : 's'}. Nothing is saved until you approve it.
      </div>

      {journalLines.length ? <JournalTemplateDraftTable lines={journalLines} formatAmount={fmtAmount} /> : null}
    </div>
  );
}
```

```jsx
// Full path: /home/luanngo/boss-dev/client/services/accounting/components/AccountingRules.jsx
import React, { useCallback, useEffect, useMemo, useState } from 'react';
import { fetchWithAuth } from '@/shared/utils/fetchWithAuth';
import { toast } from 'react-toastify';
import {
  BookOpen,
  Calendar as CalendarIcon,
  CheckCircle2,
  Eye,
  Filter,
  Pencil,
  Play,
  Copy,
  PlusCircle,
  RefreshCw,
  Save,
  Trash2,
  Wand2,
  X,
  Bot,
  GitBranch,
} from 'lucide-react';
import { useGenericSocket } from '@/shared/hooks/useGenericSocket';
import { defaultRuleForm as defaultForm, ruleToFormState as toFormState, ruleFormToPayload as formToPayload, parseJsonArrayText } from '../utils/ruleUtils';
import AccountAutocomplete from './AccountAutocomplete';
import TransactionGroupModal from './TransactionGroupModal';

const transactionTypes = [
  '',
  'BANK_EXPENSE',
  'BANK_REVENUE',
  'TRANSFER',
  'CREDIT_CARD_PAYMENT',
  'PAYROLL_PAYMENT',
  'TAX_REMITTANCE',
  'OWNER_DRAW',
  'OWNER_CONTRIBUTION',
];

const RuleDraftModal = ({ open, onClose, onApply, selectedIds = [] }) => {
  const [prompt, setPrompt] = useState('');
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!open) {
      setPrompt('');
      setLoading(false);
    }
  }, [open]);

  const handleGenerate = async () => {
    if (!prompt.trim()) {
      toast.error('Enter instructions for the rule draft.');
      return;
    }

    try {
      setLoading(true);
      toast.info('AI is drafting an accounting rule...');
      const res = await fetchWithAuth(`${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL}/accounting/rules/ai-draft`, {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
        body: JSON.stringify({ prompt: prompt.trim(), selectedTransactionIds: selectedIds }),
      });
      const data = await res.json().catch(() => ({}));
      if (!res.ok) throw new Error(data.error || 'Failed to generate AI rule draft.');
      onApply(data.draft || null);
      onClose();
      toast.success('AI rule draft ready.');
    } catch (error) {
      toast.error(error.message || 'Failed to generate AI rule draft.');
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  };

  if (!open) return null;

  return (
    <dialog className="modal modal-open">
      <div className="modal-box max-w-2xl">
        <h3 className="font-bold text-lg flex items-center gap-2">
          <Wand2 size={18} /> Draft rule with AI
        </h3>
        <p className="py-2 text-sm text-base-content/70">
          Describe the rule you want. Selected transactions will be used as examples when available.
        </p>
        <textarea
          className="textarea textarea-bordered w-full h-40"
          value={prompt}
          onChange={(event) => setPrompt(event.target.value)}
          placeholder="Examples: Categorize Augusta produce purchases as raw materials. Match credit-card expenses from the same vendor. Require receipts for larger food-supply purchases."
        />
        <div className="modal-action">
          <button className="btn btn-ghost" onClick={onClose} disabled={loading}>Cancel</button>
          <button className="btn btn-primary" onClick={handleGenerate} disabled={loading || !prompt.trim()}>
            {loading ? <span className="loading loading-spinner loading-sm" /> : <Wand2 size={16} />}
            Generate draft
          </button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </dialog>
  );
};



const batchTemplate = JSON.stringify([
  {
    name: 'Augusta produce purchases',
    group: 'Vendors',
    patterns: ['augusta', 'fruit market'],
    sourceType: 'CREDIT_CARD',
    amountDirection: 'EXPENSE',
    transactionType: 'CREDIT_CARD_PAYMENT',
    categoryId: '',
    autoCategory: true,
    autoApplyTaxes: false,
    requiredReceipt: false,
    notes: 'Example batch rule generated from repeated produce purchases.',
    llmSummary: 'Batch-created example rule.',
    proposalSource: 'BATCH'
  }
], null, 2);

const BatchRuleModal = ({ open, onClose, onCreate }) => {
  const [value, setValue] = useState(batchTemplate);
  const [saving, setSaving] = useState(false);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!open) {
      setValue(batchTemplate);
      setSaving(false);
    }
  }, [open]);

  const handleSubmit = async () => {
    let parsed;
    try {
      parsed = JSON.parse(value);
    } catch (error) {
      toast.error('Batch rules must be valid JSON.');
      return;
    }

    const rules = Array.isArray(parsed) ? parsed : Array.isArray(parsed?.rules) ? parsed.rules : null;
    if (!rules || !rules.length) {
      toast.error('Provide a JSON array of rules.');
      return;
    }

    try {
      setSaving(true);
      await onCreate(rules);
      onClose();
    } finally {
      setSaving(false);
    }
  };

  if (!open) return null;

  return (
    <dialog className="modal modal-open">
      <div className="modal-box max-w-3xl">
        <h3 className="font-bold text-lg flex items-center gap-2">
          <PlusCircle size={18} /> Create batch rules
        </h3>
        <p className="py-2 text-sm text-base-content/70">
          Paste a JSON array of rule objects. This is useful when you want to create many vendor or pattern rules at once.
        </p>
        <textarea
          className="textarea textarea-bordered w-full h-80 font-mono text-sm"
          value={value}
          onChange={(event) => setValue(event.target.value)}
        />
        <div className="modal-action">
          <button className="btn btn-ghost" onClick={onClose} disabled={saving}>Cancel</button>
          <button className="btn btn-primary" onClick={handleSubmit} disabled={saving}>
            {saving ? <span className="loading loading-spinner loading-sm" /> : <Save size={16} />}
            Create batch
          </button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </dialog>
  );
};

export const RuleEditor = ({

        <label className="label cursor-pointer justify-start gap-2"><input className="checkbox checkbox-sm" type="checkbox" checked={form.autoApplyTaxes} onChange={(e) => update('autoApplyTaxes', e.target.checked)} /><span className="label-text">Auto taxes</span></label>
        <label className="label cursor-pointer justify-start gap-2"><input className="checkbox checkbox-sm" type="checkbox" checked={form.requiredReceipt} onChange={(e) => update('requiredReceipt', e.target.checked)} /><span className="label-text">Require receipt</span></label>
      </div>

      <div className="flex justify-end gap-2">
        {onCancel ? <button type="button" className="btn btn-ghost" onClick={onCancel}><X size={16} /> Cancel</button> : null}
        <button type="button" className="btn btn-primary" onClick={onSave} disabled={saving}>
          {saving ? <span className="loading loading-spinner loading-sm" /> : <Save size={16} />}
          Save rule
        </button>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
};

const RuleCard = ({ rule, onEdit, onDelete, onRunSelection, runningRuleId, selectedCount, onDetail }) => {
  const meta = rule.meta || {};
  return (
    <div className="card bg-base-100 border border-base-300 shadow-sm">
      <div className="card-body gap-3">
        <div className="flex flex-col gap-3 lg:flex-row lg:items-start lg:justify-between">
          <div className="space-y-2">
            <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2 items-center">
              <div className="font-semibold text-base">{rule.name}</div>
              <span className="badge badge-outline">{meta.group || 'General'}</span>
              <span className={`badge ${meta.enabled === false ? 'badge-ghost' : 'badge-success badge-outline'}`}>{meta.enabled === false ? 'Disabled' : 'Enabled'}</span>
              {rule.category ? <span className="badge badge-primary badge-outline">{rule.category.code} — {rule.category.description}</span> : null}
              {meta.transactionType ? <span className="badge badge-secondary badge-outline">{meta.transactionType}</span> : null}
            </div>
            {meta.notes ? <div className="text-sm text-base-content/80">{meta.notes}</div> : null}
            {meta.llmSummary ? <div className="text-xs text-base-content/60">{meta.llmSummary}</div> : null}
            {Array.isArray(meta.patterns) && meta.patterns.length ? (
              <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2">
                {meta.patterns.map((pattern) => <span key={pattern} className="badge badge-ghost">{pattern}</span>)}
              </div>
            ) : null}
            {rule.sql ? <pre className="rounded-box bg-base-200 p-3 text-xs whitespace-pre-wrap break-all font-mono">{rule.sql}</pre> : null}
          </div>
          <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2 lg:justify-end">
            <button type="button" className="btn btn-outline btn-sm" onClick={() => onDetail(rule)}><Eye size={14} /> Details</button>
            <button type="button" className="btn btn-outline btn-sm" onClick={() => onEdit(rule)}><Pencil size={14} /> Edit</button>
            <button type="button" className="btn btn-outline btn-sm" onClick={() => onRunSelection(rule.id)} disabled={runningRuleId === rule.id || selectedCount === 0}>
              {runningRuleId === rule.id ? <span className="loading loading-spinner loading-sm" /> : <Play size={14} />}
              Run on selected ({selectedCount})
            </button>
            <button type="button" className="btn btn-ghost btn-sm" onClick={() => onDelete(rule.id)}><Trash2 size={14} /> Delete</button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
};

const AccountingRulesManager = ({ selectedIds = [] }) => {
  const [rules, setRules] = useState([]);
  const [categories, setCategories] = useState([]);
  const [filterKeyword, setFilterKeyword] = useState('');
  const [groupFilter, setGroupFilter] = useState('');
  const [showDisabled, setShowDisabled] = useState(true);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);
  const [saving, setSaving] = useState(false);
  const [runningRuleId, setRunningRuleId] = useState(null);
  const [runDateFrom, setRunDateFrom] = useState('');
  const [runDateTo, setRunDateTo] = useState('');
  const [runProgress, setRunProgress] = useState({ message: '', current: 0, total: 0 });
  const [createForm, setCreateForm] = useState(defaultForm);
  const [editingRule, setEditingRule] = useState(null);
  const [editForm, setEditForm] = useState(defaultForm);
  const [showAIDraftModal, setShowAIDraftModal] = useState(false);
  const [showBatchModal, setShowBatchModal] = useState(false);
  const [aiTarget, setAiTarget] = useState('create');
  const [ruleAnalysis, setRuleAnalysis] = useState(null);
  const [analyzingRule, setAnalyzingRule] = useState(false);
  const [detailRule, setDetailRule] = useState(null);
  const { socket } = useGenericSocket('accounting');

  const fetchAll = useCallback(async () => {
    setLoading(true);
    try {
      const [rulesRes, categoriesRes] = await Promise.all([
        fetchWithAuth(`${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL}/accounting/rules`),
        fetchWithAuth(`${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL}/accounting/categories?view=all`),
      ]);

      const rulesData = await rulesRes.json().catch(() => ({}));
      const categoriesData = await categoriesRes.json().catch(() => ({}));
      if (!rulesRes.ok) throw new Error(rulesData.error || 'Failed to fetch rules.');
      if (!categoriesRes.ok) throw new Error(categoriesData.error || 'Failed to fetch categories.');
      setRules(Array.isArray(rulesData.rules) ? rulesData.rules : []);
      setCategories(Array.isArray(categoriesData) ? categoriesData : Array.isArray(categoriesData.categories) ? categoriesData.categories : []);
    } catch (error) {
      toast.error(error.message || 'Failed to load rules.');
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  }, []);

  useEffect(() => {
    fetchAll();
  }, [fetchAll]);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!socket) return undefined;
    const handler = (data) => setRunProgress({ message: data.message, current: data.current, total: data.total });
    socket.on('accounting:rule-progress', handler);
    return () => socket.off('accounting:rule-progress', handler);
  }, [socket]);

  const groups = useMemo(() => Array.from(new Set(rules.map((rule) => rule?.meta?.group || 'General'))).sort(), [rules]);

  const filteredRules = useMemo(() => {
    const keyword = filterKeyword.trim().toLowerCase();
    return rules.filter((rule) => {
      const meta = rule.meta || {};
      if (!showDisabled && meta.enabled === false) return false;
      if (groupFilter && (meta.group || 'General') !== groupFilter) return false;
      if (!keyword) return true;
      const haystack = [
        rule.name,
        rule.sql,
        meta.group,
        meta.notes,
        meta.llmSummary,
        ...(meta.patterns || []),
      ].join(' ').toLowerCase();
      return haystack.includes(keyword);
    });
  }, [filterKeyword, groupFilter, rules, showDisabled]);

  const groupedRules = useMemo(() => {
    return filteredRules.reduce((accumulator, rule) => {
      const group = rule?.meta?.group || 'General';
      if (!accumulator[group]) accumulator[group] = [];
      accumulator[group].push(rule);
      return accumulator;
    }, {});
  }, [filteredRules]);

  const handleSaveCreate = async () => {
    const payload = formToPayload(createForm);
    if (!payload.name) {
      toast.error('Rule name is required.');
      return;
    }
    try {
      setSaving(true);
      const res = await fetchWithAuth(`${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL}/accounting/rules`, {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
        body: JSON.stringify(payload),
      });
      const data = await res.json().catch(() => ({}));
      if (!res.ok) throw new Error(data.error || 'Failed to create rule.');
      toast.success('Rule created.');
      setCreateForm(defaultForm);
      fetchAll();
    } catch (error) {
      toast.error(error.message || 'Failed to create rule.');
    } finally {
      setSaving(false);
    }
  };

  const handleSaveEdit = async () => {
    if (!editingRule) return;
    const payload = formToPayload(editForm);
    if (!payload.name) {
      toast.error('Rule name is required.');
      return;
    }
    try {
      setSaving(true);
      const res = await fetchWithAuth(`${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL}/accounting/rules/${editingRule.id}`, {
        method: 'PUT',
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
        body: JSON.stringify(payload),
      });
      const data = await res.json().catch(() => ({}));
      if (!res.ok) throw new Error(data.error || 'Failed to update rule.');
      toast.success('Rule updated.');
      setEditingRule(null);
      setEditForm(defaultForm);
      fetchAll();
    } catch (error) {
      toast.error(error.message || 'Failed to update rule.');
    } finally {
      setSaving(false);
    }
  };

  const handleDeleteRule = async (ruleId) => {
    if (!window.confirm('Delete this rule?')) return;
    try {
      const res = await fetchWithAuth(`${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL}/accounting/rules/${ruleId}`, { method: 'DELETE' });
      const data = await res.json().catch(() => ({}));
      if (!res.ok) throw new Error(data.error || 'Failed to delete rule.');
      toast.success('Rule deleted.');
      fetchAll();
    } catch (error) {
      toast.error(error.message || 'Failed to delete rule.');
    }
  };

  const handleRunSelection = async (ruleId) => {
    if (!selectedIds.length) {
      toast.info('Select transactions first.');
      return;
    }
    try {
      setRunningRuleId(ruleId);
      const res = await fetchWithAuth(`${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL}/accounting/rules/${ruleId}/run`, {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
        body: JSON.stringify({ transactionIds: selectedIds }),
      });
      const data = await res.json().catch(() => ({}));
      if (!res.ok) throw new Error(data.error || 'Failed to run rule.');
      toast.success(data.message || 'Rule ran successfully.');
      window.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent('refetchTransactions'));
    } catch (error) {
      toast.error(error.message || 'Failed to run rule.');
    } finally {
      setRunningRuleId(null);
    }
  };

  const handleRunAll = async () => {
    if (!runDateFrom && !runDateTo) {
      toast.info('Choose a date range first.');
      return;
    }
    try {
      setRunningRuleId('__ALL__');
      setRunProgress({ message: 'Starting rule execution...', current: 0, total: 1 });
      const res = await fetchWithAuth(`${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL}/accounting/rules/__ALL__/run`, {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
        body: JSON.stringify({ dateFrom: runDateFrom || null, dateTo: runDateTo || null }),
      });
      const data = await res.json().catch(() => ({}));
      if (!res.ok) throw new Error(data.error || 'Failed to run rules.');
      toast.success(data.message || 'Rules executed.');
      window.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent('refetchTransactions'));
    } catch (error) {
      toast.error(error.message || 'Failed to run rules.');
    } finally {
      setRunningRuleId(null);
    }
  };



const handleCopyAllRules = async () => {
  const payload = rules.map((rule) => ({
    name: rule.name,
    group: rule?.meta?.group || 'General',
    notes: rule?.meta?.notes || '',
    patterns: Array.isArray(rule?.meta?.patterns) ? rule.meta.patterns : [],
    sql: rule.sql || '',
    enabled: rule?.meta?.enabled !== false,
    matchMode: rule?.meta?.matchMode || 'ANY',
    sourceType: rule?.meta?.sourceType || null,
    transactionType: rule?.meta?.transactionType || null,
    amountDirection: rule?.meta?.amountDirection || 'ANY',
    categoryId: rule.categoryId || null,
    categoryCode: rule?.category?.code || null,
    categoryDescription: rule?.category?.description || null,
    autoCategory: Boolean(rule.autoCategory),
    autoApplyTaxes: Boolean(rule.autoApplyTaxes),
    requiredReceipt: Boolean(rule.requiredReceipt),
    llmSummary: rule?.meta?.llmSummary || '',
    proposalSource: rule?.meta?.proposalSource || null,
    journalMode: rule?.meta?.journalMode || 'STANDARD',
    journalTemplateLines: Array.isArray(rule?.meta?.journalTemplateLines) ? rule.meta.journalTemplateLines : [],
  }));

  try {
    await navigator.clipboard.writeText(JSON.stringify(payload, null, 2));
    toast.success(`Copied ${payload.length} rule${payload.length === 1 ? '' : 's'} to the clipboard.`);
  } catch (error) {
    toast.error('Failed to copy rules to the clipboard.');
  }
};

const handleDeleteAllRules = async () => {
  if (!rules.length) {
    toast.info('There are no rules to delete.');
    return;
  }
  if (!window.confirm(`Delete all ${rules.length} rules? This cannot be undone.`)) return;
  try {
    const res = await fetchWithAuth(`${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL}/accounting/rules`, { method: 'DELETE' });
    const data = await res.json().catch(() => ({}));
    if (!res.ok) throw new Error(data.error || 'Failed to delete all rules.');
    toast.success(data.message || 'All rules deleted.');
    if (editingRule) {
      setEditingRule(null);
      setEditForm(defaultForm);
    }
    fetchAll();
  } catch (error) {
    toast.error(error.message || 'Failed to delete all rules.');
  }
};

const handleCreateBatchRules = async (rulesToCreate = []) => {
  const normalizedRules = Array.isArray(rulesToCreate) ? rulesToCreate : [];
  if (!normalizedRules.length) {
    toast.error('No rules were provided for batch creation.');
    return;
  }
  try {
    setSaving(true);
    const res = await fetchWithAuth(`${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL}/accounting/rules/batch`, {
      method: 'POST',
      headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
      body: JSON.stringify({ rules: normalizedRules }),
    });
    const data = await res.json().catch(() => ({}));
    if (!res.ok) throw new Error(data.error || 'Failed to create batch rules.');
    toast.success(data.message || 'Batch rules created.');
    fetchAll();
  } catch (error) {
    toast.error(error.message || 'Failed to create batch rules.');
    throw error;
  } finally {
    setSaving(false);
  }
};

  const handleAnalyzeEditRule = async () => {
    if (!editingRule) return;
    try {
      setAnalyzingRule(true);
      toast.info('AI is analyzing this accounting rule...');
      const payload = formToPayload(editForm);
      const res = await fetchWithAuth(`${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL}/accounting/rules/${editingRule.id}/ai-analyze`, {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
        body: JSON.stringify({ rule: payload }),
      });
      const data = await res.json().catch(() => ({}));
      if (!res.ok) throw new Error(data.error || 'Failed to analyze rule.');
      setRuleAnalysis(data.analysis || null);
      toast.success('AI analysis ready. Review it before saving.');
    } catch (error) {
      toast.error(error.message || 'Failed to analyze rule.');
    } finally {
      setAnalyzingRule(false);
    }
  };

  const openDetail = (rule) => {
    setDetailRule(rule);
  };

  const openEdit = (rule) => {
    setEditingRule(rule);
    setEditForm(toFormState(rule));
    setRuleAnalysis(null);
  };

  const applyAIDraft = (draft) => {
    if (!draft) return;
    const mapped = {
      ...defaultForm,
      name: draft.name || '',
      group: draft.group || 'General',
      notes: draft.notes || '',
      patternsText: Array.isArray(draft.patterns) ? draft.patterns.join('\n') : '',
      sql: draft.sql || '',
      enabled: draft.enabled !== false,
      matchMode: draft.matchMode || 'ANY',
      sourceType: draft.sourceType || '',
      transactionType: draft.transactionType || '',
      amountDirection: draft.amountDirection || 'ANY',
      categoryId: draft.categoryId || '',
      autoCategory: Boolean(draft.autoCategory),
      autoApplyTaxes: Boolean(draft.autoApplyTaxes),
      requiredReceipt: Boolean(draft.requiredReceipt),
      llmSummary: draft.llmSummary || '',
      proposalSource: draft.proposalSource || 'AI',
      journalMode: draft.journalMode || 'STANDARD',
      journalTemplateText: Array.isArray(draft.journalTemplateLines) ? JSON.stringify(draft.journalTemplateLines, null, 2) : '',
    };

    if (aiTarget === 'edit') {
      setEditForm((current) => ({ ...current, ...mapped }));
    } else {
      setCreateForm((current) => ({ ...current, ...mapped }));
    }
  };

  return (
    <div className="space-y-5 p-3 bg-base-100 rounded-box">
      <div className="flex flex-col gap-3 lg:flex-row lg:items-center lg:justify-between">
        <div>
          <h3 className="text-lg font-semibold flex items-center gap-2"><BookOpen size={20} /> Accounting Rules</h3>
          <p className="text-sm text-base-content/70">Create, organize, run, and edit rule-driven automations. AI can draft full rule definitions, not just SQL.</p>
        </div>
        <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2">
          <button type="button" className="btn btn-outline btn-sm" onClick={fetchAll}><RefreshCw size={14} /> Refresh</button>
          <button type="button" className="btn btn-outline btn-sm" onClick={handleCopyAllRules}><Copy size={14} /> Copy all rules</button>
          <button type="button" className="btn btn-outline btn-sm" onClick={() => setShowBatchModal(true)}><PlusCircle size={14} /> Batch rules</button>
          <button type="button" className="btn btn-outline btn-sm btn-error" onClick={handleDeleteAllRules}><Trash2 size={14} /> Delete all rules</button>
          <button type="button" className="btn btn-outline btn-sm" onClick={() => { setAiTarget('create'); setShowAIDraftModal(true); }}><Wand2 size={14} /> AI draft</button>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div className="rounded-box border border-base-300 bg-base-200/50 p-4 space-y-3">
        <div className="font-semibold flex items-center gap-2"><CalendarIcon size={16} /> Run all rules over a period</div>
        <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-3">
          <input type="datetime-local" className="input input-bordered" value={runDateFrom} onChange={(e) => setRunDateFrom(e.target.value)} />
          <input type="datetime-local" className="input input-bordered" value={runDateTo} onChange={(e) => setRunDateTo(e.target.value)} />
          <button type="button" className="btn btn-primary" onClick={handleRunAll} disabled={runningRuleId === '__ALL__'}>
            {runningRuleId === '__ALL__' ? <span className="loading loading-spinner loading-sm" /> : <Play size={14} />}
            Run all rules
          </button>
        </div>
        {runningRuleId === '__ALL__' && runProgress.total > 0 ? (
          <div>
            <div className="text-sm text-base-content/70 mb-1">{runProgress.message}</div>
            <progress className="progress progress-primary w-full" value={runProgress.current} max={runProgress.total} />
          </div>
        ) : null}
      </div>

      <RuleEditor
        title="Add new rule"
        form={createForm}
        setForm={setCreateForm}
        categories={categories}
        onSave={handleSaveCreate}
        saving={saving && !editingRule}
        onAIDraft={() => { setAiTarget('create'); setShowAIDraftModal(true); }}
        onApplySuggested={applyAIDraft}
        analysis={null}
        analyzing={false}
      />

      {editingRule ? (
        <RuleEditor
          title={`Edit rule: ${editingRule.name}`}
          form={editForm}
          setForm={setEditForm}
          categories={categories}
          onSave={handleSaveEdit}
          onCancel={() => { setEditingRule(null); setEditForm(defaultForm); setRuleAnalysis(null); }}
          saving={saving}
          onAIDraft={() => { setAiTarget('edit'); setShowAIDraftModal(true); }}
          onAIAnalyze={handleAnalyzeEditRule}
          onApplySuggested={applyAIDraft}
          analysis={ruleAnalysis}
          analyzing={analyzingRule}
        />
      ) : null}

      <div className="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-3">
        <label className="input input-bordered flex items-center gap-2 lg:col-span-2">
          <Filter size={16} />
          <input className="grow" value={filterKeyword} onChange={(e) => setFilterKeyword(e.target.value)} placeholder="Filter by name, notes, SQL, or patterns" />
        </label>
        <select className="select select-bordered" value={groupFilter} onChange={(e) => setGroupFilter(e.target.value)}>
          <option value="">All groups</option>
          {groups.map((group) => <option key={group} value={group}>{group}</option>)}
        </select>
      </div>
      <label className="label cursor-pointer justify-start gap-2 w-fit"><input className="checkbox checkbox-sm" type="checkbox" checked={showDisabled} onChange={(e) => setShowDisabled(e.target.checked)} /><span className="label-text">Show disabled rules</span></label>

      {loading ? (
        <div className="py-12 text-center"><span className="loading loading-spinner loading-lg" /></div>
      ) : Object.keys(groupedRules).length === 0 ? (
        <div className="alert"><span>No rules found for the current filters.</span></div>
      ) : (
        <div className="space-y-5">
          {Object.entries(groupedRules).sort(([a], [b]) => a.localeCompare(b)).map(([group, groupRules]) => (
            <div key={group} className="space-y-3">
              <div className="text-sm font-semibold uppercase tracking-wide text-base-content/60">{group}</div>
              <div className="space-y-3">
                {groupRules.map((rule) => (
                  <RuleCard
                    key={rule.id}
                    rule={rule}
                    onEdit={openEdit}
                    onDelete={handleDeleteRule}
                    onRunSelection={handleRunSelection}
                    runningRuleId={runningRuleId}
                    selectedCount={selectedIds.length}
                    onDetail={openDetail}
                  />
                ))}
              </div>
            </div>
          ))}
        </div>
      )}

      <BatchRuleModal
        open={showBatchModal}
        onClose={() => setShowBatchModal(false)}
        onCreate={handleCreateBatchRules}
      />

      <RuleDraftModal
        open={showAIDraftModal}
        onClose={() => setShowAIDraftModal(false)}
        onApply={applyAIDraft}
        selectedIds={selectedIds}
      />

      {detailRule ? (
        <TransactionGroupModal
          group={null}
          rule={detailRule}
          accounts={categories}
          onClose={() => { setDetailRule(null); fetchAll(); }}
```
