```jsx
          onChanged={() => { fetchAll(); }}
          onViewTransaction={(tx) => {
            window.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent('refetchTransactions'));
          }}
        />
      ) : null}
    </div>
  );
};

export default AccountingRulesManager;

```

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
FILE: client/services/accounting/components/AccountingWidget.jsx
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
```jsx
// Full path: /home/luanngo/boss-dev/client/services/accounting/components/AccountingWidget.jsx
// client/services/accounting/components/AccountingWidget.js
import React, { useEffect, useState, useMemo, useContext } from "react";
import moment from "moment-timezone";
import { toast } from "react-toastify";
import {
  DollarSign,
  BarChart2,
  ChartArea,
  SquareChartGantt,
  History,
  RefreshCw,
} from "lucide-react";
import BaseWidget from "@/shared/components/BaseWidget";
import { useRouter } from "next/router";
import { AuthContext } from "@/shared/context/AuthContext";
import { fetchWithAuth } from "@/shared/utils/fetchWithAuth";

const DEFAULT_TZ = "America/Toronto";

const AccountingWidget = () => {
  const { user, organization } = useContext(AuthContext);
  const tz = organization?.timezone || DEFAULT_TZ;
  const fmtDate = (d) => moment(d).tz(tz).format("YYYY-MM-DD");
  const router = useRouter();

  // View mode
  const [viewMode, setViewMode] = useState(() => {
    if (typeof window !== "undefined") {
      return localStorage.getItem("AccountingWidgetViewMode") || "advanced";
    }
    return "advanced";
  });

  // Sales-like quick actions
  const [fetchingRecent, setFetchingRecent] = useState(false);
  const [loadingSummary, setLoadingSummary] = useState(false);
  const [summaryRows, setSummaryRows] = useState([]);

  const today = useMemo(() => fmtDate(new Date()), []);

  useEffect(() => {
    loadTodayHourlySummary();
  }, [today]);

  const toggleViewMode = () => {
    const newMode = viewMode === "advanced" ? "simple" : "advanced";
    setViewMode(newMode);
    if (typeof window !== "undefined") {
      localStorage.setItem("AccountingWidgetViewMode", newMode);
    }
  };

  // Pull most-recent sales from Square (like SalesDashboard)
  const handleFetchRecentTransactions = async () => {
    setFetchingRecent(true);
    try {
      const url = `${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL}/accounting/sales/recent?sort_order=desc`;
      const res = await fetchWithAuth(url, { headers: {} });
      if (!res.ok) throw new Error("Failed to fetch most recent transactions.");
      const data = await res.json();
      toast.success(`Fetched ${data.count} new transactions from Square.`);
      await loadTodayHourlySummary();
    } catch (e) {
      console.error(e);
      toast.error("Failed to fetch most recent transactions.");
    } finally {
      setFetchingRecent(false);
    }
  };

  // Today's summary by hour across all devices
  const loadTodayHourlySummary = async () => {
    setLoadingSummary(true);
    try {
      const url = `${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL}/accounting/sales/summary?groupBy=hour&startDate=${today}&endDate=${today}&devices=all`;
      const res = await fetchWithAuth(url, { headers: {} });
      if (!res.ok) throw new Error("Failed to fetch today's hourly summary.");
      const data = await res.json();
      setSummaryRows(Array.isArray(data) ? data : []);
    } catch (e) {
      console.error(e);
      toast.error("Failed to load daily summary by hour.");
      setSummaryRows([]);
    } finally {
      setLoadingSummary(false);
    }
  };

  // Aggregate a single row for today's totals
  const todayTotals = useMemo(() => {
    const acc = {
      total_money: 0,
      amount_money: 0,
      tip_money: 0,
      tax_amount: 0,
      count: 0,
    };
    for (const r of summaryRows) {
      acc.total_money += Number(r.total_money || 0);
      acc.amount_money += Number(r.amount_money || 0);
      acc.tip_money += Number(r.tip_money || 0);
      acc.tax_amount += Number(r.tax_amount || 0);
      acc.count += Number(r.count || 0);
    }
    return acc;
  }, [summaryRows]);

  const headerActions = (
    <div className="flex space-x-2">
      <div className="tooltip tooltip-left" data-tip="Fetch Most Recent Sales">
        <button
          onClick={handleFetchRecentTransactions}
          className="btn btn-sm bg-purple-600 text-white hover:bg-purple-700"
          disabled={fetchingRecent}
        >
          <History size={16} />
        </button>
      </div>
      <div className="tooltip tooltip-left" data-tip="Refresh Today">
        <button
          onClick={loadTodayHourlySummary}
          className="btn btn-sm"
          disabled={loadingSummary}
        >
          <RefreshCw size={16} />
        </button>
      </div>
      <div
        className="tooltip tooltip-left"
        data-tip={viewMode === "advanced" ? "Switch to Simple View" : "Switch to Advanced View"}
      >
        <button onClick={toggleViewMode} className="btn btn-sm">
          {viewMode === "advanced" ? <ChartArea size={16} /> : <SquareChartGantt size={16} />}
        </button>
      </div>
      <div className="tooltip tooltip-left" data-tip="Open Accounting">
        <button
          onClick={() => router.push("/accounting")}
          className="btn btn-sm bg-green-600 text-white hover:bg-green-700"
        >
          <BarChart2 size={16} />
        </button>
      </div>
    </div>
  );

  const simpleView = (
    <div className="p-4">
      <p className="text-base-content">Accounting quick view.</p>
    </div>
  );

  const advancedView = (
    <div className="p-4 space-y-4">
      {/* Single-row summary for today's totals */}
      <div>
        <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-2">
          <h3 className="font-semibold">Today’s Totals (All Devices)</h3>
          <div className="text-xs opacity-70">Date: {today}</div>
        </div>
        <div className="overflow-x-auto">
          <table className="table table-zebra table-sm">
            <thead>
              <tr>
                <th>Label</th>
                <th>Total</th>
                <th>Amount</th>
                <th>Tips</th>
                <th>Tax</th>
                <th>Count</th>
              </tr>
            </thead>
            <tbody>
              <tr>
                <td>Today</td>
                <td>${todayTotals.total_money.toLocaleString()}</td>
                <td>${todayTotals.amount_money.toLocaleString()}</td>
                <td>${todayTotals.tip_money.toLocaleString()}</td>
                <td>${todayTotals.tax_amount.toLocaleString()}</td>
                <td>{todayTotals.count.toLocaleString()}</td>
              </tr>
            </tbody>
          </table>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Hourly breakdown table */}
      <div>
        <div className="font-medium mb-2">Hourly Breakdown</div>
        {loadingSummary ? (
          <p>Loading summary…</p>
        ) : summaryRows.length === 0 ? (
          <div className="text-sm opacity-70">No data.</div>
        ) : (
          <div className="overflow-x-auto">
            <table className="table table-sm">
              <thead>
                <tr>
                  <th>Period</th>
                  {"total_money" in summaryRows[0] && <th>Total</th>}
                  {"amount_money" in summaryRows[0] && <th>Amount</th>}
                  {"tip_money" in summaryRows[0] && <th>Tips</th>}
                  {"tax_amount" in summaryRows[0] && <th>Tax</th>}
                  {"count" in summaryRows[0] && <th>Count</th>}
                </tr>
              </thead>
              <tbody>
                {summaryRows.map((row, idx) => {
                  const period =
                    row.period || row.label || row.date || row.hour || `#${idx + 1}`;
                  return (
                    <tr key={idx}>
                      <td className="whitespace-nowrap">{String(period)}</td>
                      {"total_money" in row && (
                        <td>${Number(row.total_money || 0).toLocaleString()}</td>
                      )}
                      {"amount_money" in row && (
                        <td>${Number(row.amount_money || 0).toLocaleString()}</td>
                      )}
                      {"tip_money" in row && (
                        <td>${Number(row.tip_money || 0).toLocaleString()}</td>
                      )}
                      {"tax_amount" in row && (
                        <td>${Number(row.tax_amount || 0).toLocaleString()}</td>
                      )}
                      {"count" in row && <td>{Number(row.count || 0).toLocaleString()}</td>}
                    </tr>
                  );
                })}
              </tbody>
            </table>
          </div>
        )}
      </div>
    </div>
  );

  return (
    <BaseWidget
      title="Accounting"
      path="/accounting"
      icon={<DollarSign />}
      headerActions={headerActions}
      viewMode={viewMode}
    >
      {viewMode === "simple" ? simpleView : advancedView}
    </BaseWidget>
  );
};

export default AccountingWidget;

```

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
FILE: client/services/accounting/components/AIRuleSuggestionsTab.jsx
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
```jsx
// Full path: /home/luanngo/boss-dev/client/services/accounting/components/AIRuleSuggestionsTab.jsx
'use client';
import React, { useState, useCallback, useEffect } from 'react';
import { toast } from 'react-toastify';
import { fetchWithAuth } from '@/shared/utils/fetchWithAuth';
import AccountingChartManager from './AccountingChartManager';
import { RuleEditor } from './AccountingRules';
import {
  Sparkles, RefreshCw, CheckCircle, XCircle, ChevronDown, ChevronRight,
  AlertTriangle, Info, Zap, BookOpen, TrendingUp, DollarSign,
  Edit3, Save, Plus, Trash2, Lightbulb, Layers, FileText,
  AlertCircle, Clock, Ban, RotateCw, Database, Target, Play
} from 'lucide-react';
import { formatMoney as fmt, formatDate as fmtDate } from '../utils/formatAccounting';
import { AccountingStatCard, AccountingEmptyState, AccountingLoadingState } from '../utils/AccountingDisplayComponents';
import AccountAutocomplete from './AccountAutocomplete';
import { JournalTemplatePreview, JournalTemplateLines, AccountCodeButton, FormulaHelp, deriveJournalTemplateLines, templateLine } from '../utils/AccountingJournalTemplateView';
import TransactionGroupModal from './TransactionGroupModal';

const SERVER = process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL;

const toneMap = { indigo: 'primary', amber: 'accent', emerald: 'success', red: 'negative', slate: 'default' };
const SummaryCard = ({ icon, label, value, sublabel, color }) => (
  <AccountingStatCard icon={icon} label={label} value={value} sublabel={sublabel} tone={toneMap[color] || 'default'} />
);
const EmptyState = (props) => <AccountingEmptyState {...props} />;
const LoadingState = () => <AccountingLoadingState />;

const TRANSACTION_TYPES = [
  'BANK_EXPENSE', 'BANK_REVENUE', 'TRANSFER', 'CREDIT_CARD_PAYMENT',
  'PAYROLL_PAYMENT', 'TAX_REMITTANCE', 'OWNER_DRAW', 'OWNER_CONTRIBUTION',
];

const FORCE_NO_TAX_TRANSACTION_TYPES = new Set([
  'PAYROLL_FUNDING',
  'PAYROLL_PAYMENT',
  'PAYROLL_REMITTANCE',
  'TAX_REMITTANCE',
  'TRANSFER',
  'CREDIT_CARD_PAYMENT',
  'PAYMENT_PROCESSOR_PAYOUT',
  'PAYMENT_PROCESSOR_REVERSAL',
  'OWNER_DRAW',
  'OWNER_CONTRIBUTION',
]);

const TAX_TREATMENTS = [
  'NO_ITC', 'EXEMPT_PURCHASE', 'ZERO_RATED',
  'TAXABLE_SALE', 'HST_REMITTANCE', 'NO_TAX', 'INPUT_TAX_CREDIT',
];

const RISK_BADGE = {
  LOW: 'badge-success',
  MEDIUM: 'badge-warning',
  HIGH: 'badge-error',
};

const FORMULA_HELP = {
  gross: { label: 'Gross', description: 'Full transaction amount including HST' },
  net: { label: 'Net', description: 'Pre-tax expense or revenue amount' },
  hst: { label: 'HST', description: 'Tax portion only' },
};

const FORMULA_OPTIONS = Object.keys(FORMULA_HELP);

const normalizeFormula = (value) => String(value || '').trim().toLowerCase();

const formatRuleLabel = (value) => String(value || '')
  .toLowerCase()
  .split(/[_\s-]+/)
  .filter(Boolean)
  .map((part) => part.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + part.slice(1))
  .join(' ');

const STATUS_CONFIG = {
  PENDING: { label: 'Pending', bg: 'bg-amber-50 text-amber-700 border-amber-200', dot: 'bg-amber-400', Icon: Clock },
  APPROVED: { label: 'Approved', bg: 'bg-emerald-50 text-emerald-700 border-emerald-200', dot: 'bg-emerald-400', Icon: CheckCircle },
  APPLIED: { label: 'Applied', bg: 'bg-indigo-50 text-indigo-700 border-indigo-200', dot: 'bg-indigo-400', Icon: Zap },
  REJECTED: { label: 'Rejected', bg: 'bg-slate-50 text-slate-500 border-slate-200', dot: 'bg-slate-300', Icon: Ban },
};

const STATUS_CONFIG_COLORS = {
  PENDING: { bg: 'bg-amber-50', text: 'text-amber-700', border: 'border-amber-200', badge: 'bg-amber-100 text-amber-700' },
  APPROVED: { bg: 'bg-emerald-50', text: 'text-emerald-700', border: 'border-emerald-200', badge: 'bg-emerald-100 text-emerald-700' },
  APPLIED: { bg: 'bg-indigo-50', text: 'text-indigo-700', border: 'border-indigo-200', badge: 'bg-indigo-100 text-indigo-700' },
  REJECTED: { bg: 'bg-slate-50', text: 'text-slate-500', border: 'border-slate-200', badge: 'bg-slate-100 text-slate-500' },
};

function StatusBadge({ status, size = 'sm' }) {
  const config = STATUS_CONFIG_COLORS[status] || STATUS_CONFIG_COLORS.PENDING;
  const label = STATUS_CONFIG[status]?.label || status;
  const sizeClass = size === 'sm' ? 'text-xs px-2 py-0.5' : 'text-sm px-2.5 py-1';
  return (
    <span className={`inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 rounded-full font-medium ${sizeClass} ${config.badge}`}>
      <span className={`w-1.5 h-1.5 rounded-full ${status === 'PENDING' ? 'bg-amber-400' : status === 'APPROVED' ? 'bg-emerald-400' : status === 'APPLIED' ? 'bg-indigo-400' : 'bg-slate-300'}`} />
      {label}
    </span>
  );
}

function RiskBadge({ level }) {
  const colors = {
    LOW: 'bg-emerald-50 text-emerald-700 border-emerald-200',
    MEDIUM: 'bg-amber-50 text-amber-700 border-amber-200',
    HIGH: 'bg-red-50 text-red-700 border-red-200',
  };
  return (
    <span className={`inline-flex items-center gap-1 rounded-md text-xs font-medium px-1.5 py-0.5 border ${colors[level] || 'bg-slate-50 text-slate-500 border-slate-200'}`}>
      <span className={`w-1.5 h-1.5 rounded-full ${level === 'LOW' ? 'bg-emerald-400' : level === 'MEDIUM' ? 'bg-amber-400' : level === 'HIGH' ? 'bg-red-400' : 'bg-slate-300'}`} />
      {level || 'UNKNOWN'}
    </span>
  );
}

const SOURCE_ACCOUNT_CODE_BY_TYPE = {
  CREDIT_CARD: '2690',
  CHEQUING_ACCOUNT: '1001',
};

const SOURCE_TYPE_OPTIONS = [
  { value: 'CREDIT_CARD', label: 'Credit card payable', accountCode: '2690' },
  { value: 'CHEQUING_ACCOUNT', label: 'Cash / chequing', accountCode: '1001' },
];

const AMOUNT_DIRECTION_OPTIONS = [
  { value: 'EXPENSE', label: 'Expense / purchase' },
  { value: 'INCOME', label: 'Income / sale' },
];

const PURCHASE_ITC_TREATMENTS = new Set(['INPUT_TAX_CREDIT']);
const SALES_TAX_TREATMENTS = new Set(['TAXABLE_SALE']);
const TAX_REMITTANCE_TREATMENTS = new Set(['HST_REMITTANCE']);

const findAccountByCode = (accounts = [], code) =>
  accounts.find((account) => String(account.code) === String(code)) || null;

const resolveAccountForLine = (line = {}, accounts = []) => {
  const accountCode = String(line.accountCode || line.code || '').trim();
  const accountId = String(line.accountId || '').trim();
  return accounts.find((account) =>
    (accountCode && String(account.code) === accountCode) ||
    (accountCode && String(account.id) === accountCode) ||
    (accountId && String(account.id) === accountId)
  ) || null;
};

const findExpenseTaxAccount = (accounts = []) =>
  findAccountByCode(accounts, '1066') ||
  accounts.find((account) => /expense tax clearing/i.test(String(account.description || ''))) ||
  null;

const findSalesTaxAccount = (accounts = []) =>
  findAccountByCode(accounts, '2640') ||
  accounts.find((account) => /taxes payable|hst payable|gst\/hst payable/i.test(String(account.description || ''))) ||
  null;



function ImpactSummary({ impact }) {
  if (!impact) return null;
  const previousTaxShareOfGross = Number(impact.previousTaxRate?.taxShareOfGross || 0);
  const estimatedHST = Number.isFinite(Number(impact.estimatedHST))
    ? Number(impact.estimatedHST)
    : Number(impact.totalHST || 0) > 0
      ? Number(impact.totalHST || 0)
      : previousTaxShareOfGross > 0
        ? Math.abs(Number(impact.totalGross || 0)) * previousTaxShareOfGross
        : 0;

  return (
    <div className="grid grid-cols-2 sm:grid-cols-4 gap-2">
      <div className="rounded-lg bg-slate-50 border border-slate-200 p-3">
        <div className="text-[11px] font-medium text-slate-500 uppercase tracking-wider">Matched</div>
        <div className="text-xl font-bold text-slate-800 mt-0.5">{impact.matchedCount ?? 0}</div>
        <div className="text-xs text-slate-400">{impact.uncategorizedCount ?? 0} uncategorized</div>
      </div>
      <div className="rounded-lg bg-slate-50 border border-slate-200 p-3">
        <div className="text-[11px] font-medium text-slate-500 uppercase tracking-wider">Total</div>
        <div className="text-xl font-bold text-slate-800 mt-0.5">{fmt(impact.totalGross)}</div>
        <div className="text-xs text-slate-400">gross amount</div>
      </div>
      <div className="rounded-lg bg-slate-50 border border-slate-200 p-3">
        <div className="text-[11px] font-medium text-slate-500 uppercase tracking-wider">HST</div>
        <div className="text-xl font-bold text-slate-800 mt-0.5">{fmt(estimatedHST)}</div>
        <div className="text-xs text-slate-400">estimated tax</div>
      </div>
      <div className="rounded-lg bg-slate-50 border border-slate-200 p-3">
        <div className="text-[11px] font-medium text-slate-500 uppercase tracking-wider">Period</div>
        <div className="text-sm font-medium text-slate-700 mt-0.5">
          {impact.dateRange ? `${fmtDate(impact.dateRange.from)} — ${fmtDate(impact.dateRange.to)}` : '—'}
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

const accountDescription = (account) => account?.description || account?.name || account?.accountName || '';
const accountLabel = (account) => {
  if (!account) return '';
  const description = accountDescription(account);
  return description ? `${account.code} — ${description}` : String(account.code || '');
};

const findAccountForRule = (rule = {}, accounts = []) => {
  const accountId = String(rule.suggestedAccountId || '');
  const accountCode = String(rule.suggestedAccountCode || '');
  return accounts.find((account) =>
    (accountId && String(account.id) === accountId) ||
    (accountCode && String(account.code) === accountCode)
  ) || null;
};

const ruleAccountLabel = (rule = {}, accounts = []) => {
  const account = findAccountForRule(rule, accounts);
  const code = rule.suggestedAccountCode || account?.code || '';
  const description = rule.suggestedAccountDescription || accountDescription(account);
  if (!code) return '';
  return description ? `${code} — ${description}` : String(code);
};

const parsePatternText = (value) =>
  String(value || '')
    .split(/[\n,]/)
    .map((item) => item.trim())
    .filter(Boolean);

const uniqueTransactions = (...lists) => {
  const seen = new Set();
  return lists
    .flat()
    .filter((tx) => {
      if (!tx?.id || seen.has(tx.id)) return false;
      seen.add(tx.id);
      return true;
    });
};

const parseOrganizationHstRatePercent = (value) => {
  const numeric = Number(value);
  if (!Number.isFinite(numeric) || numeric < 0) return '';
  return numeric <= 1 ? Number((numeric * 100).toFixed(4)) : Number(numeric.toFixed(4));
};

const inferSourceTypeFromTransactions = (transactions = []) => {
  const sourceType = transactions
    .map((tx) => String(tx?.sourceType || tx?.source || '').trim().toUpperCase())
    .find(Boolean);
  return sourceType || '';
};

const buildEditorState = (rule, sourceTypeFallback = '') => ({
  name: rule.name || '',
  suggestedAccountId: rule.suggestedAccountId || '',
  sourceType: rule.sourceType || rule.matchConditions?.sourceType || sourceTypeFallback || '',
  amountDirection: rule.amountDirection || rule.matchConditions?.amountDirection || '',
  transactionType: rule.transactionType || '',
  taxTreatment: rule.taxTreatment || '',
  requiredReceipt: Boolean(rule.requiredReceipt),
  applyPreviousTaxRate: Boolean(rule.applyPreviousTaxRate),
  ratePercent: rule.previousTaxRate?.ratePercent ?? '',
  patternsText: Array.isArray(rule.patterns) ? rule.patterns.join('\n') : '',
  journalTemplateLines: Array.isArray(rule.journalTemplateLines)
    ? rule.journalTemplateLines.map((line) => ({ ...line }))
    : [],
});



function SuggestionEditor({ draft, setDraft, accounts, organizationHstRatePercent = '', previousTaxRate: editorPreviousTaxRate }) {
  const sourceTypeLabel = (value) => {
    const option = SOURCE_TYPE_OPTIONS.find((item) => item.value === value);
    const account = findAccountByCode(accounts, option?.accountCode);
    if (!option) return value || 'Source account';
    return account ? `${option.label} (${accountLabel(account)})` : option.label;
  };

  const recalculateTemplate = (nextDraft) => {
    const selectedAccount = accounts.find((account) => account.id === nextDraft.suggestedAccountId) || null;
    return {
      ...nextDraft,
      journalTemplateLines: deriveJournalTemplateLines({
        accounts,
        selectedAccount,
        taxTreatment: nextDraft.taxTreatment,
        sourceType: nextDraft.sourceType,
        amountDirection: nextDraft.amountDirection,
        existingLines: nextDraft.journalTemplateLines,
      }),
    };
  };

  const updateLine = (index, patch) => {
    setDraft((current) => ({
      ...current,
      journalTemplateLines: current.journalTemplateLines.map((line, i) => (i === index ? { ...line, ...patch } : line)),
    }));
  };

  const removeLine = (index) => {
    setDraft((current) => ({
      ...current,
      journalTemplateLines: current.journalTemplateLines.filter((_, i) => i !== index),
    }));
  };

  const addLine = () => {
    setDraft((current) => ({
      ...current,
      journalTemplateLines: [
        ...current.journalTemplateLines,
        { accountId: accounts[0]?.id || null, accountCode: accounts[0]?.code || '', accountDescription: accounts[0]?.description || '', side: 'DEBIT', amountFormula: 'gross' },
      ],
    }));
  };

  const resetTemplate = () => {
    setDraft((current) => recalculateTemplate(current));
  };

  return (
    <div className="space-y-4 rounded-xl border border-slate-200 bg-slate-50/60 p-4">
      <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-4">
        <div>
          <label className="block text-xs font-medium text-slate-500 mb-1">Rule name</label>
          <input
            className="w-full rounded-lg border border-slate-200 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500 focus:border-indigo-500"
            value={draft.name}
            onChange={(event) => setDraft((current) => ({ ...current, name: event.target.value }))}
          />
        </div>

        <div>
          <label className="block text-xs font-medium text-slate-500 mb-1">Account / category</label>
          <AccountAutocomplete
            value={draft.suggestedAccountId}
            onChange={(val) => setDraft((current) => recalculateTemplate({ ...current, suggestedAccountId: val }))}
            accounts={accounts}
            placeholder="No account"
          />
        </div>

        <div>
          <label className="block text-xs font-medium text-slate-500 mb-1">Transaction type</label>
          <select
            className="w-full rounded-lg border border-slate-200 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500 focus:border-indigo-500"
            value={draft.transactionType}
            onChange={(event) => {
              const transactionType = event.target.value;
              setDraft((current) => {
                const next = { ...current, transactionType };
                if (transactionType === 'BANK_REVENUE') next.amountDirection = 'INCOME';
                if (transactionType === 'BANK_EXPENSE') next.amountDirection = 'EXPENSE';
                if (transactionType === 'TAX_REMITTANCE') next.taxTreatment = 'HST_REMITTANCE';
                if (FORCE_NO_TAX_TRANSACTION_TYPES.has(String(transactionType || '').toUpperCase())) {
                  next.taxTreatment = 'NO_TAX';
                  next.applyPreviousTaxRate = false;
                  next.ratePercent = '';
                }
                return recalculateTemplate(next);
              });
            }}
          >
            <option value="">None</option>
            {TRANSACTION_TYPES.map((type) => <option key={type} value={type}>{type}</option>)}
          </select>
        </div>

        <div>
          <label className="block text-xs font-medium text-slate-500 mb-1">Source account</label>
          <select
            className="w-full rounded-lg border border-slate-200 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500 focus:border-indigo-500"
            value={draft.sourceType}
            onChange={(event) => setDraft((current) => recalculateTemplate({ ...current, sourceType: event.target.value }))}
          >
            <option value="">Infer from matched transactions</option>
            {SOURCE_TYPE_OPTIONS.map((option) => (
              <option key={option.value} value={option.value}>{sourceTypeLabel(option.value)}</option>
            ))}
          </select>
        </div>

        <div>
          <label className="block text-xs font-medium text-slate-500 mb-1">Direction</label>
          <select
            className="w-full rounded-lg border border-slate-200 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500 focus:border-indigo-500"
            value={draft.amountDirection}
            onChange={(event) => setDraft((current) => recalculateTemplate({ ...current, amountDirection: event.target.value }))}
          >
            <option value="">Infer from transactions</option>
            {AMOUNT_DIRECTION_OPTIONS.map((option) => (
              <option key={option.value} value={option.value}>{option.label}</option>
            ))}
          </select>
        </div>

        <div>
          <label className="block text-xs font-medium text-slate-500 mb-1">Tax treatment</label>
          <select
            className="w-full rounded-lg border border-slate-200 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500 focus:border-indigo-500"
            value={draft.taxTreatment}
              onChange={(event) => {
              const taxTreatment = event.target.value;
              const isTaxableTreatment = SALES_TAX_TREATMENTS.has(String(taxTreatment || '').toUpperCase()) || PURCHASE_ITC_TREATMENTS.has(String(taxTreatment || '').toUpperCase());
              setDraft((current) => {
                let newRatePercent = current.ratePercent;
                if (isTaxableTreatment) {
                  if (editorPreviousTaxRate?.taxShareOfGross) {
                    newRatePercent = editorPreviousTaxRate.ratePercent ?? current.ratePercent;
                  } else if (organizationHstRatePercent !== '') {
                    newRatePercent = organizationHstRatePercent;
                  }
                }
                return recalculateTemplate({
                  ...current,
                  taxTreatment,
                  ratePercent: newRatePercent,
                });
              });
            }}
          >
            <option value="">None</option>
            {TAX_TREATMENTS.map((type) => <option key={type} value={type}>{type}</option>)}
          </select>
        </div>

        <div>
          <label className="block text-xs font-medium text-slate-500 mb-1">Tax rate %</label>
          <input
            className="w-full rounded-lg border border-slate-200 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500 focus:border-indigo-500"
            type="number"
            min="0"
            step="0.01"
            value={draft.ratePercent}
            onChange={(event) => setDraft((current) => ({ ...current, ratePercent: event.target.value }))}
          />
        </div>

        <div className="flex flex-wrap items-end gap-4">
          <label className="flex items-center gap-2 cursor-pointer">
            <input
              type="checkbox"
              className="w-4 h-4 rounded border-slate-300 text-indigo-600 focus:ring-indigo-500"
              checked={draft.requiredReceipt}
              onChange={(event) => setDraft((current) => ({ ...current, requiredReceipt: event.target.checked }))}
            />
            <span className="text-xs text-slate-600">Receipt required</span>
          </label>
          <label className="flex items-center gap-2 cursor-pointer">
            <input
              type="checkbox"
              className="w-4 h-4 rounded border-slate-300 text-indigo-600 focus:ring-indigo-500"
              checked={draft.applyPreviousTaxRate}
              disabled={FORCE_NO_TAX_TRANSACTION_TYPES.has(String(draft.transactionType || '').toUpperCase())}
              onChange={(event) => setDraft((current) => ({ ...current, applyPreviousTaxRate: event.target.checked }))}
            />
            <span className="text-xs text-slate-600">Apply tax rate</span>
          </label>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div>
        <label className="block text-xs font-medium text-slate-500 mb-1">Match patterns</label>
        <textarea
          className="w-full rounded-lg border border-slate-200 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500 focus:border-indigo-500 min-h-[80px]"
          value={draft.patternsText}
          onChange={(event) => setDraft((current) => ({ ...current, patternsText: event.target.value }))}
        />
      </div>

      <div className="space-y-2">
        <div className="flex items-center justify-between gap-2">
          <div>
            <div className="text-xs font-semibold text-slate-500">Journal template</div>
            <div className="text-[11px] text-slate-400">
              Auto-updates from account, source, direction, and tax treatment.
            </div>
          </div>
          <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-1.5">
            <button type="button" className="inline-flex items-center gap-1 px-2.5 py-1.5 text-xs font-medium rounded-lg border border-slate-200 bg-white text-slate-600 hover:bg-slate-50 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500" onClick={resetTemplate}>
              <RefreshCw size={12} /> Recalculate
            </button>
            <button type="button" className="inline-flex items-center gap-1 px-2.5 py-1.5 text-xs font-medium rounded-lg border border-slate-200 bg-white text-slate-600 hover:bg-slate-50 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500" onClick={addLine}>
              <Plus size={12} /> Add line
            </button>
          </div>
        </div>
        {draft.journalTemplateLines.map((line, index) => {
          const account = resolveAccountForLine(line, accounts);
          return (
            <div key={index} className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-[1fr_120px_1fr_auto] gap-2">
              <AccountAutocomplete
                value={account?.id || line.accountId || ''}
                onChange={(val) => {
                  const nextAccount = accounts.find((item) => item.id === val) || null;
                  updateLine(index, {
                    accountId: nextAccount?.id || null,
                    accountCode: nextAccount?.code || '',
                    accountDescription: nextAccount?.description || '',
                  });
                }}
                accounts={accounts}
                placeholder="Account"
              />
              <select
                className="rounded-lg border border-slate-200 bg-white px-3 py-1.5 text-sm focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500 focus:border-indigo-500"
                value={line.side || 'DEBIT'}
                onChange={(event) => updateLine(index, { side: event.target.value })}
              >
                <option value="DEBIT">DEBIT</option>
                <option value="CREDIT">CREDIT</option>
              </select>
              <div>
                <select
                  className="w-full rounded-lg border border-slate-200 bg-white px-3 py-1.5 text-sm focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500 focus:border-indigo-500"
                  value={normalizeFormula(line.amountFormula)}
                  onChange={(event) => updateLine(index, { amountFormula: event.target.value })}
                  title={FORMULA_HELP[normalizeFormula(line.amountFormula)]?.description || 'Choose which part of the transaction amount this line uses.'}
                >
                  <option value="">Formula</option>
                  {FORMULA_OPTIONS.map((formula) => (
                    <option key={formula} value={formula}>{FORMULA_HELP[formula].label} — {FORMULA_HELP[formula].description}</option>
                  ))}
                </select>
                <div className="text-xs text-slate-400 mt-0.5">
                  {FORMULA_HELP[normalizeFormula(line.amountFormula)]?.description}
                </div>
              </div>
              <button type="button" className="inline-flex items-center justify-center p-1.5 text-red-500 hover:text-red-700 hover:bg-red-50 rounded-lg focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-red-500" onClick={() => removeLine(index)} title="Remove line">
                <Trash2 size={14} />
              </button>
            </div>
          );
        })}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

function SuggestionCard({ suggestion, accounts = [], organizationHstRatePercent = '', onApprove, onReject, onDeleteApproved, onSave, onOpenAccount, loading }) {
  const [expanded, setExpanded] = useState(false);
  const [editing, setEditing] = useState(false);
  const [revising, setRevising] = useState(false);
  const [revisionInstructions, setRevisionInstructions] = useState('');
  const [applyPreviousTaxRate, setApplyPreviousTaxRate] = useState(Boolean(suggestion.suggestedRule?.applyPreviousTaxRate));
  const rule = suggestion.suggestedRule || {};
  const impact = suggestion.impactSummary || {};
  const matchedTransactions = uniqueTransactions(
    Array.isArray(impact.transactions) ? impact.transactions : [],
    Array.isArray(impact.uncategorizedTransactionSamples) ? impact.uncategorizedTransactionSamples : [],
    Array.isArray(impact.completedTransactionSamples) ? impact.completedTransactionSamples : [],
    Array.isArray(impact.sampleMatches) ? impact.sampleMatches : []
  );
  const inferredSourceType = inferSourceTypeFromTransactions(matchedTransactions);
  const [draft, setDraft] = useState(() => buildEditorState(rule, inferredSourceType));
  const confidence = Math.round((suggestion.confidence || 0) * 100);
  const previousTaxRate = rule.previousTaxRate || impact.previousTaxRate || null;
  const canApplyPreviousTaxRate = Boolean(previousTaxRate?.taxShareOfGross) || (Boolean(rule.taxTreatment) && organizationHstRatePercent !== '');
  const suggestedAccount = findAccountForRule(rule, accounts);
  const suggestedAccountCode = rule.suggestedAccountCode || suggestedAccount?.code || '';
  const suggestedAccountDescription = rule.suggestedAccountDescription || accountDescription(suggestedAccount);
  const suggestedAccountLabel = ruleAccountLabel(rule, accounts);
  const isPending = suggestion.status === 'PENDING';
  const isApproved = suggestion.status === 'APPROVED';
  const isApplied = suggestion.status === 'APPLIED';
  const displayJournalTemplateLines = deriveJournalTemplateLines({
    accounts,
    selectedAccount: suggestedAccount,
    taxTreatment: rule.taxTreatment,
    sourceType: rule.sourceType || rule.matchConditions?.sourceType || inferredSourceType,
    amountDirection: rule.amountDirection || rule.matchConditions?.amountDirection,
    existingLines: Array.isArray(rule.journalTemplateLines) ? rule.journalTemplateLines : [],
  });

  useEffect(() => {
    setDraft(buildEditorState(rule, inferredSourceType));
    setApplyPreviousTaxRate(Boolean(rule.applyPreviousTaxRate));
  }, [suggestion.id, suggestion.suggestedRuleJson, inferredSourceType]);

  const saveDraft = async () => {
    const selectedAccount = accounts.find((account) => account.id === draft.suggestedAccountId) || null;
    const ratePercent = Number(draft.ratePercent);
    await onSave(suggestion.id, {
      suggestedRule: {
        ...rule,
        name: draft.name,
        suggestedAccountId: selectedAccount?.id || null,
        suggestedAccountCode: selectedAccount?.code || null,
        suggestedAccountDescription: selectedAccount?.description || '',
        transactionType: draft.transactionType || null,
        taxTreatment: draft.taxTreatment || null,
        sourceType: draft.sourceType || rule.sourceType || rule.matchConditions?.sourceType || inferredSourceType || null,
        amountDirection: draft.amountDirection || rule.amountDirection || rule.matchConditions?.amountDirection || null,
        requiredReceipt: draft.requiredReceipt,
        applyPreviousTaxRate: draft.applyPreviousTaxRate,
        previousTaxRate: Number.isFinite(ratePercent) && ratePercent >= 0
          ? { ...(rule.previousTaxRate || {}), ratePercent }
          : null,
        patterns: parsePatternText(draft.patternsText),
        journalTemplateLines: draft.journalTemplateLines,
      },
    });
    setEditing(false);
  };

  const [showMenu, setShowMenu] = useState(false);
  const statusColors = STATUS_CONFIG_COLORS[suggestion.status] || STATUS_CONFIG_COLORS.PENDING;

  const primaryAction = isPending
    ? { label: 'Approve', icon: CheckCircle, onClick: () => onApprove(suggestion.id, false, false), color: 'border border-emerald-200 bg-white text-emerald-700 hover:bg-emerald-50' }
    : isApproved
      ? { label: 'Apply to matches', icon: Zap, onClick: () => onApprove(suggestion.id, true, canApplyPreviousTaxRate && applyPreviousTaxRate), color: 'bg-indigo-600 text-white hover:bg-indigo-700' }
      : isApplied
        ? { label: 'Re-apply', icon: Zap, onClick: () => onApprove(suggestion.id, true, false), color: 'bg-indigo-600 text-white hover:bg-indigo-700' }
        : null;

  return (
    <div className={`rounded-xl border bg-white shadow-sm transition-shadow hover:shadow-md overflow-hidden ${
      isPending ? 'border-indigo-200 ring-1 ring-indigo-100' :
      isApproved ? 'border-emerald-200' :
      isApplied ? 'border-indigo-200' :
      'border-slate-200'
    }`}>
      <div className="p-4 sm:p-5">
        <div className="flex items-start gap-3 sm:gap-4">
          <div className={`shrink-0 w-1 self-stretch rounded-full ${statusColors.bg} hidden sm:block`} />

          <div className="flex-1 min-w-0 space-y-3">
            <div className="flex flex-col sm:flex-row sm:items-start justify-between gap-2 sm:gap-3">
              <div className="min-w-0 space-y-1.5">
                <div className="flex items-center gap-2 flex-wrap">
                  <h3 className="text-sm font-semibold text-slate-900 truncate max-w-[280px]">
                    {rule.name || suggestion.merchantName || suggestion.normalizedMerchant || 'Unnamed rule'}
                  </h3>
                  <StatusBadge status={suggestion.status} />
                </div>

                <div className="flex flex-wrap items-center gap-1.5 text-xs">
                  {suggestedAccountLabel && (
                    <button
                      type="button"
                      className="inline-flex items-center gap-1 px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded-md border border-slate-200 text-slate-600 hover:border-indigo-300 hover:text-indigo-600 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500"
                      onClick={() => onOpenAccount?.({ id: suggestedAccount?.id || rule.suggestedAccountId || null, code: suggestedAccountCode, description: suggestedAccountDescription })}
                      title={`Open account ${suggestedAccountLabel}`}
                    >
                      <BookOpen size={11} /> {suggestedAccountLabel}
                    </button>
                  )}
                  {confidence > 0 && (
                    <span className="inline-flex items-center gap-1 px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded-md bg-indigo-50 text-indigo-600 font-medium">
                      <Sparkles size={11} /> {confidence}%
                    </span>
                  )}
                  {suggestion.riskLevel && <RiskBadge level={suggestion.riskLevel} />}
                </div>

                {impact.matchedCount != null && (
                  <div className="flex flex-wrap items-center gap-x-3 gap-y-0.5 text-xs text-slate-500">
                    <span><span className="font-medium text-slate-700">{impact.matchedCount ?? 0}</span> matched</span>
                    <span><span className="font-medium text-slate-700">{fmt(impact.totalGross)}</span> gross</span>
                    {impact.uncategorizedCount > 0 && <span><span className="font-medium text-amber-600">{impact.uncategorizedCount}</span> uncategorized</span>}
                    {rule.transactionType && <span className="text-slate-400">{rule.transactionType}</span>}
                    {rule.taxTreatment && <span className="text-slate-400">{rule.taxTreatment}</span>}
                  </div>
                )}
              </div>

              <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5 shrink-0">
                {primaryAction && (
                  <button
                    className={`inline-flex items-center gap-1 px-3 py-1.5 text-xs font-medium rounded-lg shadow-sm focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500 ${primaryAction.color} ${loading ? 'opacity-50 cursor-not-allowed' : ''}`}
                    onClick={primaryAction.onClick}
                    disabled={loading}
                  >
                    <primaryAction.icon size={14} /> {primaryAction.label}
                  </button>
                )}

                {(isPending || isApproved || isApplied) && (
                  <button
                    className={`inline-flex items-center gap-1 px-3 py-1.5 text-xs font-medium rounded-lg shadow-sm focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500 border border-slate-200 text-slate-600 bg-white hover:bg-slate-50 ${loading ? 'opacity-50 cursor-not-allowed' : ''}`}
                    onClick={() => { if (editing) saveDraft().catch(() => {}); else setEditing(true); }}
                    disabled={loading}
                  >
                    {editing ? <Save size={14} /> : <Edit3 size={14} />} {editing ? 'Save' : 'Edit'}
                  </button>
                )}

                <div className="relative">
                  <button
                    className={`inline-flex items-center justify-center px-2 py-1.5 text-xs font-medium rounded-lg border border-slate-200 text-slate-500 bg-white hover:bg-slate-50 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500 ${loading ? 'opacity-50 cursor-not-allowed' : ''}`}
                    onClick={() => setShowMenu((v) => !v)}
                    disabled={loading}
                    aria-label="More actions"
                  >
                    <svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="2"><circle cx="12" cy="5" r="1.5"/><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="1.5"/><circle cx="12" cy="19" r="1.5"/></svg>
                  </button>
                  {showMenu && (
                    <div className="absolute right-0 top-full mt-1 z-20 w-52 rounded-lg border border-slate-200 bg-white shadow-lg py-1">
                      {isPending && (
                        <>
                          <button className="w-full flex items-center gap-2 px-3 py-1.5 text-xs text-slate-600 hover:bg-slate-50" onClick={() => { setShowMenu(false); setRevising((v) => !v); }}><Sparkles size={13} /> Revise with AI</button>
                          <button className="w-full flex items-center gap-2 px-3 py-1.5 text-xs text-emerald-600 hover:bg-emerald-50" onClick={() => { setShowMenu(false); onApprove(suggestion.id, false, false); }}><CheckCircle size={13} /> Approve</button>
                          <div className="border-t border-slate-100 my-1" />
                          <button className="w-full flex items-center gap-2 px-3 py-1.5 text-xs text-red-600 hover:bg-red-50" onClick={() => { setShowMenu(false); onReject(suggestion.id); }}><XCircle size={13} /> Reject</button>
                        </>
                      )}
                      {isApproved && (
                        <>
                          <button className="w-full flex items-center gap-2 px-3 py-1.5 text-xs text-slate-600 hover:bg-slate-50" onClick={() => { setShowMenu(false); setRevising((v) => !v); }}><Sparkles size={13} /> Revise with AI</button>
                          <div className="border-t border-slate-100 my-1" />
                          <button className="w-full flex items-center gap-2 px-3 py-1.5 text-xs text-red-600 hover:bg-red-50" onClick={() => { setShowMenu(false); onDeleteApproved(suggestion.id); }}><Trash2 size={13} /> Delete rule</button>
                        </>
                      )}
                      {isApplied && (
                        <>
                          <button className="w-full flex items-center gap-2 px-3 py-1.5 text-xs text-slate-600 hover:bg-slate-50" onClick={() => { setShowMenu(false); setRevising((v) => !v); }}><Sparkles size={13} /> Revise with AI</button>
                          <div className="border-t border-slate-100 my-1" />
                          <button className="w-full flex items-center gap-2 px-3 py-1.5 text-xs text-red-600 hover:bg-red-50" onClick={() => { setShowMenu(false); onDeleteApproved(suggestion.id); }}><Trash2 size={13} /> Delete rule</button>
                        </>
                      )}
                    </div>
                  )}
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>

            <div className="text-sm text-slate-500 leading-relaxed">{suggestion.reason || 'No reason provided.'}</div>

            {(impact.matchedCount != null || impact.totalGross != null) && (
              <ImpactSummary impact={impact} />
            )}

            {!editing && displayJournalTemplateLines.length > 0 && (
              <JournalTemplatePreview lines={displayJournalTemplateLines} accounts={accounts} onOpenAccount={onOpenAccount} />
            )}

            {canApplyPreviousTaxRate && !isPending && (
              <label className="flex items-center gap-2 cursor-pointer w-fit">
                <input type="checkbox" className="w-4 h-4 rounded border-slate-300 text-indigo-600 focus:ring-indigo-500" checked={applyPreviousTaxRate} onChange={(event) => setApplyPreviousTaxRate(event.target.checked)} disabled={loading} />
                <span className="text-xs text-slate-600">Apply previous tax rate to matching transactions with missing tax</span>
              </label>
            )}

            {rule.requiredReceipt && (
              <span className="inline-flex items-center px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs bg-amber-50 text-amber-600 border border-amber-200">Receipt required</span>
            )}

            {editing && (
              <SuggestionEditor draft={draft} setDraft={setDraft} accounts={accounts} organizationHstRatePercent={organizationHstRatePercent} previousTaxRate={previousTaxRate} />
            )}

            {revising && (
              <div className="space-y-2 rounded-lg border border-slate-200 bg-slate-50/60 p-3">
                <div>
                  <label className="block text-xs font-medium text-slate-500 mb-1">Revision instructions</label>
                  <textarea className="w-full rounded-lg border border-slate-200 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500 focus:border-indigo-500 min-h-[80px]" value={revisionInstructions} onChange={(event) => setRevisionInstructions(event.target.value)} placeholder="Example: Use meals and entertainment, no ITC, and make the match pattern stricter." />
                </div>
                <div className="flex justify-end gap-2">
                  <button type="button" className="inline-flex items-center px-3 py-1.5 text-xs font-medium rounded-lg border border-slate-200 text-slate-600 bg-white hover:bg-slate-50 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500" onClick={() => setRevising(false)} disabled={loading}>Cancel</button>
                  <button type="button" className="inline-flex items-center gap-1 px-3 py-1.5 text-xs font-medium rounded-lg bg-indigo-600 text-white hover:bg-indigo-700 shadow-sm focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500 disabled:opacity-50" disabled={loading || !revisionInstructions.trim()} onClick={() => onSave(suggestion.id, { reviseInstructions: revisionInstructions.trim() }).then(() => { setRevisionInstructions(''); setRevising(false); }).catch(() => {})}><Sparkles size={12} /> Revise</button>
                </div>
              </div>
            )}

            <button type="button" className="inline-flex items-center gap-1 text-xs text-slate-400 hover:text-slate-600 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500 rounded px-1" onClick={() => setExpanded((v) => !v)}>
              {expanded ? <ChevronDown size={14} /> : <ChevronRight size={14} />}
              {expanded ? 'Hide details' : 'Show details'}
            </button>

            {expanded && (
              <div className="space-y-4 pt-3 border-t border-slate-100">
                {(rule.reasoning || suggestion.reason) && (
                  <div>
                    <div className="text-xs font-semibold text-slate-500 mb-1">AI reasoning</div>
                    <p className="text-sm text-slate-600 whitespace-pre-wrap">{rule.reasoning || suggestion.reason}</p>
                  </div>
                )}

                {Array.isArray(rule.patterns) && rule.patterns.length > 0 && (
                  <div>
                    <div className="text-xs font-semibold text-slate-500 mb-1">Match patterns</div>
                    <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-1">{rule.patterns.map((p, i) => (<code key={i} className="inline-flex items-center px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded text-xs bg-slate-100 text-slate-600 font-mono">{p}</code>))}</div>
                  </div>
                )}

                <JournalTemplateLines lines={displayJournalTemplateLines} accounts={accounts} onOpenAccount={onOpenAccount} />

                {Array.isArray(impact.completedTransactionSamples) && impact.completedTransactionSamples.length > 0 && (
                  <div>
                    <div className="text-xs font-semibold text-slate-500 mb-1.5">Prior categorized samples</div>
                    <div className="overflow-hidden rounded-lg border border-slate-200">
                      <table className="min-w-full text-xs">
                        <thead><tr className="bg-slate-50"><th className="px-3 py-2 text-left font-medium text-slate-500">Date</th><th className="px-3 py-2 text-left font-medium text-slate-500">Description</th><th className="px-3 py-2 text-right font-medium text-slate-500">Amount</th><th className="px-3 py-2 text-right font-medium text-slate-500">Tax</th><th className="px-3 py-2 text-left font-medium text-slate-500">Category</th></tr></thead>
                        <tbody className="divide-y divide-slate-100">
                          {impact.completedTransactionSamples.slice(0, 5).map((tx) => (
                            <tr key={tx.id} className="hover:bg-slate-50/50">
                              <td className="px-3 py-2 text-slate-600 whitespace-nowrap">{fmtDate(tx.date)}</td>
                              <td className="px-3 py-2 text-slate-700 max-w-[200px] truncate">{tx.description}</td>
                              <td className="px-3 py-2 text-right font-mono text-slate-700">{fmt(tx.amount)}</td>
                              <td className="px-3 py-2 text-right font-mono text-slate-700">{fmt(tx.taxes)}</td>
                              <td className="px-3 py-2 text-slate-500">{tx.currentCategoryCode ? (<><AccountCodeButton code={tx.currentCategoryCode} description={tx.currentCategoryDescription || ''} onOpenAccount={onOpenAccount} />{tx.currentCategoryDescription ? <span className="text-slate-400 ml-1">— {tx.currentCategoryDescription}</span> : null}</>) : '—'}</td>
                            </tr>
                          ))}
                        </tbody>
                      </table>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                )}

                {matchedTransactions.length > 0 && (
                  <div>
                    <div className="text-xs font-semibold text-slate-500 mb-1.5">Matched transactions</div>
                    <div className="overflow-hidden rounded-lg border border-slate-200">
                      <table className="min-w-full text-xs">
                        <thead><tr className="bg-slate-50"><th className="px-3 py-2 text-left font-medium text-slate-500">Date</th><th className="px-3 py-2 text-left font-medium text-slate-500">Description</th><th className="px-3 py-2 text-right font-medium text-slate-500">Amount</th><th className="px-3 py-2 text-right font-medium text-slate-500">Tax</th><th className="px-3 py-2 text-left font-medium text-slate-500">Category</th><th className="px-3 py-2 text-left font-medium text-slate-500">Source</th></tr></thead>
                        <tbody className="divide-y divide-slate-100">
                          {matchedTransactions.map((tx) => (
                            <tr key={tx.id} className="hover:bg-slate-50/50">
                              <td className="px-3 py-2 text-slate-600 whitespace-nowrap">{fmtDate(tx.date)}</td>
                              <td className="px-3 py-2 text-slate-700 max-w-[200px] truncate">{tx.description}</td>
                              <td className={`px-3 py-2 text-right font-mono ${Number(tx.amount) >= 0 ? 'text-emerald-600' : 'text-red-600'}`}>{fmt(tx.amount)}</td>
                              <td className="px-3 py-2 text-right font-mono text-slate-700">{tx.taxes == null ? '—' : fmt(tx.taxes)}</td>
                              <td className="px-3 py-2 text-slate-500">{tx.currentCategoryCode ? (<><AccountCodeButton code={tx.currentCategoryCode} description={tx.currentCategoryDescription || ''} onOpenAccount={onOpenAccount} />{tx.currentCategoryDescription ? <span className="text-slate-400 ml-1">— {tx.currentCategoryDescription}</span> : null}</>) : (tx.currentCategory || <span className="text-slate-400">Uncategorized</span>)}</td>
                              <td className="px-3 py-2 text-slate-500">{tx.sourceType || tx.source || '—'}</td>
                            </tr>
                          ))}
                        </tbody>
                      </table>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                )}
              </div>
            )}
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      {showMenu && <div className="fixed inset-0 z-10" onClick={() => setShowMenu(false)} />}
    </div>
  );
}

const groupCount = (group, key) => Number(group?.[key] || 0);

const getGroupWorkLabels = (group) => [
  groupCount(group, 'uncategorizedCount') > 0 ? 'Category' : null,
  groupCount(group, 'missingTaxCount') > 0 ? 'Tax' : null,
  groupCount(group, 'missingReceiptCount') > 0 ? 'Receipt' : null,
  groupCount(group, 'unpostedCount') > 0 ? 'Posting' : null,
].filter(Boolean);

const getGroupStatus = (group) => {
  if (groupCount(group, 'incompleteCount') <= 0) return { label: 'Done', badge: 'badge-success' };
  if (groupCount(group, 'uncategorizedCount') > 0) return { label: 'Needs category', badge: 'badge-error' };
  if (groupCount(group, 'unpostedCount') > 0) return { label: 'Needs posting', badge: 'badge-warning' };
  if (groupCount(group, 'missingTaxCount') > 0) return { label: 'Needs tax', badge: 'badge-warning' };
  if (groupCount(group, 'missingReceiptCount') > 0) return { label: 'Needs receipt', badge: 'badge-info' };
  return { label: 'Review', badge: 'badge-ghost' };
};

const ALIGNMENT_CONFIG = {
  NO_RULE: { label: 'No rule', color: 'text-slate-400', bg: 'bg-slate-100', icon: '—' },
  PENDING_SUGGESTION: { label: 'Pending AI suggestion', color: 'text-amber-700', bg: 'bg-amber-100', icon: Clock },
  HAS_SUGGESTION: { label: 'Has suggestion', color: 'text-indigo-700', bg: 'bg-indigo-100', icon: Sparkles },
  ACTIVE_RULE_MATCHES: { label: 'Active rule linked', color: 'text-emerald-700', bg: 'bg-emerald-100', icon: CheckCircle },
  RULE_PARTIAL_COVERAGE: { label: 'Rule partial coverage', color: 'text-orange-700', bg: 'bg-orange-100', icon: AlertTriangle },
  RULE_MISMATCH: { label: 'Rule mismatch', color: 'text-red-700', bg: 'bg-red-100', icon: XCircle },
  GROUP_CHANGED: { label: 'Group changed since suggestion', color: 'text-amber-700', bg: 'bg-amber-100', icon: RefreshCw },
};

const ALIGNMENT_FILTERS = [
  { id: 'all', label: 'All groups' },
  { id: 'NO_RULE', label: 'No rule' },
  { id: 'PENDING_SUGGESTION', label: 'Pending suggestion' },
  { id: 'ACTIVE_RULE_MATCHES', label: 'Active rule' },
  { id: 'RULE_PARTIAL_COVERAGE', label: 'Partial coverage' },
  { id: 'RULE_MISMATCH', label: 'Rule mismatch' },
];

const GROUP_FILTERS = [
  { id: 'all', label: 'All incomplete', matches: (group) => groupCount(group, 'incompleteCount') > 0 },
  { id: 'category', label: 'Needs category', matches: (group) => groupCount(group, 'uncategorizedCount') > 0 },
  { id: 'tax', label: 'Needs tax', matches: (group) => groupCount(group, 'missingTaxCount') > 0 },
  { id: 'receipt', label: 'Needs receipt', matches: (group) => groupCount(group, 'missingReceiptCount') > 0 },
  { id: 'posting', label: 'Needs posting', matches: (group) => groupCount(group, 'unpostedCount') > 0 },
  { id: 'categoryDone', label: 'Category done', matches: (group) => groupCount(group, 'uncategorizedCount') === 0 && groupCount(group, 'incompleteCount') > 0 },
];

const ruleToFormState = (ruleValue = {}) => {
  const rule = ruleValue || {};
  return {
    name: rule.name || '',
    group: rule.group || 'General',
    notes: rule.notes || '',
    patternsText: Array.isArray(rule.patterns) ? rule.patterns.join('\n') : '',
    sql: rule.sql || '',
    enabled: rule.enabled !== false,
    matchMode: rule.matchMode === 'ALL' ? 'ALL' : 'ANY',
    sourceType: rule.sourceType || '',
    transactionType: rule.transactionType || '',
    amountDirection: rule.amountDirection || 'ANY',
    categoryId: rule.suggestedAccountId || rule.categoryId || '',
    autoCategory: Boolean(rule.autoCategory || rule.suggestedAccountId),
    autoApplyTaxes: Boolean(rule.autoApplyTaxes),
    requiredReceipt: Boolean(rule.requiredReceipt),
    llmSummary: rule.llmSummary || '',
    proposalSource: rule.proposalSource || '',
    journalMode: rule.journalMode || 'STANDARD',
    journalTemplateText: Array.isArray(rule.journalTemplateLines) && rule.journalTemplateLines.length
    ? JSON.stringify(rule.journalTemplateLines, null, 2)
    : '',
  };
};

const parseRuleJsonArray = (value, label) => {
  const text = String(value || '').trim();
  if (!text) return [];
  const parsed = JSON.parse(text);
  if (!Array.isArray(parsed)) throw new Error(`${label} must be a JSON array.`);
  return parsed;
};

const ruleFormToPayload = (form) => ({
  name: String(form.name || '').trim(),
  sql: String(form.sql || '').trim(),
  group: String(form.group || 'General').trim() || 'General',
  notes: String(form.notes || '').trim(),
  patterns: String(form.patternsText || '').split('\n').map((item) => item.trim()).filter(Boolean),
  enabled: Boolean(form.enabled),
  matchMode: form.matchMode === 'ALL' ? 'ALL' : 'ANY',
  sourceType: form.sourceType || null,
  transactionType: form.transactionType || null,
  amountDirection: form.amountDirection || 'ANY',
  categoryId: form.categoryId || null,
  autoCategory: Boolean(form.autoCategory),
  autoApplyTaxes: Boolean(form.autoApplyTaxes),
  requiredReceipt: Boolean(form.requiredReceipt),
  llmSummary: String(form.llmSummary || '').trim(),
  proposalSource: form.proposalSource || null,
  journalMode: form.journalMode || 'STANDARD',
  journalTemplateLines: parseRuleJsonArray(form.journalTemplateText, 'Journal template lines'),
});

const draftToRuleFormPatch = (draftValue = {}, accounts = []) => {
  const draft = draftValue || {};
  const matchedAccount = accounts.find((account) =>
    account.id === draft.categoryId ||
    account.id === draft.suggestedAccountId ||
    account.code === draft.categoryCode ||
    account.code === draft.suggestedAccountCode
  ) || null;

  return {
    name: draft.name || draft.ruleName || '',
    group: draft.group || 'General',
    notes: draft.notes || draft.reasoning || draft.reason || '',
    patternsText: Array.isArray(draft.patterns) ? draft.patterns.join('\n') : '',
    enabled: draft.enabled !== false,
    matchMode: draft.matchMode === 'ALL' ? 'ALL' : 'ANY',
    sourceType: draft.sourceType || draft.matchConditions?.sourceType || '',
    transactionType: draft.transactionType || '',
    amountDirection: draft.amountDirection || draft.matchConditions?.amountDirection || 'ANY',
    categoryId: matchedAccount?.id || draft.categoryId || draft.suggestedAccountId || '',
    autoCategory: Boolean(matchedAccount?.id || draft.categoryId || draft.suggestedAccountId),
    autoApplyTaxes: Boolean(draft.autoApplyTaxes || draft.applyPreviousTaxRate),
    requiredReceipt: Boolean(draft.requiredReceipt),
    llmSummary: draft.llmSummary || draft.reasoning || draft.reason || '',
    journalMode: Array.isArray(draft.journalTemplateLines) && draft.journalTemplateLines.length ? 'PROPOSAL_HINT' : 'STANDARD',
    journalTemplateText: Array.isArray(draft.journalTemplateLines) && draft.journalTemplateLines.length
      ? JSON.stringify(draft.journalTemplateLines, null, 2)
      : '',
  };
};

function ExistingRuleModal({ groupRule, accounts, onClose, onChanged }) {
  const rule = groupRule?.rule || null;
  const group = groupRule?.group || null;
  const transactionIds = Array.isArray(group?.transactionIds) ? group.transactionIds : [];
  const [form, setForm] = useState(() => ruleToFormState(rule));
  const [working, setWorking] = useState('');
  const [reviseInstructions, setReviseInstructions] = useState('');

  useEffect(() => {
    setForm(ruleToFormState(rule));
    setReviseInstructions('');
    setWorking('');
  }, [rule?.id]);

  if (!rule) return null;

  const saveRule = async (extra = {}) => {
    const payload = { ...ruleFormToPayload(form), ...extra };
    if (!payload.name) throw new Error('Rule name is required.');
    const res = await fetchWithAuth(`${SERVER}/accounting/rules/${rule.id}`, {
      method: 'PUT',
      headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
      body: JSON.stringify(payload),
    });
    const data = await res.json().catch(() => ({}));
    if (!res.ok) throw new Error(data.error || 'Failed to save rule.');
    return data.rule || null;
  };

  const handleSave = async () => {
    setWorking('save');
    try {
      await saveRule();
      toast.success('Rule saved.');
      await onChanged?.();
    } catch (error) {
      toast.error(error.message || 'Failed to save rule.');
    } finally {
      setWorking('');
    }
  };

  const handleApprove = async () => {
    setWorking('approve');
    try {
      await saveRule({ status: 'ACTIVE', enabled: true });
      toast.success('Rule approved and active.');
      await onChanged?.();
    } catch (error) {
      toast.error(error.message || 'Failed to approve rule.');
    } finally {
      setWorking('');
    }
  };

  const handleRevise = async () => {
    setWorking('revise');
    try {
      const payload = ruleFormToPayload(form);
      const res = await fetchWithAuth(`${SERVER}/accounting/rules/${rule.id}/ai-analyze`, {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
        body: JSON.stringify({
          rule: payload,
          prompt: reviseInstructions.trim() || 'Revise this rule for the matched transaction group. Keep the account, tax treatment, journal template, and matching patterns accurate.',
        }),
      });
      const data = await res.json().catch(() => ({}));
      if (!res.ok) throw new Error(data.error || 'Failed to revise rule.');
      const draft = data.analysis?.suggestedDraft || null;
      if (!draft) throw new Error('AI did not return revised rule details.');
      setForm((current) => ({ ...current, ...draftToRuleFormPatch(draft, accounts) }));
      toast.success('Revision drafted. Review and save it.');
    } catch (error) {
      toast.error(error.message || 'Failed to revise rule.');
    } finally {
      setWorking('');
    }
  };

  const handleDelete = async () => {
    if (!window.confirm(`Delete ${rule.name}?`)) return;
    setWorking('delete');
    try {
      const res = await fetchWithAuth(`${SERVER}/accounting/rules/${rule.id}`, { method: 'DELETE' });
      const data = await res.json().catch(() => ({}));
      if (!res.ok) throw new Error(data.error || 'Failed to delete rule.');
      toast.success(data.message || 'Rule deleted.');
      await onChanged?.();
      onClose();
    } catch (error) {
      toast.error(error.message || 'Failed to delete rule.');
    } finally {
      setWorking('');
    }
  };

  const handleApply = async () => {
    if (!transactionIds.length) {
      toast.info('No transactions found for this group.');
      return;
    }
    setWorking('apply');
    try {
      await saveRule();
      const res = await fetchWithAuth(`${SERVER}/accounting/rules/${rule.id}/run`, {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
        body: JSON.stringify({ transactionIds }),
      });
      const data = await res.json().catch(() => ({}));
      if (!res.ok) throw new Error(data.error || 'Failed to apply rule.');
      toast.success(data.message || 'Rule applied.');
      window.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent('refetchTransactions'));
      await onChanged?.();
    } catch (error) {
      toast.error(error.message || 'Failed to apply rule.');
    } finally {
      setWorking('');
    }
  };

  const handlePost = async () => {
    if (!transactionIds.length) {
      toast.info('No transactions found for this group.');
      return;
    }
    setWorking('post');
    try {
      const res = await fetchWithAuth(`${SERVER}/accounting/transactions/bulk-post`, {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
        body: JSON.stringify({ bankIds: transactionIds }),
      });
      const data = await res.json().catch(() => ({}));
      if (!res.ok) throw new Error(data.error || 'Failed to post transactions.');
      toast.success(`Posted ${data.posted ?? transactionIds.length} transaction${(data.posted ?? transactionIds.length) === 1 ? '' : 's'}.`);
      window.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent('refetchTransactions'));
      await onChanged?.();
    } catch (error) {
      toast.error(error.message || 'Failed to post transactions.');
    } finally {
      setWorking('');
    }
  };

  const disabled = Boolean(working);
  const account = accounts.find((item) =>
    item.id === form.categoryId ||
    String(item.code) === String(rule.suggestedAccountCode || rule.categoryCode || '')
  ) || null;
  const journalPreviewLines = (() => {
    try {
      return parseRuleJsonArray(form.journalTemplateText, 'Journal template lines');
    } catch {
      return [];
    }
  })();
  const groupStatus = getGroupStatus(group || {});
  const workLabels = group ? getGroupWorkLabels(group) : [];
  const patternList = parsePatternText(form.patternsText);

  return (
    <dialog className="modal modal-open">
      <div className="modal-box w-11/12 max-w-6xl max-h-[90vh] overflow-y-auto bg-slate-50 p-0">
        <div className="sticky top-0 z-20 border-b border-slate-200 bg-white/95 px-5 py-4 backdrop-blur-sm">
          <div className="flex flex-wrap items-start justify-between gap-3">
            <div className="flex min-w-0 items-center gap-3">
              <span className="inline-flex h-9 w-9 shrink-0 items-center justify-center rounded-lg bg-indigo-50 text-indigo-600">
                <BookOpen size={18} />
              </span>
              <div className="min-w-0">
                <h3 className="truncate text-xl font-bold text-slate-900">{form.name || rule.name || 'Untitled rule'}</h3>
                <p className="text-sm text-slate-500">
                  Rule details for {group?.normalizedMerchant || 'this transaction group'} · {transactionIds.length} transaction{transactionIds.length === 1 ? '' : 's'}
                </p>
              </div>
            </div>
            <button type="button" className="inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 rounded-lg border border-slate-200 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-xs font-medium text-slate-600 hover:bg-slate-50 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500" onClick={onClose} disabled={disabled}>
              <XCircle size={14} /> Close
            </button>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div className="space-y-4 p-5">
          <div className="rounded-xl border border-slate-200 bg-white p-4 shadow-sm">
            <div className="flex flex-col gap-4 xl:flex-row xl:items-start xl:justify-between">
              <div className="min-w-0 flex-1 space-y-3">
                <div className="flex flex-wrap items-center gap-2">
                  <span className={`inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 rounded-full px-2.5 py-1 text-xs font-medium ${form.enabled ? 'bg-emerald-50 text-emerald-700' : 'bg-slate-100 text-slate-500'}`}>
                    <span className={`h-1.5 w-1.5 rounded-full ${form.enabled ? 'bg-emerald-400' : 'bg-slate-300'}`} />
                    {form.enabled ? 'Active rule' : 'Disabled rule'}
                  </span>
                  <span className={`inline-flex items-center rounded-md px-2 py-1 text-xs font-medium ${groupStatus.badge === 'badge-error' ? 'bg-red-50 text-red-700' : groupStatus.badge === 'badge-warning' ? 'bg-amber-50 text-amber-700' : groupStatus.badge === 'badge-info' ? 'bg-sky-50 text-sky-700' : groupStatus.badge === 'badge-success' ? 'bg-emerald-50 text-emerald-700' : 'bg-slate-100 text-slate-500'}`}>
                    {groupStatus.label}
                  </span>
                  <span className="inline-flex items-center rounded-md bg-slate-100 px-2 py-1 text-xs font-medium text-slate-600">{form.group || 'General'}</span>
                  {form.transactionType ? <span className="inline-flex items-center rounded-md bg-indigo-50 px-2 py-1 text-xs font-medium text-indigo-700">{formatRuleLabel(form.transactionType)}</span> : null}
                  {form.sourceType ? <span className="inline-flex items-center rounded-md bg-slate-100 px-2 py-1 text-xs font-medium text-slate-600">{formatRuleLabel(form.sourceType)}</span> : null}
                  {form.requiredReceipt ? <span className="inline-flex items-center rounded-md bg-amber-50 px-2 py-1 text-xs font-medium text-amber-700">Receipt required</span> : null}
                </div>

                {form.notes || form.llmSummary ? (
                  <p className="max-w-3xl text-sm leading-relaxed text-slate-600">{form.notes || form.llmSummary}</p>
                ) : null}

                <div className="flex flex-wrap items-center gap-2 text-xs text-slate-500">
                  {account ? (
                    <span className="inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 rounded-lg border border-slate-200 bg-white px-2.5 py-1.5 font-medium text-slate-700">
                      <BookOpen size={12} />
                      <span className="font-mono text-indigo-600">{account.code}</span>
                      {account.description ? <span className="text-slate-400">— {account.description}</span> : null}
                    </span>
                  ) : null}
                  {workLabels.map((label) => (
                    <span key={label} className="rounded-md bg-slate-100 px-2 py-1 font-medium text-slate-500">{label}</span>
                  ))}
                </div>

                {patternList.length ? (
                  <div>
                    <div className="mb-1.5 text-xs font-semibold text-slate-500">Match patterns</div>
                    <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-1.5">
                      {patternList.map((pattern, index) => (
                        <code key={`${pattern}-${index}`} className="rounded bg-slate-100 px-1.5 py-0.5 font-mono text-xs text-slate-600">{pattern}</code>
                      ))}
                    </div>
                  </div>
                ) : null}
              </div>

              <div className="xl:w-[460px]">
                <ImpactSummary impact={{
                  matchedCount: transactionIds.length,
                  totalGross: group?.amountTotal,
                  uncategorizedCount: group?.uncategorizedCount,
                  estimatedHST: group?.taxTotal,
                }} />
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>

          <JournalTemplatePreview lines={journalPreviewLines} accounts={accounts} onOpenAccount={null} />

          <div className="rounded-xl border border-slate-200 bg-white p-4 shadow-sm">
            <RuleEditor
              title="Edit rule settings"
              form={form}
              setForm={setForm}
              categories={accounts}
              onSave={handleSave}
              onCancel={onClose}
              saving={working === 'save'}
            />
          </div>

          <div className="rounded-xl border border-slate-200 bg-white p-4 shadow-sm">
            <label className="mb-1.5 block text-xs font-semibold text-slate-500">AI revision instructions</label>
            <textarea
              className="min-h-[84px] w-full rounded-lg border border-slate-200 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm focus:border-indigo-500 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500"
              value={reviseInstructions}
              onChange={(event) => setReviseInstructions(event.target.value)}
              placeholder="Example: tighten the pattern, use raw materials, keep no tax unless the receipt shows HST."
            />
          </div>

          <div className="sticky bottom-0 z-10 -mx-5 -mb-5 flex flex-wrap justify-end gap-2 border-t border-slate-200 bg-white/95 p-4 backdrop-blur-sm">
            <button type="button" className="inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 rounded-lg border border-slate-200 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm font-medium text-slate-600 hover:bg-slate-50 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500 disabled:opacity-50" onClick={handleRevise} disabled={disabled}>
              {working === 'revise' ? <span className="loading loading-spinner loading-sm" /> : <Sparkles size={16} />} Revise with AI
            </button>
            <button type="button" className="inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 rounded-lg border border-emerald-200 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm font-medium text-emerald-700 hover:bg-emerald-50 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-emerald-500 disabled:opacity-50" onClick={handleApprove} disabled={disabled}>
              {working === 'approve' ? <span className="loading loading-spinner loading-sm" /> : <CheckCircle size={16} />} Approve
            </button>
            <button type="button" className="inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 rounded-lg bg-indigo-600 px-3 py-2 text-sm font-medium text-white shadow-sm hover:bg-indigo-700 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500 disabled:opacity-50" onClick={handleApply} disabled={disabled || !transactionIds.length}>
              {working === 'apply' ? <span className="loading loading-spinner loading-sm" /> : <Play size={16} />} Apply rule
            </button>
            <button type="button" className="inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 rounded-lg bg-slate-800 px-3 py-2 text-sm font-medium text-white shadow-sm hover:bg-slate-900 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-slate-500 disabled:opacity-50" onClick={handlePost} disabled={disabled || !transactionIds.length}>
              {working === 'post' ? <span className="loading loading-spinner loading-sm" /> : <Zap size={16} />} Post transactions
            </button>
            <button type="button" className="inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 rounded-lg border border-red-200 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm font-medium text-red-600 hover:bg-red-50 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-red-500 disabled:opacity-50" onClick={handleDelete} disabled={disabled}>
              {working === 'delete' ? <span className="loading loading-spinner loading-sm" /> : <Trash2 size={16} />} Delete
            </button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <form method="dialog" className="modal-backdrop">
        <button type="button" onClick={onClose}>close</button>
      </form>
    </dialog>
  );
}

function GroupsView({
  groups,
  accounts,
  alignment = [],
  suggestions = [],
  onOpenAccount,
  onGenerateGroup,
  onRejectSuggestion,
  generatingGroupKey,
  onNavigate,
  onOpenWorkflow,
  onGroupsChanged,
}) {
  const [expandedGroups, setExpandedGroups] = useState({});
  const [workFilter, setWorkFilter] = useState('all');
  const [alignmentFilter, setAlignmentFilter] = useState('all');
  const [search, setSearch] = useState('');
  const [groupPages, setGroupPages] = useState({});
  const [selectedGroupContext, setSelectedGroupContext] = useState(null);
  const [openAfterGenerateGroupKey, setOpenAfterGenerateGroupKey] = useState('');
  const PAGE_SIZE = 10;

  const alignmentByKey = new Map((alignment || []).map((a) => [a.groupKey, a]));
  const suggestionById = new Map((suggestions || []).map((suggestion) => [suggestion.id, suggestion]));
  const normalizeSuggestionLookupText = (value) =>
    String(value || '').toLowerCase().replace(/[^a-z0-9]+/g, ' ').trim();
  const findPendingSuggestionForGroup = (group, ali) => {
    const alignedSuggestion = ali?.pendingSuggestion?.id ? suggestionById.get(ali.pendingSuggestion.id) : null;
    if (alignedSuggestion?.status === 'PENDING') return alignedSuggestion;
    const groupIds = new Set([group?.id, group?.groupId, ali?.groupId].filter(Boolean).map(String));
    const byGroupId = (suggestions || []).find((suggestion) =>
      suggestion?.status === 'PENDING' &&
      suggestion.transactionGroupId &&
      groupIds.has(String(suggestion.transactionGroupId))
    );
    if (byGroupId) return byGroupId;

    const merchantText = normalizeSuggestionLookupText(group?.normalizedMerchant);
    if (!merchantText || merchantText.length < 3) return null;
    return (suggestions || []).find((suggestion) => {
      if (suggestion?.status !== 'PENDING') return false;
      const rule = suggestion.suggestedRule || {};
      const patterns = [
        ...(Array.isArray(rule.patterns) ? rule.patterns : []),
        ...(Array.isArray(rule.matchConditions?.descriptionContainsAny) ? rule.matchConditions.descriptionContainsAny : []),
        ...(Array.isArray(rule.matchConditions?.requiredDescriptors) ? rule.matchConditions.requiredDescriptors : []),
      ];
```
