```jsx
      const suggestionText = normalizeSuggestionLookupText([
        rule.name,
        rule.reason,
        suggestion.reason,
        patterns.join(' '),
      ].filter(Boolean).join(' '));
      return suggestionText.includes(merchantText) || patterns.some((pattern) => {
        const normalizedPattern = normalizeSuggestionLookupText(pattern);
        return normalizedPattern && merchantText.includes(normalizedPattern);
      });
    }) || null;
  };

  const toggleGroup = (index) => {
    setExpandedGroups((current) => ({ ...current, [index]: !current[index] }));
    setGroupPages((prev) => ({ ...prev, [index]: 1 }));
  };

  const setPage = (index, page) => {
    setGroupPages((prev) => ({ ...prev, [index]: page }));
  };

  const handleViewTransaction = (tx, group) => {
    const sourceId = tx.sourceId || group.transactions?.find((item) => item.sourceId)?.sourceId || '';
    if (onOpenWorkflow) {
      onOpenWorkflow({
        title: `${group.normalizedMerchant || 'Transaction group'} transactions`,
        affectedRecords: Array.isArray(group.transactionIds) && group.transactionIds.length ? group.transactionIds : [tx.id],
        primaryTab: 'transactions',
        tab: 'transactions',
        filters: {
          search: group.normalizedMerchant || tx.description || '',
          sourceId,
          type: group.direction === 'INCOME' ? 'income' : group.direction === 'EXPENSE' ? 'expense' : '',
        },
        nextAction: 'Transactions is filtered to the selected AI rule suggestion group.',
      });
    } else if (onNavigate) {
      onNavigate('transactions');
    }
  };

  const handleViewGroup = (g) => {
    const ali = alignmentByKey.get(g.groupKey);
    const suggestion = findPendingSuggestionForGroup(g, ali);
    const suggestionId = suggestion?.status === 'PENDING' ? suggestion.id : null;
    setSelectedGroupContext({
      group: g,
      rule: ali?.existingRule || g.suggestedRule || null,
      alignment: suggestionId ? 'PENDING_SUGGESTION' : ali?.alignment || null,
      suggestionId,
      suggestionRule: suggestion?.suggestedRule || g.suggestedRule || null,
      suggestionTransactionIds: Array.isArray(suggestion?.matchedTransactionIds) ? suggestion.matchedTransactionIds : [],
    });
  };

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!openAfterGenerateGroupKey) return;
    if (generatingGroupKey === openAfterGenerateGroupKey) return;
    const group = groups.find((item) => item.groupKey === openAfterGenerateGroupKey);
    if (!group) return;
    const ali = alignmentByKey.get(group.groupKey);
    const suggestion = findPendingSuggestionForGroup(group, ali);
    if (!suggestion) return;
    handleViewGroup(group);
    setOpenAfterGenerateGroupKey('');
  }, [openAfterGenerateGroupKey, generatingGroupKey, groups, alignment, suggestions]);

  const activeFilter = GROUP_FILTERS.find((filter) => filter.id === workFilter) || GROUP_FILTERS[0];
  const normalizedSearch = String(search || '').trim().toLowerCase();
  const filteredGroups = groups.filter((group) => {
    if (!activeFilter.matches(group)) return false;
    if (!normalizedSearch) return true;
    if (String(group.normalizedMerchant || '').toLowerCase().includes(normalizedSearch)) return true;
    const ali = alignmentByKey.get(group.groupKey);
    if (ali && String(ali.existingRule?.name || '').toLowerCase().includes(normalizedSearch)) return true;
    return false;
  });

  const alignmentFiltered = alignmentFilter === 'all'
    ? filteredGroups
    : filteredGroups.filter((g) => {
        const ali = alignmentByKey.get(g.groupKey);
        return ali && ali.alignment === alignmentFilter;
      });

  const totals = groups.reduce((acc, group) => ({
    incomplete: acc.incomplete + groupCount(group, 'incompleteCount'),
    category: acc.category + groupCount(group, 'uncategorizedCount'),
    tax: acc.tax + groupCount(group, 'missingTaxCount'),
    receipt: acc.receipt + groupCount(group, 'missingReceiptCount'),
    posting: acc.posting + groupCount(group, 'unpostedCount'),
  }), { incomplete: 0, category: 0, tax: 0, receipt: 0, posting: 0 });

  if (!groups.length) {
    return (
      <EmptyState
        icon={Database}
        title="No transaction groups found"
        description="Incomplete transaction groups will appear here once detected. They are grouped by merchant, direction, and source."
      />
    );
  }

  return (
    <div className="space-y-4">
      {selectedGroupContext && (
        <TransactionGroupModal
          group={selectedGroupContext.group}
          rule={selectedGroupContext.rule}
          accounts={accounts}
          alignment={selectedGroupContext.alignment}
          suggestionId={selectedGroupContext.suggestionId}
          suggestionRule={selectedGroupContext.suggestionRule}
          suggestionTransactionIds={selectedGroupContext.suggestionTransactionIds}
          onClose={() => setSelectedGroupContext(null)}
          onChanged={onGroupsChanged}
          onViewTransaction={(tx) => {
            if (onOpenWorkflow) {
              onOpenWorkflow({
                title: 'Transaction details',
                affectedRecords: [tx.id],
                primaryTab: 'transactions',
              });
            } else if (onNavigate) {
              onNavigate('transactions');
            }
          }}
          onGenerateSuggestion={(g) => {
            setOpenAfterGenerateGroupKey(g?.groupKey || '');
            onGenerateGroup?.(g);
          }}
          onRejectSuggestion={onRejectSuggestion}
        />
      )}
      <div className="grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-5 gap-3">
        <SummaryCard icon={AlertCircle} label="Incomplete" value={totals.incomplete} color="slate" />
        <SummaryCard icon={BookOpen} label="Need category" value={totals.category} color="amber" />
        <SummaryCard icon={DollarSign} label="Need tax" value={totals.tax} color="amber" />
        <SummaryCard icon={FileText} label="Need receipt" value={totals.receipt} color="indigo" />
        <SummaryCard icon={Layers} label="Need posting" value={totals.posting} color="indigo" />
      </div>

      <div className="flex flex-col gap-3 rounded-xl border border-slate-200 bg-white p-3 shadow-sm">
        <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-1">
          {GROUP_FILTERS.map((filter) => (
            <button
              key={filter.id}
              type="button"
              className={`px-3 py-1.5 text-xs font-medium rounded-lg transition-all ${
                workFilter === filter.id
                  ? 'bg-indigo-600 text-white shadow-sm'
                  : 'text-slate-500 hover:text-slate-700 hover:bg-slate-100 border border-transparent'
              }`}
              onClick={() => setWorkFilter(filter.id)}
            >
              {filter.label}
            </button>
          ))}
        </div>
        <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-1">
          {ALIGNMENT_FILTERS.map((filter) => (
            <button
              key={filter.id}
              type="button"
              className={`px-2 py-1 text-[10px] font-medium rounded-md transition-all ${
                alignmentFilter === filter.id
                  ? 'bg-indigo-100 text-indigo-700 shadow-sm'
                  : 'text-slate-400 hover:text-slate-600 hover:bg-slate-50'
              }`}
              onClick={() => setAlignmentFilter(filter.id)}
            >
              {filter.label}
            </button>
          ))}
        </div>
        <input
          type="search"
          className="w-full lg:w-64 rounded-lg border border-slate-200 bg-white px-3 py-1.5 text-sm focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500 focus:border-indigo-500"
          value={search}
          onChange={(event) => setSearch(event.target.value)}
          placeholder="Search merchant or rule..."
        />
      </div>

      {!alignmentFiltered.length ? (
        <div className="rounded-xl border border-slate-200 bg-white p-8 text-center">
          <div className="text-sm text-slate-400">
            {groups.length ? 'No groups match this filter.' : 'No incomplete transaction groups found.'}
          </div>
        </div>
      ) : (
        <div className="space-y-2">
          {alignmentFiltered.map((g, i) => {
            const expanded = Boolean(expandedGroups[i]);
            const status = getGroupStatus(g);
            const workLabels = getGroupWorkLabels(g);
            const transactions = uniqueTransactions(
              Array.isArray(g.incompleteTransactionSamples) ? g.incompleteTransactionSamples : [],
              Array.isArray(g.transactions) ? g.transactions : [],
              Array.isArray(g.uncategorizedTransactionSamples) ? g.uncategorizedTransactionSamples : [],
              Array.isArray(g.completedTransactionSamples) ? g.completedTransactionSamples : [],
              Array.isArray(g.sampleTransactions) ? g.sampleTransactions : []
            );
            return (
              <div key={`${g.normalizedMerchant}-${g.direction}-${g.sourceType}-${i}`} className="rounded-xl border border-slate-200 bg-white shadow-sm overflow-hidden">
                <div
                  className="flex items-center gap-3 px-4 py-3 cursor-pointer hover:bg-slate-50/80 transition-colors"
                  onClick={() => toggleGroup(i)}
                >
                  <button
                    type="button"
                    className="shrink-0 p-0.5 rounded text-slate-300 hover:text-slate-500 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500"
                    title={expanded ? 'Hide transactions' : 'Show transactions'}
                  >
                    {expanded ? <ChevronDown size={16} /> : <ChevronRight size={16} />}
                  </button>

                  <div className="flex-1 min-w-0 grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-[1fr_auto_auto_auto_auto_auto_auto_auto_auto_auto] gap-2 items-center text-xs">
                    <div className="font-mono text-sm font-medium text-slate-800 truncate">{g.normalizedMerchant}</div>

                    <div className="hidden md:flex gap-1">
                      <span className={`inline-flex items-center px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded text-xs font-medium ${status.badge === 'badge-success' ? 'bg-emerald-50 text-emerald-700' : status.badge === 'badge-error' ? 'bg-red-50 text-red-700' : status.badge === 'badge-warning' ? 'bg-amber-50 text-amber-700' : status.badge === 'badge-info' ? 'bg-sky-50 text-sky-700' : 'bg-slate-50 text-slate-500'}`}>
                        {status.label}
                      </span>
                      {(alignmentByKey.get(g.groupKey)) && (() => {
                        const ali = alignmentByKey.get(g.groupKey);
                        const cfg = ALIGNMENT_CONFIG[ali.alignment] || ALIGNMENT_CONFIG.NO_RULE;
                        const Icon = cfg.icon;
                        return (
                          <span className={`inline-flex items-center gap-1 px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded text-xs font-medium ${cfg.bg} ${cfg.color}`} title={cfg.label}>
                            {typeof Icon === 'string' ? <span>{Icon}</span> : Icon ? <Icon size={10} /> : null}
                            {cfg.label}
                          </span>
                        );
                      })()}
                    </div>

                    <div className="hidden md:flex flex-wrap gap-1">
                      {workLabels.length ? workLabels.map((label) => (
                        <span key={`${g.groupKey}-${label}`} className="px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded bg-slate-100 text-slate-500 text-[10px]">{label}</span>
                      )) : <span className="text-slate-300">—</span>}
                    </div>

                    <div className={`hidden md:block font-medium ${g.direction === 'INCOME' ? 'text-emerald-600' : 'text-red-600'}`}>{g.direction}</div>
                    <div className="hidden md:block text-slate-400">{g.sourceType || '—'}</div>
                    <div className="text-right font-medium text-slate-600">{g.transactionCount}</div>
                    <div className="text-right font-semibold text-amber-600">{g.incompleteCount ?? 0}</div>
                    <div className="text-right font-mono text-slate-600">{fmt(g.amountTotal)}</div>

                    <div className="flex items-center justify-end gap-1">
                      <button
                        type="button"
                        className="inline-flex items-center gap-1 px-2 py-1 text-xs font-medium rounded-lg bg-indigo-50 text-indigo-700 hover:bg-indigo-100 border border-indigo-200 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500"
                        onClick={(e) => { e.stopPropagation(); handleViewGroup(g); }}
                        title="Open transaction group details"
                      >
                        <Layers size={12} />
                        Group details
                      </button>
                      <button
                        type="button"
                        className="ml-1 inline-flex items-center gap-1 px-2 py-1 text-xs font-medium rounded-lg bg-indigo-50 text-indigo-700 hover:bg-indigo-100 border border-indigo-200 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500"
                        onClick={(e) => {
                          e.stopPropagation();
                          setOpenAfterGenerateGroupKey(g.groupKey || '');
                          onGenerateGroup?.(g);
                        }}
                        disabled={generatingGroupKey === g.groupKey}
                        title="Generate an AI suggestion for this transaction group"
                      >
                        {generatingGroupKey === g.groupKey ? (
                          <span className="w-3 h-3 border-2 border-indigo-300 border-t-indigo-600 rounded-full animate-spin" />
                        ) : <Sparkles size={12} />}
                        Suggest
                      </button>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                </div>

                {expanded && (
                  <div className="border-t border-slate-100 bg-slate-50/40">
                    <div className="overflow-x-auto max-h-[400px] overflow-y-auto">
                      <table className="min-w-full text-xs">
                        <thead>
                          <tr className="bg-slate-50/80 sticky top-0 z-10">
                            <th className="px-4 py-2 text-left font-medium text-slate-500">Date</th>
                            <th className="px-4 py-2 text-left font-medium text-slate-500">Description</th>
                            <th className="px-4 py-2 text-right font-medium text-slate-500">Amount</th>
                            <th className="px-4 py-2 text-right font-medium text-slate-500">Tax</th>
                            <th className="px-4 py-2 text-left font-medium text-slate-500">Category</th>
                            <th className="px-4 py-2 text-left font-medium text-slate-500">Journal</th>
                            <th className="px-4 py-2 text-left font-medium text-slate-500">Issues</th>
                            <th className="px-4 py-2 text-left font-medium text-slate-500">Source</th>
                          </tr>
                        </thead>
                        <tbody className="divide-y divide-slate-100">
                          {(transactions.length > PAGE_SIZE
                            ? transactions.slice(
                                ((groupPages[i] || 1) - 1) * PAGE_SIZE,
                                (groupPages[i] || 1) * PAGE_SIZE
                              )
                            : transactions
                          ).map((tx) => (
                            <tr
                              key={tx.id}
                              className="hover:bg-white cursor-pointer"
                              onClick={() => handleViewTransaction(tx, g)}
                            >
                              <td className="px-4 py-2 text-slate-600 whitespace-nowrap">{fmtDate(tx.date)}</td>
                              <td className="px-4 py-2 text-slate-700 max-w-[220px] truncate">{tx.description}</td>
                              <td className={`px-4 py-2 text-right font-mono ${Number(tx.amount) >= 0 ? 'text-emerald-600' : 'text-red-600'}`}>{fmt(tx.amount)}</td>
                              <td className="px-4 py-2 text-right font-mono text-slate-600">{tx.taxes == null ? '—' : fmt(tx.taxes)}</td>
                              <td className="px-4 py-2 text-slate-500">
                                {tx.currentCategoryCode ? (
                                  <>
                                    <AccountCodeButton code={tx.currentCategoryCode} description={tx.currentCategoryDescription || ''} onOpenAccount={onOpenAccount} />
                                    {tx.currentCategoryDescription ? <span className="text-slate-400 ml-1">— {tx.currentCategoryDescription}</span> : null}
                                  </>
                                ) : <span className="text-slate-400">Uncategorized</span>}
                              </td>
                              <td className="px-4 py-2">
                                {tx.hasJournalEntry ? (
                                  <span className="inline-flex items-center gap-1 px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded text-xs font-medium bg-emerald-50 text-emerald-700">
                                    Posted
                                  </span>
                                ) : tx.journalEntryId ? (
                                  <span className="inline-flex items-center gap-1 px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded text-xs font-medium bg-amber-50 text-amber-700">
                                    Unposted
                                  </span>
                                ) : (
                                  <span className="text-slate-400">—</span>
                                )}
                              </td>
                              <td className="px-4 py-2 text-slate-400">
                                {Array.isArray(tx.incompleteReasons) && tx.incompleteReasons.length
                                  ? tx.incompleteReasons.join(', ')
                                  : '—'}
                              </td>
                              <td className="px-4 py-2 text-slate-400">{tx.sourceName || tx.source || '—'}</td>
                            </tr>
                          ))}
                          {!transactions.length && (
                            <tr>
                              <td colSpan={8} className="px-4 py-6 text-center text-slate-400">
                                This group has {g.transactionCount || 0} transaction{Number(g.transactionCount || 0) === 1 ? '' : 's'}, but the row details were not returned. Refresh after the backend restart.
                              </td>
                            </tr>
                          )}
                        </tbody>
                      </table>
                      {transactions.length > PAGE_SIZE && (
                        <div className="flex items-center justify-between px-4 py-2 border-t border-slate-100 bg-slate-50/80 text-xs text-slate-500">
                          <span>{transactions.length} total transactions</span>
                          <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                            <button
                              type="button"
                              className="px-2 py-1 rounded border border-slate-200 bg-white hover:bg-slate-50 disabled:opacity-30"
                              disabled={(groupPages[i] || 1) <= 1}
                              onClick={(e) => { e.stopPropagation(); setPage(i, (groupPages[i] || 1) - 1); }}
                            >
                              Prev
                            </button>
                            <span className="font-medium">Page {groupPages[i] || 1} of {Math.ceil(transactions.length / PAGE_SIZE)}</span>
                            <button
                              type="button"
                              className="px-2 py-1 rounded border border-slate-200 bg-white hover:bg-slate-50 disabled:opacity-30"
                              disabled={(groupPages[i] || 1) >= Math.ceil(transactions.length / PAGE_SIZE)}
                              onClick={(e) => { e.stopPropagation(); setPage(i, (groupPages[i] || 1) + 1); }}
                            >
                              Next
                            </button>
                          </div>
                        </div>
                      )}
                    </div>
                  </div>
                )}
              </div>
            );
          })}
        </div>
      )}
    </div>
  );
}

export default function AIRuleSuggestionsTab({ onNavigate, onOpenWorkflow }) {
  const [suggestions, setSuggestions] = useState([]);
  const [suggestionHistory, setSuggestionHistory] = useState([]);
  const [groups, setGroups] = useState([]);
  const [groupAlignment, setGroupAlignment] = useState([]);
  const [accounts, setAccounts] = useState([]);
  const [loadingSuggestions, setLoadingSuggestions] = useState(false);
  const [loadingGroups, setLoadingGroups] = useState(false);
  const [generating, setGenerating] = useState(false);
  const [generatingGroupKey, setGeneratingGroupKey] = useState('');
  const [actionLoadingId, setActionLoadingId] = useState(null);
  const [showAccountsManager, setShowAccountsManager] = useState(false);
  const [focusedAccount, setFocusedAccount] = useState(null);
  const [organizationHstRatePercent, setOrganizationHstRatePercent] = useState('');
  const [showSuggestionHistory, setShowSuggestionHistory] = useState(false);
  const [suggestionHistoryFilter, setSuggestionHistoryFilter] = useState('PENDING');
  const [suggestionHistorySearch, setSuggestionHistorySearch] = useState('');
  const [suggestionHistorySort, setSuggestionHistorySort] = useState('risk');

  const fetchSuggestions = useCallback(async () => {
    setLoadingSuggestions(true);
    try {
      const res = await fetchWithAuth(`${SERVER}/accounting/rule-suggestions?status=PENDING`);
      if (!res.ok) throw new Error('Failed to load suggestions.');
      const data = await res.json();
      setSuggestions(Array.isArray(data.suggestions) ? data.suggestions : []);
    } catch (err) {
      toast.error(err.message || 'Failed to load suggestions.');
    } finally {
      setLoadingSuggestions(false);
    }
  }, []);

  const fetchSuggestionHistory = useCallback(async (status = suggestionHistoryFilter) => {
    setLoadingSuggestions(true);
    try {
      const res = await fetchWithAuth(`${SERVER}/accounting/rule-suggestions?status=${status}`);
      if (!res.ok) throw new Error('Failed to load suggestion history.');
      const data = await res.json();
      setSuggestionHistory(Array.isArray(data.suggestions) ? data.suggestions : []);
    } catch (err) {
      toast.error(err.message || 'Failed to load suggestion history.');
    } finally {
      setLoadingSuggestions(false);
    }
  }, [suggestionHistoryFilter]);

  const fetchGroups = useCallback(async () => {
    setLoadingGroups(true);
    try {
      const [groupsRes, alignRes] = await Promise.all([
        fetchWithAuth(`${SERVER}/accounting/rule-suggestions/groups`),
        fetchWithAuth(`${SERVER}/accounting/rule-suggestions/groups/alignment`),
      ]);
      if (!groupsRes.ok) throw new Error('Failed to load groups.');
      const groupsData = await groupsRes.json();
      setGroups(Array.isArray(groupsData.groups) ? groupsData.groups : []);
      if (alignRes.ok) {
        const alignData = await alignRes.json();
        setGroupAlignment(Array.isArray(alignData.groups) ? alignData.groups : []);
      }
    } catch (err) {
      toast.error(err.message || 'Failed to load groups.');
    } finally {
      setLoadingGroups(false);
    }
  }, []);

  const fetchAccounts = useCallback(async () => {
    try {
      const res = await fetchWithAuth(`${SERVER}/accounting/categories?view=all`);
      if (!res.ok) throw new Error('Failed to load accounts.');
      const data = await res.json();
      const list = Array.isArray(data) ? data : Array.isArray(data.categories) ? data.categories : [];
      setAccounts(list);
    } catch (err) {
      toast.error(err.message || 'Failed to load accounts.');
    }
  }, []);

  const fetchOrganizationTaxSettings = useCallback(async () => {
    try {
      const res = await fetchWithAuth(`${SERVER}/settings/organization`);
      if (!res.ok) throw new Error('Failed to load organization tax settings.');
      const data = await res.json();
      const settings = Array.isArray(data.settings) ? data.settings : [];
      const taxRate = settings.find((setting) => setting.settingName === 'salesTaxRate')?.settingValue ?? '';
      setOrganizationHstRatePercent(parseOrganizationHstRatePercent(taxRate));
    } catch {
      setOrganizationHstRatePercent('');
    }
  }, []);

  useEffect(() => {
    fetchGroups();
    fetchSuggestions();
  }, [fetchGroups, fetchSuggestions]);

  useEffect(() => {
    fetchAccounts();
    fetchOrganizationTaxSettings();
  }, [fetchAccounts, fetchOrganizationTaxSettings]);

  const handleOpenAccount = useCallback((account) => {
    setFocusedAccount(account ? {
      id: account.id || null,
      code: account.code || null,
      description: account.description || null,
    } : null);
    setShowAccountsManager(true);
  }, []);

  const handleGenerate = async ({ groupKeys = null } = {}) => {
    setGenerating(true);
    try {
      const maxGroups = Array.isArray(groupKeys)
        ? groupKeys.length
        : groups.length || 200;
      const res = await fetchWithAuth(`${SERVER}/accounting/rule-suggestions/generate`, {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
        body: JSON.stringify({ maxGroups, groupKeys }),
      });
      if (!res.ok) throw new Error('Failed to generate suggestions.');
      const data = await res.json();
      toast.success(data.message || 'Suggestions generated.');
      await fetchSuggestions();
      await fetchGroups();
    } catch (err) {
      toast.error(err.message || 'Generation failed.');
    } finally {
      setGenerating(false);
    }
  };

  const handleGenerateGroup = async (group) => {
    if (!group?.groupKey) return;
    setGeneratingGroupKey(group.groupKey);
    try {
      await handleGenerate({ groupKeys: [group.groupKey] });
    } finally {
      setGeneratingGroupKey('');
    }
  };

  const handleGenerateAllGroups = async () => {
    const groupKeys = groups
      .map((group) => group.groupKey)
      .filter(Boolean);

    if (!groupKeys.length) {
      toast.info('No transaction groups to suggest.');
      return;
    }

    await handleGenerate({ groupKeys });
  };

  const handleClearSuggestions = async () => {
    if (!window.confirm('Clear all AI rule suggestions? This removes pending, approved, applied, and rejected suggestions.')) return;
    try {
      setActionLoadingId('__CLEAR_ALL__');
      const res = await fetchWithAuth(`${SERVER}/accounting/rule-suggestions`, { method: 'DELETE' });
      const data = await res.json().catch(() => ({}));
      if (!res.ok) throw new Error(data.error || 'Failed to clear suggestions.');
      toast.success(data.message || 'Suggestions cleared.');
      setSuggestions([]);
      setSuggestionHistory([]);
      await fetchSuggestions();
      await fetchGroups();
    } catch (err) {
      toast.error(err.message || 'Failed to clear suggestions.');
    } finally {
      setActionLoadingId(null);
    }
  };

  const handleApprove = async (id, applyToMatches, applyPreviousTaxRate = false) => {
    setActionLoadingId(id);
    try {
      const currentSuggestion = suggestions.find((suggestion) => suggestion.id === id);
      const applyingApprovedRule = (currentSuggestion?.status === 'APPROVED' || currentSuggestion?.status === 'APPLIED') && applyToMatches;
      const res = await fetchWithAuth(`${SERVER}/accounting/rule-suggestions/${id}/approve`, {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
        body: JSON.stringify({ applyToMatches, applyPreviousTaxRate }),
      });
      if (!res.ok) {
        const err = await res.json().catch(() => ({}));
        throw new Error(err.error || 'Failed to approve.');
      }
      const data = await res.json();
      toast.success(
        applyingApprovedRule
          ? `Rule applied to ${data.appliedToCount || 0} transaction${data.appliedToCount === 1 ? '' : 's'}.`
          : `Rule created${applyToMatches && data.appliedToCount ? ` and applied to ${data.appliedToCount} transactions` : ''}.`
      );
      await fetchSuggestions();
      await fetchGroups();
      if (showSuggestionHistory) await fetchSuggestionHistory();
    } catch (err) {
      toast.error(err.message || 'Approval failed.');
    } finally {
      setActionLoadingId(null);
    }
  };

  const handleSaveSuggestion = async (id, payload) => {
    setActionLoadingId(id);
    try {
      const isRevision = Boolean(payload?.reviseInstructions);
      const res = await fetchWithAuth(`${SERVER}/accounting/rule-suggestions/${id}${isRevision ? '/revise' : ''}`, {
        method: isRevision ? 'POST' : 'PUT',
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
        body: JSON.stringify(isRevision ? { instructions: payload.reviseInstructions } : payload),
      });
      if (!res.ok) {
        const err = await res.json().catch(() => ({}));
        throw new Error(err.error || 'Failed to save suggestion.');
      }
      toast.success(isRevision ? 'Suggestion revised.' : 'Suggestion updated.');
      await fetchSuggestions();
      if (showSuggestionHistory) await fetchSuggestionHistory();
    } catch (err) {
      toast.error(err.message || 'Failed to save suggestion.');
      throw err;
    } finally {
      setActionLoadingId(null);
    }
  };

  const handleReject = async (id) => {
    setActionLoadingId(id);
    try {
      const res = await fetchWithAuth(`${SERVER}/accounting/rule-suggestions/${id}/reject`, {
        method: 'POST',
      });
      if (!res.ok) throw new Error('Failed to reject.');
      toast.success('Suggestion rejected.');
      await fetchSuggestions();
      await fetchGroups();
      if (showSuggestionHistory) await fetchSuggestionHistory();
    } catch (err) {
      toast.error(err.message || 'Rejection failed.');
    } finally {
      setActionLoadingId(null);
    }
  };

  const handleDeleteApprovedRule = async (id) => {
    const suggestion = suggestions.find((item) => item.id === id);
    const ruleName = suggestion?.suggestedRule?.name || 'this approved rule';
    if (!window.confirm(`Delete ${ruleName}? This removes the approved accounting rule.`)) return;

    setActionLoadingId(id);
    try {
      const res = await fetchWithAuth(`${SERVER}/accounting/rule-suggestions/${id}/approved-rule`, {
        method: 'DELETE',
      });
      const data = await res.json().catch(() => ({}));
      if (!res.ok) throw new Error(data.error || 'Failed to delete approved rule.');
      toast.success(data.message || 'Approved rule deleted.');
      await fetchSuggestions();
      await fetchGroups();
      if (showSuggestionHistory) await fetchSuggestionHistory();
    } catch (err) {
      toast.error(err.message || 'Failed to delete approved rule.');
    } finally {
      setActionLoadingId(null);
    }
  };

  const noRuleCount = groupAlignment.filter((group) => group.alignment === 'NO_RULE').length;
  const pendingCount = groupAlignment.filter((group) => group.alignment === 'PENDING_SUGGESTION').length;
  const activeRuleCount = groupAlignment.filter((group) => group.alignment === 'ACTIVE_RULE_MATCHES').length;
  const attentionCount = groupAlignment.filter((group) =>
    group.alignment === 'RULE_PARTIAL_COVERAGE' || group.alignment === 'RULE_MISMATCH'
  ).length;

  return (
    <div className="max-w-[1440px] mx-auto space-y-6 px-1 sm:px-2">
      <div className="flex flex-col sm:flex-row sm:items-center sm:justify-between gap-4">
        <div>
          <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
            <div className="rounded-xl bg-gradient-to-br from-indigo-500 to-indigo-600 p-2 shadow-sm">
              <Lightbulb size={20} className="text-white" />
            </div>
            <div>
              <h2 className="text-lg sm:text-xl font-bold text-slate-900">Rule Review</h2>
              <p className="text-sm text-slate-500 mt-0.5">
                Review transaction groups, approve AI suggestions, and manage rule coverage — all from one place.
              </p>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2">
          <button
            className="inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 px-3 py-2 text-xs font-medium rounded-lg border border-slate-200 bg-white text-slate-600 hover:bg-slate-50 hover:border-slate-300 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500 transition-all"
            onClick={() => setShowAccountsManager((value) => !value)}
          >
            <BookOpen size={14} />
            {showAccountsManager ? 'Hide accounts' : 'Show accounts'}
          </button>
          <button
            className={`inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 px-3 py-2 text-xs font-medium rounded-lg border border-slate-200 bg-white text-slate-600 hover:bg-slate-50 hover:border-slate-300 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500 transition-all ${loadingGroups || loadingSuggestions ? 'opacity-50 cursor-not-allowed' : ''}`}
            onClick={() => { fetchGroups(); fetchSuggestions(); if (showSuggestionHistory) fetchSuggestionHistory(); }}
          >
            <RefreshCw size={14} className={(loadingGroups || loadingSuggestions) ? 'animate-spin' : ''} /> Refresh
          </button>
          <button
            className={`inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 px-3 py-2 text-xs font-medium rounded-lg bg-indigo-600 text-white hover:bg-indigo-700 shadow-sm focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500 transition-all ${generating ? 'opacity-70 cursor-not-allowed' : ''}`}
            onClick={handleGenerateAllGroups}
            disabled={generating}
          >
            {generating ? (
              <span className="w-3.5 h-3.5 border-2 border-white/30 border-t-white rounded-full animate-spin" />
            ) : <Sparkles size={14} />}
            {generating ? 'Generating...' : 'Suggest all groups'}
          </button>
          <button
            className={`inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 px-3 py-2 text-xs font-medium rounded-lg border border-red-200 bg-white text-red-600 hover:bg-red-50 hover:border-red-300 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-red-500 transition-all ${actionLoadingId === '__CLEAR_ALL__' ? 'opacity-50 cursor-not-allowed' : ''}`}
            onClick={handleClearSuggestions}
            disabled={actionLoadingId === '__CLEAR_ALL__'}
          >
            {actionLoadingId === '__CLEAR_ALL__' ? (
              <span className="w-3.5 h-3.5 border-2 border-red-300 border-t-red-600 rounded-full animate-spin" />
            ) : <Trash2 size={14} />}
            Clear all
          </button>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div className="grid grid-cols-2 sm:grid-cols-4 gap-3">
        <SummaryCard icon={BookOpen} label="No rule" value={noRuleCount} sublabel="Need suggestion" color="slate" />
        <SummaryCard icon={Clock} label="Pending" value={pendingCount} sublabel="Awaiting review" color="amber" />
        <SummaryCard icon={CheckCircle} label="Active rule" value={activeRuleCount} sublabel="Linked groups" color="emerald" />
        <SummaryCard icon={AlertTriangle} label="Needs attention" value={attentionCount} sublabel="Coverage issues" color="red" />
      </div>

      {pendingCount > 0 && (
        <div className="flex items-center gap-3 p-3 rounded-xl bg-amber-50 border border-amber-200">
          <div className="rounded-full bg-amber-100 p-1.5">
            <Info size={16} className="text-amber-600" />
          </div>
          <span className="text-sm text-amber-800 font-medium">{pendingCount} pending suggestion{pendingCount !== 1 ? 's' : ''} waiting for your review. Nothing changes until you approve.</span>
        </div>
      )}

      {showAccountsManager && (
        <div className="rounded-xl border border-slate-200 bg-white p-4 shadow-sm">
          <AccountingChartManager focusRecord={focusedAccount} />
        </div>
      )}

      <div className="space-y-4">
        <div className="rounded-xl border border-slate-200 bg-white p-4 shadow-sm">
          <p className="text-sm text-slate-500 leading-relaxed">
            These are incomplete transaction groups detected by pattern, direction, and source. Each group shows its lifecycle state — click to view details, review pending suggestions, or manage approved rules.
          </p>
          <div className="mt-3">
            <button
              type="button"
              className="inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium rounded-lg bg-indigo-600 text-white hover:bg-indigo-700 shadow-sm focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500 disabled:opacity-50"
              onClick={handleGenerateAllGroups}
              disabled={generating || loadingGroups}
            >
              {generating ? (
                <span className="w-4 h-4 border-2 border-white/30 border-t-white rounded-full animate-spin" />
              ) : <Sparkles size={16} />}
              Suggest all transaction groups
            </button>
          </div>
        </div>
        {loadingGroups ? (
          <LoadingState />
        ) : (
          <GroupsView
            groups={groups}
            accounts={accounts}
            alignment={groupAlignment}
            suggestions={suggestions}
            onOpenAccount={handleOpenAccount}
            onGenerateGroup={handleGenerateGroup}
            onRejectSuggestion={handleReject}
            generatingGroupKey={generatingGroupKey}
            onNavigate={onNavigate}
            onOpenWorkflow={onOpenWorkflow}
            onGroupsChanged={async () => { await fetchGroups(); await fetchSuggestions(); }}
          />
        )}
      </div>

      <div className="rounded-xl border border-slate-200 bg-white p-4 shadow-sm">
        <button
          type="button"
          className="flex items-center gap-1.5 text-xs font-medium text-slate-500 hover:text-slate-700 focus:outline-none"
          onClick={() => {
            if (!showSuggestionHistory) {
              fetchSuggestionHistory(suggestionHistoryFilter);
            }
            setShowSuggestionHistory((v) => !v);
          }}
        >
          {showSuggestionHistory ? <ChevronDown size={14} /> : <ChevronRight size={14} />}
          View all suggestion history (audit & debug)
        </button>
        {showSuggestionHistory && (
          <div className="mt-3 space-y-4">
            <div className="flex flex-col sm:flex-row sm:items-center gap-3">
              <div className="flex gap-1 p-0.5 bg-slate-100 rounded-lg">
                {['PENDING', 'APPROVED', 'APPLIED', 'REJECTED'].map((s) => (
                  <button
                    key={s}
                    className={`px-3 py-1.5 text-xs font-medium rounded-md transition-all ${
                      suggestionHistoryFilter === s
                        ? 'bg-white text-slate-800 shadow-sm border border-slate-200'
                        : 'text-slate-400 hover:text-slate-600'
                    }`}
                    onClick={() => { setSuggestionHistoryFilter(s); fetchSuggestionHistory(s); }}
                  >
                    {s}
                  </button>
                ))}
              </div>
              <div className="flex items-center gap-2 flex-1 flex-wrap">
                <input
                  type="search"
                  placeholder="Search by merchant, rule, or account..."
                  className="flex-1 min-w-[160px] rounded-lg border border-slate-200 bg-white px-3 py-1.5 text-xs focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500 focus:border-indigo-500"
                  value={suggestionHistorySearch}
                  onChange={(e) => setSuggestionHistorySearch(e.target.value)}
                />
                <select
                  className="rounded-lg border border-slate-200 bg-white px-2.5 py-1.5 text-xs focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500 focus:border-indigo-500"
                  value={suggestionHistorySort}
                  onChange={(e) => setSuggestionHistorySort(e.target.value)}
                >
                  <option value="risk">Sort: Risk</option>
                  <option value="confidence">Sort: Confidence</option>
                  <option value="matched">Sort: Matched count</option>
                  <option value="amount">Sort: Total amount</option>
                  <option value="name">Sort: Name</option>
                </select>
              </div>
            </div>

            {loadingSuggestions ? (
              <LoadingState />
            ) : (
              (() => {
                const q = suggestionHistorySearch.trim().toLowerCase();
                let filtered = [...suggestionHistory];
                if (q) {
                  filtered = suggestions.filter((s) => {
                    const rule = s.suggestedRule || {};
                    const account = findAccountForRule(rule, accounts);
                    const searchText = [
                      rule.name || '',
                      s.merchantName || s.normalizedMerchant || '',
                      rule.suggestedAccountCode || account?.code || '',
                      rule.suggestedAccountDescription || accountDescription(account) || '',
                      s.reason || '',
                    ].join(' ').toLowerCase();
                    return searchText.includes(q);
                  });
                }
                if (suggestionHistorySort === 'confidence') filtered.sort((a, b) => (b.confidence || 0) - (a.confidence || 0));
                else if (suggestionHistorySort === 'matched') {
                  filtered.sort((a, b) => (b.impactSummary?.matchedCount || 0) - (a.impactSummary?.matchedCount || 0));
                }
                else if (suggestionHistorySort === 'amount') {
                  filtered.sort((a, b) => (Math.abs(Number(b.impactSummary?.totalGross || 0))) - (Math.abs(Number(a.impactSummary?.totalGross || 0))));
                }
                else if (suggestionHistorySort === 'name') {
                  filtered.sort((a, b) => ((a.suggestedRule?.name || a.merchantName || '') || '').localeCompare((b.suggestedRule?.name || b.merchantName || '') || ''));
                }

                if (!filtered.length) {
                  return (
                    <EmptyState
                      icon={Sparkles}
                      title="No suggestions found"
                      description={q ? 'No suggestions match your search.' : `No ${suggestionHistoryFilter.toLowerCase()} suggestions.`}
                    />
                  );
                }

                return filtered.map((s) => (
                  <SuggestionCard key={s.id} suggestion={s} accounts={accounts} organizationHstRatePercent={organizationHstRatePercent} onApprove={handleApprove} onReject={handleReject} onDeleteApproved={handleDeleteApprovedRule} onSave={handleSaveSuggestion} onOpenAccount={handleOpenAccount} loading={actionLoadingId === s.id} />
                ));
              })()
            )}
          </div>
        )}
      </div>

      <div className="rounded-xl border border-slate-200 bg-gradient-to-br from-indigo-50 to-indigo-50/30 p-4">
        <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
          <div className="rounded-full bg-indigo-100 p-1.5 shrink-0 mt-0.5">
            <Info size={16} className="text-indigo-600" />
          </div>
          <div className="space-y-1">
            <h4 className="text-sm font-semibold text-indigo-900">About posting</h4>
            <p className="text-xs text-indigo-700/80 leading-relaxed">
              <strong>Approve</strong> creates the accounting rule. After approval, use <strong>Apply to matches</strong> or the transaction group apply controls to update matching transactions. Applying sets categories, tax treatments, and journal templates, but does <strong>not</strong> automatically post journal entries to the ledger.
            </p>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>


    </div>
  );
}

```
