FILE: client/services/accounting/components/DuplicateTransactions.jsx
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
```jsx
// Full path: /home/luanngo/boss-dev/client/services/accounting/components/DuplicateTransactions.jsx
// /home/luan_ngo/boss/client/services/accounting/components/DuplicateTransactions.js
import React, { useState, useContext, useEffect } from 'react';
import { AuthContext } from '@/shared/context/AuthContext';
import { toast } from 'react-toastify';
import { fetchWithAuth } from '@/shared/utils/fetchWithAuth';
import { Copy, Trash2, Search, AlertTriangle } from 'lucide-react';
import Tooltip from '@/shared/components/Tooltip';

const DuplicateTransactions = () => {
  const { user } = useContext(AuthContext);
  const [duplicateGroups, setDuplicateGroups] = useState([]);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);
  const [deleting, setDeleting] = useState(false);

  const fetchDuplicateTransactions = async () => {
    setLoading(true);
    setDuplicateGroups([]); // Clear previous results
    try {
      const res = await fetchWithAuth(`${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL}/accounting/transactions/duplicates`);
      if (!res.ok) throw new Error('Failed to fetch duplicate transactions.');
      const data = await res.json();
      // Sort groups by date of the first transaction
      const sortedGroups = data.duplicateGroups.sort((a, b) => new Date(a[0].date) - new Date(b[0].date));
      setDuplicateGroups(sortedGroups);
      if (sortedGroups.length === 0) {
          toast.info("No duplicate transactions found.");
      } else {
          toast.success(`Found ${sortedGroups.length} group(s) of duplicates.`);
      }
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Fetch Duplicate Transactions Error:', error);
      toast.error('Failed to load duplicate transactions.');
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  };

  const handleDeleteFirstDuplicate = async (group) => {
    if (!group || group.length < 2) return; // Need at least 2 to be a duplicate pair

    const transactionToDelete = group[0]; // Assume first is the one to delete
    if (!window.confirm(`DELETE Duplicate?\n\nDescription: ${transactionToDelete.description}\nDate: ${new Date(transactionToDelete.date).toLocaleDateString()}\nAmount: ${transactionToDelete.amount.toFixed(2)}\n\nThis will delete only this specific transaction.`)) {
      return;
    }

    setDeleting(true);
    try {
      const res = await fetchWithAuth(`${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL}/accounting/transactions/${transactionToDelete.id}`, { method: 'DELETE' });
      if (!res.ok) {
        const data = await res.json();
        throw new Error(data.error || 'Failed to delete transaction.');
      }
      toast.success('Duplicate transaction deleted.');
      // Remove the deleted transaction from this specific group in the state
      setDuplicateGroups(prevGroups => {
        const newGroups = prevGroups.map(g => {
            if (g.some(tx => tx.id === transactionToDelete.id)) { // Find the group containing the deleted tx
                const filteredGroup = g.filter(tx => tx.id !== transactionToDelete.id);
                return filteredGroup.length > 1 ? filteredGroup : null; // Return null if only one remains
            }
            return g;
        });
        return newGroups.filter(g => g !== null); // Remove groups that are no longer duplicates
      });
       // Optional: Refresh main transaction list
       window.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent('refetchTransactions'));
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Delete Duplicate Error:', error);
      toast.error(`Error: ${error.message}`);
    } finally {
      setDeleting(false);
    }
  };

  const handleDeleteAllFirstDuplicates = async () => {
    if (duplicateGroups.length === 0) return;
    if (!window.confirm(`DELETE FIRST entry from all ${duplicateGroups.length} duplicate groups? This action cannot be undone.`)) return;

    setDeleting(true);
    try {
      const transactionIdsToDelete = duplicateGroups.map(group => group[0]?.id).filter(id => id); // Get first ID from each group safely
      if (transactionIdsToDelete.length === 0) {
          throw new Error("No valid transaction IDs found to delete.");
      }

      const res = await fetchWithAuth(`${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL}/accounting/transactions/duplicates/bulk-delete`, { // Assuming a bulk delete endpoint
        method: 'DELETE',
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
        body: JSON.stringify({ transactionIds: transactionIdsToDelete }),
      });

      if (!res.ok) {
        const data = await res.json();
        throw new Error(data.error || 'Failed to delete multiple duplicates.');
      }

      const result = await res.json();
      toast.success(`Successfully deleted ${result.deletedCount || transactionIdsToDelete.length} duplicate transactions.`);

      // Remove the first transaction from each group in the state
      setDuplicateGroups(prevGroups => {
        return prevGroups.map(group => group.slice(1)).filter(group => group.length > 1); // Keep groups with more than 1 item left
      });
      // Optional: Refresh main transaction list
      window.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent('refetchTransactions'));

    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Delete All Duplicates Error:', error);
      toast.error(`Error: ${error.message}`);
    } finally {
      setDeleting(false);
    }
  };

  return (
    <div className="bg-base-100 p-4 rounded-box">
      <h3 className="text-lg font-semibold mb-4 flex items-center"><Copy size={20} className="mr-2"/> Duplicate Transactions</h3>

      <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2 mb-4">
        <button onClick={fetchDuplicateTransactions} className="btn btn-primary" disabled={loading || deleting}>
          {loading ? <><span className="loading loading-spinner loading-xs"></span> Finding...</> : <><Search size={18} className="mr-1" /> Find Duplicates</>}
        </button>
        {duplicateGroups.length > 0 && (
          <button onClick={handleDeleteAllFirstDuplicates} className="btn btn-error btn-outline" disabled={deleting || loading}>
            {deleting ? <><span className="loading loading-spinner loading-xs"></span> Deleting All...</> : <><Trash2 size={18} className="mr-1" /> Delete All First Duplicates</>}
          </button>
        )}
      </div>

      {loading ? (
         <div className="flex justify-center items-center p-10"><span className="loading loading-spinner loading-lg"></span></div>
      ) : (
        <div className="space-y-6 max-h-[60vh] overflow-y-auto">
          {duplicateGroups.length === 0 && !loading && (
            <p className="text-base-content/70 p-4 text-center">Click "Find Duplicates" to search.</p>
          )}
          {duplicateGroups.map((group, index) => (
            <div key={index} className="p-4 border border-base-300 rounded-box bg-base-200 shadow">
              <div className="flex justify-between items-center mb-3">
                <h4 className="font-medium text-md">Duplicate Group {index + 1} ({group.length} items)</h4>
                <Tooltip content="Delete the first transaction listed below">
                  <button onClick={() => handleDeleteFirstDuplicate(group)} className="btn btn-xs btn-error btn-outline" disabled={deleting}>
                    <Trash2 size={14} /> Delete First
                  </button>
                </Tooltip>
              </div>
              <div className="overflow-x-auto">
                <table className="table table-zebra table-sm w-full">
                  <thead>
                    <tr>
                      <th>Date</th>
                      <th>Description</th>
                      <th>Amount</th>
                      <th>Type</th>
                      <th className="w-16">Source</th>
                    </tr>
                  </thead>
                  <tbody>
                    {group.map((tx) => (
                      <tr key={tx.id} className="hover:bg-base-100">
                        <td>{new Date(tx.date).toLocaleDateString()}</td>
                        <td>{tx.description}</td>
                        <td className={tx.amount >= 0 ? 'text-success' : 'text-error'}>
                          {tx.amount >= 0 ? '+' : '-'}${Math.abs(tx.amount).toFixed(2)}
                        </td>
                        <td className="capitalize">{tx.type}</td>
                        <td className="text-xs text-base-content/70">{tx.source?.name || 'N/A'}</td>
                      </tr>
                    ))}
                  </tbody>
                </table>
              </div>
            </div>
          ))}
        </div>
      )}
    </div>
  );
};

export default DuplicateTransactions;
```

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
FILE: client/services/accounting/components/JournalEntries.jsx
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
```jsx
// Full path: /home/luanngo/boss-dev/client/services/accounting/components/JournalEntries.jsx
import React, { useEffect, useRef, useState, useMemo } from 'react';
import { fetchWithAuth } from '@/shared/utils/fetchWithAuth';
import { toast } from 'react-toastify';
import AccountAutocomplete from './AccountAutocomplete';
import {
  formatDate, formatAccountingAmount, sourceLabel,
} from '../utils/formatAccounting';
import { computeThisFiscalYear, computeLastFiscalYear, getFiscalYearStartMonth } from '../utils/fiscalYear';
import {
  ChevronDown, ChevronRight, MoreVertical, Search, X, Filter,
  ExternalLink, Edit3, Copy, RotateCcw, Trash2, FileText,
  AlertTriangle, CheckCircle, Clock, BookOpen, Download,
  Tag, CheckSquare, Upload, Eye,
} from 'lucide-react';

export default function JournalEntries() {
  // ---- data ----
  const [entries, setEntries] = useState([]);
  const [accounts, setAccounts] = useState([]);
  const [summary, setSummary] = useState({ total: 0, drafts: 0, unbalanced: 0, dateMin: null, dateMax: null });

  // ---- pagination ----
  const [page, setPage] = useState(1);
  const [pageSize, setPageSize] = useState(25);
  const [totalPages, setTotalPages] = useState(1);
  const [totalEntries, setTotalEntries] = useState(0);

  // ---- filters ----
  const [search, setSearch] = useState('');
  const [debouncedSearch, setDebouncedSearch] = useState('');
  const [dateFrom, setDateFrom] = useState('');
  const [dateTo, setDateTo] = useState('');
  const [sourceFilter, setSourceFilter] = useState('');
  const [statusFilter, setStatusFilter] = useState('');
  const [showMoreFilters, setShowMoreFilters] = useState(false);

  // ---- sort ----
  const [sortKey, setSortKey] = useState('date');
  const [sortDir, setSortDir] = useState('desc');

  // ---- UI state ----
  const [expandedEntries, setExpandedEntries] = useState(new Set());
  const [selectedEntries, setSelectedEntries] = useState(new Set());
  const [openMenuEntry, setOpenMenuEntry] = useState(null);
  const [deleteConfirm, setDeleteConfirm] = useState(null);
  const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(true);

  // ---- modal ----
  const [isModalOpen, setIsModalOpen] = useState(false);
  const [editingEntry, setEditingEntry] = useState(null);
  const defaultForm = { date: new Date().toISOString().slice(0, 10), memo: '', lines: [{ accountId: '', debit: 0, credit: 0 }] };
  const [form, setForm] = useState(defaultForm);

  const loadReqId = useRef(0);
  const [fyStartMonth, setFyStartMonth] = useState(null);

  // ---- helpers ----
  const hasActiveFilters = debouncedSearch || dateFrom || dateTo || sourceFilter || statusFilter;

  useEffect(() => {
    getFiscalYearStartMonth().then(setFyStartMonth);
  }, []);

  // ---- computed entry data ----
  const computeEntryStats = (entry) => {
    const d = entry.totalDebit ?? entry.lines.reduce((s, l) => s + (l.debit || 0), 0);
    const c = entry.totalCredit ?? entry.lines.reduce((s, l) => s + (l.credit || 0), 0);
    const diff = Math.abs(d - c);
    return {
      totalDebit: Math.round(d * 100) / 100,
      totalCredit: Math.round(c * 100) / 100,
      isBalanced: diff < 0.005,
      difference: Math.round(diff * 100) / 100,
      totalAmount: Math.max(d, c),
    };
  };

  // Client-side unbalanced filter
  const filteredEntries = useMemo(() => {
    if (statusFilter !== 'unbalanced') return entries;
    return entries.filter(e => {
      const stats = computeEntryStats(e);
      return !stats.isBalanced;
    });
  }, [entries, statusFilter]);

  // ---- data fetching ----
  const loadEntries = async (keepExpanded = false) => {
    const id = ++loadReqId.current;
    setIsLoading(true);
    try {
      const params = new URLSearchParams({
        page: page.toString(),
        pageSize: pageSize.toString(),
        sortKey,
        sortDir,
      });
      if (search) params.set('search', search);
      if (dateFrom) params.set('dateFrom', dateFrom);
      if (dateTo) params.set('dateTo', dateTo);
      if (sourceFilter) params.set('source', sourceFilter);
      if (statusFilter === 'posted') params.set('posted', 'true');
      if (statusFilter === 'draft') params.set('posted', 'false');

      const res = await fetchWithAuth(
        `${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL}/accounting/journal-entries?${params}`
      );
      const json = await res.json();
      if (id !== loadReqId.current) return;
      setEntries(json.entries || []);
      setSummary(json.summary || { total: 0, drafts: 0, unbalanced: 0 });
      setTotalPages(json.pagination?.totalPages || 1);
      setTotalEntries(json.pagination?.total || 0);
      if (!keepExpanded) setExpandedEntries(new Set());
      setSelectedEntries(new Set());
    } catch {
      if (id !== loadReqId.current) return;
      toast.error('Failed to load entries.');
      setEntries([]);
    } finally {
      if (id === loadReqId.current) setIsLoading(false);
    }
  };

  const loadAccounts = async () => {
    try {
      const res = await fetchWithAuth(`${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL}/accounting/categories`);
      const json = await res.json();
      setAccounts(json || []);
    } catch {
      toast.error('Failed to load accounts.');
    }
  };

  useEffect(() => { loadEntries(); loadAccounts(); }, [page, pageSize, sortKey, sortDir]);
  useEffect(() => { if (loadReqId.current > 0) loadEntries(); }, [search, dateFrom, dateTo, sourceFilter, statusFilter]);

  // ---- search debounce ----
  const handleSearchChange = (val) => {
    setDebouncedSearch(val);
  };
  useEffect(() => {
    const timer = setTimeout(() => {
      setSearch(debouncedSearch);
      setPage(1);
    }, 300);
    return () => clearTimeout(timer);
  }, [debouncedSearch]);

  const clearFilters = () => {
    setDebouncedSearch('');
    setSearch('');
    setDateFrom('');
    setDateTo('');
    setSourceFilter('');
    setStatusFilter('');
    setPage(1);
  };

  // ---- sort ----
  const toggleSort = (key) => {
    if (sortKey === key) setSortDir(sd => sd === 'asc' ? 'desc' : 'asc');
    else { setSortKey(key); setSortDir('desc'); }
    setPage(1);
  };

  const sortIndicator = (key) => sortKey === key ? (sortDir === 'asc' ? ' ↑' : ' ↓') : '';

  // ---- expand / collapse ----
  const handleExpand = (id) => {
    setExpandedEntries(prev => {
      const next = new Set(prev);
      next.has(id) ? next.delete(id) : next.add(id);
      return next;
    });
  };

  // ---- selection ----
  const visibleEntries = statusFilter === 'unbalanced' ? filteredEntries : entries;
  const allVisibleSelected = visibleEntries.length > 0 && visibleEntries.every(e => selectedEntries.has(e.id));
  const toggleSelectAll = () => {
    if (allVisibleSelected) setSelectedEntries(new Set());
    else setSelectedEntries(new Set(visibleEntries.map(e => e.id)));
  };
  const toggleSelect = (id) => {
    setSelectedEntries(prev => {
      const next = new Set(prev);
      next.has(id) ? next.delete(id) : next.add(id);
      return next;
    });
  };

  // ---- modal ----
  const openModal = (entry) => {
    if (entry) {
      setEditingEntry(entry.id);
      setForm({
        date: new Date(entry.date).toISOString().slice(0, 10),
        memo: entry.memo || '',
        lines: entry.lines.map(l => ({ accountId: l.accountId, debit: l.debit, credit: l.credit })),
      });
    } else {
      setEditingEntry(null);
      setForm(defaultForm);
    }
    setIsModalOpen(true);
  };
  const closeModal = () => { setIsModalOpen(false); setEditingEntry(null); };
  const updateLine = (idx, field, value) => {
    const newLines = [...form.lines];
    newLines[idx][field] = field === 'accountId' ? value : parseFloat(value) || 0;
    setForm(f => ({ ...f, lines: newLines }));
  };
  const addLine = () => setForm(f => ({ ...f, lines: [...f.lines, { accountId: '', debit: 0, credit: 0 }] }));
  const removeLine = (idx) => setForm(f => ({ ...f, lines: f.lines.filter((_, i) => i !== idx) }));

  const formTotalDebit = form.lines.reduce((s, l) => s + (Number(l.debit) || 0), 0);
  const formTotalCredit = form.lines.reduce((s, l) => s + (Number(l.credit) || 0), 0);
  const formDifference = Math.abs(formTotalDebit - formTotalCredit);

  const save = async () => {
    try {
      const url = editingEntry
        ? `${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL}/accounting/journal-entries/${editingEntry}`
        : `${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL}/accounting/journal-entries`;
      const method = editingEntry ? 'PUT' : 'POST';
      const res = await fetchWithAuth(url, {
        method,
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
        body: JSON.stringify(form)
      });
      if (!res.ok) throw new Error('Save failed');
      toast.success(editingEntry ? 'Updated' : 'Created');
      closeModal();
      loadEntries(true);
    } catch (err) {
      toast.error(err.message);
    }
  };

  // ---- delete ----
  const confirmDelete = async () => {
    if (!deleteConfirm) return;
    try {
      const res = await fetchWithAuth(
        `${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL}/accounting/journal-entries/${deleteConfirm}`,
        { method: 'DELETE' }
      );
      if (!res.ok) throw new Error('Delete failed');
      toast.success('Deleted');
      setDeleteConfirm(null);
      setEntries(es => es.filter(e => e.id !== deleteConfirm));
    } catch (err) {
      toast.error(err.message);
    }
  };

  // ---- formatting helpers ----
  const fmtAmt = (value) => {
    const n = Number(value || 0);
    return formatAccountingAmount(n, true);
  };
  const fmtAmtOrDash = (value) => {
    const n = Number(value || 0);
    if (Math.abs(n) < 0.005) return '—';
    return formatAccountingAmount(n, true);
  };

  // ---- DatePreset button component ----
  const DatePreset = ({ label, onClick }) => (
    <button className="btn btn-xs btn-ghost text-indigo-600 font-medium hover:bg-indigo-50 px-2" onClick={onClick}>
      {label}
    </button>
  );

  // ---- source options ----
  const sourceOptions = [
    { value: '', label: 'All sources' },
    { value: 'MANUAL', label: 'Manual' },
    { value: 'BANK_IMPORT', label: 'Bank import' },
    { value: 'SQUARE_RECONCILIATION', label: 'Square' },
    { value: 'PAYROLL_IMPORT', label: 'Payroll' },
    { value: 'RISE_DEDUPED_REPORTS', label: 'Payroll (Rise)' },
    { value: 'PAYROLL_FUNDING_CORRECTION', label: 'Payroll funding' },
    { value: 'WSIB_PAYMENT_CORRECTION', label: 'WSIB payment' },
  ];

  // ---- menu outside click ----
  const menuRef = useRef(null);
  useEffect(() => {
    const handler = (e) => {
      if (menuRef.current && !menuRef.current.contains(e.target)) {
        setOpenMenuEntry(null);
      }
    };
    document.addEventListener('mousedown', handler);
    return () => document.removeEventListener('mousedown', handler);
  }, []);

  // ---- status badge ----
  const StatusBadge = ({ entry }) => {
    const { isBalanced } = computeEntryStats(entry);
    if (!entry.posted) return <span className="badge badge-ghost badge-sm gap-1"><Clock size={12} /> Draft</span>;
    if (!isBalanced) return <span className="badge badge-warning badge-sm gap-1"><AlertTriangle size={12} /> Unbalanced</span>;
    return <span className="badge badge-success badge-sm gap-1 bg-emerald-50 text-emerald-700 border-emerald-200"><CheckCircle size={12} /> Balanced</span>;
  };

  // ---- render ----
  return (
    <div className="min-w-0">
      {/* Page header */}
      <div className="flex flex-col sm:flex-row sm:items-start sm:justify-between gap-3 mb-5">
        <div>
          <h1 className="text-2xl font-bold text-slate-900 tracking-tight">Journal</h1>
          <p className="text-sm text-slate-500 mt-1">Review, create, and manage general ledger entries.</p>
        </div>
        <div className="flex items-center gap-2 shrink-0">
          <button className="btn btn-outline btn-sm gap-1.5">
            <Upload size={14} /> Import
          </button>
          <button className="btn btn-primary btn-sm gap-1.5" onClick={() => openModal(null)}>
            + New journal entry
          </button>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Summary chips */}
      {summary.total > 0 && (
        <div className="flex flex-wrap items-center gap-2 mb-4 text-sm">
          <span className="font-medium text-slate-700">All entries {summary.total.toLocaleString()}</span>
          <span className="text-slate-300">·</span>
          <button
            className={`chip-filter ${statusFilter === 'draft' ? 'chip-active' : ''}`}
            onClick={() => setStatusFilter(st => st === 'draft' ? '' : 'draft')}
          >
            Draft {summary.drafts}
          </button>
          <span className="text-slate-300">·</span>
          <button
            className={`chip-filter ${statusFilter !== '' && statusFilter !== 'draft' && statusFilter !== 'posted' ? 'chip-active' : ''}`}
            onClick={() => setSourceFilter(sf => sf === 'MANUAL' ? '' : 'MANUAL')}
          >
            Needs review
          </button>
          <span className="text-slate-300">·</span>
          <button
            className={`chip-filter ${statusFilter === 'unbalanced' ? 'chip-active' : ''} text-amber-700`}
            onClick={() => setStatusFilter(st => st === 'unbalanced' ? '' : 'unbalanced')}
          >
            Unbalanced {summary.unbalanced}
          </button>
        </div>
      )}

      {/* Filter toolbar */}
      <div className="bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-xl shadow-sm mb-4">
        <div className="p-3 space-y-3">
          {/* Search row */}
          <div className="flex flex-col sm:flex-row gap-3">
            <div className="relative flex-1">
              <Search size={16} className="absolute left-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 text-slate-400 pointer-events-none" />
              <input
                type="text"
                placeholder="Search memo, account, amount, or reference…"
                className="input input-bordered w-full pl-9 h-10 text-sm"
                value={debouncedSearch}
                onChange={e => handleSearchChange(e.target.value)}
              />
              {debouncedSearch && (
                <button className="absolute right-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 text-slate-400 hover:text-slate-600" onClick={() => { setDebouncedSearch(''); setSearch(''); setPage(1); }}>
                  <X size={14} />
                </button>
              )}
            </div>
            <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
              <button
                className={`btn btn-sm gap-1.5 ${showMoreFilters ? 'btn-primary' : 'btn-ghost'}`}
                onClick={() => setShowMoreFilters(s => !s)}
              >
                <Filter size={14} /> Filters
              </button>
              <select className="select select-bordered select-sm text-sm" value={`${sortKey}-${sortDir}`}
                onChange={e => { const [k, d] = e.target.value.split('-'); setSortKey(k); setSortDir(d); setPage(1); }}>
                <option value="date-desc">Newest first</option>
                <option value="date-asc">Oldest first</option>
                <option value="memo-asc">Memo A-Z</option>
                <option value="memo-desc">Memo Z-A</option>
              </select>
            </div>
          </div>

          {/* Filter row */}
          {showMoreFilters && (
            <div className="flex flex-wrap items-center gap-3 pt-1">
              <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                <label className="text-xs font-medium text-slate-500">Date range:</label>
                <input type="date" className="input input-bordered input-sm text-sm w-36"
                  value={dateFrom} onChange={e => { setDateFrom(e.target.value); setPage(1); }} />
                <span className="text-slate-400 text-xs">to</span>
                <input type="date" className="input input-bordered input-sm text-sm w-36"
                  value={dateTo} onChange={e => { setDateTo(e.target.value); setPage(1); }} />
                <div className="flex gap-1 ml-1">
                  <DatePreset label="This FY" onClick={() => {
                    if (!fyStartMonth) return;
                    const d = computeThisFiscalYear(fyStartMonth);
                    if (d) { setDateFrom(d.from.toISOString().slice(0,10)); setDateTo(d.to.toISOString().slice(0,10)); setPage(1); }
                  }} />
                  <DatePreset label="Last FY" onClick={() => {
                    if (!fyStartMonth) return;
                    const d = computeLastFiscalYear(fyStartMonth);
                    if (d) { setDateFrom(d.from.toISOString().slice(0,10)); setDateTo(d.to.toISOString().slice(0,10)); setPage(1); }
                  }} />
                </div>
              </div>
              <select className="select select-bordered select-sm text-sm"
                value={sourceFilter} onChange={e => { setSourceFilter(e.target.value); setPage(1); }}>
                {sourceOptions.map(o => <option key={o.value} value={o.value}>{o.label}</option>)}
              </select>
              <select className="select select-bordered select-sm text-sm"
                value={statusFilter} onChange={e => { setStatusFilter(e.target.value); setPage(1); }}>
                <option value="">All statuses</option>
                <option value="posted">Posted</option>
                <option value="draft">Draft</option>
              </select>
            </div>
          )}

          {/* Active filter chips */}
          {hasActiveFilters && (
            <div className="flex flex-wrap items-center gap-1.5 pt-1 border-t border-slate-100">
              {search && <span className="chip">Search: "{search}" <button onClick={() => { setDebouncedSearch(''); setSearch(''); setPage(1); }}><X size={12} /></button></span>}
              {dateFrom && <span className="chip">From: {dateFrom} <button onClick={() => { setDateFrom(''); setPage(1); }}><X size={12} /></button></span>}
              {dateTo && <span className="chip">To: {dateTo} <button onClick={() => { setDateTo(''); setPage(1); }}><X size={12} /></button></span>}
              {sourceFilter && <span className="chip">Source: {sourceOptions.find(o => o.value === sourceFilter)?.label} <button onClick={() => { setSourceFilter(''); setPage(1); }}><X size={12} /></button></span>}
              {statusFilter && <span className="chip">Status: {statusFilter} <button onClick={() => { setStatusFilter(''); setPage(1); }}><X size={12} /></button></span>}
              <button className="text-xs text-slate-400 hover:text-slate-600 ml-1 font-medium" onClick={clearFilters}>Clear all</button>
            </div>
          )}
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Bulk actions bar */}
      {selectedEntries.size > 0 && (
        <div className="flex items-center gap-3 py-2 px-4 bg-indigo-50 border border-indigo-100 rounded-lg mb-3 text-sm">
          <span className="font-medium text-indigo-700">{selectedEntries.size} selected</span>
          <div className="flex gap-1.5">
            <button className="btn btn-xs btn-ghost gap-1"><Download size={12} /> Export</button>
            <button className="btn btn-xs btn-ghost gap-1"><CheckSquare size={12} /> Mark reviewed</button>
            <button className="btn btn-xs btn-ghost gap-1"><Tag size={12} /> Tag</button>
          </div>
        </div>
      )}

      {/* Journal table */}
      <div className="bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-xl shadow-sm overflow-hidden">
        <div className="overflow-x-auto">
          <table className="journal-table w-full">
            <thead>
              <tr>
                <th className="w-10 px-2">
                  <input type="checkbox" className="checkbox checkbox-sm"
                    checked={allVisibleSelected} onChange={toggleSelectAll} />
                </th>
                <th className="w-8 px-1"></th>
                <th className="cursor-pointer select-none px-3 py-3 text-left text-xs font-semibold text-slate-500 uppercase tracking-wider"
                  onClick={() => toggleSort('date')}>
                  Date{sortIndicator('date')}
                </th>
                <th className="cursor-pointer select-none px-3 py-3 text-left text-xs font-semibold text-slate-500 uppercase tracking-wider"
                  onClick={() => toggleSort('memo')}>
                  Memo / Reference{sortIndicator('memo')}
                </th>
                <th className="px-3 py-3 text-left text-xs font-semibold text-slate-500 uppercase tracking-wider">
                  Source
                </th>
                <th className="px-3 py-3 text-right text-xs font-semibold text-slate-500 uppercase tracking-wider">
                  Lines
                </th>
                <th className="px-3 py-3 text-right text-xs font-semibold text-slate-500 uppercase tracking-wider">
                  Amount
                </th>
                <th className="px-3 py-3 text-center text-xs font-semibold text-slate-500 uppercase tracking-wider">
                  Status
                </th>
                <th className="w-12 px-2"></th>
              </tr>
            </thead>
            <tbody>
              {isLoading ? (
                <tr><td colSpan={9} className="py-16 text-center">
                  <span className="loading loading-spinner loading-md text-slate-400" />
                </td></tr>
              ) : visibleEntries.length === 0 ? (
                <tr><td colSpan={9} className="py-16 text-center text-slate-400 text-sm">
                  <BookOpen size={32} className="mx-auto mb-3 opacity-40" />
                  No journal entries found
                </td></tr>
              ) : visibleEntries.map(entry => {
                const stats = computeEntryStats(entry);
                const isExpanded = expandedEntries.has(entry.id);
                const isSelected = selectedEntries.has(entry.id);
                const isMenuOpen = openMenuEntry === entry.id;

                return (
                  <React.Fragment key={entry.id}>
                    <tr className={`journal-row ${isSelected ? 'journal-row-selected' : ''} ${isExpanded ? 'journal-row-expanded' : ''}`}
                      onClick={() => handleExpand(entry.id)}>
                      <td className="px-2" onClick={e => e.stopPropagation()}>
                        <input type="checkbox" className="checkbox checkbox-sm"
                          checked={isSelected} onChange={() => toggleSelect(entry.id)} />
                      </td>
                      <td className="px-1 text-slate-400">
                        {isExpanded ? <ChevronDown size={16} /> : <ChevronRight size={16} />}
                      </td>
                      <td className="px-3 py-2.5 text-sm font-medium text-slate-700 whitespace-nowrap">
                        {formatDate(entry.date)}
                      </td>
                      <td className="px-3 py-2.5">
                        <div className="text-sm font-medium text-slate-800 truncate max-w-xs">
                          {entry.memo || '(no memo)'}
                        </div>
                        <div className="text-xs text-slate-400 mt-0.5">
                          {entry.lines.length} line{entry.lines.length !== 1 ? 's' : ''}
                        </div>
                      </td>
                      <td className="px-3 py-2.5">
                        <span className="badge badge-ghost badge-sm text-slate-600 font-normal">
                          {sourceLabel(entry.source)}
                        </span>
                      </td>
                      <td className="px-3 py-2.5 text-right text-sm text-slate-600 tabular-nums">
                        {entry.lines.length}
                      </td>
                      <td className="px-3 py-2.5 text-right text-sm font-medium tabular-nums">
                        <span className={stats.isBalanced ? 'text-slate-700' : 'text-amber-700'}>
                          {fmtAmtOrDash(stats.totalAmount)}
                        </span>
                      </td>
                      <td className="px-3 py-2.5 text-center" onClick={e => e.stopPropagation()}>
                        <StatusBadge entry={entry} />
                      </td>
                      <td className="px-2 relative" onClick={e => e.stopPropagation()}>
                        <button className="btn btn-ghost btn-xs btn-square text-slate-400 hover:text-slate-700"
                          onClick={() => setOpenMenuEntry(isMenuOpen ? null : entry.id)}>
                          <MoreVertical size={16} />
                        </button>
                        {isMenuOpen && (
                          <div ref={menuRef} className="absolute right-0 top-full mt-1 z-50 w-48 bg-white rounded-lg shadow-lg border border-slate-200 py-1 text-sm animate-slide-down-in">
                            <button className="w-full flex items-center gap-2 px-3 py-2 text-slate-700 hover:bg-slate-50"
                              onClick={() => { setOpenMenuEntry(null); openModal(entry); }}>
                              <Eye size={14} /> View details
                            </button>
                            <button className="w-full flex items-center gap-2 px-3 py-2 text-slate-700 hover:bg-slate-50"
                              onClick={() => { setOpenMenuEntry(null); openModal(entry); }}>
                              <Edit3 size={14} /> Edit
                            </button>
                            <button className="w-full flex items-center gap-2 px-3 py-2 text-slate-700 hover:bg-slate-50"
                              onClick={() => { setOpenMenuEntry(null); }}>
                              <Copy size={14} /> Duplicate
                            </button>
                            <button className="w-full flex items-center gap-2 px-3 py-2 text-slate-700 hover:bg-slate-50"
                              onClick={() => { setOpenMenuEntry(null); }}>
                              <RotateCcw size={14} /> Reverse entry
                            </button>
                            <button className="w-full flex items-center gap-2 px-3 py-2 text-slate-700 hover:bg-slate-50"
                              onClick={() => { setOpenMenuEntry(null); }}>
                              <FileText size={14} /> View source
                            </button>
                            <hr className="my-1 border-slate-100" />
                            <button className="w-full flex items-center gap-2 px-3 py-2 text-red-600 hover:bg-red-50"
                              onClick={() => { setOpenMenuEntry(null); setDeleteConfirm(entry.id); }}>
                              <Trash2 size={14} /> Delete
                            </button>
                          </div>
                        )}
                      </td>
                    </tr>
                    {isExpanded && (
                      <tr className="journal-detail-row">
                        <td colSpan={9} className="p-0">
                          <div className="journal-detail-inner">
                            <div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-xs text-slate-400 mb-3">
                              <span className="font-mono text-slate-500">ID: {entry.id.slice(0, 8)}</span>
                              <span className="text-slate-300">·</span>
                              <span>Created by {entry.createdBy || 'system'}</span>
                              {entry.posted && (
                                <>
                                  <span className="text-slate-300">·</span>
                                  <span className="text-emerald-600 font-medium">Posted</span>
                                </>
                              )}
                            </div>

                            <div className="journal-lines-container">
                              <div className="journal-lines-header">
                                <span className="journal-lines-col-acct">Account</span>
                                <span className="journal-lines-col-dr text-right">Debit</span>
                                <span className="journal-lines-col-cr text-right">Credit</span>
                              </div>
                              {entry.lines.map((ln, i) => {
                                const acct = accounts.find(a => a.id === ln.accountId);
                                const isDebitNegative = Number(ln.debit || 0) < -0.005;
                                const isCreditNegative = Number(ln.credit || 0) < -0.005;
                                return (
                                  <div key={i} className="journal-line-row">
                                    <span className="journal-lines-col-acct text-sm text-slate-700">
                                      {acct ? (
                                        <><span className="text-slate-400 font-mono">{acct.code}</span><span className="text-slate-300 mx-1.5">·</span>{acct.description}</>
                                      ) : (
                                        <span className="text-slate-400 italic">Unknown account ({ln.accountId?.slice(0, 8)})</span>
                                      )}
                                    </span>
                                    <span className={`journal-lines-col-dr text-sm tabular-nums ${isDebitNegative ? 'text-amber-600' : 'text-slate-700'}`}>
                                      {fmtAmtOrDash(ln.debit)}
                                    </span>
                                    <span className={`journal-lines-col-cr text-sm tabular-nums ${isCreditNegative ? 'text-amber-600' : 'text-slate-700'}`}>
                                      {fmtAmtOrDash(ln.credit)}
                                    </span>
                                  </div>
                                );
                              })}
                              <div className="journal-lines-total">
                                <span className="journal-lines-col-acct text-sm font-semibold text-slate-800">Total</span>
                                <span className="journal-lines-col-dr text-sm font-semibold tabular-nums text-slate-800">
                                  {fmtAmt(stats.totalDebit)}
                                </span>
                                <span className="journal-lines-col-cr text-sm font-semibold tabular-nums text-slate-800">
                                  {fmtAmt(stats.totalCredit)}
                                </span>
                              </div>
                            </div>

                            <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mt-3">
                              {stats.isBalanced ? (
                                <span className="flex items-center gap-1 text-xs text-emerald-600 font-medium">
                                  <CheckCircle size={14} /> Balanced
                                </span>
                              ) : (
                                <span className="flex items-center gap-1 text-xs text-amber-600 font-medium">
                                  <AlertTriangle size={14} /> Unbalanced by ${stats.difference.toFixed(2)}
                                </span>
                              )}
                              <button className="btn btn-xs btn-ghost gap-1 text-slate-400" onClick={() => openModal(entry)}>
                                <ExternalLink size={12} /> View full entry
                              </button>
                            </div>
                          </div>
                        </td>
                      </tr>
                    )}
                  </React.Fragment>
                );
              })}
            </tbody>
          </table>
        </div>

        {/* Pagination */}
        <div className="flex flex-col sm:flex-row items-center justify-between gap-3 px-4 py-3 border-t border-slate-200 bg-slate-50 text-sm">
          <div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-slate-500">
            <span>Rows per page:</span>
            <select className="select select-bordered select-xs text-sm"
              value={pageSize} onChange={e => { setPageSize(Number(e.target.value)); setPage(1); }}>
              <option value={25}>25</option>
              <option value={50}>50</option>
              <option value={100}>100</option>
            </select>
            <span>
              {Math.min((page - 1) * pageSize + 1, totalEntries)}–{Math.min(page * pageSize, totalEntries)} of {totalEntries.toLocaleString()}
            </span>
          </div>
          <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
            <button className="btn btn-ghost btn-xs" disabled={page === 1} onClick={() => setPage(1)} title="First">
              ««
            </button>
            <button className="btn btn-ghost btn-xs" disabled={page === 1} onClick={() => setPage(p => p - 1)} title="Previous">
              ‹
            </button>
            <span className="px-3 text-slate-600">
              Page <span className="font-medium">{page}</span> of {totalPages}
            </span>
            <button className="btn btn-ghost btn-xs" disabled={page === totalPages} onClick={() => setPage(p => p + 1)} title="Next">
              ›
            </button>
            <button className="btn btn-ghost btn-xs" disabled={page === totalPages} onClick={() => setPage(totalPages)} title="Last">
              »»
            </button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Create / Edit Modal */}
      {isModalOpen && (
        <div className="fixed inset-0 bg-black/50 flex items-center justify-center z-50" onClick={closeModal}>
          <div className="bg-white rounded-xl shadow-xl w-full max-w-2xl mx-4 max-h-[90vh] overflow-y-auto animate-slide-down-in"
            onClick={e => e.stopPropagation()}>
            <div className="sticky top-0 bg-white border-b border-slate-200 px-6 py-4 flex items-center justify-between rounded-t-xl">
              <h3 className="text-lg font-semibold text-slate-900">
                {editingEntry ? 'Edit Journal Entry' : 'New Journal Entry'}
              </h3>
              <button className="btn btn-ghost btn-sm btn-square text-slate-400" onClick={closeModal}>
                <X size={18} />
              </button>
            </div>
            <div className="p-6 space-y-5">
              <div className="flex flex-col sm:flex-row gap-3">
                <div className="flex-1">
                  <label className="text-xs font-medium text-slate-500 mb-1 block">Date</label>
                  <input type="date" className="input input-bordered w-full text-sm"
                    value={form.date} onChange={e => setForm(f => ({ ...f, date: e.target.value }))} />
                </div>
                <div className="flex-[2]">
                  <label className="text-xs font-medium text-slate-500 mb-1 block">Memo</label>
                  <input type="text" className="input input-bordered w-full text-sm" placeholder="Describe this entry…"
                    value={form.memo} onChange={e => setForm(f => ({ ...f, memo: e.target.value }))} />
                </div>
              </div>

              <div>
                <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-2">
                  <h4 className="text-sm font-medium text-slate-700">Journal lines</h4>
                  <button className="btn btn-xs btn-ghost gap-1 text-indigo-600" onClick={addLine}>
                    + Add line
                  </button>
                </div>
                <div className="space-y-2">
                  {form.lines.map((ln, idx) => (
                    <div key={idx} className="form-line-row">
                      <div className="form-line-col-acct">
                        <AccountAutocomplete
                          value={ln.accountId}
                          onChange={(val) => updateLine(idx, 'accountId', val)}
                          accounts={accounts}
                          placeholder="Select account"
                        />
                      </div>
                      <div className="form-line-col-dr">
                        <input type="number" step="0.01" className="input input-bordered input-sm w-full text-right text-sm tabular-nums"
                          placeholder="Debit" value={ln.debit || ''}
                          onChange={e => updateLine(idx, 'debit', e.target.value || '0')} />
                      </div>
                      <div className="form-line-col-cr">
                        <input type="number" step="0.01" className="input input-bordered input-sm w-full text-right text-sm tabular-nums"
                          placeholder="Credit" value={ln.credit || ''}
                          onChange={e => updateLine(idx, 'credit', e.target.value || '0')} />
                      </div>
                      <button className="btn btn-ghost btn-xs btn-square text-slate-400 hover:text-red-500 shrink-0"
                        onClick={() => removeLine(idx)} disabled={form.lines.length <= 1}>
                        <X size={14} />
                      </button>
                    </div>
                  ))}
                </div>

                {/* Running totals in form */}
                <div className="mt-3 flex items-center justify-end gap-6 text-sm border-t border-slate-100 pt-3">
                  <div className="text-right">
                    <span className="text-slate-400 text-xs">Debits</span>
                    <div className="font-semibold tabular-nums text-slate-700">${formTotalDebit.toFixed(2)}</div>
                  </div>
                  <div className="text-right">
                    <span className="text-slate-400 text-xs">Credits</span>
                    <div className="font-semibold tabular-nums text-slate-700">${formTotalCredit.toFixed(2)}</div>
                  </div>
                  <div className="text-right">
                    <span className="text-slate-400 text-xs">Difference</span>
                    <div className={`font-semibold tabular-nums ${formDifference < 0.005 ? 'text-emerald-600' : 'text-amber-600'}`}>
                      {formDifference < 0.005 ? '✓ Balanced' : `$${formDifference.toFixed(2)}`}
                    </div>
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
            <div className="sticky bottom-0 bg-slate-50 border-t border-slate-200 px-6 py-4 flex justify-end gap-2 rounded-b-xl">
              <button className="btn btn-ghost btn-sm" onClick={closeModal}>Cancel</button>
              <button className="btn btn-primary btn-sm" onClick={save} disabled={formDifference >= 0.005}>
                {editingEntry ? 'Save changes' : 'Post entry'}
              </button>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      )}

      {/* Delete confirmation */}
      {deleteConfirm && (
        <div className="fixed inset-0 bg-black/50 flex items-center justify-center z-50" onClick={() => setDeleteConfirm(null)}>
          <div className="bg-white rounded-xl shadow-xl w-full max-w-md mx-4 p-6 animate-slide-down-in"
            onClick={e => e.stopPropagation()}>
            <h3 className="text-lg font-semibold text-slate-900 mb-2">Delete journal entry?</h3>
            <p className="text-sm text-slate-600 mb-1">
              This permanently removes this entry and its journal lines.
            </p>
            <p className="text-sm text-slate-500 mb-5">This action cannot be undone.</p>
            <div className="flex justify-end gap-2">
              <button className="btn btn-ghost btn-sm" onClick={() => setDeleteConfirm(null)}>Cancel</button>
              <button className="btn btn-error btn-sm" onClick={confirmDelete}>Delete entry</button>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      )}

      {/* Inline styles */}
      <style>{`
        .chip-filter {
          font-size: 0.8125rem;
          padding: 0.125rem 0.5rem;
          border-radius: 9999px;
          border: 1px solid transparent;
          background: transparent;
          color: #475569;
          cursor: pointer;
          transition: all 0.15s;
          font-weight: 500;
        }
        .chip-filter:hover {
          background: #f1f5f9;
          border-color: #e2e8f0;
        }
        .chip-filter.chip-active {
          background: #eef2ff;
          border-color: #c7d2fe;
          color: #4338ca;
        }
        .chip {
          display: inline-flex;
          align-items: center;
          gap: 0.25rem;
          font-size: 0.75rem;
          padding: 0.125rem 0.5rem;
          border-radius: 9999px;
          background: #f1f5f9;
          color: #475569;
          border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;
        }
        .chip button {
          display: inline-flex;
          align-items: center;
          color: #94a3b8;
        }
        .chip button:hover { color: #475569; }

        .journal-table {
          border-collapse: collapse;
          min-width: 900px;
        }
        .journal-table thead {
          position: sticky;
          top: 0;
          z-index: 20;
        }
        .journal-table thead th {
          background: #f8fafc;
          border-bottom: 2px solid #e2e8f0;
        }
        .journal-row {
          cursor: pointer;
          transition: background 0.1s;
          border-bottom: 1px solid #f1f5f9;
        }
        .journal-row:hover {
          background: #f8fafc;
        }
        .journal-row-selected {
          background: #eef2ff !important;
        }
        .journal-row-expanded {
          background: #f8fafc;
          border-bottom: none;
        }

        .journal-detail-row {
          background: #f8fafc;
        }
        .journal-detail-inner {
          padding: 0.75rem 1rem 1rem 2.5rem;
          border-left: 3px solid #c7d2fe;
          margin-left: 2rem;
          margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
          background: #ffffff;
          border-radius: 0 0.5rem 0.5rem 0.5rem;
          box-shadow: inset 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.02);
        }

        .journal-lines-container {
          border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;
          border-radius: 0.5rem;
          overflow: hidden;
        }
        .journal-lines-header {
          display: flex;
          padding: 0.5rem 0.75rem;
          background: #f1f5f9;
          font-size: 0.7rem;
          font-weight: 600;
          text-transform: uppercase;
          letter-spacing: 0.04em;
          color: #64748b;
          border-bottom: 1px solid #e2e8f0;
        }
        .journal-line-row {
          display: flex;
          padding: 0.4rem 0.75rem;
          border-bottom: 1px solid #f1f5f9;
        }
        .journal-line-row:last-child {
          border-bottom: none;
        }
        .journal-lines-total {
          display: flex;
          padding: 0.5rem 0.75rem;
          background: #f8fafc;
          border-top: 2px solid #e2e8f0;
        }
        .journal-lines-col-acct { flex: 1; min-width: 0; }
        .journal-lines-col-dr { width: 140px; padding-right: 0.5rem; }
        .journal-lines-col-cr { width: 140px; }

        .form-line-row {
          display: flex;
          align-items: center;
          gap: 0.5rem;
        }
        .form-line-col-acct { flex: 1; min-width: 0; }
        .form-line-col-dr { width: 130px; }
        .form-line-col-cr { width: 130px; }
      `}</style>
    </div>
  );
}

```

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
FILE: client/services/accounting/components/LedgerTab.jsx
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
```jsx
// Full path: /home/luanngo/boss-dev/client/services/accounting/components/LedgerTab.jsx
// File: client/services/accounting/components/LedgerTab.js
import React, { useState, useEffect, useCallback } from 'react';
import { fetchWithAuth } from '@/shared/utils/fetchWithAuth';
import { toast } from 'react-toastify';
import AccountAutocomplete from './AccountAutocomplete';

const LedgerCard = ({
  code,
  categories,
  ledgers,
  prevNets,
  paginationData,
  loading,
  sortBy,
  sortDir,
  page,
  onSort,
  onPageChange,
  onEntryClick,
}) => {
  const rows = ledgers[code] || [];
  let acc = prevNets[code] || 0;
  const computed = rows.map(r => {
    acc += (r.debit || 0) - (r.credit || 0);
    return { ...r, displayBalance: acc };
  });
  const title = code === 'ALL' ? 'All Accounts' : categories.find(c => c.code === code)?.description || code;
  const currentCardPagination = paginationData[code] || { currentPage: 1, totalPages: 1 };

  const handlePageInputChange = (e) => {
    let newPage = parseInt(e.target.value, 10);
    if (isNaN(newPage) || newPage < 1) newPage = 1;
    if (newPage > currentCardPagination.totalPages) newPage = currentCardPagination.totalPages;
    onPageChange(newPage); // This will call setPage globally
  };

  return (
    <div className="card bg-base-100 shadow-xl flex flex-col flex-shrink-0 w-auto max-w-full h-full">
      <div className="card-body p-4 flex flex-col">
        <h3 className="card-title text-base mb-2">{title}{code !== 'ALL' && ` (${code})`}</h3>
        {loading ? (
          <div className="flex justify-center items-center h-40">
            <span className="loading loading-spinner loading-lg"></span>
          </div>
        ) : (
          <>
            <div className="overflow-auto flex-1">
              <table className="table-auto table-xs min-w-max">
                <thead>
                  <tr>
                    {['date', 'memo', 'debit', 'credit', 'balance'].map(field => (
                      <th key={field} onClick={() => onSort(field)} className="cursor-pointer sticky top-0 bg-base-200 z-10">
                        {field.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + field.slice(1)}
                        {sortBy === field ? (sortDir === 'asc' ? ' ↑' : ' ↓') : ''}
                      </th>
                    ))}
                  </tr>
                </thead>
                <tbody>
                  {computed.map((r, i) => (
                    <tr key={r.entryId + '-' + i} className="hover cursor-pointer" onClick={() => onEntryClick(r.entryId)}>
                      <td>{new Date(r.date).toLocaleDateString()}</td>
                      <td>{r.memo}</td>
                      <td className="text-right">{r.debit?.toFixed(2)}</td>
                      <td className="text-right">{r.credit?.toFixed(2)}</td>
                      <td className="text-right">{r.displayBalance.toFixed(2)}</td>
                    </tr>
                  ))}
                  {!computed.length && (
                    <tr>
                      <td colSpan={5} className="text-center text-sm py-4">No entries found.</td>
                    </tr>
                  )}
                </tbody>
              </table>
            </div>
            <div className="flex justify-between items-center mt-4 flex-shrink-0">
              <div className="join">
                <button
                  className="join-item btn btn-sm"
                  disabled={page === 1}
                  onClick={() => onPageChange(Math.max(1, page - 1))}
                >
                  « Prev
                </button>
                <input
                  type="number"
                  min="1"
                  max={currentCardPagination.totalPages}
                  value={page}
                  onChange={handlePageInputChange}
                  className="join-item input input-sm input-bordered w-20 text-center"
                  aria-label="Current Page"
                />
                <button
                  className="join-item btn btn-sm"
                  disabled={page >= currentCardPagination.totalPages}
                  onClick={() => onPageChange(Math.min(page + 1, currentCardPagination.totalPages))}
                >
                  Next »
                </button>
              </div>
              <span className="text-sm">
                Page {page} of {currentCardPagination.totalPages}
              </span>
            </div>
          </>
        )}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
};

export default function LedgerTab() {
  const [categories, setCategories] = useState([]);
  const [accountFilter, setAccountFilter] = useState('');
  const [selectedCodes, setSelectedCodes] = useState([]);
  const [dateRange, setDateRange] = useState(() => {
    const saved = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('ledgerDateRange') || 'null');
    if (saved && saved.from && saved.to) return saved;
    const today = new Date().toISOString().slice(0, 10);
    return { from: today, to: today };
  });
  const [jumpToDateValue, setJumpToDateValue] = useState(dateRange.from);

  const [ledgers, setLedgers] = useState({});
  const [prevNets, setPrevNets] = useState({});
  const [startingBalances, setStartingBalances] = useState(() =>
    JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('startingBalances') || '{}')
  );
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);
  const [isDownloadingCsv, setIsDownloadingCsv] = useState(false); // New state for CSV download

  const [editingEntryId, setEditingEntryId] = useState(null); // For inline memo (if re-added)
  const [memoValue, setMemoValue] = useState(''); // For inline memo (if re-added)
  const [memoFilter, setMemoFilter] = useState('');

  const [modalOpen, setModalOpen] = useState(false);
  const [selectedEntryId, setSelectedEntryId] = useState(null);
  const [entryData, setEntryData] = useState(null);
  const [editMemo, setEditMemo] = useState('');
  const [editDate, setEditDate] = useState('');
  const [editLines, setEditLines] = useState([]);

  const [sortBy, setSortBy] = useState('date');
  const [sortDir, setSortDir] = useState('asc');
  const [page, setPage] = useState(1);
  const [pageSize] = useState(200); // Adjusted page size
  const [paginationData, setPaginationData] = useState({});

  useEffect(() => {
    localStorage.setItem('ledgerDateRange', JSON.stringify(dateRange));
  }, [dateRange]);

  useEffect(() => {
    localStorage.setItem('startingBalances', JSON.stringify(startingBalances));
  }, [startingBalances]);

  useEffect(() => {
    fetchWithAuth(`${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL}/accounting/categories`)
      .then(r => r.json())
      .then(setCategories)
      .catch(() => toast.error('Couldn’t load accounts.'));
  }, []);

  const resetPageAndFetch = useCallback(() => {
    setPage(1);
  }, []);

  useEffect(() => {
    resetPageAndFetch();
  }, [selectedCodes, dateRange, sortBy, sortDir, pageSize, startingBalances, resetPageAndFetch]);


  useEffect(() => {
    const fetchLedgerDataForCode = async (codeToFetch, commonParams) => {
      const currentApiParams = {
        ...commonParams,
        sortBy,
        sortDir,
        page: String(page),
        pageSize: String(pageSize),
      };
      if (codeToFetch !== 'ALL') {
        currentApiParams.code = codeToFetch;
      }

      const res = await fetchWithAuth(
        `${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL}/accounting/ledger?${new URLSearchParams(currentApiParams)}`
      );
      if (!res.ok) throw new Error(`Failed to fetch ledger for ${codeToFetch}. Status: ${res.status}`);
      const data = await res.json();

      let prevNetBalance = parseFloat(startingBalances[codeToFetch] || 0);
      if (page > 1) {
        const pastDataParams = {
          ...commonParams,
          sortBy: 'date', // usually chronological for opening balance
          sortDir: 'asc',
          page: '1',
          pageSize: String((page - 1) * pageSize),
        };
        if (codeToFetch !== 'ALL') pastDataParams.code = codeToFetch;

        const pastRes = await fetchWithAuth(
          `${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL}/accounting/ledger?${new URLSearchParams(pastDataParams)}`
        );
        if (!pastRes.ok) throw new Error(`Failed to fetch past ledger for ${codeToFetch}. Status: ${pastRes.status}`);
        const pastJson = await pastRes.json();
        prevNetBalance += (pastJson.ledger || []).reduce((sum, row) => sum + (parseFloat(row.debit) || 0) - (parseFloat(row.credit) || 0), 0);
      }
      return {
        rows: data.ledger || [],
        totalItems: data.total || 0,
        calculatedPrevNet: prevNetBalance,
      };
    };

    const codesToDisplay = selectedCodes.length ? selectedCodes : ['ALL'];
    const commonParamsForDateRange = { from: dateRange.from, to: dateRange.to,...(memoFilter ? { memo: memoFilter } : {}) };

    const loadAllLedgers = async () => {
      if (!dateRange.from || !dateRange.to || new Date(dateRange.from) > new Date(dateRange.to)) {
        toast.warn("Invalid date range: 'From' date cannot be after 'To' date.");
        setLedgers({});
        setPrevNets({});
        setPaginationData({});
        setLoading(false);
        return;
      }
      setLoading(true);
      const newLedgers = {};
      const newPrevNets = {};
      const newPaginationData = {};

      try {
        for (const code of codesToDisplay) {
          const { rows, totalItems, calculatedPrevNet } = await fetchLedgerDataForCode(code, commonParamsForDateRange);
          newLedgers[code] = rows;
          newPrevNets[code] = calculatedPrevNet;
          newPaginationData[code] = {
            currentPage: page,
            totalPages: Math.ceil(totalItems / pageSize) || 1,
            totalItems: totalItems,
          };
        }
        setLedgers(newLedgers);
        setPrevNets(newPrevNets);
        setPaginationData(newPaginationData);
      } catch (error) {
        console.error('Error loading ledgers:', error);
        toast.error(`Error loading ledgers: ${error.message}`);
      } finally {
        setLoading(false);
      }
    };

    loadAllLedgers();
  }, [selectedCodes, dateRange, sortBy, sortDir, page, pageSize, startingBalances]);


  const handleSort = (field) => {
    if (sortBy === field) {
      setSortDir(d => (d === 'asc' ? 'desc' : 'asc'));
    } else {
      setSortBy(field);
      setSortDir('asc');
    }
    // Page reset is handled by the separate useEffect watching sortBy
  };

  const openEntryModal = async (id) => {
    setSelectedEntryId(id);
    setModalOpen(true);
    try {
      const res = await fetchWithAuth(`${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL}/accounting/journal-entries/${id}`);
      if (!res.ok) throw new Error('Fetch failed');
      const d = await res.json();
      setEntryData(d);
      setEditDate(new Date(d.date).toISOString().slice(0, 10));
      setEditMemo(d.memo || '');
      setEditLines(d.lines.map(l => ({
        id: l.id,
        accountId: l.account.id,
        description: l.description || '',
        debit: l.debit,
        credit: l.credit,
      })));
    } catch (err) {
      toast.error(err.message);
      setModalOpen(false);
    }
  };

  const saveEntry = async () => {
    try {
      const payload = { date: editDate, memo: editMemo, lines: editLines.map(l => ({ ...l, debit: parseFloat(l.debit) || 0, credit: parseFloat(l.credit) || 0 })) };
      const res = await fetchWithAuth(
        `${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL}/accounting/journal-entries/${selectedEntryId}`,
        { method: 'PUT', headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }, body: JSON.stringify(payload) }
      );
      if (!res.ok) {
        const errorData = await res.json().catch(() => ({ detail: 'Update failed with no error detail.' }));
        throw new Error(errorData.detail || errorData.error || 'Update failed');
      }
      toast.success('Entry updated');
      setModalOpen(false);
      // Trigger a refetch of ledger data
      const currentStartingBalances = { ...startingBalances }; // Create a new object reference
      setStartingBalances(currentStartingBalances); // This will trigger the useEffect for fetching
    } catch (err) {
      toast.error(err.message);
    }
  };

  const handleJumpToDateChange = (e) => {
    const newDate = e.target.value;
    setJumpToDateValue(newDate);
    if (newDate) {
      setDateRange({ from: newDate, to: newDate });
      // Page reset is handled by the separate useEffect watching dateRange
    }
  };

  const filteredCategories = categories.filter(c =>
    c.description.toLowerCase().includes(accountFilter.toLowerCase()) ||
    c.code.includes(accountFilter)
  );

  const handleDownloadCsv = async () => {
    if (!dateRange.from || !dateRange.to) {
      toast.warn("Please select both a 'From' and 'To' date for the export.");
      return;
    }
    if (new Date(dateRange.from) > new Date(dateRange.to)) {
      toast.warn("Invalid date range: 'From' date cannot be after 'To' date.");
      return;
    }

    setIsDownloadingCsv(true);
    toast.info("Preparing ledger CSV download...", { autoClose: 3000 });

    try {
      const codesToExport = selectedCodes.length > 0 ? selectedCodes.join(',') : 'ALL';

      const params = new URLSearchParams({
        from: dateRange.from,
        to: dateRange.to,
        codes: codesToExport,
        memo:  memoFilter
      });
      // This endpoint `/accounting/ledger/export-csv` needs to be created on the server.
      // It should accept `from`, `to`, and `codes` (where 'ALL' means all accounts, 
      // or a comma-separated string of account codes).
      // It should return a CSV file with appropriate headers (Content-Type: text/csv, Content-Disposition).
      // CSV columns might be: Date, Account Code, Account Name, Memo, Debit, Credit.
      const url = `${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL}/accounting/ledger/export-csv?${params.toString()}`;

      const response = await fetchWithAuth(url, { method: 'GET' });

      if (!response.ok) {
        let errorMsg = `Failed to download CSV. Status: ${response.status}`;
        try {
          const errorData = await response.json(); // Try to parse as JSON
          errorMsg = errorData.detail || errorData.message || errorData.error || errorMsg;
        } catch (e) {
          // If not JSON, try to parse as text
          try {
            const errorText = await response.text();
            if (errorText) errorMsg = `${errorMsg} - ${errorText.substring(0, 100)}`;
          } catch (textErr) { /* ignore */ }
        }
        throw new Error(errorMsg);
      }

      const blob = await response.blob();
      const contentDisposition = response.headers.get('content-disposition');
      let filename = `ledger_${codesToExport.replace(/[^a-z0-9,-]/gi, '_').toLowerCase()}_${dateRange.from}_to_${dateRange.to}.csv`; // Default filename

      if (contentDisposition) {
        const filenameMatch = contentDisposition.match(/filename="?(.+?)"?(;|$)/i);
        if (filenameMatch && filenameMatch[1]) {
          filename = filenameMatch[1];
        }
      }

      const downloadUrl = window.URL.createObjectURL(blob);
      const a = document.createElement('a');
      a.style.display = 'none';
      a.href = downloadUrl;
      a.download = filename;

      document.body.appendChild(a);
      a.click();

      document.body.removeChild(a);
      window.URL.revokeObjectURL(downloadUrl);

      toast.success("Ledger CSV downloaded successfully.");

    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error downloading ledger CSV:', error);
      toast.error(`Download failed: ${error.message}`);
    } finally {
      setIsDownloadingCsv(false);
    }
  };

  return (
    <>
      <div className="p-4 bg-base-200 rounded-lg shadow mb-6 space-y-4">
        <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-4">
          <div className="form-control">
            <label className="label"><span className="label-text">Filter Accounts</span></label>
            <input
              value={accountFilter}
              onChange={e => { setAccountFilter(e.target.value); setPage(1); }}
              placeholder="Filter accounts by name or code..."
              className="input input-bordered input-sm w-full"
            />
          </div>
          <div className="form-control">
            <label className="label"><span className="label-text">Memo Contains</span></label>
            <input
              type="text"
              value={memoFilter}
              onChange={e => { setMemoFilter(e.target.value); setPage(1); }}
              placeholder="Search memo…"
              className="input input-bordered input-sm w-full"
            />
          </div>
          <div className="form-control md:col-span-2">
            <label className="label"><span className="label-text">Select Accounts (Ctrl/Cmd + Click for multiple)</span></label>
            <select
              multiple
              value={selectedCodes}
              size={5} // Reduced size for better layout with new button
              onChange={e => setSelectedCodes(Array.from(e.target.selectedOptions, o => o.value))}
              className="select select-bordered w-full"
            >
              {filteredCategories.map(c => (
                <option key={c.code} value={c.code}>
                  {c.description} ({c.code})
                </option>
              ))}
            </select>
            {selectedCodes.length === 0 && <span className="text-xs text-gray-500 mt-1">No specific accounts selected; showing "All Accounts".</span>}
          </div>
        </div>

        <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-4 items-end">
          <div>
            <label className="label-text block">From Date</label>
            <input
              type="date"
              value={dateRange.from}
              onChange={e => setDateRange(d => ({ ...d, from: e.target.value }))}
              className="input input-bordered input-sm w-full"
            />
          </div>
          <div>
            <label className="label-text block">To Date</label>
            <input
              type="date"
              value={dateRange.to}
              onChange={e => setDateRange(d => ({ ...d, to: e.target.value }))}
              className="input input-bordered input-sm w-full"
            />
          </div>
          <div>
            <label className="label-text block">Jump to Specific Date</label>
            <input
              type="date"
              value={jumpToDateValue}
              onChange={handleJumpToDateChange}
              className="input input-bordered input-sm w-full"
            />
          </div>
        </div>

        <div className="pt-4 flex justify-start">
          <button
            className="btn btn-secondary btn-sm"
            onClick={handleDownloadCsv}
            disabled={isDownloadingCsv || loading || !dateRange.from || !dateRange.to || new Date(dateRange.from) > new Date(dateRange.to)}
          >
            {isDownloadingCsv ? (
              <>
                <span className="loading loading-spinner loading-xs mr-2"></span>
                Downloading CSV...
              </>
            ) : (
              "Download Ledger to CSV"
            )}
          </button>
        </div>

        <div>
          <h4 className="font-semibold mb-2 text-sm">Starting Balances (as of day *before* 'From Date' or 'Jump Date')</h4>
          <div className="max-h-32 overflow-y-auto space-y-2 p-2 border rounded bg-base-100">
            {(selectedCodes.length ? selectedCodes : ['ALL']).map(code => {
              const name = code === 'ALL' ? 'All Accounts' : categories.find(c => c.code === code)?.description || code;
              return (
                <div key={code} className="flex items-center space-x-2">
                  <label className="label-text w-48 truncate" title={name}>{name}:</label>
                  <input
                    type="number"
                    step="0.01"
                    value={startingBalances[code] || ''}
                    onChange={e =>
                      setStartingBalances(prev => ({ ...prev, [code]: parseFloat(e.target.value) || 0 }))
                    }
                    className="input input-bordered input-xs w-32"
                    placeholder="0.00"
                  />
                </div>
              );
            })}
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-4">
        {(selectedCodes.length ? selectedCodes : ['ALL']).map(code => (
          <LedgerCard
            key={code}
            code={code}
            categories={categories}
            ledgers={ledgers}
            prevNets={prevNets}
            paginationData={paginationData}
            loading={loading && !ledgers[code]} // Show spinner only if this card's data isn't loaded yet during a general load
            sortBy={sortBy}
            sortDir={sortDir}
            page={page}
            onSort={handleSort}
            onPageChange={setPage} // Global page state
            onEntryClick={openEntryModal}
          />
        ))}
        {loading && (selectedCodes.length === 0 && !ledgers['ALL']) && (
          <div className="w-full flex justify-center py-10">
            <span className="loading loading-spinner loading-lg"></span>
            <p className="ml-2">Loading All Accounts Ledger...</p>
          </div>
        )}
      </div>

      {modalOpen && entryData && (
        <dialog open className="modal modal-open">
          <div className="modal-box w-11/12 max-w-3xl">
            <form method="dialog">
              <button className="btn btn-sm btn-circle btn-ghost absolute right-2 top-2" onClick={() => setModalOpen(false)}>✕</button>
            </form>
            <h3 className="font-bold text-lg">Edit Journal Entry</h3>
            <div className="py-4 space-y-3">
              <div>
                <label className="label-text block">Date</label>
                <input type="date" value={editDate} onChange={e => setEditDate(e.target.value)} className="input input-bordered w-full" />
              </div>
              <div>
                <label className="label-text block">Memo</label>
                <input type="text" value={editMemo} onChange={e => setEditMemo(e.target.value)} className="input input-bordered w-full" />
              </div>
              <div>
                <label className="label-text block">Lines</label>
                <div className="overflow-x-auto">
                  <table className="table table-xs w-full">
                    <thead><tr><th>Account</th><th>Description</th><th>Debit</th><th>Credit</th></tr></thead>
                    <tbody>
                      {editLines.map((l, idx) => (
                        <tr key={l.id || idx}>
                          <td>
                            <AccountAutocomplete
                              value={l.accountId}
                              onChange={(val) => {
                                const copy = [...editLines];
                                copy[idx].accountId = val;
                                setEditLines(copy);
                              }}
                              accounts={categories}
                              placeholder="Select account"
                            />
                          </td>
                          <td><input type="text" value={l.description} onChange={e => { const copy = [...editLines]; copy[idx].description = e.target.value; setEditLines(copy); }} className="input input-sm input-bordered w-full" /></td>
                          <td><input type="number" step="0.01" value={l.debit} onChange={e => { const copy = [...editLines]; copy[idx].debit = e.target.value; setEditLines(copy); }} className="input input-sm input-bordered w-full text-right" /></td>
                          <td><input type="number" step="0.01" value={l.credit} onChange={e => { const copy = [...editLines]; copy[idx].credit = e.target.value; setEditLines(copy); }} className="input input-sm input-bordered w-full text-right" /></td>
                        </tr>
                      ))}
                    </tbody>
                  </table>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
            <div className="modal-action">
              <button onClick={() => setModalOpen(false)} className="btn btn-ghost">Cancel</button>
              <button onClick={saveEntry} className="btn btn-primary">Save</button>
            </div>
          </div>
        </dialog>
      )}
    </>
  );
}
```
