FILE: client/services/accounting/components/PayrollAdjustmentsModal.jsx
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
```jsx
// Full path: /home/luanngo/boss-dev/client/services/accounting/components/PayrollAdjustmentsModal.jsx
import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { format, parseISO, isValid as isValidDate } from 'date-fns';
import { fetchWithAuth } from '@/shared/utils/fetchWithAuth';
import { toast } from 'react-toastify';

const PayrollAdjustmentsModal = ({ payrollRecordId, recordContext, onClose, onUpdate, readOnly = false }) => {
  const [adjustments, setAdjustments] = useState([]);
  // These states will be ignored in readOnly mode.
  const [editing, setEditing] = useState(null);
  const [form, setForm] = useState({ name: "", amount: '', date: format(new Date(), 'yyyy-MM-dd'), notes: "" });
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);
  const [isSubmitting, setIsSubmitting] = useState(false);
  const [isDeleting, setIsDeleting] = useState(null);

  const loadAdjustments = async () => {
    if (!payrollRecordId) return;
    setLoading(true);
    try {
      const res = await fetchWithAuth(`${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL}/accounting/payroll-adjustments?payrollRecordId=${payrollRecordId}`);
      if (!res.ok) {
          const errorData = await res.json().catch(() => ({ message: "Failed to fetch adjustments." }));
          throw new Error(errorData.message || "Failed to fetch adjustments.");
      }
      const data = await res.json();
      setAdjustments(data || []);
    } catch (error) {
      console.error("Load Adjustments Error:", error.message);
      toast.error(`Failed to load adjustments: ${error.message}`);
      setAdjustments([]);
    } finally {
        setLoading(false);
    }
  };

  useEffect(() => {
    loadAdjustments();
    setForm({ name: "", amount: '', date: format(new Date(), 'yyyy-MM-dd'), notes: "" });
    setEditing(null);
  }, [payrollRecordId]);

  const handleFormChange = (e) => {
      const { name, value } = e.target;
      setForm(prevForm => ({ ...prevForm, [name]: value }));
  };

  const handleSubmit = async (e) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    if (readOnly) return; // In readOnly mode, do nothing.
    setIsSubmitting(true);
    if (!form.name.trim()) {
        toast.error("Adjustment name is required.");
        setIsSubmitting(false);
        return;
    }
    const amountValue = parseFloat(form.amount);
    if (isNaN(amountValue)) {
        toast.error("Invalid amount. Please enter a number.");
        setIsSubmitting(false);
        return;
    }
    if (!form.date || !isValidDate(parseISO(form.date))) {
        toast.error("Invalid date.");
        setIsSubmitting(false);
        return;
    }

    try {
      const payload = {
           name: form.name.trim(),
           amount: amountValue,
           date: form.date,
           notes: form.notes || ""
      };

      let res;
      let successMessage = "";
      if (editing) {
        res = await fetchWithAuth(`${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL}/accounting/payroll-adjustments/${editing.id}`, {
          method: 'PUT',
          headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
          body: JSON.stringify(payload),
        });
        successMessage = "Adjustment updated.";
      } else {
        const body = { ...payload, payrollRecordId };
        res = await fetchWithAuth(`${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL}/accounting/payroll-adjustments`, {
          method: 'POST',
          headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
          body: JSON.stringify(body),
        });
         successMessage = "Adjustment added.";
      }

      if (!res.ok) {
         const errorData = await res.json().catch(() => ({ message: editing ? "Update failed." : "Creation failed." }));
         throw new Error(errorData.message || "Failed to submit adjustment.");
      }

      toast.success(successMessage);
      setForm({ name: "", amount: '', date: format(new Date(), 'yyyy-MM-dd'), notes: "" });
      setEditing(null);
      await loadAdjustments();
      if (onUpdate) onUpdate();
    } catch (error) {
      console.error("Submit Adjustment Error:", error.message);
      toast.error(`Error: ${error.message}`);
    } finally {
        setIsSubmitting(false);
    }
  };

  const handleDelete = async (id) => {
    if (readOnly) return;
    if (!window.confirm("Are you sure you want to delete this adjustment? This action cannot be undone.")) return;
    setIsDeleting(id);
    try {
      const res = await fetchWithAuth(`${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL}/accounting/payroll-adjustments/${id}`, {
        method: 'DELETE',
      });
      if (!res.ok) {
         const errorData = await res.json().catch(() => ({ message: "Deletion failed." }));
         throw new Error(errorData.message || "Failed to delete adjustment.");
      }
      toast.success("Adjustment deleted.");
      if (editing && editing.id === id) {
          setEditing(null);
          setForm({ name: "", amount: '', date: format(new Date(), 'yyyy-MM-dd'), notes: "" });
      }
      await loadAdjustments();
      if (onUpdate) onUpdate();
    } catch (error) {
      console.error("Delete Adjustment Error:", error.message);
      toast.error(`Delete failed: ${error.message}`);
    } finally {
        setIsDeleting(null);
    }
  };

  const startEdit = (adj) => {
    if (readOnly) return; // Prevent editing in readOnly mode.
    setEditing(adj);
    let formattedDate = '';
    try {
        const parsed = parseISO(adj.date);
        if (isValidDate(parsed)) {
            formattedDate = format(parsed, 'yyyy-MM-dd');
        } else {
             throw new Error('Invalid date received from server');
        }
    } catch (e) {
        console.error("Error parsing date for editing:", adj.date, e);
        toast.error("Error loading date for editing. Using today's date.");
        formattedDate = format(new Date(), 'yyyy-MM-dd');
    }
    setForm({
      name: adj.name || "",
      amount: adj.amount?.toString() ?? '',
      date: formattedDate,
      notes: adj.notes || ""
    });
  };

  const cancelEdit = () => {
       setEditing(null);
       setForm({ name: "", amount: '', date: format(new Date(), 'yyyy-MM-dd'), notes: "" });
  };

  return (
    <div className={`modal modal-open ${loading ? 'opacity-80' : ''}`}>
      <div className="modal-box max-w-3xl relative">
         <button
             onClick={onClose}
             className="btn btn-sm btn-circle absolute right-2 top-2"
             disabled={isSubmitting || !!isDeleting || loading}
             aria-label="Close"
         >
             ✕
         </button>
         <h3 className="font-bold text-xl mb-4 mr-8">
            Payroll Adjustments {recordContext?.userName ? `for ${recordContext.userName}` : ''}
         </h3>
         {/* Adjustments Table */}
         <div className="overflow-x-auto mb-6 max-h-60">
           <table className="table table-compact w-full table-zebra">
             <thead className="sticky top-0 bg-base-200 z-10">
               <tr>
                 <th>Name</th>
                 <th className="text-right">Amount</th>
                 <th>Date</th>
                 <th>Notes</th>
                 { !readOnly && <th className="text-center">Actions</th> }
               </tr>
             </thead>
             <tbody>
               {loading ? (
                  <tr>
                    <td colSpan={readOnly ? "4" : "5"} className="text-center py-4">
                      <span className="loading loading-dots loading-md"></span>
                    </td>
                  </tr>
               ) : adjustments.length > 0 ? (
                   adjustments.map(adj => (
                     <tr key={adj.id} className={`${isDeleting === adj.id ? 'opacity-50' : ''}`}>
                       <td className="font-medium">{adj.name}</td>
                       <td className="text-right">${parseFloat(adj.amount || 0).toFixed(2)}</td>
                       <td>
                           {isValidDate(parseISO(adj.date))
                                ? format(parseISO(adj.date), 'MMM d, yyyy')
                                : 'Invalid Date'}
                       </td>
                       <td className="text-sm text-gray-600">{adj.notes}</td>
                       {!readOnly && (
                       <td className="text-center space-x-1">
                         <button
                            className="btn btn-xs btn-outline btn-info"
                            onClick={() => startEdit(adj)}
                            disabled={isSubmitting || !!isDeleting || loading}
                         >
                            Edit
                        </button>
                         <button
                            className={`btn btn-xs btn-outline btn-error ${isDeleting === adj.id ? 'loading' : ''}`}
                            onClick={() => handleDelete(adj.id)}
                            disabled={isSubmitting || !!isDeleting || loading}
                         >
                             {isDeleting === adj.id ? '' : 'Delete'}
                         </button>
                       </td>
                       )}
                     </tr>
                   ))
               ) : (
                   <tr>
                     <td colSpan={readOnly ? "4" : "5"} className="text-center italic py-4">
                       No adjustments added yet.
                     </td>
                   </tr>
               )}
             </tbody>
           </table>
         </div>

         {/* Only show form if not in readOnly mode */}
         {!readOnly && (
         <form onSubmit={handleSubmit} className="border-t pt-4">
           <h4 className="font-semibold text-lg mb-3">{editing ? "Edit Adjustment" : "Add New Adjustment"}</h4>
           <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 gap-3 items-end">
             <div className="form-control">
                 <label className="label pb-1"><span className="label-text">Name</span></label>
                 <input type="text" name="name" placeholder="e.g., Uniform Fee" value={form.name} onChange={handleFormChange} className="input input-bordered input-sm w-full" required disabled={isSubmitting || loading} />
             </div>
             <div className="form-control">
                 <label className="label pb-1"><span className="label-text">Amount (+/-)</span></label>
                 <input type="number" name="amount" placeholder="e.g., -25 or 50" step="0.01" value={form.amount} onChange={handleFormChange} className="input input-bordered input-sm w-full" required disabled={isSubmitting || loading} />
             </div>
             <div className="form-control">
                 <label className="label pb-1"><span className="label-text">Date</span></label>
                 <input type="date" name="date" value={form.date} onChange={handleFormChange} className="input input-bordered input-sm w-full" required disabled={isSubmitting || loading} />
             </div>
             <div className="form-control">
                 <label className="label pb-1"><span className="label-text">Notes</span></label>
                 <input type="text" name="notes" placeholder="(Optional)" value={form.notes} onChange={handleFormChange} className="input input-bordered input-sm w-full" disabled={isSubmitting || loading} />
             </div>
           </div>
           <div className="mt-4 flex justify-end gap-2">
             {editing && (
                 <button type="button" className="btn btn-sm btn-ghost" onClick={cancelEdit} disabled={isSubmitting || loading}>
                     Cancel Edit
                 </button>
             )}
             <button type="submit" className={`btn btn-primary btn-sm ${isSubmitting ? 'loading' : ''}`} disabled={isSubmitting || !!isDeleting || loading}>
                 {isSubmitting ? 'Saving...' : (editing ? "Update Adjustment" : "Add Adjustment")}
             </button>
           </div>
         </form>
         )}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
};

export default PayrollAdjustmentsModal;

```

FILE: client/services/accounting/components/PayrollDashboard.jsx
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
```jsx
// Full path: /home/luanngo/boss-dev/client/services/accounting/components/PayrollDashboard.jsx
import React, { useEffect, useState, useMemo, useCallback } from 'react';
import { addDays, format, isValid, parseISO } from 'date-fns';
import { fetchWithAuth } from '@/shared/utils/fetchWithAuth';
import { toast } from 'react-toastify';
import WeeklyShiftSchedule from './WeeklyShiftSchedule';
import PayrollAdjustmentsModal from './PayrollAdjustmentsModal';
import moment from 'moment-timezone';
import TipDetailModal from './TipDetailModal';
import { Download, Save, RefreshCw, Eye, EyeOff, FileSpreadsheet, DollarSign, Clock, Users, AlertTriangle, ChevronRight, Calculator } from 'lucide-react';
import StatusBadge from '@/shared/components/ui/StatusBadge';
import EmptyState from '@/shared/components/ui/EmptyState';
import { DashboardCard, DashboardCardHeader, DashboardCardBody } from '@/shared/components/ui/DashboardCard';

const PayrollDashboard = ({ selectedSchedule }) => {
  const [payrollRecords, setPayrollRecords] = useState([]);
  const [tipBreakdownData, setTipBreakdownData] = useState({ breakdown: [], totals: {}, periodDates: [] });
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
  const [loadingBreakdown, setLoadingBreakdown] = useState(true);
  const [modalRecordId, setModalRecordId] = useState(null);
  const [currentPayrollRecordForModal, setCurrentPayrollRecordForModal] = useState(null);
  const [isDetailModalOpen, setIsDetailModalOpen] = useState(false);
  const [selectedDetailDate, setSelectedDetailDate] = useState(null);
  const [detailedTipData, setDetailedTipData] = useState([]);
  const [isLoadingDetail, setIsLoadingDetail] = useState(false);
  const [isSavingAll, setIsSavingAll] = useState(false);

  const handleDownloadCSV = () => {
    if (!payrollRecords.length) {
      toast.info("No records available to download.");
      return;
    }

    const headers = [
      "Name", "Wage", "Scheduled Hours", "Actual Hours", "Tips", "Bonus",
      "Base Pay", "Adjustments", "Total Pay", "Hourly Pay", "Hourly Tip", "Notes"
    ];
    const csvRows = [];
    csvRows.push(headers.join(","));

    payrollRecords.forEach(record => {
      const displayName = record.user?.username || record.name;
      const scheduled = parseFloat(record.scheduledHours || 0);
      const actual    = parseFloat(record.actualHours   || 0);
      const wage      = parseFloat(record.hourlyWage    || 0);
      const tips      = parseFloat(record.tips           || 0);
      const bonus     = parseFloat(record.bonus          || 0);
      const adjustmentsSum = record.adjustments && record.adjustments.length > 0
        ? record.adjustments.reduce((sum, adj) => sum + parseFloat(adj.amount || 0), 0)
        : 0;
      const basePay = actual * wage;
      const totalPayBeforeAdjustments = basePay + tips + bonus;
      const numericTotalPay = totalPayBeforeAdjustments + adjustmentsSum;
      const divisor = actual > 0 ? actual : 1;
      const hourlyPay = numericTotalPay / divisor;
      const hourlyTip = tips / divisor;

      const row = [
        `"${displayName}"`, wage.toFixed(2), record.scheduledHours, record.actualHours,
        tips.toFixed(2), bonus.toFixed(2), basePay.toFixed(2),
        adjustmentsSum.toFixed(2), numericTotalPay.toFixed(2),
        hourlyPay.toFixed(2), hourlyTip.toFixed(2),
        record.notes ? `"${record.notes}"` : ""
      ];
      csvRows.push(row.join(","));
    });

    const csvString = csvRows.join("\n");
    const blob = new Blob([csvString], { type: 'text/csv' });
    const url = window.URL.createObjectURL(blob);
    const a = document.createElement("a");
    a.setAttribute("hidden", "");
    a.setAttribute("href", url);
    a.setAttribute("download", "payroll_dashboard.csv");
    document.body.appendChild(a);
    a.click();
    document.body.removeChild(a);
  };

  const computePeriod = (schedule) => {
    if (schedule?.startWeek && schedule?.endWeek) {
      const start = moment.utc(schedule.startWeek).tz(moment.tz.guess()).startOf('day').toDate();
      const end = moment.utc(schedule.endWeek).tz(moment.tz.guess()).startOf('day').toDate();
      return { start, end };
    } else {
      console.warn("PayrollDashboard: No schedule selected, falling back to current week.");
      const start = moment().startOf('isoWeek').toDate();
      const end = moment(start).add(6, 'days').toDate();
      return { start, end };
    }
  };

  const { start: periodStart, end: periodEnd } = useMemo(() => computePeriod(selectedSchedule), [selectedSchedule]);

  const [selectedWeekStart, setSelectedWeekStart] = useState(periodStart);
  useEffect(() => {
    setSelectedWeekStart(periodStart);
  }, [periodStart]);

  const allPublished = useMemo(() => {
    return payrollRecords.length > 0 && payrollRecords.every(record => record.visible);
  }, [payrollRecords]);

  const validWeekStart = useMemo(() => {
    let date = selectedWeekStart instanceof Date ? selectedWeekStart : new Date(selectedSchedule?.startWeek || periodStart);
    return isValid(date) ? date : new Date();
  }, [selectedWeekStart, selectedSchedule, periodStart]);

  const currentPeriodEnd = useMemo(() => {
    if (selectedSchedule?.id && selectedSchedule.endWeek) {
      return moment.utc(selectedSchedule.endWeek).tz(moment.tz.guess()).startOf('day').toDate();
    }
    console.warn("Calculating period end without schedule end date.");
    return addDays(validWeekStart, (selectedSchedule?.durationWeeks || 1) * 7 - 1);
  }, [selectedSchedule, validWeekStart]);

  const periodStartISO = useMemo(() => format(validWeekStart, 'yyyy-MM-dd'), [validWeekStart]);
  const periodEndISO = useMemo(() => format(currentPeriodEnd, 'yyyy-MM-dd'), [currentPeriodEnd]);
  const displayDateRange = useMemo(() => `${format(validWeekStart, 'MMM d')} - ${format(currentPeriodEnd, 'MMM d, yyyy')}`, [validWeekStart, currentPeriodEnd]);

  const fetchPayrollData = useCallback(async () => {
    if (!selectedSchedule?.id) {
      console.warn("Skipping payroll fetch: No schedule selected.");
      setPayrollRecords([]);
      setLoading(false);
      return;
    }

    setLoading(true);
    try {
      const url = `${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL}/accounting/payroll?scheduleId=${selectedSchedule.id}`;
      const res = await fetchWithAuth(url);
      if (!res.ok) {
        const errorData = await res.json().catch(() => ({ error: 'Failed to parse error response.' }));
        throw new Error(errorData.error || 'Failed to fetch payroll data.');
      }
      let data = await res.json();
      if (Array.isArray(data)) {
        data = data.map(record => ({
          ...record,
          hourlyWage: parseFloat(record.hourlyWage || 0),
          allowableHours: parseFloat(record.allowableHours || 0).toFixed(2),
          scheduledHours: record.scheduledHours || '0.00',
          actualHours: record.actualHours || '0.00',
          bonus: parseFloat(record.bonus || 0).toFixed(2),
          tips: parseFloat(record.tips || 0).toFixed(2),
          adjustments: record.adjustments || [],
        }));
      } else {
        console.warn("Received non-array data from payroll endpoint:", data);
        data = [];
      }
      setPayrollRecords(data || []);
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Fetch Payroll Data Error:', error);
      toast.error(error.message || 'Failed to load payroll data.');
      setPayrollRecords([]);
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  }, [selectedSchedule?.id]);

  const fetchTipBreakdown = useCallback(async () => {
    if (!periodStartISO || !periodEndISO) {
      console.warn("Skipping tip breakdown fetch: Missing date range.");
      setLoadingBreakdown(false);
      return;
    }
    setLoadingBreakdown(true);
    try {
      const startTime = moment.tz(periodStartISO, 'YYYY-MM-DD', moment.tz.guess()).startOf('day').utc().unix();
      const endTime = moment.tz(periodEndISO, 'YYYY-MM-DD', moment.tz.guess()).startOf('day').utc().unix();
      const url = `${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL}/accounting/payroll/tips-breakdown?startTime=${startTime}&endTime=${endTime}`;
      const res = await fetchWithAuth(url);
      if (!res.ok) {
        const errorData = await res.json().catch(() => ({ error: 'Failed to parse error response.' }));
        throw new Error(errorData.error || 'Failed to fetch tip breakdown.');
      }
      const data = await res.json();
      setTipBreakdownData(data || { breakdown: [], totals: {}, periodDates: [] });
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Fetch Tip Breakdown Error:', error);
      toast.error(error.message || 'Failed to load tip breakdown.');
      setTipBreakdownData({ breakdown: [], totals: {}, periodDates: [] });
    } finally {
      setLoadingBreakdown(false);
    }
  }, [periodStartISO, periodEndISO]);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (selectedSchedule?.id) {
      fetchPayrollData();
      fetchTipBreakdown();
    } else {
      setPayrollRecords([]);
      setTipBreakdownData({ breakdown: [], totals: {}, periodDates: [] });
      setLoading(false);
      setLoadingBreakdown(false);
    }
  }, [selectedSchedule?.id, fetchPayrollData, fetchTipBreakdown]);

  const handleImportHours = (hoursMapping) => {
    const updatedRecords = payrollRecords.map(record => {
      const importData = hoursMapping[record.userId];
      if (importData) {
        return {
          ...record,
          scheduledHours: importData.scheduledHours.toFixed(2),
          actualHours: importData.actualHours.toFixed(2),
        };
      }
      return record;
    });
    setPayrollRecords(updatedRecords);
    toast.success("Hours imported from Weekly Shift Schedule. Remember to Save All.");
  };

  const handleInputChange = (index, field, value) => {
    const newRecords = [...payrollRecords];
    const numericFields = ['hourlyWage', 'allowableHours', 'bonus', 'tips', 'scheduledHours', 'actualHours'];
    if (numericFields.includes(field)) {
      newRecords[index][field] = value === '' ? '' : value;
    } else {
      newRecords[index][field] = value;
    }
    setPayrollRecords(newRecords);
  };

  const saveRecord = async (record) => {
    if (!selectedSchedule?.id) {
      toast.error("Cannot save: No Payroll Schedule selected.");
      return { success: false, error: "No schedule selected" };
    }
    if (!record.userId) {
      toast.error(`Cannot save record for ${record.name}: Missing User ID.`);
      return { success: false, error: "Missing User ID" };
    }
    try {
      const hourlyWage = parseFloat(record.hourlyWage || 0);
      const allowableHours = parseFloat(record.allowableHours || 0);
      const bonus = parseFloat(record.bonus || 0);
      const tips = parseFloat(record.tips || 0);
      const scheduledHours = parseFloat(record.scheduledHours || 0);
      const actualHours = parseFloat(record.actualHours || 0);
      if (
        isNaN(hourlyWage) || isNaN(allowableHours) || isNaN(bonus) ||
        isNaN(tips) || isNaN(scheduledHours) || isNaN(actualHours)
      ) {
        toast.error(`Invalid numeric input for ${record.name}. Please check values.`);
        return { success: false, error: "Invalid numeric input" };
      }
      const body = {
        userId: record.userId, payrollScheduleId: selectedSchedule.id,
        hourlyWage, allowableHours, bonus, tips, scheduledHours, actualHours,
        notes: record.notes || ''
      };
      const res = await fetchWithAuth(`${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL}/accounting/payroll/update`, {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
        body: JSON.stringify(body),
      });
      if (!res.ok) {
        const errorData = await res.json().catch(() => ({ error: 'Update failed.' }));
        throw new Error(errorData.error || 'Failed to update payroll record.');
      }
      return { success: true };
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Save Record Error:', error);
      toast.error(`Failed to save record for ${record.name}: ${error.message}`);
      return { success: false, error: error.message };
    }
  };

  const handleToggleRecordPublished = async (record) => {
    const newVisible = !record.visible;
    try {
      const body = {
        userId: record.userId, payrollScheduleId: selectedSchedule.id,
        hourlyWage: parseFloat(record.hourlyWage || 0),
        allowableHours: parseFloat(record.allowableHours || 0),
        bonus: parseFloat(record.bonus || 0), tips: parseFloat(record.tips || 0),
        scheduledHours: parseFloat(record.scheduledHours || 0),
        actualHours: parseFloat(record.actualHours || 0),
        notes: record.notes || "", visible: newVisible
      };
      const res = await fetchWithAuth(`${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL}/accounting/payroll/update`, {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
        body: JSON.stringify(body),
      });
      if (!res.ok) {
        const errorData = await res.json().catch(() => ({ error: "Failed to update record." }));
        throw new Error(errorData.error || "Failed to update record.");
      }
      toast.success(`Record ${record.name} is now ${newVisible ? "published" : "unpublished"}.`);
      fetchPayrollData();
    } catch (error) {
      toast.error(`Failed to toggle published state for ${record.name}: ${error.message}`);
    }
  };

  const handleTogglePublished = async () => {
    const shouldPublish = !allPublished;
    setIsSavingAll(true);
    try {
      const updatePromises = payrollRecords.map(record => {
        const body = {
          userId: record.userId, payrollScheduleId: selectedSchedule.id,
          hourlyWage: parseFloat(record.hourlyWage || 0),
          allowableHours: parseFloat(record.allowableHours || 0),
          bonus: parseFloat(record.bonus || 0), tips: parseFloat(record.tips || 0),
          scheduledHours: parseFloat(record.scheduledHours || 0),
          actualHours: parseFloat(record.actualHours || 0),
          notes: record.notes || '', visible: shouldPublish
        };
        return fetchWithAuth(`${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL}/accounting/payroll/update`, {
          method: 'POST',
          headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
          body: JSON.stringify(body),
        }).then(async res => {
          if (!res.ok) {
            const errorData = await res.json().catch(() => ({ error: 'Update failed.' }));
            throw new Error(errorData.error || 'Failed to update payroll record.');
          }
          return res.json();
        });
      });
      const results = await Promise.allSettled(updatePromises);
      let successCount = 0;
      results.forEach(result => {
        if (result.status === 'fulfilled') successCount++;
      });
      if (successCount === payrollRecords.length) {
        toast.success(`All records ${shouldPublish ? 'published' : 'unpublished'} successfully!`);
      } else if (successCount > 0) {
        toast.warn(`${successCount} records updated, some failed.`);
      } else {
        toast.error("Failed to update records.");
      }
      fetchPayrollData();
    } catch (error) {
      console.error("Toggle Published Error:", error);
      toast.error("Error toggling published status.");
    } finally {
      setIsSavingAll(false);
    }
  };

  const handleSaveAll = async () => {
    if (!selectedSchedule?.id) {
      toast.error("Cannot save: No Payroll Schedule selected.");
      return;
    }
    if (payrollRecords.length === 0) {
      toast.info("No records to save.");
      return;
    }
    setIsSavingAll(true);
    toast.info("Saving all records...", { autoClose: 2000 });
    const savePromises = payrollRecords.map(record => saveRecord(record));
    const results = await Promise.allSettled(savePromises);
    let successCount = 0;
    let failureCount = 0;
    results.forEach((result, index) => {
      if (result.status === 'fulfilled' && result.value.success) {
        successCount++;
      } else {
        failureCount++;
        console.error(`Failed to save record for ${payrollRecords[index]?.name}:`, result.reason || result.value?.error);
      }
    });
    if (failureCount === 0) {
      toast.success(`All ${successCount} records saved successfully!`);
    } else if (successCount > 0) {
      toast.warn(`${successCount} records saved, ${failureCount} failed.`);
    } else {
      toast.error("All records failed to save. Please check console for details.");
    }
    setIsSavingAll(false);
    fetchPayrollData();
    fetchTipBreakdown();
  };

  const handleGeneratePayrollData = async () => {
    if (!selectedSchedule?.id) {
      toast.error("No Payroll Schedule selected.");
      return;
    }
    try {
      toast.info("Generating payroll data...");
      const url = `${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL}/accounting/payroll/generate?dayStart=${periodStartISO}&dayEnd=${periodEndISO}`;
      const res = await fetchWithAuth(url);
      if (!res.ok) {
        const errorData = await res.json().catch(() => ({ error: 'Failed to parse error response.' }));
        throw new Error(errorData.error || 'Failed to generate payroll data.');
      }
      const data = await res.json();
      setPayrollRecords(data);
      toast.success("Payroll data generated successfully.");
    } catch (error) {
      console.error("Generate Payroll Data Error:", error);
      toast.error(error.message || "Failed to generate payroll data.");
    }
  };

  const handleImportTips = () => {
    if (!tipBreakdownData?.breakdown?.length) {
      toast.warn("No tip breakdown data available to import.");
      return;
    }
    if (!payrollRecords?.length) {
      toast.warn("No payroll records loaded to import tips into.");
      return;
    }
    const updatedRecords = payrollRecords.map(record => {
      const tipData = tipBreakdownData.breakdown.find(item => item.userId === record.userId);
      if (tipData && tipData.Total !== undefined) {
        return { ...record, tips: parseFloat(tipData.Total || 0).toFixed(2) };
      }
      return record;
    });
    setPayrollRecords(updatedRecords);
    toast.success("Tips imported from breakdown. Remember to Save All.");
  };

  const openAdjustmentsModal = (record) => {
    if (!record || !record.id) {
      toast.warn("Save the payroll record first to manage adjustments.");
      return;
    }
    setCurrentPayrollRecordForModal({
      id: record.id, name: record.name, userId: record.userId
    });
    setModalRecordId(record.id);
  };

  const closeAdjustmentsModal = () => {
    setModalRecordId(null);
    setCurrentPayrollRecordForModal(null);
  };

  const handleAdjustmentUpdate = () => {
    fetchPayrollData();
  };

  const fetchDetailedTipData = async (date) => {
    if (!date) return;
    setIsLoadingDetail(true);
    setDetailedTipData([]);
    try {
      const url = `${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL}/accounting/payroll/tips-detail/${date}`;
      const res = await fetchWithAuth(url);
      if (!res.ok) {
        const errorData = await res.json().catch(() => ({ error: 'Failed to parse error response.' }));
        throw new Error(errorData.error || `Failed to fetch detailed tips for ${date}.`);
      }
      const data = await res.json();
      setDetailedTipData(data || []);
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Fetch Detailed Tip Data Error:', error);
      toast.error(error.message);
      setDetailedTipData([]);
    } finally {
      setIsLoadingDetail(false);
    }
  };

  const handleDateHeaderClick = (dateKey) => {
    setSelectedDetailDate(dateKey);
    setIsDetailModalOpen(true);
    fetchDetailedTipData(dateKey);
  };

  const closeDetailModal = () => {
    setIsDetailModalOpen(false);
    setSelectedDetailDate(null);
    setDetailedTipData([]);
  };

  const getAdjustmentsSum = (record) => {
    if (!record?.adjustments || record.adjustments.length === 0) return 0;
    return record.adjustments.reduce((sum, adj) => sum + parseFloat(adj.amount || 0), 0);
  };

  const totalScheduled = payrollRecords.reduce((sum, record) => sum + parseFloat(record.scheduledHours || 0), 0).toFixed(2);
  const totalActual = payrollRecords.reduce((sum, record) => sum + parseFloat(record.actualHours || 0), 0).toFixed(2);
  const totalTips = payrollRecords.reduce((sum, record) => sum + parseFloat(record.tips || 0), 0).toFixed(2);
  const totalBonus = payrollRecords.reduce((sum, record) => sum + parseFloat(record.bonus || 0), 0).toFixed(2);
  const totalBasePay = payrollRecords.reduce((sum, record) => {
    return sum + (parseFloat(record.actualHours || 0) * parseFloat(record.hourlyWage || 0));
  }, 0).toFixed(2);
  const totalAdjustments = payrollRecords.reduce((sum, record) => sum + getAdjustmentsSum(record), 0).toFixed(2);
  const totalPay = payrollRecords.reduce((sum, record) => {
    const basePay = parseFloat(record.actualHours || 0) * parseFloat(record.hourlyWage || 0);
    const totalBeforeAdjustments = basePay + parseFloat(record.tips || 0) + parseFloat(record.bonus || 0);
    return sum + totalBeforeAdjustments + getAdjustmentsSum(record);
  }, 0).toFixed(2);

  // Summary metrics
  const employeesWithData = payrollRecords.filter(r => parseFloat(r.actualHours) > 0 || parseFloat(r.scheduledHours) > 0);
  const missingActualCount = payrollRecords.filter(r => !r.actualHours || parseFloat(r.actualHours) === 0).length;

  const tipColumns = useMemo(() => {
    return tipBreakdownData.periodDates || [];
  }, [tipBreakdownData.periodDates]);

  if (!selectedSchedule?.id) {
    return (
      <DashboardCard>
        <div className="px-6 py-5 border-b border-slate-100">
          <h2 className="text-lg font-semibold text-slate-900">Payroll Dashboard</h2>
        </div>
        <EmptyState
          icon={FileSpreadsheet}
          title="No payroll schedule selected"
          description="Select a payroll period above to view tips, shifts, and payroll details."
        />
      </DashboardCard>
    );
  }

  return (
    <div className="space-y-6">
      {/* Payroll Dashboard Card */}
      <DashboardCard>
        <DashboardCardHeader
          title="Payroll Dashboard"
          subtitle={displayDateRange}
          actions={
            <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2">
              <button
                onClick={handleGeneratePayrollData}
                className="btn h-9 min-h-0 px-3.5 text-xs font-medium rounded-lg bg-indigo-50 text-indigo-700 border border-indigo-200 hover:bg-indigo-100 transition-all"
                disabled={loading}
                aria-label="Generate payroll data"
              >
                <RefreshCw size={14} className="mr-1" />
                Generate Payroll Data
              </button>
              {payrollRecords.length > 0 && (
                <>
                  <button
                    onClick={handleSaveAll}
                    className={`btn h-9 min-h-0 px-3.5 text-xs font-medium rounded-lg bg-emerald-50 text-emerald-700 border border-emerald-200 hover:bg-emerald-100 transition-all ${isSavingAll ? 'loading' : ''}`}
                    disabled={isSavingAll || loading}
                    aria-label="Save all changes"
                  >
                    <Save size={14} className="mr-1" />
                    {isSavingAll ? 'Saving...' : 'Save All'}
                  </button>
                  <button
                    onClick={handleTogglePublished}
                    className={`btn h-9 min-h-0 px-3.5 text-xs font-medium rounded-lg border transition-all ${
                      allPublished
                        ? 'bg-amber-50 text-amber-700 border-amber-200 hover:bg-amber-100'
                        : 'bg-emerald-50 text-emerald-700 border-emerald-200 hover:bg-emerald-100'
                    } ${isSavingAll ? 'loading' : ''}`}
                    disabled={isSavingAll || loading}
                    aria-label={allPublished ? 'Unpublish all records' : 'Publish all records'}
                  >
                    {allPublished ? <EyeOff size={14} className="mr-1" /> : <Eye size={14} className="mr-1" />}
                    {allPublished ? 'Unpublish All' : 'Publish All'}
                  </button>
                  <button
                    onClick={handleDownloadCSV}
                    className="btn h-9 min-h-0 px-3.5 text-xs font-medium rounded-lg border border-slate-200 text-slate-600 hover:bg-slate-50 hover:border-slate-300 transition-all"
                    aria-label="Download CSV"
                  >
                    <Download size={14} className="mr-1" />
                    Download CSV
                  </button>
                </>
              )}
            </div>
          }
        />

        {loading ? (
          <div className="flex justify-center items-center h-48">
            <span className="loading loading-spinner loading-md text-indigo-500" />
          </div>
        ) : (
          <>
            {/* Summary Metrics */}
            {employeesWithData.length > 0 && (
              <div className="px-6 pt-5 pb-3">
                <div className="grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4 lg:grid-cols-6 gap-3">
                  <div className="bg-slate-50 rounded-lg p-3 border border-slate-100">
                    <div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-slate-400 mb-1">
                      <Users size={14} />
                      <span className="text-xs font-medium uppercase tracking-wider">Employees</span>
                    </div>
                    <span className="text-lg font-semibold text-slate-900">{employeesWithData.length}</span>
                  </div>
                  <div className="bg-slate-50 rounded-lg p-3 border border-slate-100">
                    <div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-slate-400 mb-1">
                      <Clock size={14} />
                      <span className="text-xs font-medium uppercase tracking-wider">Scheduled</span>
                    </div>
                    <span className="text-lg font-semibold text-slate-900">{totalScheduled}h</span>
                  </div>
                  <div className="bg-slate-50 rounded-lg p-3 border border-slate-100">
                    <div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-slate-400 mb-1">
                      <Clock size={14} />
                      <span className="text-xs font-medium uppercase tracking-wider">Actual</span>
                    </div>
                    <span className="text-lg font-semibold text-slate-900">{totalActual}h</span>
                  </div>
                  <div className="bg-slate-50 rounded-lg p-3 border border-slate-100">
                    <div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-slate-400 mb-1">
                      <DollarSign size={14} />
                      <span className="text-xs font-medium uppercase tracking-wider">Base Pay</span>
                    </div>
                    <span className="text-lg font-semibold text-slate-900">${totalBasePay}</span>
                  </div>
                  <div className="bg-slate-50 rounded-lg p-3 border border-slate-100">
                    <div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-slate-400 mb-1">
                      <DollarSign size={14} />
                      <span className="text-xs font-medium uppercase tracking-wider">Tips</span>
                    </div>
                    <span className="text-lg font-semibold text-slate-900">${totalTips}</span>
                  </div>
                  <div className="bg-slate-50 rounded-lg p-3 border border-slate-100">
                    <div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-slate-400 mb-1">
                      <DollarSign size={14} />
                      <span className="text-xs font-medium uppercase tracking-wider">Total Pay</span>
                    </div>
                    <span className="text-lg font-semibold text-slate-900">${totalPay}</span>
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>
            )}

            {/* Payroll Data Table */}
            <DashboardCardBody>
              {payrollRecords.length > 0 ? (
                <div className="overflow-x-auto rounded-lg border border-slate-200">
                  <table className="table w-full">
                    <thead className="bg-slate-50">
                      <tr>
                        <th className="text-xs font-semibold text-slate-500 uppercase tracking-wider px-3 py-3 text-left">Name</th>
                        <th className="text-xs font-semibold text-slate-500 uppercase tracking-wider px-3 py-3 text-right">Wage</th>
                        <th className="text-xs font-semibold text-slate-500 uppercase tracking-wider px-3 py-3 text-right">Sched Hrs</th>
                        <th className="text-xs font-semibold text-slate-500 uppercase tracking-wider px-3 py-3 text-right">Actual Hrs</th>
                        <th className="text-xs font-semibold text-slate-500 uppercase tracking-wider px-3 py-3 text-right">Tips</th>
                        <th className="text-xs font-semibold text-slate-500 uppercase tracking-wider px-3 py-3 text-right">Bonus</th>
                        <th className="text-xs font-semibold text-slate-500 uppercase tracking-wider px-3 py-3 text-right">Base Pay</th>
                        <th className="text-xs font-semibold text-slate-500 uppercase tracking-wider px-3 py-3 text-center">Adj.</th>
                        <th className="text-xs font-semibold text-slate-500 uppercase tracking-wider px-3 py-3 text-right">Total Pay</th>
                        <th className="text-xs font-semibold text-slate-500 uppercase tracking-wider px-3 py-3 text-right">Hrly Pay</th>
                        <th className="text-xs font-semibold text-slate-500 uppercase tracking-wider px-3 py-3 text-right">Hrly Tip</th>
                        <th className="text-xs font-semibold text-slate-500 uppercase tracking-wider px-3 py-3 text-left">Notes</th>
                        <th className="text-xs font-semibold text-slate-500 uppercase tracking-wider px-3 py-3 text-center">Actions</th>
                      </tr>
                    </thead>
                    <tbody>
                      {payrollRecords.map((record, index) => {
                        const displayName = record.user?.username || record.name;
                        const scheduled   = parseFloat(record.scheduledHours || 0);
                        const actual      = parseFloat(record.actualHours   || 0);
                        const wage        = parseFloat(record.hourlyWage    || 0);
                        const tips        = parseFloat(record.tips           || 0);
                        const bonus       = parseFloat(record.bonus          || 0);
                        const adjustmentsSum = getAdjustmentsSum(record);
                        const basePay = actual * wage;
                        const totalPayBeforeAdjustments = basePay + tips + bonus;
                        const numericTotalPay = totalPayBeforeAdjustments + adjustmentsSum;
                        const divisor = actual > 0 ? actual : 1;
                        const hourlyPay = numericTotalPay / divisor;
                        const hourlyTip = tips / divisor;
                        return (
                          <tr key={record.userId || index} className="border-t border-slate-100 hover:bg-slate-50/40 transition-colors">
                            <td className="px-3 py-3 text-sm font-medium text-slate-900 whitespace-nowrap">{displayName}</td>
                            <td className="px-3 py-3">
                              <input
                                type="number"
                                value={record.hourlyWage ?? ''}
                                onChange={(e) => handleInputChange(index, "hourlyWage", e.target.value)}
                                className="input input-bordered h-8 text-xs w-20 text-right rounded-lg border-slate-200 focus:border-indigo-400"
                                step="0.01" min="0"
                                aria-label={`Hourly wage for ${displayName}`}
                              />
                            </td>
                            <td className="px-3 py-3">
                              <input
                                type="number"
                                value={record.scheduledHours ?? ''}
                                onChange={(e) => handleInputChange(index, "scheduledHours", e.target.value)}
                                className="input input-bordered h-8 text-xs w-20 text-right rounded-lg border-slate-200 focus:border-indigo-400"
                                step="0.01" min="0"
                                aria-label={`Scheduled hours for ${displayName}`}
                              />
                            </td>
                            <td className="px-3 py-3">
                              <input
                                type="number"
                                value={record.actualHours ?? ''}
                                onChange={(e) => handleInputChange(index, "actualHours", e.target.value)}
                                className="input input-bordered h-8 text-xs w-20 text-right rounded-lg border-slate-200 focus:border-indigo-400"
                                step="0.01" min="0"
                                aria-label={`Actual hours for ${displayName}`}
                              />
                            </td>
                            <td className="px-3 py-3">
                              <input
                                type="number"
                                value={record.tips ?? ''}
                                onChange={(e) => handleInputChange(index, "tips", e.target.value)}
                                className="input input-bordered h-8 text-xs w-20 text-right rounded-lg border-slate-200 focus:border-indigo-400"
                                step="0.01" min="0"
                                aria-label={`Tips for ${displayName}`}
                              />
                            </td>
                            <td className="px-3 py-3">
                              <input
                                type="number"
                                value={record.bonus ?? ''}
                                onChange={(e) => handleInputChange(index, "bonus", e.target.value)}
                                className="input input-bordered h-8 text-xs w-20 text-right rounded-lg border-slate-200 focus:border-indigo-400"
                                step="0.01" min="0"
                                aria-label={`Bonus for ${displayName}`}
                              />
                            </td>
                            <td className="px-3 py-3 text-sm text-right font-medium text-slate-700">${basePay.toFixed(2)}</td>
                            <td className="px-3 py-3 text-center">
                              <button
                                className={`text-xs font-medium ${!record.id ? 'text-slate-300 cursor-not-allowed' : 'text-indigo-600 hover:text-indigo-800'}`}
                                onClick={() => openAdjustmentsModal(record)}
                                disabled={!record.id || isSavingAll}
                                aria-label={`Adjustments for ${displayName}: $${adjustmentsSum.toFixed(2)}`}
                              >
                                ${adjustmentsSum.toFixed(2)}
                              </button>
                            </td>
                            <td className="px-3 py-3 text-sm text-right font-semibold text-slate-900">${numericTotalPay.toFixed(2)}</td>
                            <td className="px-3 py-3 text-sm text-right text-slate-600">${hourlyPay.toFixed(2)}</td>
                            <td className="px-3 py-3 text-sm text-right text-slate-600">${hourlyTip.toFixed(2)}</td>
                            <td className="px-3 py-3">
                              <input
                                type="text"
                                value={record.notes || ''}
                                onChange={(e) => handleInputChange(index, "notes", e.target.value)}
                                className="input input-bordered h-8 text-xs w-full rounded-lg border-slate-200 focus:border-indigo-400"
                                placeholder="Notes..."
                                aria-label={`Notes for ${displayName}`}
                              />
                            </td>
                            <td className="px-3 py-3">
                              <div className="flex items-center justify-center gap-1.5">
                                <button
                                  onClick={() => saveRecord(record).then(result => {
                                    if (result.success) {
                                      toast.success(`${record.name}'s record saved.`);
                                      fetchPayrollData();
                                    }
                                  })}
                                  className="btn h-7 min-h-0 px-2 text-xs rounded-lg bg-indigo-50 text-indigo-700 border border-indigo-200 hover:bg-indigo-100 transition-all"
                                  disabled={!selectedSchedule?.id || isSavingAll}
                                  aria-label={`Save record for ${displayName}`}
                                >
                                  <Save size={12} className="mr-0.5" /> Save
                                </button>
                                <button
                                  onClick={() => handleToggleRecordPublished(record)}
                                  className={`btn h-7 min-h-0 px-2 text-xs rounded-lg border transition-all ${
                                    record.visible
                                      ? 'bg-emerald-50 text-emerald-700 border-emerald-200 hover:bg-emerald-100'
                                      : 'bg-slate-50 text-slate-500 border-slate-200 hover:bg-slate-100'
                                  }`}
                                  disabled={!selectedSchedule?.id || isSavingAll}
                                  aria-label={record.visible ? `Unpublish ${displayName}` : `Publish ${displayName}`}
                                >
                                  {record.visible ? 'Published' : 'Unpublished'}
                                </button>
                              </div>
                            </td>
                          </tr>
                        );
                      })}
                    </tbody>
                    <tfoot className="bg-slate-50 border-t-2 border-slate-200">
                      <tr>
                        <td colSpan="2" className="px-3 py-3 text-sm font-semibold text-slate-700 text-right">Totals:</td>
                        <td className="px-3 py-3 text-sm font-semibold text-slate-900 text-right">{totalScheduled}</td>
                        <td className="px-3 py-3 text-sm font-semibold text-slate-900 text-right">{totalActual}</td>
                        <td className="px-3 py-3 text-sm font-semibold text-slate-900 text-right">${totalTips}</td>
                        <td className="px-3 py-3 text-sm font-semibold text-slate-900 text-right">${totalBonus}</td>
                        <td className="px-3 py-3 text-sm font-semibold text-slate-900 text-right">${totalBasePay}</td>
                        <td className="px-3 py-3 text-sm font-semibold text-slate-900 text-center">${totalAdjustments}</td>
                        <td className="px-3 py-3 text-sm font-semibold text-slate-900 text-right">${totalPay}</td>
                        <td colSpan="4" />
                      </tr>
                    </tfoot>
                  </table>
                </div>
              ) : (
                <EmptyState
                  icon={FileSpreadsheet}
                  title="No payroll records found"
                  description="Generate payroll data for this schedule to populate records."
                  action={
                    <button
                      onClick={handleGeneratePayrollData}
                      className="btn h-9 min-h-0 px-4 text-sm font-medium rounded-lg bg-indigo-600 text-white hover:bg-indigo-700 transition-all"
                    >
                      <RefreshCw size={14} className="mr-1.5" />
                      Generate Payroll Data
                    </button>
                  }
                />
              )}
            </DashboardCardBody>
          </>
        )}
      </DashboardCard>

      {/* Tip Breakdown Card */}
      <DashboardCard>
        <DashboardCardHeader
          title="Tip Breakdown by Day"
          subtitle="Local time tips distribution across the payroll period"
          actions={
            selectedSchedule?.id && tipBreakdownData?.breakdown?.length > 0 && payrollRecords?.length > 0 ? (
              <button
                onClick={handleImportTips}
                className="btn h-9 min-h-0 px-3.5 text-xs font-medium rounded-lg bg-indigo-50 text-indigo-700 border border-indigo-200 hover:bg-indigo-100 transition-all"
                disabled={loading || loadingBreakdown || isSavingAll}
                aria-label="Import tips to payroll"
              >
                <Calculator size={14} className="mr-1" />
                Import Tips to Payroll
              </button>
            ) : null
          }
        />
        <DashboardCardBody>
          {loadingBreakdown ? (
            <div className="flex justify-center items-center h-32">
              <span className="loading loading-spinner loading-md text-indigo-500" />
            </div>
          ) : !tipBreakdownData || !tipBreakdownData.breakdown || tipBreakdownData.breakdown.length === 0 ? (
            <EmptyState
              icon={DollarSign}
              title="No tip data available"
              description="No tip breakdown data is available for this payroll period."
            />
          ) : (
            <div>
              <div className="overflow-x-auto rounded-lg border border-slate-200">
                <table className="table w-full">
                  <thead className="bg-slate-50">
                    <tr>
                      <th className="text-xs font-semibold text-slate-500 uppercase tracking-wider px-3 py-3 text-left">Name</th>
                      {tipColumns.map(dateKey => (
                        <th
                          key={dateKey}
                          className="text-xs font-semibold text-slate-500 uppercase tracking-wider px-3 py-3 text-right cursor-pointer hover:text-indigo-600 transition-colors"
                          onClick={() => handleDateHeaderClick(dateKey)}
                          title={`Click for ${format(parseISO(dateKey), 'MMM d')} details`}
                        >
                          {format(parseISO(dateKey), 'MMM d')}
                        </th>
                      ))}
                      <th className="text-xs font-semibold text-slate-700 px-3 py-3 text-right">Total</th>
                    </tr>
                  </thead>
                  <tbody>
                    {tipBreakdownData.breakdown.map((row, idx) => (
                      <tr key={row.userId || idx} className="border-t border-slate-100 hover:bg-slate-50/40 transition-colors">
                        <td className="px-3 py-3 text-sm font-medium text-slate-900 whitespace-nowrap">{row.name}</td>
                        {tipColumns.map(dateKey => (
                          <td key={dateKey} className="px-3 py-3 text-sm text-right text-slate-600">${row[dateKey] || '0.00'}</td>
                        ))}
                        <td className="px-3 py-3 text-sm text-right font-semibold text-slate-900">${row.Total || '0.00'}</td>
                      </tr>
                    ))}
                  </tbody>
                  <tfoot className="bg-slate-50 border-t-2 border-slate-200">
                    <tr>
                      <td className="px-3 py-3 text-sm font-semibold text-slate-700">Total</td>
                      {tipColumns.map(dateKey => (
                        <td key={dateKey} className="px-3 py-3 text-sm font-semibold text-slate-900 text-right">${tipBreakdownData.totals[dateKey] || '0.00'}</td>
                      ))}
                      <td className="px-3 py-3 text-sm font-semibold text-slate-900 text-right">${tipBreakdownData.totals.Total || '0.00'}</td>
                    </tr>
                  </tfoot>
                </table>
              </div>
              <p className="text-xs text-slate-400 mt-2 text-right">Click on a date header for detailed breakdown.</p>
            </div>
          )}
        </DashboardCardBody>
      </DashboardCard>

      {/* Shift Schedule Card */}
      <DashboardCard>
        <DashboardCardHeader
          title="Shift Schedule Overview"
          subtitle={displayDateRange}
        />
        <DashboardCardBody>
          <WeeklyShiftSchedule
            selectedWeekStart={validWeekStart}
            periodEnd={currentPeriodEnd}
            onImportHours={handleImportHours}
          />
        </DashboardCardBody>
      </DashboardCard>

      <TipDetailModal
        isOpen={isDetailModalOpen}
        onClose={closeDetailModal}
        date={selectedDetailDate}
        data={detailedTipData}
        isLoading={isLoadingDetail}
      />

      {modalRecordId && currentPayrollRecordForModal && (
        <PayrollAdjustmentsModal
          payrollRecordId={modalRecordId}
          recordContext={{
            userName: currentPayrollRecordForModal.name,
            userId: currentPayrollRecordForModal.userId
          }}
          onClose={closeAdjustmentsModal}
          onUpdate={handleAdjustmentUpdate}
        />
      )}
    </div>
  );
};

export default PayrollDashboard;
```

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
FILE: client/services/accounting/components/PayrollScheduleManager.jsx
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
```jsx
// Full path: /home/luanngo/boss-dev/client/services/accounting/components/PayrollScheduleManager.jsx
import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { format, addDays } from 'date-fns';
import { fetchWithAuth } from '@/shared/utils/fetchWithAuth';
import { toast } from 'react-toastify';
import moment from 'moment-timezone';
import { Calendar, Clock, Plus, Trash2, Eye, Download, X, Filter } from 'lucide-react';
import StatusBadge from '@/shared/components/ui/StatusBadge';
import EmptyState from '@/shared/components/ui/EmptyState';
import { DashboardCard, DashboardCardBody } from '@/shared/components/ui/DashboardCard';

const convertLocalDateToUTC = (localDateStr) => {
  return moment(localDateStr, "YYYY-MM-DD").utc().format("YYYY-MM-DD");
};

const PayrollScheduleManager = ({ onSelectSchedule }) => {
  const [tempStartDate, setTempStartDate] = useState(format(new Date(), 'yyyy-MM-dd'));
  const [durationWeeks, setDurationWeeks] = useState(2);
  const [schedules, setSchedules] = useState([]);
  const [filterStartDate, setFilterStartDate] = useState('');
  const [filterEndDate, setFilterEndDate] = useState('');
  const [isExporting, setIsExporting] = useState(false);

  const loadSchedules = async () => {
    try {
      const res = await fetchWithAuth(`${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL}/accounting/payroll-schedules`);
      if (!res.ok) {
        const errorText = await res.text();
        console.error('Fetch payroll schedules error:', errorText);
        throw new Error('Failed to fetch payroll schedules.');
      }
      const data = await res.json();
      setSchedules(data);
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error loading payroll schedules', error);
      toast.error('Error loading payroll schedules');
    }
  };

  useEffect(() => {
    loadSchedules();
  }, []);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (schedules.length > 0) {
      const latest = schedules.reduce((acc, curr) =>
        new Date(curr.endWeek) > new Date(acc.endWeek) ? curr : acc
      );
      setTempStartDate(format(addDays(new Date(latest.endWeek), 1), 'yyyy-MM-dd'));
    } else {
      const now = new Date();
      const day = now.getDay();
      const diff = (day === 0 ? 1 : 8) - day;
      setTempStartDate(format(addDays(now, diff), 'yyyy-MM-dd'));
    }
  }, [schedules]);

  const generateSchedule = async () => {
    try {
      toast.info('Generating payroll schedule...');
      const startDateObj = moment.tz(tempStartDate, 'YYYY-MM-DD', moment.tz.guess()).utc();
      const endDateObj = moment.tz(tempStartDate, 'YYYY-MM-DD', moment.tz.guess())
                                .add(durationWeeks * 7 - 1, 'days')
                                .utc();

      const res = await fetchWithAuth(`${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL}/accounting/payroll-schedules/generate`, {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
        body: JSON.stringify({
          startWeek: startDateObj,
          endWeek: endDateObj,
          status: "Active",
          notes: ""
        }),
      });
      if (!res.ok) throw new Error('Failed to generate payroll schedule.');
      toast.success('Payroll schedule generated.');
      loadSchedules();
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Generate Schedule Error:', error);
      toast.error(error.message || 'Failed to generate payroll schedule.');
    }
  };

  const deleteSchedule = async (scheduleId) => {
    try {
      const res = await fetchWithAuth(`${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL}/accounting/payroll-schedules/${scheduleId}`, {
        method: 'DELETE',
      });
      if (!res.ok) throw new Error('Failed to delete payroll schedule.');
      toast.success('Payroll schedule deleted.');
      loadSchedules();
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Delete Schedule Error:', error);
      toast.error('Failed to delete payroll schedule.');
    }
  };

  const filteredSchedules = schedules.filter(schedule => {
    if (!filterStartDate && !filterEndDate) return true;
    const sStart = moment.utc(schedule.startWeek).tz(moment.tz.guess());
    const sEnd = moment.utc(schedule.endWeek).tz(moment.tz.guess());
    if (filterStartDate) {
      const fStart = moment(filterStartDate, 'YYYY-MM-DD').startOf('day');
      if (sStart.isBefore(fStart)) return false;
    }
    if (filterEndDate) {
      const fEnd = moment(filterEndDate, 'YYYY-MM-DD').endOf('day');
      if (sEnd.isAfter(fEnd)) return false;
    }
    return true;
  });

  const handleExportCSV = async () => {
    if (filteredSchedules.length === 0) {
      toast.info("No schedules visible to export.");
      return;
    }

    setIsExporting(true);
    toast.info("Fetching payroll data for all visible schedules...");

    try {
      const allPayrollData = [];
      for (const schedule of filteredSchedules) {
        const res = await fetchWithAuth(`${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL}/accounting/payroll?scheduleId=${schedule.id}`);
        if (res.ok) {
          let data = await res.json();
          if (Array.isArray(data)) {
            data.forEach(record => {
              allPayrollData.push({
                ...record,
                scheduleStart: format(new Date(schedule.startWeek), 'yyyy-MM-dd'),
                scheduleEnd: format(new Date(schedule.endWeek), 'yyyy-MM-dd'),
              });
            });
          }
        }
      }

      if (allPayrollData.length === 0) {
        toast.info("No payroll records found for these schedules.");
        setIsExporting(false);
        return;
      }

      allPayrollData.sort((a, b) => {
        const dateA = new Date(a.scheduleStart);
        const dateB = new Date(b.scheduleStart);
        if (dateA - dateB !== 0) return dateA - dateB;
        const nameA = (a.user?.username || a.name || "").toLowerCase();
        const nameB = (b.user?.username || b.name || "").toLowerCase();
        return nameA.localeCompare(nameB);
      });

      const headers = [
        "Schedule Start", "Schedule End", "Name", "Wage", "Scheduled Hours",
        "Actual Hours", "Tips", "Bonus", "Base Pay", "Adjustments",
        "Total Pay", "Hourly Pay", "Hourly Tip", "Notes"
      ];

      const csvRows = [headers.join(",")];

      allPayrollData.forEach(record => {
        const displayName = record.user?.username || record.name || "";
        const wage = parseFloat(record.hourlyWage || 0);
        const scheduled = parseFloat(record.scheduledHours || 0);
        const actual = parseFloat(record.actualHours || 0);
        const tips = parseFloat(record.tips || 0);
        const bonus = parseFloat(record.bonus || 0);
        const adjustmentsSum = record.adjustments && record.adjustments.length > 0
          ? record.adjustments.reduce((sum, adj) => sum + parseFloat(adj.amount || 0), 0)
          : 0;
        const basePay = actual * wage;
        const totalPayBeforeAdjustments = basePay + tips + bonus;
        const numericTotalPay = totalPayBeforeAdjustments + adjustmentsSum;
        const divisor = actual > 0 ? actual : 1;
        const hourlyPay = numericTotalPay / divisor;
        const hourlyTip = tips / divisor;

        const row = [
          record.scheduleStart, record.scheduleEnd,
          `"${displayName.replace(/"/g, '""')}"`,
          wage.toFixed(2), scheduled.toFixed(2), actual.toFixed(2),
          tips.toFixed(2), bonus.toFixed(2), basePay.toFixed(2),
          adjustmentsSum.toFixed(2), numericTotalPay.toFixed(2),
          hourlyPay.toFixed(2), hourlyTip.toFixed(2),
          record.notes ? `"${record.notes.replace(/"/g, '""')}"` : ""
        ];
        csvRows.push(row.join(","));
      });

      const csvString = csvRows.join("\n");
      const blob = new Blob([csvString], { type: 'text/csv' });
      const url = window.URL.createObjectURL(blob);
      const a = document.createElement("a");
      a.setAttribute("hidden", "");
      a.setAttribute("href", url);
      a.setAttribute("download", `payroll_export_${format(new Date(), 'yyyyMMdd_HHmmss')}.csv`);
      document.body.appendChild(a);
      a.click();
      document.body.removeChild(a);
      toast.success("CSV exported successfully.");
    } catch (error) {
      console.error("Export CSV error:", error);
      toast.error("Failed to export CSV.");
    } finally {
      setIsExporting(false);
    }
  };

  const clearFilters = () => {
    setFilterStartDate('');
    setFilterEndDate('');
  };

  const hasActiveFilters = filterStartDate || filterEndDate;

  return (
    <div className="space-y-6">
      <DashboardCard>
        <div className="px-6 py-5 border-b border-slate-100">
          <div className="flex items-start justify-between">
            <div>
              <h2 className="text-lg font-semibold text-slate-900">Payroll Schedule Manager</h2>
              <p className="text-sm text-slate-500 mt-0.5">Generate, review, and export payroll periods.</p>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <DashboardCardBody>
          <div className="flex flex-col sm:flex-row gap-4 items-end">
            <div className="flex-1 w-full sm:w-auto">
              <label className="block text-xs font-medium text-slate-500 mb-1.5">Start Day of Week</label>
              <div className="relative">
                <Calendar size={15} className="absolute left-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 text-slate-400 pointer-events-none" />
                <input
                  type="date"
                  value={tempStartDate}
                  onChange={(e) => setTempStartDate(e.target.value)}
                  className="input input-bordered w-full pl-9 h-10 text-sm rounded-lg border-slate-200 focus:border-indigo-400 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-100"
                />
              </div>
            </div>
            <div className="w-full sm:w-36">
              <label className="block text-xs font-medium text-slate-500 mb-1.5">Duration (weeks)</label>
              <div className="relative">
                <Clock size={15} className="absolute left-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 text-slate-400 pointer-events-none" />
                <input
                  type="number"
                  value={durationWeeks}
                  onChange={(e) => setDurationWeeks(parseInt(e.target.value))}
                  className="input input-bordered w-full pl-9 h-10 text-sm rounded-lg border-slate-200 focus:border-indigo-400 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-100"
                  min="1"
                />
              </div>
            </div>
            <button
              onClick={generateSchedule}
              className="btn h-10 px-5 text-sm font-medium rounded-lg border-0 bg-indigo-600 text-white hover:bg-indigo-700 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-200 transition-all w-full sm:w-auto"
            >
              <Plus size={16} className="mr-1.5" />
              Generate Payroll Schedule
            </button>
          </div>
        </DashboardCardBody>
      </DashboardCard>

      <DashboardCard>
        <div className="px-6 py-4 border-b border-slate-100">
          <div className="flex flex-col md:flex-row md:items-center justify-between gap-3">
            <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
              <h3 className="text-base font-semibold text-slate-900">Existing Payroll Schedules</h3>
              <span className="text-xs text-slate-400 bg-slate-100 px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full font-medium">
                {filteredSchedules.length} schedule{filteredSchedules.length !== 1 ? 's' : ''}
              </span>
            </div>
            <div className="flex flex-wrap items-center gap-2">
              <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                <div>
                  <input
                    type="date"
                    value={filterStartDate}
                    onChange={(e) => setFilterStartDate(e.target.value)}
                    className="input input-bordered h-9 text-xs rounded-lg border-slate-200 w-36 focus:border-indigo-400"
                    placeholder="From"
                    aria-label="Filter from date"
                  />
                </div>
                <span className="text-slate-300 text-xs">to</span>
                <div>
                  <input
                    type="date"
                    value={filterEndDate}
                    onChange={(e) => setFilterEndDate(e.target.value)}
                    className="input input-bordered h-9 text-xs rounded-lg border-slate-200 w-36 focus:border-indigo-400"
                    placeholder="To"
                    aria-label="Filter to date"
                  />
                </div>
                {hasActiveFilters && (
                  <button
                    onClick={clearFilters}
                    className="btn btn-ghost btn-xs h-9 px-2 text-slate-400 hover:text-slate-600"
                    aria-label="Clear filters"
                  >
                    <X size={14} />
                  </button>
                )}
              </div>
              <div className="w-px h-6 bg-slate-200 mx-1 hidden md:block" />
              <button
                onClick={handleExportCSV}
                className={`btn h-9 px-3 text-xs font-medium rounded-lg border border-slate-200 text-slate-600 hover:bg-slate-50 hover:border-slate-300 transition-all ${isExporting ? 'loading' : ''}`}
                disabled={isExporting || filteredSchedules.length === 0}
                aria-label="Export visible schedules to CSV"
              >
                {isExporting ? (
                  'Exporting...'
                ) : (
                  <><Download size={14} className="mr-1" /> Export CSV</>
                )}
              </button>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <DashboardCardBody padding={false}>
          <div className="overflow-y-auto" style={{ maxHeight: '60vh' }}>
            <table className="table w-full">
              <thead className="bg-slate-50 sticky top-0 z-10">
                <tr>
                  <th className="text-xs font-semibold text-slate-500 uppercase tracking-wider px-4 py-3 text-left">Start Week</th>
                  <th className="text-xs font-semibold text-slate-500 uppercase tracking-wider px-4 py-3 text-left">End Week</th>
                  <th className="text-xs font-semibold text-slate-500 uppercase tracking-wider px-4 py-3 text-left">Status</th>
                  <th className="text-xs font-semibold text-slate-500 uppercase tracking-wider px-4 py-3 text-left">Notes</th>
                  <th className="text-xs font-semibold text-slate-500 uppercase tracking-wider px-4 py-3 text-right">Actions</th>
                </tr>
              </thead>
              <tbody>
                {filteredSchedules.map(schedule => (
                  <tr key={schedule.id} className="border-t border-slate-100 hover:bg-slate-50/50 transition-colors">
                    <td className="px-4 py-3.5 text-sm text-slate-700">
                      {format(new Date(schedule.startWeek), 'MMM d, yyyy')}
                    </td>
                    <td className="px-4 py-3.5 text-sm text-slate-700">
                      {format(new Date(schedule.endWeek), 'MMM d, yyyy')}
                    </td>
                    <td className="px-4 py-3.5">
                      <StatusBadge variant={schedule.status === 'Active' ? 'active' : 'inactive'}>
                        {schedule.status}
                      </StatusBadge>
                    </td>
                    <td className="px-4 py-3.5 text-sm text-slate-500 max-w-xs truncate">
                      {schedule.notes || <span className="text-slate-300">—</span>}
                    </td>
                    <td className="px-4 py-3.5 text-right">
                      <div className="flex items-center justify-end gap-1.5">
                        <button
                          onClick={() => onSelectSchedule(schedule)}
                          className="btn h-8 min-h-0 px-3 text-xs font-medium rounded-lg border border-slate-200 text-slate-600 hover:bg-slate-50 hover:border-slate-300 transition-all"
                          aria-label={`View schedule starting ${format(new Date(schedule.startWeek), 'MMM d, yyyy')}`}
                        >
                          <Eye size={13} className="mr-1" /> View
                        </button>
                        <button
                          onClick={() => deleteSchedule(schedule.id)}
                          className="btn h-8 min-h-0 px-3 text-xs font-medium rounded-lg border border-red-200 text-red-600 hover:bg-red-50 hover:border-red-300 transition-all"
                          aria-label={`Delete schedule starting ${format(new Date(schedule.startWeek), 'MMM d, yyyy')}`}
                        >
                          <Trash2 size={13} className="mr-1" /> Delete
                        </button>
                      </div>
                    </td>
                  </tr>
                ))}
                {filteredSchedules.length === 0 && (
                  <tr>
                    <td colSpan="5" className="px-4 py-12">
                      <EmptyState
                        title={schedules.length === 0 ? 'No payroll schedules' : 'No schedules match your filters'}
                        description={schedules.length === 0 ? 'Generate a payroll schedule above to get started.' : 'Try adjusting your date filter.'}
                      />
                    </td>
                  </tr>
                )}
              </tbody>
            </table>
          </div>
        </DashboardCardBody>
      </DashboardCard>
    </div>
  );
};

export default PayrollScheduleManager;
```

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
FILE: client/services/accounting/components/ProfitLossBetaTab.jsx
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
```jsx
// Full path: /home/luanngo/boss-dev/client/services/accounting/components/ProfitLossBetaTab.jsx
import React, { useEffect, useMemo, useState } from 'react';
import { fetchWithAuth } from '@/shared/utils/fetchWithAuth';
import { toast } from 'react-toastify';
import { formatMoney } from '../utils/formatAccounting';

const defaultDateRange = () => {
  const today = new Date().toISOString().slice(0, 10);
  const start = new Date();
  start.setMonth(start.getMonth() - 1);
  return {
    from: start.toISOString().slice(0, 10),
    to: today,
  };
};

const totalCards = [
  ['Revenue', 'revenue'],
  ['COGS', 'cogs'],
  ['Expenses', 'expenses'],
  ['Other Income', 'otherIncome'],
  ['Other Expenses', 'otherExpenses'],
  ['Net Income', 'netIncome'],
];

export default function ProfitLossBetaTab() {
  const [dateRange, setDateRange] = useState(() => {
    if (typeof window === 'undefined') return defaultDateRange();
    const saved = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('profitLossBetaDateRange') || 'null');
    return saved?.from && saved?.to ? saved : defaultDateRange();
  });
  const [report, setReport] = useState(null);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (typeof window !== 'undefined') {
      localStorage.setItem('profitLossBetaDateRange', JSON.stringify(dateRange));
    }
  }, [dateRange]);

  useEffect(() => {
    const fetchReport = async () => {
      if (!dateRange.from || !dateRange.to) return;
      setLoading(true);
      try {
        const params = new URLSearchParams({ from: dateRange.from, to: dateRange.to });
        const res = await fetchWithAuth(
          `${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL}/accounting/reports/profit-loss?${params.toString()}`
        );
        if (!res.ok) throw new Error((await res.json()).error || 'Failed to fetch profit/loss report.');
        const data = await res.json();
        setReport(data);
      } catch (error) {
        toast.error(error.message);
      } finally {
        setLoading(false);
      }
    };

    fetchReport();
  }, [dateRange]);

  const csvContent = useMemo(() => {
    if (!report?.sections?.length) return '';
    const rows = [['Section', 'Line', 'Amount']];
    report.sections.forEach((section) => {
      section.lines.forEach((line) => {
        rows.push([section.label, line.statementLine, Number(line.totalAmount || 0).toFixed(2)]);
      });
      rows.push([section.label, 'Section Total', Number(section.totalAmount || 0).toFixed(2)]);
    });
    rows.push(['', 'Net Income', Number(report?.totals?.netIncome || 0).toFixed(2)]);
    return rows.map((row) => row.map((cell) => `"${String(cell).replace(/"/g, '""')}"`).join(',')).join('\n');
  }, [report]);

  const handleDownloadCsv = () => {
    if (!csvContent) return;
    const blob = new Blob([csvContent], { type: 'text/csv;charset=utf-8;' });
    const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
    const link = document.createElement('a');
    link.href = url;
    link.setAttribute('download', `profit_loss_beta_${dateRange.from}_to_${dateRange.to}.csv`);
    document.body.appendChild(link);
    link.click();
    document.body.removeChild(link);
    URL.revokeObjectURL(url);
  };

  return (
    <div className="space-y-4">
      <div className="flex flex-wrap items-end gap-4">
        <div>
          <label className="label-text block">From</label>
          <input
            type="date"
            value={dateRange.from}
            onChange={(e) => setDateRange((prev) => ({ ...prev, from: e.target.value }))}
            className="input input-bordered input-sm"
          />
        </div>
```
