```jsx
        <div>
          <label className="label-text block">To</label>
          <input
            type="date"
            value={dateRange.to}
            onChange={(e) => setDateRange((prev) => ({ ...prev, to: e.target.value }))}
            className="input input-bordered input-sm"
          />
        </div>
        <button className="btn btn-sm" onClick={handleDownloadCsv} disabled={!csvContent}>
          Download CSV
        </button>
        <div className="badge badge-warning badge-outline">Beta</div>
      </div>

      {report?.totals && (
        <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 xl:grid-cols-6 gap-3">
          {totalCards.map(([label, key]) => (
            <div key={key} className="stat bg-base-200 rounded-box">
              <div className="stat-title">{label}</div>
              <div className="stat-value text-2xl">{formatMoney(report.totals[key])}</div>
            </div>
          ))}
        </div>
      )}

      {report?.totals?.unmapped ? (
        <div className="alert alert-warning">
          <span>
            {formatMoney(report.totals.unmapped)} is currently landing in Unmapped Accounts. Use the starter mapping script to move those accounts into statement lines.
          </span>
        </div>
      ) : null}

      {loading ? (
        <div className="flex justify-center p-10">
          <span className="loading loading-spinner loading-lg"></span>
        </div>
      ) : !report ? (
        <div className="text-sm opacity-70">Choose a date range to load the journal-first profit and loss report.</div>
      ) : (
        <div className="space-y-4">
          {report.sections.length === 0 ? (
            <div className="alert">
              <span>No journal-based P&L lines were found for this range.</span>
            </div>
          ) : (
            report.sections.map((section) => (
              <div key={section.groupKey} className="card bg-base-100 shadow border border-base-300">
                <div className="card-body p-4">
                  <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-2">
                    <h3 className="card-title text-lg">{section.label}</h3>
                    <div className="font-semibold">{formatMoney(section.totalAmount)}</div>
                  </div>
                  <div className="overflow-x-auto">
                    <table className="table table-sm w-full">
                      <thead>
                        <tr>
                          <th>Statement Line</th>
                          <th className="text-right">Amount</th>
                        </tr>
                      </thead>
                      <tbody>
                        {section.lines.map((line) => (
                          <tr key={`${section.groupKey}-${line.statementLine}`}>
                            <td>{line.statementLine}</td>
                            <td className="text-right">{formatMoney(line.totalAmount)}</td>
                          </tr>
                        ))}
                      </tbody>
                      <tfoot>
                        <tr className="font-bold">
                          <td>{section.label} Total</td>
                          <td className="text-right">{formatMoney(section.totalAmount)}</td>
                        </tr>
                      </tfoot>
                    </table>
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>
            ))
          )}

          <div className="card bg-base-200 shadow">
            <div className="card-body p-4 flex flex-row items-center justify-between">
              <h3 className="text-lg font-bold">Net Income</h3>
              <div className="text-2xl font-bold">{formatMoney(report.totals.netIncome)}</div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      )}
    </div>
  );
}

```

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
FILE: client/services/accounting/components/ReceiptMatchingQueue.jsx
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
```jsx
// Full path: /home/luanngo/boss-dev/client/services/accounting/components/ReceiptMatchingQueue.jsx
'use client';
import React, { useState, useEffect, useCallback } from 'react';
import { toast } from 'react-toastify';
import {
  CheckCircle2,
  XCircle,
  RefreshCw,
  Receipt,
  AlertTriangle,
  CircleDashed,
  Banknote,
  ThumbsUp,
  Eye,
  GitMerge,
  Search,
  Mail,
  Pencil,
} from 'lucide-react';
import { fetchWithAuth } from '@/shared/utils/fetchWithAuth';
import ReceiptsDetails from '@/services/receipt/components/ReceiptsDetails';
import MatchReceiptModal from '@/services/receipt/components/MatchReceiptModal';

const fmt = (v) =>
  new Intl.NumberFormat('en-CA', { style: 'currency', currency: 'CAD' }).format(Math.abs(Number(v || 0)));

const fmtDate = (v) => {
  if (!v) return '—';
  const d = new Date(v);
  return Number.isNaN(d.getTime()) ? '—' : d.toLocaleDateString('en-CA', { year: 'numeric', month: 'short', day: '2-digit' });
};

const getDateIssue = (v) => {
  if (!v) return 'Missing date';
  const d = new Date(v);
  if (Number.isNaN(d.getTime())) return 'Invalid date';
  const year = d.getFullYear();
  const currentYear = new Date().getFullYear();
  if (year < 2015 || year > currentYear + 1) return 'Review date';
  return '';
};

const RECEIPT_MATCH_APPROACHES = ['balanced', 'closest-date', 'closest-amount', 'transaction-details', 'broad-review'];

const CONFIDENCE_BADGE = {
  VERY_HIGH: 'badge-success',
  HIGH: 'badge-info',
  MEDIUM: 'badge-warning',
  LOW: 'badge-error',
};

const ConfidenceBadge = ({ label, score }) => {
  const cls = CONFIDENCE_BADGE[label] || 'badge-ghost';
  const pct = score != null ? `${Math.round(score * 100)}%` : '';
  return (
    <span className={`badge ${cls} badge-sm gap-1`}>
      {pct} {label?.replace('_', ' ')}
    </span>
  );
};

const ScoreBar = ({ label, value }) => (
  <div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-xs">
    <span className="w-24 text-base-content/60 truncate">{label}</span>
    <div className="flex-1 bg-base-300 rounded-full h-1.5">
      <div className="bg-primary h-1.5 rounded-full" style={{ width: `${Math.round((value ?? 0) * 100)}%` }} />
    </div>
    <span className="w-8 text-right text-base-content/70">{Math.round((value ?? 0) * 100)}%</span>
  </div>
);

const scoreValue = (candidate, key, fallbackKey = null) =>
  candidate?.[key] ?? (fallbackKey ? candidate?.scoreBreakdown?.[fallbackKey] : undefined) ?? 0;

const SearchResultCard = ({ receipt, transactionId, onMatch, loading }) => (
  <div className="border border-base-300 rounded-lg p-3 bg-base-100 space-y-2">
    <div className="flex flex-wrap items-center justify-between gap-2">
      <div className="min-w-0">
        <div className="font-medium text-sm truncate">{receipt.companyName || 'Unknown merchant'}</div>
        <div className="text-xs text-base-content/60">
          {fmtDate(receipt.date)} · {receipt.total != null ? fmt(receipt.total) : 'No total'}
          {receipt.hst != null && <span className="ml-1 text-base-content/50">· HST {fmt(receipt.hst)}</span>}
        </div>
      </div>
      <ConfidenceBadge label={String(receipt.confidenceLabel || '').toUpperCase().replace(/\s+/g, '_')} score={receipt.matchScore} />
    </div>
    {Array.isArray(receipt.matchReasons) && receipt.matchReasons.length > 0 && (
      <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-1">
        {receipt.matchReasons.map((reason) => (
          <span key={reason} className="badge badge-ghost badge-xs">{reason}</span>
        ))}
      </div>
    )}
    <div className="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 gap-x-4 gap-y-1 pt-1">
      <ScoreBar label="Amount" value={scoreValue(receipt, 'amountScore', 'amountScore')} />
      <ScoreBar label="Date" value={scoreValue(receipt, 'dateScore', 'dateScore')} />
      <ScoreBar label="Vendor" value={scoreValue(receipt, 'vendorScore', 'vendorScore')} />
      <ScoreBar label="Keywords" value={scoreValue(receipt, 'keywordScore', 'keywordScore')} />
    </div>
    <button
      type="button"
      className="btn btn-success btn-xs gap-1"
      onClick={() => onMatch({ transactionId, receiptId: receipt.id })}
      disabled={loading}
    >
      <CheckCircle2 size={12} /> Match
    </button>
  </div>
);

const CandidateCard = ({ candidate, onApprove, onReject, loading }) => {
  const [showScores, setShowScores] = useState(false);
  const r = candidate.receipt;

  return (
    <div className="border border-base-300 rounded-xl p-3 bg-base-100 space-y-2">
      <div className="flex flex-wrap items-center justify-between gap-2">
        <div className="min-w-0">
          <div className="font-medium text-sm truncate">{r?.companyName || 'Unknown merchant'}</div>
          <div className="text-xs text-base-content/60">
            {fmtDate(r?.date)} · {fmt(r?.total)}
            {r?.hst != null && <span className="ml-1 text-base-content/50">· HST {fmt(r.hst)}</span>}
          </div>
        </div>
        <ConfidenceBadge label={candidate.confidenceLabel} score={candidate.confidence} />
      </div>

      {Array.isArray(candidate.matchReasons) && candidate.matchReasons.length > 0 && (
        <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-1">
          {candidate.matchReasons.map((reason) => (
            <span key={reason} className="badge badge-ghost badge-xs">{reason}</span>
          ))}
        </div>
      )}

      <button
        type="button"
        className="text-xs text-primary underline"
        onClick={() => setShowScores((s) => !s)}
      >
        {showScores ? 'Hide score breakdown' : 'Show score breakdown'}
      </button>

      {showScores && (
        <div className="space-y-1 pt-1">
          <ScoreBar label="Amount" value={candidate.amountScore} />
          <ScoreBar label="Date" value={candidate.dateScore} />
          <ScoreBar label="Vendor" value={candidate.vendorScore} />
          <ScoreBar label="Description" value={candidate.descriptionScore} />
          <ScoreBar label="Keywords" value={candidate.keywordScore} />
          <ScoreBar label="HST" value={candidate.taxScore} />
          <ScoreBar label="Source" value={candidate.sourceScore} />
          <ScoreBar label="Prior match" value={candidate.priorMatchScore} />
        </div>
      )}

      <div className="flex gap-2 pt-1">
        <button
          type="button"
          className="btn btn-success btn-xs gap-1"
          onClick={() => onApprove(candidate.id)}
          disabled={loading}
        >
          <CheckCircle2 size={12} /> Approve
        </button>
        <button
          type="button"
          className="btn btn-ghost btn-xs gap-1"
          onClick={() => onReject(candidate.id)}
          disabled={loading}
        >
          <XCircle size={12} /> Reject
        </button>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
};

const TransactionRow = ({
  tx,
  onApprove,
  onReject,
  onNoReceipt,
  onSearchReceipts,
  onDirectMatch,
  actionLoading,
  searchState,
}) => {
  const [open, setOpen] = useState(false);
  const candidates = tx.matchCandidates || [];
  const best = candidates[0];
  const searchData = searchState?.[tx.id] || {};
  const hasFreshSearch = Boolean(searchData.receipts || searchData.emailSearchSuggestion);

  return (
    <div className="border border-base-300 rounded-xl bg-base-100">
      <button
        type="button"
        className="w-full flex flex-wrap items-center justify-between gap-3 p-3 text-left"
        onClick={() => setOpen((s) => !s)}
      >
        <div className="min-w-0 flex-1">
          <div className="font-semibold text-sm truncate">{tx.description}</div>
          <div className="text-xs text-base-content/60">{fmtDate(tx.date)} · {fmt(tx.amount)}</div>
        </div>
        <div className="flex flex-wrap items-center gap-2 shrink-0">
          {best ? (
            <ConfidenceBadge label={best.confidenceLabel} score={best.confidence} />
          ) : (
            <span className="badge badge-ghost badge-sm">No candidates</span>
          )}
          {tx.receiptMatchStatus === 'CONFLICT' && (
            <span className="badge badge-warning badge-sm">Conflict</span>
          )}
          <span className="text-base-content/40 text-xs">{open ? '▲' : '▼'}</span>
        </div>
      </button>

      {(open || hasFreshSearch) && (
        <div className="px-3 pb-3 space-y-2 border-t border-base-300 pt-3">
          {candidates.length === 0 ? (
            <p className="text-sm text-base-content/60">No stored candidates. Open the transaction to search manually.</p>
          ) : (
            candidates.map((c) => (
              <CandidateCard
                key={c.id}
                candidate={c}
                onApprove={onApprove}
                onReject={onReject}
                loading={actionLoading}
              />
            ))
          )}

          <button
            type="button"
            className="btn btn-ghost btn-xs gap-1 text-base-content/60"
            onClick={() => onNoReceipt(tx.id)}
            disabled={actionLoading}
          >
            <Banknote size={12} /> Mark no receipt required
          </button>
          <button
            type="button"
            className="btn btn-outline btn-xs gap-1"
            onClick={() => onSearchReceipts(tx.id, { broadSearch: false })}
            disabled={actionLoading || searchData.loading}
          >
            {searchData.loading ? <span className="loading loading-spinner loading-xs" /> : <Search size={12} />}
            Search receipts
          </button>
          <button
            type="button"
            className="btn btn-ghost btn-xs gap-1"
            onClick={() => onSearchReceipts(tx.id, { broadSearch: true })}
            disabled={actionLoading || searchData.loading}
          >
            Broaden search
          </button>
          {searchData.receipts?.length > 0 && (
            <div className="pt-2 space-y-2">
              <p className="text-xs font-medium text-base-content/60">Fresh search results</p>
              {searchData.receipts.map((receipt) => (
                <SearchResultCard
                  key={receipt.id}
                  receipt={receipt}
                  transactionId={tx.id}
                  onMatch={onDirectMatch}
                  loading={actionLoading}
                />
              ))}
            </div>
          )}
          {!searchData.loading && searchData.receipts && searchData.receipts.length === 0 && (
            <div className="rounded-lg border border-dashed border-base-300 bg-base-200/30 p-3 text-xs text-base-content/60 space-y-2">
              <p>No receipt candidates found for this transaction.</p>
              {searchData.emailSearchSuggestion?.query && (
                <div className="flex items-start gap-2">
                  <Mail size={14} className="mt-0.5 shrink-0" />
                  <div className="min-w-0">
                    <p className="font-medium">Suggested email search</p>
                    <p className="font-mono break-words">{searchData.emailSearchSuggestion.query}</p>
                    <p>{searchData.emailSearchSuggestion.startDate} to {searchData.emailSearchSuggestion.endDate}</p>
                  </div>
                </div>
              )}
            </div>
          )}
        </div>
      )}
    </div>
  );
};

const AutoMatchedRow = ({ tx, onApprove, actionLoading }) => {
  const candidate = tx.matchCandidates?.[0];
  return (
    <div className="border border-success/30 rounded-xl bg-success/5 p-3 flex flex-wrap items-center justify-between gap-3">
      <div className="min-w-0 flex-1">
        <div className="font-semibold text-sm truncate">{tx.description}</div>
        <div className="text-xs text-base-content/60">{fmtDate(tx.date)} · {fmt(tx.amount)}</div>
        <div className="text-xs text-base-content/60 mt-0.5">
          Matched to: <span className="font-medium">{tx.receipt?.companyName || tx.receipt?.id}</span>
          {tx.receiptMatchConfidence != null && (
            <span className="ml-1 text-success">{Math.round(tx.receiptMatchConfidence * 100)}%</span>
          )}
        </div>
      </div>
      <div className="flex gap-2 shrink-0">
        {candidate && (
          <button
            type="button"
            className="btn btn-success btn-xs gap-1"
            onClick={() => onApprove(candidate.id)}
            disabled={actionLoading}
          >
            <ThumbsUp size={12} /> Confirm
          </button>
        )}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
};

const ReceiptTransactionCandidate = ({ receiptId, transaction, onMatch, loading }) => (
  <div className="mt-2 rounded-lg border border-base-300 bg-base-100 p-2 text-xs">
    <div className="flex items-start justify-between gap-2">
      <div className="min-w-0">
        <div className="font-medium truncate">{transaction.description || 'No description'}</div>
        <div className="text-base-content/60">
          {fmtDate(transaction.date)} · {fmt(transaction.amount)}
          {transaction.source?.name && <span> · {transaction.source.name}</span>}
        </div>
        <div className="mt-1 flex flex-wrap gap-1">
          <span className="badge badge-ghost badge-xs">{Math.round(Number(transaction.matchScore || 0) * 100)}%</span>
          {transaction.confidenceLabel && <span className="badge badge-outline badge-xs">{transaction.confidenceLabel}</span>}
          {transaction.approachHits?.length > 1 && <span className="badge badge-info badge-xs">{transaction.approachHits.length} approaches</span>}
          {transaction.matchApproachLabel && <span className="badge badge-ghost badge-xs">{transaction.matchApproachLabel}</span>}
        </div>
      </div>
      <button
        type="button"
        className="btn btn-success btn-xs shrink-0"
        onClick={() => onMatch({ receiptId, transactionId: transaction.id })}
        disabled={loading}
      >
        <CheckCircle2 size={12} />
      </button>
    </div>
  </div>
);

const UnmatchedReceiptRow = ({
  receipt,
  checked,
  searchState,
  actionLoading,
  onToggleSelected,
  onView,
  onMatch,
  onSearch,
  onDirectMatch,
}) => {
  const dateIssue = getDateIssue(receipt.date);
  const bestCandidate = searchState?.transactions?.[0] || null;

  return (
    <tr>
      <td>
        <input
          type="checkbox"
          className="checkbox checkbox-xs"
          checked={checked}
          onChange={() => onToggleSelected(receipt.id)}
          aria-label={`Select receipt ${receipt.companyName || receipt.id}`}
        />
      </td>
      <td className="whitespace-nowrap">
        <div>{fmtDate(receipt.date)}</div>
        {dateIssue && <div className="badge badge-warning badge-xs mt-1">{dateIssue}</div>}
      </td>
      <td className="max-w-[220px]">
        <button
          type="button"
          className="font-medium truncate block hover:text-primary text-left max-w-full"
          onClick={() => onView(receipt)}
          title="View receipt"
        >
          {receipt.companyName || 'Unknown merchant'}
        </button>
        {receipt.notes && <div className="text-xs text-base-content/50 truncate">{receipt.notes}</div>}
        {searchState?.loading && (
          <div className="mt-2 text-xs text-base-content/50">
            <span className="loading loading-spinner loading-xs mr-1" />
            Searching matches...
          </div>
        )}
        {!searchState?.loading && searchState?.transactions && searchState.transactions.length === 0 && (
          <div className="mt-2 text-xs text-base-content/50">No candidate transactions found.</div>
        )}
        {bestCandidate && (
          <ReceiptTransactionCandidate
            receiptId={receipt.id}
            transaction={bestCandidate}
            onMatch={onDirectMatch}
            loading={actionLoading}
          />
        )}
      </td>
      <td className="text-right whitespace-nowrap">{receipt.total != null ? fmt(receipt.total) : '—'}</td>
      <td className="text-right whitespace-nowrap text-xs text-base-content/60">
        {receipt.hst != null ? fmt(receipt.hst) : '—'}
      </td>
      <td className="whitespace-nowrap">
        <div className="flex justify-end gap-1">
          <button
            type="button"
            className="btn btn-outline btn-xs"
            onClick={() => onView(receipt)}
            title="View and edit receipt"
          >
            <Pencil size={12} />
          </button>
          <button
            type="button"
            className="btn btn-success btn-xs"
            onClick={() => onMatch(receipt)}
            title="Find matching transaction"
          >
            <GitMerge size={12} />
          </button>
          <button
            type="button"
            className="btn btn-ghost btn-xs"
            onClick={() => onSearch(receipt.id)}
            disabled={searchState?.loading}
            title="Search candidate transactions"
          >
            {searchState?.loading ? <span className="loading loading-spinner loading-xs" /> : <Search size={12} />}
          </button>
        </div>
      </td>
    </tr>
  );
};

const Section = ({ title, icon: Icon, count, colorClass = 'text-base-content', children, defaultOpen = false }) => {
  const [open, setOpen] = useState(defaultOpen);
  return (
    <div className="card bg-base-100 border border-base-300 shadow-sm">
      <button
        type="button"
        className="card-body p-4 flex flex-row items-center justify-between gap-3 cursor-pointer w-full text-left"
        onClick={() => setOpen((s) => !s)}
      >
        <div className={`flex items-center gap-2 font-semibold ${colorClass}`}>
          <Icon size={18} />
          {title}
          <span className="badge badge-ghost badge-sm ml-1">{count}</span>
        </div>
        <span className="text-base-content/40">{open ? '▲' : '▼'}</span>
      </button>

      {open && (
        <div className="px-4 pb-4 space-y-2">
          {children}
        </div>
      )}
    </div>
  );
};

const ReceiptMatchingQueue = () => {
  const [data, setData] = useState(null);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
  const [actionLoading, setActionLoading] = useState(false);
  const [batchLoading, setBatchLoading] = useState(false);
  const [refreshLoading, setRefreshLoading] = useState(false);
  const [searchTerm, setSearchTerm] = useState('');
  const [viewFilter, setViewFilter] = useState('all');
  const [manualSearch, setManualSearch] = useState({});
  const [receiptMatchSearch, setReceiptMatchSearch] = useState({});
  const [selectedReceiptIds, setSelectedReceiptIds] = useState(new Set());
  const [suspiciousReceiptDatesOnly, setSuspiciousReceiptDatesOnly] = useState(false);
  const [batchReceiptSearchLoading, setBatchReceiptSearchLoading] = useState(false);
  const [selectedReceipt, setSelectedReceipt] = useState(null);
  const [receiptToMatch, setReceiptToMatch] = useState(null);

  const fetchQueue = useCallback(async () => {
    setLoading(true);
    try {
      const res = await fetchWithAuth(`${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL}/receipt/match/queue`);
      if (!res.ok) throw new Error('Failed to load queue.');
      const json = await res.json();
      setData(json);
    } catch (err) {
      toast.error(`Failed to load receipt matching queue: ${err.message}`);
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  }, []);

  useEffect(() => {
    fetchQueue();
  }, [fetchQueue]);

  const handleApprove = async (candidateId) => {
    setActionLoading(true);
    try {
      const res = await fetchWithAuth(`${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL}/receipt/match/approve-candidate`, {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
        body: JSON.stringify({ candidateId }),
      });
      const json = await res.json();
      if (!res.ok) throw new Error(json.error || 'Failed to approve.');
      toast.success('Receipt match approved.');
      await fetchQueue();
    } catch (err) {
      toast.error(`Approve failed: ${err.message}`);
    } finally {
      setActionLoading(false);
    }
  };

  const handleReject = async (candidateId) => {
    setActionLoading(true);
    try {
      const res = await fetchWithAuth(`${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL}/receipt/match/reject-candidate`, {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
        body: JSON.stringify({ candidateId }),
      });
      const json = await res.json();
      if (!res.ok) throw new Error(json.error || 'Failed to reject.');
      toast.success('Candidate rejected.');
      await fetchQueue();
    } catch (err) {
      toast.error(`Reject failed: ${err.message}`);
    } finally {
      setActionLoading(false);
    }
  };

  const handleNoReceipt = async (transactionId) => {
    setActionLoading(true);
    try {
      const res = await fetchWithAuth(`${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL}/receipt/match/no-receipt-required`, {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
        body: JSON.stringify({ transactionId }),
      });
      const json = await res.json();
      if (!res.ok) throw new Error(json.error || 'Failed.');
      toast.success('Marked as no receipt required.');
      await fetchQueue();
    } catch (err) {
      toast.error(`Failed: ${err.message}`);
    } finally {
      setActionLoading(false);
    }
  };

  const handleDirectMatch = async ({ transactionId, receiptId }) => {
    setActionLoading(true);
    try {
      const res = await fetchWithAuth(`${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL}/receipt/match`, {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
        body: JSON.stringify({ receiptId, type: 'bank', transactionId }),
      });
      const json = await res.json();
      if (!res.ok) throw new Error(json.error || 'Failed to match.');
      toast.success('Receipt matched.');
      setManualSearch((prev) => {
        const next = { ...prev };
        delete next[transactionId];
        return next;
      });
      setReceiptMatchSearch((prev) => {
        const next = { ...prev };
        delete next[receiptId];
        return next;
      });
      setSelectedReceiptIds((prev) => {
        const next = new Set(prev);
        next.delete(receiptId);
        return next;
      });
      await fetchQueue();
    } catch (err) {
      toast.error(`Match failed: ${err.message}`);
    } finally {
      setActionLoading(false);
    }
  };

  const fetchTransactionsForReceiptApproach = async (receiptId, { approach = 'balanced', broadSearch = false } = {}) => {
    const res = await fetchWithAuth(`${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL}/receipt/match/transactions`, {
      method: 'POST',
      headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
      body: JSON.stringify({ receiptId, approach, broadSearch, range: broadSearch ? 0.5 : 0.05 }),
    });
    const json = await res.json();
    if (!res.ok) throw new Error(json.error || 'Failed to search transactions.');
    return {
      approach: json.approach || approach,
      transactions: json.transactions || [],
    };
  };

  const mergeReceiptApproachResults = (results) => {
    const byTransactionId = new Map();
    results.forEach((result) => {
      (result.transactions || []).forEach((transaction) => {
        const existing = byTransactionId.get(transaction.id);
        const approachHit = result.approach || transaction.matchApproach || 'balanced';
        if (!existing || Number(transaction.matchScore || 0) > Number(existing.matchScore || 0)) {
          byTransactionId.set(transaction.id, {
            ...transaction,
            approachHits: Array.from(new Set([...(existing?.approachHits || []), approachHit])),
          });
          return;
        }
        existing.approachHits = Array.from(new Set([...(existing.approachHits || []), approachHit]));
      });
    });

    return Array.from(byTransactionId.values())
      .map((transaction) => ({
        ...transaction,
        consensusScore: Number(transaction.matchScore || 0) + Math.min(0.08, Math.max(0, (transaction.approachHits?.length || 1) - 1) * 0.02),
      }))
      .sort((left, right) => {
        if (right.consensusScore !== left.consensusScore) return right.consensusScore - left.consensusScore;
        return Number(right.matchScore || 0) - Number(left.matchScore || 0);
      });
  };

  const handleSearchTransactionsForReceipt = async (receiptId, { approach = 'all', broadSearch = false } = {}) => {
    setReceiptMatchSearch((prev) => ({ ...prev, [receiptId]: { ...(prev[receiptId] || {}), loading: true } }));
    try {
      const approaches = approach === 'all' ? RECEIPT_MATCH_APPROACHES : [approach];
      const results = [];
      for (const selectedApproach of approaches) {
        results.push(await fetchTransactionsForReceiptApproach(receiptId, {
          approach: selectedApproach,
          broadSearch: broadSearch || selectedApproach === 'broad-review',
        }));
      }
      const transactions = mergeReceiptApproachResults(results);
      setReceiptMatchSearch((prev) => ({
        ...prev,
        [receiptId]: {
          loading: false,
          transactions,
          approach,
        },
      }));
      return transactions;
    } catch (err) {
      setReceiptMatchSearch((prev) => ({ ...prev, [receiptId]: { ...(prev[receiptId] || {}), loading: false, error: err.message } }));
      toast.error(`Receipt search failed: ${err.message}`);
      return [];
    }
  };

  const handleBatchSearchSelectedReceipts = async () => {
    const ids = Array.from(selectedReceiptIds);
    if (!ids.length) {
      toast.info('Select receipts to search first.');
      return;
    }

    setBatchReceiptSearchLoading(true);
    let withCandidates = 0;
    try {
      for (const receiptId of ids) {
        const transactions = await handleSearchTransactionsForReceipt(receiptId);
        if (transactions.length) withCandidates += 1;
      }
      toast.success(`Searched ${ids.length} receipt${ids.length !== 1 ? 's' : ''}. Found candidates for ${withCandidates}.`);
    } finally {
      setBatchReceiptSearchLoading(false);
    }
  };

  const toggleReceiptSelected = (receiptId) => {
    setSelectedReceiptIds((prev) => {
      const next = new Set(prev);
      if (next.has(receiptId)) next.delete(receiptId);
      else next.add(receiptId);
      return next;
    });
  };

  const handleSearchReceipts = async (transactionId, { broadSearch = false } = {}) => {
    setManualSearch((prev) => ({ ...prev, [transactionId]: { ...(prev[transactionId] || {}), loading: true } }));
    try {
      const res = await fetchWithAuth(`${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL}/receipt/match/transactions`, {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
        body: JSON.stringify({ transactionId, broadSearch, range: broadSearch ? 0.5 : 0.05 }),
      });
      const json = await res.json();
      if (!res.ok) throw new Error(json.error || 'Failed to search receipts.');
      setManualSearch((prev) => ({
        ...prev,
        [transactionId]: {
          loading: false,
          receipts: json.receipts || [],
          emailSearchSuggestion: json.emailSearchSuggestion || null,
          broadSearch,
        },
      }));
      if (json.receipts?.length) {
        await fetchQueue();
      }
    } catch (err) {
      setManualSearch((prev) => ({ ...prev, [transactionId]: { ...(prev[transactionId] || {}), loading: false, error: err.message } }));
      toast.error(`Search failed: ${err.message}`);
    }
  };

  const handleRefreshVisibleUnmatched = async ({ broadSearch = false } = {}) => {
    const ids = (data?.unmatchedTransactions || []).map((tx) => tx.id);
    if (!ids.length) {
      toast.info('No unmatched transactions to refresh.');
      return;
    }
    setRefreshLoading(true);
    try {
      const res = await fetchWithAuth(`${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL}/receipt/match/refresh-candidates`, {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
        body: JSON.stringify({ transactionIds: ids, broadSearch, range: broadSearch ? 0.5 : 0.05 }),
      });
      const json = await res.json();
      if (!res.ok) throw new Error(json.error || 'Failed to refresh candidates.');
      const refreshed = json.refreshed?.length ?? 0;
      const errors = json.errors?.length ?? 0;
      toast.success(`Refreshed ${refreshed} transaction${refreshed !== 1 ? 's' : ''}${errors ? ` with ${errors} error${errors !== 1 ? 's' : ''}` : ''}.`);
      await fetchQueue();
    } catch (err) {
      toast.error(`Refresh failed: ${err.message}`);
    } finally {
      setRefreshLoading(false);
    }
  };

  const handleBatchApprove = async () => {
    setBatchLoading(true);
    try {
      const res = await fetchWithAuth(`${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL}/receipt/match/batch-approve`, {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
        body: JSON.stringify({}),
      });
      const json = await res.json();
      if (!res.ok) throw new Error(json.error || 'Failed.');
      const approvedCount = json.approved?.length ?? 0;
      const skippedCount = json.skipped?.length ?? 0;
      toast.success(`Batch approved ${approvedCount} match${approvedCount !== 1 ? 'es' : ''}. Skipped ${skippedCount}.`);
      await fetchQueue();
    } catch (err) {
      toast.error(`Batch approve failed: ${err.message}`);
    } finally {
      setBatchLoading(false);
    }
  };

  const handleReceiptUpdated = async () => {
    await fetchQueue();
  };

  if (loading) {
    return (
      <div className="flex justify-center items-center py-16">
        <span className="loading loading-spinner loading-lg" />
      </div>
    );
  }

  if (!data) return null;

  const { candidateTransactions, unmatchedTransactions, unmatchedReceipts, autoMatched, conflictTransactions, summary } = data;

  const veryHighCandidates = candidateTransactions.filter(
    (tx) => tx.matchCandidates?.[0]?.confidenceLabel === 'VERY_HIGH'
  );
  const needsReviewCandidates = candidateTransactions.filter(
    (tx) => tx.matchCandidates?.[0]?.confidenceLabel !== 'VERY_HIGH'
  );

  const matchesSearch = (tx) => {
    const term = searchTerm.trim().toLowerCase();
    if (!term) return true;
    return [
      tx.description,
      tx.source?.name,
      tx.category?.description,
      tx.receipt?.companyName,
      ...(tx.matchCandidates || []).map((c) => c.receipt?.companyName),
    ].filter(Boolean).some((value) => String(value).toLowerCase().includes(term));
  };

  const visibleVeryHighCandidates = veryHighCandidates.filter(matchesSearch);
  const visibleNeedsReviewCandidates = needsReviewCandidates.filter(matchesSearch);
  const visibleConflictTransactions = conflictTransactions.filter(matchesSearch);
  const visibleUnmatchedTransactions = unmatchedTransactions.filter(matchesSearch);
  const visibleAutoMatched = autoMatched.filter(matchesSearch);
  const visibleUnmatchedReceipts = unmatchedReceipts.filter((receipt) => {
    const term = searchTerm.trim().toLowerCase();
    if (suspiciousReceiptDatesOnly && !getDateIssue(receipt.date)) return false;
    if (!term) return true;
    return [receipt.companyName, receipt.notes, receipt.text].filter(Boolean).some((value) => String(value).toLowerCase().includes(term));
  });
  const visibleReceiptPage = visibleUnmatchedReceipts.slice(0, 30);
  const selectedVisibleReceiptCount = visibleReceiptPage.filter((receipt) => selectedReceiptIds.has(receipt.id)).length;
  const allVisibleReceiptsSelected = visibleReceiptPage.length > 0 && selectedVisibleReceiptCount === visibleReceiptPage.length;

  const toggleVisibleReceiptSelection = () => {
    setSelectedReceiptIds((prev) => {
      const next = new Set(prev);
      if (allVisibleReceiptsSelected) {
        visibleReceiptPage.forEach((receipt) => next.delete(receipt.id));
      } else {
        visibleReceiptPage.forEach((receipt) => next.add(receipt.id));
      }
      return next;
    });
  };

  return (
    <div className="space-y-4">
      {/* Header */}
      <div className="flex flex-wrap items-center justify-between gap-3">
        <div>
          <h2 className="text-xl font-semibold">Receipt Matching Queue</h2>
          <p className="text-sm text-base-content/60 mt-0.5">
            Review, approve, or reject candidate receipt matches. High-confidence matches can be batch-approved.
          </p>
        </div>
        <div className="flex gap-2 flex-wrap">
          {visibleVeryHighCandidates.length > 0 && (
            <button
              type="button"
              className="btn btn-success btn-sm gap-2"
              onClick={handleBatchApprove}
              disabled={batchLoading}
            >
              {batchLoading ? <span className="loading loading-spinner loading-xs" /> : <ThumbsUp size={14} />}
              Approve all Very High ({visibleVeryHighCandidates.length})
            </button>
          )}
          <button type="button" className="btn btn-outline btn-sm gap-2" onClick={() => handleRefreshVisibleUnmatched({ broadSearch: false })} disabled={refreshLoading}>
            {refreshLoading ? <span className="loading loading-spinner loading-xs" /> : <Search size={14} />}
            Find candidates
          </button>
          <button type="button" className="btn btn-ghost btn-sm" onClick={() => handleRefreshVisibleUnmatched({ broadSearch: true })} disabled={refreshLoading}>
            Broad refresh
          </button>
          <button type="button" className="btn btn-outline btn-sm gap-2" onClick={fetchQueue} disabled={loading}>
            <RefreshCw size={14} className={loading ? 'animate-spin' : ''} />
            Refresh
          </button>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div className="flex flex-col md:flex-row gap-2">
        <label className="input input-bordered input-sm flex items-center gap-2 flex-1">
          <Search size={14} className="text-base-content/50" />
          <input
            type="search"
            className="grow"
            placeholder="Search merchant, transaction, source, category"
            value={searchTerm}
            onChange={(event) => setSearchTerm(event.target.value)}
          />
        </label>
        <div className="join">
          {[
            ['all', 'All'],
            ['ready', 'Ready'],
            ['review', 'Review'],
            ['conflicts', 'Conflicts'],
            ['unmatched', 'Unmatched'],
          ].map(([value, label]) => (
            <button
              key={value}
              type="button"
              className={`btn btn-sm join-item ${viewFilter === value ? 'btn-primary' : 'btn-outline'}`}
              onClick={() => setViewFilter(value)}
            >
              {label}
            </button>
          ))}
        </div>
        <label className="label cursor-pointer gap-2 justify-start md:justify-center">
          <input
            type="checkbox"
            className="checkbox checkbox-sm checkbox-warning"
            checked={suspiciousReceiptDatesOnly}
            onChange={(event) => setSuspiciousReceiptDatesOnly(event.target.checked)}
          />
          <span className="label-text text-sm whitespace-nowrap">Suspicious OCR dates</span>
        </label>
      </div>

      {/* Summary stats */}
      <div className="grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-5 gap-3">
        {[
          { label: 'High confidence', value: veryHighCandidates.length, color: 'text-success' },
          { label: 'Needs review', value: (summary?.candidatesFound ?? 0) - veryHighCandidates.length, color: 'text-warning' },
          { label: 'Auto-matched', value: summary?.autoMatchedPendingReview ?? 0, color: 'text-info' },
          { label: 'No receipt', value: summary?.unmatched ?? 0, color: 'text-base-content/60' },
          { label: 'Conflicts', value: summary?.conflicts ?? 0, color: 'text-error' },
        ].map(({ label, value, color }) => (
          <div key={label} className="stat bg-base-100 border border-base-300 rounded-box p-3">
            <div className="stat-title text-xs">{label}</div>
            <div className={`stat-value text-2xl ${color}`}>{value}</div>
          </div>
        ))}
      </div>

      {/* Auto-matched (pending user confirmation) */}
      {(viewFilter === 'all' || viewFilter === 'ready') && visibleAutoMatched.length > 0 && (
        <Section
          title="Auto-matched — confirm or override"
          icon={CheckCircle2}
          count={visibleAutoMatched.length}
          colorClass="text-success"
          defaultOpen={true}
        >
          <p className="text-sm text-base-content/60 mb-2">
            These were matched automatically at very high confidence. Confirm to mark as user-approved.
          </p>
          <div className="space-y-2">
            {visibleAutoMatched.map((tx) => (
              <AutoMatchedRow key={tx.id} tx={tx} onApprove={handleApprove} actionLoading={actionLoading} />
            ))}
          </div>
        </Section>
      )}

      {/* Very high confidence candidates */}
      {(viewFilter === 'all' || viewFilter === 'ready') && visibleVeryHighCandidates.length > 0 && (
        <Section
          title="High confidence — ready to approve"
          icon={GitMerge}
          count={visibleVeryHighCandidates.length}
          colorClass="text-success"
          defaultOpen={true}
        >
          <p className="text-sm text-base-content/60 mb-2">
            These candidates scored 92%+. Use the batch-approve button above or approve individually.
          </p>
          <div className="space-y-2">
            {visibleVeryHighCandidates.map((tx) => (
              <TransactionRow
                key={tx.id}
                tx={tx}
                onApprove={handleApprove}
                onReject={handleReject}
                onNoReceipt={handleNoReceipt}
                onSearchReceipts={handleSearchReceipts}
                onDirectMatch={handleDirectMatch}
                searchState={manualSearch}
                actionLoading={actionLoading}
              />
            ))}
          </div>
        </Section>
      )}

      {/* Needs review */}
      {(viewFilter === 'all' || viewFilter === 'review') && visibleNeedsReviewCandidates.length > 0 && (
        <Section
          title="Needs review"
          icon={Eye}
          count={visibleNeedsReviewCandidates.length}
          colorClass="text-warning"
          defaultOpen={visibleNeedsReviewCandidates.length <= 5}
        >
          <p className="text-sm text-base-content/60 mb-2">
            Medium or low confidence. Review the score breakdown before approving.
          </p>
          <div className="space-y-2">
            {visibleNeedsReviewCandidates.map((tx) => (
              <TransactionRow
                key={tx.id}
                tx={tx}
                onApprove={handleApprove}
                onReject={handleReject}
                onNoReceipt={handleNoReceipt}
                onSearchReceipts={handleSearchReceipts}
                onDirectMatch={handleDirectMatch}
                searchState={manualSearch}
                actionLoading={actionLoading}
              />
            ))}
          </div>
        </Section>
      )}

      {/* Conflicts */}
      {(viewFilter === 'all' || viewFilter === 'conflicts') && visibleConflictTransactions.length > 0 && (
        <Section
          title="Conflicts"
          icon={AlertTriangle}
          count={visibleConflictTransactions.length}
          colorClass="text-error"
        >
          <p className="text-sm text-base-content/60 mb-2">
            Multiple receipts scored similarly for the same transaction. Review each candidate carefully.
          </p>
          <div className="space-y-2">
            {visibleConflictTransactions.map((tx) => (
              <TransactionRow
                key={tx.id}
                tx={tx}
                onApprove={handleApprove}
                onReject={handleReject}
                onNoReceipt={handleNoReceipt}
                onSearchReceipts={handleSearchReceipts}
                onDirectMatch={handleDirectMatch}
                searchState={manualSearch}
                actionLoading={actionLoading}
              />
            ))}
          </div>
        </Section>
      )}

      {/* Unmatched expense transactions */}
      {(viewFilter === 'all' || viewFilter === 'unmatched') && visibleUnmatchedTransactions.length > 0 && (
        <Section
          title="No receipt found"
          icon={CircleDashed}
          count={visibleUnmatchedTransactions.length}
          colorClass="text-base-content/70"
        >
          <p className="text-sm text-base-content/60 mb-2">
            Expense transactions with no candidate receipts. Open a transaction to search or mark as no receipt required.
          </p>
          <div className="overflow-x-auto">
            <table className="table table-xs table-zebra">
              <thead>
                <tr>
                  <th>Date</th>
                  <th>Description</th>
                  <th className="text-right">Amount</th>
                  <th>Source</th>
                  <th></th>
                </tr>
              </thead>
              <tbody>
                {visibleUnmatchedTransactions.slice(0, 30).map((tx) => (
                  <tr key={tx.id}>
                    <td className="whitespace-nowrap">{fmtDate(tx.date)}</td>
                    <td className="max-w-[200px] truncate">{tx.description}</td>
                    <td className="text-right text-error whitespace-nowrap">{fmt(tx.amount)}</td>
                    <td className="whitespace-nowrap text-xs text-base-content/60">{tx.source?.name || '—'}</td>
                    <td className="whitespace-nowrap">
                      <div className="flex justify-end gap-1">
                        <button
                          type="button"
                          className="btn btn-outline btn-xs"
                          onClick={() => handleSearchReceipts(tx.id, { broadSearch: false })}
                          disabled={actionLoading || manualSearch[tx.id]?.loading}
                          title="Search receipt candidates"
                        >
                          {manualSearch[tx.id]?.loading ? <span className="loading loading-spinner loading-xs" /> : <Search size={12} />}
                        </button>
                        <button
                          type="button"
                          className="btn btn-ghost btn-xs"
                          onClick={() => handleNoReceipt(tx.id)}
                          disabled={actionLoading}
                          title="Mark as no receipt required"
                        >
                          <Banknote size={12} />
                        </button>
                      </div>
                    </td>
                  </tr>
                ))}
              </tbody>
            </table>
            {visibleUnmatchedTransactions.length > 30 && (
              <p className="text-xs text-base-content/50 mt-2 text-center">
                Showing 30 of {visibleUnmatchedTransactions.length} unmatched transactions.
              </p>
            )}
          </div>
          {Object.entries(manualSearch).some(([, state]) => state.receipts?.length || state.emailSearchSuggestion) && (
            <div className="mt-3 space-y-3">
              {visibleUnmatchedTransactions
                .filter((tx) => manualSearch[tx.id]?.receipts || manualSearch[tx.id]?.emailSearchSuggestion)
                .map((tx) => (
                  <TransactionRow
                    key={`manual-${tx.id}`}
                    tx={{ ...tx, matchCandidates: [] }}
                    onApprove={handleApprove}
                    onReject={handleReject}
                    onNoReceipt={handleNoReceipt}
                    onSearchReceipts={handleSearchReceipts}
                    onDirectMatch={handleDirectMatch}
                    searchState={manualSearch}
                    actionLoading={actionLoading}
                  />
                ))}
            </div>
          )}
        </Section>
      )}

      {/* Unmatched receipts */}
      {(viewFilter === 'all' || viewFilter === 'unmatched') && visibleUnmatchedReceipts.length > 0 && (
        <Section
          title="Unmatched receipts"
          icon={Receipt}
          count={visibleUnmatchedReceipts.length}
          colorClass="text-base-content/70"
        >
          <p className="text-sm text-base-content/60 mb-2">
            Imported receipts that still need a bank match. Use view/edit to fix bad OCR fields, then find a transaction match.
          </p>
          <div className="mb-2 flex flex-wrap items-center gap-2">
            <button
              type="button"
              className="btn btn-outline btn-xs gap-1"
              onClick={handleBatchSearchSelectedReceipts}
              disabled={batchReceiptSearchLoading || selectedReceiptIds.size === 0}
            >
              {batchReceiptSearchLoading ? <span className="loading loading-spinner loading-xs" /> : <Search size={12} />}
              Search selected ({selectedReceiptIds.size})
            </button>
            <button
              type="button"
              className="btn btn-ghost btn-xs"
              onClick={() => {
                setSelectedReceiptIds(new Set());
                setReceiptMatchSearch({});
              }}
              disabled={selectedReceiptIds.size === 0 && Object.keys(receiptMatchSearch).length === 0}
            >
              Clear
            </button>
          </div>
          <div className="overflow-x-auto">
            <table className="table table-xs table-zebra">
              <thead>
                <tr>
                  <th>
                    <input
                      type="checkbox"
                      className="checkbox checkbox-xs"
                      checked={allVisibleReceiptsSelected}
                      onChange={toggleVisibleReceiptSelection}
                      aria-label="Select visible receipts"
                    />
                  </th>
                  <th>Date</th>
                  <th>Merchant</th>
                  <th className="text-right">Total</th>
                  <th className="text-right">HST</th>
                  <th></th>
                </tr>
              </thead>
              <tbody>
                {visibleReceiptPage.map((r) => (
                  <UnmatchedReceiptRow
                    key={r.id}
                    receipt={r}
                    checked={selectedReceiptIds.has(r.id)}
                    searchState={receiptMatchSearch[r.id]}
                    actionLoading={actionLoading}
                    onToggleSelected={toggleReceiptSelected}
                    onView={setSelectedReceipt}
                    onMatch={setReceiptToMatch}
                    onSearch={handleSearchTransactionsForReceipt}
                    onDirectMatch={handleDirectMatch}
                  />
                ))}
              </tbody>
            </table>
            {visibleUnmatchedReceipts.length > 30 && (
              <p className="text-xs text-base-content/50 mt-2 text-center">
                Showing 30 of {visibleUnmatchedReceipts.length} unmatched receipts.
              </p>
            )}
          </div>
        </Section>
      )}

      {/* All clear */}
      {!candidateTransactions.length && !unmatchedTransactions.length && !unmatchedReceipts.length && !autoMatched.length && !conflictTransactions.length && (
        <div className="text-center py-16 text-base-content/50">
          <CheckCircle2 size={40} className="mx-auto mb-3 text-success" />
          <p className="font-semibold">All caught up!</p>
          <p className="text-sm">No receipt matching work needed right now.</p>
        </div>
      )}

      {selectedReceipt && (
        <ReceiptsDetails
          receipt={selectedReceipt}
          onClose={() => setSelectedReceipt(null)}
          onUpdate={handleReceiptUpdated}
        />
      )}

      {receiptToMatch && (
        <MatchReceiptModal
          receipt={receiptToMatch}
          onClose={() => setReceiptToMatch(null)}
          onMatched={async () => {
            setReceiptToMatch(null);
            await fetchQueue();
          }}
        />
      )}
    </div>
  );
};

export default ReceiptMatchingQueue;

```

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
FILE: client/services/accounting/components/ReviewQueueTab.jsx
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
```jsx
// Full path: /home/luanngo/boss-dev/client/services/accounting/components/ReviewQueueTab.jsx
import React, { useCallback, useEffect, useMemo, useState } from 'react';
import { fetchWithAuth } from '@/shared/utils/fetchWithAuth';
import { toast } from 'react-toastify';
import { Bot, CheckCircle2, RefreshCw, Sparkles, XCircle, GitBranch, Wand2 } from 'lucide-react';
import AccountingRuleDraftReview from './AccountingRuleDraftReview';
import { formatMoney } from "../utils/formatAccounting";

const initialEditor = {
  accountCode: '',
  transactionType: '',
  taxTreatment: '',
  journalText: '',
  applyToSimilar: true,
};

const ReviewQueueTab = ({ selectedTransactionIds = [], workflow = null, onNavigate = null }) => {
  const [items, setItems] = useState([]);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);
  const [workingId, setWorkingId] = useState(null);
  const [editorById, setEditorById] = useState({});
  const [ruleDraftById, setRuleDraftById] = useState({});

  const fetchQueue = useCallback(async () => {
    try {
      setLoading(true);
      const res = await fetchWithAuth(`${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL}/accounting/review-queue?limit=50`);
      const data = await res.json().catch(() => ({}));
      if (!res.ok) throw new Error(data.error || 'Failed to load review queue.');
      const nextItems = Array.isArray(data.items) ? data.items : [];
      setItems(nextItems);
      setEditorById((current) => {
        const copy = { ...current };
        nextItems.forEach((item) => {
          if (!copy[item.transactionId]) {
            copy[item.transactionId] = {
              ...initialEditor,
              accountId: item.proposal?.likelyAccount?.id || '',
              accountCode: item.proposal?.likelyAccount?.code || '',
              transactionType: item.proposal?.likelyTransactionType || item.transaction?.postingType || '',
              taxTreatment: item.proposal?.likelyTaxTreatment || 'NO_TAX',
              journalText: JSON.stringify(item.proposal?.likelyJournalLines || [], null, 2),
            };
          }
        });
        return copy;
      });
    } catch (error) {
      toast.error(error.message || 'Failed to load manual proposals.');
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  }, []);

  useEffect(() => {
    fetchQueue();
  }, [fetchQueue]);

  const handleGenerateForSelected = async () => {
    if (!selectedTransactionIds.length) {
      toast.info('Select transactions first to generate proposals in batch.');
      return;
    }
    try {
      setLoading(true);
      const res = await fetchWithAuth(`${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL}/accounting/review-queue/propose-selected`, {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
        body: JSON.stringify({ transactionIds: selectedTransactionIds }),
      });
      const data = await res.json().catch(() => ({}));
      if (!res.ok) throw new Error(data.error || 'Failed to generate proposals.');
      toast.success(data.message || 'Proposals generated.');
      fetchQueue();
    } catch (error) {
      toast.error(error.message || 'Failed to generate proposals.');
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  };

  const updateEditor = (transactionId, field, value) => {
    setEditorById((current) => ({
      ...current,
      [transactionId]: {
        ...(current[transactionId] || initialEditor),
        [field]: value,
      },
    }));
  };

  const parseJournalLines = (raw) => {
    const value = String(raw || '').trim();
    if (!value) return [];
    try {
      const parsed = JSON.parse(value);
      return Array.isArray(parsed) ? parsed : [];
    } catch {
      return [];
    }
  };

  const handleApprove = async (item) => {
    const editor = editorById[item.transactionId] || initialEditor;
    try {
      setWorkingId(item.transactionId);
      const res = await fetchWithAuth(`${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL}/accounting/review-queue/${item.transactionId}/approve`, {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
        body: JSON.stringify({
          accountId: editor.accountId || null,
          accountCode: editor.accountCode || null,
          transactionType: editor.transactionType || null,
          taxTreatment: editor.taxTreatment || null,
          journalLines: parseJournalLines(editor.journalText),
          applyToSimilar: Boolean(editor.applyToSimilar),
          targetTransactionIds: item.proposal?.batchPreview?.candidateIds || [],
        }),
      });
      const data = await res.json().catch(() => ({}));
      if (!res.ok) throw new Error(data.error || 'Failed to approve proposal.');
      toast.success(data.message || 'Proposal approved.');
      fetchQueue();
    } catch (error) {
      toast.error(error.message || 'Failed to approve proposal.');
    } finally {
      setWorkingId(null);
    }
  };

  const handleReject = async (item) => {
    try {
      setWorkingId(item.transactionId);
      const res = await fetchWithAuth(`${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL}/accounting/review-queue/${item.transactionId}/reject`, {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
        body: JSON.stringify({ reason: 'Rejected from manual proposal UI.' }),
      });
      const data = await res.json().catch(() => ({}));
      if (!res.ok) throw new Error(data.error || 'Failed to reject proposal.');
      toast.success('Proposal rejected.');
      fetchQueue();
    } catch (error) {
      toast.error(error.message || 'Failed to reject proposal.');
    } finally {
      setWorkingId(null);
    }
  };

  const handleSuggestRule = async (item) => {
    const editor = editorById[item.transactionId] || initialEditor;
    try {
      setWorkingId(item.transactionId);
      const res = await fetchWithAuth(`${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL}/accounting/review-queue/${item.transactionId}/create-rule-draft`, {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
        body: JSON.stringify({
          accountId: editor.accountId || null,
          accountCode: editor.accountCode || null,
          transactionType: editor.transactionType || null,
          taxTreatment: editor.taxTreatment || null,
          journalLines: parseJournalLines(editor.journalText),
        }),
      });
      const data = await res.json().catch(() => ({}));
      if (!res.ok) throw new Error(data.error || 'Failed to draft rule.');
      setRuleDraftById((current) => ({
        ...current,
        [item.transactionId]: {
          draft: data.draft || null,
          matchedTransactionCount: data.matchedTransactionCount || 0,
          sampleTransactionIds: data.sampleTransactionIds || [],
          sampleTransactions: data.sampleTransactions || [],
        },
      }));
      toast.success(data.message || 'Rule suggestion ready for review.');
    } catch (error) {
      toast.error(error.message || 'Failed to draft rule.');
    } finally {
      setWorkingId(null);
    }
  };

  const handleApproveRuleDraft = async (item) => {
    const draftState = ruleDraftById[item.transactionId];
    const draft = draftState?.draft || null;
    if (!draft) {
      toast.info('Generate a rule suggestion first.');
      return;
    }
    try {
      setWorkingId(item.transactionId);
      const res = await fetchWithAuth(`${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL}/accounting/review-queue/${item.transactionId}/create-rule/approve`, {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
        body: JSON.stringify({ draft }),
      });
      const data = await res.json().catch(() => ({}));
      if (!res.ok) throw new Error(data.error || 'Failed to save approved rule.');
      setRuleDraftById((current) => {
        const copy = { ...current };
        delete copy[item.transactionId];
        return copy;
      });
      toast.success(data.message || 'Rule approved and saved.');
    } catch (error) {
      toast.error(error.message || 'Failed to save approved rule.');
    } finally {
      setWorkingId(null);
    }
  };

  const selectedIdSet = useMemo(
    () => new Set((selectedTransactionIds || []).map((value) => Number(value))),
    [selectedTransactionIds]
  );

  const sortedItems = useMemo(() => {
    const scopedItems = selectedIdSet.size
      ? items.filter((item) => selectedIdSet.has(Number(item.transactionId)))
      : items;
    return [...scopedItems].sort((a, b) => new Date(b.transaction?.date || 0) - new Date(a.transaction?.date || 0));
  }, [items, selectedIdSet]);

  return (
    <div className="space-y-5 p-3 bg-base-100 rounded-box">
      {workflow?.activatedAt && (
        <div className="rounded-box border border-primary/30 bg-primary/5 p-4">
          <div className="flex flex-col gap-3 lg:flex-row lg:items-start lg:justify-between">
            <div>
              <div className="text-sm font-semibold text-primary">{workflow.title || 'AI Manager workflow'}</div>
              <p className="mt-1 text-sm text-base-content/75">
                Review generated proposals for the issue transactions. After a proposal looks right, use Suggest rule to make the pattern reusable.
              </p>
              <div className="mt-2 flex flex-wrap gap-2">
                {workflow.toolName && <span className="badge badge-outline">Use: {workflow.toolName}</span>}
                {selectedIdSet.size > 0 && <span className="badge badge-outline">{selectedIdSet.size} issue records scoped</span>}
              </div>
            </div>
            <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2">
              <button type="button" className="btn btn-sm btn-primary" onClick={handleGenerateForSelected} disabled={loading || selectedIdSet.size === 0}>
                {loading ? <span className="loading loading-spinner loading-xs" /> : <Bot size={14} />}
                Generate for issue records
              </button>
              <button type="button" className="btn btn-sm btn-outline" onClick={() => onNavigate?.('transactions')}>
                Back to filtered transactions
              </button>
              <button type="button" className="btn btn-sm btn-outline" onClick={() => onNavigate?.('ai-rule-suggestions')}>
                AI rule suggestions
              </button>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      )}
      <div className="flex flex-col gap-3 lg:flex-row lg:items-center lg:justify-between">
        <div>
          <h3 className="text-lg font-semibold flex items-center gap-2"><Sparkles size={20} /> Manual Proposals</h3>
          <p className="text-sm text-base-content/70">Proposal generation can now carry journal-entry lines through approval and rule creation, not just category and tax.</p>
        </div>
        <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2">
          <button type="button" className="btn btn-outline btn-sm" onClick={fetchQueue}><RefreshCw size={14} /> Refresh</button>
          <button type="button" className="btn btn-outline btn-sm" onClick={handleGenerateForSelected} disabled={loading}>
            {loading ? <span className="loading loading-spinner loading-xs"></span> : <Bot size={14} />} Generate for selected ({selectedTransactionIds.length})
          </button>
        </div>
      </div>

      {loading ? (
        <div className="py-12 text-center"><span className="loading loading-spinner loading-lg" /></div>
      ) : sortedItems.length === 0 ? (
        <div className="alert">
          <span>
            {selectedIdSet.size
              ? 'No proposals are waiting for the scoped issue records yet. Generate for selected first, then review them here.'
              : 'No proposals are waiting for review.'}
          </span>
        </div>
      ) : (
        <div className="space-y-4">
          {sortedItems.map((item) => {
            const editor = editorById[item.transactionId] || initialEditor;
            const ruleDraftState = ruleDraftById[item.transactionId] || null;
            const suggestedRule = ruleDraftState?.draft || null;
            return (
              <div key={item.transactionId} className="card bg-base-100 border border-base-300 shadow-sm">
                <div className="card-body gap-4">
                  <div className="flex flex-col gap-3 lg:flex-row lg:items-start lg:justify-between">
                    <div className="space-y-2">
                      <div className="text-sm uppercase tracking-wide text-base-content/60">{item.transaction?.postingType || item.proposal?.likelyTransactionType || 'BANK_EXPENSE'}</div>
                      <div className="text-xl font-semibold">{item.transaction?.description}</div>
                      <div className="text-sm text-base-content/70">{new Date(item.transaction?.date).toLocaleDateString()} · {formatMoney(item.transaction?.amount)}</div>
                      {item.transaction?.category ? <div className="badge badge-outline">Current category: {item.transaction.category.code} — {item.transaction.category.description}</div> : null}
                      {item.proposal?.likelyAccount ? <div className="badge badge-primary badge-outline">Primary proposed account: {item.proposal.likelyAccount.code} — {item.proposal.likelyAccount.description}</div> : null}
                      {item.proposal?.explanation ? <div className="text-sm text-base-content/80">{item.proposal.explanation}</div> : null}
                      {item.proposal?.confidence != null ? <div className="text-xs text-base-content/60">Confidence: {Math.round(Number(item.proposal.confidence || 0) * 100)}%</div> : null}
                      {item.proposal?.batchPreview?.similarCount ? <div className="text-xs text-base-content/60">Also apply batch: {item.proposal.batchPreview.similarCount} similar uncategorized transactions</div> : null}
                    </div>
                    <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2">
                      <button type="button" className="btn btn-outline btn-sm" onClick={() => handleSuggestRule(item)} disabled={workingId === item.transactionId}><Wand2 size={14} /> Suggest rule</button>
                      <button type="button" className="btn btn-ghost btn-sm text-error" onClick={() => handleReject(item)} disabled={workingId === item.transactionId}><XCircle size={14} /> Reject</button>
                      <button type="button" className="btn btn-primary btn-sm" onClick={() => handleApprove(item)} disabled={workingId === item.transactionId}>
                        {workingId === item.transactionId ? <span className="loading loading-spinner loading-sm" /> : <CheckCircle2 size={14} />} Approve
                      </button>
                    </div>
                  </div>

                  <div className="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-2 gap-3">
                    <label className="form-control">
                      <span className="label-text">Account ID</span>
                      <input className="input input-bordered" value={editor.accountId} onChange={(e) => updateEditor(item.transactionId, 'accountId', e.target.value)} placeholder="Optional account id override" />
                    </label>
                    <label className="form-control">
                      <span className="label-text">Account code</span>
                      <input className="input input-bordered" value={editor.accountCode} onChange={(e) => updateEditor(item.transactionId, 'accountCode', e.target.value)} placeholder="8810" />
                    </label>
                    <label className="form-control">
                      <span className="label-text">Transaction type</span>
                      <input className="input input-bordered" value={editor.transactionType} onChange={(e) => updateEditor(item.transactionId, 'transactionType', e.target.value)} />
                    </label>
                    <label className="form-control">
                      <span className="label-text">Tax treatment</span>
                      <input className="input input-bordered" value={editor.taxTreatment} onChange={(e) => updateEditor(item.transactionId, 'taxTreatment', e.target.value)} />
                    </label>
                    <label className="form-control lg:col-span-2">
                      <span className="label-text flex items-center gap-2"><GitBranch size={14} /> Journal entry lines (JSON)</span>
                      <textarea className="textarea textarea-bordered h-40 font-mono text-sm" value={editor.journalText} onChange={(e) => updateEditor(item.transactionId, 'journalText', e.target.value)} />
                    </label>
                  </div>

                  {Array.isArray(item.proposal?.likelyJournalLines) && item.proposal.likelyJournalLines.length ? (
                    <div className="space-y-2">
                      <div className="font-semibold">Proposed journal entry</div>
                      <div className="overflow-x-auto">
                        <table className="table table-sm">
                          <thead>
                            <tr><th>Account</th><th>Debit</th><th>Credit</th></tr>
                          </thead>
                          <tbody>
                            {item.proposal.likelyJournalLines.map((line, index) => (
                              <tr key={`${item.transactionId}-${index}`}>
                                <td>{line.label || `${line.accountCode || ''} ${line.accountDescription || ''}`.trim()}</td>
                                <td>{line.debit ? formatMoney(line.debit) : '—'}</td>
                                <td>{line.credit ? formatMoney(line.credit) : '—'}</td>
                              </tr>
                            ))}
                          </tbody>
                        </table>
                      </div>
                    </div>
                  ) : null}

                  <AccountingRuleDraftReview
                    draft={suggestedRule}
                    matchedTransactionCount={ruleDraftState?.matchedTransactionCount || 1}
                    approving={workingId === item.transactionId}
                    formatAmount={formatMoney}
                    onDismiss={() => setRuleDraftById((current) => {
                      const copy = { ...current };
                      delete copy[item.transactionId];
                      return copy;
                    })}
                    onApprove={() => handleApproveRuleDraft(item)}
                  />
                </div>
              </div>
            );
          })}
        </div>
      )}
    </div>
  );
};

export default ReviewQueueTab;

```

FILE: client/services/accounting/components/RulesAndAIReview.jsx

```jsx
// Full path: /home/luanngo/boss-dev/client/services/accounting/components/RulesAndAIReview.jsx
'use client';
import React, { useState } from 'react';
import { Sparkles, CheckCircle, Shield, Sliders } from 'lucide-react';
import AIRuleSuggestionsTab from './AIRuleSuggestionsTab';
import AccountingAuditTab from './AccountingAuditTab';
import AccountingPromptsTab from './AccountingPromptsTab';
import AccountingRulesManager from './AccountingRules';

const SUB_TABS = [
  { id: 'suggestions', label: 'Rule Review', Icon: Sparkles },
  { id: 'rules', label: 'Approved Rules', Icon: CheckCircle },
  { id: 'audit', label: 'Audit / Issues', Icon: Shield },
  { id: 'prompts', label: 'Prompt / Policy', Icon: Sliders },
];

export default function RulesAndAIReview({ onNavigate, onOpenWorkflow }) {
  const [subTab, setSubTab] = useState('suggestions');
  const [selectedIds, setSelectedIds] = useState(new Set());
  const selectedIdsArray = React.useMemo(() => Array.from(selectedIds), [selectedIds]);

  return (
    <div>
      <div className="flex items-center gap-1 p-1 bg-slate-100 rounded-xl w-fit mb-4">
        {SUB_TABS.map(({ id, label, Icon }) => (
          <button
            key={id}
            className={`px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium rounded-lg transition-all ${
              subTab === id
                ? 'bg-white text-indigo-700 shadow-sm border border-slate-200'
                : 'text-slate-500 hover:text-slate-700'
            }`}
            onClick={() => setSubTab(id)}
          >
            <span className="flex items-center gap-1.5">
              <Icon size={16} /> {label}
            </span>
          </button>
        ))}
      </div>

      {subTab === 'suggestions' && (
        <AIRuleSuggestionsTab onNavigate={onNavigate} onOpenWorkflow={onOpenWorkflow} />
      )}

      {subTab === 'rules' && (
        <AccountingRulesManager selectedIds={selectedIdsArray} />
      )}

      {subTab === 'audit' && (
        <AccountingAuditTab onNavigate={onNavigate} />
      )}

      {subTab === 'prompts' && (
        <AccountingPromptsTab />
      )}
    </div>
  );
}
```
