FILE: client/services/accounting/components/TipDetailModal.jsx
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
```jsx
// Full path: /home/luanngo/boss-dev/client/services/accounting/components/TipDetailModal.jsx
import React, { useState, useMemo, useEffect } from 'react';
import { format, parseISO } from 'date-fns';
import moment from 'moment-timezone';

const TipDetailModal = ({
  isOpen,
  onClose,
  date, // The specific date this modal is for (YYYY-MM-DD string)
  data, // Augmented tip data (includes server tips + temporary custom tips)
  isLoading,
  onSaveCustomTip,     // Callback: (tipDetails, editingId) => boolean (success)
  onDeleteCustomTip,   // Callback: (customTipLogId) => void
  defaultCustomTipStartTime // Suggested start time for new custom tip form
}) => {
  const [showCustomTipForm, setShowCustomTipForm] = useState(false);
  const [editingTipData, setEditingTipData] = useState(null); // Holds data of tip being edited: { id, amount, startTime, endTime }

  // Local state for the custom tip form inputs
  const [formAmount, setFormAmount] = useState('');
  const [formStartTime, setFormStartTime] = useState('');
  const [formEndTime, setFormEndTime] = useState('');

  useEffect(() => {
    // Pre-fill form if editingTipData changes (i.e., user clicks "Edit")
    // Or set default start time if adding new for the current modal's date
    if (editingTipData) {
      setFormAmount(String(editingTipData.amount || ''));
      setFormStartTime(editingTipData.startTime ? moment(editingTipData.startTime).format('YYYY-MM-DDTHH:mm') : '');
      setFormEndTime(editingTipData.endTime ? moment(editingTipData.endTime).format('YYYY-MM-DDTHH:mm') : '');
    } else if (showCustomTipForm && date) {
      // Default for new tip: current modal date, around noon.
      const defaultStart = moment(date).startOf('day').add(12, 'hours').format('YYYY-MM-DDTHH:mm');
      const defaultEnd = moment(date).startOf('day').add(14, 'hours').format('YYYY-MM-DDTHH:mm');
      setFormStartTime(defaultStart);
      setFormEndTime(defaultEnd);
      setFormAmount(''); // Clear amount for new tip
    }
  }, [editingTipData, showCustomTipForm, date]);


  const dailyTotalTip = useMemo(() => {
    if (!data || data.length === 0) return 0;
    return data.reduce((sum, txDetail) => sum + parseFloat(txDetail.totalTip || 0), 0);
  }, [data]);

  if (!isOpen) return null;

  const formatLocalTime = (localTimeString) => {
    return moment(localTimeString).format('h:mm:ss A');
  };

  const handleToggleCustomTipForm = (tipToEdit = null) => {
    if (tipToEdit) { // Editing existing custom tip
        setEditingTipData({
            id: tipToEdit.customTipLogId, // The ID from customTipsLog
            amount: tipToEdit.originalAmount,
            startTime: tipToEdit.startTime,
            endTime: tipToEdit.endTime,
        });
    } else { // Adding new custom tip
        setEditingTipData(null); // Clear any prior editing state
    }
    setShowCustomTipForm(true); // Always show form when this is called
  };
  
  const handleCustomTipFormSubmit = (e) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    if (!onSaveCustomTip) return;

    const success = onSaveCustomTip(
      { amount: formAmount, startTime: formStartTime, endTime: formEndTime },
      editingTipData ? editingTipData.id : null
    );

    if (success) {
      setShowCustomTipForm(false);
      setEditingTipData(null);
      setFormAmount('');
      setFormStartTime('');
      setFormEndTime('');
    }
    // If not successful, onSaveCustomTip should show a toast, and form remains open.
  };

  const handleCancelCustomTipForm = () => {
    setShowCustomTipForm(false);
    setEditingTipData(null);
    setFormAmount('');
    setFormStartTime('');
    setFormEndTime('');
  };

  const handleDeleteClick = (customTipLogId) => {
    if (window.confirm("Are you sure you want to remove this temporary custom tip?")) {
        onDeleteCustomTip(customTipLogId);
    }
  };


  return (
    <div className="modal modal-open">
      <div className="modal-box max-w-4xl relative"> {/* Added relative for spinner positioning */}
        <div className="flex justify-between items-center mb-2">
          <h3 className="font-bold text-lg">
            Detailed Tip Distribution for {date ? format(parseISO(date), 'EEEE, MMMM d, yyyy') : 'N/A'}
          </h3>
          {!isLoading && dailyTotalTip > 0 && (
            <span className="font-semibold text-lg">Day Total Tips: ${dailyTotalTip.toFixed(2)}</span>
          )}
        </div>
        <button onClick={onClose} className="btn btn-sm btn-circle btn-ghost absolute right-2 top-2">✕</button>

        {/* Section for Adding/Editing Custom Tip */}
        <div className="my-4 p-3 bg-base-300/30 rounded-md">
          {showCustomTipForm ? (
            <form onSubmit={handleCustomTipFormSubmit}>
              <h4 className="text-md font-semibold mb-2">
                {editingTipData ? 'Edit Temporary Custom Tip' : 'Add New Temporary Custom Tip for this Day'}
              </h4>
              <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-3">
                <div>
                  <label className="label-text pb-1">Amount ($)</label>
                  <input type="number" value={formAmount} onChange={e => setFormAmount(e.target.value)} placeholder="100.00" className="input input-sm input-bordered w-full" step="0.01" required />
                </div>
                <div>
                  <label className="label-text pb-1">Start Time</label>
                  <input type="datetime-local" value={formStartTime} onChange={e => setFormStartTime(e.target.value)} className="input input-sm input-bordered w-full" required />
                </div>
                <div>
                  <label className="label-text pb-1">End Time</label>
                  <input type="datetime-local" value={formEndTime} onChange={e => setFormEndTime(e.target.value)} className="input input-sm input-bordered w-full" required />
                </div>
              </div>
              <div className="flex justify-end gap-2 mt-3">
                <button type="button" onClick={handleCancelCustomTipForm} className="btn btn-sm btn-ghost">Cancel</button>
                <button type="submit" className="btn btn-sm btn-primary">{editingTipData ? 'Update Tip' : 'Add Tip'}</button>
              </div>
            </form>
          ) : (
            <button onClick={() => handleToggleCustomTipForm()} className="btn btn-sm btn-outline btn-accent">
              Add Temporary Custom Tip for {date ? format(parseISO(date), 'MMM d') : ''}
            </button>
          )}
        </div>
        {/* End Custom Tip Form Section */}
        
        <div className="mt-4 max-h-[60vh] overflow-y-auto pr-1"> {/* Adjusted max-h */}
          {isLoading ? (
            <div className="absolute inset-0 flex justify-center items-center bg-base-100/50 backdrop-blur-sm z-10">
                <span className="loading loading-spinner loading-lg text-primary"></span>
            </div>
          ) : !data || data.length === 0 ? (
            <p className="text-center italic py-6">No tip transactions found for this date. You can add a temporary custom tip above.</p>
          ) : (
            <div className="space-y-4">
              {data.map((txDetail) => ( // Removed index as txDetail.transactionId should be unique enough, or use customTipLogId for custom ones
                <div key={txDetail.transactionId || txDetail.customTipLogId} className={`card card-compact shadow ${txDetail.isCustom ? 'bg-blue-100/60 border border-blue-300' : 'bg-base-200'}`}>
                  <div className="card-body">
                    <div className="flex justify-between items-start text-sm mb-2 flex-wrap">
                      <div>
                        <span className="font-semibold">Time (Local):</span> {formatLocalTime(txDetail.transactionTimeLocal)}
                        {txDetail.isCustom && <span className="badge badge-info badge-outline badge-xs ml-2">Custom Tip</span>}
                        <br />
                        <span className="font-semibold">Total Tip:</span> ${parseFloat(txDetail.totalTip || 0).toFixed(2)}
                        {txDetail.undistributedAmount > 0.001 && !txDetail.isCustom && ( // Don't show undistributed for custom even split
                          <> <br/><span className="font-semibold text-warning">Undistributed:</span> <span className="text-warning ml-1">${txDetail.undistributedAmount.toFixed(2)}</span></>
                        )}
                      </div>
                      <div className="text-right">
                        <span className="font-semibold">Rule ({txDetail.ruleApplied?.ruleKey || 'N/A'}):</span>
                        {!txDetail.isCustom && txDetail.ruleApplied && (
                          <> <br/> <span className="ml-1 px-1 py-0.5 bg-green-100 text-green-800 rounded text-xs">S: {txDetail.ruleApplied.server}%</span> <span className="ml-1 px-1 py-0.5 bg-red-100 text-red-800 rounded text-xs">K: {txDetail.ruleApplied.kitchen}%</span> <span className="ml-1 px-1 py-0.5 bg-orange-100 text-orange-800 rounded text-xs">Su: {txDetail.ruleApplied.support}%</span></>
                        )}
                      </div>
                    </div>

                    {txDetail.distribution && txDetail.distribution.length > 0 ? (
                      <div className="overflow-x-auto">
                        <table className="table table-xs w-full">
                          <thead className="bg-base-300/70">
                            <tr><th>Employee</th><th>Role</th><th>Amount Received</th></tr>
                          </thead>
                          <tbody>
                            {txDetail.distribution.map((emp, empIndex) => (
                              <tr key={emp.userId || empIndex}><td>{emp.name}</td><td className="capitalize">{emp.role}</td><td>${parseFloat(emp.amountReceived || 0).toFixed(2)}</td></tr>
                            ))}
                          </tbody>
                        </table>
                      </div>
                    ) : (
                      <p className="text-xs italic text-center py-1">{txDetail.totalTip > 0 ? "No employees found matching distribution criteria." : "No distribution (Tip was $0 or details missing)."}</p>
                    )}

                    {/* Edit/Delete buttons for Custom Temporary Tips */}
                    {txDetail.isCustom && txDetail.source === 'USER_ADDED_TEMPORARY' && (
                        <div className="card-actions justify-end mt-2">
                            <button onClick={() => handleToggleCustomTipForm(txDetail)} className="btn btn-xs btn-outline btn-info">Edit</button>
                            <button onClick={() => handleDeleteClick(txDetail.customTipLogId)} className="btn btn-xs btn-outline btn-error">Delete</button>
                        </div>
                    )}
                  </div>
                </div>
              ))}
            </div>
          )}
        </div>

        <div className="modal-action mt-6">
          <button className="btn btn-sm btn-primary" onClick={onClose}>Close</button>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div className="modal-backdrop" onClick={onClose}></div> {/* Added for consistency, though modal-open should handle it */}
    </div>
  );
};

export default TipDetailModal;
```

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
FILE: client/services/accounting/components/TransactionDetailsModal.jsx
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
```jsx
// Full path: /home/luanngo/boss-dev/client/services/accounting/components/TransactionDetailsModal.jsx
// Full path: /home/luan_ngo/boss/client/services/accounting/components/TransactionDetailsModal.js
import React, { useCallback, useContext, useEffect, useMemo, useState } from 'react';
import { toast } from 'react-toastify';
import { fetchWithAuth } from '@/shared/utils/fetchWithAuth';
import { Save, Search, Link, Link2Off, RefreshCw, BookOpen, Percent, Wand2, MailSearch } from 'lucide-react';
import Tooltip from '@/shared/components/Tooltip';
import { AuthContext } from '@/shared/context/AuthContext';
import ImportReceiptFromEmailModal from '@/services/receipt/components/ImportReceiptFromEmailModal';
import AccountingRuleDraftReview from './AccountingRuleDraftReview';
import { formatCurrency, formatPercent, formatDateInputValue } from '../utils/formatAccounting';
import AccountAutocomplete from './AccountAutocomplete';

const getCategoryLabel = (category) => {
  if (!category) return '';
  if (category.code && category.description) return `${category.code} · ${category.description}`;
  return category.description || category.code || '';
};

const getJournalLineLabel = (line) => {
  if (line?.account?.code && line?.account?.description) {
    return `${line.account.code} · ${line.account.description}`;
  }
  if (line?.account?.description) return line.account.description;
  if (line?.account?.code) return line.account.code;
  return line?.accountId || 'Unknown account';
};

const transactionTypeOptions = [
  { value: '', label: 'Auto-detect' },
  { value: 'BANK_EXPENSE', label: 'Bank expense' },
  { value: 'BANK_REVENUE', label: 'Bank revenue' },
  { value: 'TRANSFER', label: 'Transfer' },
  { value: 'CREDIT_CARD_PAYMENT', label: 'Credit card payment' },
  { value: 'PAYROLL_PAYMENT', label: 'Payroll payment' },
  { value: 'TAX_REMITTANCE', label: 'Tax remittance' },
  { value: 'OWNER_DRAW', label: 'Owner draw' },
  { value: 'OWNER_CONTRIBUTION', label: 'Owner contribution' },
];

const taxTreatmentOptions = [
  { value: 'NO_TAX', label: 'No tax' },
  { value: 'INPUT_TAX_CREDIT', label: 'Input tax credit' },
  { value: 'SALES_TAX_PAYABLE', label: 'Sales tax payable' },
];

const forceNoTaxPostingTypes = new Set([
  'PAYROLL_FUNDING',
  'PAYROLL_PAYMENT',
  'PAYROLL_REMITTANCE',
  'TAX_REMITTANCE',
  'TRANSFER',
  'CREDIT_CARD_PAYMENT',
  'PAYMENT_PROCESSOR_PAYOUT',
  'PAYMENT_PROCESSOR_REVERSAL',
  'OWNER_DRAW',
  'OWNER_CONTRIBUTION',
]);
const stopWords = new Set(['visa', 'debit', 'credit', 'purchase', 'payment', 'bank', 'transaction', 'online', 'pos', 'fee', 'service', 'statement']);

const normalizeText = (value) => String(value || '')
  .normalize('NFD')
  .replace(/[\u0300-\u036f]/g, '')
  .toLowerCase()
  .replace(/[^a-z0-9\s]/g, ' ')
  .replace(/\s+/g, ' ')
  .trim();

const isRisePayrollFundingTransaction = (transaction = {}) =>
  Number(transaction?.amount || 0) < 0 &&
  normalizeText(transaction?.description).includes('rise cap') &&
  String(transaction?.source?.type || transaction?.sourceType || '').toUpperCase() !== 'CREDIT_CARD';

const isTaxActionBlocked = (transaction = {}) => {
  const postingType = String(transaction?.postingType || '').trim().toUpperCase();
  return forceNoTaxPostingTypes.has(postingType) || isRisePayrollFundingTransaction(transaction);
};

const getTaxActionBlockReason = (transaction = {}) => {
  if (isRisePayrollFundingTransaction(transaction)) {
    return 'This is a Rise payroll-funding withdrawal from TD Chequing. Debit Payroll Clearing and credit TD Chequing. The detailed wage, employer CPP/EI, payroll-fee, and HST allocation comes from the Rise payroll report. Do not record the full bank withdrawal directly as wage expense.';
  }
  return 'Tax shortcuts are blocked for transfers, payroll funding, payroll remittances, credit-card payments, payment-processor payouts, and tax remittances.';
};

const parseAIProposalFromNotes = (notes) => {
  if (!notes || typeof notes !== 'string') return null;
  const marker = '__aiProposal:';
  const markerIndex = notes.indexOf(marker);
  if (markerIndex < 0) return null;
  try {
    return JSON.parse(notes.slice(markerIndex + marker.length).trim());
  } catch {
    return null;
  }
};

const deriveTaxTreatment = (transaction, postingType) => {
  if (forceNoTaxPostingTypes.has(String(postingType || '').trim().toUpperCase())) {
    return 'NO_TAX';
  }
  const proposal = parseAIProposalFromNotes(transaction?.notes) || {};
  if (proposal?.likelyTaxTreatment) return proposal.likelyTaxTreatment;
  if (transaction?.taxTreatment) return transaction.taxTreatment;
  const taxAmount = Number(transaction?.taxes || 0);
  if (taxAmount <= 0) return 'NO_TAX';
  return Number(transaction?.amount || 0) > 0 ? 'SALES_TAX_PAYABLE' : 'INPUT_TAX_CREDIT';
};

const deriveEditableTransaction = (transaction) => {
  const proposal = parseAIProposalFromNotes(transaction?.notes) || {};
  const postingType = proposal?.likelyTransactionType || transaction?.postingType || '';
  return {
    ...transaction,
    postingType,
    taxTreatment: deriveTaxTreatment(transaction, postingType),
  };
};

const parseJournalLines = (value) => {
  if (Array.isArray(value)) return value;
  if (!value || typeof value !== 'string') return [];
  try {
    const parsed = JSON.parse(value);
    return Array.isArray(parsed) ? parsed : [];
  } catch {
    return [];
  }
};

const normalizeJournalTemplateFromEntries = (entries = []) => {
  const firstEntry = Array.isArray(entries) ? entries[0] : null;
  const lines = Array.isArray(firstEntry?.lines) ? firstEntry.lines : [];
  return lines.map((line) => ({
    accountId: line?.account?.id || line?.accountId || null,
    accountCode: line?.account?.code || null,
    accountDescription: line?.account?.description || null,
    debit: Number(Number(line?.debit || 0).toFixed(2)),
    credit: Number(Number(line?.credit || 0).toFixed(2)),
  })).filter((line) => line.accountId || line.accountCode);
};

const extractSearchKeywords = (...values) => {
  const seen = new Set();
  const keywords = [];

  values.forEach((value) => {
    String(value || '')
      .toLowerCase()
      .replace(/[^a-z0-9\s]/g, ' ')
      .split(/\s+/)
      .filter(Boolean)
      .forEach((token) => {
        if (token.length < 3) return;
        if (/^\d+$/.test(token)) return;
        if (stopWords.has(token)) return;
        if (seen.has(token)) return;
        seen.add(token);
        keywords.push(token);
      });
  });

  return keywords.slice(0, 5);
};

const buildFallbackEmailSearchSuggestion = (tx, timezone = 'America/Toronto') => {
  const baseDate = new Date(tx?.date || Date.now());
  const start = new Date(baseDate.getTime() - 7 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000);
  const end = new Date(baseDate.getTime() + 7 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000);
  const keywords = extractSearchKeywords(tx?.description, tx?.notes);
  const amountAbs = Math.abs(Number(tx?.amount || 0));
  return {
    query: [
      'has:attachment',
      '(receipt OR invoice OR order OR payment OR statement)',
      keywords.length ? `(${keywords.join(' OR ')})` : '',
      amountAbs ? `("${amountAbs.toFixed(2)}" OR "${Math.round(amountAbs)}")` : '',
    ].filter(Boolean).join(' '),
    startDate: formatDateInputValue(start, timezone),
    endDate: formatDateInputValue(end, timezone),
    keywords,
    reason: 'Uses likely vendor keywords from the transaction description and a date window around the charge.',
  };
};

const sortReceiptsWithPinnedFirst = (receipts, pinnedReceiptId) => {
  const items = Array.isArray(receipts) ? [...receipts] : [];
  if (!pinnedReceiptId) return items;
  return items.sort((left, right) => {
    if (left.id === pinnedReceiptId) return -1;
    if (right.id === pinnedReceiptId) return 1;
    return 0;
  });
};

const TransactionDetailsModal = ({ transaction, categories = [], sources = [], onClose, updateTransaction, onOpenTransaction = null }) => {
  const { user } = useContext(AuthContext);
  const accountingTimezone = user?.organizationTimezone || 'America/Toronto';
  const [editableTransaction, setEditableTransaction] = useState(() => deriveEditableTransaction(transaction));
  const [isEditing, setIsEditing] = useState(true);
  const [saving, setSaving] = useState(false);
  const [showProposalModal, setShowProposalModal] = useState(false);
  const [proposal, setProposal] = useState({ date: null, memo: '', lines: [] });

  const [candidateReceipts, setCandidateReceipts] = useState([]);
  const [loadingReceipts, setLoadingReceipts] = useState(false);
  const [matchingInProgress, setMatchingInProgress] = useState(false);
  const [unmatchingInProgress, setUnmatchingInProgress] = useState(false);
  const [manualReceiptId, setManualReceiptId] = useState('');
  const [searchCompany, setSearchCompany] = useState('');
  const [searchDate, setSearchDate] = useState('');
  const [emailSearchSuggestion, setEmailSearchSuggestion] = useState(() => buildFallbackEmailSearchSuggestion(transaction, accountingTimezone));
  const [showImportEmailModal, setShowImportEmailModal] = useState(false);
  const [pinnedReceiptId, setPinnedReceiptId] = useState(null);

  const [journalEntries, setJournalEntries] = useState([]);
  const [loadingJournalEntries, setLoadingJournalEntries] = useState(false);
  const [ruleDraftState, setRuleDraftState] = useState(null);
  const [ruleDraftLoading, setRuleDraftLoading] = useState(false);
  const [sameBatchTransactions, setSameBatchTransactions] = useState([]);
  const [loadingSameBatch, setLoadingSameBatch] = useState(false);

  useEffect(() => {
    const derived = deriveEditableTransaction(transaction);
    setEditableTransaction(derived);
    setIsEditing(true);
    setSearchCompany(transaction?.description || '');
    setSearchDate(formatDateInputValue(transaction?.date, accountingTimezone));
    setEmailSearchSuggestion(buildFallbackEmailSearchSuggestion(derived, accountingTimezone));
    setPinnedReceiptId(null);
    if (Math.sign(Number(transaction?.amount || 0)) < 0 && !transaction?.receipt) {
      fetchCandidateReceipts(derived.date, derived.amount, transaction?.description || '', formatDateInputValue(derived.date, accountingTimezone));
    } else {
      setCandidateReceipts([]);
    }
    setRuleDraftState(null);
  }, [transaction, accountingTimezone]);

  const fetchSameBatchTransactions = useCallback(async () => {
    const sourceId = transaction?.sourceId || transaction?.source?.id || null;
    if (!sourceId) {
      setSameBatchTransactions([]);
      return;
    }

    setLoadingSameBatch(true);
    try {
      const query = new URLSearchParams({
        sourceId,
        page: '1',
        pageSize: '50',
        sortKey: 'date',
        sortOrder: 'desc',
      }).toString();
      const res = await fetchWithAuth(`${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL}/accounting/transactions?${query}`);
      const data = await res.json().catch(() => ({}));
      if (!res.ok) throw new Error(data.error || 'Failed to load same-batch transactions.');
      setSameBatchTransactions(
        (Array.isArray(data.transactions) ? data.transactions : [])
          .filter((item) => item.id !== transaction.id)
      );
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Load Same Batch Transactions Error:', error);
      setSameBatchTransactions([]);
    } finally {
      setLoadingSameBatch(false);
    }
  }, [transaction?.id, transaction?.source?.id, transaction?.sourceId]);

  const fetchJournalEntries = useCallback(async () => {
    if (!transaction?.id) return;
    setLoadingJournalEntries(true);
    try {
      const res = await fetchWithAuth(
        `${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL}/accounting/transactions/${transaction.id}/journal-entries`
      );
      const data = await res.json().catch(() => ({}));
      if (!res.ok) {
        throw new Error(data.error || 'Failed to load journal entries.');
      }
      setJournalEntries(Array.isArray(data.entries) ? data.entries : []);
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Load Journal Entries Error:', error);
      toast.error(error.message || 'Failed to load journal entries.');
      setJournalEntries([]);
    } finally {
      setLoadingJournalEntries(false);
    }
  }, [transaction?.id]);

  useEffect(() => {
    fetchJournalEntries();
  }, [fetchJournalEntries]);

  useEffect(() => {
    fetchSameBatchTransactions();
  }, [fetchSameBatchTransactions]);

  const fetchCandidateReceipts = useCallback(async (txDate, txAmount, company = '', date = '') => {
    if (!transaction?.id || Math.sign(Number(txAmount || 0)) >= 0) {
      setCandidateReceipts([]);
      return;
    }

    setLoadingReceipts(true);
    try {
      const res = await fetchWithAuth(`${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL}/receipt/match/transactions`, {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
        body: JSON.stringify({
          transactionId: transaction.id,
          transactionDate: txDate,
          transactionAmount: txAmount,
          company,
          date,
        }),
      });

      const data = await res.json().catch(() => ({}));
      if (!res.ok) {
        setCandidateReceipts([]);
        return;
      }

      setCandidateReceipts(sortReceiptsWithPinnedFirst(Array.isArray(data.receipts) ? data.receipts : [], pinnedReceiptId));
      setEmailSearchSuggestion(data.emailSearchSuggestion || buildFallbackEmailSearchSuggestion({ ...editableTransaction, date: txDate, amount: txAmount, description: company || editableTransaction.description }));
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Candidate Receipt Search Error:', error);
      setCandidateReceipts([]);
      setEmailSearchSuggestion(buildFallbackEmailSearchSuggestion({ ...editableTransaction, date: txDate, amount: txAmount, description: company || editableTransaction.description }));
    } finally {
      setLoadingReceipts(false);
    }
  }, [editableTransaction, pinnedReceiptId, transaction?.id]);

  const handleFieldChange = (field, value) => {
    setEditableTransaction((prev) => {
      const next = { ...prev, [field]: value };

      if (field === 'postingType') {
        const normalizedPostingType = String(value || '').trim().toUpperCase();
        if (forceNoTaxPostingTypes.has(normalizedPostingType)) {
          next.taxTreatment = 'NO_TAX';
        } else if (!next.taxTreatment || next.taxTreatment === 'NO_TAX') {
          next.taxTreatment = Number(next.taxes || 0) > 0
            ? Number(next.amount || 0) > 0 ? 'SALES_TAX_PAYABLE' : 'INPUT_TAX_CREDIT'
            : 'NO_TAX';
        }
      }

      if (field === 'taxes' && !forceNoTaxPostingTypes.has(String(next.postingType || '').trim().toUpperCase())) {
        const numericTaxes = Number(value || 0);
        if (numericTaxes > 0 && (!next.taxTreatment || next.taxTreatment === 'NO_TAX')) {
          next.taxTreatment = Number(next.amount || 0) > 0 ? 'SALES_TAX_PAYABLE' : 'INPUT_TAX_CREDIT';
        }
        if (numericTaxes <= 0) {
          next.taxTreatment = 'NO_TAX';
        }
      }

      return next;
    });
    if (!isEditing) setIsEditing(true);
  };

  const handleCategoryChange = (categoryId) => {
    const selectedCategory = categories.find((cat) => cat.id === categoryId) || null;
    setEditableTransaction((prev) => ({
      ...prev,
      categoryId: categoryId || null,
      category: selectedCategory,
    }));
    if (!isEditing) setIsEditing(true);
  };

  const handleSourceChange = (e) => {
    const sourceId = e.target.value;
    const selectedSource = sources.find((source) => source.id === sourceId) || null;
    setEditableTransaction((prev) => ({
      ...prev,
      sourceId: sourceId || null,
      source: selectedSource,
    }));
    if (!isEditing) setIsEditing(true);
  };

  const applyLatestTransactionResponse = (payload, fallback = {}) => {
    const nextTransaction = deriveEditableTransaction(payload?.transaction || { ...editableTransaction, ...fallback });
    setEditableTransaction(nextTransaction);
    updateTransaction(nextTransaction);
    return nextTransaction;
  };

  const handleSaveChanges = async () => {
    setSaving(true);
    const original = transaction;
    const edited = editableTransaction;
    const requests = [];

    try {
      if ((original.notes || '') !== (edited.notes || '')) {
        requests.push(
          fetchWithAuth(`${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL}/accounting/transactions/${original.id}/notes`, {
            method: 'PUT',
            headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
            body: JSON.stringify({ notes: edited.notes || '' }),
          })
        );
      }

      if (Number(original.taxes || 0) !== Number(edited.taxes || 0)) {
        requests.push(
          fetchWithAuth(`${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL}/accounting/transactions/${original.id}/taxes`, {
            method: 'PUT',
            headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
            body: JSON.stringify({ taxes: edited.taxes === '' ? null : Number(edited.taxes || 0) }),
          })
        );
      }

      const originalCategoryId = original.category?.id ?? original.categoryId ?? null;
      const editedCategoryId = edited.categoryId ?? edited.category?.id ?? null;
      if (originalCategoryId !== editedCategoryId) {
        requests.push(
          fetchWithAuth(`${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL}/accounting/transactions/${original.id}/assignCategory`, {
            method: 'PUT',
            headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
            body: JSON.stringify({ categoryId: editedCategoryId }),
          })
        );
      }

      const transactionUpdatePayload = {};
      if ((original.description || '') !== (edited.description || '')) {
        transactionUpdatePayload.description = edited.description || '';
      }
      if (Number(original.amount || 0) !== Number(edited.amount || 0)) {
        transactionUpdatePayload.amount = Number(edited.amount || 0);
      }
      if (formatDateInputValue(original.date, accountingTimezone) !== formatDateInputValue(edited.date, accountingTimezone)) {
        transactionUpdatePayload.date = edited.date;
      }
      const originalSourceId = original.sourceId ?? original.source?.id ?? null;
      const editedSourceId = edited.sourceId ?? edited.source?.id ?? null;
      if (originalSourceId !== editedSourceId) {
        transactionUpdatePayload.sourceId = editedSourceId || null;
      }
      if ((original.postingType || '') !== (edited.postingType || '')) {
        transactionUpdatePayload.postingType = edited.postingType || null;
      }
      if ((deriveTaxTreatment(original, original.postingType) || 'NO_TAX') !== (edited.taxTreatment || 'NO_TAX')) {
        transactionUpdatePayload.taxTreatment = edited.taxTreatment || 'NO_TAX';
      }
      if (Object.keys(transactionUpdatePayload).length) {
        requests.push(
          fetchWithAuth(`${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL}/accounting/transactions/${original.id}`, {
            method: 'PUT',
            headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
            body: JSON.stringify(transactionUpdatePayload),
          })
        );
      }

      if (!requests.length) {
        toast.info('No changes to save.');
        setSaving(false);
        return;
      }

      const responses = await Promise.all(requests);
      const payloads = await Promise.all(responses.map((response) => response.json().catch(() => ({}))));

      responses.forEach((response, index) => {
        if (!response.ok) {
          throw new Error(payloads[index]?.error || 'Failed to save transaction changes.');
        }
      });

      const latestPayload = [...payloads].reverse().find((payload) => payload?.transaction) || {};
      const nextTransaction = applyLatestTransactionResponse(latestPayload, {
        notes: edited.notes,
        taxes: edited.taxes,
        category: edited.category,
        categoryId: edited.categoryId,
        description: edited.description,
        amount: edited.amount,
        date: edited.date,
        source: edited.source,
        sourceId: edited.sourceId,
        postingType: edited.postingType,
        taxTreatment: edited.taxTreatment,
      });

      await fetchJournalEntries();
      await fetchCandidateReceipts(nextTransaction.date, nextTransaction.amount, searchCompany.trim(), searchDate);
      toast.success('Transaction updated successfully.');
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Save Transaction Error:', error);
      toast.error(error.message || 'Failed to save transaction changes.');
    } finally {
      setSaving(false);
    }
  };

  const handleMatchReceipt = async (receiptId) => {
    setMatchingInProgress(true);
    try {
      const res = await fetchWithAuth(`${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL}/receipt/match`, {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
        body: JSON.stringify({
          receiptId,
          type: 'bank',
          transactionId: transaction.id,
        }),
      });
      const data = await res.json().catch(() => ({}));
      if (!res.ok) {
        throw new Error(data.error || 'Failed to match receipt.');
      }
      toast.success('Receipt matched successfully.');
      const nextTransaction = data.transaction || { ...editableTransaction, receipt: data.receipt, receiptId };
      const derived = deriveEditableTransaction(nextTransaction);
      setEditableTransaction(derived);
      updateTransaction(derived);
      setCandidateReceipts([]);
      setPinnedReceiptId(receiptId);
      await fetchJournalEntries();
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error matching receipt:', error);
      toast.error(`Error: ${error.message}`);
    } finally {
      setMatchingInProgress(false);
    }
  };

  const handleManualMatch = () => {
    if (!manualReceiptId.trim()) {
      toast.error('Please enter a valid receipt ID.');
      return;
    }
    handleMatchReceipt(manualReceiptId.trim());
  };

  const handleSearchReceipts = () => {
    fetchCandidateReceipts(editableTransaction.date, editableTransaction.amount, searchCompany.trim(), searchDate);
  };

  const handleUnmatchReceipt = async () => {
    if (!transaction.receipt || !transaction.receipt.id) return;
    if (!window.confirm('Are you sure you want to unmatch this receipt?')) return;

    setUnmatchingInProgress(true);
    try {
      const res = await fetchWithAuth(
        `${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL}/receipt/match/${transaction.id}`,
        { method: 'DELETE' }
      );
      const data = await res.json().catch(() => ({}));
      if (!res.ok) {
        throw new Error(data.error || 'Failed to unmatch receipt.');
      }

      toast.success('Receipt unmatched successfully.');
      const nextTransaction = deriveEditableTransaction(data?.transaction || { ...editableTransaction, receipt: null, receiptId: null, receiptHints: null });
      setEditableTransaction(nextTransaction);
      updateTransaction(nextTransaction);
      await fetchCandidateReceipts(nextTransaction.date, nextTransaction.amount, searchCompany.trim(), searchDate);
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error unmatching receipt:', error);
      toast.error(`Unmatch Error: ${error.message}`);
    } finally {
      setUnmatchingInProgress(false);
    }
  };

  const handleImportedReceipt = async (result) => {
    const importedReceiptId = result?.receipt?.id || result?.receiptId || result?.id || null;
    if (!importedReceiptId) {
      toast.info('Receipt imported. Search again to match it to this transaction.');
      return;
    }

    setPinnedReceiptId(importedReceiptId);
    setManualReceiptId(importedReceiptId);
    await fetchCandidateReceipts(editableTransaction.date, editableTransaction.amount, searchCompany.trim(), searchDate);
    toast.success('Receipt imported. It has been pinned at the top of the match list.');
  };

  const handleSuggestRule = async () => {
    if (!transaction?.id) return;
    setRuleDraftLoading(true);
    try {
      const selectedCategory = categories.find((cat) => cat.id === (editableTransaction.categoryId || editableTransaction.category?.id)) || editableTransaction.category || null;
      let journalTemplateLines = normalizeJournalTemplateFromEntries(journalEntries);
      if (!journalTemplateLines.length) {
        const proposalRes = await fetchWithAuth(`${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL}/accounting/transactions/${transaction.id}/propose`);
        const proposalData = await proposalRes.json().catch(() => ({}));
        if (proposalRes.ok && Array.isArray(proposalData.lines)) {
          journalTemplateLines = proposalData.lines;
        }
      }
      const res = await fetchWithAuth(`${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL}/accounting/review-queue/${transaction.id}/create-rule-draft`, {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
        body: JSON.stringify({
          accountId: selectedCategory?.id || null,
          accountCode: selectedCategory?.code || null,
          transactionType: editableTransaction.postingType || null,
          taxTreatment: editableTransaction.taxTreatment || null,
          journalLines: journalTemplateLines,
        }),
      });
      const data = await res.json().catch(() => ({}));
      if (!res.ok) throw new Error(data.error || 'Failed to draft rule.');
      setRuleDraftState({
        draft: data.draft || null,
        matchedTransactionCount: data.matchedTransactionCount || 0,
        sampleTransactions: Array.isArray(data.sampleTransactions) ? data.sampleTransactions : [],
      });
      toast.success(data.message || 'Rule suggestion ready for review.');
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Create Rule Draft Error:', error);
      toast.error(error.message || 'Failed to draft rule.');
    } finally {
      setRuleDraftLoading(false);
    }
  };

  const handleApproveRuleDraft = async () => {
    const draft = ruleDraftState?.draft || null;
    if (!draft) {
      toast.info('Generate a rule suggestion first.');
      return;
    }
    setRuleDraftLoading(true);
    try {
      const res = await fetchWithAuth(`${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL}/accounting/review-queue/${transaction.id}/create-rule/approve`, {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
        body: JSON.stringify({ draft }),
      });
      const data = await res.json().catch(() => ({}));
      if (!res.ok) throw new Error(data.error || 'Failed to save rule.');
      toast.success(data.message || 'Rule approved and saved.');
      setRuleDraftState(null);
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Approve Rule Draft Error:', error);
      toast.error(error.message || 'Failed to save rule.');
    } finally {
      setRuleDraftLoading(false);
    }
  };

  const sourceLabel = useMemo(() => {
    const source = sources.find((item) => item.id === editableTransaction.sourceId) || editableTransaction.source;
    if (!source) return '';
    return source.name || source.id || '';
  }, [editableTransaction.source, editableTransaction.sourceId, sources]);

  const receiptCandidatesForDisplay = useMemo(
    () => sortReceiptsWithPinnedFirst(candidateReceipts, pinnedReceiptId),
    [candidateReceipts, pinnedReceiptId]
  );

  const emailSearchPreset = emailSearchSuggestion || buildFallbackEmailSearchSuggestion(editableTransaction);

  return (
    <>
      <dialog id={`transaction_modal_${transaction.id}`} className="modal modal-open">
        <div className="modal-box w-11/12 max-w-6xl">
          <div className="flex flex-wrap justify-between items-center gap-3 mb-4">
            <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold">Transaction Details</h2>
            <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
              {isEditing && (
                <button onClick={handleSaveChanges} className="btn btn-success btn-sm" disabled={saving}>
                  {saving ? <span className="loading loading-spinner loading-xs" /> : <Save size={16} />} Save
                </button>
              )}
              <Tooltip content="Refresh journal entries">
                <button type="button" className="btn btn-ghost btn-sm" onClick={fetchJournalEntries} disabled={loadingJournalEntries}>
                  <RefreshCw size={16} className={loadingJournalEntries ? 'animate-spin' : ''} />
                </button>
              </Tooltip>
              <Tooltip content="Propose Journal Entry">
                <button
                  type="button"
                  className="btn btn-ghost btn-sm"
                  onClick={async () => {
                    try {
                      const res = await fetchWithAuth(
                        `${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL}/accounting/transactions/${transaction.id}/propose`
                      );
                      const data = await res.json().catch(() => ({}));
                      if (!res.ok) throw new Error(data.error || 'Failed to get proposal');
                      setProposal(data);
                      setShowProposalModal(true);
                    } catch (err) {
                      toast.error(err.message);
                    }
                  }}
                >
                  <BookOpen size={16} />
                </button>
              </Tooltip>
              <Tooltip content="Create rule from this transaction">
                <button
                  type="button"
                  className="btn btn-ghost btn-sm"
                  onClick={handleSuggestRule}
                  disabled={ruleDraftLoading}
                >
                  <Wand2 size={16} className={ruleDraftLoading ? 'animate-pulse' : ''} />
                </button>
              </Tooltip>
              <button type="button" className="btn btn-ghost btn-sm" onClick={onClose}>
                Close
              </button>
            </div>
          </div>

          <div className="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-2 gap-6">
            <div className="space-y-4">
              <div className="card bg-base-200 shadow-sm">
                <div className="card-body gap-3">
                  <h3 className="card-title text-base">Transaction</h3>

                  <div className="form-control">
                    <label className="label"><span className="label-text">Date</span></label>
                    <input
                      type="date"
                      className="input input-bordered"
                      value={formatDateInputValue(editableTransaction.date, accountingTimezone)}
                      onChange={(e) => handleFieldChange('date', e.target.value)}
                    />
                  </div>

                  <div className="form-control">
                    <label className="label"><span className="label-text">Description</span></label>
                    <input
                      type="text"
                      className="input input-bordered"
                      value={editableTransaction.description || ''}
                      onChange={(e) => handleFieldChange('description', e.target.value)}
                    />
                  </div>

                  <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-3">
                    <div className="form-control">
                      <label className="label"><span className="label-text">Amount</span></label>
                      <input
                        type="number"
                        step="0.01"
                        className="input input-bordered"
                        value={editableTransaction.amount ?? ''}
                        onChange={(e) => handleFieldChange('amount', e.target.value)}
                      />
                    </div>
                    <div className="form-control">
                      <label className="label"><span className="label-text">Tax amount</span></label>
                      <div className="space-y-2">
                        <input
                          type="number"
                          step="0.01"
                          className="input input-bordered"
                          value={editableTransaction.taxes ?? ''}
                          onChange={(e) => handleFieldChange('taxes', e.target.value)}
                        />
                        <div className="flex flex-wrap items-center gap-2">
                          <button
                            type="button"
                            className="btn btn-outline btn-xs"
                            disabled={isTaxActionBlocked(editableTransaction)}
                            title={isTaxActionBlocked(editableTransaction) ? getTaxActionBlockReason(editableTransaction) : 'Apply 13% included tax'}
                            onClick={() => {
                              if (isTaxActionBlocked(editableTransaction)) {
                                toast.info(getTaxActionBlockReason(editableTransaction));
                                return;
                              }
                              const grossAmount = Math.abs(Number(editableTransaction.amount || 0));
                              const computedTaxes = grossAmount
                                ? Number((grossAmount * (0.13 / (1 + 0.13))).toFixed(2))
                                : 0;
                              handleFieldChange('taxes', computedTaxes);
                            }}
                          >
                            <Percent size={14} /> Apply 13% included tax
                          </button>
                          <span className="text-xs text-base-content/70">Enter the tax dollar amount, not the tax rate.</span>
                        </div>
                      </div>
                    </div>
                  </div>

                  <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-3">
                    <div className="form-control">
                      <label className="label"><span className="label-text">Category</span></label>
                      <AccountAutocomplete
                        value={editableTransaction.categoryId || editableTransaction.category?.id || ''}
                        onChange={handleCategoryChange}
                        accounts={categories}
                        placeholder="Uncategorized"
                      />
                    </div>
                    <div className="form-control">
                      <label className="label"><span className="label-text">Source</span></label>
                      <select
                        className="select select-bordered"
                        value={editableTransaction.sourceId || editableTransaction.source?.id || ''}
                        onChange={handleSourceChange}
                      >
                        <option value="">No source</option>
                        {sources.map((source) => (
                          <option key={source.id} value={source.id}>{source.name || source.id}</option>
                        ))}
                      </select>
                    </div>
                    <div className="form-control">
                      <label className="label"><span className="label-text">Transaction type</span></label>
                      <select
                        className="select select-bordered"
                        value={editableTransaction.postingType || ''}
                        onChange={(e) => handleFieldChange('postingType', e.target.value)}
                      >
                        {transactionTypeOptions.map((option) => (
                          <option key={option.value || 'auto'} value={option.value}>{option.label}</option>
                        ))}
                      </select>
                    </div>
                    <div className="form-control">
                      <label className="label"><span className="label-text">Tax treatment</span></label>
                      <select
                        className="select select-bordered"
                        value={editableTransaction.taxTreatment || 'NO_TAX'}
                        onChange={(e) => handleFieldChange('taxTreatment', e.target.value)}
                        disabled={forceNoTaxPostingTypes.has(String(editableTransaction.postingType || '').trim().toUpperCase())}
                      >
                        {taxTreatmentOptions.map((option) => (
                          <option key={option.value} value={option.value}>{option.label}</option>
                        ))}
                      </select>
                      {forceNoTaxPostingTypes.has(String(editableTransaction.postingType || '').trim().toUpperCase()) ? (
                        <span className="label-text-alt text-base-content/70 mt-1">This transaction type posts without GST/HST lines.</span>
                      ) : null}
                    </div>
                  </div>

                  <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-3 text-sm">
                    <div><span className="font-semibold">Imported type:</span> {editableTransaction.type || '—'}</div>
                    <div><span className="font-semibold">Balance:</span> {editableTransaction.balance == null ? '—' : formatCurrency(editableTransaction.balance)}</div>
                    <div><span className="font-semibold">Receipt:</span> {editableTransaction.receipt?.id || editableTransaction.receiptId || 'None'}</div>
                    <div><span className="font-semibold">Category label:</span> {getCategoryLabel(editableTransaction.category) || 'Uncategorized'}</div>
                    <div><span className="font-semibold">Posting type:</span> {editableTransaction.postingType || 'Auto-detect'}</div>
                    <div><span className="font-semibold">Tax treatment:</span> {editableTransaction.taxTreatment || 'NO_TAX'}</div>
                  </div>

                  <div className="form-control">
                    <label className="label"><span className="label-text">Notes</span></label>
                    <textarea
                      className="textarea textarea-bordered min-h-28"
                      value={editableTransaction.notes || ''}
                      onChange={(e) => handleFieldChange('notes', e.target.value)}
                    />
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>

              <div className="card bg-base-200 shadow-sm">
                <div className="card-body gap-3">
                  <div className="flex items-center justify-between gap-3 flex-wrap">
                    <h3 className="card-title text-base">Receipt Matching</h3>
                    <button
                      type="button"
                      className="btn btn-sm btn-outline"
                      onClick={() => setShowImportEmailModal(true)}
                    >
                      <MailSearch size={16} /> Look for receipt in email
                    </button>
                  </div>
                  <div className="alert alert-info text-sm">
                    Search saved receipts first, then jump into email search with a pre-filled query based on this transaction.
                  </div>

                  <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-3">
                    <div className="form-control">
                      <label className="label"><span className="label-text">Search company / vendor</span></label>
                      <input
                        type="text"
                        className="input input-bordered"
                        value={searchCompany}
                        onChange={(e) => setSearchCompany(e.target.value)}
                      />
                    </div>
                    <div className="form-control">
                      <label className="label"><span className="label-text">Search date</span></label>
                      <input
                        type="date"
                        className="input input-bordered"
                        value={searchDate}
                        onChange={(e) => setSearchDate(e.target.value)}
                      />
                    </div>
                  </div>

                  <div className="rounded-box border border-base-300 bg-base-100 p-3 text-sm space-y-2">
                    <div className="font-semibold">Suggested email query</div>
                    <div className="font-mono text-xs break-words text-base-content/70">{emailSearchPreset.query}</div>
                    <div className="text-xs text-base-content/60">
                      {emailSearchPreset.reason}
                    </div>
                    {Array.isArray(emailSearchPreset.keywords) && emailSearchPreset.keywords.length ? (
                      <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2">
                        {emailSearchPreset.keywords.map((keyword) => (
                          <span key={keyword} className="badge badge-ghost">{keyword}</span>
                        ))}
                      </div>
                    ) : null}
                  </div>

                  <div className="flex flex-wrap items-center gap-2">
                    <button type="button" className="btn btn-sm" onClick={handleSearchReceipts} disabled={loadingReceipts}>
                      {loadingReceipts ? <span className="loading loading-spinner loading-xs" /> : <Search size={16} />} Find existing receipts
                    </button>
                    <input
                      type="text"
                      className="input input-bordered input-sm w-52"
                      placeholder="Manual receipt ID"
                      value={manualReceiptId}
                      onChange={(e) => setManualReceiptId(e.target.value)}
                    />
                    <button type="button" className="btn btn-sm btn-primary" onClick={handleManualMatch} disabled={matchingInProgress}>
                      {matchingInProgress ? <span className="loading loading-spinner loading-xs" /> : <Link size={16} />} Match
                    </button>
                    {editableTransaction.receipt?.id && (
                      <button type="button" className="btn btn-sm btn-outline" onClick={handleUnmatchReceipt} disabled={unmatchingInProgress}>
                        {unmatchingInProgress ? <span className="loading loading-spinner loading-xs" /> : <Link2Off size={16} />} Unmatch
                      </button>
                    )}
                  </div>

                  {editableTransaction.receipt?.id ? (
                    <div className="alert alert-info text-sm">
                      Matched receipt: <span className="font-semibold">{editableTransaction.receipt.id}</span>
                    </div>
                  ) : null}

                  {receiptCandidatesForDisplay.length > 0 ? (
                    <div className="space-y-3">
                      {receiptCandidatesForDisplay.map((receipt) => (
                        <div key={receipt.id} className={`rounded-box border p-3 bg-base-100 ${receipt.id === pinnedReceiptId ? 'border-primary' : 'border-base-300'}`}>
                          <div className="flex flex-wrap items-start justify-between gap-3">
                            <div className="space-y-1 min-w-0">
                              <div className="flex flex-wrap items-center gap-2">
                                <span className="font-semibold truncate max-w-[260px]">{receipt.companyName || 'Unknown vendor'}</span>
                                <span className="badge badge-outline">{receipt.confidenceLabel || 'Match'}</span>
                                <span className="badge badge-ghost">{formatPercent(receipt.matchScore)}</span>
                                {receipt.id === pinnedReceiptId ? <span className="badge badge-primary">Imported from email</span> : null}
                              </div>
                              <div className="text-sm text-base-content/70">
                                {receipt.date ? formatDateInputValue(receipt.date, accountingTimezone) : '—'} · {receipt.total == null ? '—' : formatCurrency(receipt.total)}
                                {receipt.hst != null ? ` · HST ${formatCurrency(receipt.hst)}` : ''}
                              </div>
                              {Array.isArray(receipt.matchReasons) && receipt.matchReasons.length ? (
                                <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2 pt-1">
                                  {receipt.matchReasons.map((reason) => (
                                    <span key={reason} className="badge badge-ghost text-xs">{reason}</span>
                                  ))}
                                </div>
                              ) : null}
                            </div>
                            <div className="flex flex-col gap-2 items-end">
                              <div className="text-xs text-base-content/60">Receipt #{receipt.id}</div>
                              <button
                                type="button"
                                className="btn btn-xs btn-primary"
                                onClick={() => handleMatchReceipt(receipt.id)}
                                disabled={matchingInProgress}
                              >
                                Match
                              </button>
                            </div>
                          </div>
                        </div>
                      ))}
                    </div>
                  ) : (
                    <div className="text-sm opacity-70">No candidate receipts loaded yet.</div>
                  )}
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>

            <div className="space-y-4">
              <div className="alert alert-info text-sm">
                Changing tax amount, tax treatment, category, posting type, amount, or date here will rebuild the linked journal entry so the books stay in sync.
              </div>

              <div className="card bg-base-200 shadow-sm">
                <div className="card-body gap-3">
                  <div className="flex items-center justify-between gap-3">
                    <h3 className="card-title text-base">Associated Journal Entries</h3>
                    <button type="button" className="btn btn-ghost btn-xs" onClick={fetchJournalEntries}>
                      <RefreshCw size={14} /> Refresh
                    </button>
                  </div>

                  {loadingJournalEntries ? (
                    <div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-sm opacity-70">
                      <span className="loading loading-spinner loading-sm" /> Loading journal entries...
                    </div>
                  ) : journalEntries.length === 0 ? (
                    <div className="alert">
                      No journal entries are currently linked to this transaction.
                    </div>
                  ) : (
                    <div className="space-y-4">
                      {journalEntries.map((entry) => (
                        <div key={entry.id} className="rounded-box border border-base-300 p-3 bg-base-100">
                          <div className="flex flex-wrap justify-between gap-2 mb-3 text-sm">
                            <div><span className="font-semibold">Date:</span> {formatDateInputValue(entry.date, accountingTimezone)}</div>
                            <div><span className="font-semibold">Memo:</span> {entry.memo || '—'}</div>
                          </div>
                          <div className="overflow-x-auto">
                            <table className="table table-sm">
                              <thead>
                                <tr>
                                  <th>Account</th>
                                  <th className="text-right">Debit</th>
                                  <th className="text-right">Credit</th>
                                </tr>
                              </thead>
                              <tbody>
                                {entry.lines?.map((line) => (
                                  <tr key={line.id || `${line.accountId}-${line.debit}-${line.credit}`}>
                                    <td>{getJournalLineLabel(line)}</td>
                                    <td className="text-right">{Number(line.debit || 0).toFixed(2)}</td>
                                    <td className="text-right">{Number(line.credit || 0).toFixed(2)}</td>
                                  </tr>
                                ))}
                              </tbody>
                            </table>
                          </div>
                        </div>
                      ))}
                    </div>
                  )}
                </div>
              </div>

              <AccountingRuleDraftReview
                draft={ruleDraftState?.draft}
                matchedTransactionCount={ruleDraftState?.matchedTransactionCount || 1}
                approving={ruleDraftLoading}
                formatAmount={(value) => Number(value || 0).toFixed(2)}
                className="card bg-base-200 shadow-sm p-4 space-y-3 text-sm"
                matchedLabelPrefix="This would match about"
                onDismiss={() => setRuleDraftState(null)}
                onApprove={handleApproveRuleDraft}
              />

              <div className="card bg-base-200 shadow-sm">
                <div className="card-body gap-2 text-sm">
                  <h3 className="card-title text-base">Summary</h3>
                  <div><span className="font-semibold">Amount:</span> {formatCurrency(editableTransaction.amount)}</div>
                  <div><span className="font-semibold">Taxes:</span> {editableTransaction.taxes == null ? '—' : formatCurrency(editableTransaction.taxes)}</div>
                  <div><span className="font-semibold">Net of tax:</span> {formatCurrency(Number(editableTransaction.amount || 0) - Number(editableTransaction.taxes || 0))}</div>
                  <div><span className="font-semibold">Status:</span> {journalEntries.length > 0 ? 'Posted to journal' : 'Not posted yet'}</div>
                </div>
              </div>

              <div className="card bg-base-200 shadow-sm">
                <div className="card-body gap-3 text-sm">
                  <div className="flex items-center justify-between gap-3">
                    <h3 className="card-title text-base">Same Import Batch</h3>
                    <button type="button" className="btn btn-ghost btn-xs" onClick={fetchSameBatchTransactions} disabled={loadingSameBatch}>
                      <RefreshCw size={14} className={loadingSameBatch ? 'animate-spin' : ''} /> Refresh
                    </button>
                  </div>
                  <div className="text-xs text-base-content/60">
                    Showing other transactions from {sourceLabel || 'this source'}.
                  </div>
                  {loadingSameBatch ? (
                    <div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-sm opacity-70">
                      <span className="loading loading-spinner loading-sm" /> Loading transactions...
                    </div>
                  ) : sameBatchTransactions.length ? (
                    <div className="overflow-x-auto rounded-box border border-base-300 bg-base-100">
                      <table className="table table-xs">
                        <thead>
                          <tr>
                            <th>Date</th>
                            <th>Description</th>
                            <th className="text-right">Amount</th>
                            <th>Category</th>
                          </tr>
                        </thead>
                        <tbody>
                          {sameBatchTransactions.slice(0, 12).map((item) => (
                            <tr
                              key={item.id}
                              className={onOpenTransaction ? 'hover cursor-pointer' : ''}
                              onClick={() => onOpenTransaction?.(item)}
                            >
                              <td>{formatDateInputValue(item.date, accountingTimezone)}</td>
                              <td className="max-w-[220px] truncate">{item.description}</td>
                              <td className={`text-right ${Number(item.amount || 0) >= 0 ? 'text-success' : 'text-error'}`}>{formatCurrency(item.amount)}</td>
                              <td>{getCategoryLabel(item.category) || 'Uncategorized'}</td>
                            </tr>
                          ))}
                        </tbody>
                      </table>
                    </div>
                  ) : (
                    <div className="alert">No other transactions found for this import batch.</div>
                  )}
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>

          {showProposalModal && proposal && (
            <dialog open className="modal">
              <div className="modal-box max-w-3xl">
                <h3 className="font-bold text-lg mb-4">Review Journal Entry</h3>
                <div className="form-control">
                  <label className="label"><span className="label-text">Date</span></label>
                  <input type="date" className="input input-bordered input-sm" value={formatDateInputValue(proposal.date, accountingTimezone)} readOnly />
                </div>
                <div className="form-control mt-2">
                  <label className="label"><span className="label-text">Memo</span></label>
                  <input type="text" className="input input-bordered input-sm" value={proposal.memo || ''} readOnly />
                </div>
                <div className="overflow-x-auto mt-4">
                  <table className="table table-sm w-full">
                    <thead>
                      <tr><th>Account ID</th><th>Debit</th><th>Credit</th></tr>
                    </thead>
                    <tbody>
                      {(proposal.lines || []).map((line, index) => (
                        <tr key={index}>
                          <td>{line.accountId}</td>
                          <td>{Number(line.debit || 0).toFixed(2)}</td>
                          <td>{Number(line.credit || 0).toFixed(2)}</td>
                        </tr>
                      ))}
                    </tbody>
                  </table>
                </div>
                <div className="modal-action">
                  <button className="btn" onClick={() => setShowProposalModal(false)}>Close</button>
                </div>
              </div>
              <form method="dialog" className="modal-backdrop">
                <button>close</button>
              </form>
            </dialog>
          )}
        </div>
        <form method="dialog" className="modal-backdrop">
          <button onClick={onClose}>close</button>
        </form>
      </dialog>

      <ImportReceiptFromEmailModal
        isOpen={showImportEmailModal}
        onClose={() => setShowImportEmailModal(false)}
        onImported={handleImportedReceipt}
        initialQuery={emailSearchPreset.query}
        initialStartDate={emailSearchPreset.startDate}
        initialEndDate={emailSearchPreset.endDate}
        autoSearchOnOpen
        modalTitle="Look for a receipt in email"
        modalDescription="We pre-filled the search using this transaction's vendor clues, amount, and date. Import the receipt, then match it back here."
        highlightedKeywords={emailSearchPreset.keywords || extractSearchKeywords(searchCompany, editableTransaction.description)}
      />
    </>
  );
};

export default TransactionDetailsModal;

```

// Full path: /home/luanngo/boss-dev/client/services/accounting/components/TransactionGroupModal.jsx
'use client';
import React, { useState, useEffect, useCallback, useMemo } from 'react';
import { toast } from 'react-toastify';
import { fetchWithAuth } from '@/shared/utils/fetchWithAuth';
import {
  BookOpen, XCircle, Sparkles, CheckCircle, Play, Trash2, Zap,
  Database, AlertCircle, DollarSign, RefreshCw, Filter,
  Clock, Info, Save, Plus, Target, TrendingUp, Layers, Percent
} from 'lucide-react';
import { formatMoney as fmt, formatDate as fmtDate } from '../utils/formatAccounting';
import { AccountingLoadingState } from '../utils/AccountingDisplayComponents';
import AccountAutocomplete from './AccountAutocomplete';
import { deriveJournalTemplateLines, JournalTemplatePreview, AccountCodeButton, FormulaHelp } from '../utils/AccountingJournalTemplateView';
import { defaultRuleForm, ruleToFormState, ruleFormToPayload, draftToRuleFormPatch } from '../utils/ruleUtils';

const SERVER = process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL;

const formatRuleLabel = (v) => String(v || '')
  .toLowerCase().split(/[_\s-]+/).filter(Boolean)
  .map((p) => p.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + p.slice(1)).join(' ');

const TAX_TREATMENTS = [
  'NO_ITC', 'EXEMPT_PURCHASE', 'ZERO_RATED',
  'TAXABLE_SALE', 'HST_REMITTANCE', 'NO_TAX', 'INPUT_TAX_CREDIT',
];

const FORMULA_HELP = {
  gross: 'Gross is the full transaction amount, including any HST.',
  net: 'Net is the pre-tax expense or revenue amount.',
  hst: 'HST is only the tax portion.',
};

const FORMULA_OPTIONS = Object.keys(FORMULA_HELP);

const normalizeFormula = (value) => String(value || '').trim().toLowerCase();

const accountDescription = (account) => account?.description || account?.name || '';

const FORCE_NO_TAX_TRANSACTION_TYPES = new Set([
  'PAYROLL_FUNDING',
  'PAYROLL_PAYMENT',
  'PAYROLL_REMITTANCE',
  'TAX_REMITTANCE',
  'TRANSFER',
  'CREDIT_CARD_PAYMENT',
  'PAYMENT_PROCESSOR_PAYOUT',
  'PAYMENT_PROCESSOR_REVERSAL',
  'OWNER_DRAW',
  'OWNER_CONTRIBUTION',
]);

const suggestionRuleToFormState = (rule = {}, accounts = []) => ({
  ...defaultRuleForm,
  ...ruleToFormState(rule, accounts),
  ...draftToRuleFormPatch(rule, accounts),
});

const transactionTypes = [
  '', 'BANK_EXPENSE', 'BANK_REVENUE', 'TRANSFER', 'CREDIT_CARD_PAYMENT',
  'PAYROLL_PAYMENT', 'TAX_REMITTANCE', 'OWNER_DRAW', 'OWNER_CONTRIBUTION',
];

const SOURCE_TYPE_OPTIONS = [
  { value: '', label: 'Any source' },
  { value: 'CREDIT_CARD', label: 'Credit card' },
  { value: 'CHEQUING_ACCOUNT', label: 'Chequing account' },
  { value: 'SAVINGS_ACCOUNT', label: 'Savings account' },
];

const SEMANTIC_TYPE_OPTIONS = [
  { value: '', label: 'Auto-detect' },
  { value: 'SQUARE_PAYOUT', label: 'Square Payout' },
  { value: 'PAYROLL_FUNDING', label: 'Payroll Funding' },
  { value: 'CREDIT_CARD_PAYMENT', label: 'Credit Card Payment' },
  { value: 'TAX_REMITTANCE', label: 'Tax Remittance' },
  { value: 'INSURANCE', label: 'Insurance' },
  { value: 'RENT_LEASE', label: 'Rent / Lease' },
  { value: 'UTILITY', label: 'Utility' },
  { value: 'SUBSCRIPTION', label: 'Subscription' },
  { value: 'LOAN_PAYMENT', label: 'Loan Payment' },
  { value: 'OWNER_DRAW', label: 'Owner Draw' },
  { value: 'INCOME_DEPOSIT', label: 'Income / Deposit' },
];

const ALIGNMENT_CONFIG = {
  NO_RULE: { label: 'No rule yet', color: 'text-slate-500', bg: 'bg-slate-100' },
  PENDING_SUGGESTION: { label: 'Pending AI suggestion', color: 'text-amber-700', bg: 'bg-amber-100' },
  HAS_SUGGESTION: { label: 'Has suggestion', color: 'text-indigo-700', bg: 'bg-indigo-100' },
  ACTIVE_RULE_MATCHES: { label: 'Active rule linked', color: 'text-emerald-700', bg: 'bg-emerald-100' },
  RULE_PARTIAL_COVERAGE: { label: 'Rule partial coverage', color: 'text-orange-700', bg: 'bg-orange-100' },
  RULE_MISMATCH: { label: 'Rule mismatch', color: 'text-red-700', bg: 'bg-red-100' },
};

const hasRecordedTax = (tx) => Math.abs(Number(tx?.taxes || 0)) > 0;
const needsTax = (tx) => tx?.needsTax ?? !hasRecordedTax(tx);
const isIncompleteTransaction = (tx) =>
  !tx?.categoryId || needsTax(tx) || (tx?.receiptRequired && !tx?.hasReceipt) || !tx?.hasJournalEntry;

function SummaryCards({ group, rule }) {
  if (!group) return null;

  const taxTreatment = rule?.meta?.taxTreatment || rule?.taxTreatment || '';
  const ratePercent = rule?.meta?.ratePercent ?? rule?.meta?.previousTaxRate?.ratePercent ?? rule?.previousTaxRate?.ratePercent ?? '';

  const cards = [
    { icon: Database, label: 'Transactions', value: group.transactionCount ?? 0, sublabel: `${group.incompleteCount ?? 0} incomplete`, color: 'from-slate-50 to-slate-100/50 border-slate-200 text-slate-700' },
    { icon: DollarSign, label: 'Total', value: fmt(group.amountTotal ?? 0), sublabel: 'gross amount', color: 'from-slate-50 to-slate-100/50 border-slate-200 text-slate-700' },
    { icon: AlertCircle, label: 'Uncategorized', value: group.uncategorizedCount ?? 0, sublabel: 'need category', color: group.uncategorizedCount > 0 ? 'from-amber-50 to-amber-100/50 border-amber-200 text-amber-700' : 'from-emerald-50 to-emerald-100/50 border-emerald-200 text-emerald-700' },
    { icon: TrendingUp, label: 'Semantic type', value: group.semanticType || 'General', sublabel: group.direction || '', color: 'from-indigo-50 to-indigo-100/50 border-indigo-200 text-indigo-700' },
    { icon: Info, label: 'Tax type', value: taxTreatment ? formatRuleLabel(taxTreatment) : 'None', sublabel: '', color: 'from-slate-50 to-slate-100/50 border-slate-200 text-slate-700' },
    { icon: Percent, label: 'Tax rate', value: ratePercent ? `${ratePercent}%` : '—', sublabel: '', color: 'from-slate-50 to-slate-100/50 border-slate-200 text-slate-700' },
  ];
  return (
    <div className="grid grid-cols-2 sm:grid-cols-4 gap-2">
      {cards.map((card) => (
        <div key={card.label} className={`rounded-lg bg-gradient-to-br ${card.color} p-3 border`}>
          <div className="text-[11px] font-medium uppercase tracking-wider flex items-center gap-1"><card.icon size={12} /> {card.label}</div>
          <div className="text-xl font-bold mt-0.5">{card.value}</div>
          <div className="text-xs opacity-60">{card.sublabel}</div>
        </div>
      ))}
    </div>
  );
}

function GroupFiltersCard({ group, onRefresh, onAutoSuggest, loading, canSuggest }) {
  const [direction, setDirection] = useState(group?.direction || 'EXPENSE');
  const [sourceType, setSourceType] = useState(group?.sourceType || '');
  const [semanticType, setSemanticType] = useState(group?.semanticType || '');
  const [merchantSig, setMerchantSig] = useState(group?.normalizedMerchant || '');
  const [modified, setModified] = useState(false);

  useEffect(() => {
    setDirection(group?.direction || 'EXPENSE');
    setSourceType(group?.sourceType || '');
    setSemanticType(group?.semanticType || '');
    setMerchantSig(group?.normalizedMerchant || '');
    setModified(false);
  }, [group?.groupKey]);

  const handleApply = () => {
    setModified(false);
    onRefresh?.({ direction, sourceType, semanticType, merchantSig });
  };

  return (
    <div className="rounded-xl border border-slate-200 bg-white p-4 shadow-sm">
      <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-3">
        <h4 className="text-sm font-semibold text-slate-700 flex items-center gap-1.5"><Filter size={14} /> Group formation filters</h4>
        <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
          {canSuggest && (
            <button type="button" className="inline-flex items-center gap-1 px-2.5 py-1.5 text-xs font-medium rounded-lg border border-indigo-200 bg-indigo-50 text-indigo-700 hover:bg-indigo-100 disabled:opacity-50" onClick={onAutoSuggest} disabled={loading}>
              <Sparkles size={12} /> Autosuggest group
            </button>
          )}
          <button type="button" className="inline-flex items-center gap-1 px-2.5 py-1.5 text-xs font-medium rounded-lg bg-indigo-600 text-white shadow-sm hover:bg-indigo-700 disabled:opacity-50" onClick={handleApply} disabled={loading || (!modified && Boolean(group?.previewOnly))}>
            <RefreshCw size={12} className={loading ? 'animate-spin' : ''} /> Refresh transactions
          </button>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div className="text-[11px] text-slate-400 mb-3">These parameters determine which transactions belong to this group. Changes trigger a regroup.</div>
      <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-3">
        <div>
          <label className="block text-xs font-medium text-slate-500 mb-1">Merchant signature</label>
          <input
            className="w-full rounded-lg border border-slate-200 bg-white px-3 py-1.5 text-xs focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500 font-mono"
            value={merchantSig}
            onChange={(e) => { setMerchantSig(e.target.value); setModified(true); }}
            placeholder="e.g. uber lcbo square"
          />
        </div>
        <div>
          <label className="block text-xs font-medium text-slate-500 mb-1">Direction</label>
          <select className="w-full rounded-lg border border-slate-200 bg-white px-3 py-1.5 text-xs focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500" value={direction} onChange={(e) => { setDirection(e.target.value); setModified(true); }}>
            <option value="EXPENSE">Expense</option>
            <option value="INCOME">Income</option>
          </select>
        </div>
        <div>
          <label className="block text-xs font-medium text-slate-500 mb-1">Source type</label>
          <select className="w-full rounded-lg border border-slate-200 bg-white px-3 py-1.5 text-xs focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500" value={sourceType} onChange={(e) => { setSourceType(e.target.value); setModified(true); }}>
            {SOURCE_TYPE_OPTIONS.map((o) => <option key={o.value} value={o.value}>{o.label}</option>)}
          </select>
        </div>
        <div>
          <label className="block text-xs font-medium text-slate-500 mb-1">Semantic type</label>
          <select className="w-full rounded-lg border border-slate-200 bg-white px-3 py-1.5 text-xs focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500" value={semanticType} onChange={(e) => { setSemanticType(e.target.value); setModified(true); }}>
            {SEMANTIC_TYPE_OPTIONS.map((o) => <option key={o.value} value={o.value}>{o.label}</option>)}
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

function TransactionTable({ transactions, loading, onViewTransaction, selectedIds, onToggleSelect, onSelectAll, onShiftSelect }) {
  const lastClickedRef = React.useRef(null);
  if (loading) return <AccountingLoadingState />;
  if (!transactions?.length) {
    return (
      <div className="py-8 text-center text-sm text-slate-400">
        <Database size={24} className="mx-auto mb-2 opacity-40" />
        No matching transactions found.
      </div>
    );
  }
  const allSelected = transactions.every((tx) => selectedIds.includes(tx.id));
  const handleCheck = (e, tx, index) => {
    e.stopPropagation();
    if (e.shiftKey && lastClickedRef.current !== null) {
      const [start, end] = [lastClickedRef.current, index].sort((a, b) => a - b);
      const rangeIds = transactions.slice(start, end + 1).map((t) => t.id);
      onShiftSelect?.(rangeIds);
    } else {
      lastClickedRef.current = index;
      onToggleSelect?.(tx.id);
    }
  };
  return (
    <div className="overflow-x-auto max-h-[500px] overflow-y-auto">
      <table className="min-w-full text-xs">
        <thead>
          <tr className="bg-slate-50/80 sticky top-0 z-10">
            <th className="px-2 py-2 w-8">
              <input type="checkbox" className="w-3.5 h-3.5 rounded border-slate-300 text-indigo-600" checked={allSelected} onChange={(e) => onSelectAll?.(e.target.checked)} />
            </th>
            <th className="px-4 py-2 text-left font-medium text-slate-500">Date</th>
            <th className="px-4 py-2 text-left font-medium text-slate-500">Description</th>
            <th className="px-4 py-2 text-right font-medium text-slate-500">Amount</th>
            <th className="px-4 py-2 text-right font-medium text-slate-500">Tax</th>
            <th className="px-4 py-2 text-left font-medium text-slate-500">Category</th>
            <th className="px-4 py-2 text-left font-medium text-slate-500">Issues</th>
            <th className="px-4 py-2 text-left font-medium text-slate-500">Source</th>
