```jsx
            <th className="px-4 py-2 text-left font-medium text-slate-500">Posted</th>
            <th className="px-2 py-2 w-12"></th>
          </tr>
        </thead>
        <tbody className="divide-y divide-slate-100">
          {transactions.map((tx, index) => {
            const issues = [];
            if (!tx.categoryId) issues.push('No category');
            if (needsTax(tx)) issues.push('No tax');
            if (tx.receiptRequired && !tx.hasReceipt) issues.push('No receipt');
            if (!tx.hasJournalEntry) issues.push('Unposted');
            const checked = selectedIds.includes(tx.id);
            return (
              <tr key={tx.id} className={`hover:bg-white ${checked ? 'bg-indigo-50/50' : ''}`}>
                <td className="px-2 py-2">
                  <input type="checkbox" className="w-3.5 h-3.5 rounded border-slate-300 text-indigo-600" checked={checked} onClick={(e) => handleCheck(e, tx, index)} onChange={() => {}} />
                </td>
                <td className="px-4 py-2 text-slate-600 whitespace-nowrap">{fmtDate(tx.date)}</td>
                <td className="px-4 py-2 text-slate-700 max-w-[220px] truncate">{tx.description}</td>
                <td className={`px-4 py-2 text-right font-mono ${Number(tx.amount) >= 0 ? 'text-emerald-600' : 'text-red-600'}`}>{fmt(tx.amount)}</td>
                <td className="px-4 py-2 text-right font-mono text-slate-600">{tx.taxes == null ? '—' : fmt(tx.taxes)}</td>
                <td className="px-4 py-2 text-slate-500">
                  {tx.currentCategoryCode ? (
                    <><AccountCodeButton code={tx.currentCategoryCode} description={tx.currentCategoryDescription || ''} onOpenAccount={null} />{tx.currentCategoryDescription ? <span className="text-slate-400 ml-1">— {tx.currentCategoryDescription}</span> : null}</>
                  ) : <span className="text-slate-400">Uncategorized</span>}
                </td>
                <td className="px-4 py-2 text-slate-400">{issues.length ? issues.join(', ') : '—'}</td>
                <td className="px-4 py-2 text-slate-400">{tx.sourceName || tx.sourceType || '—'}</td>
                <td className="px-4 py-2">
                  {tx.hasJournalEntry
                    ? <span className="inline-flex items-center gap-1 text-emerald-600"><CheckCircle size={12} /> Posted</span>
                    : <span className="inline-flex items-center gap-1 text-slate-400"><Clock size={12} /> Unposted</span>
                  }
                </td>
                <td className="px-2 py-2">
                  <button type="button" className="text-xs font-medium text-indigo-600 hover:text-indigo-800 whitespace-nowrap" onClick={(e) => { e.stopPropagation(); onViewTransaction?.(tx); }}>Go to</button>
                </td>
              </tr>
            );
          })}
        </tbody>
      </table>
    </div>
  );
}

const Pagination = ({ page, totalPages, totalCount, onPageChange }) => {
  if (totalPages <= 1) return null;
  return (
    <div className="flex items-center justify-between px-4 py-2 border-t border-slate-100 bg-slate-50/80 text-xs text-slate-500">
      <span>{totalCount} total transactions</span>
      <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
        <button type="button" className="px-2 py-1 rounded border border-slate-200 bg-white hover:bg-slate-50 disabled:opacity-30" disabled={page <= 1} onClick={() => onPageChange(page - 1)}>Prev</button>
        <span className="font-medium">Page {page} of {totalPages}</span>
        <button type="button" className="px-2 py-1 rounded border border-slate-200 bg-white hover:bg-slate-50 disabled:opacity-30" disabled={page >= totalPages} onClick={() => onPageChange(page + 1)}>Next</button>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
};

function AlignmentBadge({ alignment }) {
  const cfg = ALIGNMENT_CONFIG[alignment] || ALIGNMENT_CONFIG.NO_RULE;
  return (
    <span className={`inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 rounded-full px-3 py-1 text-xs font-medium ${cfg.bg} ${cfg.color}`}>
      <span className={`w-1.5 h-1.5 rounded-full ${cfg.bg.replace('bg-', 'bg-').replace('100', '400')}`} />
      {cfg.label}
    </span>
  );
}

export default function TransactionGroupModal({
  group,
  rule,
  accounts,
  alignment,
  onClose,
  onChanged,
  onViewTransaction,
  onGenerateSuggestion,
  suggestionId,
  suggestionRule,
  suggestionTransactionIds = [],
  onRejectSuggestion,
}) {
  const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState('overview');
  const [form, setForm] = useState(() => rule ? ruleToFormState(rule, accounts || []) : suggestionId ? suggestionRuleToFormState(suggestionRule || {}, accounts || []) : defaultRuleForm);
  const [working, setWorking] = useState('');
  const [reviseInstructions, setReviseInstructions] = useState('');
  const [transactions, setTransactions] = useState([]);
  const [impact, setImpact] = useState(null);
  const [txLoading, setTxLoading] = useState(false);
  const [txPage, setTxPage] = useState(1);
  const [txFilter, setTxFilter] = useState('all');
  const [applyIncompleteOnly, setApplyIncompleteOnly] = useState(false);
  const [revisionPreview, setRevisionPreview] = useState(null);
  const [previewGroup, setPreviewGroup] = useState(null);
  const [previewLoading, setPreviewLoading] = useState(false);
  const [selectedTransactionIds, setSelectedTransactionIds] = useState([]);
  const [suggestionRevisionInstructions, setSuggestionRevisionInstructions] = useState('');

  const [localRule, setLocalRule] = useState(null);
  const [approvedSuggestionRule, setApprovedSuggestionRule] = useState(null);
  const pageSize = 20;

  const effectiveRule = approvedSuggestionRule || localRule || rule;
  const hasPendingSuggestion = Boolean(suggestionId) && !approvedSuggestionRule;
  const pendingSuggestionRule = suggestionRule || rule?.suggestedRule || rule || null;
  const reviewingPendingSuggestion = hasPendingSuggestion && !localRule;

  const tabs = [
    { id: 'overview', label: 'Group', icon: Layers },
    { id: 'transactions', label: 'Transactions', icon: Database },
    { id: 'rule', label: 'Rule', icon: BookOpen },
  ];

  const ruleId = effectiveRule?.id;
  const activeGroup = previewGroup || group;
  const groupKey = group?.groupKey || '';
  const transactionIds = Array.isArray(activeGroup?.transactionIds) ? activeGroup.transactionIds : [];
  const postTransactionIds = async (ids = []) => {
    const bankIds = [...new Set((ids || []).filter((id) => id !== null && id !== undefined && id !== ''))];
    if (!bankIds.length) return 0;
    const res = await fetchWithAuth(`${SERVER}/accounting/transactions/bulk-post`, {
      method: 'POST',
      headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
      body: JSON.stringify({ bankIds }),
    });
    const data = await res.json().catch(() => ({}));
    if (!res.ok) throw new Error(data.error || 'Failed to post transactions.');
    return data.posted ?? bankIds.length;
  };

  const previewTxns = useMemo(() => {
    const rows = Array.isArray(activeGroup?.transactions) && activeGroup.transactions.length
      ? activeGroup.transactions
      : transactions;
    if (!rows.length) return [];
    return [...rows].sort(() => Math.random() - 0.5).slice(0, 5);
  }, [activeGroup, transactions]);

  useEffect(() => {
    setReviseInstructions('');
    setSuggestionRevisionInstructions('');
    setWorking('');
    setActiveTab(suggestionId ? 'rule' : 'overview');
    setTxPage(1);
    setTxFilter('all');
    setTransactions([]);
    setImpact(null);
    setRevisionPreview(null);
    setPreviewGroup(null);
    setSelectedTransactionIds([]);
    setLocalRule(null);
    setApprovedSuggestionRule(null);
  }, [rule?.id, groupKey, suggestionId]);

  useEffect(() => {
    setSuggestionRevisionInstructions('');
    if (approvedSuggestionRule) {
      setForm(ruleToFormState(approvedSuggestionRule, accounts || []));
    } else if (suggestionId) {
      setForm(suggestionRuleToFormState(pendingSuggestionRule || {}, accounts || []));
    } else if (rule) {
      setForm(ruleToFormState(rule, accounts || []));
    }
  }, [approvedSuggestionRule, suggestionId, pendingSuggestionRule, rule, accounts]);

  const loadGroupTransactions = useCallback(async () => {
    if (!activeGroup?.transactions?.length && !transactionIds.length) return;
    setTxLoading(true);
    try {
      const txs = activeGroup.transactions || [];
      if (txs.length) {
        setTransactions(txs);
        setImpact({ totalCount: txs.length, incompleteCount: activeGroup.incompleteCount, uncategorizedCount: activeGroup.uncategorizedCount, totalAmount: activeGroup.amountTotal ?? activeGroup.totalAmount });
        setTxLoading(false);
        return;
      }
      if (transactionIds.length) {
        const res = await fetchWithAuth(`${SERVER}/accounting/transactions?ids=${transactionIds.slice(0, 200).join(',')}`);
        if (res.ok) {
          const data = await res.json();
          setTransactions(Array.isArray(data.transactions) ? data.transactions : []);
        }
      }
    } catch {} finally { setTxLoading(false); }
  }, [activeGroup, transactionIds]);

  const fetchRuleTransactions = useCallback(async (page = 1, filterOverride) => {
    if (activeGroup) return loadGroupTransactions();
    if (!ruleId) return loadGroupTransactions();
    setTxLoading(true);
    try {
      const f = filterOverride || txFilter;
      const res = await fetchWithAuth(`${SERVER}/accounting/rules/${ruleId}/transactions?page=${page}&pageSize=${pageSize}&filter=${f}`);
      if (!res.ok) throw new Error('Failed to load transactions');
      const data = await res.json();
      setTransactions(data.transactions || []);
      setImpact(data);
      setTxPage(data.page || page);
    } catch (err) {
      toast.error(err.message || 'Failed to load transactions');
    } finally {
      setTxLoading(false);
    }
  }, [ruleId, txFilter, loadGroupTransactions]);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (activeTab === 'transactions') {
      fetchRuleTransactions(txPage);
    }
  }, [activeTab, fetchRuleTransactions, txPage]);

  useEffect(() => {
    if ((activeTab === 'overview' || activeTab === 'rule') && !impact) {
      fetchRuleTransactions(1);
    }
  }, [activeTab, impact, fetchRuleTransactions]);

  const refreshGroupPreview = useCallback(async (filters = {}) => {
    if (!group) return;
    setPreviewLoading(true);
    try {
      const params = new URLSearchParams();
      params.set('merchantSig', filters.merchantSig ?? group.normalizedMerchant ?? '');
      params.set('direction', filters.direction ?? group.direction ?? '');
      params.set('sourceType', filters.sourceType ?? group.sourceType ?? '');
      params.set('semanticType', filters.semanticType ?? group.semanticType ?? '');
      const res = await fetchWithAuth(`${SERVER}/accounting/rule-suggestions/groups/preview?${params.toString()}`);
      const data = await res.json().catch(() => ({}));
      if (!res.ok) throw new Error(data.error || 'Failed to refresh group preview.');
      const nextGroup = data.group || null;
      setPreviewGroup(nextGroup);
      setTransactions(Array.isArray(nextGroup?.transactions) ? nextGroup.transactions : []);
      setImpact({
        totalCount: nextGroup?.transactionCount ?? 0,
        incompleteCount: nextGroup?.incompleteCount ?? 0,
        uncategorizedCount: nextGroup?.uncategorizedCount ?? 0,
        totalAmount: nextGroup?.amountTotal ?? nextGroup?.totalAmount ?? 0,
      });
      setTxPage(1);
      toast.success(`Preview refreshed: ${nextGroup?.transactionCount ?? 0} transaction${(nextGroup?.transactionCount ?? 0) === 1 ? '' : 's'}.`);
    } catch (error) {
      toast.error(error.message || 'Failed to refresh group preview.');
    } finally {
      setPreviewLoading(false);
    }
  }, [group]);

  const handleAutoSuggestGroup = useCallback(() => {
    if (!onGenerateSuggestion || !activeGroup) return;
    onGenerateSuggestion(activeGroup);
  }, [activeGroup, onGenerateSuggestion]);

  const saveRule = async (extra = {}) => {
    if (!ruleId) { toast.error('No rule to save.'); return; }
    const payload = { ...ruleFormToPayload(form), ...extra };
    if (!payload.name) throw new Error('Rule name is required.');
    const res = await fetchWithAuth(`${SERVER}/accounting/rules/${ruleId}`, {
      method: 'PUT',
      headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
      body: JSON.stringify(payload),
    });
    const data = await res.json().catch(() => ({}));
    if (!res.ok) throw new Error(data.error || 'Failed to save rule.');
    return data.rule || null;
  };

  const handleSave = async () => {
    setWorking('save');
    try {
      await saveRule();
      toast.success('Rule saved.');
      await onChanged?.();
    } catch (error) {
      toast.error(error.message || 'Failed to save rule.');
    } finally { setWorking(''); }
  };

  const handleApprove = async () => {
    if (!ruleId) { toast.info('No rule to approve. Generate a suggestion first.'); return; }
    setWorking('approve');
    try {
      await saveRule({ status: 'ACTIVE', enabled: true });
      toast.success('Rule approved and active.');
      await onChanged?.();
    } catch (error) {
      toast.error(error.message || 'Failed to approve rule.');
    } finally { setWorking(''); }
  };

  const handleRevise = async () => {
    if (!ruleId) { toast.info('No rule to revise.'); return; }
    const beforeForm = form;
    setWorking('revise');
    try {
      const payload = ruleFormToPayload(form);
      const res = await fetchWithAuth(`${SERVER}/accounting/rules/${ruleId}/ai-analyze`, {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
        body: JSON.stringify({
          rule: payload,
          prompt: reviseInstructions.trim() || 'Revise this rule for the matched transaction group.',
        }),
      });
      const data = await res.json().catch(() => ({}));
      if (!res.ok) throw new Error(data.error || 'Failed to revise rule.');
      const draft = data.analysis?.suggestedDraft || null;
      if (!draft) throw new Error('AI did not return revised rule details.');
      const patch = draftToRuleFormPatch(draft, accounts || []);
      setRevisionPreview({ before: beforeForm, after: { ...beforeForm, ...patch } });
      setForm((current) => ({ ...current, ...patch }));
      toast.success('Revision drafted. Review and save it.');
    } catch (error) {
      toast.error(error.message || 'Failed to revise rule.');
    } finally { setWorking(''); }
  };

  const handleApproveSuggestion = async () => {
    if (!suggestionId) { toast.info('No suggestion to approve.'); return; }
    setWorking('approve-suggestion');
    try {
      await saveSuggestionDraft({ showToast: false });
      const res = await fetchWithAuth(`${SERVER}/accounting/rule-suggestions/${suggestionId}/approve`, {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
        body: JSON.stringify({ applyToMatches: false, applyPreviousTaxRate: false }),
      });
      const data = await res.json().catch(() => ({}));
      if (!res.ok) throw new Error(data.error || 'Failed to approve suggestion.');
      if (data.rule) {
        setLocalRule(data.rule);
        setApprovedSuggestionRule(data.rule);
        setForm(ruleToFormState(data.rule, accounts || []));
      }
      toast.success(data.message || 'Suggestion approved.');
      await onChanged?.();
    } catch (error) {
      toast.error(error.message || 'Failed to approve suggestion.');
    } finally { setWorking(''); }
  };

  const buildSuggestionPayload = () => {
    const selectedAccount = (accounts || []).find((account) => account.id === form.categoryId) || null;
    const payload = ruleFormToPayload(form);
    return {
      suggestedRule: {
        ...(pendingSuggestionRule || {}),
        name: payload.name,
        suggestedAccountId: selectedAccount?.id || null,
        suggestedAccountCode: selectedAccount?.code || null,
        suggestedAccountDescription: accountDescription(selectedAccount),
        categoryId: selectedAccount?.id || null,
        categoryCode: selectedAccount?.code || null,
        transactionType: payload.transactionType,
        taxTreatment: payload.taxTreatment,
        sourceType: payload.sourceType || pendingSuggestionRule?.sourceType || pendingSuggestionRule?.matchConditions?.sourceType || null,
        amountDirection: payload.amountDirection || pendingSuggestionRule?.amountDirection || pendingSuggestionRule?.matchConditions?.amountDirection || null,
        requiredReceipt: payload.requiredReceipt,
        applyPreviousTaxRate: payload.applyPreviousTaxRate,
        previousTaxRate: payload.previousTaxRate || null,
        patterns: payload.patterns,
        autoCategory: payload.autoCategory,
        autoApplyTaxes: payload.autoApplyTaxes,
        group: payload.group,
        notes: payload.notes,
        matchMode: payload.matchMode,
        enabled: payload.enabled,
        sql: payload.sql,
        llmSummary: payload.llmSummary,
        proposalSource: payload.proposalSource,
        journalMode: payload.journalMode,
        journalTemplateLines: payload.journalTemplateLines,
      },
    };
  };

  const saveSuggestionDraft = async ({ showToast = true } = {}) => {
    if (!suggestionId) throw new Error('No suggestion to save.');
    const res = await fetchWithAuth(`${SERVER}/accounting/rule-suggestions/${suggestionId}`, {
      method: 'PUT',
      headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
      body: JSON.stringify(buildSuggestionPayload()),
    });
    const data = await res.json().catch(() => ({}));
    if (!res.ok) throw new Error(data.error || 'Failed to save suggestion.');
    if (showToast) toast.success(data.message || 'Suggestion updated.');
    await onChanged?.();
    return data.suggestion || null;
  };

  const handleReviseSuggestion = async () => {
    if (!suggestionId) { toast.info('No suggestion to revise.'); return; }
    const instructions = suggestionRevisionInstructions.trim();
    if (!instructions) { toast.info('Enter revision instructions first.'); return; }
    setWorking('revise-suggestion');
    try {
      await saveSuggestionDraft({ showToast: false });
      const res = await fetchWithAuth(`${SERVER}/accounting/rule-suggestions/${suggestionId}/revise`, {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
        body: JSON.stringify({ instructions }),
      });
      const data = await res.json().catch(() => ({}));
      if (!res.ok) throw new Error(data.error || 'Failed to revise suggestion.');
      const nextRule = data.suggestion?.suggestedRule || null;
      if (nextRule) {
        setForm(suggestionRuleToFormState(nextRule, accounts || []));
      }
      setSuggestionRevisionInstructions('');
      toast.success(data.message || 'Suggestion revised. Review and save it.');
      await onChanged?.();
    } catch (error) {
      toast.error(error.message || 'Failed to revise suggestion.');
    } finally { setWorking(''); }
  };

  const handleRejectSuggestion = async () => {
    if (!suggestionId) { toast.info('No suggestion to reject.'); return; }
    setWorking('reject-suggestion');
    try {
      if (onRejectSuggestion) {
        await onRejectSuggestion(suggestionId);
      } else {
        const res = await fetchWithAuth(`${SERVER}/accounting/rule-suggestions/${suggestionId}/reject`, {
          method: 'POST',
        });
        const data = await res.json().catch(() => ({}));
        if (!res.ok) throw new Error(data.error || 'Failed to reject suggestion.');
        toast.success(data.message || 'Suggestion rejected.');
      }
      await onChanged?.();
    } catch (error) {
      toast.error(error.message || 'Failed to reject suggestion.');
    } finally { setWorking(''); }
  };

  const handleDelete = async () => {
    if (!ruleId) { toast.info('No rule to delete.'); return; }
    if (!window.confirm(`Delete ${effectiveRule.name}?`)) return;
    setWorking('delete');
    try {
      const res = await fetchWithAuth(`${SERVER}/accounting/rules/${ruleId}`, { method: 'DELETE' });
      const data = await res.json().catch(() => ({}));
      if (!res.ok) throw new Error(data.error || 'Failed to delete rule.');
      toast.success(data.message || 'Rule deleted.');
      await onChanged?.();
      onClose();
    } catch (error) {
      toast.error(error.message || 'Failed to delete rule.');
    } finally { setWorking(''); }
  };

  const handleApply = async () => {
    if (!ruleId) { toast.info('No rule to apply.'); return; }
    setWorking('apply');
    try {
      await saveRule();
      let ids = transactionIds;
      if (!ids.length && impact?.totalCount) {
        ids = transactions.map((tx) => tx.id);
      }
      if (!ids.length) { toast.info('No transactions to apply.'); return; }
      if (applyIncompleteOnly) {
        const incompleteIds = transactions.filter(isIncompleteTransaction).map((tx) => tx.id);
        ids = ids.filter((id) => incompleteIds.includes(id));
        if (!ids.length) { toast.info('No incomplete transactions to apply to.'); return; }
      }
      const res = await fetchWithAuth(`${SERVER}/accounting/rules/${ruleId}/run`, {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
        body: JSON.stringify({ transactionIds: ids }),
      });
      const data = await res.json().catch(() => ({}));
      if (!res.ok) throw new Error(data.error || 'Failed to apply rule.');
      const posted = await postTransactionIds(ids);
      toast.success(`${data.message || 'Rule applied.'} Posted ${posted} transaction${posted === 1 ? '' : 's'}.`);
      window.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent('refetchTransactions'));
      await onChanged?.();
    } catch (error) {
      toast.error(error.message || 'Failed to apply rule.');
    } finally { setWorking(''); }
  };

  const handlePost = async () => {
    if (!transactionIds.length && !impact?.totalCount) {
      toast.info('No transactions found to post.');
      return;
    }
    setWorking('post');
    try {
      const ids = transactionIds.length ? transactionIds : (transactions.map((tx) => tx.id) || []);
      if (!ids.length) { toast.info('No transactions to post.'); return; }
      const posted = await postTransactionIds(ids);
      toast.success(`Posted ${posted} transaction${posted === 1 ? '' : 's'}.`);
      window.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent('refetchTransactions'));
      await onChanged?.();
      setImpact(null);
    } catch (error) {
      toast.error(error.message || 'Failed to post transactions.');
    } finally { setWorking(''); }
  };

  const handleUnpost = async () => {
    const ids = selectedTransactionIds;
    if (!ids.length) { toast.info('No transactions selected to unpost.'); return; }
    setWorking('unpost');
    try {
      const res = await fetchWithAuth(`${SERVER}/accounting/transactions/bulk-unpost`, {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
        body: JSON.stringify({ bankIds: ids }),
      });
      const data = await res.json().catch(() => ({}));
      if (!res.ok) throw new Error(data.error || 'Failed to unpost transactions.');
      toast.success(`Unposted ${data.unposted ?? ids.length} transaction${(data.unposted ?? ids.length) === 1 ? '' : 's'}.`);
      setSelectedTransactionIds([]);
      fetchRuleTransactions(txPage);
    } catch (error) {
      toast.error(error.message || 'Failed to unpost transactions.');
    } finally { setWorking(''); }
  };

  const handleApplySelected = async () => {
    if (!ruleId) { toast.info('No rule to apply.'); return; }
    const ids = selectedTransactionIds;
    if (!ids.length) { toast.info('No transactions selected to apply rule to.'); return; }
    setWorking('apply-selected');
    try {
      await saveRule();
      const res = await fetchWithAuth(`${SERVER}/accounting/rules/${ruleId}/run`, {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
        body: JSON.stringify({ transactionIds: ids }),
      });
      const data = await res.json().catch(() => ({}));
      if (!res.ok) throw new Error(data.error || 'Failed to apply rule.');
      const posted = await postTransactionIds(ids);
      toast.success(`${data.message || 'Rule applied to selected transactions.'} Posted ${posted} transaction${posted === 1 ? '' : 's'}.`);
      setSelectedTransactionIds([]);
      fetchRuleTransactions(txPage);
    } catch (error) {
      toast.error(error.message || 'Failed to apply rule to selected transactions.');
    } finally { setWorking(''); }
  };

  const disabled = Boolean(working);
  const hasRule = Boolean(effectiveRule) && !reviewingPendingSuggestion;
  const canApproveRule = hasRule && (String(effectiveRule?.status || '').toUpperCase() !== 'ACTIVE' || form.enabled === false);
  const displayAlignment = approvedSuggestionRule ? 'ACTIVE_RULE_MATCHES' : alignment;
  const meta = effectiveRule?.meta || {};
  const account = (accounts || []).find((item) =>
    item.id === form.categoryId ||
    String(item.code) === String(meta.suggestedAccountCode || effectiveRule?.categoryCode || '')
  ) || null;
  const patternList = Array.isArray(meta.patterns) ? meta.patterns : form.patternsText.split('\n').map(s => s.trim()).filter(Boolean);
  const journalLines = (() => {
    try { return JSON.parse(form.journalTemplateText || '[]'); } catch { return []; }
  })();

  const journalPreviewLines = (() => {
    const stored = (() => {
      try { return Array.isArray(meta.journalTemplateLines) ? meta.journalTemplateLines : JSON.parse(form.journalTemplateText || '[]'); } catch { return []; }
    })();
    const selectedAccount = (accounts || []).find((item) => item.id === (form.categoryId || effectiveRule?.categoryId)) || null;
    return deriveJournalTemplateLines({
      accounts,
      selectedAccount,
      taxTreatment: form.taxTreatment || meta.taxTreatment || '',
      sourceType: form.sourceType || meta.sourceType || '',
      amountDirection: form.amountDirection || meta.amountDirection || '',
      existingLines: stored,
    });
  })();

  const resolveAccountForLine = (line, list) => {
    const ac = String(line.accountCode || line.code || '').trim();
    const ai = String(line.accountId || '').trim();
    return (list || accounts || []).find((a) =>
      (ac && String(a.code) === ac) || (ac && String(a.id) === ac) || (ai && String(a.id) === ai)
    ) || null;
  };

  const accountLabel = (a) => {
    if (!a) return '';
    const d = a?.description || a?.name || '';
    return d ? `${a.code} — ${d}` : String(a.code || '');
  };

  const updateJournalLine = (index, patch) => {
    const lines = [...journalLines];
    lines[index] = { ...lines[index], ...patch };
    setForm((f) => ({ ...f, journalTemplateText: JSON.stringify(lines, null, 2) }));
  };

  const removeJournalLine = (index) => {
    setForm((f) => ({ ...f, journalTemplateText: JSON.stringify(journalLines.filter((_, i) => i !== index), null, 2) }));
  };

  const addJournalLine = () => {
    const fa = accounts?.[0];
    setForm((f) => ({ ...f, journalTemplateText: JSON.stringify([...journalLines, { accountId: fa?.id || null, accountCode: fa?.code || '', accountDescription: fa?.description || '', side: 'DEBIT', amountFormula: 'gross' }], null, 2) }));
  };

  const withDerivedJournalTemplate = (current, patch) => {
    const next = { ...current, ...patch };
    const selectedAccount = (accounts || []).find((item) => item.id === next.categoryId) || null;
    const derivedLines = deriveJournalTemplateLines({
      accounts, selectedAccount, taxTreatment: next.taxTreatment, sourceType: next.sourceType, amountDirection: next.amountDirection, existingLines: (() => { try { return JSON.parse(next.journalTemplateText || '[]'); } catch { return []; } })(),
    });
    return { ...patch, journalMode: derivedLines.length ? 'PROPOSAL_HINT' : next.journalMode, journalTemplateText: JSON.stringify(derivedLines, null, 2) };
  };

  const txFilterOptions = [
    { id: 'all', label: 'All', matches: () => true },
    { id: 'incomplete', label: 'Incomplete', matches: isIncompleteTransaction },
    { id: 'noCategory', label: 'No category', matches: (tx) => !tx.categoryId },
    { id: 'noTax', label: 'No tax', matches: needsTax },
    { id: 'noReceipt', label: 'No receipt', matches: (tx) => tx.receiptRequired && !tx.hasReceipt },
    { id: 'unposted', label: 'Unposted', matches: (tx) => !tx.hasJournalEntry },
  ];

  const normalizeFormulaLocal = normalizeFormula;
  const FORMULA_HELP_LOCAL = FORMULA_HELP;
  const FORMULA_OPTIONS_LOCAL = FORMULA_OPTIONS;

  return (
    <dialog className="modal modal-open">
      <div className="modal-box w-11/12 max-w-6xl max-h-[90vh] overflow-y-hidden bg-slate-50 p-0 flex flex-col">
        <div className="sticky top-0 z-20 border-b border-slate-200 bg-white/95 px-5 py-4 backdrop-blur-sm shrink-0">
          <div className="flex flex-wrap items-start justify-between gap-3">
            <div className="flex min-w-0 items-center gap-3">
              <span className="inline-flex h-9 w-9 shrink-0 items-center justify-center rounded-lg bg-indigo-50 text-indigo-600">
                <Layers size={18} />
              </span>
              <div className="min-w-0">
                <h3 className="truncate text-xl font-bold text-slate-900">{activeGroup?.normalizedMerchant || 'Transaction group'}</h3>
                <p className="text-sm text-slate-500 flex flex-wrap items-center gap-2">
                  <span>{activeGroup?.direction || ''} · {activeGroup?.sourceType || ''} · {activeGroup?.semanticType || 'General'}</span>
                  {hasRule && <span className="text-indigo-500">· Rule: {effectiveRule?.name || 'Untitled'}</span>}
                  <span>· {activeGroup?.transactionCount ?? 0} txns</span>
                  {displayAlignment && <AlignmentBadge alignment={displayAlignment} />}
                </p>
              </div>
            </div>
            <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
              {!hasRule && onGenerateSuggestion && (
                <button type="button" className="inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 rounded-lg bg-indigo-600 px-3 py-2 text-xs font-medium text-white shadow-sm hover:bg-indigo-700" onClick={() => onGenerateSuggestion(activeGroup)} disabled={disabled}>
                  <Sparkles size={14} /> Suggest rule
                </button>
              )}
              <button type="button" className="inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 rounded-lg border border-slate-200 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-xs font-medium text-slate-600 hover:bg-slate-50" onClick={onClose} disabled={disabled}>
                <XCircle size={14} /> Close
              </button>
            </div>
          </div>

          <div className="flex gap-1 mt-3 p-0.5 bg-slate-100 rounded-lg w-fit">
            {tabs.map((tab) => (
              <button key={tab.id} type="button"
                className={`px-3 py-1.5 text-xs font-medium rounded-md transition-all flex items-center gap-1.5 ${
                  activeTab === tab.id
                    ? 'bg-white text-indigo-700 shadow-sm border border-slate-200'
                    : 'text-slate-500 hover:text-slate-700'
                }`}
                onClick={() => setActiveTab(tab.id)}
              >
                <tab.icon size={14} /> {tab.label}
              </button>
            ))}
          </div>
        </div>

        <div className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto p-5 space-y-4">
          {activeTab === 'overview' && (
            <>
              <GroupFiltersCard
                group={activeGroup}
                onRefresh={refreshGroupPreview}
                onAutoSuggest={handleAutoSuggestGroup}
                loading={previewLoading}
                canSuggest={!hasRule && Boolean(onGenerateSuggestion)}
              />

              <SummaryCards group={activeGroup} rule={effectiveRule} />

              {journalPreviewLines.length > 0 && (
                <div className="rounded-xl border border-slate-200 bg-white p-4 shadow-sm">
                  <h4 className="text-xs font-semibold text-slate-500 mb-2">Journal template</h4>
                  <JournalTemplatePreview lines={journalPreviewLines} accounts={accounts} onOpenAccount={null} />
                </div>
              )}

              {activeGroup?.dateRange && (
                <div className="rounded-xl border border-slate-200 bg-white p-3 shadow-sm">
                  <div className="text-[11px] font-medium text-slate-500 uppercase tracking-wider mb-1">Date range</div>
                  <div className="text-sm font-medium text-slate-700">
                    {fmtDate(activeGroup.dateRange.from)} — {fmtDate(activeGroup.dateRange.to)}
                  </div>
                </div>
              )}

              {previewTxns.length > 0 && (
                <div className="rounded-xl border border-slate-200 bg-white p-4 shadow-sm">
                  <div className="mb-2 flex items-center justify-between gap-2">
                    <h4 className="text-sm font-semibold text-slate-700 flex items-center gap-1.5"><Database size={14} /> Transaction preview (random sample)</h4>
                    <button type="button" className="inline-flex items-center gap-1 px-2 py-1 text-xs font-medium rounded-lg border border-slate-200 bg-white text-slate-600 hover:bg-slate-50 disabled:opacity-50" onClick={() => refreshGroupPreview({
                      merchantSig: activeGroup?.normalizedMerchant,
                      direction: activeGroup?.direction,
                      sourceType: activeGroup?.sourceType,
                      semanticType: activeGroup?.semanticType,
                    })} disabled={previewLoading}>
                      <RefreshCw size={12} className={previewLoading ? 'animate-spin' : ''} /> Refresh transactions
                    </button>
                  </div>
                  <div className="overflow-x-auto">
                    <table className="min-w-full text-xs">
                      <thead>
                        <tr className="bg-slate-50/80">
                          <th className="px-3 py-1.5 text-left font-medium text-slate-500">Date</th>
                          <th className="px-3 py-1.5 text-left font-medium text-slate-500">Description</th>
                          <th className="px-3 py-1.5 text-right font-medium text-slate-500">Amount</th>
                          <th className="px-3 py-1.5 text-left font-medium text-slate-500">Category</th>
                        </tr>
                      </thead>
                      <tbody className="divide-y divide-slate-100">
                        {previewTxns.map((tx) => (
                          <tr key={tx.id} className="hover:bg-slate-50">
                            <td className="px-3 py-1.5 text-slate-600 whitespace-nowrap">{fmtDate(tx.date)}</td>
                            <td className="px-3 py-1.5 text-slate-700 max-w-[240px] truncate">{tx.description}</td>
                            <td className={`px-3 py-1.5 text-right font-mono ${Number(tx.amount) >= 0 ? 'text-emerald-600' : 'text-red-600'}`}>{fmt(tx.amount)}</td>
                            <td className="px-3 py-1.5 text-slate-500">
                              {tx.currentCategoryCode ? `${tx.currentCategoryCode} — ${tx.currentCategoryDescription || ''}` : <span className="text-slate-400">Uncategorized</span>}
                            </td>
                          </tr>
                        ))}
                      </tbody>
                    </table>
                  </div>
                </div>
              )}

              {alignment === 'RULE_PARTIAL_COVERAGE' || alignment === 'RULE_MISMATCH' ? (
                <div className="rounded-xl border border-orange-200 bg-orange-50 p-4">
                  <div className="flex items-start gap-2">
                    <AlertCircle size={16} className="text-orange-600 mt-0.5 shrink-0" />
                    <div>
                      <h4 className="text-sm font-semibold text-orange-800">Rule coverage mismatch</h4>
                      <p className="text-xs text-orange-700 mt-1">The linked rule does not fully cover all transactions in this group. Go to the Rule tab and adjust the match patterns, or generate a new suggestion.</p>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                </div>
              ) : null}
            </>
          )}

          {activeTab === 'transactions' && (
            <div className="rounded-xl border border-slate-200 bg-white p-4 shadow-sm">
              <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-3">
                <h4 className="text-sm font-semibold text-slate-700 flex items-center gap-1.5"><Database size={14} /> Transactions in this group</h4>
                <button type="button" className="inline-flex items-center gap-1 px-2 py-1 text-xs font-medium rounded-lg border border-slate-200 bg-white text-slate-600 hover:bg-slate-50" onClick={() => { setTxPage(1); fetchRuleTransactions(1); setSelectedTransactionIds([]); }} disabled={txLoading}>
                  <RefreshCw size={12} className={txLoading ? 'animate-spin' : ''} /> Refresh
                </button>
              </div>
              <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-1 mb-3">
                {txFilterOptions.map((f) => (
                  <button key={f.id} type="button"
                    className={`px-2.5 py-1 text-xs font-medium rounded-lg transition-all ${
                      txFilter === f.id
                        ? 'bg-indigo-600 text-white shadow-sm'
                        : 'text-slate-500 hover:text-slate-700 hover:bg-slate-100 border border-slate-200'
                    }`}
                    onClick={() => { setTxFilter(f.id); setTxPage(1); fetchRuleTransactions(1, f.id); setSelectedTransactionIds([]); }}
                  >
                    {f.label}
                  </button>
                ))}
              </div>
              {selectedTransactionIds.length > 0 && (
                <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-3 px-1">
                  <span className="text-xs font-medium text-slate-600">{selectedTransactionIds.length} selected</span>
                  {hasRule && (
                    <button type="button" className="inline-flex items-center gap-1 px-2 py-1 text-xs font-medium rounded-lg bg-indigo-600 text-white shadow-sm hover:bg-indigo-700 disabled:opacity-50" onClick={handleApplySelected} disabled={disabled}>
                      <Play size={12} /> Apply rule to selected
                    </button>
                  )}
                  <button type="button" className="inline-flex items-center gap-1 px-2 py-1 text-xs font-medium rounded-lg border border-slate-200 bg-white text-slate-600 hover:bg-slate-50 disabled:opacity-50" onClick={handleUnpost} disabled={disabled}>
                    <Clock size={12} /> Unpost selected
                  </button>
                  <button type="button" className="inline-flex items-center gap-1 px-2 py-1 text-xs font-medium rounded-lg border border-slate-200 bg-white text-slate-400 hover:bg-slate-50 hover:text-slate-600" onClick={() => setSelectedTransactionIds([])}>
                    <XCircle size={12} /> Clear
                  </button>
                </div>
              )}
              <TransactionTable
                transactions={transactions}
                loading={txLoading}
                onViewTransaction={onViewTransaction}
                selectedIds={selectedTransactionIds}
                onToggleSelect={(id) => setSelectedTransactionIds((prev) => prev.includes(id) ? prev.filter((x) => x !== id) : [...prev, id])}
                onSelectAll={(checked) => setSelectedTransactionIds(checked ? transactions.map((tx) => tx.id) : [])}
                onShiftSelect={(ids) => setSelectedTransactionIds((prev) => { const set = new Set(prev); ids.forEach((id) => set.add(id)); return [...set]; })}
              />
              <Pagination page={txPage} totalPages={Math.ceil((impact?.filteredCount ?? impact?.totalCount ?? 0) / pageSize)} totalCount={impact?.filteredCount ?? impact?.totalCount ?? 0} onPageChange={(p) => { setTxPage(p); setSelectedTransactionIds([]); }} />
            </div>
          )}

          {activeTab === 'rule' && (
            <div className="space-y-4">
              {reviewingPendingSuggestion ? (
                <>
                  <div className="rounded-xl border border-indigo-200 bg-indigo-50 p-4 shadow-sm">
                    <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
                      <Sparkles size={16} className="text-indigo-600 mt-0.5 shrink-0" />
                      <div>
                        <h4 className="text-sm font-semibold text-indigo-800">AI Suggestion</h4>
                        <p className="mt-0.5 text-xs text-indigo-700/80">Review the rule fields below, then approve or reject. Edits are saved before approving.</p>
                      </div>
                    </div>
                  </div>

                  <div className="rounded-xl border border-slate-200 bg-white p-4 shadow-sm">
                    <div className="mb-4 rounded-lg border border-slate-200 bg-slate-50 p-3">
                      <label className="block text-xs font-medium text-slate-500 mb-1">AI revision instructions</label>
                      <textarea className="min-h-[64px] w-full rounded-lg border border-slate-200 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm focus:border-indigo-500 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500" value={suggestionRevisionInstructions} onChange={(e) => setSuggestionRevisionInstructions(e.target.value)} placeholder="Adjust patterns, change category, etc." />
                      <div className="mt-2 flex justify-end">
                        <button type="button" className="inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 rounded-lg border border-slate-200 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm font-medium text-slate-600 hover:bg-slate-50 disabled:opacity-50" onClick={handleReviseSuggestion} disabled={disabled || !suggestionRevisionInstructions.trim()}>
                          <Sparkles size={16} /> Revise with AI
                        </button>
                      </div>
                    </div>

                    <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-4">
                      <div>
                        <label className="block text-xs font-medium text-slate-500 mb-1">Rule name</label>
                        <input className="w-full rounded-lg border border-slate-200 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500" value={form.name} onChange={(e) => setForm((f) => ({ ...f, name: e.target.value }))} />
                      </div>
                      <div>
                        <label className="block text-xs font-medium text-slate-500 mb-1">Group tag</label>
                        <input className="w-full rounded-lg border border-slate-200 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500" value={form.group} onChange={(e) => setForm((f) => ({ ...f, group: e.target.value }))} />
                      </div>
                      <div className="md:col-span-2">
                        <label className="block text-xs font-medium text-slate-500 mb-1">Notes</label>
                        <textarea className="w-full rounded-lg border border-slate-200 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500 min-h-[80px]" value={form.notes} onChange={(e) => setForm((f) => ({ ...f, notes: e.target.value }))} />
                      </div>
                      <div className="md:col-span-2">
                        <label className="block text-xs font-medium text-slate-500 mb-1">Match patterns (one per line)</label>
                        <textarea className="w-full rounded-lg border border-slate-200 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm font-mono focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500 min-h-[80px]" value={form.patternsText} onChange={(e) => setForm((f) => ({ ...f, patternsText: e.target.value }))} />
                      </div>
                      <div>
                        <label className="block text-xs font-medium text-slate-500 mb-1">Match mode</label>
                        <select className="w-full rounded-lg border border-slate-200 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm" value={form.matchMode} onChange={(e) => setForm((f) => ({ ...f, matchMode: e.target.value }))}>
                          <option value="ANY">Match any pattern</option>
                          <option value="ALL">Match all patterns</option>
                        </select>
                      </div>
                      <div>
                        <label className="block text-xs font-medium text-slate-500 mb-1">Amount direction</label>
                        <select className="w-full rounded-lg border border-slate-200 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm" value={form.amountDirection} onChange={(e) => setForm((f) => ({ ...f, ...withDerivedJournalTemplate(f, { amountDirection: e.target.value }) }))}>
                          <option value="ANY">Any</option>
                          <option value="EXPENSE">Expense only</option>
                          <option value="INCOME">Income only</option>
                        </select>
                      </div>
                      <div>
                        <label className="block text-xs font-medium text-slate-500 mb-1">Source type</label>
                        <select className="w-full rounded-lg border border-slate-200 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm" value={form.sourceType} onChange={(e) => setForm((f) => ({ ...f, ...withDerivedJournalTemplate(f, { sourceType: e.target.value }) }))}>
                          <option value="">Any</option>
                          <option value="CHEQUING_ACCOUNT">Chequing account</option>
                          <option value="CREDIT_CARD">Credit card</option>
                        </select>
                      </div>
                      <div>
                        <label className="block text-xs font-medium text-slate-500 mb-1">Posting type</label>
                        <select className="w-full rounded-lg border border-slate-200 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm" value={form.transactionType} onChange={(e) => setForm((f) => ({ ...f, transactionType: e.target.value, applyPreviousTaxRate: FORCE_NO_TAX_TRANSACTION_TYPES.has(String(e.target.value || '').toUpperCase()) ? false : f.applyPreviousTaxRate }))}>
                          {transactionTypes.map((type) => <option key={type || 'blank'} value={type}>{type || 'Do not set posting type'}</option>)}
                        </select>
                      </div>
                      <div className="md:col-span-2">
                        <label className="block text-xs font-medium text-slate-500 mb-1">Category / account</label>
                        <AccountAutocomplete value={form.categoryId} onChange={(val) => setForm((f) => ({ ...f, ...withDerivedJournalTemplate(f, { categoryId: val, autoCategory: Boolean(val) }) }))} accounts={accounts || []} placeholder="Do not auto-categorize" />
                      </div>
                      <div>
                        <label className="block text-xs font-medium text-slate-500 mb-1">Tax treatment</label>
                        <select className="w-full rounded-lg border border-slate-200 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm" value={form.taxTreatment} onChange={(e) => setForm((f) => ({ ...f, ...withDerivedJournalTemplate(f, { taxTreatment: e.target.value }) }))}>
                          <option value="">None</option>
                          {TAX_TREATMENTS.map((type) => <option key={type} value={type}>{type}</option>)}
                        </select>
                      </div>
                      <div>
                        <label className="block text-xs font-medium text-slate-500 mb-1">Tax rate %</label>
                        <input className="w-full rounded-lg border border-slate-200 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm" type="number" min="0" step="0.01" value={form.ratePercent} onChange={(e) => setForm((f) => ({ ...f, ratePercent: e.target.value, applyPreviousTaxRate: Number(e.target.value) > 0 || f.applyPreviousTaxRate }))} />
                      </div>
                      <div className="md:col-span-2 flex flex-wrap gap-4">
                        <label className="flex items-center gap-2 cursor-pointer">
                          <input type="checkbox" className="w-4 h-4 rounded border-slate-300 text-indigo-600" checked={form.applyPreviousTaxRate} disabled={FORCE_NO_TAX_TRANSACTION_TYPES.has(String(form.transactionType || '').toUpperCase())} onChange={(e) => setForm((f) => ({ ...f, applyPreviousTaxRate: e.target.checked }))} />
                          <span className="text-xs text-slate-600">Apply tax rate</span>
                        </label>
                        <label className="flex items-center gap-2 cursor-pointer">
                          <input type="checkbox" className="w-4 h-4 rounded border-slate-300 text-indigo-600" checked={form.requiredReceipt} onChange={(e) => setForm((f) => ({ ...f, requiredReceipt: e.target.checked }))} />
                          <span className="text-xs text-slate-600">Receipt required</span>
                        </label>
                        <label className="flex items-center gap-2 cursor-pointer">
                          <input type="checkbox" className="w-4 h-4 rounded border-slate-300 text-indigo-600" checked={form.enabled !== false} onChange={(e) => setForm((f) => ({ ...f, enabled: e.target.checked }))} />
                          <span className="text-xs text-slate-600">Enabled</span>
                        </label>
                        <label className="flex items-center gap-2 cursor-pointer">
                          <input type="checkbox" className="w-4 h-4 rounded border-slate-300 text-indigo-600" checked={form.autoCategory} onChange={(e) => setForm((f) => ({ ...f, autoCategory: e.target.checked }))} />
                          <span className="text-xs text-slate-600">Auto category</span>
                        </label>
                        <label className="flex items-center gap-2 cursor-pointer">
                          <input type="checkbox" className="w-4 h-4 rounded border-slate-300 text-indigo-600" checked={form.autoApplyTaxes} onChange={(e) => setForm((f) => ({ ...f, autoApplyTaxes: e.target.checked }))} />
                          <span className="text-xs text-slate-600">Auto taxes</span>
                        </label>
                      </div>
                      <div>
                        <label className="block text-xs font-medium text-slate-500 mb-1">Journal mode</label>
                        <select className="w-full rounded-lg border border-slate-200 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm" value={form.journalMode} onChange={(e) => setForm((f) => ({ ...f, journalMode: e.target.value }))}>
                          <option value="STANDARD">Standard generated journal</option>
                          <option value="PROPOSAL_HINT">Use stored AI/proposal journal lines</option>
                        </select>
                      </div>
                      <div className="md:col-span-2">
                        <label className="block text-xs font-medium text-slate-500 mb-1">SQL (optional)</label>
                        <textarea className="w-full rounded-lg border border-slate-200 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm font-mono focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500 min-h-[80px]" value={form.sql} onChange={(e) => setForm((f) => ({ ...f, sql: e.target.value }))} />
                      </div>
                      <div className="md:col-span-2">
                        <label className="block text-xs font-medium text-slate-500 mb-1">AI summary</label>
                        <textarea className="w-full rounded-lg border border-slate-200 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500 min-h-[60px]" value={form.llmSummary} onChange={(e) => setForm((f) => ({ ...f, llmSummary: e.target.value }))} />
                      </div>
                    </div>

                    <div className="mt-6 border-t border-slate-200 pt-4">
                      <div className="flex items-center justify-between gap-2 mb-3">
                        <div>
                          <div className="text-xs font-semibold text-slate-500">Journal template lines</div>
                          <div className="text-[11px] text-slate-400">Add or edit journal lines for this rule.</div>
                        </div>
                        <button type="button" className="inline-flex items-center gap-1 px-2.5 py-1.5 text-xs font-medium rounded-lg border border-slate-200 bg-white text-slate-600 hover:bg-slate-50" onClick={addJournalLine}>
                          <Plus size={12} /> Add line
                        </button>
                      </div>
                      {journalLines.length === 0 ? (
                        <p className="text-xs text-slate-400 py-2">No journal template lines configured. Standard auto-generated journal will be used.</p>
                      ) : (
                        <div className="space-y-2">
                          {journalLines.map((line, index) => {
                            const lineAccount = resolveAccountForLine(line);
                            return (
                              <div key={index} className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-[1fr_120px_1fr_auto] gap-2 items-start">
                                <AccountAutocomplete
                                  value={lineAccount?.id || line.accountId || ''}
                                  onChange={(val) => {
                                    const nextAccount = (accounts || []).find((a) => a.id === val) || null;
                                    updateJournalLine(index, {
                                      accountId: nextAccount?.id || null,
                                      accountCode: nextAccount?.code || '',
                                      accountDescription: nextAccount?.description || '',
                                    });
                                  }}
                                  accounts={accounts || []}
                                  placeholder="Account"
                                />
                                <select
                                  className="rounded-lg border border-slate-200 bg-white px-3 py-1.5 text-sm"
                                  value={line.side || 'DEBIT'}
                                  onChange={(e) => updateJournalLine(index, { side: e.target.value })}
                                >
                                  <option value="DEBIT">DEBIT</option>
                                  <option value="CREDIT">CREDIT</option>
                                </select>
                                <div>
                                  <select
                                    className="w-full rounded-lg border border-slate-200 bg-white px-3 py-1.5 text-sm"
                                    value={normalizeFormula(line.amountFormula)}
                                    onChange={(e) => updateJournalLine(index, { amountFormula: e.target.value })}
                                    title={FORMULA_HELP[normalizeFormula(line.amountFormula)] || ''}
                                  >
                                    <option value="">Formula</option>
                                    {FORMULA_OPTIONS.map((f) => (
                                      <option key={f} value={f}>{f}</option>
                                    ))}
                                  </select>
                                  <FormulaHelp formula={line.amountFormula} />
                                </div>
                                <button type="button" className="inline-flex items-center justify-center p-1.5 text-red-500 hover:text-red-700 hover:bg-red-50 rounded-lg" onClick={() => removeJournalLine(index)} title="Remove line">
                                  <Trash2 size={14} />
                                </button>
                              </div>
                            );
                          })}
                        </div>
                      )}
                    </div>
                  </div>

                  <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2">
                    <button type="button" className="inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 rounded-lg border border-emerald-200 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm font-medium text-emerald-700 hover:bg-emerald-50 disabled:opacity-50" onClick={handleApproveSuggestion} disabled={disabled}>
                      <CheckCircle size={16} /> Approve
                    </button>
                    <button type="button" className="inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 rounded-lg border border-red-200 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm font-medium text-red-600 hover:bg-red-50 disabled:opacity-50" onClick={handleRejectSuggestion} disabled={disabled}>
                      <XCircle size={16} /> Reject
                    </button>
                  </div>
                </>
              ) : hasRule ? (
                <>
                  <div className="rounded-xl border border-slate-200 bg-white p-4 shadow-sm">
                    <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-3">
                      <h4 className="text-sm font-semibold text-slate-700 flex items-center gap-1.5"><BookOpen size={14} /> Rule: {effectiveRule.name}</h4>
                      <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                        <button type="button" className="inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 rounded-lg border border-slate-200 bg-white px-3 py-1.5 text-xs font-medium text-slate-600 hover:bg-slate-50" onClick={handleRevise} disabled={disabled}>
                          <Sparkles size={12} /> Revise with AI
                        </button>
                        <button type="button" className="inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 rounded-lg border border-red-200 bg-white px-3 py-1.5 text-xs font-medium text-red-600 hover:bg-red-50" onClick={handleDelete} disabled={disabled}>
                          <Trash2 size={12} /> Delete
                        </button>
                      </div>
                    </div>

                    <div className="mb-4 rounded-lg border border-slate-200 bg-slate-50 p-3">
                      <label className="block text-xs font-medium text-slate-500 mb-1">AI revision instructions</label>
                      <textarea className="min-h-[64px] w-full rounded-lg border border-slate-200 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm focus:border-indigo-500 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500" value={reviseInstructions} onChange={(e) => setReviseInstructions(e.target.value)} placeholder="Adjust patterns, change category, etc." />
                    </div>

                    <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-4">
                      <div>
                        <label className="block text-xs font-medium text-slate-500 mb-1">Rule name</label>
                        <input className="w-full rounded-lg border border-slate-200 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500" value={form.name} onChange={(e) => setForm((f) => ({ ...f, name: e.target.value }))} />
                      </div>
                      <div>
                        <label className="block text-xs font-medium text-slate-500 mb-1">Group tag</label>
                        <input className="w-full rounded-lg border border-slate-200 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500" value={form.group} onChange={(e) => setForm((f) => ({ ...f, group: e.target.value }))} />
                      </div>
                      <div className="md:col-span-2">
                        <label className="block text-xs font-medium text-slate-500 mb-1">Notes</label>
                        <textarea className="w-full rounded-lg border border-slate-200 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500 min-h-[80px]" value={form.notes} onChange={(e) => setForm((f) => ({ ...f, notes: e.target.value }))} />
                      </div>
                      <div className="md:col-span-2">
                        <label className="block text-xs font-medium text-slate-500 mb-1">Match patterns (one per line)</label>
                        <textarea className="w-full rounded-lg border border-slate-200 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm font-mono focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500 min-h-[80px]" value={form.patternsText} onChange={(e) => setForm((f) => ({ ...f, patternsText: e.target.value }))} />
                      </div>
                      <div>
                        <label className="block text-xs font-medium text-slate-500 mb-1">Match mode</label>
                        <select className="w-full rounded-lg border border-slate-200 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm" value={form.matchMode} onChange={(e) => setForm((f) => ({ ...f, matchMode: e.target.value }))}>
                          <option value="ANY">Match any pattern</option>
                          <option value="ALL">Match all patterns</option>
                        </select>
                      </div>
                      <div>
                        <label className="block text-xs font-medium text-slate-500 mb-1">Amount direction</label>
                        <select className="w-full rounded-lg border border-slate-200 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm" value={form.amountDirection} onChange={(e) => setForm((f) => ({ ...f, ...withDerivedJournalTemplate(f, { amountDirection: e.target.value }) }))}>
                          <option value="ANY">Any</option>
                          <option value="EXPENSE">Expense only</option>
                          <option value="INCOME">Income only</option>
                        </select>
                      </div>
                      <div>
                        <label className="block text-xs font-medium text-slate-500 mb-1">Source type</label>
                        <select className="w-full rounded-lg border border-slate-200 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm" value={form.sourceType} onChange={(e) => setForm((f) => ({ ...f, ...withDerivedJournalTemplate(f, { sourceType: e.target.value }) }))}>
                          <option value="">Any</option>
                          <option value="CHEQUING_ACCOUNT">Chequing account</option>
                          <option value="CREDIT_CARD">Credit card</option>
                        </select>
                      </div>
                      <div>
                        <label className="block text-xs font-medium text-slate-500 mb-1">Posting type</label>
                        <select className="w-full rounded-lg border border-slate-200 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm" value={form.transactionType} onChange={(e) => setForm((f) => ({ ...f, transactionType: e.target.value, applyPreviousTaxRate: FORCE_NO_TAX_TRANSACTION_TYPES.has(String(e.target.value || '').toUpperCase()) ? false : f.applyPreviousTaxRate }))}>
                          {transactionTypes.map((type) => <option key={type || 'blank'} value={type}>{type || 'Do not set posting type'}</option>)}
                        </select>
                      </div>
                      <div className="md:col-span-2">
                        <label className="block text-xs font-medium text-slate-500 mb-1">Category / account</label>
                        <AccountAutocomplete value={form.categoryId} onChange={(val) => setForm((f) => ({ ...f, ...withDerivedJournalTemplate(f, { categoryId: val, autoCategory: Boolean(val) }) }))} accounts={accounts || []} placeholder="Do not auto-categorize" />
                      </div>
                      <div>
                        <label className="block text-xs font-medium text-slate-500 mb-1">Tax treatment</label>
                        <select className="w-full rounded-lg border border-slate-200 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm" value={form.taxTreatment} onChange={(e) => setForm((f) => ({ ...f, ...withDerivedJournalTemplate(f, { taxTreatment: e.target.value }) }))}>
                          <option value="">None</option>
                          {TAX_TREATMENTS.map((type) => <option key={type} value={type}>{type}</option>)}
                        </select>
                      </div>
                      <div>
                        <label className="block text-xs font-medium text-slate-500 mb-1">Tax rate %</label>
                        <input className="w-full rounded-lg border border-slate-200 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm" type="number" min="0" step="0.01" value={form.ratePercent} onChange={(e) => setForm((f) => ({ ...f, ratePercent: e.target.value, applyPreviousTaxRate: Number(e.target.value) > 0 || f.applyPreviousTaxRate }))} />
                      </div>
                      <div className="md:col-span-2 flex flex-wrap gap-4">
                        <label className="flex items-center gap-2 cursor-pointer">
                          <input type="checkbox" className="w-4 h-4 rounded border-slate-300 text-indigo-600" checked={form.applyPreviousTaxRate} disabled={FORCE_NO_TAX_TRANSACTION_TYPES.has(String(form.transactionType || '').toUpperCase())} onChange={(e) => setForm((f) => ({ ...f, applyPreviousTaxRate: e.target.checked }))} />
                          <span className="text-xs text-slate-600">Apply tax rate</span>
                        </label>
                        <label className="flex items-center gap-2 cursor-pointer">
                          <input type="checkbox" className="w-4 h-4 rounded border-slate-300 text-indigo-600" checked={form.requiredReceipt} onChange={(e) => setForm((f) => ({ ...f, requiredReceipt: e.target.checked }))} />
                          <span className="text-xs text-slate-600">Receipt required</span>
                        </label>
                        <label className="flex items-center gap-2 cursor-pointer">
                          <input type="checkbox" className="w-4 h-4 rounded border-slate-300 text-indigo-600" checked={form.enabled !== false} onChange={(e) => setForm((f) => ({ ...f, enabled: e.target.checked }))} />
                          <span className="text-xs text-slate-600">Enabled</span>
                        </label>
                        <label className="flex items-center gap-2 cursor-pointer">
                          <input type="checkbox" className="w-4 h-4 rounded border-slate-300 text-indigo-600" checked={form.autoCategory} onChange={(e) => setForm((f) => ({ ...f, autoCategory: e.target.checked }))} />
                          <span className="text-xs text-slate-600">Auto category</span>
                        </label>
                        <label className="flex items-center gap-2 cursor-pointer">
                          <input type="checkbox" className="w-4 h-4 rounded border-slate-300 text-indigo-600" checked={form.autoApplyTaxes} onChange={(e) => setForm((f) => ({ ...f, autoApplyTaxes: e.target.checked }))} />
                          <span className="text-xs text-slate-600">Auto taxes</span>
                        </label>
                      </div>
                      <div>
                        <label className="block text-xs font-medium text-slate-500 mb-1">Journal mode</label>
                        <select className="w-full rounded-lg border border-slate-200 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm" value={form.journalMode} onChange={(e) => setForm((f) => ({ ...f, journalMode: e.target.value }))}>
                          <option value="STANDARD">Standard generated journal</option>
                          <option value="PROPOSAL_HINT">Use stored AI/proposal journal lines</option>
                        </select>
                      </div>
                      <div className="md:col-span-2">
                        <label className="block text-xs font-medium text-slate-500 mb-1">SQL (optional)</label>
                        <textarea className="w-full rounded-lg border border-slate-200 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm font-mono focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500 min-h-[80px]" value={form.sql} onChange={(e) => setForm((f) => ({ ...f, sql: e.target.value }))} />
                      </div>
                      <div className="md:col-span-2">
                        <label className="block text-xs font-medium text-slate-500 mb-1">AI summary</label>
                        <textarea className="w-full rounded-lg border border-slate-200 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500 min-h-[60px]" value={form.llmSummary} onChange={(e) => setForm((f) => ({ ...f, llmSummary: e.target.value }))} />
                      </div>
                    </div>

                    <div className="mt-6 border-t border-slate-200 pt-4">
                      <div className="flex items-center justify-between gap-2 mb-3">
                        <div>
                          <div className="text-xs font-semibold text-slate-500">Journal template lines</div>
                          <div className="text-[11px] text-slate-400">Add or edit journal lines for this rule.</div>
                        </div>
                        <button type="button" className="inline-flex items-center gap-1 px-2.5 py-1.5 text-xs font-medium rounded-lg border border-slate-200 bg-white text-slate-600 hover:bg-slate-50" onClick={addJournalLine}>
                          <Plus size={12} /> Add line
                        </button>
                      </div>
                      {journalLines.length === 0 ? (
                        <p className="text-xs text-slate-400 py-2">No journal template lines configured. Standard auto-generated journal will be used.</p>
                      ) : (
                        <div className="space-y-2">
                          {journalLines.map((line, index) => {
                            const lineAccount = resolveAccountForLine(line);
                            return (
                              <div key={index} className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-[1fr_120px_1fr_auto] gap-2 items-start">
                                <AccountAutocomplete
                                  value={lineAccount?.id || line.accountId || ''}
                                  onChange={(val) => {
                                    const nextAccount = (accounts || []).find((a) => a.id === val) || null;
                                    updateJournalLine(index, {
                                      accountId: nextAccount?.id || null,
                                      accountCode: nextAccount?.code || '',
                                      accountDescription: nextAccount?.description || '',
                                    });
                                  }}
                                  accounts={accounts || []}
                                  placeholder="Account"
                                />
                                <select
                                  className="rounded-lg border border-slate-200 bg-white px-3 py-1.5 text-sm"
                                  value={line.side || 'DEBIT'}
                                  onChange={(e) => updateJournalLine(index, { side: e.target.value })}
                                >
                                  <option value="DEBIT">DEBIT</option>
                                  <option value="CREDIT">CREDIT</option>
                                </select>
                                <div>
                                  <select
                                    className="w-full rounded-lg border border-slate-200 bg-white px-3 py-1.5 text-sm"
                                    value={normalizeFormula(line.amountFormula)}
                                    onChange={(e) => updateJournalLine(index, { amountFormula: e.target.value })}
                                    title={FORMULA_HELP[normalizeFormula(line.amountFormula)] || ''}
                                  >
                                    <option value="">Formula</option>
                                    {FORMULA_OPTIONS.map((f) => (
                                      <option key={f} value={f}>{f}</option>
                                    ))}
                                  </select>
                                  <FormulaHelp formula={line.amountFormula} />
                                </div>
                                <button type="button" className="inline-flex items-center justify-center p-1.5 text-red-500 hover:text-red-700 hover:bg-red-50 rounded-lg" onClick={() => removeJournalLine(index)} title="Remove line">
                                  <Trash2 size={14} />
                                </button>
                              </div>
                            );
                          })}
                        </div>
                      )}
                    </div>
                  </div>
                </>
              ) : (
                <div className="rounded-xl border border-slate-200 bg-white p-8 text-center">
                  <Sparkles size={32} className="mx-auto mb-3 text-slate-300" />
                  <h4 className="text-sm font-semibold text-slate-600 mb-1">No rule for this group</h4>
                  <p className="text-xs text-slate-400 mb-4">Generate an AI suggestion to create a rule for this transaction group.</p>
                  {onGenerateSuggestion && (
                    <button type="button" className="inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium rounded-lg bg-indigo-600 text-white shadow-sm hover:bg-indigo-700" onClick={() => onGenerateSuggestion(activeGroup)}>
                      <Sparkles size={16} /> Generate suggestion
                    </button>
                  )}
                </div>
              )}
            </div>
          )}
        </div>

        {hasRule && (
          <div className="sticky bottom-0 z-10 shrink-0 border-t border-slate-200 bg-white/95 px-5 py-3 backdrop-blur-sm">
            <div className="flex flex-wrap justify-end gap-2">
              {canApproveRule && (
                <button type="button" className="inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 rounded-lg border border-emerald-200 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm font-medium text-emerald-700 hover:bg-emerald-50 disabled:opacity-50" onClick={handleApprove} disabled={disabled}>
                  <CheckCircle size={16} /> Approve
                </button>
              )}
              <button type="button" className="inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 rounded-lg bg-indigo-600 px-3 py-2 text-sm font-medium text-white shadow-sm hover:bg-indigo-700 disabled:opacity-50" onClick={handleSave} disabled={disabled}>
                <Save size={16} /> Save
              </button>
              <label className="inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 px-2 py-1 text-xs text-slate-500 cursor-pointer hover:text-slate-700" title="Only apply to incomplete transactions">
                <input type="checkbox" className="w-3.5 h-3.5 rounded border-slate-300 text-indigo-600" checked={applyIncompleteOnly} onChange={(e) => setApplyIncompleteOnly(e.target.checked)} />
                Incomplete only
              </label>
              <button type="button" className="inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 rounded-lg bg-indigo-600 px-3 py-2 text-sm font-medium text-white shadow-sm hover:bg-indigo-700 disabled:opacity-50" onClick={handleApply} disabled={disabled}>
                <Play size={16} /> Apply rule
              </button>
              <button type="button" className="inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 rounded-lg bg-slate-800 px-3 py-2 text-sm font-medium text-white shadow-sm hover:bg-slate-900 disabled:opacity-50" onClick={handlePost} disabled={disabled}>
                <Zap size={16} /> Post transactions
              </button>
            </div>
          </div>
        )}
      </div>
      <form method="dialog" className="modal-backdrop">
        <button type="button" onClick={onClose}>close</button>
      </form>
    </dialog>
  );
}

```

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
FILE: client/services/accounting/components/TransactionsList.jsx
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
```jsx
// Full path: /home/luanngo/boss-dev/client/services/accounting/components/TransactionsList.jsx
// Full path: /home/luan_ngo/boss/client/services/accounting/components/TransactionsList.js
// client/services/accounting/components/TransactionsList.js

import React, { useState, useEffect, useContext, useRef } from 'react';
import { AuthContext } from '@/shared/context/AuthContext';
import { toast } from 'react-toastify';
import {
  Trash2,
  CheckCircle,
  HelpCircle,
  Percent,
  Download,
  Filter as FilterIcon,
  Search,
  DollarSign,
  ChevronUp,
  ChevronDown,
  Save,
  XCircle,
  UploadCloud,
  Columns,
  Wand2,
  ClipboardCopy as ClipboardCopyIcon,
  ChevronsRight
} from 'lucide-react';
import Tooltip from '@/shared/components/Tooltip';
import TransactionDetailsModal from './TransactionDetailsModal';
import { fetchWithAuth } from '@/shared/utils/fetchWithAuth';
import { computeFiscalYearDates, getFiscalYearStartMonth } from '../utils/fiscalYear';
import { useGenericSocket } from '@/shared/hooks/useGenericSocket';
import AccountAutocomplete from './AccountAutocomplete';
import { formatDate } from '../utils/formatAccounting';

const availableColumns = [
  { key: 'date', label: 'Date' },
  { key: 'description', label: 'Description' },
  { key: 'amount', label: 'Amount' },
  { key: 'taxes', label: 'Taxes' },
  { key: 'balance', label: 'Balance' },
  { key: 'category', label: 'Category' },
  { key: 'receiptSupport', label: 'Receipt Support' },
  { key: 'notes', label: 'Notes' },
  { key: 'source', label: 'Source' },
  { key: 'actions', label: 'Actions' },
  { key: 'createdAt', label: 'Created At' }
];

const SHOW_ALL_PAGE_SIZE = 99999;
const forceNoTaxPostingTypes = new Set([
  'PAYROLL_FUNDING',
  'PAYROLL_PAYMENT',
  'PAYROLL_REMITTANCE',
  'TAX_REMITTANCE',
  'TRANSFER',
  'CREDIT_CARD_PAYMENT',
  'PAYMENT_PROCESSOR_PAYOUT',
  'PAYMENT_PROCESSOR_REVERSAL',
  'OWNER_DRAW',
  'OWNER_CONTRIBUTION',
]);

const normalizeText = (value) => String(value || '')
  .normalize('NFD')
  .replace(/[\u0300-\u036f]/g, '')
  .toLowerCase()
  .replace(/[^a-z0-9\s]/g, ' ')
  .replace(/\s+/g, ' ')
  .trim();

const isRisePayrollFundingTransaction = (transaction = {}) =>
  Number(transaction?.amount || 0) < 0 &&
  normalizeText(transaction?.description).includes('rise cap') &&
  String(transaction?.source?.type || transaction?.sourceType || '').toUpperCase() !== 'CREDIT_CARD';

const isTaxActionBlocked = (transaction = {}) => {
  const postingType = String(transaction?.postingType || '').trim().toUpperCase();
  return forceNoTaxPostingTypes.has(postingType) || isRisePayrollFundingTransaction(transaction);
};

const getTaxActionBlockReason = (transaction = {}) => {
  if (isRisePayrollFundingTransaction(transaction)) {
    return 'This is a Rise payroll-funding withdrawal from TD Chequing. Debit Payroll Clearing and credit TD Chequing. The detailed wage, employer CPP/EI, payroll-fee, and HST allocation comes from the Rise payroll report. Do not record the full bank withdrawal directly as wage expense.';
  }
  return 'Tax shortcuts are blocked for transfers, payroll funding, payroll remittances, credit-card payments, payment-processor payouts, and tax remittances.';
};

const createDefaultFilters = () => ({
  type: '',
  categoryId: '',
  topCategory: '',
  sourceId: '',
  dateFrom: '',
  dateTo: '',
  search: '',
  notes: '',
  amountMin: '',
  amountMax: '',
  unmatchedOnly: false,
  timeframe: '',
  noCategory: 'false',
```
