  missingCategory: false,
  missingReceipt: false,
  missingJournal: false,
  missingTaxes: false,
  unfinishedOnly: false,
  transactionIds: '',
});

const inferTaxTreatmentFromTransaction = (transaction = {}) => {
  const postingType = String(transaction?.postingType || '').trim().toUpperCase();
  if (forceNoTaxPostingTypes.has(postingType)) return 'NO_TAX';
  const taxAmount = Number(transaction?.taxes || 0);
  if (taxAmount <= 0) return 'NO_TAX';
  return Number(transaction?.amount || 0) > 0 ? 'SALES_TAX_PAYABLE' : 'INPUT_TAX_CREDIT';
};

const formatConfidencePercent = (value) => {
  const numericValue = Number(value);
  if (!Number.isFinite(numericValue)) return null;
  return `${Math.round(numericValue * 100)}%`;
};

const getSuggestedAccountLabel = (suggestedAccount) => {
  if (!suggestedAccount) return null;
  if (typeof suggestedAccount === 'string') return suggestedAccount;
  if (suggestedAccount.code && suggestedAccount.description) {
    return `${suggestedAccount.code} · ${suggestedAccount.description}`;
  }
  return suggestedAccount.description || suggestedAccount.code || null;
};

const TransactionsList = ({ selectedIds, setSelectedIds, workflow = null, onNavigate = null }) => {
  const { user } = useContext(AuthContext);
  const accountingTimezone = user?.organizationTimezone || 'America/Toronto';
  const [transactions, setTransactions] = useState([]);
  const [categories, setCategories] = useState([]);
  const [sources, setSources] = useState([]);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
  const [summary, setSummary] = useState({ count: 0, totalAmount: 0, totalTaxes: 0 });
  const [unfinishedSummary, setUnfinishedSummary] = useState({ uncategorized: 0, missingReceipt: 0, missingJournal: 0, missingTaxes: 0, unfinishedCount: 0 });
  const [editingNotesTransactionId, setEditingNotesTransactionId] = useState(null);
  const [notesValues, setNotesValues] = useState({});
  const [editingTransactionId, setEditingTransactionId] = useState(null);
  const [taxesValues, setTaxesValues] = useState({});
  const [selectedTransaction, setSelectedTransaction] = useState(null);
  const [showModal, setShowModal] = useState(false);
  const columnSelectorRef = useRef(null);
  const [showColumnSelector, setShowColumnSelector] = useState(false);

  const [fyStartMonth, setFyStartMonth] = useState(null);
  useEffect(() => { getFiscalYearStartMonth().then(setFyStartMonth).catch(() => {}); }, []);

  // Bulk ops state
  const [showBulkCategoryModal, setShowBulkCategoryModal] = useState(false);
  const [bulkCategoryId, setBulkCategoryId] = useState('');
  const [isBulkCategorying, setIsBulkCategorying] = useState(false);
  const [isBulkTaxing, setIsBulkTaxing] = useState(false);
  const [isBulkWorking, setIsBulkWorking] = useState(false);

  const bulkSetCategory = async () => {
    if (selectedIds.size === 0) {
      toast.error("Select at least one transaction.");
      return;
    }
    if (!bulkCategoryId) {
      toast.error("Pick a category.");
      return;
    }
    setIsBulkCategorying(true);
    const ids = Array.from(selectedIds);
    const loadingId = toast.loading(`Updating ${ids.length} transactions...`);

    try {
      const results = await Promise.allSettled(
        ids.map((id) =>
          fetchWithAuth(`${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL}/accounting/transactions/${id}/assignCategory`, {
            method: 'PUT',
            headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
            body: JSON.stringify({ categoryId: bulkCategoryId }),
          })
        )
      );

      let ok = 0, fail = 0;
      const pickedCategory = categories.find(c => c.id === bulkCategoryId) || null;

      results.forEach((r, idx) => {
        if (r.status === 'fulfilled' && r.value.ok) {
          ok++;
          const id = ids[idx];
          // optimistic local update
          setTransactions(prev => prev.map(tx => tx.id === id ? { ...tx, category: pickedCategory, categoryId: bulkCategoryId } : tx));
        } else {
          fail++;
        }
      });

      toast.update(loadingId, { render: `Bulk category update complete — ${ok} OK, ${fail} failed.`, type: fail ? "warning" : "success", isLoading: false, autoClose: 4000 });
      setShowBulkCategoryModal(false);
    } catch (err) {
      toast.update(loadingId, { render: `Bulk category failed: ${err.message}`, type: "error", isLoading: false, autoClose: 6000 });
    } finally {
      setIsBulkCategorying(false);
    }
  };

  const bulkAddHST13 = async () => {
    if (selectedIds.size === 0) {
      toast.error("Select at least one transaction.");
      return;
    }
    setIsBulkTaxing(true);
    const ids = Array.from(selectedIds);
    const txMap = new Map(transactions.map(t => [t.id, t]));
    const loadingId = toast.loading(`Applying 13% HST to ${ids.length} transactions...`);

    const taxRate = 0.13;

    try {
      const results = await Promise.allSettled(
        ids.map((id) => {
          const tx = txMap.get(id);
          if (!tx || tx.amount == null) return Promise.resolve({ ok: false });
          const computedTaxes = Number(Math.abs(tx.amount * (taxRate / (1 + taxRate))).toFixed(2));
          return fetchWithAuth(`${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL}/accounting/transactions/${id}/taxes`, {
            method: 'PUT',
            headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
            body: JSON.stringify({ taxes: computedTaxes }),
          }).then(res => ({ res, id, computedTaxes }));
        })
      );

      let ok = 0, fail = 0;
      results.forEach((r) => {
        if (r.status === 'fulfilled' && r.value.res && r.value.res.ok) {
          ok++;
          const { id, computedTaxes } = r.value;
          setTransactions(prev => prev.map(tx => tx.id === id ? { ...tx, taxes: computedTaxes } : tx));
        } else {
          fail++;
        }
      });

      toast.update(loadingId, { render: `Bulk tax update complete — ${ok} OK, ${fail} failed.`, type: fail ? "warning" : "success", isLoading: false, autoClose: 4000 });
    } catch (err) {
      toast.update(loadingId, { render: `Bulk tax failed: ${err.message}`, type: "error", isLoading: false, autoClose: 6000 });
    } finally {
      setIsBulkTaxing(false);
    }
  };


  const runBulkSelectedMutation = async ({ label, worker, onSuccess = null, clearSelection = false }) => {
    if (selectedIds.size === 0) {
      toast.error('Select at least one transaction.');
      return;
    }

    const ids = Array.from(selectedIds);
    const loadingId = toast.loading(`${label} for ${ids.length} transactions...`);
    setIsBulkWorking(true);

    try {
      const results = await Promise.allSettled(ids.map((id) => worker(id)));
      let ok = 0;
      let fail = 0;

      results.forEach((result, index) => {
        if (result.status === 'fulfilled') {
          ok += 1;
          if (typeof onSuccess === 'function') {
            onSuccess(ids[index], result.value);
          }
        } else {
          fail += 1;
        }
      });

      toast.update(loadingId, {
        render: `${label} complete — ${ok} OK, ${fail} failed.`,
        type: fail ? 'warning' : 'success',
        isLoading: false,
        autoClose: 4000,
      });

      if (clearSelection && fail === 0) {
        setSelectedIds(new Set());
      }
      fetchTransactions(pagination.currentPage, pagination.pageSize, filters, sortConfig);
    } catch (error) {
      toast.update(loadingId, {
        render: `${label} failed: ${error.message}`,
        type: 'error',
        isLoading: false,
        autoClose: 6000,
      });
    } finally {
      setIsBulkWorking(false);
    }
  };

  const bulkClearCategory = async () => runBulkSelectedMutation({
    label: 'Clear category',
    worker: async (id) => {
      const res = await fetchWithAuth(`${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL}/accounting/transactions/${id}/assignCategory`, {
        method: 'PUT',
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
        body: JSON.stringify({ categoryId: null }),
      });
      const data = await res.json().catch(() => ({}));
      if (!res.ok) throw new Error(data.error || 'Failed to clear category.');
      return data;
    },
    onSuccess: (id) => {
      setTransactions((prev) => prev.map((tx) => tx.id === id ? { ...tx, category: null, categoryId: null } : tx));
    },
  });

  const bulkInferTaxTreatment = async () => {
    const txMap = new Map(transactions.map((tx) => [tx.id, tx]));
    return runBulkSelectedMutation({
      label: 'Infer tax treatment',
      worker: async (id) => {
        const tx = txMap.get(id) || {};
        const taxTreatment = inferTaxTreatmentFromTransaction(tx);
        const res = await fetchWithAuth(`${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL}/accounting/transactions/${id}`, {
          method: 'PUT',
          headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
          body: JSON.stringify({ taxTreatment }),
        });
        const data = await res.json().catch(() => ({}));
        if (!res.ok) throw new Error(data.error || 'Failed to infer tax treatment.');
        return { ...data, taxTreatment };
      },
      onSuccess: (id, result) => {
        setTransactions((prev) => prev.map((tx) => tx.id === id ? { ...tx, taxTreatment: result.taxTreatment } : tx));
      },
    });
  };

  const bulkMarkNoTax = async () => runBulkSelectedMutation({
    label: 'Mark no tax',
    worker: async (id) => {
      const treatmentRes = await fetchWithAuth(`${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL}/accounting/transactions/${id}`, {
        method: 'PUT',
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
        body: JSON.stringify({ taxTreatment: 'NO_TAX' }),
      });
      const treatmentPayload = await treatmentRes.json().catch(() => ({}));
      if (!treatmentRes.ok) throw new Error(treatmentPayload.error || 'Failed to set tax treatment.');

      const taxesRes = await fetchWithAuth(`${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL}/accounting/transactions/${id}/taxes`, {
        method: 'PUT',
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
        body: JSON.stringify({ taxes: null }),
      });
      const taxesPayload = await taxesRes.json().catch(() => ({}));
      if (!taxesRes.ok) throw new Error(taxesPayload.error || 'Failed to clear taxes.');
      return taxesPayload;
    },
    onSuccess: (id) => {
      setTransactions((prev) => prev.map((tx) => tx.id === id ? { ...tx, taxes: null, taxTreatment: 'NO_TAX' } : tx));
    },
  });

  const bulkGenerateProposals = async () => {
    if (selectedIds.size === 0) {
      toast.error('Select at least one transaction.');
      return;
    }
    const ids = Array.from(selectedIds);
    setIsBulkWorking(true);
    try {
      const res = await fetchWithAuth(`${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL}/accounting/review-queue/propose-selected`, {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
        body: JSON.stringify({ transactionIds: ids }),
      });
      const data = await res.json().catch(() => ({}));
      if (!res.ok) throw new Error(data.error || 'Failed to generate proposals.');
      toast.success(data.message || `Generated proposals for ${ids.length} selected transactions.`);
      fetchTransactions(pagination.currentPage, pagination.pageSize, filters, sortConfig);
    } catch (error) {
      toast.error(`Generate proposals error: ${error.message}`);
    } finally {
      setIsBulkWorking(false);
    }
  };

  const [filters, setFilters] = useState(() => {
    const saved = localStorage.getItem('transactionFilters');
    if (!saved) return createDefaultFilters();
    try {
      return { ...createDefaultFilters(), ...JSON.parse(saved) };
    } catch {
      return createDefaultFilters();
    }
  });

  const [rules, setRules] = useState([]);
  const [showApplyRuleModal, setShowApplyRuleModal] = useState(false);
  const [selectedRuleId, setSelectedRuleId] = useState('');
  const [isApplyingRule, setIsApplyingRule] = useState(false);
  const [ruleProgress, setRuleProgress] = useState({ message: '', current: 0, total: 0 });
  const { socket } = useGenericSocket('accounting');

  const [showAddModal, setShowAddModal] = useState(false);
  const [newTx, setNewTx] = useState({
    date: "", description: "", amount: "", taxes: "", categoryId: "", sourceId: "", notes: "", postingType: "", taxTreatment: "NO_TAX", journalText: ""
  });

  const applyManualTemplate = (templateKey) => {
    setNewTx((current) => {
      const gross = Math.abs(Number(current.amount || 0));
      const tax = Math.abs(Number(current.taxes || 0));
      const net = Math.max(0, Number((gross - tax).toFixed(2)));
      const selectedCategory = categories.find((item) => item.id === current.categoryId) || null;
      const expenseCode = selectedCategory?.code || '9999';
      const expenseDescription = selectedCategory?.description || 'Selected expense or revenue account';
      const templates = {
        AP_BILL: {
          postingType: 'BANK_EXPENSE',
          taxTreatment: tax > 0 ? 'INPUT_TAX_CREDIT' : 'NO_TAX',
          sourceId: '',
          journalText: JSON.stringify([
            { accountCode: expenseCode, accountDescription: expenseDescription, debit: net || gross, credit: 0 },
            ...(tax > 0 ? [{ accountCode: '1066', accountDescription: 'Expense Tax Clearing', debit: tax, credit: 0 }] : []),
            { accountCode: '2100', accountDescription: 'Accounts Payable', debit: 0, credit: gross },
          ], null, 2),
        },
        AR_INVOICE: {
          postingType: 'BANK_REVENUE',
          taxTreatment: tax > 0 ? 'SALES_TAX_PAYABLE' : 'NO_TAX',
          sourceId: '',
          journalText: JSON.stringify([
            { accountCode: '1200', accountDescription: 'Accounts Receivable', debit: gross, credit: 0 },
            ...(tax > 0 ? [{ accountCode: '2640', accountDescription: 'GST/HST Payable', debit: 0, credit: tax }] : []),
            { accountCode: expenseCode, accountDescription: expenseDescription, debit: 0, credit: net || gross },
          ], null, 2),
        },
        PAYROLL_NET_PAY: {
          postingType: 'PAYROLL_PAYMENT',
          taxTreatment: 'NO_TAX',
          journalText: JSON.stringify([
            { accountCode: '2310', accountDescription: 'Payroll Clearing / Wages Payable', debit: gross, credit: 0 },
            { accountCode: '1001', accountDescription: 'Operating Bank Account', debit: 0, credit: gross },
          ], null, 2),
        },
        PAYROLL_REMITTANCE: {
          postingType: 'TAX_REMITTANCE',
          taxTreatment: 'NO_TAX',
          journalText: JSON.stringify([
            { accountCode: '2360', accountDescription: 'Payroll Taxes Payable', debit: gross, credit: 0 },
            { accountCode: '1001', accountDescription: 'Operating Bank Account', debit: 0, credit: gross },
          ], null, 2),
        },
        TIPS_PAYOUT: {
          postingType: 'PAYROLL_PAYMENT',
          taxTreatment: 'NO_TAX',
          journalText: JSON.stringify([
            { accountCode: '2625', accountDescription: 'Tips Payable', debit: gross, credit: 0 },
            { accountCode: '1001', accountDescription: 'Operating Bank Account', debit: 0, credit: gross },
          ], null, 2),
        },
      };
      return { ...current, ...(templates[templateKey] || {}) };
    });
  };

  // FIX 1: Initialize pagination state from localStorage
  const [pagination, setPagination] = useState(() => {
    const savedPageSize = localStorage.getItem('transactionListPageSize');
    return {
      currentPage: 1,
      pageSize: savedPageSize ? parseInt(savedPageSize, 10) : 100,
      totalPages: 1,
      totalCount: 0
    };
  });
  const [sortConfig, setSortConfig] = useState({ key: 'date', order: 'desc' });
  const [showBulkModal, setShowBulkModal] = useState(false);
  const [posting, setPosting] = useState(false);
  const [visibleColumns, setVisibleColumns] = useState(() => {
    const saved = localStorage.getItem('visibleColumns');
    const defaultCols = availableColumns.map(col => col.key);
    if (!saved) return defaultCols;
    try {
      const parsed = JSON.parse(saved);
      return Array.from(new Set([...parsed, 'receiptSupport']));
    } catch {
      return defaultCols;
    }
  });

  const [proposal, setProposal] = useState(null);
  const [showProposalModal, setShowProposalModal] = useState(false);

  const topCategories = Array.from(
    new Set(
      (categories || [])
        .map(cat => cat?.category)
        .filter(Boolean)
    )
  );

  useEffect(() => {
    if (socket) {
      const handleProgress = (data) => {
        if (showApplyRuleModal) {
          setRuleProgress({ message: data.message, current: data.current, total: data.total });
        }
      };
      socket.on('accounting:rule-progress', handleProgress);
      return () => {
        socket.off('accounting:rule-progress', handleProgress);
      };
    }
  }, [socket, showApplyRuleModal]);

  useEffect(() => {
    const debounceTimer = setTimeout(() => {
      localStorage.setItem('transactionFilters', JSON.stringify(filters));
    }, 500);
    return () => clearTimeout(debounceTimer);
  }, [filters]);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (user) {
      fetchCategories();
      fetchSources();
      fetchRules();
      fetchTransactions(1, pagination.pageSize, filters, sortConfig);
    }
    // eslint-disable-next-line react-hooks/exhaustive-deps
  }, [user]);

  useEffect(() => {
    localStorage.setItem('visibleColumns', JSON.stringify(visibleColumns));
  }, [visibleColumns]);

  useEffect(() => {
    const handleFilterEvent = (e) => {
      const { search, category } = e.detail;
      setFilters(prev => {
        const updated = { ...prev };
        if (search !== undefined) updated.search = search;
        if (category !== undefined) {
          const foundCategory = categories.find(cat => cat.description === category);
          updated.categoryId = foundCategory ? foundCategory.id : '';
          updated.noCategory = 'false';
          updated.missingCategory = false;
        }
        // Fetch using the updated filters (avoid one-cycle lag)
        fetchTransactions(1, pagination.pageSize, updated, sortConfig);
        return updated;
      });
    };
    window.addEventListener('filterTransactions', handleFilterEvent);
    return () => window.removeEventListener('filterTransactions', handleFilterEvent);
  }, [categories, pagination.pageSize, sortConfig]);

  useEffect(() => {
    function handleClickOutside(event) {
      if (columnSelectorRef.current && !columnSelectorRef.current.contains(event.target)) {
        const button = document.getElementById('column-selector-button');
        if (button && button.contains(event.target)) {
          return;
        }
        setShowColumnSelector(false);
      }
    }
    document.addEventListener("mousedown", handleClickOutside);
    return () => document.removeEventListener("mousedown", handleClickOutside);
  }, []);

  // Refetch whenever sort changes (prevents “one-click behind”)
  useEffect(() => {
    if (user) {
      fetchTransactions(1, pagination.pageSize, filters, sortConfig);
    }
    // eslint-disable-next-line react-hooks/exhaustive-deps
  }, [sortConfig]);

  useEffect(() => {
    const handleRefetch = () => {
      fetchTransactions(pagination.currentPage, pagination.pageSize, filters, sortConfig);
    };
    window.addEventListener('refetchTransactions', handleRefetch);
    return () => window.removeEventListener('refetchTransactions', handleRefetch);
  }, [pagination.currentPage, pagination.pageSize, filters, sortConfig]);

  useEffect(() => {
    setSelectedIds(new Set());
  }, [filters, pagination.currentPage, pagination.pageSize, setSelectedIds]);

  const fetchRules = async () => {
    try {
      const res = await fetchWithAuth(`${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL}/accounting/rules`);
      if (!res.ok) throw new Error('Failed to fetch accounting rules.');
      const data = await res.json();
      setRules(data.rules || []);
    } catch (error) {
      console.error(error);
      toast.error('Failed to load accounting rules.');
    }
  };

  const fetchCategories = async () => {
    try {
      const res = await fetchWithAuth(`${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL}/accounting/categories`);
      if (!res.ok) throw new Error('Failed to fetch categories.');
      const data = await res.json();
      setCategories(data);
    } catch (error) {
      console.error(error);
      toast.error('Failed to load categories.');
    }
  };

  const fetchSources = async () => {
    try {
      const res = await fetchWithAuth(`${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL}/accounting/sources`);
      if (!res.ok) throw new Error('Failed to fetch sources.');
      const data = await res.json();
      setSources(data.sources);
    } catch (error) {
      console.error(error);
      toast.error('Failed to load sources.');
    }
  };

  const handleShowProposal = async (bankTxId, e) => {
    e.stopPropagation();
    try {
      const res = await fetchWithAuth(
        `${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL}/accounting/transactions/${bankTxId}/propose`
      );
      if (!res.ok) throw new Error('Failed to load proposal');
      const data = await res.json();
      setProposal({ ...data, bankTxId });
      setShowProposalModal(true);
    } catch (err) {
      toast.error(err.message);
    }
  };

  /**
   * Centralized loader with optional overrides to avoid stale state usage.
   */
  const fetchTransactions = async (
    page = pagination.currentPage,
    size = pagination.pageSize,
    filtersOverride = filters,
    sortOverride = sortConfig
  ) => {
    setLoading(true);
    try {
      const { categoryId, ...rest } = filtersOverride;
      let queryParams = {
        ...rest,
        categoryId,
        sortKey: sortOverride.key,
        sortOrder: sortOverride.order,
        page,
        pageSize: size,
        ...(filtersOverride.unmatchedOnly ? { unmatchedReceipts: 'true' } : {}),
        ...(filtersOverride.missingCategory ? { missingCategory: 'true' } : {}),
        ...(filtersOverride.missingReceipt ? { missingReceipt: 'true' } : {}),
        ...(filtersOverride.missingJournal ? { missingJournal: 'true' } : {}),
        ...(filtersOverride.missingTaxes ? { missingTaxes: 'true' } : {}),
        ...(filtersOverride.unfinishedOnly ? { unfinishedOnly: 'true' } : {}),
      };
      if (filtersOverride.categoryId === 'none') {
        queryParams.noCategory = 'true';
        delete queryParams.categoryId;
      } else {
        queryParams.noCategory = 'false';
      }
      Object.keys(queryParams).forEach((key) => {
        if (queryParams[key] === '' || queryParams[key] === null || queryParams[key] === undefined || queryParams[key] === false) {
          delete queryParams[key];
        }
      });
      const query = new URLSearchParams(queryParams).toString();
      const res = await fetchWithAuth(`${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL}/accounting/transactions?${query}`);
      if (!res.ok) throw new Error('Failed to fetch transactions.');
      const data = await res.json();
      const nextPagination = data.pagination || {};
      const nextSummary = data.summary || {};
      setTransactions(Array.isArray(data.transactions) ? data.transactions : []);
      setPagination({
        currentPage: nextPagination.currentPage || page,
        pageSize: nextPagination.pageSize || size,
        totalCount: nextPagination.totalCount ?? data.totalCount ?? 0,
        totalPages: nextPagination.totalPages ?? (Math.ceil((nextPagination.totalCount ?? data.totalCount ?? 0) / size) || 1),
      });
      setSummary({
        count: nextSummary.count ?? data.totalCount ?? 0,
        totalAmount: nextSummary.totalAmount ?? data.totalSum ?? 0,
        totalTaxes: nextSummary.totalTaxes ?? data.totalTaxes ?? 0,
      });
      setUnfinishedSummary(nextSummary.unfinished || { uncategorized: 0, missingReceipt: 0, missingJournal: 0, missingTaxes: 0, unfinishedCount: 0 });
    } catch (error) {
      console.error(error);
      toast.error('Failed to load transactions.');
      setTransactions([]);
      setPagination(prev => ({ ...prev, totalCount: 0, totalPages: 1 }));
      setSummary({ count: 0, totalAmount: 0, totalTaxes: 0 });
      setUnfinishedSummary({ uncategorized: 0, missingReceipt: 0, missingJournal: 0, missingTaxes: 0, unfinishedCount: 0 });
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  };

  const handleFilterChange = (e) => {
    const { name, value, type, checked } = e.target;
    const nextValue = type === 'checkbox' ? checked : value;
    let newFilters = { ...filters, [name]: nextValue };

    if (name === 'categoryId' && value === 'none') {
      newFilters.noCategory = 'true';
      newFilters.missingCategory = true;
    } else if (name === 'categoryId') {
      newFilters.noCategory = 'false';
      newFilters.missingCategory = false;
    }

    if (name === 'missingCategory') {
      newFilters.noCategory = checked ? 'true' : 'false';
      newFilters.categoryId = checked ? 'none' : '';
    }

    if (name === 'missingReceipt') {
      newFilters.unmatchedOnly = checked;
    }

    setFilters(newFilters);
  };

  const handleTimeframeChange = (e) => {
    const timeframe = e.target.value;
    let start, end;
    const now = new Date();
    if (timeframe === 'thisQuarter') {
      const currentMonth = now.getMonth();
      const quarterStartMonth = Math.floor(currentMonth / 3) * 3;
      start = new Date(now.getFullYear(), quarterStartMonth, 1);
      end = new Date(now.getFullYear(), quarterStartMonth + 3, 0);
    } else if (timeframe === 'lastQuarter') {
      const currentMonth = now.getMonth();
      const currentQuarter = Math.floor(currentMonth / 3);
      let prevQuarter = currentQuarter - 1;
      let year = now.getFullYear();
      if (prevQuarter < 0) {
        prevQuarter = 3;
        year -= 1;
      }
      const quarterStartMonth = prevQuarter * 3;
      start = new Date(year, quarterStartMonth, 1);
      end = new Date(year, quarterStartMonth + 3, 0);
    } else if (timeframe === 'thisYear') {
      start = new Date(now.getFullYear(), 0, 1);
      end = new Date(now.getFullYear(), 11, 31);
    } else if (timeframe === 'lastYear') {
      start = new Date(now.getFullYear() - 1, 0, 1);
      end = new Date(now.getFullYear() - 1, 11, 31);
    } else if (timeframe === 'thisFiscalYear' && fyStartMonth) {
      const fy = computeFiscalYearDates(fyStartMonth, now);
      if (fy) { start = fy.from; end = fy.to; }
    } else if (timeframe === 'lastFiscalYear' && fyStartMonth) {
      const fy = computeFiscalYearDates(fyStartMonth, now);
      if (fy) {
        start = new Date(fy.from.getFullYear() - 1, fy.from.getMonth(), fy.from.getDate());
        end = new Date(fy.to.getFullYear() - 1, fy.to.getMonth(), fy.to.getDate());
      }
    } else {
      start = '';
      end = '';
    }
    setFilters({ ...filters, timeframe, dateFrom: start ? start.toISOString().split('T')[0] : '', dateTo: end ? end.toISOString().split('T')[0] : '' });
  };

  const handleApplyFilters = () => {
    fetchTransactions(1, pagination.pageSize, filters, sortConfig);
  };

  const handleResetFilters = () => {
    const initial = createDefaultFilters();
    setFilters(initial);
    const resetSort = { key: 'date', order: 'desc' };
    setSortConfig(resetSort);
    localStorage.removeItem('transactionFilters');
    // FIX 1: Use current pagination.pageSize instead of hardcoded 100
    fetchTransactions(1, pagination.pageSize, initial, resetSort);
    toast.info('Filters and sort reset.');
  };


  const applyUnfinishedPreset = (preset) => {
    const nextFilters = {
      ...filters,
      categoryId: filters.categoryId === 'none' ? '' : filters.categoryId,
      missingCategory: false,
      missingReceipt: false,
      missingJournal: false,
      missingTaxes: false,
      unfinishedOnly: false,
      unmatchedOnly: false,
      noCategory: 'false',
    };

    switch (preset) {
      case 'uncategorized':
        nextFilters.missingCategory = true;
        nextFilters.noCategory = 'true';
        nextFilters.categoryId = 'none';
        break;
      case 'missingReceipt':
        nextFilters.missingReceipt = true;
        nextFilters.unmatchedOnly = true;
        break;
      case 'missingJournal':
        nextFilters.missingJournal = true;
        break;
      case 'missingTaxes':
        nextFilters.missingTaxes = true;
        break;
      case 'unfinished':
        nextFilters.unfinishedOnly = true;
        break;
      default:
        break;
    }

    setFilters(nextFilters);
    fetchTransactions(1, pagination.pageSize, nextFilters, sortConfig);
  };

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!workflow?.activatedAt || !user) return;

    const affectedIds = Array.isArray(workflow.affectedRecords)
      ? workflow.affectedRecords.map((value) => Number(value)).filter((value) => Number.isFinite(value))
      : [];

    if (workflow.filterPreset) {
      applyUnfinishedPreset(workflow.filterPreset);
    }

    if (workflow.filters && typeof workflow.filters === 'object') {
      const nextFilters = affectedIds.length
        ? { ...createDefaultFilters(), transactionIds: affectedIds.join(',') }
        : {
            ...createDefaultFilters(),
            ...workflow.filters,
            transactionIds: workflow.filters.transactionIds || '',
          };
      setFilters(nextFilters);
      fetchTransactions(1, SHOW_ALL_PAGE_SIZE, nextFilters, sortConfig);
    } else if (affectedIds.length) {
      const nextFilters = {
        ...createDefaultFilters(),
        transactionIds: affectedIds.join(','),
      };
      setFilters(nextFilters);
      fetchTransactions(1, SHOW_ALL_PAGE_SIZE, nextFilters, sortConfig);
    }

    if (affectedIds.length) {
      setSelectedIds(new Set(affectedIds));
    }
    // eslint-disable-next-line react-hooks/exhaustive-deps
  }, [workflow?.activatedAt, user]);

  const handlePageChange = (newPage) => {
    if (newPage >= 1 && newPage <= pagination.totalPages) {
      fetchTransactions(newPage, pagination.pageSize, filters, sortConfig);
    }
  };

  const handlePageSizeChange = (e) => {
    const newPageSize = parseInt(e.target.value, 10);
    // FIX 1: Save new page size to localStorage
    localStorage.setItem('transactionListPageSize', String(newPageSize));
    fetchTransactions(1, newPageSize, filters, sortConfig);
  };

  const handleSort = (key) => {
    const newOrder = sortConfig.key === key && sortConfig.order === 'asc' ? 'desc' : 'asc';
    const nextSort = { key, order: newOrder };
    setSortConfig(nextSort);
    // fetch happens in useEffect([sortConfig])
  };

  const handleSelectRow = (id) => {
    setSelectedIds(prev => {
      const newSet = new Set(prev);
      if (newSet.has(id)) {
        newSet.delete(id);
      } else {
        newSet.add(id);
      }
      return newSet;
    });
  };

  const handleSelectAll = (e) => {
    if (e.target.checked) {
      setSelectedIds(new Set(transactions.map(t => t.id)));
    } else {
      setSelectedIds(new Set());
    }
  };

  const handleApplyRule = async () => {
    if (!selectedRuleId) {
      toast.error("Please select a rule to apply.");
      return;
    }
    if (selectedIds.size === 0) {
      toast.error("No transactions selected.");
      return;
    }

    setIsApplyingRule(true);
    if (selectedRuleId === '__ALL__') {
      setRuleProgress({ message: 'Starting rule execution...', current: 0, total: 1 });
    }

    try {
      const res = await fetchWithAuth(`${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL}/accounting/rules/${selectedRuleId}/run`, {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
        body: JSON.stringify({ transactionIds: Array.from(selectedIds) })
      });

      const data = await res.json();
      if (!res.ok) {
        throw new Error(data.error || "Failed to apply rule.");
      }

      toast.success(data.message || `Rule applied successfully.`);

      setSelectedIds(new Set());
      setShowApplyRuleModal(false);
      setSelectedRuleId('');
      fetchTransactions(pagination.currentPage, pagination.pageSize, filters, sortConfig);

    } catch (error) {
      toast.error(`Error applying rule: ${error.message}`);
    } finally {
      setIsApplyingRule(false);
      setRuleProgress({ message: '', current: 0, total: 0 });
    }
  };

  const toggleColumn = (key) => {
    setVisibleColumns(prev => prev.includes(key) ? prev.filter(col => col !== key) : [...prev, key]);
  };

  const handleRowClick = (transaction) => {
    setSelectedTransaction(transaction);
    setShowModal(true);
  };

  const handleAssignCategory = async (transactionId, categoryId) => {
    const payload = categoryId ? { categoryId } : { categoryId: null };
    try {
      const res = await fetchWithAuth(`${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL}/accounting/transactions/${transactionId}/assignCategory`, {
        method: 'PUT',
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
        body: JSON.stringify(payload)
      });
      const data = await res.json();
      if (res.ok) {
        toast.success('Category updated successfully.');
        const updatedCategory = categoryId ? categories.find(cat => cat.id === categoryId) : null;
        setTransactions(prev =>
          prev.map(tx => tx.id === transactionId ? { ...tx, category: updatedCategory, categoryId: categoryId || null } : tx)
        );
      } else {
        throw new Error(data.error || 'Failed to assign category.');
      }
    } catch (error) {
      console.error(error);
      toast.error(`Category Assign Error: ${error.message}`);
    }
  };

  const handleDeleteTransaction = async (transactionId, e) => {
    e.stopPropagation();
    if (!window.confirm(`Are you sure you want to delete transaction ID ${transactionId}? This cannot be undone.`)) return;
    try {
      const res = await fetchWithAuth(`${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL}/accounting/transactions/${transactionId}`, {
        method: 'DELETE'
      });
      if (!res.ok) {
        const data = await res.json();
        throw new Error(data.error || 'Failed to delete transaction.');
      }
      toast.success('Transaction deleted successfully.');
      setTransactions(prev => prev.filter(tx => tx.id !== transactionId));
      fetchTransactions(pagination.currentPage, pagination.pageSize, filters, sortConfig);
    } catch (error) {
      console.error(error);
      toast.error(`Delete Error: ${error.message}`);
    }
  };

  const handleGuessCategory = async (transactionId, e) => {
    e.stopPropagation();
    try {
      const res = await fetchWithAuth(`${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL}/accounting/transactions/${transactionId}/guessCategory`);
      if (!res.ok) {
        const data = await res.json();
        throw new Error(data.error || 'Failed to guess category.');
      }
      const data = await res.json();
      const suggestedCode = data.suggestedCategory;
      const matchingCategory = categories.find(cat => cat.code === suggestedCode);
      if (matchingCategory) {
        toast.success(`AI Suggestion: ${matchingCategory.description}. Assigning...`);
        await handleAssignCategory(transactionId, matchingCategory.id);
      } else {
        toast.warn(`AI suggested code '${suggestedCode}', but no matching category found.`);
      }
    } catch (error) {
      console.error(error);
      toast.error(`Guess Error: ${error.message}`);
    }
  };

  const handleCopyToClipboard = async () => {
    try {
      let queryParams = { ...filters, sortKey: sortConfig.key, sortOrder: sortConfig.order, page: 1, pageSize: SHOW_ALL_PAGE_SIZE };
      if (filters.categoryId === "none") {
        queryParams.noCategory = "true";
        delete queryParams.categoryId;
      }
      Object.keys(queryParams).forEach(key => {
        if (queryParams[key] === '' || queryParams[key] == null || queryParams[key] === false) delete queryParams[key];
      });
      const query = new URLSearchParams(queryParams).toString();
      const res = await fetchWithAuth(`${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL}/accounting/transactions?${query}`);
      if (!res.ok) throw new Error("Failed to fetch transactions for copy.");
      const data = await res.json();
      if (!data.transactions || data.transactions.length === 0) {
        toast.warn("No transactions to copy.");
        return;
      }
      const clipboardText = convertVisibleToClipboard(data.transactions);
      await navigator.clipboard.writeText(clipboardText);
      toast.success(`Copied ${data.transactions.length} transactions to clipboard.`);
    } catch (err) {
      console.error(err);
      toast.error(`Copy failed: ${err.message}`);
    }
  };

  const handleInputTaxes = async (transaction, e) => {
    e.stopPropagation();
    const taxRate = 0.13;
    if (transaction.amount == null) {
      toast.error("Cannot calculate taxes without an amount.");
      return;
    }
    const computedTaxes = parseFloat(Math.abs(transaction.amount * (taxRate / (1 + taxRate))).toFixed(2));
    if (isNaN(computedTaxes)) {
      toast.error("Failed to compute taxes.");
      return;
    }
    await handleUpdateTaxes(transaction.id, computedTaxes);
  };

  const handleUpdateTaxes = async (transactionId, newValue = undefined) => {
    const taxesToUpdate = newValue !== undefined ? newValue : taxesValues[transactionId];
    if (taxesToUpdate === undefined || taxesToUpdate === null || taxesToUpdate === '') {
      toast.error('Taxes value is missing.');
      return;
    }
    const parsedTaxes = parseFloat(taxesToUpdate);
    if (isNaN(parsedTaxes)) {
      toast.error('Taxes must be a valid number.');
      return;
    }
    try {
      const res = await fetchWithAuth(`${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL}/accounting/transactions/${transactionId}/taxes`, {
        method: 'PUT',
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
        body: JSON.stringify({ taxes: parsedTaxes })
      });
      if (!res.ok) {
        const data = await res.json();
        throw new Error(data.error || 'Failed to update taxes.');
      }
      toast.success('Taxes updated successfully.');
      setTransactions(prev =>
        prev.map(tx => tx.id === transactionId ? { ...tx, taxes: parsedTaxes } : tx)
      );
      if (editingTransactionId === transactionId) {
        setEditingTransactionId(null);
      }
    } catch (error) {
      console.error(error);
      toast.error(`Taxes Update Error: ${error.message}`);
    }
  };

  const handleNotesChange = (transactionId, value) => {
    setNotesValues(prev => ({ ...prev, [transactionId]: value }));
  };

  const handleNotesKeyDown = async (e, transactionId) => {
    if (e.key === 'Enter') {
      e.preventDefault();
      await handleUpdateNotes(transactionId);
    }
    if (e.key === 'Escape') {
      setEditingNotesTransactionId(null);
    }
  };

  const handleUpdateNotes = async (transactionId) => {
    const newNotes = notesValues[transactionId];
    if (newNotes === undefined) return;
    try {
      const res = await fetchWithAuth(`${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL}/accounting/transactions/${transactionId}/notes`, {
        method: 'PUT',
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
        body: JSON.stringify({ notes: newNotes })
      });
      if (!res.ok) {
        const data = await res.json();
        throw new Error(data.error || 'Failed to update notes.');
      }
      toast.success('Notes updated successfully.');
      setTransactions(prev =>
        prev.map(tx => tx.id === transactionId ? { ...tx, notes: newNotes } : tx)
      );
      setEditingNotesTransactionId(null);
    } catch (error) {
      console.error(error);
      toast.error(`Notes Update Error: ${error.message}`);
    }
  };

  const handleAutoMatchTransactions = async (transactionIdsOverride = null) => {
    const transactionIds = Array.isArray(transactionIdsOverride) && transactionIdsOverride.length
      ? transactionIdsOverride
      : transactions.map(tx => tx.id);
    if (transactionIds.length === 0) {
      toast.warn("No transactions loaded to match.");
      return;
    }
    toast.info(`Attempting to auto-match ${transactionIds.length} transactions...`);
    try {
      const res = await fetchWithAuth(`${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL}/receipt/match/auto-match-transactions`, {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
        body: JSON.stringify({ transactionIds })
      });
      if (!res.ok) {
        const data = await res.json().catch(() => ({ error: "Failed to auto-match transactions" }));
        throw new Error(data.error || 'Failed to auto-match transactions');
      }
      const result = await res.json();
      const { matched, skipped, errors } = result;
      let message = `Auto-match complete!`;
      if (matched?.length > 0) message += ` Matched: ${matched.length}.`;
      if (skipped?.length > 0) message += ` Skipped: ${skipped.length}.`;
      if (errors?.length > 0) message += ` Errors: ${errors.length}.`;
      toast.success(message);
      fetchTransactions(pagination.currentPage, pagination.pageSize, filters, sortConfig);
    } catch (error) {
      console.error(error);
      toast.error(`Auto-match error: ${error.message}`);
    }
  };

  const convertToCSV = (txs) => {
    if (!txs || txs.length === 0) return "";
    const headers = [
      "Date", "Description", "Amount", "Balance", "Taxes", "Notes", "Category", "Receipt Support", "Source", "Created At", "Receipt ID"
    ];
    const rows = txs.map(tx => {
      const date = formatDate(tx.date, accountingTimezone);
      const description = tx.description;
      const amount = tx.amount;
      const balance = tx.balance != null ? tx.balance.toFixed(2) : "";
      const taxes = tx.taxes ?? 0;
      const notes = tx.notes || "";
      const category = tx.category ? tx.category.description : "";
      const receiptSupport = [
        tx.receipt?.id ? `Matched ${tx.receipt.id}` : '',
        tx.receiptHints?.matchConfidence != null ? `Confidence ${formatConfidencePercent(tx.receiptHints.matchConfidence)}` : '',
        tx.receiptHints?.suggestedExpenseAccount ? getSuggestedAccountLabel(tx.receiptHints.suggestedExpenseAccount) : '',
        tx.receiptHints?.needsReview ? 'Needs review' : ''
      ].filter(Boolean).join(' | ');
      const source = tx.source ? tx.source.name : "";
      const createdAt = new Date(tx.createdAt).toLocaleString();
      const receiptId = tx.receipt?.id || "";
      return [date, description, amount, balance, taxes, notes, category, receiptSupport, source, createdAt, receiptId];
    });
    const csvContent = [
      headers.join(","),
      ...rows.map(row => row.map(cell => `"${String(cell ?? "").replace(/"/g, '""')}"`).join(","))
    ].join("\n");
    return csvContent;
  };

  const convertVisibleToClipboard = (txs) => {
    if (!txs || txs.length === 0) return '';
    const headers = availableColumns
      .filter(col => visibleColumns.includes(col.key))
      .map(col => col.label);
    const rows = txs.map(tx =>
      availableColumns
        .filter(col => visibleColumns.includes(col.key))
        .map(col => {
          const key = col.key;
          switch (key) {
            case 'date': return formatDate(tx.date, accountingTimezone);
            case 'description': return tx.description;
            case 'amount': return (tx.amount >= 0 ? '+' : '-') + Math.abs(tx.amount).toFixed(2);
            case 'taxes': return (tx.taxes ?? 0).toFixed(2);
            case 'notes': return tx.notes || '';
            case 'category': return tx.category?.description || '';
            case 'receiptSupport': {
              const hints = tx.receiptHints || {};
              const parts = [];
              if (tx.receipt?.id) parts.push(`Matched ${tx.receipt.id}`);
              if (hints.extractedTaxAmount != null) parts.push(`Tax ${Number(hints.extractedTaxAmount).toFixed(2)}`);
              if (hints.matchConfidence != null) parts.push(`Confidence ${formatConfidencePercent(hints.matchConfidence)}`);
              if (hints.suggestedExpenseAccount) parts.push(getSuggestedAccountLabel(hints.suggestedExpenseAccount));
              if (hints.needsReview) parts.push('Needs review');
              return parts.join(' | ');
            }
            case 'source': return tx.source?.name || '';
            case 'balance': return tx.balance != null ? tx.balance.toFixed(2) : '';
            case 'createdAt': return new Date(tx.createdAt).toLocaleString();
            default: return '';
          }
        })
    );
    const allLines = [headers.join('\t'), ...rows.map(r => r.join('\t'))];
    return allLines.join('\n');
  };


  const handleDownloadCSV = async () => {
    toast.info("Preparing CSV download for all filtered transactions...");
    try {
      let queryParams = { ...filters, sortKey: sortConfig.key, sortOrder: sortConfig.order, page: 1, pageSize: SHOW_ALL_PAGE_SIZE };
      if (filters.categoryId === "none") {
        queryParams.noCategory = "true";
        delete queryParams.categoryId;
      } else {
        queryParams.noCategory = "false";
      }
      Object.keys(queryParams).forEach(key => {
        if (queryParams[key] === '' || queryParams[key] === null || queryParams[key] === undefined || queryParams[key] === false) {
          delete queryParams[key];
        }
      });
      const query = new URLSearchParams(queryParams).toString();
      const res = await fetchWithAuth(`${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL}/accounting/transactions?${query}`);
      if (!res.ok) throw new Error("Failed to fetch all transactions for CSV.");
      const data = await res.json();
      if (!data.transactions || data.transactions.length === 0) {
        toast.warn("No transactions found matching filters to download.");
        return;
      }
      const csvData = convertToCSV(data.transactions);
      const blob = new Blob([csvData], { type: "text/csv;charset=utf-8;" });
      const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
      const link = document.createElement("a");
      link.setAttribute("href", url);
      link.setAttribute("download", "transactions.csv");
      document.body.appendChild(link);
      link.click();
      document.body.removeChild(link);
      URL.revokeObjectURL(url);
      toast.success(`CSV downloaded with ${data.transactions.length} transactions.`);
    } catch (error) {
      console.error(error);
      toast.error(`Error downloading CSV: ${error.message}`);
    }
  };

  const renderTableHeader = () => (
    <tr>
      <th className="px-2 py-2 border-b">
        <input
          type="checkbox"
          className="checkbox checkbox-sm"
          onChange={handleSelectAll}
          checked={transactions.length > 0 && selectedIds.size === transactions.length}
          disabled={transactions.length === 0}
        />
      </th>
      {availableColumns
        .filter(col => visibleColumns.includes(col.key))
        .map(col => (
          <th key={col.key} className="px-4 py-2 border-b select-none">
            {['date', 'description', 'amount', 'taxes', 'balance', 'source', 'createdAt'].includes(col.key) ? (
              <button
                className="flex items-center w-full justify-between hover:text-primary"
                onClick={() => handleSort(col.key)}
              >
                {col.label}
                {sortConfig.key === col.key &&
                  (sortConfig.order === 'asc'
                    ? <ChevronUp size={16} />
                    : <ChevronDown size={16} />)
                }
              </button>
            ) : col.label}
          </th>
        ))}
    </tr>
  );

  const renderTableRow = (transaction) => {
    const effectiveTaxes = transaction.taxes != null ? Number(transaction.taxes) : 0;
    const showCheck = transaction.receipt != null;
    const receiptHints = transaction.receiptHints || {};
    const confidenceLabel = formatConfidencePercent(receiptHints.matchConfidence);
    const suggestedAccountLabel = getSuggestedAccountLabel(receiptHints.suggestedExpenseAccount);
    return (
      <tr key={transaction.id} className="hover:bg-base-200 cursor-pointer" onClick={() => handleRowClick(transaction)}>
        <td className="px-2 py-2 border-b">
          <input
            type="checkbox"
            className="checkbox checkbox-sm"
            checked={selectedIds.has(transaction.id)}
            onChange={() => handleSelectRow(transaction.id)}
            onClick={e => e.stopPropagation()}
          />
        </td>
        {visibleColumns.includes('date') && <td className="px-4 py-2 border-b">{formatDate(transaction.date, accountingTimezone)}</td>}
        {visibleColumns.includes('description') && <td className="px-4 py-2 border-b">{transaction.description}</td>}
        {visibleColumns.includes('amount') && (
          <td className={`px-4 py-2 border-b ${transaction.amount >= 0 ? 'text-success' : 'text-error'}`}>
            {transaction.amount >= 0 ? '+' : '-'}${Math.abs(transaction.amount).toFixed(2)}
          </td>
        )}

        {visibleColumns.includes('taxes') && (
          <td className="px-4 py-2 border-b">
            <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
              {showCheck && <Tooltip content={`Matched Receipt ID: ${transaction.receipt?.id}`}><CheckCircle className="text-success mr-1 flex-shrink-0" size={16} /></Tooltip>}
              {editingTransactionId === transaction.id ? (
                <input
                  type="number"
                  value={taxesValues[transaction.id] ?? ''}
                  onChange={(e) => setTaxesValues(prev => ({ ...prev, [transaction.id]: e.target.value }))}
                  onKeyDown={(e) => { if (e.key === 'Enter') handleUpdateTaxes(transaction.id); if (e.key === 'Escape') setEditingTransactionId(null); }}
                  onClick={(e) => e.stopPropagation()}
                  className="input input-bordered input-xs w-20"
                  step="0.01"
                  autoFocus
                  onBlur={() => setEditingTransactionId(null)}
                />
              ) : (
                <span
                  onClick={(e) => {
                    e.stopPropagation();
                    setEditingTransactionId(transaction.id);
                    setTaxesValues(prev => ({ ...prev, [transaction.id]: transaction.taxes ?? '' }));
                  }}
                  className="cursor-pointer hover:bg-base-300 px-1 rounded"
                  title="Click to edit taxes"
                >
                  ${effectiveTaxes.toFixed(2)}
                </span>
              )}
            </div>
          </td>
        )}
        {visibleColumns.includes('balance') && (
          <td className="px-4 py-2 border-b">
            {transaction.balance != null
              ? `$${transaction.balance.toFixed(2)}`
              : <span className="text-base-content/50">—</span>}
          </td>
        )}

        {visibleColumns.includes('category') && (
          <td className="px-4 py-2 border-b">
            <select
              onClick={(e) => e.stopPropagation()}
              onChange={(e) => { e.stopPropagation(); handleAssignCategory(transaction.id, e.target.value); }}
              value={transaction.category?.id ?? ''}
              className="select select-bordered select-xs w-full max-w-xs"
              title={transaction.category ? `Current: ${transaction.category.description}` : 'Select Category'}
            >
              <option value="">-- Select Category --</option>
              {categories.sort((a, b) => a.description.localeCompare(b.description)).map(cat => (
                <option key={cat.id} value={cat.id}>{cat.description}</option>
              ))}
            </select>
          </td>
        )}
        {visibleColumns.includes('receiptSupport') && (
          <td className="px-4 py-2 border-b align-top">
            <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-1 max-w-[260px]">
              {transaction.receipt?.id ? (
                <span className="badge badge-success badge-outline">Matched receipt</span>
              ) : (
                <span className="badge badge-ghost">No receipt</span>
              )}
              {receiptHints.extractedTaxAmount != null && (
                <span className="badge badge-outline">Tax ${Number(receiptHints.extractedTaxAmount).toFixed(2)}</span>
              )}
              {confidenceLabel && (
                <span className="badge badge-info badge-outline">{confidenceLabel}</span>
              )}
              {receiptHints.needsReview && (
                <span className="badge badge-warning">Needs review</span>
              )}
            </div>
            {suggestedAccountLabel ? (
              <div className="text-xs text-base-content/70 mt-2">Suggested: {suggestedAccountLabel}</div>
            ) : null}
            {receiptHints.suggestedStatementLine ? (
              <div className="text-xs text-base-content/60 mt-1">Line: {receiptHints.suggestedStatementLine}</div>
            ) : null}
          </td>
        )}
        {visibleColumns.includes('notes') && (
          <td className="px-4 py-2 border-b">
            {editingNotesTransactionId === transaction.id ? (
              <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
                <input
                  type="text"
                  value={notesValues[transaction.id] ?? ''}
                  onChange={(e) => handleNotesChange(transaction.id, e.target.value)}
                  onKeyDown={(e) => handleNotesKeyDown(e, transaction.id)}
                  onClick={(e) => e.stopPropagation()}
                  className="input input-bordered input-xs w-full"
                  autoFocus
                />
                <Tooltip content="Save Note">
                  <button onClick={(e) => { e.stopPropagation(); handleUpdateNotes(transaction.id); }} className="btn btn-xs btn-ghost text-success">
                    <Save size={14} />
                  </button>
                </Tooltip>
                <Tooltip content="Cancel Edit">
                  <button onClick={(e) => { e.stopPropagation(); setEditingNotesTransactionId(null); }} className="btn btn-xs btn-ghost text-error">
                    <XCircle size={14} />
                  </button>
                </Tooltip>
              </div>
            ) : (
              <div
                onClick={(e) => {
                  e.stopPropagation();
                  setEditingNotesTransactionId(transaction.id);
                  setNotesValues(prev => ({ ...prev, [transaction.id]: transaction.notes || '' }));
                }}
                className="cursor-pointer hover:bg-base-300 px-1 rounded min-h-[20px] text-ellipsis overflow-hidden whitespace-nowrap max-w-[200px]"
                title={transaction.notes || 'Click to add/edit note'}
              >
                {transaction.notes || <span className="text-base-content/50 italic">Add note...</span>}
              </div>
            )}
          </td>
        )}
        {visibleColumns.includes('source') && (
          <td className="px-4 py-2 border-b">{transaction.source?.name || <span className="text-base-content/50">N/A</span>}</td>
        )}
        {visibleColumns.includes('actions') && (
          <td className="px-4 py-2 border-b">
            <div className="flex items-center space-x-1">
              {(transaction.isPosted || transaction.posted)
                ? (
                  <CheckCircle
                    className="text-success cursor-pointer"
                    size={16}
                    title="View proposed journal entry"
                    onClick={e => handleShowProposal(transaction.id, e)}
                  />
                )
                : (
                  <XCircle className="text-error" size={16} title="Not yet posted" />
                )
              }

              <Tooltip content="Delete Transaction">
                <button onClick={(e) => handleDeleteTransaction(transaction.id, e)} className="btn btn-ghost btn-xs text-error">
                  <Trash2 size={16} />
                </button>
              </Tooltip>
              <Tooltip content="Guess Category (AI)">
                <button onClick={(e) => handleGuessCategory(transaction.id, e)} className="btn btn-ghost btn-xs text-info">
                  <HelpCircle size={16} />
                </button>
              </Tooltip>
              <Tooltip content={isTaxActionBlocked(transaction) ? getTaxActionBlockReason(transaction) : 'Apply 13% Taxes (Assumes amount includes tax)'}>
                <button
                  onClick={(e) => {
                    if (isTaxActionBlocked(transaction)) {
                      e.stopPropagation();
                      toast.info(getTaxActionBlockReason(transaction));
                      return;
                    }
                    handleInputTaxes(transaction, e);
                  }}
                  disabled={isTaxActionBlocked(transaction)}
                  className={`btn btn-ghost btn-xs ${isTaxActionBlocked(transaction) ? 'text-base-content/30 cursor-not-allowed' : 'text-success'}`}
                >
                  <Percent size={16} />
                </button>
              </Tooltip>
            </div>
          </td>
        )}
        {visibleColumns.includes('createdAt') && (
          <td className="px-4 py-2 border-b">{new Date(transaction.createdAt).toLocaleString()}</td>
        )}
      </tr>
    );
  };

  return (
    <div className="mt-6">
      {workflow?.activatedAt && (
        <div className="mb-4 rounded-box border border-primary/30 bg-primary/5 p-4">
          <div className="flex flex-col gap-3 lg:flex-row lg:items-start lg:justify-between">
            <div>
              <div className="text-sm font-semibold text-primary">{workflow.title || 'AI Manager workflow'}</div>
              <div className="mt-1 text-sm text-base-content/75">
                {workflow.nextAction || 'This list is filtered to the transactions involved in the selected AI Manager task.'}
              </div>
              <div className="mt-2 flex flex-wrap gap-2 text-xs text-base-content/60">
                {workflow.toolName && <span className="badge badge-outline">Use: {workflow.toolName}</span>}
                {workflow.filterPreset && <span className="badge badge-outline">Filter: {workflow.filterPreset}</span>}
                {Array.isArray(workflow.affectedRecords) && workflow.affectedRecords.length > 0 && (
                  <span className="badge badge-outline">{workflow.affectedRecords.length} sampled records selected</span>
                )}
              </div>
            </div>
            <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2">
              <button
                type="button"
                className="btn btn-sm btn-primary"
                onClick={bulkGenerateProposals}
                disabled={selectedIds.size === 0 || isBulkWorking}
              >
                {isBulkWorking ? <span className="loading loading-spinner loading-xs" /> : <Wand2 size={14} />}
                Generate proposals
              </button>
              <button
                type="button"
                className="btn btn-sm btn-outline"
                onClick={() => onNavigate?.('review-queue')}
              >
                Review proposals
              </button>
              <button
                type="button"
                className="btn btn-sm btn-outline"
                onClick={() => onNavigate?.('ai-rule-suggestions')}
              >
                AI rules
              </button>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      )}
      <details className="collapse collapse-arrow bg-base-200 rounded-box shadow mb-4">
        <summary className="collapse-title text-lg font-medium">
          <FilterIcon className="inline mr-2" size={20} /> Filters & Options
        </summary>
        <div className="collapse-content">
          <div className="p-4 grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4">
            <div>
              <label className="label"><span className="label-text">Search Description</span></label>
              <input type="text" name="search" value={filters.search} onChange={handleFilterChange} placeholder="e.g., Amazon, Tim Hortons" className="input input-bordered w-full" />
            </div>
            <div>
              <label className="label"><span className="label-text">Notes</span></label>
              <input
                type="text"
                name="notes"
                value={filters.notes}
                onChange={handleFilterChange}
                placeholder="Filter by notes"
                className="input input-bordered w-full"
              />
            </div>

            <div>
              <label className="label"><span className="label-text">Type</span></label>
              <select name="type" value={filters.type} onChange={handleFilterChange} className="select select-bordered w-full">
                <option value="">All</option>
                <option value="income">Income</option>
                <option value="expense">Expense</option>
              </select>
            </div>
            <div>
              <label className="label"><span className="label-text">Category</span></label>
              <AccountAutocomplete
                value={filters.categoryId}
                onChange={(val) => {
                  setFilters(prev => ({
                    ...prev,
                    categoryId: val,
                    noCategory: 'false',
                    missingCategory: false,
                  }));
                }}
                accounts={categories}
                placeholder="All Categories"
              />
            </div>
            <div>
              <label className="label"><span className="label-text">Source</span></label>
              <select name="sourceId" value={filters.sourceId} onChange={handleFilterChange} className="select select-bordered w-full">
                <option value="">All Sources</option>
                {sources.sort((a, b) => a.name.localeCompare(b.name)).map(source => (
                  <option key={source.id} value={source.id}>{source.name}</option>
                ))}
              </select>
            </div>
            <div>
              <label className="label"><span className="label-text">Top Level Category</span></label>
              <select name="topCategory" value={filters.topCategory} onChange={handleFilterChange} className="select select-bordered w-full">
                <option value="">All</option>
                {topCategories.sort().map(tc => <option key={tc} value={tc}>{tc}</option>)}
              </select>
            </div>
            <div>
              <label className="label"><span className="label-text">Timeframe</span></label>
              <select name="timeframe" value={filters.timeframe} onChange={handleTimeframeChange} className="select select-bordered w-full">
                <option value="">Custom Dates</option>
                <option value="thisQuarter">This Quarter</option>
                <option value="lastQuarter">Last Quarter</option>
                <option value="thisYear">This Year</option>
                <option value="lastYear">Last Year</option>
                {fyStartMonth && <option value="thisFiscalYear">This Fiscal Year</option>}
                {fyStartMonth && <option value="lastFiscalYear">Last Fiscal Year</option>}
              </select>
            </div>
            <div>
              <label className="label"><span className="label-text">Date From</span></label>
              <input type="date" name="dateFrom" value={filters.dateFrom} onChange={handleFilterChange} className="input input-bordered w-full" />
            </div>
            <div>
              <label className="label"><span className="label-text">Date To</span></label>
              <input type="date" name="dateTo" value={filters.dateTo} onChange={handleFilterChange} className="input input-bordered w-full" />
            </div>
            <div>
              <label className="label"><span className="label-text">Amount Min</span></label>
              <input type="number" name="amountMin" value={filters.amountMin} onChange={handleFilterChange} placeholder="e.g., 10.00" className="input input-bordered w-full" min="0" step="0.01" />
            </div>
            <div>
              <label className="label"><span className="label-text">Amount Max</span></label>
              <input type="number" name="amountMax" value={filters.amountMax} onChange={handleFilterChange} placeholder="e.g., 100.00" className="input input-bordered w-full" min="0" step="0.01" />
            </div>
            <div className="form-control items-start pt-2 md:col-span-2 lg:col-span-2">
              <div className="text-sm font-medium mb-2">Unfinished work</div>
              <div className="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 gap-2 w-full">
                <label className="label cursor-pointer justify-start gap-2">
                  <input type="checkbox" name="missingReceipt" checked={filters.missingReceipt || filters.unmatchedOnly} onChange={handleFilterChange} className="checkbox checkbox-primary checkbox-sm" />
                  <span className="label-text">Missing receipt</span>
                </label>
                <label className="label cursor-pointer justify-start gap-2">
                  <input type="checkbox" name="missingCategory" checked={filters.missingCategory || filters.noCategory === 'true'} onChange={handleFilterChange} className="checkbox checkbox-primary checkbox-sm" />
                  <span className="label-text">Missing category</span>
                </label>
                <label className="label cursor-pointer justify-start gap-2">
                  <input type="checkbox" name="missingJournal" checked={filters.missingJournal} onChange={handleFilterChange} className="checkbox checkbox-primary checkbox-sm" />
                  <span className="label-text">Missing journal entry</span>
                </label>
                <label className="label cursor-pointer justify-start gap-2">
                  <input type="checkbox" name="missingTaxes" checked={filters.missingTaxes} onChange={handleFilterChange} className="checkbox checkbox-primary checkbox-sm" />
                  <span className="label-text">Missing tax amount</span>
                </label>
                <label className="label cursor-pointer justify-start gap-2 sm:col-span-2">
                  <input type="checkbox" name="unfinishedOnly" checked={filters.unfinishedOnly} onChange={handleFilterChange} className="checkbox checkbox-primary checkbox-sm" />
                  <span className="label-text">Anything unfinished</span>
                </label>
              </div>
            </div>
            <div>
              <label className="label"><span className="label-text">Items Per Page</span></label>
              <select value={pagination.pageSize} onChange={handlePageSizeChange} className="select select-bordered w-full">
                <option value={50}>50</option>
                <option value={100}>100</option>
                <option value={200}>200</option>
                <option value={SHOW_ALL_PAGE_SIZE}>Show All</option>
              </select>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div className="p-4 border-t border-base-300 flex justify-end space-x-2">
            <button onClick={handleResetFilters} className="btn btn-ghost">
              <XCircle size={18} className="mr-1" /> Reset Filters
            </button>
            <button onClick={handleApplyFilters} className="btn btn-primary">
              <Search size={18} className="mr-1" /> Apply Filters
            </button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </details>

      {(!loading && summary.count > 0) && (
        <div className="stats shadow mb-4 w-full">
          <div className="stat">
            <div className="stat-figure text-secondary"><FilterIcon /></div>
            <div className="stat-title">Filtered Transactions</div>
            <div className="stat-value">{summary.count.toLocaleString()}</div>
          </div>
          <div className="stat">
            <div className="stat-figure text-secondary"><DollarSign /></div>
            <div className="stat-title">Total Amount</div>
            <div className={`stat-value ${summary.totalAmount >= 0 ? 'text-success' : 'text-error'}`}>
              ${summary.totalAmount.toLocaleString(undefined, { minimumFractionDigits: 2, maximumFractionDigits: 2 })}
            </div>
          </div>
          <div className="stat">
            <div className="stat-figure text-secondary"><Percent /></div>
            <div className="stat-title">Total Taxes</div>
            <div className="stat-value">${summary.totalTaxes.toLocaleString(undefined, { minimumFractionDigits: 2, maximumFractionDigits: 2 })}</div>
            <div className="stat-desc text-xs italic">(Based on recorded taxes)</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      )}


      {(!loading && summary.count > 0) && (
        <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 xl:grid-cols-5 gap-3 mb-4">
          <button type="button" className="stat bg-base-100 shadow border border-base-300 rounded-box text-left hover:border-primary" onClick={() => applyUnfinishedPreset('unfinished')}>
            <div className="stat-title">Anything unfinished</div>
            <div className="stat-value text-2xl">{unfinishedSummary.unfinishedCount || 0}</div>
            <div className="stat-desc">Missing receipt, category, journal, or tax</div>
          </button>
          <button type="button" className="stat bg-base-100 shadow border border-base-300 rounded-box text-left hover:border-primary" onClick={() => applyUnfinishedPreset('uncategorized')}>
            <div className="stat-title">Uncategorized</div>
            <div className="stat-value text-2xl">{unfinishedSummary.uncategorized || 0}</div>
            <div className="stat-desc">Open the list filtered to category gaps</div>
          </button>
          <button type="button" className="stat bg-base-100 shadow border border-base-300 rounded-box text-left hover:border-primary" onClick={() => applyUnfinishedPreset('missingReceipt')}>
            <div className="stat-title">Missing receipt</div>
            <div className="stat-value text-2xl">{unfinishedSummary.missingReceipt || 0}</div>
            <div className="stat-desc">Useful before month-end review</div>
          </button>
          <button type="button" className="stat bg-base-100 shadow border border-base-300 rounded-box text-left hover:border-primary" onClick={() => applyUnfinishedPreset('missingJournal')}>
            <div className="stat-title">Missing journal</div>
            <div className="stat-value text-2xl">{unfinishedSummary.missingJournal || 0}</div>
            <div className="stat-desc">Items not yet synced to books</div>
          </button>
          <button type="button" className="stat bg-base-100 shadow border border-base-300 rounded-box text-left hover:border-primary" onClick={() => applyUnfinishedPreset('missingTaxes')}>
            <div className="stat-title">Missing tax amount</div>
            <div className="stat-value text-2xl">{unfinishedSummary.missingTaxes || 0}</div>
            <div className="stat-desc">Zero or blank taxes recorded</div>
          </button>
        </div>
      )}

      <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2 mb-4 relative items-center">
        <button id="column-selector-button" onClick={() => setShowColumnSelector(prev => !prev)} className="btn btn-outline">
          <Columns size={18} className="mr-1" /> Columns
        </button>
        {showColumnSelector && (
          <div ref={columnSelectorRef} className="absolute top-full left-0 mt-2 z-50 bg-base-100 border border-base-300 rounded-box shadow-lg p-4 grid grid-cols-2 gap-2 w-80">
            {availableColumns.map(col => (
              <div key={col.key} className="form-control">
                <label className="label cursor-pointer justify-start gap-2">
                  <input type="checkbox" checked={visibleColumns.includes(col.key)} onChange={() => toggleColumn(col.key)} className="checkbox checkbox-sm checkbox-primary" id={`col-${col.key}`} />
                  <span className="label-text">{col.label}</span>
                </label>
              </div>
            ))}
          </div>
        )}
        <button onClick={handleDownloadCSV} className="btn btn-outline btn-success">
          <Download size={18} className="mr-1" /> Download CSV
        </button>
        <button onClick={handleAutoMatchTransactions} className="btn btn-outline btn-secondary">
          <Wand2 size={18} className="mr-1" /> Auto-Match Receipts
        </button>
        <button onClick={() => setShowBulkModal(true)} className="btn btn-outline btn-warning">
          <UploadCloud size={18} className="mr-1" /> Bulk Post
        </button>
        <button
          onClick={() => setShowAddModal(true)}
          className="btn btn-outline btn-primary"
        >
          + Add Transaction
        </button>

        <button
          onClick={handleCopyToClipboard}
          className="btn btn-outline btn-info"
        >
          <ClipboardCopyIcon size={18} className="mr-1" /> Copy CSV
        </button>

        {selectedIds.size > 0 && (
          <>
            <button onClick={() => setShowApplyRuleModal(true)} className="btn btn-accent">
              <ChevronsRight size={18} className="mr-1" />
              Apply Rule ({selectedIds.size})
            </button>

            <button
              onClick={() => setShowBulkCategoryModal(true)}
              className="btn btn-outline btn-secondary"
              disabled={isBulkCategorying}
              title="Set one category for all selected"
            >
              {isBulkCategorying ? <span className="loading loading-spinner loading-xs mr-1" /> : null}
              Set Category
            </button>

            <button
              onClick={bulkClearCategory}
              className="btn btn-outline"
              disabled={isBulkWorking}
              title="Clear category for selected transactions"
            >
              {isBulkWorking ? <span className="loading loading-spinner loading-xs mr-1" /> : null}
              Clear Category
            </button>

            <button
              onClick={bulkAddHST13}
              className="btn btn-outline btn-success"
              disabled={isBulkTaxing}
              title="Assumes amounts include HST"
            >
              {isBulkTaxing ? <span className="loading loading-spinner loading-xs mr-1" /> : null}
              Add 13% Tax
            </button>

            <button
              onClick={bulkInferTaxTreatment}
              className="btn btn-outline"
              disabled={isBulkWorking}
              title="Infer tax treatment from tax amount and sign"
            >
              {isBulkWorking ? <span className="loading loading-spinner loading-xs mr-1" /> : null}
              Infer Tax Treatment
            </button>

            <button
              onClick={bulkMarkNoTax}
              className="btn btn-outline"
              disabled={isBulkWorking}
              title="Clear tax amount and set no tax"
            >
              {isBulkWorking ? <span className="loading loading-spinner loading-xs mr-1" /> : null}
              Mark No Tax
            </button>

            <button
              onClick={() => handleAutoMatchTransactions(Array.from(selectedIds))}
              className="btn btn-outline"
              disabled={isBulkWorking}
              title="Try receipt auto-match on selected transactions only"
            >
              {isBulkWorking ? <span className="loading loading-spinner loading-xs mr-1" /> : null}
              Match Receipts
            </button>

            <button
              onClick={bulkGenerateProposals}
              className="btn btn-outline btn-info"
              disabled={isBulkWorking}
              title="Generate AI bookkeeping proposals for the selected transactions"
            >
              {isBulkWorking ? <span className="loading loading-spinner loading-xs mr-1" /> : null}
              Generate Proposals
            </button>
          </>
        )}
      </div>

      {loading ? (
        <div className="flex justify-center items-center min-h-[300px]">
          <span className="loading loading-spinner loading-lg"></span>
        </div>
      ) : (
        <>
          <div className="overflow-x-auto w-full">
            <table className="table table-zebra table-sm w-full">
              <thead>{renderTableHeader()}</thead>
              <tbody>
                {transactions.length === 0 ? (
                  <tr>
                    <td colSpan={visibleColumns.length + 1} className="text-center py-10 text-base-content/70">
                      No transactions found matching your criteria.
                    </td>
                  </tr>
                ) : (
                  transactions.map(tx => renderTableRow(tx))
                )}
              </tbody>
            </table>
          </div>
          {pagination.totalPages > 1 && (
            <div className="flex justify-center mt-6">
              <div className="join">
                <button onClick={() => handlePageChange(pagination.currentPage - 1)} disabled={pagination.currentPage === 1} className="join-item btn btn-sm">
                  «
                </button>
                <button className="join-item btn btn-sm">
                  Page {pagination.currentPage} of {pagination.totalPages}
                </button>
                <button onClick={() => handlePageChange(pagination.currentPage + 1)} disabled={pagination.currentPage === pagination.totalPages} className="join-item btn btn-sm">
                  »
                </button>
              </div>
            </div>
          )}
        </>
      )}

      {showBulkCategoryModal && (
        <dialog open className="modal">
          <div className="modal-box w-11/12 max-w-2xl">
            <h3 className="font-bold text-lg">Bulk Set Category</h3>
            <p className="py-2">
              Apply one category to <strong>{selectedIds.size}</strong> selected transactions.
            </p>
            <div className="form-control mt-3">
              <label className="label"><span className="label-text">Category</span></label>
              <AccountAutocomplete
                value={bulkCategoryId}
                onChange={(val) => setBulkCategoryId(val)}
                accounts={categories}
                placeholder="-- Select Category --"
              />
            </div>

            <div className="modal-action">
              <button className="btn btn-ghost" onClick={() => setShowBulkCategoryModal(false)} disabled={isBulkCategorying}>Cancel</button>
              <button className="btn btn-primary" onClick={bulkSetCategory} disabled={!bulkCategoryId || isBulkCategorying}>
                {isBulkCategorying ? <span className="loading loading-spinner loading-xs" /> : "Apply"}
              </button>
            </div>
          </div>
          <form method="dialog" className="modal-backdrop">
            <button>close</button>
          </form>
        </dialog>
      )}

      {showApplyRuleModal && (
        <dialog open className="modal modal-open">
          <div className="modal-box">
            <h3 className="font-bold text-lg">Apply Accounting Rule</h3>
            <p className="py-2">Select a rule to apply to the <strong>{selectedIds.size}</strong> selected transactions.</p>
            <div className="form-control w-full mt-4">
              <select
                className="select select-bordered w-full"
                value={selectedRuleId}
                onChange={e => setSelectedRuleId(e.target.value)}
