```jsx
              >
                <option disabled value="">-- Select a Rule --</option>
                <option value="__ALL__">-- Apply All Rules --</option>
                {rules.map(rule => <option key={rule.id} value={rule.id}>{rule.name}</option>)}
              </select>
            </div>

            {isApplyingRule && selectedRuleId === '__ALL__' && ruleProgress.total > 0 && (
              <div className="mt-4">
                <p className="text-sm text-center mb-1 text-base-content/80">
                  {ruleProgress.message}
                </p>
                <progress
                  className="progress progress-info w-full"
                  value={ruleProgress.current}
                  max={ruleProgress.total}
                ></progress>
                <p className="text-xs text-center mt-1 text-base-content/60">
                  {ruleProgress.current} of {ruleProgress.total} rules processed
                </p>
              </div>
            )}

            <div className="modal-action">
              <button className="btn btn-ghost" onClick={() => { setShowApplyRuleModal(false); setSelectedRuleId(''); setRuleProgress({ message: '', current: 0, total: 0 }); }}>Cancel</button>
              <button
                className="btn btn-primary"
                disabled={!selectedRuleId || isApplyingRule}
                onClick={handleApplyRule}
              >
                {isApplyingRule ? <span className="loading loading-spinner loading-xs"></span> : 'Run Rule'}
              </button>
            </div>
          </div>
        </dialog>
      )}

      {showAddModal && (
        <dialog open className="modal">
          <div className="modal-box w-11/12 max-w-2xl">
            <h3 className="font-bold text-lg">New Transaction</h3>
            <div className="space-y-3 mt-4">
              <input
                type="date"
                value={newTx.date}
                onChange={e => setNewTx({ ...newTx, date: e.target.value })}
                className="input input-bordered w-full"
              />
              <input
                type="text"
                placeholder="Description"
                value={newTx.description}
                onChange={e => setNewTx({ ...newTx, description: e.target.value })}
                className="input input-bordered w-full"
              />
              <div className="flex gap-2">
                <input
                  type="number"
                  placeholder="Amount"
                  value={newTx.amount}
                  onChange={e => setNewTx({ ...newTx, amount: e.target.value })}
                  className="input input-bordered flex-1"
                />
                <input
                  type="number"
                  placeholder="Taxes"
                  value={newTx.taxes}
                  onChange={e => setNewTx({ ...newTx, taxes: e.target.value })}
                  className="input input-bordered flex-1"
                />
              </div>

              <select
                value=""
                onChange={e => { if (e.target.value) applyManualTemplate(e.target.value); e.target.value = ''; }}
                className="select select-bordered w-full"
              >
                <option value="">Apply a template (optional)</option>
                <option value="AP_BILL">Accounts payable bill</option>
                <option value="AR_INVOICE">Accounts receivable invoice</option>
                <option value="PAYROLL_NET_PAY">Payroll net pay</option>
                <option value="PAYROLL_REMITTANCE">Payroll remittance</option>
                <option value="TIPS_PAYOUT">Tips payout</option>
              </select>
              <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-2">
                <select
                  value={newTx.postingType}
                  onChange={e => setNewTx({ ...newTx, postingType: e.target.value })}
                  className="select select-bordered w-full"
                >
                  <option value="">Auto-detect transaction type</option>
                  <option value="BANK_EXPENSE">Bank expense</option>
                  <option value="BANK_REVENUE">Bank revenue</option>
                  <option value="TRANSFER">Transfer</option>
                  <option value="CREDIT_CARD_PAYMENT">Credit card payment</option>
                  <option value="PAYROLL_PAYMENT">Payroll payment</option>
                  <option value="TAX_REMITTANCE">Tax remittance</option>
                  <option value="OWNER_DRAW">Owner draw</option>
                  <option value="OWNER_CONTRIBUTION">Owner contribution</option>
                </select>
                <select
                  value={newTx.taxTreatment}
                  onChange={e => setNewTx({ ...newTx, taxTreatment: e.target.value })}
                  className="select select-bordered w-full"
                >
                  <option value="NO_TAX">No tax</option>
                  <option value="INPUT_TAX_CREDIT">Input tax credit</option>
                  <option value="SALES_TAX_PAYABLE">Sales tax payable</option>
                </select>
              </div>
              <AccountAutocomplete
                value={newTx.categoryId}
                onChange={(val) => setNewTx({ ...newTx, categoryId: val })}
                accounts={categories}
                placeholder="No Category"
              />
              <select
                value={newTx.sourceId}
                onChange={e => setNewTx({ ...newTx, sourceId: e.target.value })}
                className="select select-bordered w-full"
              >
                <option value="">No Source</option>
                {sources.map(s => (
                  <option key={s.id} value={s.id}>{s.name}</option>
                ))}
              </select>
              <textarea
                placeholder="Custom journal lines JSON (optional)"
                value={newTx.journalText}
                onChange={e => setNewTx({ ...newTx, journalText: e.target.value })}
                className="textarea textarea-bordered w-full h-40 font-mono text-sm"
              />
              <div className="text-xs text-base-content/70">
                Use this for non-cash items like A/P, A/R, payroll remittances, and tips payable. Template codes are editable before saving.
              </div>
              <textarea
                placeholder="Notes (optional)"
                value={newTx.notes}
                onChange={e => setNewTx({ ...newTx, notes: e.target.value })}
                className="textarea textarea-bordered w-full"
              />
            </div>
            <div className="modal-action">
              <button
                className="btn btn-ghost"
                onClick={() => setShowAddModal(false)}
              >
                Cancel
              </button>
              <button
                className="btn btn-primary"
                onClick={async () => {
                  try {
                    const res = await fetchWithAuth(
                      `${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL}/accounting/transactions`,
                      {
                        method: 'POST',
                        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
                        body: JSON.stringify({
                          ...newTx,
                          journalLines: (() => {
                            if (!newTx.journalText || !String(newTx.journalText).trim()) return [];
                            try {
                              const parsed = JSON.parse(newTx.journalText);
                              return Array.isArray(parsed) ? parsed : [];
                            } catch {
                              throw new Error('Journal lines JSON is invalid.');
                            }
                          })(),
                        })
                      }
                    );
                    const data = await res.json();
                    if (!res.ok) throw new Error(data.error || 'Create failed');
                    toast.success('Created transaction!');
                    setShowAddModal(false);
                    setNewTx({ date: '', description: '', amount: '', taxes: '', categoryId: '', sourceId: '', notes: '', postingType: '', taxTreatment: 'NO_TAX', journalText: '' });
                    fetchTransactions(pagination.currentPage, pagination.pageSize, filters, sortConfig);
                  } catch (err) {
                    toast.error(err.message);
                  }
                }}
              >
                Save
              </button>
            </div>
          </div>
        </dialog>
      )}

      {showBulkModal && (
        <dialog open className="modal">
          <div className="modal-box">
            <h3 className="font-bold text-lg">Confirm Bulk Post</h3>
            <p className="py-2">You are about to post <strong>{summary.count}</strong> transactions to the ledger. This cannot be undone.</p>
            <div className="modal-action">
              <button className="btn btn-error" onClick={() => setShowBulkModal(false)} disabled={posting}>
                Cancel
              </button>
              <button
                className="btn btn-primary"
                disabled={posting}
                onClick={async () => {
                  setPosting(true);
                  try {
                    const bankIds = transactions.map(tx => tx.id);
                    const res = await fetchWithAuth(
                      `${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL}/accounting/transactions/bulk-post`,
                      {
                        method: 'POST',
                        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
                        body: JSON.stringify({ bankIds })
                      }
                    );
                    if (!res.ok) throw new Error('Bulk post failed');
                    const data = await res.json();
                    toast.success(`Posted ${data.posted} entries.`);
                    setShowBulkModal(false);
                  } catch (err) {
                    toast.error(err.message);
                  } finally {
                    setPosting(false);
                  }
                }}
              >
                {posting ? 'Posting...' : 'Confirm'}
              </button>
            </div>
          </div>
        </dialog>
      )}

      {showProposalModal && proposal && (
        <dialog open className="modal">
          <div className="modal-box max-w-3xl">
            <h3 className="font-bold text-lg mb-4">Review Journal Entry</h3>
            <div className="form-control">
              <label className="label"><span className="label-text">Date</span></label>
              <input
                type="date"
                className="input input-bordered input-sm"
                value={new Date(proposal.date).toISOString().split('T')[0]}
                readOnly
              />
            </div>
            <div className="form-control mt-2">
              <label className="label"><span className="label-text">Memo</span></label>
              <input
                type="text"
                className="input input-bordered input-sm"
                value={proposal.memo}
                readOnly
              />
            </div>
            <div className="overflow-x-auto mt-4">
              <table className="table table-sm w-full">
                <thead>
                  <tr><th>Account ID</th><th>Debit</th><th>Credit</th></tr>
                </thead>
                <tbody>
                  {proposal.lines.map((ln, i) => (
                    <tr key={i}>
                      <td>{ln.accountId}</td>
                      <td>{ln.debit.toFixed(2)}</td>
                      <td>{ln.credit.toFixed(2)}</td>
                    </tr>
                  ))}
                </tbody>
              </table>
            </div>

            <div className="modal-action">
              <button
                className="btn"
                onClick={() => setShowProposalModal(false)}
              >Close</button>
            </div>
          </div>
          <form method="dialog" className="modal-backdrop">
            <button>close</button>
          </form>
        </dialog>
      )}

      {showModal && selectedTransaction && (
        <TransactionDetailsModal
          transaction={selectedTransaction}
          categories={categories}
          sources={sources}
          onClose={() => { setShowModal(false); setSelectedTransaction(null); }}
          onOpenTransaction={(nextTransaction) => {
            setSelectedTransaction(nextTransaction);
            setShowModal(true);
          }}
          updateTransaction={(updatedTx) => {
            setTransactions(prev => prev.map(tx => tx.id === updatedTx.id ? updatedTx : tx));
            setSelectedTransaction(updatedTx);
          }}
        />
      )}
    </div>
  );
};

export default TransactionsList;

```

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
FILE: client/services/accounting/components/TrialBalanceTab.jsx
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
```jsx
// Full path: /home/luanngo/boss-dev/client/services/accounting/components/TrialBalanceTab.jsx
import React, { useState, useEffect, useMemo } from 'react';
import { fetchWithAuth } from '@/shared/utils/fetchWithAuth';
import { toast } from 'react-toastify';

const numberFormatter = new Intl.NumberFormat('en-US', {
  minimumFractionDigits: 2,
  maximumFractionDigits: 2,
});

export default function TrialBalanceTab() {
  // Load saved dateRange or default to today
  const [dateRange, setDateRange] = useState(() => {
    const saved = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('trialDateRange') || 'null');
    if (saved && saved.from && saved.to) return saved;
    const today = new Date().toISOString().slice(0, 10);
    return { from: today, to: today };
  });

  const [trialRows, setTrialRows] = useState([]);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);
  const [sortBy, setSortBy] = useState('code');
  const [sortDir, setSortDir] = useState('asc');

  // Persist dateRange whenever it changes
  useEffect(() => {
    localStorage.setItem('trialDateRange', JSON.stringify(dateRange));
  }, [dateRange]);

  // Fetch trial balance any time the dateRange changes
  useEffect(() => {
    const fetchTrial = async () => {
      if (!dateRange.from || !dateRange.to) return;
      setLoading(true);
      try {
        const params = new URLSearchParams({
          from: dateRange.from,
          to:   dateRange.to,
        });
        const res = await fetchWithAuth(
          `${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL}/accounting/trial-balance?${params}`
        );
        if (!res.ok) throw new Error('Failed to fetch trial balance');
        let data = await res.json();
        // only show non-zero
        data = data.filter(r => r.debit !== 0 || r.credit !== 0);
        setTrialRows(data);
      } catch (err) {
        toast.error(err.message);
      } finally {
        setLoading(false);
      }
    };
    fetchTrial();
  }, [dateRange]);

  const sortedRows = useMemo(() => {
    const rows = [...trialRows];
    rows.sort((a, b) => {
      let av = a[sortBy];
      let bv = b[sortBy];
      if (sortBy === 'debit' || sortBy === 'credit') {
        av = Number(av);
        bv = Number(bv);
      } else {
        av = (av || '').toString();
        bv = (bv || '').toString();
      }
      if (av < bv) return sortDir === 'asc' ? -1 : 1;
      if (av > bv) return sortDir === 'asc' ? 1 : -1;
      return 0;
    });
    return rows;
  }, [trialRows, sortBy, sortDir]);

  // Group by category and compute totals
  const categoryTotals = useMemo(() => {
    const totals = {};
    sortedRows.forEach(r => {
      if (!totals[r.category]) {
        totals[r.category] = { debit: 0, credit: 0 };
      }
      totals[r.category].debit  += r.debit;
      totals[r.category].credit += r.credit;
    });
    return Object.entries(totals).map(([category, vals]) => ({ category, ...vals }));
  }, [sortedRows]);

  // compute overall totals & profit
  const totalDebit  = trialRows.reduce((sum, r) => sum + (r.debit  || 0), 0);
  const totalCredit = trialRows.reduce((sum, r) => sum + (r.credit || 0), 0);
  const profit      = totalCredit - totalDebit;

  // Download CSV
  const handleDownloadCsv = () => {
    const header = ['Account Code','Account Name','Category','Debit','Credit'];
    const lines = sortedRows.map(r => [
      r.code,
      r.name,
      r.category,
      r.debit.toFixed(2),
      r.credit.toFixed(2)
    ]);
    // Include profit row
    lines.push(['','Profit','','', profit.toFixed(2)]);

    const csvContent = [header, ...lines]
      .map(row => row.join(','))
      .join('\n');

    const blob = new Blob([csvContent], { type: 'text/csv;charset=utf-8;' });
    const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
    const link = document.createElement('a');
    link.href = url;
    link.setAttribute('download', `trial_balance_${dateRange.from}_to_${dateRange.to}.csv`);
    document.body.appendChild(link);
    link.click();
    document.body.removeChild(link);
  };

  return (
    <div>
      {/* Date range inputs */}
      <div className="flex space-x-4 mb-4">
        {['from', 'to'].map(f => (
          <div key={f}>
            <label className="label-text block lowercase">{f}</label>
            <input
              type="date"
              value={dateRange[f]}
              onChange={e =>
                setDateRange(d => ({ ...d, [f]: e.target.value }))
              }
              className="input input-bordered input-sm"
            />
          </div>
        ))}
      </div>

      {/* Download button */}
      <button
        onClick={handleDownloadCsv}
        className="btn btn-sm mb-4"
      >
        Download CSV
      </button>

      {/* Category totals */}
      {categoryTotals.length > 0 && (
        <div className="mb-4">
          <h3 className="font-bold">Category Totals</h3>
          <table className="table table-sm w-full">
            <thead>
              <tr>
                <th>Category</th>
                <th className="text-right">Debit</th>
                <th className="text-right">Credit</th>
              </tr>
            </thead>
            <tbody>
              {categoryTotals.map(ct => (
                <tr key={ct.category} className="font-medium">
                  <td>{ct.category}</td>
                  <td className="text-right">
                    {numberFormatter.format(ct.debit)}
                  </td>
                  <td className="text-right">
                    {numberFormatter.format(ct.credit)}
                  </td>
                </tr>
              ))}
            </tbody>
          </table>
        </div>
      )}

      {loading ? (
        <div className="flex justify-center p-6">
          <span className="loading loading-spinner loading-lg"></span>
        </div>
      ) : (
        <table className="table table-auto w-full">
          <thead>
            <tr>
              {[ 
                { key: 'code',     label: 'Account Code' },
                { key: 'name',     label: 'Account Name' },
                { key: 'category', label: 'Category' },
                { key: 'debit',    label: 'Debit',  align: 'text-right' },
                { key: 'credit',   label: 'Credit', align: 'text-right' },
              ].map(col => (
                <th
                  key={col.key}
                  className={`${col.align || ''} cursor-pointer`}
                  onClick={() => setSortBy(col.key) || setSortDir(prev => prev === 'asc' ? 'desc' : 'asc')}
                >
                  {col.label}{' '}
                  {sortBy === col.key && (sortDir === 'asc' ? '↑' : '↓')}
                </th>
              ))}
            </tr>
          </thead>
          <tbody>
            {sortedRows.length === 0 ? (
              <tr>
                <td colSpan={5} className="text-center text-xs">
                  No data for selected dates
                </td>
              </tr>
            ) : (
              sortedRows.map(row => (
                <tr key={row.code + row.name}>
                  <td>{row.code}</td>
                  <td>{row.name}</td>
                  <td>{row.category}</td>
                  <td className="text-right">
                    {numberFormatter.format(row.debit)}
                  </td>
                  <td className="text-right">
                    {numberFormatter.format(row.credit)}
                  </td>
                </tr>
              ))
            )}

            {/* Profit / Net Income row */}
            {sortedRows.length > 0 && (
              <tr className="font-bold">
                <td colSpan={3}>Profit (Net Income)</td>
                <td className="text-right">
                  {profit < 0 ? numberFormatter.format(-profit) : ''}
                </td>
                <td className="text-right">
                  {profit >= 0 ? numberFormatter.format(profit) : ''}
                </td>
              </tr>
            )}
          </tbody>
        </table>
      )}
    </div>
  );
}

```

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
FILE: client/services/accounting/components/UploadTransactions.jsx
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
```jsx
// Full path: /home/luanngo/boss-dev/client/services/accounting/components/UploadTransactions.jsx
// client/services/accounting/components/UploadTransactions.js

import React, { useEffect, useMemo, useState } from 'react';
import { toast } from 'react-toastify';
import { Database, FileSpreadsheet, FileText, RefreshCw, Search, Trash2, UploadCloud } from 'lucide-react';
import { fetchWithAuth } from '@/shared/utils/fetchWithAuth';

const SERVER = process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL;

const formatDateTime = (value) => {
  if (!value) return '-';
  const date = new Date(value);
  if (Number.isNaN(date.getTime())) return '-';
  return date.toLocaleString();
};

const UploadTransactions = ({ onUploadSuccess, onSelectImport }) => {
  const [files, setFiles] = useState([]);
  const [sourceId, setSourceId] = useState('');
  const [newSourceName, setNewSourceName] = useState('');
  const [sourceType, setSourceType] = useState('CREDIT_CARD');
  const [uploading, setUploading] = useState(false);
  const [uploadProgress, setUploadProgress] = useState(null);
  const [uploadResults, setUploadResults] = useState([]);
  const [dragActive, setDragActive] = useState(false);
  const [existingSources, setExistingSources] = useState([]);
  const [selectedSource, setSelectedSource] = useState('');
  const [specialInstructions, setSpecialInstructions] = useState('');
  const [importRecords, setImportRecords] = useState([]);
  const [sortConfig, setSortConfig] = useState({ key: 'createdAt', direction: 'desc' });

  useEffect(() => {
    fetchSources();
    fetchImportRecords();
  }, []);

  const fetchSources = async () => {
    try {
      const res = await fetchWithAuth(`${SERVER}/accounting/sources`);
      const data = await res.json().catch(() => ({}));
      if (!res.ok) throw new Error(data.error || 'Failed to fetch sources.');
      setExistingSources(Array.isArray(data.sources) ? data.sources : []);
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Fetch Sources Error:', error);
      toast.error(error.message || 'Failed to load existing sources.');
    }
  };

  const fetchImportRecords = async () => {
    try {
      const res = await fetchWithAuth(`${SERVER}/accounting/imports`);
      const data = await res.json().catch(() => ({}));
      if (!res.ok) throw new Error(data.error || 'Failed to fetch import records.');
      setImportRecords(Array.isArray(data.importRecords) ? data.importRecords : []);
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Fetch Import Records Error:', error);
      toast.error(error.message || 'Failed to load import records.');
    }
  };

  const acceptFiles = (selectedFiles) => {
    const incomingFiles = Array.from(selectedFiles || []);
    if (!incomingFiles.length) return;

    const csvFiles = incomingFiles.filter((selectedFile) => {
      const name = selectedFile.name || '';
      return selectedFile.type.includes('csv') || name.toLowerCase().endsWith('.csv')
        || selectedFile.type === 'application/pdf' || name.toLowerCase().endsWith('.pdf');
    });

    const rejectedCount = incomingFiles.length - csvFiles.length;
    if (rejectedCount > 0) {
      toast.error(`${rejectedCount} unsupported file${rejectedCount === 1 ? '' : 's'} skipped. Only CSV and PDF files are accepted.`);
    }

    if (!csvFiles.length) return;

    setFiles((current) => {
      const existingKeys = new Set(
        current.map((selectedFile) => `${selectedFile.name}-${selectedFile.size}-${selectedFile.lastModified}`)
      );
      const uniqueFiles = csvFiles.filter((selectedFile) => {
        const key = `${selectedFile.name}-${selectedFile.size}-${selectedFile.lastModified}`;
        return !existingKeys.has(key);
      });

      if (!uniqueFiles.length) {
        toast.info('Selected files are already in the upload queue.');
        return current;
      }

      return [...current, ...uniqueFiles];
    });
  };

  const handleFileChange = (event) => {
    acceptFiles(event.target.files);
    event.target.value = '';
  };

  const handleDrop = (event) => {
    event.preventDefault();
    setDragActive(false);
    acceptFiles(event.dataTransfer.files);
  };

  const removeFile = (index) => {
    setFiles((current) => current.filter((_, fileIndex) => fileIndex !== index));
  };

  const handleSourceSelection = (event) => {
    const value = event.target.value;
    setSelectedSource(value);

    if (value === 'add_new') {
      setSourceId('');
      return;
    }

    setSourceId(value);
    setNewSourceName('');
  };

  const handleDeleteSource = async () => {
    if (!selectedSource || selectedSource === 'add_new') {
      toast.error('No source selected to delete.');
      return;
    }

    if (!window.confirm('Delete this source?')) return;

    try {
      const source = existingSources.find((src) => src.id === selectedSource);
      if (!source) throw new Error('Selected source does not exist.');

      const res = await fetchWithAuth(`${SERVER}/accounting/sources/${source.id}`, {
        method: 'DELETE',
      });
      const data = await res.json().catch(() => ({}));
      if (!res.ok) throw new Error(data.error || 'Failed to delete source.');

      toast.success('Source deleted.');
      setSelectedSource('');
      setSourceId('');
      fetchSources();
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Delete Source Error:', error);
      toast.error(error.message || 'Failed to delete source.');
    }
  };

  const handleUpload = async (event) => {
    event.preventDefault();

    if (!files.length) {
      toast.error('Select one or more CSV or PDF files first.');
      return;
    }

    if (!sourceId && !newSourceName.trim()) {
      toast.error('Select or add a source.');
      return;
    }

    setUploading(true);
    setUploadResults([]);

    try {
      const results = [];

      for (let index = 0; index < files.length; index += 1) {
        const selectedFile = files[index];
        setUploadProgress({ current: index + 1, total: files.length, fileName: selectedFile.name });

        const formData = new FormData();
        formData.append('file', selectedFile);

        if (newSourceName.trim()) {
          formData.append('newSourceName', newSourceName.trim());
          formData.append('type', sourceType);
        } else {
          formData.append('sourceId', sourceId);
        }

        if (specialInstructions.trim()) {
          formData.append('specialInstructions', specialInstructions.trim());
        }

        const res = await fetchWithAuth(`${SERVER}/accounting/imports/upload`, {
          method: 'POST',
          body: formData,
        });

        const data = await res.json().catch(() => ({}));
        if (!res.ok) {
          results.push({
            fileName: selectedFile.name,
            status: 'failed',
            error: data.error || 'Failed to process transactions.',
          });
          setUploadResults([...results]);
          continue;
        }

        results.push({
          fileName: selectedFile.name,
          status: 'processed',
          importId: data.importId,
          validationReport: data.validationReport,
        });
        setUploadResults([...results]);
      }

      const successfulResults = results.filter((result) => result.status === 'processed');
      const failedResults = results.filter((result) => result.status === 'failed');
      const lastImportId = successfulResults.at(-1)?.importId;

      if (successfulResults.length) {
        toast.success(`Processed ${successfulResults.length} preview${successfulResults.length === 1 ? '' : 's'}.`);
        if (lastImportId) {
          onUploadSuccess?.(lastImportId);
          onSelectImport?.(lastImportId);
        }
      }

      if (failedResults.length) {
        toast.error(`${failedResults.length} file${failedResults.length === 1 ? '' : 's'} failed to process.`);
      }

      setFiles(failedResults.length ? files.filter((selectedFile) =>
        failedResults.some((result) => result.fileName === selectedFile.name)
      ) : []);
      if (!failedResults.length) setSpecialInstructions('');
      fetchImportRecords();
      fetchSources();
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Upload Transactions Error:', error);
      toast.error(error.message || 'Failed to process transactions.');
    } finally {
      setUploading(false);
      setUploadProgress(null);
    }
  };

  const handleDeleteBankTransactions = async (importId) => {
    if (!window.confirm('Delete all bank transactions created by this import?')) return;

    try {
      const res = await fetchWithAuth(`${SERVER}/accounting/imports/${importId}/banktransactions`, {
        method: 'DELETE',
      });
      const data = await res.json().catch(() => ({}));
      if (!res.ok) throw new Error(data.error || 'Failed to delete bank transactions.');

      toast.success(`Undo complete. Deleted ${data.count || 0} bank transactions.`);
      fetchImportRecords();
      window.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent('refetchTransactions'));
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Delete Bank Transactions Error:', error);
      toast.error(error.message || 'Failed to delete bank transactions.');
    }
  };

  const handleSort = (key) => {
    setSortConfig((current) => ({
      key,
      direction: current.key === key && current.direction === 'asc' ? 'desc' : 'asc',
    }));
  };

  const sortedRecords = useMemo(() => {
    return [...importRecords].sort((a, b) => {
      const left = a[sortConfig.key] || '';
      const right = b[sortConfig.key] || '';
      if (left < right) return sortConfig.direction === 'asc' ? -1 : 1;
      if (left > right) return sortConfig.direction === 'asc' ? 1 : -1;
      return 0;
    });
  }, [importRecords, sortConfig]);

  const showNewSource = selectedSource === 'add_new';

  return (
    <div className="space-y-6">
      <ul className="steps w-full">
        <li className="step step-primary">Upload</li>
        <li className={`step ${files.length ? 'step-primary' : ''}`}>Parse</li>
        <li className="step">Review</li>
        <li className="step">Import</li>
      </ul>

      <form onSubmit={handleUpload} className="space-y-4">
        <div className="grid gap-4 lg:grid-cols-[1fr_1fr]">
          <div className="space-y-3">
            <label className="form-control">
              <span className="label-text font-medium">Source</span>
              <div className="mt-1 flex gap-2">
                <select
                  value={selectedSource}
                  onChange={handleSourceSelection}
                  className="select select-bordered w-full"
                  required
                >
                  <option value="" disabled>Select source</option>
                  {existingSources.map((source) => (
                    <option key={source.id} value={source.id}>{source.name}</option>
                  ))}
                  <option value="add_new">Add new source</option>
                </select>
                {selectedSource && selectedSource !== 'add_new' && (
                  <button
                    type="button"
                    onClick={handleDeleteSource}
                    className="btn btn-outline btn-error"
                    title="Delete source"
                  >
                    <Trash2 size={16} />
                  </button>
                )}
              </div>
            </label>

            {showNewSource && (
              <div className="grid gap-3 rounded-box border border-base-300 bg-base-100 p-3 sm:grid-cols-[1fr_180px]">
                <label className="form-control">
                  <span className="label-text font-medium">New source</span>
                  <input
                    type="text"
                    value={newSourceName}
                    onChange={(event) => setNewSourceName(event.target.value)}
                    placeholder="Bank or card name"
                    className="input input-bordered mt-1"
                    required
                  />
                </label>
                <label className="form-control">
                  <span className="label-text font-medium">Type</span>
                  <select
                    value={sourceType}
                    onChange={(event) => setSourceType(event.target.value)}
                    className="select select-bordered mt-1"
                  >
                    <option value="CREDIT_CARD">Credit Card</option>
                    <option value="CHEQUING_ACCOUNT">Chequing</option>
                    <option value="SAVINGS_ACCOUNT">Savings</option>
                  </select>
                </label>
              </div>
            )}

            <label className="form-control">
              <span className="label-text font-medium">Special instructions</span>
              <textarea
                value={specialInstructions}
                onChange={(event) => setSpecialInstructions(event.target.value)}
                placeholder="Optional parsing or review instructions"
                className="textarea textarea-bordered mt-1 min-h-24"
              />
            </label>
          </div>

          <div
            className={`flex min-h-56 flex-col items-center justify-center rounded-box border border-dashed p-5 text-center ${
              dragActive ? 'border-primary bg-primary/5' : 'border-base-300 bg-base-100'
            }`}
            onDragEnter={(event) => {
              event.preventDefault();
              setDragActive(true);
            }}
            onDragOver={(event) => event.preventDefault()}
            onDragLeave={() => setDragActive(false)}
            onDrop={handleDrop}
          >
            <FileSpreadsheet size={34} className="mb-3 text-base-content/60" />
            <div className="font-medium">
              {files.length
                ? `${files.length} file${files.length === 1 ? '' : 's'} selected (${files.filter((f) => f.name.toLowerCase().endsWith('.csv')).length} CSV, ${files.filter((f) => f.name.toLowerCase().endsWith('.pdf')).length} PDF)`
                : 'CSV or PDF files'}
            </div>
            <div className="mt-1 text-xs text-base-content/60">
              {files.length
                ? `${Math.round(files.reduce((sum, selectedFile) => sum + selectedFile.size, 0) / 1024)} KB total`
                : 'Drop files or choose them below'}
            </div>
            <input
              type="file"
              multiple
              accept=".csv,text/csv,.pdf,application/pdf"
              onChange={handleFileChange}
              name="file"
              className="file-input file-input-bordered file-input-sm mt-4 w-full max-w-xs"
            />
            {files.length > 0 && (
              <div className="mt-4 w-full max-w-md space-y-2 text-left">
                {files.map((selectedFile, index) => (
                  <div
                    key={`${selectedFile.name}-${selectedFile.size}-${selectedFile.lastModified}`}
                    className="flex items-center justify-between gap-3 rounded-box border border-base-300 bg-base-200/60 px-3 py-2 text-sm"
                  >
                    <div className="min-w-0">
                      <div className="truncate font-medium">{selectedFile.name}</div>
                      <div className="text-xs text-base-content/60">{Math.round(selectedFile.size / 1024)} KB</div>
                    </div>
                    <button
                      type="button"
                      className="btn btn-ghost btn-xs"
                      onClick={() => removeFile(index)}
                      disabled={uploading}
                    >
                      Remove
                    </button>
                  </div>
                ))}
              </div>
            )}
          </div>
        </div>

        {uploadProgress && (
          <div className="rounded-box border border-info/30 bg-info/10 p-3 text-sm">
            Processing {uploadProgress.current} of {uploadProgress.total}: {uploadProgress.fileName}
          </div>
        )}

        {uploadResults.length > 0 && (
          <div className="rounded-box border border-base-300 bg-base-100 p-3">
            <div className="mb-2 text-sm font-medium">Upload results</div>
            <div className="space-y-2">
              {uploadResults.map((result) => (
                <div key={`${result.fileName}-${result.importId || result.error}`} className="flex flex-wrap items-center gap-2 text-sm">
                  <span
                    className={`badge badge-sm ${
                      result.status === 'processed' ? 'badge-success' : 'badge-error'
                    }`}
                  >
                    {result.status === 'processed' ? 'Processed' : 'Failed'}
                  </span>
                  <span className="font-medium">{result.fileName}</span>
                  {result.importId && <span className="font-mono text-xs text-base-content/50">{result.importId}</span>}
                  {result.error && <span className="text-error">{result.error}</span>}
                </div>
              ))}
            </div>
          </div>
        )}

        <div className="flex flex-wrap items-center gap-2">
          <button type="submit" className={`btn btn-primary ${uploading ? 'btn-disabled' : ''}`}>
            {uploading ? <span className="loading loading-spinner loading-sm" /> : <UploadCloud size={16} />}
            {files.length > 1 ? 'Process Previews' : 'Process Preview'}
          </button>
          <button type="button" className="btn btn-outline" onClick={fetchImportRecords}>
            <RefreshCw size={16} />
            Refresh Records
          </button>
        </div>
      </form>

      <div className="rounded-box border border-base-300">
        <div className="flex items-center justify-between gap-3 border-b border-base-300 px-4 py-3">
          <div className="font-semibold">Import Records</div>
          <Database size={16} className="text-base-content/60" />
        </div>
        <div className="max-h-[50vh] overflow-auto">
          <table className="table table-sm">
            <thead>
              <tr>
                <th className="cursor-pointer" onClick={() => handleSort('sourceId')}>Source</th>
                <th className="cursor-pointer" onClick={() => handleSort('status')}>Status</th>
                <th className="cursor-pointer" onClick={() => handleSort('createdAt')}>Created</th>
                <th className="text-right">Action</th>
              </tr>
            </thead>
            <tbody>
              {sortedRecords.length === 0 ? (
                <tr>
                  <td colSpan={4} className="py-8 text-center text-sm text-base-content/60">
                    No import records found.
                  </td>
                </tr>
              ) : (
                sortedRecords.map((record) => (
                  <tr key={record.id}>
                    <td>
                      <div className="font-medium">{record.source?.name || record.sourceId || '-'}</div>
                      <div className="font-mono text-xs text-base-content/50">{record.id}</div>
                    </td>
                    <td>
                      <span className={`badge badge-sm ${
                        record.status === 'IMPORTED'
                          ? 'badge-success'
                          : record.status === 'FAILED'
                          ? 'badge-error'
                          : 'badge-warning'
                      }`}>
                        {record.status}
                      </span>
                    </td>
                    <td className="whitespace-nowrap">{formatDateTime(record.createdAt)}</td>
                    <td className="text-right">
                      <div className="flex justify-end gap-2">
                        <button
                          type="button"
                          onClick={() => {
                            onSelectImport?.(record.id);
                            onUploadSuccess?.(record.id);
                          }}
                          className="btn btn-xs btn-outline"
                        >
                          <Search size={13} />
                          Review
                        </button>
                        {record.status === 'IMPORTED' && (
                          <button
                            type="button"
                            onClick={() => handleDeleteBankTransactions(record.id)}
                            className="btn btn-xs btn-error"
                          >
                            Undo
                          </button>
                        )}
                      </div>
                    </td>
                  </tr>
                ))
              )}
            </tbody>
          </table>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
};

export default UploadTransactions;

```
