FILE: client/services/accounting/components/VerifiedTransactions.jsx
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
```jsx
// Full path: /home/luanngo/boss-dev/client/services/accounting/components/VerifiedTransactions.jsx
// client/services/accounting/components/VerifiedTransactions.js

import React, { useCallback, useEffect, useMemo, useState } from 'react';
import { toast } from 'react-toastify';
import {
  AlertCircle,
  CheckCircle2,
  Edit3,
  FileSearch,
  ListChecks,
  ReceiptText,
  RefreshCw,
  Save,
  Sparkles,
} from 'lucide-react';
import { fetchWithAuth } from '@/shared/utils/fetchWithAuth';
import AccountAutocomplete from './AccountAutocomplete';

const SERVER = process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL;

const formatCurrency = (value) => {
  if (value === null || value === undefined || value === '') return '-';
  const numericValue = Number(value);
  if (!Number.isFinite(numericValue)) return '-';
  return new Intl.NumberFormat('en-CA', {
    style: 'currency',
    currency: 'CAD',
    minimumFractionDigits: 2,
    maximumFractionDigits: 2,
  }).format(numericValue);
};

const formatConfidence = (value) => {
  if (value === null || value === undefined || Number.isNaN(Number(value))) return '-';
  return `${Math.round(Number(value) * 100)}%`;
};

const toDateInputValue = (value) => {
  if (!value) return '';
  const date = new Date(value);
  if (Number.isNaN(date.getTime())) return '';
  return date.toISOString().slice(0, 10);
};

const getHints = (transaction) => {
  const notes = String(transaction?.notes || '');
  const match = notes.match(/\[\[accountingReceiptHints\]\]([\s\S]*?)\[\[\/accountingReceiptHints\]\]/i);
  if (!match?.[1]) return null;

  try {
    return JSON.parse(match[1]);
  } catch {
    return null;
  }
};

const HintBadge = ({ children, tone = 'neutral' }) => {
  const toneClass =
    tone === 'success'
      ? 'badge-success'
      : tone === 'warning'
      ? 'badge-warning'
      : tone === 'error'
      ? 'badge-error'
      : tone === 'info'
      ? 'badge-info'
      : 'badge-outline';

  return <span className={`badge ${toneClass} badge-sm gap-1`}>{children}</span>;
};

const rowStatusMeta = {
  ready: { tone: 'success', label: 'Ready', Icon: CheckCircle2 },
  warning: { tone: 'warning', label: 'Review', Icon: AlertCircle },
  error: { tone: 'error', label: 'Blocked', Icon: AlertCircle },
};

const validationMessages = (validationRow) => [
  ...(validationRow?.issues || []),
  ...(validationRow?.warnings || []),
];

const VerifiedTransactions = ({ importId, onVerificationComplete }) => {
  const [transactions, setTransactions] = useState([]);
  const [draftTransactions, setDraftTransactions] = useState([]);
  const [validationReport, setValidationReport] = useState(null);
  const [categories, setCategories] = useState([]);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
  const [validating, setValidating] = useState(false);
  const [saving, setSaving] = useState(false);
  const [verifying, setVerifying] = useState(false);
  const [revising, setRevising] = useState(false);
  const [editMode, setEditMode] = useState(false);
  const [showRevise, setShowRevise] = useState(false);
  const [specialInstructions, setSpecialInstructions] = useState('');
  const [runRulesOnImport, setRunRulesOnImport] = useState(true);
  const [allowExistingDuplicates, setAllowExistingDuplicates] = useState(false);
  const [lastImportReport, setLastImportReport] = useState(null);
  const [invalidCategories, setInvalidCategories] = useState([]);
  const [invalidReceipts, setInvalidReceipts] = useState([]);

  const validationByIndex = useMemo(() => {
    const map = new Map();
    (validationReport?.rows || []).forEach((row) => map.set(row.index, row));
    return map;
  }, [validationReport]);

  const stats = useMemo(() => {
    if (validationReport?.summary) {
      const approvedRows = transactions.filter((transaction) => transaction.approvedForImport !== false).length;
      return {
        ...validationReport.summary,
        approvedRows,
        skippedRows: Math.max(0, (validationReport.summary.totalRows || 0) - approvedRows),
      };
    }

    const rows = transactions.map((transaction) => ({
      transaction,
      hints: getHints(transaction),
    }));

    return {
      totalRows: rows.length,
      approvedRows: rows.filter((row) => row.transaction.approvedForImport !== false).length,
      skippedRows: rows.filter((row) => row.transaction.approvedForImport === false).length,
      readyRows: rows.filter((row) => !row.transaction.aiNeedsReview && !row.hints?.needsReview).length,
      warningRows: rows.filter((row) => row.transaction.aiNeedsReview || row.hints?.needsReview).length,
      errorRows: 0,
      totalIncome: rows.reduce((sum, row) => {
        const amount = Number(row.transaction.amount);
        return Number.isFinite(amount) && amount > 0 ? sum + amount : sum;
      }, 0),
      totalExpenses: rows.reduce((sum, row) => {
        const amount = Number(row.transaction.amount);
        return Number.isFinite(amount) && amount < 0 ? sum + Math.abs(amount) : sum;
      }, 0),
      totalTax: rows.reduce((sum, row) => {
        const taxes = Number(row.transaction.taxes);
        return Number.isFinite(taxes) ? sum + Math.abs(taxes) : sum;
      }, 0),
    };
  }, [transactions, validationReport]);

  const fetchCategories = useCallback(async () => {
    try {
      const response = await fetchWithAuth(`${SERVER}/accounting/categories?view=all`);
      const data = await response.json().catch(() => []);
      if (!response.ok) throw new Error(data.error || 'Failed to fetch categories.');
      setCategories(Array.isArray(data) ? data : Array.isArray(data.categories) ? data.categories : []);
    } catch (error) {
      toast.error(error.message || 'Failed to load categories.');
    }
  }, []);

  const validateImport = useCallback(async () => {
    if (!importId) return null;
    setValidating(true);
    try {
      const response = await fetchWithAuth(`${SERVER}/accounting/imports/${importId}/validate`, {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
      });
      const data = await response.json().catch(() => ({}));
      if (!response.ok) throw new Error(data.error || 'Failed to validate import.');
      setValidationReport(data.validationReport || null);
      return data.validationReport || null;
    } catch (error) {
      toast.error(error.message || 'Failed to validate import.');
      return null;
    } finally {
      setValidating(false);
    }
  }, [importId]);

  const fetchTransactions = useCallback(async () => {
    if (!importId) return;
    setLoading(true);

    try {
      const response = await fetchWithAuth(`${SERVER}/accounting/imports/${importId}`, {
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
      });

      const data = await response.json().catch(() => ({}));
      if (!response.ok) throw new Error(data.error || 'Failed to fetch transactions.');

      const rows = Array.isArray(data.transactions) ? data.transactions : [];
      setTransactions(rows);
      setDraftTransactions(rows);
      setLastImportReport(null);
      await validateImport();
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Fetch Transactions Error:', error);
      toast.error(error.message || 'Failed to load transactions for verification.');
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  }, [importId, validateImport]);

  useEffect(() => {
    fetchCategories();
  }, [fetchCategories]);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!importId) return;
    fetchTransactions();
  }, [fetchTransactions, importId]);

  const updateDraft = (index, field, value) => {
    setDraftTransactions((current) =>
      current.map((transaction, rowIndex) =>
        rowIndex === index ? { ...transaction, [field]: value } : transaction
      )
    );
  };

  const setRowApproved = (index, approvedForImport) => {
    const update = (rows) =>
      rows.map((transaction, rowIndex) =>
        rowIndex === index ? { ...transaction, approvedForImport } : transaction
      );

    setTransactions(update);
    setDraftTransactions(update);
  };

  const setAllRowsApproved = (approvedForImport) => {
    const update = (rows) => rows.map((transaction) => ({ ...transaction, approvedForImport }));
    setTransactions(update);
    setDraftTransactions(update);
  };

  const saveDraft = async () => {
    setSaving(true);
    try {
      const response = await fetchWithAuth(`${SERVER}/accounting/imports/${importId}/transactions`, {
        method: 'PUT',
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
        body: JSON.stringify({ transactions: draftTransactions }),
      });
      const data = await response.json().catch(() => ({}));
      if (!response.ok) throw new Error(data.error || 'Failed to save import preview.');

      const rows = Array.isArray(data.transactions) ? data.transactions : [];
      setTransactions(rows);
      setDraftTransactions(rows);
      setValidationReport(data.validationReport || null);
      setEditMode(false);
      toast.success('Import preview saved.');
    } catch (error) {
      toast.error(error.message || 'Failed to save import preview.');
    } finally {
      setSaving(false);
    }
  };

  const handleImport = async () => {
    if (editMode) {
      toast.error('Save or close row edits before importing.');
      return;
    }

    const latestValidation = await validateImport();
    if (latestValidation?.summary?.errorRows > 0) {
      toast.error('Fix blocked rows before importing.');
      return;
    }

    const approvedRowIndexes = transactions
      .map((transaction, index) => (transaction.approvedForImport === false ? null : index))
      .filter((index) => index !== null);

    if (!approvedRowIndexes.length) {
      toast.error('Approve at least one row before importing.');
      return;
    }

    const warningRows = latestValidation?.summary?.warningRows || 0;
    const duplicateRows = latestValidation?.summary?.duplicateRows || 0;
    const confirmMessage = [
      `Import ${approvedRowIndexes.length} approved row(s)?`,
      warningRows ? `${warningRows} row(s) have review warnings.` : null,
      duplicateRows && !allowExistingDuplicates
        ? `${duplicateRows} existing duplicate row(s) will be skipped.`
        : null,
    ].filter(Boolean).join('\n');
    if (!window.confirm(confirmMessage)) return;

    setVerifying(true);

    try {
      const response = await fetchWithAuth(`${SERVER}/accounting/imports/${importId}/import`, {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
        body: JSON.stringify({
          runRulesOnImport,
          allowExistingDuplicates,
          approvedRowIndexes,
        }),
      });

      const data = await response.json().catch(() => ({}));
      if (!response.ok) {
        if (data.validationReport) setValidationReport(data.validationReport);
        throw new Error(data.error || 'Failed to import transactions.');
      }

      setInvalidCategories(Array.isArray(data.invalidCategoryIds) ? data.invalidCategoryIds : []);
      setInvalidReceipts(Array.isArray(data.invalidReceiptIds) ? data.invalidReceiptIds : []);
      setLastImportReport(data.importReport || null);
      toast.success(`Imported ${data.count || 0} transaction${data.count === 1 ? '' : 's'}.`);
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Import Transactions Error:', error);
      toast.error(error.message || 'Failed to import transactions.');
    } finally {
      setVerifying(false);
    }
  };

  const handleRevise = async () => {
    if (!specialInstructions.trim()) {
      toast.error('Add instructions before revising.');
      return;
    }

    setRevising(true);
    try {
      const response = await fetchWithAuth(`${SERVER}/accounting/imports/${importId}/revise`, {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
        body: JSON.stringify({ specialInstructions }),
      });

      const data = await response.json().catch(() => ({}));
      if (!response.ok) throw new Error(data.error || 'Failed to revise import.');

      const rows = Array.isArray(data.transactions) ? data.transactions : [];
      setTransactions(rows);
      setDraftTransactions(rows);
      setValidationReport(data.validationReport || null);
      toast.success('Import preview revised.');
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Revise Import Error:', error);
      toast.error(error.message || 'Failed to revise import.');
    } finally {
      setRevising(false);
    }
  };

  if (!importId) {
    return (
      <div className="rounded-box border border-dashed border-base-300 bg-base-200/50 p-6 text-sm text-base-content/70">
        Upload a file to open the verification step.
      </div>
    );
  }

  const rowsForDisplay = editMode ? draftTransactions : transactions;
  const blocked = (stats.errorRows || 0) > 0;
  const approvedCount = rowsForDisplay.filter((transaction) => transaction.approvedForImport !== false).length;

  return (
    <div className="space-y-5">
      <ul className="steps w-full">
        <li className="step step-primary">Upload</li>
        <li className="step step-primary">Review</li>
        <li className={`step ${validationReport ? 'step-primary' : ''}`}>Validate</li>
        <li className={`step ${blocked ? 'step-error' : ''}`}>Import</li>
      </ul>

      {lastImportReport && (
        <div className="rounded-box border border-success/40 bg-success/10 p-4">
          <div className="flex flex-wrap items-start justify-between gap-3">
            <div>
              <div className="font-semibold">Import complete</div>
              <div className="text-sm text-base-content/70">
                Inserted {lastImportReport.insertedCount || 0} transaction(s), skipped {lastImportReport.skippedCount || 0}.
                {lastImportReport.rulesAppliedCount
                  ? ` Applied ${lastImportReport.rulesAppliedCount} rule(s).`
                  : ''}
              </div>
            </div>
            <button type="button" className="btn btn-sm btn-primary" onClick={() => onVerificationComplete?.()}>
              Done
            </button>
          </div>
          {lastImportReport.skippedRows?.length > 0 && (
            <div className="mt-3 overflow-x-auto">
              <table className="table table-xs">
                <thead>
                  <tr>
                    <th>Row</th>
                    <th>Reason</th>
                    <th>Description</th>
                    <th className="text-right">Amount</th>
                  </tr>
                </thead>
                <tbody>
                  {lastImportReport.skippedRows.slice(0, 8).map((row, index) => (
                    <tr key={`${row.reason}-${row.index}-${index}`}>
                      <td>{row.index != null ? row.index + 1 : '-'}</td>
                      <td>{String(row.reason || '').replace(/_/g, ' ')}</td>
                      <td>{row.transaction?.description || '-'}</td>
                      <td className="text-right">{formatCurrency(row.transaction?.amount)}</td>
                    </tr>
                  ))}
                </tbody>
              </table>
            </div>
          )}
        </div>
      )}

      <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-3 xl:grid-cols-8">
        <div className="stat rounded-box border border-base-300 bg-base-100">
          <div className="stat-title">Rows</div>
          <div className="stat-value text-3xl">{stats.totalRows || 0}</div>
        </div>
        <div className="stat rounded-box border border-base-300 bg-base-100">
          <div className="stat-title">Approved</div>
          <div className="stat-value text-3xl text-primary">{approvedCount}</div>
        </div>
        <div className="stat rounded-box border border-base-300 bg-base-100">
          <div className="stat-title">Ready</div>
          <div className="stat-value text-3xl text-success">{stats.readyRows || 0}</div>
        </div>
        <div className="stat rounded-box border border-base-300 bg-base-100">
          <div className="stat-title">Review</div>
          <div className="stat-value text-3xl text-warning">{stats.warningRows || 0}</div>
        </div>
        <div className="stat rounded-box border border-base-300 bg-base-100">
          <div className="stat-title">Blocked</div>
          <div className="stat-value text-3xl text-error">{stats.errorRows || 0}</div>
        </div>
        <div className="stat rounded-box border border-base-300 bg-base-100">
          <div className="stat-title">Duplicates</div>
          <div className="stat-value text-3xl text-warning">{stats.duplicateRows || 0}</div>
        </div>
        <div className="stat rounded-box border border-base-300 bg-base-100">
          <div className="stat-title">Income</div>
          <div className="stat-value text-2xl">{formatCurrency(stats.totalIncome)}</div>
        </div>
        <div className="stat rounded-box border border-base-300 bg-base-100">
          <div className="stat-title">Expenses</div>
          <div className="stat-value text-2xl">{formatCurrency(stats.totalExpenses)}</div>
        </div>
        <div className="stat rounded-box border border-base-300 bg-base-100">
          <div className="stat-title">Tax</div>
          <div className="stat-value text-2xl">{formatCurrency(stats.totalTax)}</div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div className="flex flex-wrap items-center gap-2">
        <button type="button" className="btn btn-outline" onClick={() => setEditMode((value) => !value)}>
          <Edit3 size={16} />
          {editMode ? 'Close Edit' : 'Edit Rows'}
        </button>

        {editMode && (
          <button type="button" className={`btn btn-primary ${saving ? 'btn-disabled' : ''}`} onClick={saveDraft}>
            {saving ? <span className="loading loading-spinner loading-sm" /> : <Save size={16} />}
            Save Preview
          </button>
        )}

        <button type="button" className={`btn btn-outline ${validating ? 'btn-disabled' : ''}`} onClick={validateImport}>
          <FileSearch size={16} />
          Validate
        </button>

        <button type="button" className="btn btn-ghost" onClick={fetchTransactions}>
          <RefreshCw size={16} className={loading ? 'animate-spin' : ''} />
          Refresh
        </button>

        <button type="button" className="btn btn-outline" onClick={() => setAllRowsApproved(true)}>
          <ListChecks size={16} />
          Approve All
        </button>

        <button type="button" className="btn btn-outline" onClick={() => setShowRevise((value) => !value)}>
          <Sparkles size={16} />
          Revise Preview
        </button>

        <label className="ml-auto flex items-center gap-2 text-sm">
          <input
            type="checkbox"
            className="checkbox checkbox-sm"
            checked={runRulesOnImport}
            onChange={(event) => setRunRulesOnImport(event.target.checked)}
          />
          Run rules
        </label>

        <label className="flex items-center gap-2 text-sm">
          <input
            type="checkbox"
            className="checkbox checkbox-sm"
            checked={allowExistingDuplicates}
            onChange={(event) => setAllowExistingDuplicates(event.target.checked)}
          />
          Allow duplicates
        </label>

        <button
          type="button"
          className={`btn btn-primary ${verifying || blocked ? 'btn-disabled' : ''}`}
          onClick={handleImport}
          title={blocked ? 'Fix blocked rows before importing' : 'Import transactions'}
        >
          {verifying ? <span className="loading loading-spinner loading-sm" /> : <CheckCircle2 size={16} />}
          Import
        </button>
      </div>

      {showRevise && (
        <div className="rounded-box border border-base-300 bg-base-100 p-4">
          <label className="label px-0">
            <span className="label-text font-medium">Special instructions</span>
          </label>
          <textarea
            className="textarea textarea-bordered min-h-28 w-full"
            value={specialInstructions}
            onChange={(event) => setSpecialInstructions(event.target.value)}
            placeholder="Example: prefer receipt tax, mark expenses as receipt required"
          />
          <div className="mt-3">
            <button
              type="button"
              className={`btn btn-secondary ${revising ? 'btn-disabled' : ''}`}
              onClick={handleRevise}
            >
              {revising ? <span className="loading loading-spinner loading-sm" /> : <Sparkles size={16} />}
              Apply Revision
            </button>
          </div>
        </div>
      )}

      {(invalidCategories.length > 0 || invalidReceipts.length > 0) && (
        <div className="rounded-box border border-warning/40 bg-warning/10 p-4 text-sm">
          {invalidCategories.length > 0 && (
            <div>Invalid categories cleared on import: {invalidCategories.join(', ')}</div>
          )}
          {invalidReceipts.length > 0 && (
            <div>Invalid receipt links cleared on import: {invalidReceipts.join(', ')}</div>
          )}
        </div>
      )}

      <div className="overflow-x-auto rounded-box border border-base-300">
        <table className="table table-zebra table-sm">
          <thead>
            <tr>
              <th className="w-20">Status</th>
              <th className="w-24">Import</th>
              <th>Date</th>
              <th>Description</th>
              <th className="text-right">Amount</th>
              <th className="text-right">Tax</th>
              <th>Type</th>
              <th>Category</th>
              <th>Receipt / Signals</th>
            </tr>
          </thead>
          <tbody>
            {loading ? (
              <tr>
                <td colSpan={9} className="py-10 text-center">
                  <span className="loading loading-spinner loading-md" />
                </td>
              </tr>
            ) : !rowsForDisplay.length ? (
              <tr>
                <td colSpan={9} className="py-10 text-center text-base-content/60">
                  No transactions found for this import.
                </td>
              </tr>
            ) : (
              rowsForDisplay.map((transaction, index) => {
                const hints = getHints(transaction);
                const validationRow = validationByIndex.get(index);
                const status = validationRow?.status || (transaction.aiNeedsReview || hints?.needsReview ? 'warning' : 'ready');
                const meta = rowStatusMeta[status] || rowStatusMeta.ready;
                const StatusIcon = meta.Icon;
                const aiCategory = transaction.aiSuggestedCategoryDescription || hints?.suggestedExpenseAccount?.description || '-';
                const messages = validationMessages(validationRow);

                return (
                  <tr key={`${transaction.description}-${transaction.date}-${index}`}>
                    <td>
                      <HintBadge tone={meta.tone}>
                        <StatusIcon size={12} />
                        {meta.label}
                      </HintBadge>
                    </td>

                    <td>
                      <label className="flex items-center gap-2 text-xs">
                        <input
                          type="checkbox"
                          className="checkbox checkbox-xs"
                          checked={transaction.approvedForImport !== false}
                          onChange={(event) => setRowApproved(index, event.target.checked)}
                        />
                        {transaction.approvedForImport === false ? 'Skip' : 'Approve'}
                      </label>
                    </td>

                    <td className="whitespace-nowrap">
                      {editMode ? (
                        <input
                          type="date"
                          className="input input-bordered input-xs w-36"
                          value={toDateInputValue(transaction.date)}
                          onChange={(event) => updateDraft(index, 'date', event.target.value)}
                        />
                      ) : (
                        toDateInputValue(transaction.date) || '-'
                      )}
                    </td>

                    <td className="min-w-[260px]">
                      {editMode ? (
                        <input
                          type="text"
                          className="input input-bordered input-xs w-full"
                          value={transaction.description || ''}
                          onChange={(event) => updateDraft(index, 'description', event.target.value)}
                        />
                      ) : (
                        <>
                          <div className="font-medium">{transaction.description || '-'}</div>
                          {hints?.vendorName && (
                            <div className="mt-1 text-xs text-base-content/70">Vendor: {hints.vendorName}</div>
                          )}
                        </>
                      )}
                    </td>

                    <td className={`text-right font-medium ${Number(transaction.amount) >= 0 ? 'text-success' : 'text-error'}`}>
                      {editMode ? (
                        <input
                          type="number"
                          step="0.01"
                          className="input input-bordered input-xs w-28 text-right"
                          value={transaction.amount ?? ''}
                          onChange={(event) => updateDraft(index, 'amount', event.target.value)}
                        />
                      ) : (
                        formatCurrency(transaction.amount)
                      )}
                    </td>

                    <td className="text-right">
                      {editMode ? (
                        <input
                          type="number"
                          step="0.01"
                          className="input input-bordered input-xs w-24 text-right"
                          value={transaction.taxes ?? ''}
                          onChange={(event) => updateDraft(index, 'taxes', event.target.value)}
                        />
                      ) : (
                        <>
                          <div>{formatCurrency(transaction.taxes)}</div>
                          {hints?.taxConfidence != null && (
                            <div className="text-xs text-base-content/60">
                              {formatConfidence(hints.taxConfidence)} via {hints.taxSource || 'receipt'}
                            </div>
                          )}
                        </>
                      )}
                    </td>

                    <td>
                      {editMode ? (
                        <select
                          className="select select-bordered select-xs w-28"
                          value={transaction.type || 'expense'}
                          onChange={(event) => updateDraft(index, 'type', event.target.value)}
                        >
                          <option value="expense">Expense</option>
                          <option value="income">Income</option>
                        </select>
                      ) : (
                        <span className="badge badge-outline">{transaction.type || '-'}</span>
                      )}
                    </td>

                    <td className="min-w-[240px]">
                      {editMode ? (
                        <AccountAutocomplete
                          value={transaction.categoryId || ''}
                          onChange={(val) => updateDraft(index, 'categoryId', val)}
                          accounts={categories}
                          placeholder="No category"
                        />
                      ) : (
                        <>
                          <div className="font-medium">{aiCategory}</div>
                          {(transaction.aiSuggestedCategoryCode || hints?.suggestedExpenseAccount?.code) && (
                            <div className="text-xs text-base-content/70">
                              Code: {transaction.aiSuggestedCategoryCode || hints?.suggestedExpenseAccount?.code}
                            </div>
                          )}
                          {hints?.categoryReasoning && (
                            <div className="mt-1 text-xs text-base-content/70">{hints.categoryReasoning}</div>
                          )}
                        </>
                      )}
                    </td>

                    <td className="min-w-[260px]">
                      <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-1">
                        {transaction.receiptId ? (
                          <HintBadge tone="success">
                            <ReceiptText size={12} />
                            Linked receipt
                          </HintBadge>
                        ) : null}
                        {hints?.extractedTax ? <HintBadge>Tax extracted</HintBadge> : null}
                        {hints?.supportingExamples?.length ? (
                          <HintBadge>History {hints.supportingExamples.length}</HintBadge>
                        ) : null}
                      </div>

                      {messages.length > 0 && (
                        <div className="mt-2 space-y-1 text-xs text-base-content/70">
                          {messages.slice(0, 4).map((message, messageIndex) => (
                            <div key={`${message.code}-${messageIndex}`}>{message.message}</div>
                          ))}
                        </div>
                      )}
                    </td>
                  </tr>
                );
              })
            )}
          </tbody>
        </table>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
};

export default VerifiedTransactions;

```

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
FILE: client/services/accounting/components/WeeklyShiftSchedule.jsx
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
```jsx
// Full path: /home/luanngo/boss-dev/client/services/accounting/components/WeeklyShiftSchedule.jsx
import React, { useEffect, useState, useCallback } from 'react';
import { fetchWithAuth } from '@/shared/utils/fetchWithAuth';
import {
  format, addDays, parseISO, differenceInMinutes, differenceInCalendarDays
} from 'date-fns';
import { toast } from 'react-toastify';
import moment from 'moment-timezone';
import ShiftTimeEditModal from '@/services/scheduler/components/ShiftTimeEditModal';
import { Clock, Copy, Download, Upload } from 'lucide-react';
import StatusBadge from '@/shared/components/ui/StatusBadge';

const WeeklyShiftSchedule = ({ selectedWeekStart, periodEnd, onImportHours, userId, onShiftsLoaded }) => {
  const effectivePeriodEnd = periodEnd
    ? new Date(periodEnd)
    : addDays(selectedWeekStart, 6);
  const totalDays =
    differenceInCalendarDays(effectivePeriodEnd, selectedWeekStart) + 1;
  const periodDates = Array.from(
    { length: totalDays },
    (_, i) => addDays(selectedWeekStart, i)
  );

  const [shifts, setShifts] = useState([]);
  const [employees, setEmployees] = useState([]);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);

  const [editingModal, setEditingModal] = useState(null);
  const [modalDateTime, setModalDateTime] = useState('');

  const startDateISO = moment(selectedWeekStart).startOf('day').toISOString();
  const endDateISO = moment(effectivePeriodEnd).endOf('day').toISOString();

  const getEmployeeId = s => s.employeeId ?? s.employee?.id ?? null;

  const fetchShiftData = useCallback(async () => {
    setLoading(true);
    try {
      const res = await fetchWithAuth(
        `${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL}/schedule/week?startDate=${moment(selectedWeekStart).format('YYYY-MM-DD')}&endDate=${moment(effectivePeriodEnd).format('YYYY-MM-DD')}`
      );
      if (!res.ok) {
        const errorPayload = await res.json().catch(() => null);
        throw new Error(errorPayload?.error || 'Failed to fetch shift data.');
      }
      const data = await res.json();

      const allShiftsRaw = Array.isArray(data)
        ? data
        : Array.isArray(data?.shifts)
          ? data.shifts
          : Array.isArray(data?.shifts?.shifts)
            ? data.shifts.shifts
            : [];

      const filtered = userId
        ? allShiftsRaw.filter(s => String(getEmployeeId(s)) === String(userId))
        : allShiftsRaw;

      setShifts(filtered);

      const ids = Array.from(new Set(filtered.map(s => getEmployeeId(s)).filter(Boolean)));
      const emps = ids.map(id => {
        const s = filtered.find(x => getEmployeeId(x) === id);
        const e = s?.employee || {};
        const name =
          e.firstName && e.lastName
            ? `${e.firstName} ${e.lastName}`
            : e.firstName || e.lastName || e.username || 'Unnamed';
        return { id, name };
      });
      setEmployees(emps);

      if (typeof onShiftsLoaded === 'function') {
        onShiftsLoaded(filtered);
      }
    } catch (err) {
      console.error(err);
      toast.error('Failed to load shift data.');
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  }, [startDateISO, endDateISO, userId, onShiftsLoaded]);

  useEffect(() => {
    fetchShiftData();
  }, [fetchShiftData]);

  const formatTime = ds => {
    if (!ds) return '-';
    try {
      const d = typeof ds === 'string' ? parseISO(ds) : ds;
      return format(d, 'h:mm a');
    } catch {
      return '-';
    }
  };

  const getDuration = (t0, t1) => {
    if (!t0 || !t1) return 0;
    const a = typeof t0 === 'string' ? parseISO(t0) : t0;
    let b = typeof t1 === 'string' ? parseISO(t1) : t1;
    if (b < a) b = addDays(b, 1);
    const mins = differenceInMinutes(b, a);
    return mins > 0 ? mins / 60 : 0;
  };

  const getShiftsForEmployeeDate = (eid, date) => {
    const ds = format(date, 'yyyy-MM-dd');
    return shifts.filter(s => {
      const empId = getEmployeeId(s);
      if (empId !== eid) return false;
      if (!s.startTime) return false;
      const localStart = moment.utc(s.startTime).local();
      return localStart.format('YYYY-MM-DD') === ds;
    });
  };

  const openEditModal = (shift, field) => {
    let initialDateTime;
    if (shift[field]) {
      initialDateTime = moment.utc(shift[field]).local();
    } else {
      const now = moment();
      const shiftDate = moment.utc(shift.startTime).local().startOf('day');
      if (field === 'clockOut' && now.isAfter(shiftDate, 'day')) {
        initialDateTime = now;
      } else {
        initialDateTime = shiftDate.clone().set({ hour: now.hour(), minute: now.minute() });
      }
    }
    setModalDateTime(initialDateTime.format('YYYY-MM-DDTHH:mm'));
    setEditingModal({ shift, field });
  };

  const handleModalSave = async () => {
    if (!editingModal) return;
    const { shift, field } = editingModal;
    const updatedTime = new Date(modalDateTime).toISOString();
    try {
      const res = await fetchWithAuth(
        `${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL}/schedule/${shift.id}`,
        {
          method: 'PUT',
          headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
          body: JSON.stringify({ [field]: updatedTime })
        }
      );
      if (!res.ok) throw new Error();
      const { shift: updated } = await res.json();
      setShifts(prev =>
        prev.map(s => s.id === shift.id ? { ...s, [field]: updated[field] } : s)
      );
      toast.success(`${field === 'clockIn' ? 'Check in' : 'Check out'} updated`);
      setEditingModal(null);
    } catch {
      toast.error('Failed to update shift');
    }
  };

  const handleModalCancel = () => setEditingModal(null);

  const aggregateHours = () => {
    const mapping = {};
    employees.forEach(emp => {
      let sumSched = 0, sumActual = 0;
      periodDates.forEach(d =>
        getShiftsForEmployeeDate(emp.id, d).forEach(shift => {
          sumSched += getDuration(shift.startTime, shift.endTime);
          if (shift.clockIn && shift.clockOut) {
            sumActual += getDuration(shift.clockIn, shift.clockOut);
          }
        })
      );
      mapping[emp.id] = { scheduledHours: sumSched, actualHours: sumActual };
    });
    if (!userId && typeof onImportHours === 'function') {
      onImportHours(mapping);
    }
  };

  const buildScheduleClipboardText = () => {
    const header = ['Employee', ...periodDates.map(d => `${format(d, 'EEE')} ${format(d, 'MMM d')}`)].join('\t');
    const rows = employees.map(emp => {
      const cells = periodDates.map(date => {
        const dayShifts = getShiftsForEmployeeDate(emp.id, date);
        if (!dayShifts.length) return '-';
        return dayShifts.map(shift => {
          const schedStart = formatTime(shift.startTime);
          const schedEnd = formatTime(shift.endTime);
          const schedDur = getDuration(shift.startTime, shift.endTime);
          const hasActual = !!(shift.clockIn && shift.clockOut);
          const actStart = hasActual ? formatTime(shift.clockIn) : '-';
          const actEnd = hasActual ? formatTime(shift.clockOut) : '-';
          const actDur = hasActual ? getDuration(shift.clockIn, shift.clockOut) : 0;
          const typeStr = shift.shiftType ? shift.shiftType : 'N/A';
          return `[${typeStr}] Scheduled ${schedStart}-${schedEnd} (${schedDur.toFixed(2)} hrs); Actual ${actStart}-${actEnd} (${actDur.toFixed(2)} hrs)`;
        }).join(' | ');
      });
      return [emp.name, ...cells].join('\t');
    });
    return [header, ...rows].join('\n');
  };

  const escapeCsvValue = value => {
    const text = String(value ?? '');
    if (/[",\n\r]/.test(text)) return `"${text.replace(/"/g, '""')}"`;
    return text;
  };

  const buildScheduleCsv = () => {
    const header = ['Employee', 'Scheduled Hours', 'Actual Hours', ...periodDates.map(d => `${format(d, 'EEE')} ${format(d, 'MMM d')}`)];
    const rows = employees.map(emp => {
      let totalSched = 0, totalAct = 0;
      const dayCells = periodDates.map(date => {
        const dayShifts = getShiftsForEmployeeDate(emp.id, date);
        if (!dayShifts.length) return '-';
        return dayShifts.map(shift => {
          const schedStart = formatTime(shift.startTime);
          const schedEnd = formatTime(shift.endTime);
          const schedDur = getDuration(shift.startTime, shift.endTime);
          totalSched += schedDur;
          const hasActual = !!(shift.clockIn && shift.clockOut);
          const actStart = hasActual ? formatTime(shift.clockIn) : '-';
          const actEnd = hasActual ? formatTime(shift.clockOut) : '-';
          const actDur = hasActual ? getDuration(shift.clockIn, shift.clockOut) : 0;
          totalAct += actDur;
          const typeStr = shift.shiftType ? shift.shiftType : 'N/A';
          return `[${typeStr}] Scheduled ${schedStart}-${schedEnd} (${schedDur.toFixed(2)} hrs); Actual ${actStart}-${actEnd} (${actDur.toFixed(2)} hrs)`;
        }).join(' | ');
      });
      return [emp.name, totalSched.toFixed(2), totalAct.toFixed(2), ...dayCells];
    });
    return [header, ...rows].map(row => row.map(escapeCsvValue).join(',')).join('\n');
  };

  const downloadScheduleCsv = () => {
    if (!employees.length) {
      toast.info('No weekly schedule available to download.');
      return;
    }
    const csv = buildScheduleCsv();
    const blob = new Blob([csv], { type: 'text/csv;charset=utf-8;' });
    const url = window.URL.createObjectURL(blob);
    const link = document.createElement('a');
    const start = format(selectedWeekStart, 'yyyy-MM-dd');
    const end = format(effectivePeriodEnd, 'yyyy-MM-dd');
    link.href = url;
    link.download = `weekly_shift_schedule_${start}_to_${end}.csv`;
    link.style.display = 'none';
    document.body.appendChild(link);
    link.click();
    document.body.removeChild(link);
    window.URL.revokeObjectURL(url);
  };

  const copyScheduleToClipboard = async () => {
    const text = buildScheduleClipboardText();
    try {
      await navigator.clipboard.writeText(text);
      toast.success('Weekly schedule copied to clipboard.');
    } catch (e) {
      const ta = document.createElement('textarea');
      ta.value = text;
      ta.style.position = 'fixed';
      ta.style.left = '-9999px';
      document.body.appendChild(ta);
      ta.select();
      try {
        document.execCommand('copy');
        toast.success('Weekly schedule copied to clipboard.');
      } catch (err) {
        toast.error('Failed to copy schedule to clipboard.');
      } finally {
        document.body.removeChild(ta);
      }
    }
  };

  const getRoleBadgeVariant = (role) => {
    const r = (role || '').toLowerCase();
    if (r === 'server') return 'server';
    if (r === 'cook') return 'cook';
    if (r === 'manager') return 'manager';
    return 'default';
  };

  if (loading) {
    return (
      <div className="flex justify-center items-center h-32">
        <span className="loading loading-spinner loading-md text-indigo-500" />
      </div>
    );
  }

  if (!employees.length) {
    return (
      <div className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center py-10">
        <Clock size={28} className="text-slate-300 mb-3" />
        <p className="text-sm text-slate-500">No shift data available for this period.</p>
      </div>
    );
  }

  return (
    <div>
      {!userId && (
        <div className="flex flex-wrap justify-end gap-2 mb-4">
          <button
            onClick={aggregateHours}
            className="btn h-9 min-h-0 px-3.5 text-xs font-medium rounded-lg bg-indigo-600 text-white hover:bg-indigo-700 transition-all"
            aria-label="Import hours to payroll"
          >
            <Upload size={14} className="mr-1" />
            Import Hours to Payroll
          </button>
          <button
            onClick={copyScheduleToClipboard}
            className="btn h-9 min-h-0 px-3.5 text-xs font-medium rounded-lg border border-slate-200 text-slate-600 hover:bg-slate-50 hover:border-slate-300 transition-all"
            aria-label="Copy schedule table to clipboard"
          >
            <Copy size={14} className="mr-1" />
            Copy Table
          </button>
          <button
            onClick={downloadScheduleCsv}
            className="btn h-9 min-h-0 px-3.5 text-xs font-medium rounded-lg border border-slate-200 text-slate-600 hover:bg-slate-50 hover:border-slate-300 transition-all"
            aria-label="Download schedule CSV"
          >
            <Download size={14} className="mr-1" />
            Download CSV
          </button>
        </div>
      )}

      <div className="overflow-x-auto rounded-lg border border-slate-200">
        <table className="table w-full">
          <thead className="bg-slate-50">
            <tr>
              <th className="sticky left-0 z-10 bg-slate-50 text-xs font-semibold text-slate-500 uppercase tracking-wider px-3 py-3 text-left min-w-[140px]">
                Employee
              </th>
              {periodDates.map(date => (
                <th key={date.toISOString()} className="text-xs font-semibold text-slate-500 uppercase tracking-wider px-2 py-3 text-center min-w-[130px]">
                  <div>{format(date, 'EEE')}</div>
                  <div className="text-[10px] font-normal text-slate-400">{format(date, 'MMM d')}</div>
                </th>
              ))}
            </tr>
          </thead>
          <tbody>
            {employees.map(emp => {
              let totalSched = 0, totalAct = 0, hasActual = false;
              periodDates.forEach(d =>
                getShiftsForEmployeeDate(emp.id, d).forEach(shift => {
                  totalSched += getDuration(shift.startTime, shift.endTime);
                  if (shift.clockIn && shift.clockOut) {
                    totalAct += getDuration(shift.clockIn, shift.clockOut);
                    hasActual = true;
                  }
                })
              );
              const discrepancy = hasActual && Math.abs(totalSched - totalAct) > 0.5;
              const missingActuals = !hasActual && totalSched > 0;

              return (
                <tr key={emp.id} className="border-t border-slate-100 hover:bg-slate-50/40 transition-colors">
                  <td className="sticky left-0 z-10 bg-white border-r border-slate-100 px-3 py-3 align-top">
                    <div className="font-medium text-sm text-slate-900">{emp.name}</div>
                    <div className="mt-1.5 space-y-0.5">
                      <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5">
                        <span className="text-[11px] text-slate-400">Scheduled</span>
                        <span className="text-xs font-medium text-slate-600">{totalSched.toFixed(2)} hrs</span>
                      </div>
                      <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5">
                        <span className="text-[11px] text-slate-400">Actual</span>
                        <span className={`text-xs font-semibold ${discrepancy ? 'text-amber-600' : 'text-emerald-600'}`}>
                          {hasActual ? `${totalAct.toFixed(2)} hrs` : '—'}
                        </span>
                      </div>
                      {missingActuals && (
                        <span className="text-[10px] text-slate-400 italic">Actual not entered</span>
                      )}
                      {discrepancy && hasActual && (
                        <span className="text-[10px] text-amber-600 font-medium">
                          {totalAct > totalSched ? `${(totalAct - totalSched).toFixed(2)} hrs over` : `${(totalSched - totalAct).toFixed(2)} hrs under`}
                        </span>
                      )}
                    </div>
                  </td>
                  {periodDates.map(date => {
                    const dayShifts = getShiftsForEmployeeDate(emp.id, date);
                    if (!dayShifts.length) {
                      return (
                        <td key={date.toISOString()} className="px-2 py-3 text-center align-top">
                          <span className="text-slate-200 text-sm">—</span>
                        </td>
                      );
                    }
                    return (
                      <td key={date.toISOString()} className="px-2 py-3 align-top">
                        {dayShifts.map((shift, i) => {
                          const schedH = getDuration(shift.startTime, shift.endTime);
                          const actH = shift.clockIn && shift.clockOut
                            ? getDuration(shift.clockIn, shift.clockOut)
                            : null;
                          const hasDiscrepancy = actH !== null && Math.abs(schedH - actH) > 0.5;
                          return (
                            <div key={`${shift.id}-${i}`} className="mb-2 pb-2 border-b border-slate-50 last:border-b-0 last:mb-0 last:pb-0">
                              <div className="mb-1">
                                <StatusBadge variant={getRoleBadgeVariant(shift.shiftType)} className="text-[10px]">
                                  {shift.shiftType || 'No type'}
                                </StatusBadge>
                              </div>
                              <div className="text-[11px] text-slate-500">
                                <span className="font-medium text-slate-600">Sched:</span>{' '}
                                {formatTime(shift.startTime)} – {formatTime(shift.endTime)} ({schedH.toFixed(2)}h)
                              </div>
                              <div className={`text-[11px] ${!actH ? 'text-slate-300' : hasDiscrepancy ? 'text-amber-600' : 'text-emerald-600'}`}>
                                <span className="font-medium">Actual:</span>{' '}
                                <button
                                  onClick={() => openEditModal(shift, 'clockIn')}
                                  className="hover:text-indigo-600 transition-colors cursor-pointer"
                                  aria-label={`Edit clock in time for ${emp.name}`}
                                >
                                  {shift.clockIn ? formatTime(shift.clockIn) : <span className="text-slate-300 italic">—</span>}
                                </button>
                                {' – '}
                                <button
                                  onClick={() => openEditModal(shift, 'clockOut')}
                                  className="hover:text-indigo-600 transition-colors cursor-pointer"
                                  aria-label={`Edit clock out time for ${emp.name}`}
                                >
                                  {shift.clockOut ? formatTime(shift.clockOut) : <span className="text-slate-300 italic">—</span>}
                                </button>
                                {actH !== null && ` (${actH.toFixed(2)}h)`}
                              </div>
                            </div>
                          );
                        })}
                      </td>
                    );
                  })}
                </tr>
              );
            })}
          </tbody>
        </table>
      </div>

      <ShiftTimeEditModal
        isOpen={!!editingModal}
        field={editingModal?.field}
        modalDateTime={modalDateTime}
        onChange={e => setModalDateTime(e.target.value)}
        onSave={handleModalSave}
        onCancel={handleModalCancel}
      />
    </div>
  );
};

export default WeeklyShiftSchedule;
```

FILE: client/services/accounting/sales.jsx
