```jsx
// Full path: /home/luanngo/boss-dev/client/services/accounting/sales.jsx
import React, { useContext, useEffect, useMemo, useState } from 'react';
import moment from 'moment-timezone';
import { computeFiscalYearDates, getFiscalYearStartMonth } from './utils/fiscalYear';
import {
  BarChart3,
  Copy,
  Download,
  DollarSign,
  Filter,
  RefreshCw,
  Search,
  SlidersHorizontal,
  Table2,
} from 'lucide-react';
import withAuth from '../../shared/hocs/withAuth';
import { fetchWithAuth } from '@/shared/utils/fetchWithAuth';
import { AuthContext } from '@/shared/context/AuthContext';
import { toast } from 'react-toastify';
import SalesChart from './SalesChart';
import SalesSummaryTable from './SalesSummaryTable';
import SalesTransactionsTable from './SalesTransactionTable';
import { formatCurrency, formatInteger } from './utils/formatAccounting';
import { AccountingStatCard } from './utils/AccountingDisplayComponents';

const DEFAULT_START_TIME = '00:00';
const DEFAULT_END_TIME = '23:59';
const DEFAULT_TIMEZONE = 'America/Toronto';

const quickRanges = [
  { id: 'today', label: 'Today' },
  { id: 'yesterday', label: 'Yesterday' },
  { id: 'last7Days', label: 'Last 7 Days' },
  { id: 'last30Days', label: 'Last 30 Days' },
  { id: 'thisWeek', label: 'This Week' },
  { id: 'thisMonth', label: 'This Month' },
  { id: 'lastMonth', label: 'Last Month' },
  { id: 'thisQuarter', label: 'This Quarter' },
  { id: 'lastQuarter', label: 'Last Quarter' },
  { id: 'thisYear', label: 'This Year' },
  { id: 'lastYear', label: 'Last Year' },
  { id: 'thisFiscalYear', label: 'This Fiscal Year' },
  { id: 'lastFiscalYear', label: 'Last Fiscal Year' },
];

const metrics = [
  { value: 'total_money', label: 'Total Money' },
  { value: 'tip_money', label: 'Tip Money' },
  { value: 'tax_amount', label: 'Tax Amount' },
  { value: 'amount_money', label: 'Amount Money' },
];

const groupByOptions = [
  { value: 'hour', label: 'Hour' },
  { value: '6hour', label: '6 Hour' },
  { value: 'day', label: 'Day' },
  { value: 'week', label: 'Week' },
  { value: 'month', label: 'Month' },
  { value: 'year', label: 'Year' },
  { value: 'device', label: 'Device' },
];

const sortFieldOptions = [
  { value: 'date', label: 'Date' },
  { value: 'amount_money', label: 'Amount' },
  { value: 'total_money', label: 'Total' },
];

const numericFields = ['amount_money', 'tip_money', 'total_money', 'processing_fee', 'refunded_money'];

const copyTextToClipboard = async (value) => {
  try {
    await navigator.clipboard.writeText(value);
  } catch {
    const textarea = document.createElement('textarea');
    textarea.value = value;
    document.body.appendChild(textarea);
    textarea.select();
    document.execCommand('copy');
    document.body.removeChild(textarea);
  }
};

const SalesDashboard = () => {
  const { organization } = useContext(AuthContext);
  const TIMEZONE = organization?.timezone || DEFAULT_TIMEZONE;
  const [appliedGroupBy, setAppliedGroupBy] = useState('day');
  const [appliedStartDate, setAppliedStartDate] = useState('');
  const [appliedEndDate, setAppliedEndDate] = useState('');
  const [appliedStartTime, setAppliedStartTime] = useState(DEFAULT_START_TIME);
  const [appliedEndTime, setAppliedEndTime] = useState(DEFAULT_END_TIME);
  const [appliedSelectedDevices, setAppliedSelectedDevices] = useState([]);
  const [appliedMetric, setAppliedMetric] = useState('total_money');

  const [groupBy, setGroupBy] = useState('day');
  const [startDate, setStartDate] = useState('');
  const [endDate, setEndDate] = useState('');
  const [startTime, setStartTime] = useState(DEFAULT_START_TIME);
  const [endTime, setEndTime] = useState(DEFAULT_END_TIME);
  const [selectedDevices, setSelectedDevices] = useState([]);
  const [metric, setMetric] = useState('total_money');
  const [fyStartMonth, setFyStartMonth] = useState(null);

  useEffect(() => { getFiscalYearStartMonth().then(setFyStartMonth).catch(() => {}); }, []);

  const [summaryData, setSummaryData] = useState([]);
  const [transactionsData, setTransactionsData] = useState({
    transactions: [],
    totalCount: 0,
    limit: 100,
  });
  const [availableDevices, setAvailableDevices] = useState([]);
  const [loadingSummary, setLoadingSummary] = useState(false);
  const [loadingTransactions, setLoadingTransactions] = useState(false);
  const [page, setPage] = useState(1);
  const [search, setSearch] = useState('');
  const [sortField, setSortField] = useState('date');
  const [sortOrder, setSortOrder] = useState('desc');
  const [fetchingSales, setFetchingSales] = useState(false);
  const [fetchingRecent, setFetchingRecent] = useState(false);
  const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState('chart');
  const [selectedTransactionIds, setSelectedTransactionIds] = useState(new Set());
  const [selectedTransactionMap, setSelectedTransactionMap] = useState({});

  const selectedDevicesKey = useMemo(() => selectedDevices.join(','), [selectedDevices]);
  const appliedSelectedDevicesKey = useMemo(() => appliedSelectedDevices.join(','), [appliedSelectedDevices]);

  const formatDate = (date) => moment(date).tz(TIMEZONE).format('YYYY-MM-DD');

  const normalizeTime = (value, fallback) => {
    if (typeof value !== 'string') return fallback;
    return /^\d{2}:\d{2}$/.test(value) ? value : fallback;
  };

  const normalizeSelectedDevices = (devices = []) => {
    const normalized = Array.from(new Set((Array.isArray(devices) ? devices : [])
      .map((device) => String(device || '').trim())
      .filter(Boolean)));

    if (!normalized.length) {
      return [];
    }

    if (normalized.includes('all')) {
      return normalized.length > 1
        ? normalized.filter((device) => device !== 'all')
        : [];
    }

    return normalized;
  };

  const formatDevicesLabel = (devices = []) => (
    normalizeSelectedDevices(devices).length
      ? normalizeSelectedDevices(devices).join(', ')
      : 'All devices'
  );

  const buildDateTime = (dateValue, timeValue, boundary = 'start') => {
    if (!dateValue) return '';
    const normalizedTime = normalizeTime(
      timeValue,
      boundary === 'end' ? DEFAULT_END_TIME : DEFAULT_START_TIME
    );

    const parsed = moment.tz(`${dateValue} ${normalizedTime}`, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm', TIMEZONE);
    return parsed.isValid() ? parsed.toISOString() : '';
  };

  const formatDateTimeLabel = (dateValue, timeValue, boundary = 'start') => {
    if (!dateValue) return '—';
    const normalizedTime = normalizeTime(
      timeValue,
      boundary === 'end' ? DEFAULT_END_TIME : DEFAULT_START_TIME
    );
    return `${dateValue} ${normalizedTime}`;
  };

  const buildFilterRange = ({ startDateValue, endDateValue, startTimeValue, endTimeValue }) => ({
    startDateTime: buildDateTime(startDateValue, startTimeValue, 'start'),
    endDateTime: buildDateTime(endDateValue, endTimeValue, 'end'),
    startLabel: formatDateTimeLabel(startDateValue, startTimeValue, 'start'),
    endLabel: formatDateTimeLabel(endDateValue, endTimeValue, 'end'),
  });

  const buildSalesParams = ({
    groupByValue,
    startDateValue,
    endDateValue,
    startTimeValue,
    endTimeValue,
    devicesValue,
    metricValue,
    pageValue,
    searchValue,
    sortFieldValue,
    sortOrderValue,
  }) => {
    const params = new URLSearchParams();
    const { startDateTime, endDateTime } = buildFilterRange({
      startDateValue,
      endDateValue,
      startTimeValue,
      endTimeValue,
    });

    if (groupByValue) params.set('groupBy', groupByValue);
    if (metricValue) params.set('metric', metricValue);
    if (startDateTime) params.set('startDate', startDateTime);
    if (endDateTime) params.set('endDate', endDateTime);
    if (typeof pageValue === 'number') params.set('page', String(pageValue));
    if (searchValue) params.set('search', searchValue);
    if (sortFieldValue) params.set('sortField', sortFieldValue);
    if (sortOrderValue) params.set('sortOrder', sortOrderValue);
    if (devicesValue?.length) params.set('devices', devicesValue.join(','));

    return params;
  };

  useEffect(() => {
    const savedFilters = localStorage.getItem('salesDashboard_filters');
    if (savedFilters) {
      const filters = JSON.parse(savedFilters);
      const savedGroupBy = filters.groupBy || 'day';
      const savedStartDate = filters.startDate || '';
      const savedEndDate = filters.endDate || '';
      const savedStartTime = normalizeTime(filters.startTime, DEFAULT_START_TIME);
      const savedEndTime = normalizeTime(filters.endTime, DEFAULT_END_TIME);
      const savedDevices = normalizeSelectedDevices(filters.selectedDevices || []);
      const savedMetric = filters.metric || 'total_money';

      setGroupBy(savedGroupBy);
      setStartDate(savedStartDate);
      setEndDate(savedEndDate);
      setStartTime(savedStartTime);
      setEndTime(savedEndTime);
      setSelectedDevices(savedDevices);
      setMetric(savedMetric);

      setAppliedGroupBy(savedGroupBy);
      setAppliedStartDate(savedStartDate);
      setAppliedEndDate(savedEndDate);
      setAppliedStartTime(savedStartTime);
      setAppliedEndTime(savedEndTime);
      setAppliedSelectedDevices(savedDevices);
      setAppliedMetric(savedMetric);
    } else {
      const today = moment().tz(TIMEZONE);
      const threeDaysAgo = today.clone().subtract(3, 'day');
      const defaultStart = formatDate(threeDaysAgo);
      const defaultEnd = formatDate(today);

      setStartDate(defaultStart);
      setEndDate(defaultEnd);
      setStartTime(DEFAULT_START_TIME);
      setEndTime(DEFAULT_END_TIME);
      setAppliedStartDate(defaultStart);
      setAppliedEndDate(defaultEnd);
      setAppliedStartTime(DEFAULT_START_TIME);
      setAppliedEndTime(DEFAULT_END_TIME);
    }
  }, []);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!appliedStartDate || !appliedEndDate) return;

    const fetchAvailableDevices = async () => {
      try {
        const params = buildSalesParams({
          startDateValue: appliedStartDate,
          endDateValue: appliedEndDate,
          startTimeValue: appliedStartTime,
          endTimeValue: appliedEndTime,
        });

        const url = `${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL}/accounting/sales/devices?${params.toString()}`;
        const res = await fetchWithAuth(url, { headers: {} });
        if (!res.ok) throw new Error('Failed to fetch available devices.');
        const data = await res.json();
        setAvailableDevices(Array.isArray(data) ? data : []);

        if (normalizeSelectedDevices(selectedDevices).length === 0 && Array.isArray(data) && data.length > 0) {
          setSelectedDevices(['all']);
          setAppliedSelectedDevices(['all']);
        }
      } catch (error) {
        console.error('Fetch Available Devices Error:', error);
        toast.error('Failed to fetch available devices');
      }
    };

    fetchAvailableDevices();
  }, [appliedStartDate, appliedEndDate, appliedStartTime, appliedEndTime, selectedDevices.length]);

  const fetchSummaryData = async (overrides = {}) => {
    const summaryGroupBy = overrides.groupBy ?? appliedGroupBy;
    const summaryStartDate = overrides.startDate ?? appliedStartDate;
    const summaryEndDate = overrides.endDate ?? appliedEndDate;
    const summaryStartTime = overrides.startTime ?? appliedStartTime;
    const summaryEndTime = overrides.endTime ?? appliedEndTime;
    const summaryDevices = overrides.selectedDevices ?? appliedSelectedDevices;
    const summaryMetric = overrides.metric ?? appliedMetric;

    if (!summaryStartDate || !summaryEndDate) return;

    setLoadingSummary(true);
    try {
      const params = buildSalesParams({
        groupByValue: summaryGroupBy,
        startDateValue: summaryStartDate,
        endDateValue: summaryEndDate,
        startTimeValue: summaryStartTime,
        endTimeValue: summaryEndTime,
        devicesValue: summaryDevices,
        metricValue: summaryMetric,
      });

      const url = `${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL}/accounting/sales/summary?${params.toString()}`;
      const res = await fetchWithAuth(url, { headers: {} });
      if (!res.ok) throw new Error('Failed to fetch summary data.');
      const data = await res.json();
      setSummaryData(Array.isArray(data) ? data : []);
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Fetch Summary Data Error:', error);
      toast.error('Failed to fetch summary data');
    } finally {
      setLoadingSummary(false);
    }
  };

  const fetchTransactionsData = async (overrides = {}) => {
    const txStartDate = overrides.startDate ?? appliedStartDate;
    const txEndDate = overrides.endDate ?? appliedEndDate;
    const txStartTime = overrides.startTime ?? appliedStartTime;
    const txEndTime = overrides.endTime ?? appliedEndTime;
    const txDevices = overrides.selectedDevices ?? appliedSelectedDevices;
    const txPage = overrides.page ?? page;
    const txSearch = overrides.search ?? search;
    const txSortField = overrides.sortField ?? sortField;
    const txSortOrder = overrides.sortOrder ?? sortOrder;

    if (!txStartDate || !txEndDate) return;

    setLoadingTransactions(true);
    try {
      const params = buildSalesParams({
        startDateValue: txStartDate,
        endDateValue: txEndDate,
        startTimeValue: txStartTime,
        endTimeValue: txEndTime,
        devicesValue: txDevices,
        pageValue: txPage,
        searchValue: txSearch,
        sortFieldValue: txSortField,
        sortOrderValue: txSortOrder,
      });
      params.set('limit', '100');

      const url = `${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL}/accounting/sales/transactions?${params.toString()}`;
      const res = await fetchWithAuth(url, { headers: {} });
      if (!res.ok) throw new Error('Failed to fetch transactions.');
      const data = await res.json();
      setTransactionsData({
        transactions: Array.isArray(data?.transactions) ? data.transactions : [],
        totalCount: Number(data?.totalCount || 0),
        limit: Number(data?.limit || 100),
      });
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Fetch Transactions Data Error:', error);
      toast.error('Failed to fetch transactions');
    } finally {
      setLoadingTransactions(false);
    }
  };

  useEffect(() => {
    const fetchRecentOnLoad = async () => {
      await handleFetchRecentTransactions();
    };
    fetchRecentOnLoad();
  }, []);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!appliedStartDate || !appliedEndDate) return;
    fetchSummaryData();
  }, [
    appliedGroupBy,
    appliedStartDate,
    appliedEndDate,
    appliedStartTime,
    appliedEndTime,
    appliedMetric,
    appliedSelectedDevicesKey,
  ]);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!appliedStartDate || !appliedEndDate || activeTab !== 'transactions') return;
    fetchTransactionsData();
  }, [
    activeTab,
    page,
    search,
    sortField,
    sortOrder,
    appliedStartDate,
    appliedEndDate,
    appliedStartTime,
    appliedEndTime,
    appliedSelectedDevicesKey,
  ]);

  const applyFilters = () => {
    const normalizedStartTime = normalizeTime(startTime, DEFAULT_START_TIME);
    const normalizedEndTime = normalizeTime(endTime, DEFAULT_END_TIME);
    const normalizedDevices = normalizeSelectedDevices(selectedDevices);

    setSelectedDevices(normalizedDevices);
    setAppliedGroupBy(groupBy);
    setAppliedStartDate(startDate);
    setAppliedEndDate(endDate);
    setAppliedStartTime(normalizedStartTime);
    setAppliedEndTime(normalizedEndTime);
    setAppliedSelectedDevices(normalizedDevices);
    setAppliedMetric(metric);
    setPage(1);

    localStorage.setItem('salesDashboard_filters', JSON.stringify({
      groupBy,
      startDate,
      endDate,
      startTime: normalizedStartTime,
      endTime: normalizedEndTime,
      selectedDevices: normalizedDevices,
      metric,
    }));
  };

  const handleDeviceChange = (event) => {
    const newSelectedDevices = Array.from(event.target.selectedOptions, (option) => option.value);
    setSelectedDevices(normalizeSelectedDevices(newSelectedDevices));
    setPage(1);
  };

  const fetchAndNotify = async (url, setLoading, successMsgFn, errorMsg) => {
    setLoading(true);
    try {
      const res = await fetchWithAuth(url, { headers: {} });
      if (!res.ok) throw new Error('Fetch failed');
      const data = await res.json();
      toast.success(successMsgFn(data));
    } catch (error) {
      console.error(error);
      toast.error(errorMsg);
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  };

  const handleFetchSales = async () => {
    const { startDateTime, endDateTime } = buildFilterRange({
      startDateValue: appliedStartDate,
      endDateValue: appliedEndDate,
      startTimeValue: appliedStartTime,
      endTimeValue: appliedEndTime,
    });

    const params = new URLSearchParams();
    if (startDateTime) params.set('begin_time', startDateTime);
    if (endDateTime) params.set('end_time', endDateTime);
    if (sortOrder) params.set('sort_order', sortOrder);

    const url = `${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL}/accounting/sales/fetch?${params.toString()}`;
    await fetchAndNotify(
      url,
      setFetchingSales,
      (data) => `Fetched ${data.count} sales transactions from Square.`,
      'Failed to fetch sales from Square.'
    );
  };

  const handleFetchRecentTransactions = async () => {
    const url = `${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL}/accounting/sales/recent?sort_order=${sortOrder}`;
    await fetchAndNotify(
      url,
      setFetchingRecent,
      (data) => `Fetched ${data.count} new transactions from Square.`,
      'Failed to fetch most recent transactions.'
    );
  };

  const copySummaryToClipboard = async () => {
    try {
      if (!summaryData || summaryData.length === 0) {
        toast.warn('No summary data to copy');
        return;
      }
      const headers = Object.keys(summaryData[0] || {});
      const metaLine = [
        `Group By: ${appliedGroupBy}`,
        `Metric: ${appliedMetric}`,
        `Start: ${formatDateTimeLabel(appliedStartDate || startDate, appliedStartTime || startTime, 'start')}`,
        `End: ${formatDateTimeLabel(appliedEndDate || endDate, appliedEndTime || endTime, 'end')}`,
        `Devices: ${formatDevicesLabel(appliedSelectedDevices)}`,
      ].join('\t');

      const headerLine = headers.join('\t');
      const dataLines = summaryData.map((row) => headers.map((header) => {
        const value = row[header];
        if (value === null || value === undefined) return '';
        return String(value).replace(/\t/g, ' ').replace(/\r?\n/g, ' ');
      }).join('\t'));

      const tsv = [metaLine, headerLine, ...dataLines].join('\n');
      await copyTextToClipboard(tsv);
      toast.success('Sales summary copied to clipboard');
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Copy Summary Error:', error);
      toast.error('Failed to copy summary to clipboard');
    }
  };

  const downloadSummaryAsCSV = () => {
    if (!summaryData || summaryData.length === 0) {
      toast.warn('No summary data to export');
      return;
    }
    const escapeCSV = (val) => `"${String(val === null || val === undefined ? '' : val).replace(/"/g, '""')}"`;
    const headers = Object.keys(summaryData[0] || {});
    const headerLine = headers.map(escapeCSV).join(',');
    const dataLines = summaryData.map((row) => headers.map((h) => escapeCSV(row[h])).join(','));
    const csv = [headerLine, ...dataLines].join('\n');
    const blob = new Blob([csv], { type: 'text/csv;charset=utf-8;' });
    const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
    const link = document.createElement('a');
    link.href = url;
    link.download = `sales-summary-${appliedGroupBy}-${moment().format('YYYY-MM-DD')}.csv`;
    link.click();
    URL.revokeObjectURL(url);
  };

  const handleQuickRange = (range) => {
    const now = moment().tz(TIMEZONE);
    let rangeStart;
    let rangeEnd;

    switch (range) {
      case 'today':
        rangeStart = now.clone();
        rangeEnd = now.clone();
        break;
      case 'yesterday':
        rangeStart = now.clone().subtract(1, 'day');
        rangeEnd = now.clone().subtract(1, 'day');
        break;
      case 'last7Days':
        rangeStart = now.clone().subtract(6, 'day');
        rangeEnd = now.clone();
        break;
      case 'last30Days':
        rangeStart = now.clone().subtract(29, 'day');
        rangeEnd = now.clone();
        break;
      case 'thisWeek':
        rangeStart = now.clone().startOf('week');
        rangeEnd = now.clone().endOf('week');
        break;
      case 'thisMonth':
        rangeStart = now.clone().startOf('month');
        rangeEnd = now.clone().endOf('month');
        break;
      case 'lastMonth':
        rangeStart = now.clone().subtract(1, 'month').startOf('month');
        rangeEnd = now.clone().subtract(1, 'month').endOf('month');
        break;
      case 'thisQuarter':
        rangeStart = now.clone().startOf('quarter');
        rangeEnd = now.clone().endOf('quarter');
        break;
      case 'lastQuarter':
        rangeStart = now.clone().subtract(1, 'quarter').startOf('quarter');
        rangeEnd = now.clone().subtract(1, 'quarter').endOf('quarter');
        break;
      case 'thisYear':
        rangeStart = now.clone().startOf('year');
        rangeEnd = now.clone().endOf('year');
        break;
      case 'lastYear':
        rangeStart = now.clone().subtract(1, 'year').startOf('year');
        rangeEnd = now.clone().subtract(1, 'year').endOf('year');
        break;
      case 'thisFiscalYear':
        if (fyStartMonth) {
          const fy = computeFiscalYearDates(fyStartMonth, now.toDate());
          if (fy) { rangeStart = moment(fy.from); rangeEnd = moment(fy.to); }
        }
        break;
      case 'lastFiscalYear':
        if (fyStartMonth) {
          const fy = computeFiscalYearDates(fyStartMonth, now.toDate());
          if (fy) {
            rangeStart = moment(fy.from).subtract(1, 'year');
            rangeEnd = moment(fy.to).subtract(1, 'year');
          }
        }
        break;
      default:
        return;
    }

    setStartDate(formatDate(rangeStart));
    setEndDate(formatDate(rangeEnd));
    setStartTime(DEFAULT_START_TIME);
    setEndTime(DEFAULT_END_TIME);
  };

  const resetFilters = () => {
    const today = moment().tz(TIMEZONE);
    const threeDaysAgo = today.clone().subtract(3, 'day');

    setGroupBy('day');
    setStartDate(formatDate(threeDaysAgo));
    setEndDate(formatDate(today));
    setStartTime(DEFAULT_START_TIME);
    setEndTime(DEFAULT_END_TIME);
    setMetric('total_money');
    setSelectedDevices([]);
  };

  const updateSelectedTransactions = (transaction, shouldSelect) => {
    setSelectedTransactionIds((current) => {
      const next = new Set(current);
      if (shouldSelect) {
        next.add(transaction.id);
      } else {
        next.delete(transaction.id);
      }
      return next;
    });

    setSelectedTransactionMap((current) => {
      const next = { ...current };
      if (shouldSelect) {
        next[transaction.id] = transaction;
      } else {
        delete next[transaction.id];
      }
      return next;
    });
  };

  const handleToggleAllVisible = (transactions, shouldSelect) => {
    setSelectedTransactionIds((current) => {
      const next = new Set(current);
      transactions.forEach((transaction) => {
        if (shouldSelect) {
          next.add(transaction.id);
        } else {
          next.delete(transaction.id);
        }
      });
      return next;
    });

    setSelectedTransactionMap((current) => {
      const next = { ...current };
      transactions.forEach((transaction) => {
        if (shouldSelect) {
          next[transaction.id] = transaction;
        } else {
          delete next[transaction.id];
        }
      });
      return next;
    });
  };

  const clearSelectedTransactions = () => {
    setSelectedTransactionIds(new Set());
    setSelectedTransactionMap({});
  };

  const selectedTransactions = useMemo(
    () => Array.from(selectedTransactionIds).map((id) => selectedTransactionMap[id]).filter(Boolean),
    [selectedTransactionIds, selectedTransactionMap]
  );

  const selectedTotals = useMemo(
    () => selectedTransactions.reduce((accumulator, transaction) => {
      numericFields.forEach((field) => {
        accumulator[field] += Number(transaction?.[field] || 0);
      });
      return accumulator;
    }, {
      amount_money: 0,
      tip_money: 0,
      total_money: 0,
      processing_fee: 0,
      refunded_money: 0,
    }),
    [selectedTransactions]
  );

  const summaryMetricTotal = useMemo(
    () => summaryData.reduce((accumulator, row) => accumulator + Number(row?.[appliedMetric] || row?.value || 0), 0),
    [summaryData, appliedMetric]
  );

  const filterSummary = useMemo(() => {
    const devicesLabel = formatDevicesLabel(selectedDevices);
    return `${formatDateTimeLabel(startDate, startTime, 'start')} → ${formatDateTimeLabel(endDate, endTime, 'end')} • ${devicesLabel}`;
  }, [startDate, startTime, endDate, endTime, selectedDevices]);

  const appliedFilterSummary = useMemo(() => {
    const devicesLabel = formatDevicesLabel(appliedSelectedDevices);
    return `${formatDateTimeLabel(appliedStartDate, appliedStartTime, 'start')} → ${formatDateTimeLabel(appliedEndDate, appliedEndTime, 'end')} • ${devicesLabel}`;
  }, [appliedStartDate, appliedStartTime, appliedEndDate, appliedEndTime, appliedSelectedDevices]);

  const copySelectedIds = async () => {
    try {
      if (!selectedTransactions.length) {
        toast.warn('No selected transactions to copy');
        return;
      }
      await copyTextToClipboard(selectedTransactions.map((transaction) => transaction.id).join('\n'));
      toast.success('Selected transaction IDs copied');
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Copy Selected IDs Error:', error);
      toast.error('Failed to copy selected IDs');
    }
  };

  const copySelectedRows = async () => {
    try {
      if (!selectedTransactions.length) {
        toast.warn('No selected transactions to copy');
        return;
      }

      const headers = [
        'id',
        'date',
        'amount_money',
        'tip_money',
        'total_money',
        'processing_fee',
        'refunded_money',
        'status',
        'source_type',
        'device_id',
        'device_name',
        'receipt_url',
      ];

      const rows = selectedTransactions.map((transaction) => headers.map((header) => {
        const value = transaction?.[header];
        if (value === null || value === undefined) return '';
        return String(value).replace(/\t/g, ' ').replace(/\r?\n/g, ' ');
      }).join('\t'));

      await copyTextToClipboard([headers.join('\t'), ...rows].join('\n'));
      toast.success('Selected transactions copied to clipboard');
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Copy Selected Rows Error:', error);
      toast.error('Failed to copy selected transactions');
    }
  };

  const tabButtonClass = (tabId) => (
    activeTab === tabId
      ? 'btn btn-sm btn-primary min-w-0 flex-1 md:flex-none'
      : 'btn btn-sm btn-ghost border border-base-300 min-w-0 flex-1 md:flex-none'
  );

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-base-100 p-2 md:p-4">
      <div className="max-w-[1600px] mx-auto space-y-3">
        <div className="flex flex-col gap-3 md:flex-row md:items-center md:justify-between">
          <div className="flex items-center gap-2 min-w-0">
            <DollarSign size={20} className="text-primary shrink-0" />
            <h1 className="text-xl md:text-2xl font-semibold leading-tight">Sales transactions</h1>
            <span
              className="badge badge-outline badge-sm"
              title={`Draft: ${filterSummary}\nApplied: ${appliedFilterSummary}`}
            >
              Filters
            </span>
          </div>

          <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2">
            <button
              type="button"
              onClick={handleFetchRecentTransactions}
              disabled={fetchingRecent}
              className="btn btn-primary btn-sm md:btn-md"
              title="Fetch the most recent Square transactions"
            >
              <RefreshCw size={16} className={fetchingRecent ? 'animate-spin' : ''} />
              {fetchingRecent ? 'Fetching…' : 'Fetch recent'}
            </button>
            <button
              type="button"
              onClick={handleFetchSales}
              disabled={fetchingSales}
              className="btn btn-outline btn-sm md:btn-md"
              title="Fetch Square transactions for the applied date range"
            >
              <RefreshCw size={16} className={fetchingSales ? 'animate-spin' : ''} />
              {fetchingSales ? 'Fetching…' : 'Fetch from Square'}
            </button>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div className="grid grid-cols-2 xl:grid-cols-4 gap-2 md:gap-3">
          <AccountingStatCard
            label="Summary rows"
            value={formatInteger(summaryData.length)}
            description="Aggregated groups returned"
            tone="primary"
            icon={BarChart3}
          />
          <AccountingStatCard
            label="Metric total"
            value={formatCurrency(summaryMetricTotal)}
            description={`Using ${metrics.find((item) => item.value === appliedMetric)?.label || appliedMetric}`}
            tone="success"
            icon={DollarSign}
          />
          <AccountingStatCard
            label="Transactions"
            value={formatInteger(transactionsData.totalCount)}
            description={`Applied: ${appliedFilterSummary}`}
            tone="accent"
            icon={Table2}
          />
          <AccountingStatCard
            label="Selected"
            value={formatInteger(selectedTransactions.length)}
            description="Selection persists across pages you visit"
            icon={Copy}
          />
        </div>

        <div className="rounded-box border border-base-300 bg-base-100 p-3 md:p-4">
          <div className="space-y-3">
            <div className="flex flex-wrap items-center gap-2">
              <div className="font-semibold flex items-center gap-2" title="Date, time, device, grouping, and metric filters">
                <Filter size={16} /> Filters
              </div>
            </div>

            <label className="form-control md:hidden">
              <div className="label py-1"><span className="label-text font-medium">Quick filter</span></div>
              <select
                value=""
                onChange={(event) => {
                  if (!event.target.value) return;
                  handleQuickRange(event.target.value);
                  event.target.value = '';
                }}
                className="select select-bordered select-sm w-full bg-base-100 text-base-content"
              >
                <option value="" disabled>Choose a range</option>
                {quickRanges.filter((r) => !r.id.includes('FiscalYear') || fyStartMonth).map((range) => (
                  <option key={range.id} value={range.id}>{range.label}</option>
                ))}
              </select>
            </label>

            <div className="hidden md:flex flex-wrap gap-2">
              {quickRanges.filter((r) => !r.id.includes('FiscalYear') || fyStartMonth).map((range) => (
                <button
                  key={range.id}
                  type="button"
                  className="btn btn-xs md:btn-sm btn-ghost border border-base-300"
                  onClick={() => handleQuickRange(range.id)}
                >
                  {range.label}
                </button>
              ))}
            </div>

            <div className="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 xl:grid-cols-4 gap-2 md:gap-3">
              <label className="form-control">
                <div className="label py-1"><span className="label-text font-medium">Start Date</span></div>
                <input
                  type="date"
                  value={startDate}
                  onChange={(event) => setStartDate(event.target.value)}
                  className="input input-bordered input-sm w-full min-w-0 bg-base-100 text-base-content"
                />
              </label>

              <label className="form-control">
                <div className="label py-1"><span className="label-text font-medium">Start Time</span></div>
                <input
                  type="time"
                  value={startTime}
                  onChange={(event) => setStartTime(event.target.value)}
                  className="input input-bordered input-sm w-full min-w-0 bg-base-100 text-base-content"
                />
              </label>

              <label className="form-control">
                <div className="label py-1"><span className="label-text font-medium">End Date</span></div>
                <input
                  type="date"
                  value={endDate}
                  onChange={(event) => setEndDate(event.target.value)}
                  className="input input-bordered input-sm w-full min-w-0 bg-base-100 text-base-content"
                />
              </label>

              <label className="form-control">
                <div className="label py-1"><span className="label-text font-medium">End Time</span></div>
                <input
                  type="time"
                  value={endTime}
                  onChange={(event) => setEndTime(event.target.value)}
                  className="input input-bordered input-sm w-full min-w-0 bg-base-100 text-base-content"
                />
              </label>

              <label className="form-control">
                <div className="label py-1"><span className="label-text font-medium">Metric</span></div>
                <select value={metric} onChange={(event) => setMetric(event.target.value)} className="select select-bordered select-sm w-full min-w-0 bg-base-100 text-base-content">
                  {metrics.map((item) => (
                    <option key={item.value} value={item.value}>{item.label}</option>
                  ))}
                </select>
              </label>

              <label className="form-control">
                <div className="label py-1"><span className="label-text font-medium">Group By</span></div>
                <select value={groupBy} onChange={(event) => setGroupBy(event.target.value)} className="select select-bordered select-sm w-full min-w-0 bg-base-100 text-base-content">
                  {groupByOptions.map((item) => (
                    <option key={item.value} value={item.value}>{item.label}</option>
                  ))}
                </select>
              </label>

              <label className="form-control md:col-span-2 xl:col-span-2">
                <div className="label py-1 flex-wrap gap-2">
                  <span className="label-text font-medium">Devices (multi-select)</span>
                  <span className="label-text-alt text-base-content/60" title="Ctrl/Cmd-click to choose several devices">Multi</span>
                </div>
                <select
                  multiple
                  value={selectedDevices}
                  onChange={handleDeviceChange}
                  className="select select-bordered min-h-24 md:min-h-28 w-full bg-base-100 text-base-content"
                >
                  <option value="all">All Devices</option>
                  {availableDevices.map((device) => (
                    <option key={device} value={device}>{device}</option>
                  ))}
                </select>
              </label>
            </div>

            <div className="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-[auto_auto] gap-2 sm:items-center">
              <button type="button" onClick={applyFilters} className="btn btn-primary btn-sm w-full sm:w-auto" title={`Apply draft filters: ${filterSummary}`}>
                <SlidersHorizontal size={16} /> Apply Filters
              </button>
              <button type="button" onClick={resetFilters} className="btn btn-ghost btn-sm border border-base-300 w-full sm:w-auto">
                Reset Draft Filters
              </button>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div className="rounded-box border border-base-300 bg-base-100 p-3 md:p-4">
          <div className="space-y-3">
            <div className="flex flex-col gap-3 xl:flex-row xl:items-center xl:justify-between">
              <div className="join w-full md:w-auto">
                <button type="button" onClick={() => setActiveTab('chart')} className={tabButtonClass('chart')}>
                  <BarChart3 size={16} className="shrink-0" /> <span className="truncate">Sales Reports</span>
                </button>
                <button type="button" onClick={() => setActiveTab('transactions')} className={tabButtonClass('transactions')}>
                  <Table2 size={16} className="shrink-0" /> <span className="truncate">Transactions</span>
                </button>
              </div>

              {activeTab === 'transactions' && (
                <div className="flex flex-col gap-2 lg:flex-row lg:items-center">
                  <label className="input input-bordered input-sm flex items-center gap-2 w-full lg:w-[220px] bg-base-100 text-base-content">
                    <Search size={16} className="text-base-content/50" />
                    <input
                      type="text"
                      placeholder="Search transactions"
                      value={search}
                      onChange={(event) => {
                        setSearch(event.target.value);
                        setPage(1);
                      }}
                      className="grow"
                    />
                  </label>

                  <label className="form-control w-full lg:w-[180px]">
                    <div className="label py-0 pb-1"><span className="label-text text-xs">Sort Field</span></div>
                    <select value={sortField} onChange={(event) => setSortField(event.target.value)} className="select select-bordered select-sm bg-base-100 text-base-content">
                      {sortFieldOptions.map((item) => (
                        <option key={item.value} value={item.value}>{item.label}</option>
                      ))}
                    </select>
                  </label>

                  <label className="form-control w-full lg:w-[160px]">
                    <div className="label py-0 pb-1"><span className="label-text text-xs">Sort Order</span></div>
                    <select value={sortOrder} onChange={(event) => setSortOrder(event.target.value)} className="select select-bordered select-sm bg-base-100 text-base-content">
                      <option value="asc">Ascending</option>
                      <option value="desc">Descending</option>
                    </select>
                  </label>
                </div>
              )}
            </div>

            {activeTab === 'chart' && (
              <>
                {loadingSummary ? (
                  <div className="flex justify-center items-center py-14">
                    <span className="loading loading-spinner loading-lg" />
                  </div>
                ) : (
                  <div className="space-y-3">
                    <div className="flex flex-wrap justify-stretch md:justify-end gap-2">
                      <button type="button" onClick={copySummaryToClipboard} className="btn btn-outline btn-sm w-full md:w-auto">
                        <Copy size={16} /> Copy Summary to Clipboard
                      </button>
                      <button type="button" onClick={downloadSummaryAsCSV} className="btn btn-outline btn-sm w-full md:w-auto">
                        <Download size={16} /> Download as CSV
                      </button>
                    </div>

                    <div className="grid grid-cols-1 xl:grid-cols-[minmax(0,1.2fr)_minmax(0,0.8fr)] gap-3">
                      <div className="rounded-box border border-base-300 bg-base-100 p-3 md:p-4">
                        <div className="font-semibold mb-2">Chart</div>
                        <SalesChart data={summaryData} groupBy={appliedGroupBy} metric={appliedMetric} />
                      </div>
                      <div className="rounded-box border border-base-300 bg-base-100 p-3 md:p-4">
                        <div className="font-semibold mb-2">Summary Table</div>
                        <SalesSummaryTable data={summaryData} groupBy={appliedGroupBy} metric={appliedMetric} timezone={TIMEZONE} />
                      </div>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                )}
              </>
            )}

            {activeTab === 'transactions' && (
              <>
                {loadingTransactions ? (
                  <div className="flex justify-center items-center py-14">
                    <span className="loading loading-spinner loading-lg" />
                  </div>
                ) : (
                  <SalesTransactionsTable
                    data={transactionsData}
                    currentPage={page}
                    onPageChange={setPage}
                    selectedIds={selectedTransactionIds}
                    onToggleTransaction={updateSelectedTransactions}
                    onToggleAllVisible={handleToggleAllVisible}
                    onClearSelection={clearSelectedTransactions}
                    onCopySelectedIds={copySelectedIds}
                    onCopySelectedRows={copySelectedRows}
                    selectedCount={selectedTransactions.length}
                    selectedTotals={selectedTotals}
                  />
                )}
              </>
            )}
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
};

export default withAuth(SalesDashboard);

```

FILE: client/services/accounting/SalesChart.jsx
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
```jsx
// Full path: /home/luanngo/boss-dev/client/services/accounting/SalesChart.jsx
// SalesChart.js

import React from 'react';
import { Bar } from 'react-chartjs-2';
import {
  Chart as ChartJS,
  CategoryScale,
  LinearScale,
  BarElement,
  Title,
  Tooltip,
  Legend,
} from 'chart.js';

ChartJS.register(CategoryScale, LinearScale, BarElement, Title, Tooltip, Legend);

const SalesChart = ({ data, groupBy, metric }) => {
  // Generate labels: if grouping by hour or 6hour, display time; otherwise, use locale date.
  const labels = data.map((item) =>
    groupBy === 'hour' || groupBy === '6hour'
      ? new Date(item.period).toLocaleTimeString([], { hour: '2-digit', minute: '2-digit' })
      : new Date(item.period).toLocaleDateString()
  );

  // Use the selected metric; fallback to total_sales if not available.
  const salesData = data.map((item) =>
    parseFloat(item[metric] !== undefined ? item[metric] : item.total_sales)
  );

  const chartData = {
    labels,
    datasets: [
      {
        label:
          metric === 'total_money'
            ? 'Total Money'
            : metric === 'tip_money'
            ? 'Tip Money'
            : metric === 'tax_amount'
            ? 'Tax Amount'
            : 'Amount',
        data: salesData,
        backgroundColor: 'rgba(75, 192, 192, 0.6)',
        borderColor: 'rgba(75, 192, 192, 1)',
        borderWidth: 1,
      },
    ],
  };

  const options = {
    responsive: true,
    maintainAspectRatio: false,
    plugins: {
      legend: {
        display: true,
        position: 'top',
      },
      title: {
        display: true,
        text: 'Sales Chart',
      },
    },
    scales: {
      x: {
        grid: {
          display: false,
        },
      },
      y: {
        beginAtZero: true,
        grid: {
          color: 'rgba(0,0,0,0.1)',
        },
      },
    },
  };

  return (
    <div style={{ height: '400px' }}>
      <Bar data={chartData} options={options} />
    </div>
  );
};

export default SalesChart;

```

FILE: client/services/accounting/SalesSummaryTable.jsx
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
```jsx
// Full path: /home/luanngo/boss-dev/client/services/accounting/SalesSummaryTable.jsx
import React, { useMemo, useState } from 'react';
import moment from 'moment-timezone';

const DEFAULT_TIMEZONE = 'America/Toronto';

const formatPeriodLabel = (period, groupBy, timezone = DEFAULT_TIMEZONE) => {
  if (!period) return '—';
  if (groupBy === 'device') return period;

  if (groupBy === 'year') {
    return String(period);
  }

  if (groupBy === 'month') {
    const parsedMonth = moment.tz(String(period), 'YYYY-MM', timezone);
    return parsedMonth.isValid() ? parsedMonth.format('YYYY-MM') : String(period);
  }

  if (groupBy === 'day' || groupBy === 'week') {
    const parsedDay = moment.tz(String(period), 'YYYY-MM-DD', timezone);
    return parsedDay.isValid() ? parsedDay.format('YYYY-MM-DD') : String(period);
  }

  const parsedDateTime = moment.tz(
    String(period),
    ['YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm:ss', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm'],
    timezone
  );

  return parsedDateTime.isValid()
    ? parsedDateTime.format('YYYY-MM-DD h:mm:ss A')
    : String(period);
};

const SalesSummaryTable = ({ data, groupBy, metric, timezone = DEFAULT_TIMEZONE }) => {
  const [selectedValues, setSelectedValues] = useState([]);

  const metricTitle =
    metric === 'total_money'
      ? 'Total Money'
      : metric === 'tip_money'
      ? 'Tip Money'
      : metric === 'tax_amount'
      ? 'Tax Amount'
      : 'Amount';

  const toggleSelection = (value) => {
    if (selectedValues.includes(value)) {
      setSelectedValues(selectedValues.filter((v) => v !== value));
    } else {
      setSelectedValues([...selectedValues, value]);
    }
  };

  const totalSelected = useMemo(
    () => selectedValues.reduce((acc, val) => acc + val, 0),
    [selectedValues]
  );

  const totalMetric = useMemo(
    () => data.reduce((acc, row) => {
      const rawValue = row[metric] !== undefined ? row[metric] : row.total_sales;
      return acc + parseFloat(rawValue || 0);
    }, 0),
    [data, metric]
  );

  const totalCount = useMemo(
    () => data.reduce((acc, row) => acc + parseInt(row.count || 0, 10), 0),
    [data]
  );

  const formatDollar = (num) =>
    new Intl.NumberFormat('en-CA', {
      style: 'currency',
      currency: 'CAD',
      minimumFractionDigits: 2,
      maximumFractionDigits: 2,
    }).format(Number(num || 0));

  return (
    <div>
      <div className="overflow-x-auto mt-4">
        <table className="min-w-full bg-white">
          <thead>
            <tr>
              <th className="py-2 px-4 border">Period ({groupBy})</th>
              <th className="py-2 px-4 border">{metricTitle}</th>
              <th className="py-2 px-4 border">Transactions</th>
            </tr>
          </thead>
          <tbody>
            {data.map((row, index) => {
              const rawValue = row[metric] !== undefined ? row[metric] : row.total_sales;
              const numericValue = parseFloat(rawValue || 0);
              const formattedValue = formatDollar(numericValue);
              const isSelected = selectedValues.includes(numericValue);

              return (
                <tr key={index}>
                  <td className="py-2 px-4 border">
                    {formatPeriodLabel(row.period, groupBy, timezone)}
                  </td>
                  <td
                    className={`py-2 px-4 border cursor-pointer ${
                      isSelected ? 'bg-blue-100' : ''
                    }`}
                    onClick={() => toggleSelection(numericValue)}
                  >
                    {formattedValue}
                  </td>
                  <td className="py-2 px-4 border">{row.count}</td>
                </tr>
              );
            })}
            <tr className="font-semibold">
              <td className="py-2 px-4 border">Total</td>
              <td className="py-2 px-4 border">{formatDollar(totalMetric)}</td>
              <td className="py-2 px-4 border">{totalCount}</td>
            </tr>
          </tbody>
        </table>
      </div>
      {selectedValues.length > 0 && (
        <div className="mt-4 p-4 bg-gray-200">
          <p className="text-lg font-semibold">
            Total of Selected: {formatDollar(totalSelected)}
          </p>
        </div>
      )}
    </div>
  );
};

export default SalesSummaryTable;

```
