FILE: client/services/accounting/SalesTransactionTable.jsx
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
```jsx
// Full path: /home/luanngo/boss-dev/client/services/accounting/SalesTransactionTable.jsx
import React, { useEffect, useMemo, useRef } from 'react';
import {
  CheckSquare,
  Copy,
  ExternalLink,
  Receipt,
  RotateCcw,
} from 'lucide-react';

import { formatCurrency, formatDateTime } from "./utils/formatAccounting";
const getStatusBadgeClass = (status) => {
  switch (String(status || '').toUpperCase()) {
    case 'COMPLETED':
      return 'badge-success';
    case 'PENDING':
      return 'badge-warning';
    case 'FAILED':
      return 'badge-error';
    case 'CANCELED':
    case 'CANCELLED':
      return 'badge-neutral';
    default:
      return 'badge-ghost';
  }
};

const getSourceBadgeClass = (sourceType) => {
  switch (String(sourceType || '').toUpperCase()) {
    case 'CARD':
      return 'badge-primary';
    case 'CASH':
      return 'badge-secondary';
    case 'EXTERNAL':
      return 'badge-accent';
    default:
      return 'badge-outline';
  }
};

const numericColumns = [
  { key: 'amount_money', label: 'Amount' },
  { key: 'tip_money', label: 'Tip' },
  { key: 'total_money', label: 'Total' },
  { key: 'processing_fee', label: 'Processing Fee' },
  { key: 'refunded_money', label: 'Refunded' },
];

const buildNumericTotals = (rows) => rows.reduce(
  (accumulator, transaction) => {
    numericColumns.forEach(({ key }) => {
      accumulator[key] += Number(transaction?.[key] || 0);
    });
    return accumulator;
  },
  numericColumns.reduce((accumulator, { key }) => ({
    ...accumulator,
    [key]: 0,
  }), {})
);

const SelectionStat = ({ label, value, tone = 'default' }) => {
  const toneClass = {
    default: 'bg-base-100 border-base-300',
    positive: 'bg-success/10 border-success/20',
    negative: 'bg-error/10 border-error/20',
    primary: 'bg-primary/10 border-primary/20',
  }[tone] || 'bg-base-100 border-base-300';

  return (
    <div className={`rounded-box border px-2 py-1.5 ${toneClass}`}>
      <div className="text-xs uppercase tracking-wide text-base-content/60">{label}</div>
      <div className="text-sm font-semibold leading-tight text-base-content">{value}</div>
    </div>
  );
};

const SalesTransactionsTable = ({
  data,
  currentPage,
  onPageChange,
  selectedIds,
  onToggleTransaction,
  onToggleAllVisible,
  onClearSelection,
  onCopySelectedIds,
  onCopySelectedRows,
  selectedCount,
  selectedTotals,
}) => {
  const { transactions = [], totalCount = 0, limit = 100 } = data || {};
  const totalPages = Math.max(1, Math.ceil(totalCount / limit));
  const headerCheckboxRef = useRef(null);

  const allVisibleSelected = transactions.length > 0 && transactions.every((tx) => selectedIds.has(tx.id));
  const someVisibleSelected = transactions.some((tx) => selectedIds.has(tx.id));

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!headerCheckboxRef.current) return;
    headerCheckboxRef.current.indeterminate = someVisibleSelected && !allVisibleSelected;
  }, [someVisibleSelected, allVisibleSelected]);

  const visibleTotals = useMemo(() => buildNumericTotals(transactions), [transactions]);

  return (
    <div className="space-y-3 text-base-content">
      <div className="rounded-box border border-base-300 bg-base-100 p-2 md:p-3">
        <div className="flex flex-wrap items-center justify-between gap-2">
          <div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-sm font-semibold" title="Selected transaction totals">
            <CheckSquare size={16} /> {selectedCount} selected
          </div>

          <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2">
            <button
              type="button"
              className="btn btn-xs md:btn-sm btn-primary"
              onClick={onCopySelectedRows}
              disabled={!selectedCount}
            >
              <Copy size={14} /> Rows
            </button>
            <button
              type="button"
              className="btn btn-xs md:btn-sm btn-outline"
              onClick={onCopySelectedIds}
              disabled={!selectedCount}
            >
              <Receipt size={14} /> IDs
            </button>
            <button
              type="button"
              className="btn btn-xs md:btn-sm btn-ghost"
              onClick={onClearSelection}
              disabled={!selectedCount}
            >
              <RotateCcw size={14} /> Clear
            </button>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div className="mt-2 grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4 xl:grid-cols-8 gap-2">
          <SelectionStat label="Count" value={selectedCount} tone="primary" />
          <SelectionStat label="Selected total" value={formatCurrency(selectedTotals.total_money)} tone="positive" />
          <SelectionStat label="Selected fees" value={formatCurrency(selectedTotals.processing_fee)} tone="negative" />
          <SelectionStat label="Page rows" value={transactions.length} />
          <SelectionStat label="All rows" value={totalCount} />
          <SelectionStat label="Page total" value={formatCurrency(visibleTotals.total_money)} tone="positive" />
          <SelectionStat label="Page fees" value={formatCurrency(visibleTotals.processing_fee)} tone="negative" />
          <SelectionStat label="Refunded" value={formatCurrency(visibleTotals.refunded_money)} tone="negative" />
        </div>
      </div>

      <div className="rounded-box border border-base-300 bg-base-100 overflow-hidden text-base-content">
        <div className="overflow-x-auto">
          <table className="table table-zebra table-pin-rows table-xs md:table-sm bg-base-100 text-base-content">
            <thead>
              <tr className="bg-base-200 text-base-content">
                <th className="w-12">
                  <input
                    ref={headerCheckboxRef}
                    type="checkbox"
                    className="checkbox checkbox-sm"
                    checked={allVisibleSelected}
                    onChange={(event) => onToggleAllVisible(transactions, event.target.checked)}
                    aria-label="Select all visible transactions"
                  />
                </th>
                <th className="text-base-content">ID</th>
                <th className="text-base-content">Date</th>
                <th className="text-right">Amount</th>
                <th className="text-right">Tip</th>
                <th className="text-right">Total</th>
                <th className="text-right">Processing Fee</th>
                <th className="text-right">Refunded</th>
                <th>Status</th>
                <th>Source</th>
                <th>Receipt</th>
                <th>Device</th>
              </tr>
            </thead>
            <tbody>
              {!transactions.length ? (
                <tr>
                  <td colSpan={12} className="py-10 text-center text-base-content/60">
                    No transactions found for this filter range.
                  </td>
                </tr>
              ) : (
                transactions.map((tx) => {
                  const isSelected = selectedIds.has(tx.id);

                  return (
                    <tr
                      key={tx.id}
                      className={`cursor-pointer text-base-content transition-colors ${isSelected ? 'bg-primary/15 hover:bg-primary/20' : 'hover:bg-base-200'}`}
                      onClick={() => onToggleTransaction(tx, !isSelected)}
                    >
                      <td onClick={(event) => event.stopPropagation()}>
                        <input
                          type="checkbox"
                          className="checkbox checkbox-sm"
                          checked={isSelected}
                          onChange={(event) => onToggleTransaction(tx, event.target.checked)}
                          aria-label={`Select transaction ${tx.id}`}
                        />
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <div className="font-medium text-base-content">{tx.id}</div>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <div className="font-medium text-base-content">{formatDateTime(tx.date)}</div>
                      </td>
                      <td className="text-right font-medium text-base-content">{formatCurrency(tx.amount_money)}</td>
                      <td className="text-right text-base-content">{formatCurrency(tx.tip_money)}</td>
                      <td className="text-right font-semibold text-base-content">{formatCurrency(tx.total_money)}</td>
                      <td className="text-right text-error">{formatCurrency(tx.processing_fee)}</td>
                      <td className="text-right text-error">{formatCurrency(tx.refunded_money)}</td>
                      <td>
                        <span className={`badge ${getStatusBadgeClass(tx.status)}`}>{tx.status || 'Unknown'}</span>
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <span className={`badge ${getSourceBadgeClass(tx.source_type)}`}>{tx.source_type || 'N/A'}</span>
                      </td>
                      <td onClick={(event) => event.stopPropagation()}>
                        {tx.receipt_url ? (
                          <a
                            href={tx.receipt_url}
                            target="_blank"
                            rel="noopener noreferrer"
                            className="btn btn-ghost btn-xs gap-1"
                          >
                            View <ExternalLink size={12} />
                          </a>
                        ) : (
                          <span className="text-base-content/50">N/A</span>
                        )}
                      </td>
                      <td>
                        <div className="font-medium text-base-content">{tx.device_name || 'N/A'}</div>
                        <div className="text-xs text-base-content/60">{tx.device_id || 'No device ID'}</div>
                      </td>
                    </tr>
                  );
                })
              )}
            </tbody>
            {!!transactions.length && (
              <tfoot>
                <tr className="bg-base-200 font-semibold text-base-content">
                  <td colSpan={3}>Visible page totals</td>
                  <td className="text-right">{formatCurrency(visibleTotals.amount_money)}</td>
                  <td className="text-right">{formatCurrency(visibleTotals.tip_money)}</td>
                  <td className="text-right">{formatCurrency(visibleTotals.total_money)}</td>
                  <td className="text-right">{formatCurrency(visibleTotals.processing_fee)}</td>
                  <td className="text-right">{formatCurrency(visibleTotals.refunded_money)}</td>
                  <td colSpan={4} />
                </tr>
              </tfoot>
            )}
          </table>
        </div>

        <div className="border-t border-base-300 px-3 py-2 flex flex-col gap-2 md:flex-row md:items-center md:justify-between bg-base-100 text-base-content">
          <div className="text-sm text-base-content/70">
            Showing {(currentPage - 1) * limit + (transactions.length ? 1 : 0)}–{(currentPage - 1) * limit + transactions.length} of {totalCount}
          </div>

          <div className="join self-start md:self-auto">
            <button
              type="button"
              onClick={() => onPageChange(currentPage - 1)}
              disabled={currentPage === 1}
              className="join-item btn btn-sm"
            >
              Previous
            </button>
            <button type="button" className="join-item btn btn-sm btn-ghost pointer-events-none">
              Page {currentPage} of {totalPages}
            </button>
            <button
              type="button"
              onClick={() => onPageChange(currentPage + 1)}
              disabled={currentPage === totalPages}
              className="join-item btn btn-sm"
            >
              Next
            </button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
};

export default SalesTransactionsTable;

```

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
FILE: client/services/accounting/t2.jsx
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
```jsx
// Full path: /home/luanngo/boss-dev/client/services/accounting/t2.jsx
import React, { useEffect, useMemo, useState } from 'react';
import moment from 'moment';
import { toast } from 'react-toastify';
import { computeFiscalYearDates, getFiscalYearStartMonth } from './utils/fiscalYear';
import { fetchWithAuth } from '@/shared/utils/fetchWithAuth';
import { formatCurrency } from './utils/formatAccounting';

const datePresets = [
  { value: 'last12months', label: 'Last 12 Months' },
  { value: 'lastYear', label: 'Last Year' },
  { value: 'thisYear', label: 'This Year' },
  { value: 'lastQuarter', label: 'Last Quarter' },
  { value: 'thisQuarter', label: 'This Quarter' },
  { value: 'lastMonth', label: 'Last Month' },
  { value: 'thisMonth', label: 'This Month' },
  { value: 'thisFiscalYear', label: 'This Fiscal Year' },
  { value: 'lastFiscalYear', label: 'Last Fiscal Year' },
];

const blankOverride = { statementPresentation: '', taxReturnPresentation: '', gifiCode: '', gifiLabel: '' };
const blankAdjustment = () => ({ description: '', amount: '' });
const blankCCAPool = () => ({ ccaClass: '', openingUCC: '', additions: '', disposals: '', manualCCAOverride: '', halfYear: true });
const blankShareholder = () => ({ name: '', shareClass: 'Common', ownershipPct: '', address: '' });
const blankInstalment = () => ({ date: '', amount: '', note: '' });

const defaultStartDate = () => moment().subtract(12, 'months').format('YYYY-MM-DD');
const defaultEndDate = () => moment().format('YYYY-MM-DD');

export default function T2Dashboard() {
  const [startDate, setStartDate] = useState(() => {
    if (typeof window === 'undefined') return defaultStartDate();
    const saved = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('t2DateRange') || 'null');
    return saved?.startDate || defaultStartDate();
  });
  const [endDate, setEndDate] = useState(() => {
    if (typeof window === 'undefined') return defaultEndDate();
    const saved = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('t2DateRange') || 'null');
    return saved?.endDate || defaultEndDate();
  });
  const [report, setReport] = useState(null);
  const [gifiMappings, setGifiMappings] = useState([]);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);
  const [saving, setSaving] = useState(false);
  const [savingMappingId, setSavingMappingId] = useState(null);
  const [draftNotes, setDraftNotes] = useState('');
  const [permanentDifferences, setPermanentDifferences] = useState([blankAdjustment()]);
  const [temporaryDifferences, setTemporaryDifferences] = useState([blankAdjustment()]);
  const [ccaAdjustments, setCcaAdjustments] = useState([blankAdjustment()]);
  const [mappingDrafts, setMappingDrafts] = useState({});
  const [fyStartMonth, setFyStartMonth] = useState(null);
  const [activeSection, setActiveSection] = useState('summary');

  const [ccaPools, setCcaPools] = useState([]);
  const [lossCarryforwards, setLossCarryforwards] = useState({ nonCapitalLosses: 0, netCapitalLosses: 0 });
  const [s1Lines, setS1Lines] = useState({});
  const [taxRates, setTaxRates] = useState({});
  const [shareholders, setShareholders] = useState([blankShareholder()]);
  const [taxInstalments, setTaxInstalments] = useState([blankInstalment()]);

  useEffect(() => { getFiscalYearStartMonth().then(setFyStartMonth).catch(() => {}); }, []);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (typeof window !== 'undefined') {
      localStorage.setItem('t2DateRange', JSON.stringify({ startDate, endDate }));
    }
  }, [startDate, endDate]);

  const applyPreset = (preset) => {
    switch (preset) {
      case 'last12months':
        setStartDate(moment().subtract(12, 'months').format('YYYY-MM-DD'));
        setEndDate(moment().format('YYYY-MM-DD'));
        break;
      case 'lastYear':
        setStartDate(moment().subtract(1, 'year').startOf('year').format('YYYY-MM-DD'));
        setEndDate(moment().subtract(1, 'year').endOf('year').format('YYYY-MM-DD'));
        break;
      case 'thisYear':
        setStartDate(moment().startOf('year').format('YYYY-MM-DD'));
        setEndDate(moment().format('YYYY-MM-DD'));
        break;
      case 'lastQuarter':
        setStartDate(moment().subtract(1, 'quarter').startOf('quarter').format('YYYY-MM-DD'));
        setEndDate(moment().subtract(1, 'quarter').endOf('quarter').format('YYYY-MM-DD'));
        break;
      case 'thisQuarter':
        setStartDate(moment().startOf('quarter').format('YYYY-MM-DD'));
        setEndDate(moment().format('YYYY-MM-DD'));
        break;
      case 'lastMonth':
        setStartDate(moment().subtract(1, 'month').startOf('month').format('YYYY-MM-DD'));
        setEndDate(moment().subtract(1, 'month').endOf('month').format('YYYY-MM-DD'));
        break;
      case 'thisMonth':
        setStartDate(moment().startOf('month').format('YYYY-MM-DD'));
        setEndDate(moment().format('YYYY-MM-DD'));
        break;
      case 'thisFiscalYear':
        if (fyStartMonth) {
          const fy = computeFiscalYearDates(fyStartMonth, new Date());
          if (fy) { setStartDate(moment(fy.from).format('YYYY-MM-DD')); setEndDate(moment(fy.to).format('YYYY-MM-DD')); }
        }
        break;
      case 'lastFiscalYear':
        if (fyStartMonth) {
          const fy = computeFiscalYearDates(fyStartMonth, new Date());
          if (fy) {
            setStartDate(moment(fy.from).subtract(1, 'year').format('YYYY-MM-DD'));
            setEndDate(moment(fy.to).subtract(1, 'year').format('YYYY-MM-DD'));
          }
        }
        break;
      default:
        break;
    }
  };

  const normalizeAdjustments = (items) => items
    .map((item) => ({ description: String(item.description || '').trim(), amount: Number(item.amount || 0) }))
    .filter((item) => item.description || item.amount);

  const loadReport = async () => {
    setLoading(true);
    try {
      const [reportResponse, mappingResponse] = await Promise.all([
        fetchWithAuth(`${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL}/accounting/t2?startDate=${startDate}&endDate=${endDate}`),
        fetchWithAuth(`${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL}/accounting/gifi-mapping`),
      ]);
      if (!reportResponse.ok) throw new Error('Failed to load T2 prep report.');
      if (!mappingResponse.ok) throw new Error('Failed to load GIFI mappings.');
      const reportData = await reportResponse.json();
      const mappingData = await mappingResponse.json();
      setReport(reportData);
      setGifiMappings(Array.isArray(mappingData.mappings) ? mappingData.mappings : []);
      setDraftNotes(reportData.reviewNotes || '');
      setPermanentDifferences(reportData.taxableIncomeBridge?.permanentDifferences?.length ? reportData.taxableIncomeBridge.permanentDifferences : [blankAdjustment()]);
      setTemporaryDifferences(reportData.taxableIncomeBridge?.temporaryDifferences?.length ? reportData.taxableIncomeBridge.temporaryDifferences : [blankAdjustment()]);
      setCcaAdjustments(reportData.taxableIncomeBridge?.ccaAdjustments?.length ? reportData.taxableIncomeBridge.ccaAdjustments : [blankAdjustment()]);
      setMappingDrafts({});

      setCcaPools(reportData.ccaSchedule?.pools?.length ? reportData.ccaSchedule.pools.map(p => ({
        poolKey: p.poolKey || '',
        ccaClass: p.ccaClass || '',
        openingUCC: p.openingUCC || '',
        additions: p.additions || '',
        disposals: p.disposals || '',
        manualCCAOverride: p.manualCCAOverride || '',
        halfYear: p.halfYear !== false,
      })) : [blankCCAPool()]);

      setLossCarryforwards(reportData.lossCarryforwards || { nonCapitalLosses: 0, netCapitalLosses: 0 });
      setS1Lines(reportData.structuredSchedule1?.lines?.reduce((acc, l) => ({ ...acc, [l.code]: l.amount }), {}) || {});
      setTaxRates(reportData.taxRates || { province: 'ON', federalSbdRate: 9, federalGeneralRate: 15, provincialSbdRate: 3.2, provincialGeneralRate: 11.5, sbdLimit: 500000 });

      setShareholders(reportData.shareholders?.length ? reportData.shareholders.map(s => ({
        name: s.name || '', shareClass: s.shareClass || 'Common', ownershipPct: s.ownershipPct || '', address: s.address || '',
      })) : [blankShareholder()]);

      setTaxInstalments(reportData.taxInstalments?.length ? reportData.taxInstalments.map(i => ({
        date: i.date || '', amount: i.amount || '', note: i.note || '',
      })) : [blankInstalment()]);
    } catch (error) {
      console.error(error);
      toast.error(error.message || 'Failed to load T2 prep report.');
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  };

  const savePrep = async () => {
    setSaving(true);
    try {
      const response = await fetchWithAuth(`${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL}/accounting/t2/prep`, {
        method: 'PUT',
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
        body: JSON.stringify({
          startDate,
          endDate,
          reviewNotes: draftNotes,
          permanentDifferences: normalizeAdjustments(permanentDifferences),
          temporaryDifferences: normalizeAdjustments(temporaryDifferences),
          ccaAdjustments: normalizeAdjustments(ccaAdjustments),
          schedule1Lines: s1Lines,
          ccaPools: Object.fromEntries(
            ccaPools.filter(p => p.ccaClass).map(p => [
              p.poolKey || String(p.ccaClass),
              {
                ccaClass: p.ccaClass,
                openingUCC: Number(p.openingUCC || 0),
                additions: Number(p.additions || 0),
                disposals: Number(p.disposals || 0),
                manualCCAOverride: Number(p.manualCCAOverride || 0),
                halfYear: p.halfYear,
              },
            ])
          ),
          lossCarryforwards,
          taxRates,
          shareholders: shareholders.filter(s => s.name),
          taxInstalments: taxInstalments.filter(i => i.date && i.amount),
        }),
      });
      if (!response.ok) throw new Error('Failed to save T2 prep data.');
      await loadReport();
      toast.success('T2 prep saved.');
    } catch (error) {
      console.error(error);
      toast.error(error.message || 'Failed to save T2 prep data.');
    } finally {
      setSaving(false);
    }
  };

  const updateAdjustment = (setter, values, index, field, nextValue) => {
    const clone = [...values];
    clone[index] = { ...clone[index], [field]: field === 'amount' ? Number(nextValue || 0) : nextValue };
    setter(clone);
  };

  const addAdjustment = (setter, values) => setter([...values, blankAdjustment()]);

  const updateCCAPool = (index, field, value) => {
    const clone = [...ccaPools];
    clone[index] = { ...clone[index], [field]: value, poolKey: field === 'ccaClass' ? String(value) : clone[index].poolKey };
    setCcaPools(clone);
  };

  const addCCAPool = () => setCcaPools([...ccaPools, blankCCAPool()]);

  const updateShareholder = (index, field, value) => {
    const clone = [...shareholders];
    clone[index] = { ...clone[index], [field]: value };
    setShareholders(clone);
  };

  const addShareholder = () => setShareholders([...shareholders, blankShareholder()]);

  const updateInstalment = (index, field, value) => {
    const clone = [...taxInstalments];
    clone[index] = { ...clone[index], [field]: value };
    setTaxInstalments(clone);
  };

  const addInstalment = () => setTaxInstalments([...taxInstalments, blankInstalment()]);

  const saveMapping = async (accountId) => {
    setSavingMappingId(accountId);
    try {
      const response = await fetchWithAuth(`${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL}/accounting/gifi-mapping/${accountId}`, {
        method: 'PUT', headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
        body: JSON.stringify(mappingDrafts[accountId] || blankOverride),
      });
      if (!response.ok) throw new Error('Failed to save GIFI mapping.');
      await loadReport();
      toast.success('GIFI mapping saved.');
    } catch (error) {
      console.error(error);
      toast.error(error.message || 'Failed to save GIFI mapping.');
    } finally {
      setSavingMappingId(null);
    }
  };

  const editableMappings = useMemo(() => {
    const balancesByAccount = new Map((report?.gifiExport || []).map((item) => [String(item.accountId), item.balance]));
    return gifiMappings.map((mapping) => ({
      ...mapping,
      balance: balancesByAccount.get(String(mapping.accountId)) ?? 0,
      draft: {
        statementPresentation: mappingDrafts[mapping.accountId]?.statementPresentation ?? mapping.statementPresentation ?? '',
        taxReturnPresentation: mappingDrafts[mapping.accountId]?.taxReturnPresentation ?? mapping.taxReturnPresentation ?? '',
        gifiCode: mappingDrafts[mapping.accountId]?.gifiCode ?? mapping.gifiCode ?? '',
        gifiLabel: mappingDrafts[mapping.accountId]?.gifiLabel ?? mapping.gifiLabel ?? '',
      },
    }));
  }, [gifiMappings, mappingDrafts, report]);

  const handleDownloadCSV = async () => {
    try {
      const res = await fetchWithAuth(`${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL}/accounting/t2/export?startDate=${startDate}&endDate=${endDate}`);
      if (!res.ok) throw new Error('Export failed');
      const blob = await res.blob();
      const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
      const a = document.createElement('a'); a.href = url;
      a.download = `t2_${startDate}_to_${endDate}.csv`;
      document.body.appendChild(a); a.click();
      document.body.removeChild(a); URL.revokeObjectURL(url);
      toast.success('T2 package downloaded.');
    } catch (e) { toast.error('Export failed.'); }
  };

  const sectionTabs = [
    { key: 'summary', label: 'Summary' },
    { key: 'income-statement', label: 'Income Statement' },
    { key: 'schedule1', label: 'Schedule 1' },
    { key: 'cca', label: 'CCA (Sch 8)' },
    { key: 'losses', label: 'Losses' },
    { key: 'retained', label: 'Retained Earnings' },
    { key: 'taxcalc', label: 'Tax Calc' },
    { key: 'shareholders', label: 'Shareholders' },
    { key: 'instalments', label: 'Instalments' },
    { key: 'gifi', label: 'GIFI Mapping' },
  ];

  return (
    <div className="space-y-6">
      <div className="card bg-base-100 shadow-xl border border-base-300">
        <div className="card-body gap-4">
          <div>
            <h2 className="card-title text-2xl">T2 Corporate Tax Return</h2>
            <p className="text-sm text-base-content/70">
              Working papers for Schedule 100 (balance sheet), Schedule 125 (income statement), Schedule 1 (reconciliation), Schedule 8 (CCA), GIFI export, retained earnings continuity, and tax estimate.
            </p>
          </div>
          <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-3 items-end">
            <label className="form-control">
              <span className="label-text mb-1">Preset</span>
              <select className="select select-bordered" onChange={(e) => applyPreset(e.target.value)} defaultValue="">
                <option value="">Select a preset...</option>
                {datePresets.filter((p) => !p.value.includes('FiscalYear') || fyStartMonth).map((preset) => (
                  <option key={preset.value} value={preset.value}>{preset.label}</option>
                ))}
              </select>
            </label>
            <label className="form-control"><span className="label-text mb-1">Fiscal year start</span>
              <input type="date" className="input input-bordered" value={startDate} onChange={(e) => setStartDate(e.target.value)} /></label>
            <label className="form-control"><span className="label-text mb-1">Fiscal year end</span>
              <input type="date" className="input input-bordered" value={endDate} onChange={(e) => setEndDate(e.target.value)} /></label>
            <button type="button" className={`btn btn-primary ${loading ? 'btn-disabled' : ''}`} onClick={loadReport}>Refresh</button>
            <button type="button" className={`btn btn-outline ${saving ? 'btn-disabled' : ''}`} onClick={savePrep}>Save Prep</button>
            <button type="button" className="btn btn-ghost btn-sm" onClick={handleDownloadCSV}>Export CSV</button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      {loading && <div className="flex justify-center p-10"><span className="loading loading-spinner loading-lg" /></div>}

      {report && !loading && (
        <>
          <div className="grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4 xl:grid-cols-7 gap-3">
            <div className="stat bg-base-100 shadow border border-base-300 rounded-box p-3"><div className="stat-title text-xs">Book net income</div><div className="stat-value text-lg">{formatCurrency(report.bookNetIncome)}</div></div>
            <div className="stat bg-base-100 shadow border border-base-300 rounded-box p-3"><div className="stat-title text-xs">Taxable income</div><div className="stat-value text-lg">{formatCurrency(report.taxableIncomeBridge?.taxableIncome)}</div></div>
            <div className="stat bg-base-100 shadow border border-base-300 rounded-box p-3"><div className="stat-title text-xs">Est. tax</div><div className="stat-value text-lg">{formatCurrency(report.estimatedTax?.totalTax)}</div></div>
            <div className="stat bg-base-100 shadow border border-base-300 rounded-box p-3"><div className="stat-title text-xs">Balance due</div><div className="stat-value text-lg">{formatCurrency(report.taxBalanceDue)}</div></div>
            <div className="stat bg-base-100 shadow border border-base-300 rounded-box p-3"><div className="stat-title text-xs">Assets</div><div className="stat-value text-lg">{formatCurrency(report.balanceSheet?.totals?.assets)}</div></div>
            <div className="stat bg-base-100 shadow border border-base-300 rounded-box p-3"><div className="stat-title text-xs">Liabilities</div><div className="stat-value text-lg">{formatCurrency(report.balanceSheet?.totals?.liabilities)}</div></div>
            <div className="stat bg-base-100 shadow border border-base-300 rounded-box p-3"><div className="stat-title text-xs">Closing RE</div><div className="stat-value text-lg">{formatCurrency(report.retainedEarnings?.closingRetainedEarnings)}</div></div>
          </div>

          <div className="tabs tabs-boxed">
            {sectionTabs.map(t => (
              <button key={t.key} className={`tab tab-sm ${activeSection === t.key ? 'tab-active' : ''}`} onClick={() => setActiveSection(t.key)}>{t.label}</button>
            ))}
          </div>

          {activeSection === 'summary' && (
            <div className="grid grid-cols-1 xl:grid-cols-2 gap-6">
              <div className="card bg-base-100 shadow-xl border border-base-300">
                <div className="card-body">
                  <h3 className="card-title text-lg">Taxable income bridge</h3>
                  <table className="table table-sm">
                    <tbody>
                      <tr><td>Book net income</td><td className="text-right">{formatCurrency(report.taxableIncomeBridge?.bookNetIncome)}</td></tr>
                      <tr><td>Permanent differences</td><td className="text-right">{formatCurrency(report.taxableIncomeBridge?.permanentTotal)}</td></tr>
                      <tr><td>Temporary differences</td><td className="text-right">{formatCurrency(report.taxableIncomeBridge?.temporaryTotal)}</td></tr>
                      <tr><td>CCA adjustments</td><td className="text-right">{formatCurrency(report.taxableIncomeBridge?.ccaTotal)}</td></tr>
                      <tr><td>Override adjustment</td><td className="text-right">{formatCurrency(report.taxableIncomeBridge?.overrideAdjustment)}</td></tr>
                      <tr className="font-semibold"><td>Taxable income</td><td className="text-right">{formatCurrency(report.taxableIncomeBridge?.taxableIncome)}</td></tr>
                    </tbody>
                  </table>
                </div>
              </div>
              <div className="card bg-base-100 shadow-xl border border-base-300">
                <div className="card-body">
                  <h3 className="card-title text-lg">Estimated Tax</h3>
                  <table className="table table-sm">
                    <tbody>
                      <tr><td className="text-xs text-base-content/60">Province</td><td>{report.estimatedTax?.province || 'ON'}</td></tr>
                      <tr><td className="text-xs text-base-content/60">SBD income</td><td className="text-right">{formatCurrency(report.estimatedTax?.sbdIncome)}</td></tr>
                      <tr><td className="text-xs text-base-content/60">General income</td><td className="text-right">{formatCurrency(report.estimatedTax?.generalIncome)}</td></tr>
                      <tr><td>Federal tax</td><td className="text-right">{formatCurrency(report.estimatedTax?.federalTax)}</td></tr>
                      <tr><td>Provincial tax</td><td className="text-right">{formatCurrency(report.estimatedTax?.provincialTax)}</td></tr>
                      <tr className="font-semibold"><td>Total tax</td><td className="text-right">{formatCurrency(report.estimatedTax?.totalTax)}</td></tr>
                      <tr><td>Instalments paid</td><td className="text-right">{formatCurrency(report.instalmentsPaid)}</td></tr>
                      <tr className="font-bold text-lg"><td>Balance due (refund)</td><td className="text-right">{formatCurrency(report.taxBalanceDue)}</td></tr>
                    </tbody>
                  </table>
                </div>
              </div>
              <div className="card bg-base-100 shadow-xl border border-base-300">
                <div className="card-body">
                  <div className="flex items-center justify-between"><h3 className="card-title text-lg">Permanent differences</h3><button type="button" className="btn btn-sm btn-outline" onClick={() => addAdjustment(setPermanentDifferences, permanentDifferences)}>Add</button></div>
                  {permanentDifferences.map((item, i) => (
                    <div key={i} className="grid grid-cols-[1fr_140px] gap-2">
                      <input className="input input-bordered input-sm" placeholder="Description" value={item.description} onChange={e => updateAdjustment(setPermanentDifferences, permanentDifferences, i, 'description', e.target.value)} />
                      <input className="input input-bordered input-sm" type="number" step="0.01" placeholder="Amount" value={item.amount} onChange={e => updateAdjustment(setPermanentDifferences, permanentDifferences, i, 'amount', e.target.value)} />
                    </div>
                  ))}
                </div>
              </div>
              <div className="card bg-base-100 shadow-xl border border-base-300">
                <div className="card-body">
                  <div className="flex items-center justify-between"><h3 className="card-title text-lg">Temporary differences</h3><button type="button" className="btn btn-sm btn-outline" onClick={() => addAdjustment(setTemporaryDifferences, temporaryDifferences)}>Add</button></div>
                  {temporaryDifferences.map((item, i) => (
                    <div key={i} className="grid grid-cols-[1fr_140px] gap-2">
                      <input className="input input-bordered input-sm" placeholder="Description" value={item.description} onChange={e => updateAdjustment(setTemporaryDifferences, temporaryDifferences, i, 'description', e.target.value)} />
                      <input className="input input-bordered input-sm" type="number" step="0.01" placeholder="Amount" value={item.amount} onChange={e => updateAdjustment(setTemporaryDifferences, temporaryDifferences, i, 'amount', e.target.value)} />
                    </div>
                  ))}
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          )}

          {activeSection === 'income-statement' && (
            <div className="card bg-base-100 shadow-xl border border-base-300">
              <div className="card-body gap-4">
                <h3 className="card-title text-lg">Income Statement (Schedule 125)</h3>
                <p className="text-sm text-base-content/70">
                  Statement of comprehensive income for the period {report.fiscalYear?.startDate || startDate} to {report.fiscalYear?.endDate || endDate}.
                </p>
                {report.profitLoss?.sections?.map((section) => (
                  <div key={section.groupKey} className="overflow-x-auto">
                    <table className="table table-sm">
                      <thead>
                        <tr className="bg-base-200">
                          <th className="font-semibold text-base">{section.label}</th>
                          <th className="text-right font-semibold text-base">{formatCurrency(section.totalAmount)}</th>
                        </tr>
                      </thead>
                      <tbody>
                        {section.lines.map((line, i) => (
                          <tr key={i}>
                            <td className="pl-6 text-sm">{line.statementLine}</td>
                            <td className="text-right text-sm">{formatCurrency(line.totalAmount)}</td>
                          </tr>
                        ))}
                      </tbody>
                    </table>
                  </div>
                ))}
                <div className="overflow-x-auto">
                  <table className="table table-sm">
                    <tfoot>
                      <tr className="bg-base-200 font-bold text-base">
                        <td>Net Income (Loss)</td>
                        <td className="text-right">{formatCurrency(report.profitLoss?.totals?.netIncome)}</td>
                      </tr>
                    </tfoot>
                  </table>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          )}

          {activeSection === 'schedule1' && (
            <div className="card bg-base-100 shadow-xl border border-base-300">
              <div className="card-body gap-4">
                <h3 className="card-title text-lg">Schedule 1 — Net Income for Tax Purposes</h3>
                <p className="text-sm text-base-content/70">Reconcile book net income to taxable income. Enter amounts to add or deduct.</p>
                <div className="overflow-x-auto">
                  <table className="table table-sm">
                    <thead><tr><th>Line</th><th>Description</th><th className="text-right">Amount</th><th className="text-right w-32">Override</th></tr></thead>
                    <tbody>
                      <tr className="bg-base-200"><td></td><td className="font-semibold">Net income per financial statements</td><td className="text-right font-semibold">{formatCurrency(report.bookNetIncome)}</td><td></td></tr>
                      {(report.structuredSchedule1?.lines || []).map((line) => (
                        <tr key={line.code} className={line.divider ? 'bg-base-200' : ''}>
                          <td className="text-xs text-base-content/50">{line.code}</td>
                          <td className={line.divider ? 'font-semibold' : ''}>
                            {line.label}
                            {line.hint && <span className="text-xs text-base-content/40 ml-2">({line.hint})</span>}
                          </td>
                          <td className="text-right">{line.divider ? '' : formatCurrency(line.amount)}</td>
                          <td>
                            {line.editable && !line.divider && (
                              <input className="input input-bordered input-sm w-32 text-right" type="number" step="0.01"
                                value={s1Lines[line.code] ?? line.amount ?? ''}
                                onChange={e => setS1Lines(prev => ({ ...prev, [line.code]: Number(e.target.value || 0) }))} />
                            )}
                          </td>
                        </tr>
                      ))}
                      <tr className="bg-base-200 font-bold">
                        <td></td><td>Net income for tax purposes (taxable income)</td>
                        <td className="text-right">{formatCurrency(report.structuredSchedule1?.taxableIncome)}</td><td></td>
                      </tr>
                    </tbody>
                  </table>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          )}

          {activeSection === 'cca' && (
            <div className="card bg-base-100 shadow-xl border border-base-300">
              <div className="card-body gap-4">
                <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
                  <div>
                    <h3 className="card-title text-lg">CCA Schedule (Schedule 8)</h3>
                    <p className="text-sm text-base-content/70">Capital Cost Allowance by class. Opening UCC + Additions - Disposals = basis for CCA at the class rate.</p>
                  </div>
                  <button type="button" className="btn btn-sm btn-outline" onClick={addCCAPool}>Add class</button>
                </div>
                <div className="overflow-x-auto">
                  <table className="table table-sm">
                    <thead>
                      <tr>
                        <th>CCA Class</th><th>Rate</th><th>Opening UCC</th><th>Additions</th><th>Disposals</th>
                        <th>Half-year</th><th className="text-right">Computed CCA</th><th className="text-right">Manual Override</th><th className="text-right">Closing UCC</th>
                      </tr>
                    </thead>
                    <tbody>
                      {(report.ccaSchedule?.pools || []).map((pool, i) => (
                        <tr key={pool.poolKey || i}>
                          <td><input className="input input-bordered input-sm w-20" value={ccaPools[i]?.ccaClass || ''} onChange={e => updateCCAPool(i, 'ccaClass', e.target.value)} placeholder="e.g. 8" /></td>
                          <td className="text-xs">{(Number(pool.rate) * 100).toFixed(0)}%</td>
                          <td><input className="input input-bordered input-sm w-28 text-right" type="number" step="0.01" value={ccaPools[i]?.openingUCC} onChange={e => updateCCAPool(i, 'openingUCC', e.target.value)} /></td>
                          <td><input className="input input-bordered input-sm w-28 text-right" type="number" step="0.01" value={ccaPools[i]?.additions} onChange={e => updateCCAPool(i, 'additions', e.target.value)} /></td>
                          <td><input className="input input-bordered input-sm w-28 text-right" type="number" step="0.01" value={ccaPools[i]?.disposals} onChange={e => updateCCAPool(i, 'disposals', e.target.value)} /></td>
                          <td><input type="checkbox" className="checkbox checkbox-sm" checked={ccaPools[i]?.halfYear !== false} onChange={e => updateCCAPool(i, 'halfYear', e.target.checked)} /></td>
                          <td className="text-right">{formatCurrency(pool.computedCCA)}</td>
                          <td><input className="input input-bordered input-sm w-28 text-right" type="number" step="0.01" value={ccaPools[i]?.manualCCAOverride} onChange={e => updateCCAPool(i, 'manualCCAOverride', e.target.value)} /></td>
                          <td className="text-right font-semibold">{formatCurrency(pool.closingUCC)}</td>
                        </tr>
                      ))}
                    </tbody>
                    <tfoot>
                      <tr className="font-semibold">
                        <td colSpan="6">Total</td>
                        <td className="text-right">{formatCurrency(report.ccaSchedule?.totals?.autoCCA)}</td>
                        <td className="text-right">{formatCurrency(report.ccaSchedule?.totals?.manualCCA)}</td>
                        <td className="text-right">{formatCurrency(report.ccaSchedule?.totals?.totalClaimedCCA)}</td>
                      </tr>
                    </tfoot>
                  </table>
                </div>
                <div className="mt-4">
                  <h4 className="font-semibold mb-2">Manual CCA adjustments (freeform)</h4>
                  <button type="button" className="btn btn-sm btn-outline mb-2" onClick={() => addAdjustment(setCcaAdjustments, ccaAdjustments)}>Add</button>
                  {ccaAdjustments.map((item, i) => (
                    <div key={i} className="grid grid-cols-[1fr_140px] gap-2 mb-2">
                      <input className="input input-bordered input-sm" placeholder="Description" value={item.description} onChange={e => updateAdjustment(setCcaAdjustments, ccaAdjustments, i, 'description', e.target.value)} />
                      <input className="input input-bordered input-sm" type="number" step="0.01" placeholder="Amount" value={item.amount} onChange={e => updateAdjustment(setCcaAdjustments, ccaAdjustments, i, 'amount', e.target.value)} />
                    </div>
                  ))}
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          )}

          {activeSection === 'losses' && (
            <div className="card bg-base-100 shadow-xl border border-base-300">
              <div className="card-body gap-4">
                <h3 className="card-title text-lg">Loss Carryforwards</h3>
                <p className="text-sm text-base-content/70">Track non-capital and net capital loss balances. Non-capital losses can be carried back 3 years and forward 20 years.</p>
                <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-4">
                  <div className="form-control">
                    <label className="label"><span className="label-text">Non-capital losses carried forward</span></label>
                    <input className="input input-bordered" type="number" step="0.01"
                      value={lossCarryforwards.nonCapitalLosses} onChange={e => setLossCarryforwards(prev => ({ ...prev, nonCapitalLosses: Number(e.target.value || 0) }))} />
                  </div>
                  <div className="form-control">
                    <label className="label"><span className="label-text">Net capital losses carried forward</span></label>
                    <input className="input input-bordered" type="number" step="0.01"
                      value={lossCarryforwards.netCapitalLosses} onChange={e => setLossCarryforwards(prev => ({ ...prev, netCapitalLosses: Number(e.target.value || 0) }))} />
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          )}

          {activeSection === 'retained' && (
            <div className="card bg-base-100 shadow-xl border border-base-300">
              <div className="card-body gap-4">
                <h3 className="card-title text-lg">Retained Earnings Continuity</h3>
                <div className="overflow-x-auto">
                  <table className="table table-sm">
                    <tbody>
                      <tr><td>Opening retained earnings</td><td className="text-right">{formatCurrency(report.retainedEarnings?.openingRetainedEarnings)}</td></tr>
                      <tr><td>Current-year net income</td><td className="text-right">{formatCurrency(report.retainedEarnings?.currentYearNetIncome)}</td></tr>
                      <tr><td>Owner contributions</td><td className="text-right">{formatCurrency(report.retainedEarnings?.ownerContributions)}</td></tr>
                      <tr><td>Owner draws</td><td className="text-right">{formatCurrency(report.retainedEarnings?.ownerDraws)}</td></tr>
                      <tr className="font-semibold"><td>Closing retained earnings (actual)</td><td className="text-right">{formatCurrency(report.retainedEarnings?.closingRetainedEarnings)}</td></tr>
                      <tr><td className="text-warning">Expected closing retained earnings</td><td className="text-right text-warning">{formatCurrency(report.retainedEarnings?.expectedClosingRetainedEarnings)}</td></tr>
                    </tbody>
                  </table>
                </div>
                {report.retainedEarnings?.expectedClosingRetainedEarnings !== report.retainedEarnings?.closingRetainedEarnings && (
                  <div className="alert alert-warning text-sm">
                    Expected closing RE ({formatCurrency(report.retainedEarnings?.expectedClosingRetainedEarnings)}) differs from actual closing RE ({formatCurrency(report.retainedEarnings?.closingRetainedEarnings)}). Review the retained earnings account (3660) and any manual journals.
                  </div>
                )}
              </div>
            </div>
          )}

          {activeSection === 'taxcalc' && (
            <div className="card bg-base-100 shadow-xl border border-base-300">
              <div className="card-body gap-4">
                <h3 className="card-title text-lg">Tax Rate Configuration</h3>
                <p className="text-sm text-base-content/70">Configure the rates used to estimate corporate income tax. Defaults are for Ontario CCPC.</p>
                <div className="grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4 gap-3">
                  <div className="form-control">
                    <label className="label"><span className="label-text">Province</span></label>
                    <select className="select select-bordered" value={taxRates.province || 'ON'}
                      onChange={e => setTaxRates(prev => ({ ...prev, province: e.target.value }))}>
                      <option value="ON">Ontario</option><option value="BC">British Columbia</option><option value="AB">Alberta</option>
                      <option value="QC">Quebec</option><option value="MB">Manitoba</option><option value="SK">Saskatchewan</option>
                      <option value="NS">Nova Scotia</option><option value="NB">New Brunswick</option><option value="NL">Newfoundland</option>
                      <option value="PE">PEI</option>
                    </select>
                  </div>
                  <div className="form-control">
                    <label className="label"><span className="label-text">Federal SBD rate (%)</span></label>
                    <input className="input input-bordered" type="number" step="0.1"
                      value={taxRates.federalSbdRate || 9} onChange={e => setTaxRates(prev => ({ ...prev, federalSbdRate: Number(e.target.value || 0) }))} />
                  </div>
                  <div className="form-control">
                    <label className="label"><span className="label-text">Federal general rate (%)</span></label>
                    <input className="input input-bordered" type="number" step="0.1"
                      value={taxRates.federalGeneralRate || 15} onChange={e => setTaxRates(prev => ({ ...prev, federalGeneralRate: Number(e.target.value || 0) }))} />
                  </div>
                  <div className="form-control">
                    <label className="label"><span className="label-text">Provincial SBD rate (%)</span></label>
                    <input className="input input-bordered" type="number" step="0.1"
                      value={taxRates.provincialSbdRate || 3.2} onChange={e => setTaxRates(prev => ({ ...prev, provincialSbdRate: Number(e.target.value || 0) }))} />
                  </div>
                  <div className="form-control">
                    <label className="label"><span className="label-text">Provincial general rate (%)</span></label>
                    <input className="input input-bordered" type="number" step="0.1"
                      value={taxRates.provincialGeneralRate || 11.5} onChange={e => setTaxRates(prev => ({ ...prev, provincialGeneralRate: Number(e.target.value || 0) }))} />
                  </div>
                  <div className="form-control">
                    <label className="label"><span className="label-text">SBD limit ($)</span></label>
                    <input className="input input-bordered" type="number"
                      value={taxRates.sbdLimit || 500000} onChange={e => setTaxRates(prev => ({ ...prev, sbdLimit: Number(e.target.value || 0) }))} />
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          )}

          {activeSection === 'shareholders' && (
            <div className="card bg-base-100 shadow-xl border border-base-300">
              <div className="card-body gap-4">
                <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
                  <div>
                    <h3 className="card-title text-lg">Shareholders (Schedule 50)</h3>
                    <p className="text-sm text-base-content/70">Record shareholders, share classes, and ownership percentages.</p>
                  </div>
                  <button type="button" className="btn btn-sm btn-outline" onClick={addShareholder}>Add shareholder</button>
                </div>
                <div className="overflow-x-auto">
                  <table className="table table-sm">
                    <thead><tr><th>Name</th><th>Share Class</th><th className="text-right">Ownership %</th><th>Address</th></tr></thead>
                    <tbody>
                      {shareholders.map((s, i) => (
                        <tr key={i}>
                          <td><input className="input input-bordered input-sm min-w-[160px]" value={s.name} onChange={e => updateShareholder(i, 'name', e.target.value)} placeholder="Shareholder name" /></td>
                          <td><select className="select select-bordered select-sm" value={s.shareClass} onChange={e => updateShareholder(i, 'shareClass', e.target.value)}>
                            <option>Common</option><option>Preferred</option><option>Class A</option><option>Class B</option><option>Class C</option>
                          </select></td>
                          <td><input className="input input-bordered input-sm w-20 text-right" type="number" step="0.01" value={s.ownershipPct} onChange={e => updateShareholder(i, 'ownershipPct', e.target.value)} /></td>
                          <td><input className="input input-bordered input-sm min-w-[200px]" value={s.address} onChange={e => updateShareholder(i, 'address', e.target.value)} placeholder="Address" /></td>
                        </tr>
                      ))}
                    </tbody>
                  </table>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          )}

          {activeSection === 'instalments' && (
            <div className="card bg-base-100 shadow-xl border border-base-300">
              <div className="card-body gap-4">
                <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
                  <div>
                    <h3 className="card-title text-lg">Tax Instalments</h3>
                    <p className="text-sm text-base-content/70">Record corporate tax instalment payments made during the year.</p>
                  </div>
                  <button type="button" className="btn btn-sm btn-outline" onClick={addInstalment}>Add instalment</button>
                </div>
                <div className="overflow-x-auto">
                  <table className="table table-sm">
                    <thead><tr><th>Date</th><th className="text-right">Amount</th><th>Note</th></tr></thead>
                    <tbody>
                      {taxInstalments.map((inst, i) => (
                        <tr key={i}>
                          <td><input className="input input-bordered input-sm" type="date" value={inst.date} onChange={e => updateInstalment(i, 'date', e.target.value)} /></td>
                          <td><input className="input input-bordered input-sm w-32 text-right" type="number" step="0.01" value={inst.amount} onChange={e => updateInstalment(i, 'amount', e.target.value)} /></td>
                          <td><input className="input input-bordered input-sm min-w-[200px]" value={inst.note} onChange={e => updateInstalment(i, 'note', e.target.value)} placeholder="e.g. Q1 2025 instalment" /></td>
                        </tr>
                      ))}
                    </tbody>
                    <tfoot>
                      <tr className="font-semibold">
                        <td>Total paid</td><td className="text-right">{formatCurrency(taxInstalments.reduce((sum, i) => sum + Number(i.amount || 0), 0))}</td><td></td>
                      </tr>
                    </tfoot>
                  </table>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          )}

          {activeSection === 'gifi' && (
            <div className="card bg-base-100 shadow-xl border border-base-300">
              <div className="card-body gap-4">
                <div>
                  <h3 className="card-title text-lg">GIFI Mapping Workspace</h3>
                  <p className="text-sm text-base-content/70">
                    Map chart of accounts to CRA GIFI codes, statement presentation, and tax return presentation. Save overrides per account.
                  </p>
                </div>
                <div className="overflow-x-auto max-h-[520px]">
                  <table className="table table-pin-rows table-sm">
                    <thead>
                      <tr>
                        <th>Account</th><th>Statement</th><th>Tax return</th><th>GIFI code</th><th>GIFI label</th>
                        <th className="text-right">Balance</th><th></th>
                      </tr>
                    </thead>
                    <tbody>
                      {editableMappings.map((item) => (
                        <tr key={item.accountId}>
                          <td className="min-w-[240px]">{item.code} — {item.description}</td>
                          <td><input className="input input-bordered input-sm min-w-[200px]" value={item.draft.statementPresentation} onChange={(e) => setMappingDrafts((current) => ({ ...current, [item.accountId]: { ...(current[item.accountId] || blankOverride), statementPresentation: e.target.value, taxReturnPresentation: item.draft.taxReturnPresentation, gifiCode: item.draft.gifiCode, gifiLabel: item.draft.gifiLabel } }))} /></td>
                          <td><input className="input input-bordered input-sm min-w-[200px]" value={item.draft.taxReturnPresentation} onChange={(e) => setMappingDrafts((current) => ({ ...current, [item.accountId]: { ...(current[item.accountId] || blankOverride), statementPresentation: item.draft.statementPresentation, taxReturnPresentation: e.target.value, gifiCode: item.draft.gifiCode, gifiLabel: item.draft.gifiLabel } }))} /></td>
                          <td><input className="input input-bordered input-sm w-24" value={item.draft.gifiCode} onChange={(e) => setMappingDrafts((current) => ({ ...current, [item.accountId]: { ...(current[item.accountId] || blankOverride), statementPresentation: item.draft.statementPresentation, taxReturnPresentation: item.draft.taxReturnPresentation, gifiCode: e.target.value, gifiLabel: item.draft.gifiLabel } }))} /></td>
                          <td><input className="input input-bordered input-sm min-w-[150px]" value={item.draft.gifiLabel} onChange={(e) => setMappingDrafts((current) => ({ ...current, [item.accountId]: { ...(current[item.accountId] || blankOverride), statementPresentation: item.draft.statementPresentation, taxReturnPresentation: item.draft.taxReturnPresentation, gifiCode: item.draft.gifiCode, gifiLabel: e.target.value } }))} /></td>
                          <td className="text-right">{formatCurrency(item.balance)}</td>
                          <td><button type="button" className={`btn btn-xs btn-outline ${savingMappingId === item.accountId ? 'btn-disabled' : ''}`} onClick={() => saveMapping(item.accountId)}>Save</button></td>
                        </tr>
                      ))}
                    </tbody>
                  </table>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          )}

          <div className="card bg-base-100 shadow-xl border border-base-300">
            <div className="card-body gap-4">
              <h3 className="card-title text-lg">Review notes and overrides</h3>
              <textarea className="textarea textarea-bordered min-h-[140px]" value={draftNotes} onChange={(e) => setDraftNotes(e.target.value)}
                placeholder="Add filing notes, review comments, CRA follow-up items, and assumptions here." />
            </div>
          </div>
        </>
      )}
    </div>
  );
}

```

```js
// Full path: /home/luanngo/boss-dev/client/services/accounting/utils/AccountingDisplayComponents.js
import React from 'react';

export function AccountingLoadingState() {
  return (
    <div className="flex justify-center items-center py-16">
      <div className="flex flex-col items-center gap-3">
        <div className="relative">
          <div className="w-10 h-10 border-4 border-indigo-100 border-t-indigo-500 rounded-full animate-spin" />
        </div>
        <span className="text-sm text-slate-400">Loading...</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

export function AccountingEmptyState({ icon: Icon, title, description, action }) {
  return (
    <div className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center py-16 px-4">
      <div className="rounded-2xl bg-slate-50 border border-slate-200 p-4 mb-4">
        <Icon size={40} className="text-slate-300" />
      </div>
      <h3 className="text-lg font-semibold text-slate-800 mb-1">{title}</h3>
      <p className="text-sm text-slate-500 text-center max-w-sm mb-4">{description}</p>
      {action}
    </div>
  );
}

export function AccountingSection({ title, icon: Icon, children, className = '' }) {
  return (
    <div className={`rounded-box border border-base-300 bg-base-200/60 p-4 space-y-3 ${className}`}>
      {title ? (
        <div className="font-semibold flex items-center gap-2">
          {Icon ? <Icon size={16} /> : null}
          {title}
        </div>
      ) : null}
      {children}
    </div>
  );
}

export function AccountingStatCard({ label, value, description, tone = 'default', icon: Icon, sublabel }) {
  const toneClasses = {
    default: 'bg-base-100 border-base-300',
    primary: 'bg-primary/10 border-primary/20',
    success: 'bg-success/10 border-success/20',
    accent: 'bg-accent/10 border-accent/20',
    positive: 'bg-success/10 border-success/20',
    negative: 'bg-error/10 border-error/20',
  };

  const cardClass = toneClasses[tone] || toneClasses.default;

  if (sublabel !== undefined) {
    const gradientColors = {
      default: 'from-slate-50 to-slate-100/50 border-slate-200 text-slate-700',
      primary: 'from-indigo-50 to-indigo-100/50 border-indigo-200 text-indigo-700',
      success: 'from-emerald-50 to-emerald-100/50 border-emerald-200 text-emerald-700',
      accent: 'from-amber-50 to-amber-100/50 border-amber-200 text-amber-700',
      positive: 'from-emerald-50 to-emerald-100/50 border-emerald-200 text-emerald-700',
      negative: 'from-red-50 to-red-100/50 border-red-200 text-red-700',
    };
    const iconColorClasses = {
      default: 'text-slate-500 bg-slate-100',
      primary: 'text-indigo-500 bg-indigo-100',
      success: 'text-emerald-500 bg-emerald-100',
      accent: 'text-amber-500 bg-amber-100',
      positive: 'text-emerald-500 bg-emerald-100',
      negative: 'text-red-500 bg-red-100',
    };
    const gradClass = gradientColors[tone] || gradientColors.default;
    const iconColorClass = iconColorClasses[tone] || iconColorClasses.default;
    return (
      <div className={`rounded-xl border bg-gradient-to-br p-4 ${gradClass}`}>
        <div className="flex items-start justify-between">
          <div className="space-y-1">
            <div className="text-xs font-medium opacity-70">{label}</div>
            <div className="text-2xl font-bold tracking-tight">{value}</div>
            {sublabel ? <div className="text-xs opacity-60">{sublabel}</div> : null}
          </div>
          {Icon ? (
            <div className={`rounded-lg p-2 ${iconColorClass}`}>
              <Icon size={18} />
            </div>
          ) : null}
        </div>
      </div>
    );
  }

  return (
    <div className={`rounded-box border p-3 ${cardClass}`} title={description || label}>
      <div className="flex items-start justify-between gap-3">
        <div>
          <div className="text-xs text-base-content/65">{label}</div>
          <div className="text-lg md:text-xl font-semibold leading-tight">{value}</div>
        </div>
        {Icon ? <Icon size={18} className="text-base-content/55 mt-1" /> : null}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}
```

FILE: client/services/accounting/utils/AccountingJournalTemplateView.js

```js
// Full path: /home/luanngo/boss-dev/client/services/accounting/utils/AccountingJournalTemplateView.js
import React from 'react';

const SOURCE_ACCOUNT_CODE_BY_TYPE = {
  CREDIT_CARD: '2690',
  CHEQUING_ACCOUNT: '1001',
};

const PURCHASE_ITC_TREATMENTS = new Set(['INPUT_TAX_CREDIT']);
const SALES_TAX_TREATMENTS = new Set(['TAXABLE_SALE']);
const TAX_REMITTANCE_TREATMENTS = new Set(['HST_REMITTANCE']);

const findAccountByCode = (accounts = [], code) =>
  accounts.find((account) => String(account.code) === String(code)) || null;

const resolveAccountForLine = (line = {}, accounts = []) => {
  const accountCode = String(line.accountCode || line.code || '').trim();
  const accountId = String(line.accountId || '').trim();
  return accounts.find((account) =>
    (accountCode && String(account.code) === accountCode) ||
    (accountCode && String(account.id) === accountCode) ||
    (accountId && String(account.id) === accountId)
  ) || null;
};

const findExpenseTaxAccount = (accounts = []) =>
  accounts.find((account) => /expense tax clearing|input tax|hst recoverable|gst\/hst recoverable|itc/i.test(String(account.description || ''))) ||
  findAccountByCode(accounts, '1240') ||
  findAccountByCode(accounts, '1066') ||
  null;

const findSalesTaxAccount = (accounts = []) =>
  accounts.find((account) => /taxes payable|hst payable|gst\/hst payable|sales tax|output tax/i.test(String(account.description || ''))) ||
  findAccountByCode(accounts, '2640') ||
  null;

export const templateLine = (account, side, amountFormula) => ({
  accountId: account?.id || '',
  accountCode: account?.code || '',
  accountDescription: account?.description || '',
  side,
  amountFormula,
});

export const deriveJournalTemplateLines = ({ accounts = [], selectedAccount = null, taxTreatment = '', sourceType = '', amountDirection = '', existingLines = [] }) => {
  const sourceAccount = findAccountByCode(accounts, SOURCE_ACCOUNT_CODE_BY_TYPE[String(sourceType || '').toUpperCase()]);
  if (!selectedAccount || !sourceAccount) return existingLines;

  const normalizedTaxTreatment = String(taxTreatment || '').toUpperCase();
  const expenseTaxAccount = findExpenseTaxAccount(accounts);
  const salesTaxAccount = findSalesTaxAccount(accounts);
  const isIncome = String(amountDirection || '').toUpperCase() === 'INCOME' || SALES_TAX_TREATMENTS.has(normalizedTaxTreatment);
  const taxAccount = PURCHASE_ITC_TREATMENTS.has(normalizedTaxTreatment)
    ? expenseTaxAccount
    : SALES_TAX_TREATMENTS.has(normalizedTaxTreatment)
      ? salesTaxAccount
      : null;
  const normalizedExistingLines = existingLines
    .map((line) => {
      const account = resolveAccountForLine(line, accounts);
      return account
        ? { ...line, accountId: account.id, accountCode: account.code, accountDescription: account.description || line.accountDescription || '' }
        : line;
    });
  const extraLines = normalizedExistingLines.filter((line) => {
    const code = String(resolveAccountForLine(line, accounts)?.code || line.accountCode || '');
    return code &&
      code !== String(selectedAccount.code) &&
      code !== String(sourceAccount.code) &&
      code !== String(expenseTaxAccount?.code || '') &&
      code !== String(salesTaxAccount?.code || '') &&
      code !== '1066' &&
      code !== '1240' &&
      code !== '2640';
  });

  if (TAX_REMITTANCE_TREATMENTS.has(normalizedTaxTreatment)) {
    const payableAccount = findSalesTaxAccount(accounts) || selectedAccount;
    return [
      templateLine(payableAccount, 'DEBIT', 'gross'),
      ...extraLines,
      templateLine(sourceAccount, 'CREDIT', 'gross'),
    ];
  }

  if (isIncome) {
    return [
      templateLine(sourceAccount, 'DEBIT', 'gross'),
      ...extraLines,
      templateLine(selectedAccount, 'CREDIT', taxAccount ? 'net' : 'gross'),
      ...(taxAccount ? [templateLine(taxAccount, 'CREDIT', 'hst')] : []),
    ];
  }

  return [
    templateLine(selectedAccount, 'DEBIT', taxAccount ? 'net' : 'gross'),
    ...(taxAccount ? [templateLine(taxAccount, 'DEBIT', 'hst')] : []),
    ...extraLines,
    templateLine(sourceAccount, 'CREDIT', 'gross'),
  ];
};

export function AccountCodeButton({ code, description = '', onOpenAccount, className = '' }) {
  if (!code) return null;
  return (
    <button
      type="button"
      className={`font-mono text-indigo-600 hover:text-indigo-800 hover:underline focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500 focus:ring-offset-1 rounded-sm ${className}`}
      onClick={() => onOpenAccount?.({ code, description })}
      title={`Open account ${description ? `${code} — ${description}` : code}`}
    >
      {code}
    </button>
  );
}

const FORMULA_HELP = {
  gross: { label: 'Gross', description: 'Full transaction amount including HST' },
  net: { label: 'Net', description: 'Pre-tax expense or revenue amount' },
  hst: { label: 'HST', description: 'Tax portion only' },
};

export function FormulaHelp({ formula }) {
  const normalized = String(formula || '').trim().toLowerCase();
  const info = FORMULA_HELP[normalized];
  if (!info) {
    return (
      <span className="tooltip tooltip-left max-w-full" data-tip="Formula controls which part of the transaction amount this journal line uses." title="Formula controls which part of the transaction amount this journal line uses.">
        <span className="badge badge-ghost badge-xs font-mono cursor-help">{formula || 'formula'}</span>
      </span>
    );
  }
  return (
    <span className="tooltip tooltip-left max-w-full" data-tip={info.description} title={info.description}>
      <span className="badge badge-ghost badge-xs font-mono cursor-help">{info.label}</span>
    </span>
  );
}

export function JournalTemplateLines({ lines, accounts = [], onOpenAccount }) {
  if (!Array.isArray(lines) || !lines.length) return null;
  const accountByCode = new Map(accounts.map((account) => [account.code, account]));
  const accountById = new Map(accounts.map((account) => [String(account.id), account]));
  return (
    <div>
      <div className="text-xs font-semibold text-slate-500 mb-1.5">Journal template</div>
      <div className="overflow-hidden rounded-lg border border-slate-200">
        <table className="min-w-full text-xs">
          <thead>
            <tr className="bg-slate-50">
              <th className="px-3 py-2 text-left font-medium text-slate-500">Account</th>
              <th className="px-3 py-2 text-left font-medium text-slate-500">Side</th>
              <th className="px-3 py-2 text-left font-medium text-slate-500">Formula</th>
            </tr>
          </thead>
          <tbody className="divide-y divide-slate-100">
            {lines.map((line, i) => {
              const account = accountByCode.get(line.accountCode) || accountById.get(String(line.accountCode || line.accountId || '')) || null;
              const code = account?.code || line.accountCode || '';
              const description = line.accountDescription || account?.description || '';
              const formulaKey = String(line.amountFormula || '').trim().toLowerCase();
              const formulaInfo = FORMULA_HELP[formulaKey];
              return (
                <tr key={i} className="hover:bg-slate-50/50">
                  <td className="px-3 py-2">
                    <div>
                      <AccountCodeButton code={code} description={description} onOpenAccount={onOpenAccount} />
                    </div>
                    <div className="text-slate-400 truncate max-w-[160px]">
                      {description || 'Unknown account'}
                    </div>
                  </td>
                  <td className="px-3 py-2">
                    <span className={`inline-flex items-center px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded text-xs font-medium ${
                      line.side === 'DEBIT' ? 'bg-sky-50 text-sky-700' : 'bg-amber-50 text-amber-700'
                    }`}>{line.side}</span>
                  </td>
                  <td className="px-3 py-2">
                    <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
                      <FormulaHelp formula={line.amountFormula} />
                      {formulaInfo && (
                        <span className="text-slate-400 text-[10px] leading-tight hidden sm:inline">
                          {formulaInfo.description}
                        </span>
                      )}
                    </div>
                  </td>
                </tr>
              );
            })}
          </tbody>
        </table>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

export function JournalTemplatePreview({ lines, accounts = [], onOpenAccount }) {
  if (!Array.isArray(lines) || !lines.length) return null;
  const accountByCode = new Map(accounts.map((account) => [account.code, account]));
  const accountById = new Map(accounts.map((account) => [String(account.id), account]));

  return (
    <div className="rounded-lg border border-slate-200 bg-slate-50/50 p-3">
      <div className="text-xs font-semibold text-slate-500 mb-2">Proposed journal template</div>
      <div className="space-y-1.5">
        {lines.map((line, index) => {
          const account = accountByCode.get(line.accountCode) || accountById.get(String(line.accountCode || line.accountId || '')) || null;
          const code = account?.code || line.accountCode || '';
          const description = line.accountDescription || account?.description || '';
          const formulaKey = String(line.amountFormula || '').trim().toLowerCase();
          const formulaInfo = FORMULA_HELP[formulaKey];

          return (
            <div key={index} className="flex items-center gap-2 text-xs">
              <span className={`inline-flex items-center px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded text-xs font-medium w-14 justify-center ${
                line.side === 'DEBIT' ? 'bg-sky-50 text-sky-700' : 'bg-amber-50 text-amber-700'
              }`}>{line.side}</span>
              <div className="min-w-0 flex-1">
                <AccountCodeButton code={code} description={description} onOpenAccount={onOpenAccount} />
                {description ? <span className="text-slate-400 ml-1">— {description}</span> : null}
              </div>
              <div className="flex items-center gap-1 shrink-0">
                <FormulaHelp formula={line.amountFormula} />
                {formulaInfo && (
                  <span className="text-slate-400 text-[10px] leading-tight hidden sm:inline">
                    {formulaInfo.description}
                  </span>
                )}
              </div>
            </div>
          );
        })}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

export function JournalTemplateDraftTable({ lines, formatAmount = (v) => Number(v || 0).toFixed(2) }) {
  if (!Array.isArray(lines) || !lines.length) return null;
  const usesSideFormula = lines.some((line) => line.side || line.amountFormula);

  return (
    <div className="overflow-x-auto">
      <table className="table table-xs">
        <thead>
          <tr>
            <th>Account</th>
            {usesSideFormula ? <th>Side</th> : <th>Debit</th>}
            {usesSideFormula ? <th>Formula</th> : <th>Credit</th>}
          </tr>
        </thead>
        <tbody>
          {lines.map((line, index) => {
            const label = line.label || `${line.accountCode || ''} ${line.accountDescription || ''}`.trim() || line.accountId || 'Unknown account';
            return (
              <tr key={`${label}-${index}`}>
                <td>{label}</td>
                {usesSideFormula ? (
                  <>
                    <td>{line.side || '—'}</td>
                    <td>{line.amountFormula || '—'}</td>
                  </>
                ) : (
                  <>
                    <td>{line.debit ? formatAmount(line.debit) : '—'}</td>
                    <td>{line.credit ? formatAmount(line.credit) : '—'}</td>
                  </>
                )}
              </tr>
            );
          })}
        </tbody>
      </table>
    </div>
  );
}
```

FILE: client/services/accounting/utils/fiscalYear.js

```js
// Full path: /home/luanngo/boss-dev/client/services/accounting/utils/fiscalYear.js
import { fetchWithAuth } from '@/shared/utils/fetchWithAuth';

const MONTH_NAMES = {
  'january': 1, 'jan': 1, '1': 1,
  'february': 2, 'feb': 2, '2': 2,
  'march': 3, 'mar': 3, '3': 3,
  'april': 4, 'apr': 4, '4': 4,
  'may': 5, '5': 5,
  'june': 6, 'jun': 6, '6': 6,
  'july': 7, 'jul': 7, '7': 7,
  'august': 8, 'aug': 8, '8': 8,
  'september': 9, 'sep': 9, '9': 9,
  'october': 10, 'oct': 10, '10': 10,
  'november': 11, 'nov': 11, '11': 11,
  'december': 12, 'dec': 12, '12': 12,
};

const SERVER = process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL;

export const parseFiscalYearMonth = (value) => {
  if (!value) return null;
  const normalized = String(value).trim().toLowerCase();
  return MONTH_NAMES[normalized] || null;
};

export const getFiscalYearStartMonth = async () => {
  try {
    const res = await fetchWithAuth(`${SERVER}/settings/organization/fiscalYearStart`);
    if (!res.ok) return null;
    const data = await res.json();
    return parseFiscalYearMonth(data.settingValue);
  } catch {
    return null;
  }
};

export const computeFiscalYearDates = (fyStartMonth, referenceDate) => {
  const ref = referenceDate ? new Date(referenceDate) : new Date();
  const refYear = ref.getFullYear();
  const refMonth = ref.getMonth() + 1;

  if (fyStartMonth === null || fyStartMonth === undefined) return null;

  let fyStartYear;
  if (refMonth >= fyStartMonth) {
    fyStartYear = refYear;
  } else {
    fyStartYear = refYear - 1;
  }

  const from = new Date(fyStartYear, fyStartMonth - 1, 1);
  const to = new Date(fyStartYear + 1, fyStartMonth - 1, 0);

  return { from, to };
};

export const computeThisFiscalYear = (fyStartMonth) =>
  computeFiscalYearDates(fyStartMonth, new Date());

export const computeLastFiscalYear = (fyStartMonth) => {
  const thisFy = computeThisFiscalYear(fyStartMonth);
  if (!thisFy) return null;
  const from = new Date(thisFy.from);
  from.setFullYear(from.getFullYear() - 1);
  const to = new Date(thisFy.to);
  to.setFullYear(to.getFullYear() - 1);
  return { from, to };
};

```
