FILE: client/services/accounting/utils/formatAccounting.js
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
```js
// Full path: /home/luanngo/boss-dev/client/services/accounting/utils/formatAccounting.js
const LOCALE = 'en-CA';
const CURRENCY = 'CAD';
const DEFAULT_TIMEZONE = 'America/Toronto';

const resolveTimezone = (timezone) => {
  if (!timezone) return DEFAULT_TIMEZONE;
  try {
    new Intl.DateTimeFormat(LOCALE, { timeZone: timezone }).format(new Date());
    return timezone;
  } catch {
    return DEFAULT_TIMEZONE;
  }
};

export const formatCurrency = (value) => {
  const numeric = Number(value || 0);
  if (!Number.isFinite(numeric)) return '—';
  return new Intl.NumberFormat(LOCALE, {
    style: 'currency',
    currency: CURRENCY,
    minimumFractionDigits: 2,
    maximumFractionDigits: 2,
  }).format(numeric);
};

export const formatMoney = (value) => {
  const amount = Number(value || 0);
  if (!Number.isFinite(amount)) return '—';
  return new Intl.NumberFormat(LOCALE, { style: 'currency', currency: CURRENCY }).format(amount);
};

export const formatDate = (value, timezone = DEFAULT_TIMEZONE) => {
  if (!value) return '—';
  const date = new Date(value);
  if (Number.isNaN(date.getTime())) return '—';
  return new Intl.DateTimeFormat(LOCALE, {
    timeZone: resolveTimezone(timezone),
    year: 'numeric',
    month: 'short',
    day: '2-digit',
  }).format(date);
};

export const formatDateTime = (value, timezone = DEFAULT_TIMEZONE) => {
  if (!value) return '—';
  const date = new Date(value);
  if (Number.isNaN(date.getTime())) return '—';
  return new Intl.DateTimeFormat(LOCALE, {
    timeZone: resolveTimezone(timezone),
    year: 'numeric',
    month: 'short',
    day: '2-digit',
    hour: 'numeric',
    minute: '2-digit',
  }).format(date);
};

export const formatPercent = (value) => `${Math.round(Number(value || 0) * 100)}%`;

export const formatDateInputValue = (value, timezone = DEFAULT_TIMEZONE) => {
  const parsed = new Date(value);
  if (Number.isNaN(parsed.getTime())) return '';
  const parts = new Intl.DateTimeFormat(LOCALE, {
    timeZone: resolveTimezone(timezone),
    year: 'numeric',
    month: '2-digit',
    day: '2-digit',
  }).formatToParts(parsed);
  const lookup = Object.fromEntries(parts.map((part) => [part.type, part.value]));
  return `${lookup.year}-${lookup.month}-${lookup.day}`;
};

export const formatInteger = (value) => new Intl.NumberFormat(LOCALE).format(Number(value || 0));

export const formatConfidencePercent = (value) => {
  const numericValue = Number(value);
  if (!Number.isFinite(numericValue)) return null;
  return `${Math.round(numericValue * 100)}%`;
};

export const formatAmount = (value) => {
  const numeric = Number(value || 0);
  return Number.isFinite(numeric) ? numeric.toFixed(2) : '—';
};

/** Accounting display: em-dash for zero, parentheses for negatives, always 2 decimals */
export const formatAccountingAmount = (value, showCurrency = false) => {
  const numeric = Number(value || 0);
  if (!Number.isFinite(numeric)) return '—';
  if (Math.abs(numeric) < 0.005) return '—';
  const formatted = new Intl.NumberFormat(LOCALE, {
    minimumFractionDigits: 2,
    maximumFractionDigits: 2,
    useGrouping: true,
  }).format(Math.abs(numeric));
  const prefix = showCurrency ? '$' : '';
  return numeric < 0 ? `(${prefix}${formatted})` : `${prefix}${formatted}`;
};

/** Right-aligned friendly accounting amount (for table display) */
export const formatAccountingCell = (value) => {
  const numeric = Number(value || 0);
  if (!Number.isFinite(numeric) || Math.abs(numeric) < 0.005) return { text: '—', isZero: true, isNegative: false };
  const formatted = new Intl.NumberFormat(LOCALE, {
    minimumFractionDigits: 2,
    maximumFractionDigits: 2,
    useGrouping: true,
  }).format(Math.abs(numeric));
  return {
    text: numeric < 0 ? `(${formatted})` : formatted,
    isZero: false,
    isNegative: numeric < 0,
  };
};

export const sourceLabel = (source) => {
  if (!source) return 'Manual';
  const map = {
    'BANK_IMPORT': 'Bank import',
    'SQUARE_RECONCILIATION': 'Square',
    'PAYROLL_IMPORT': 'Payroll',
    'PAYROLL_FUNDING_CORRECTION': 'Payroll',
    'RISE_DEDUPED_REPORTS': 'Payroll',
    'SUPERSEDED_PAYROLL_IMPORT': 'Payroll',
    'SUPERSEDED_RISE_JE_REPORT': 'Payroll',
    'WSIB_PAYMENT_CORRECTION': 'Payroll',
    'MANUAL': 'Manual',
  };
  return map[source] || source.replace(/_/g, ' ').replace(/\b\w/g, c => c.toUpperCase());
};

export const sourceIcon = (source) => {
  if (!source) return null;
  const map = {
    'BANK_IMPORT': '🏦',
    'SQUARE_RECONCILIATION': '💳',
    'PAYROLL_IMPORT': '👤',
    'PAYROLL_FUNDING_CORRECTION': '👤',
    'RISE_DEDUPED_REPORTS': '👤',
  };
  return map[source] || null;
};

const now = new Date();
export const FISCAL_YEARS = (() => {
  const years = [];
  for (let y = 2021; y <= now.getFullYear() + 1; y++) {
    years.push({ label: `${y}`, value: y });
  }
  return years;
})();
```

```js
// Full path: /home/luanngo/boss-dev/client/services/accounting/utils/ruleUtils.js
export const defaultRuleForm = {
  name: '',
  group: 'General',
  notes: '',
  patternsText: '',
  sql: '',
  enabled: true,
  matchMode: 'ANY',
  sourceType: '',
  transactionType: '',
  amountDirection: 'ANY',
  categoryId: '',
  autoCategory: false,
  autoApplyTaxes: false,
  requiredReceipt: false,
  taxTreatment: '',
  ratePercent: '',
  previousTaxRate: null,
  applyPreviousTaxRate: false,
  llmSummary: '',
  proposalSource: '',
  journalMode: 'STANDARD',
  journalTemplateText: '',
};

export const parseJsonArrayText = (value, fieldLabel = 'JSON array') => {
  const raw = String(value || '').trim();
  if (!raw) return [];
  try {
    const parsed = JSON.parse(raw);
    if (!Array.isArray(parsed)) {
      throw new Error(`${fieldLabel} must be a JSON array.`);
    }
    return parsed;
  } catch (error) {
    throw new Error(error.message || `Invalid ${fieldLabel}.`);
  }
};

const findAccountForRule = (rule = {}, accounts = []) => {
  const accountId = String(rule.categoryId || rule.suggestedAccountId || '');
  const accountCode = String(rule.categoryCode || rule.suggestedAccountCode || '');
  return (accounts || []).find((account) =>
    (accountId && String(account.id) === accountId) ||
    (accountCode && String(account.code) === accountCode) ||
    (accountCode && String(account.id) === accountCode)
  ) || null;
};

const getRulePatterns = (rule = {}) => {
  const metaPatterns = rule?.meta?.patterns;
  if (Array.isArray(metaPatterns)) return metaPatterns;
  if (Array.isArray(rule?.patterns)) return rule.patterns;
  if (Array.isArray(rule?.matchConditions?.descriptionContainsAny)) return rule.matchConditions.descriptionContainsAny;
  if (Array.isArray(rule?.matchConditions?.requiredDescriptors)) return rule.matchConditions.requiredDescriptors;
  return [];
};

const normalizeAmountDirection = (value, fallback = 'ANY') => {
  const normalized = String(value || '').toUpperCase();
  if (normalized === 'OUTGOING') return 'EXPENSE';
  if (normalized === 'INCOMING') return 'INCOME';
  return normalized || fallback;
};

export const ruleToFormState = (rule, accounts = []) => ({
  name: rule?.name || '',
  group: rule?.meta?.group || rule?.group || 'General',
  notes: rule?.meta?.notes || rule?.notes || '',
  patternsText: getRulePatterns(rule).join('\n'),
  sql: rule?.sql || '',
  enabled: rule?.meta?.enabled !== false && rule?.enabled !== false,
  matchMode: rule?.meta?.matchMode || rule?.matchMode || 'ANY',
  sourceType: rule?.meta?.sourceType || rule?.sourceType || rule?.matchConditions?.sourceType || rule?.matchConditions?.sourceAccountTypes?.[0] || '',
  transactionType: rule?.meta?.transactionType || rule?.transactionType || '',
  amountDirection: normalizeAmountDirection(rule?.meta?.amountDirection || rule?.amountDirection || rule?.matchConditions?.amountDirection),
  categoryId: findAccountForRule(rule, accounts)?.id || rule?.categoryId || rule?.suggestedAccountId || '',
  autoCategory: Boolean(rule?.autoCategory || rule?.categoryId || rule?.suggestedAccountId || rule?.suggestedAccountCode),
  autoApplyTaxes: Boolean(rule?.autoApplyTaxes || rule?.applyPreviousTaxRate),
  requiredReceipt: Boolean(rule?.requiredReceipt),
  taxTreatment: rule?.meta?.taxTreatment || rule?.taxTreatment || '',
  ratePercent: rule?.meta?.ratePercent ?? rule?.meta?.previousTaxRate?.ratePercent ?? rule?.ratePercent ?? rule?.previousTaxRate?.ratePercent ?? '',
  previousTaxRate: rule?.meta?.previousTaxRate || rule?.previousTaxRate || null,
  applyPreviousTaxRate: Boolean(rule?.meta?.applyPreviousTaxRate ?? rule?.applyPreviousTaxRate),
  llmSummary: rule?.meta?.llmSummary || rule?.llmSummary || '',
  proposalSource: rule?.meta?.proposalSource || rule?.proposalSource || '',
  journalMode: rule?.meta?.journalMode || rule?.journalMode || (Array.isArray(rule?.meta?.journalTemplateLines || rule?.journalTemplateLines) ? 'PROPOSAL_HINT' : 'STANDARD'),
  journalTemplateText: Array.isArray(rule?.meta?.journalTemplateLines || rule?.journalTemplateLines)
    ? JSON.stringify(rule.meta?.journalTemplateLines || rule.journalTemplateLines, null, 2)
    : '',
});

export const ruleFormToPayload = (form) => {
  const ratePercent = Number(form.ratePercent);
  const shouldApplyTaxRate = Boolean(form.applyPreviousTaxRate || (Number.isFinite(ratePercent) && ratePercent > 0));
  return {
    name: String(form.name || '').trim(),
    sql: String(form.sql || '').trim(),
    patterns: String(form.patternsText || '').split('\n').map((item) => item.trim()).filter(Boolean),
    group: String(form.group || 'General').trim() || 'General',
    notes: String(form.notes || '').trim(),
    enabled: Boolean(form.enabled),
    matchMode: form.matchMode === 'ALL' ? 'ALL' : 'ANY',
    sourceType: form.sourceType || null,
    transactionType: form.transactionType || null,
    amountDirection: form.amountDirection || 'ANY',
    categoryId: form.categoryId || null,
    autoCategory: Boolean(form.autoCategory || form.categoryId),
    autoApplyTaxes: Boolean(form.autoApplyTaxes || shouldApplyTaxRate),
    requiredReceipt: Boolean(form.requiredReceipt),
    taxTreatment: form.taxTreatment || null,
    applyPreviousTaxRate: shouldApplyTaxRate,
    previousTaxRate: Number.isFinite(ratePercent) && ratePercent >= 0
      ? {
          ...(form.previousTaxRate || {}),
          ratePercent,
        }
      : undefined,
    llmSummary: String(form.llmSummary || '').trim(),
    proposalSource: form.proposalSource || null,
    journalMode: form.journalMode || 'STANDARD',
    journalTemplateLines: parseJsonArrayText(form.journalTemplateText, 'Journal template lines'),
  };
};

export const draftToRuleFormPatch = (draftValue = {}, accounts = []) => {
  const draft = draftValue || {};
  const matchedAccount = accounts.find((account) =>
    String(account.id) === String(draft.categoryId || '') ||
    String(account.id) === String(draft.suggestedAccountId || '') ||
    String(account.code) === String(draft.categoryCode || '') ||
    String(account.code) === String(draft.suggestedAccountCode || '')
  ) || null;
  const patterns = Array.isArray(draft.patterns) && draft.patterns.length
    ? draft.patterns
    : Array.isArray(draft.matchConditions?.descriptionContainsAny) && draft.matchConditions.descriptionContainsAny.length
      ? draft.matchConditions.descriptionContainsAny
      : Array.isArray(draft.matchConditions?.requiredDescriptors)
        ? draft.matchConditions.requiredDescriptors
        : [];

  return {
    name: draft.name || draft.ruleName || '',
    group: draft.group || draft.meta?.group || 'General',
    notes: draft.notes || draft.meta?.notes || draft.reasoning || draft.reason || '',
    patternsText: patterns.join('\n'),
    enabled: draft.enabled !== false,
    matchMode: draft.matchMode === 'ALL' ? 'ALL' : 'ANY',
    sourceType: draft.sourceType || draft.matchConditions?.sourceType || '',
    transactionType: draft.transactionType || '',
    amountDirection: normalizeAmountDirection(draft.amountDirection || draft.matchConditions?.amountDirection),
    categoryId: matchedAccount?.id || draft.categoryId || draft.suggestedAccountId || '',
    autoCategory: Boolean(matchedAccount?.id || draft.categoryId || draft.suggestedAccountId),
    autoApplyTaxes: Boolean(draft.autoApplyTaxes || draft.applyPreviousTaxRate),
    requiredReceipt: Boolean(draft.requiredReceipt),
    taxTreatment: draft.taxTreatment || '',
    ratePercent: draft.ratePercent ?? draft.previousTaxRate?.ratePercent ?? '',
    previousTaxRate: draft.previousTaxRate || null,
    applyPreviousTaxRate: Boolean(draft.applyPreviousTaxRate),
    llmSummary: draft.llmSummary || draft.reasoning || draft.reason || '',
    journalMode: Array.isArray(draft.meta?.journalTemplateLines || draft.journalTemplateLines) && (draft.meta?.journalTemplateLines || draft.journalTemplateLines).length ? 'PROPOSAL_HINT' : 'STANDARD',
    journalTemplateText: Array.isArray(draft.meta?.journalTemplateLines || draft.journalTemplateLines) && (draft.meta?.journalTemplateLines || draft.journalTemplateLines).length
      ? JSON.stringify(draft.meta?.journalTemplateLines || draft.journalTemplateLines, null, 2)
      : '',
  };
};

```

```sql
-- Full path: /home/luanngo/boss-dev/server/prisma/migrations/20260630000001_add_transaction_groups/migration.sql
-- CreateTable TransactionGroups
CREATE TABLE "TransactionGroups" (
    "id" TEXT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,
    "organizationId" TEXT NOT NULL,
    "groupKey" TEXT NOT NULL,
    "normalizedMerchant" TEXT NOT NULL,
    "sourceId" TEXT,
    "sourceType" TEXT NOT NULL,
    "direction" TEXT NOT NULL,
    "amountSign" TEXT NOT NULL,
    "transactionCount" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    "incompleteCount" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    "totalAmount" REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    "dateRangeStart" DATETIME,
    "dateRangeEnd" DATETIME,
    "status" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'ACTIVE',
    "linkedRuleId" TEXT,
    "linkedSuggestionId" TEXT,
    "lastComputedAt" DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    "createdAt" DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    "updatedAt" DATETIME NOT NULL,
    "semanticType" TEXT,
    CONSTRAINT "TransactionGroups_organizationId_fkey" FOREIGN KEY ("organizationId") REFERENCES "Organization" ("id") ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE,
    CONSTRAINT "TransactionGroups_linkedRuleId_fkey" FOREIGN KEY ("linkedRuleId") REFERENCES "AccountingRules" ("id") ON DELETE SET NULL ON UPDATE CASCADE
);

-- CreateIndex
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX "TransactionGroups_linkedRuleId_key" ON "TransactionGroups"("linkedRuleId");
CREATE INDEX "TransactionGroups_organizationId_status_idx" ON "TransactionGroups"("organizationId", "status");
CREATE INDEX "TransactionGroups_organizationId_groupKey_idx" ON "TransactionGroups"("organizationId", "groupKey");
CREATE INDEX "TransactionGroups_organizationId_semanticType_idx" ON "TransactionGroups"("organizationId", "semanticType");

-- CreateTable TransactionGroupMembers
CREATE TABLE "TransactionGroupMembers" (
    "id" TEXT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,
    "transactionGroupId" TEXT NOT NULL,
    "bankTransactionId" INTEGER NOT NULL,
    "matchConfidence" REAL,
    "incompleteReasons" TEXT,
    "createdAt" DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    CONSTRAINT "TransactionGroupMembers_transactionGroupId_fkey" FOREIGN KEY ("transactionGroupId") REFERENCES "TransactionGroups" ("id") ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE,
    CONSTRAINT "TransactionGroupMembers_bankTransactionId_fkey" FOREIGN KEY ("bankTransactionId") REFERENCES "BankTransaction" ("id") ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE
);

-- CreateIndex
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX "TransactionGroupMembers_transactionGroupId_bankTransactionId_key" ON "TransactionGroupMembers"("transactionGroupId", "bankTransactionId");
CREATE INDEX "TransactionGroupMembers_transactionGroupId_idx" ON "TransactionGroupMembers"("transactionGroupId");
CREATE INDEX "TransactionGroupMembers_bankTransactionId_idx" ON "TransactionGroupMembers"("bankTransactionId");

-- AlterTable AccountingRuleSuggestion
ALTER TABLE "AccountingRuleSuggestion" ADD COLUMN "transactionGroupId" TEXT;
CREATE INDEX "AccountingRuleSuggestion_transactionGroupId_idx" ON "AccountingRuleSuggestion"("transactionGroupId");

-- AlterTable AccountingRules

CREATE INDEX "AccountingRules_transactionGroupId_idx" ON "AccountingRules"("transactionGroupId");
```

FILE: server/src/integrations/square/squareTaxHelpers.js
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
```js
// Full path: /home/luanngo/boss-dev/server/src/integrations/square/squareTaxHelpers.js
// e.g. in #integrations/square/squareTaxHelpers.js

export function buildSquareLineItemsWithTaxes(localOrder, taxRateDecimal = 0.13) {
  const taxPercentageString = (taxRateDecimal * 100).toFixed(2); // 0.13 -> "13.00"

  return localOrder.orderItems.map((item) => {
    const name =
      (item.product ? item.product.name : item.customName || "Item") +
      (item.variant ? ` (${item.variant.name})` : "");

    const unitPrice = item.price; // already pre-tax in your DB
    const quantity = item.quantity;

    const baseLineItem = {
      name,
      quantity: String(quantity),
      basePriceMoney: {
        amount: Math.round(unitPrice * 100), // cents
        currency: "CAD",
      },
    };

    const isTaxable = item.taxable ?? true; // default to true if null/undefined

    if (isTaxable) {
      // LINE-ITEM level tax; only attached when taxable === true
      baseLineItem.taxes = [
        {
          name: "HST",
          percentage: taxPercentageString, // "13.00"
          scope: "LINE_ITEM",             // Important: per-line
        },
      ];
    }

    return baseLineItem;
  });
}
```

FILE: server/src/routes/api/accounting/aiManager.js
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
```js
// Full path: /home/luanngo/boss-dev/server/src/routes/api/accounting/aiManager.js
import express from 'express';
import authenticate from '#middleware/auth.js';
import AccountingAIManagerService from '#services/accounting/services/AccountingAIManagerService.js';

const router = express.Router();
const aiManagerService = new AccountingAIManagerService();

const defaultDateRange = () => {
  const today = new Date();
  const start = new Date(today);
  start.setDate(start.getDate() - 365);
  return {
    startDate: start.toISOString().slice(0, 10),
    endDate: today.toISOString().slice(0, 10),
  };
};

router.get('/plan', authenticate, async (req, res) => {
  try {
    const organizationId = req.user.organizationId;
    const fallback = defaultDateRange();

    const plan = await aiManagerService.buildManagerPlan({
      organizationId,
      startDate: req.query.startDate || req.query.from || fallback.startDate,
      endDate: req.query.endDate || req.query.to || fallback.endDate,
    });

    return res.status(200).json(plan);
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Accounting AI manager plan error:', error);
    return res.status(500).json({ error: error.message || 'Failed to build accounting AI manager plan.' });
  }
});

router.post('/generate-categorization-proposals', authenticate, async (req, res) => {
  try {
    const organizationId = req.user.organizationId;
    const userId = req.user.id || req.user.userId;
    const sessionId = req.sessionID || req.sessionId || null;

    const result = await aiManagerService.generateCategorizationProposals({
      organizationId,
      userId,
      sessionId,
      limit: req.body?.limit || 10,
    });

    return res.status(200).json({
      message: result.count
        ? `Generated ${result.count} categorization proposal${result.count === 1 ? '' : 's'}.`
        : 'No uncategorized transactions were found.',
      ...result,
    });
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Accounting AI manager proposal generation error:', error);
    return res.status(500).json({ error: error.message || 'Failed to generate categorization proposals.' });
  }
});

export default router;

```

```js
// Full path: /home/luanngo/boss-dev/server/src/routes/api/accounting/audit.js
import express from 'express';
import authenticate from '#middleware/auth.js';
import AccountingAuditService from '#services/accounting/services/AccountingAuditService.js';

const router = express.Router();
const auditService = new AccountingAuditService();

router.get('/latest', authenticate, async (req, res) => {
  try {
    const organizationId = req.user.organizationId;
    const result = await auditService.getLatestAudit(organizationId);
    return res.status(200).json({ audit: result });
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Latest accounting audit error:', error);
    return res.status(500).json({ error: error.message || 'Failed to fetch latest accounting audit.' });
  }
});

router.get('/', authenticate, async (req, res) => {
  try {
    const organizationId = req.user.organizationId;
    const userId = req.user.id || req.user.userId;
    const sessionId = req.sessionID || req.sessionId || null;
    const today = new Date();
    const defaultStart = new Date(today.getFullYear(), today.getMonth(), 1).toISOString().slice(0, 10);
    const defaultEnd = today.toISOString().slice(0, 10);

    const result = await auditService.runAudit({
      organizationId,
      userId,
      sessionId,
      startDate: req.query.startDate || req.query.from || defaultStart,
      endDate: req.query.endDate || req.query.to || defaultEnd,
    });

    return res.status(200).json(result);
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Accounting audit error:', error);
    return res.status(500).json({ error: error.message || 'Failed to run accounting audit.' });
  }
});

export default router;

```

```js
// Full path: /home/luanngo/boss-dev/server/src/routes/api/accounting/categories.js
import express from 'express';
import AccountingService from '#services/accounting/services/AccountingService.js';
import AccountingLLMService from '#services/accounting/services/AccountingLLMService.js';
import authenticate from '#middleware/auth.js';

const router = express.Router();
const accountingService = new AccountingService();

router.get('/', authenticate, async (req, res) => {
  try {
    const organizationId = req.user.organizationId;
    const { view = 'all', search = '' } = req.query || {};
    const categories = await accountingService.getCategories(organizationId, { view, search });
    return res.status(200).json(categories);
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Fetch Categories Error:', error);
    return res.status(500).json({ error: error.message || 'Internal server error.' });
  }
});

router.post('/ai-draft', authenticate, async (req, res) => {
  try {
    const organizationId = req.user.organizationId;
    const userId = req.user.id || req.user.userId;
    const { prompt = '', view = 'categories' } = req.body || {};

    if (!String(prompt).trim()) {
      return res.status(400).json({ error: 'A prompt is required.' });
    }

    const suggestion = await AccountingLLMService.suggestChartOfAccountsEntry({
      organizationId,
      userId,
      sessionId: req.sessionID,
      view,
      request: prompt,
    });

    return res.status(200).json(suggestion);
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('AI Category Draft Error:', error);
    return res.status(500).json({ error: error.message || 'Failed to generate AI draft.' });
  }
});

router.post('/ai-suggestions', authenticate, async (req, res) => {
  try {
    const organizationId = req.user.organizationId;
    const userId = req.user.id || req.user.userId;
    const { prompt = '', view = 'categories', count = 6 } = req.body || {};

    if (!String(prompt).trim()) {
      return res.status(400).json({ error: 'A prompt is required.' });
    }

    const suggestion = await AccountingLLMService.suggestChartOfAccountsEntries({
      organizationId,
      userId,
      sessionId: req.sessionID,
      view,
      request: prompt,
      count,
    });

    return res.status(200).json(suggestion);
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('AI Category Suggestions Error:', error);
    return res.status(500).json({ error: error.message || 'Failed to generate AI suggestions.' });
  }
});


router.post('/batch', authenticate, async (req, res) => {
  try {
    const organizationId = req.user.organizationId;
    const categories = Array.isArray(req.body?.categories) ? req.body.categories : [];
    const created = await accountingService.createCategoriesBatch(organizationId, categories);
    return res.status(201).json({ message: `${created.length} categories created successfully.`, categories: created });
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Batch Create Categories Error:', error);
    return res.status(500).json({ error: error.message || 'Internal server error.' });
  }
});

router.delete('/', authenticate, async (req, res) => {
  try {
    const organizationId = req.user.organizationId;
    const result = await accountingService.deleteAllCategories(organizationId);
    return res.status(200).json({ message: `Deleted ${result.deletedCount} categories.`, ...result });
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Delete All Categories Error:', error);
    return res.status(500).json({ error: error.message || 'Internal server error.' });
  }
});

router.post('/', authenticate, async (req, res) => {
  try {
    const organizationId = req.user.organizationId;
    const { description, code, category, normalSide, statementLine, sortOrder, isPLAccount } = req.body || {};

    if (!description || !code || !category) {
      return res.status(400).json({ error: 'Description, account ID, and type are required.' });
    }

    const newCategory = await accountingService.createCategory(organizationId, {
      description,
      code,
      category,
      normalSide,
      statementLine,
      sortOrder,
      isPLAccount,
    });
    return res.status(201).json({ message: 'Record created successfully.', category: newCategory });
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Create Category Error:', error);
    return res.status(500).json({ error: error.message || 'Internal server error.' });
  }
});

router.put('/:id', authenticate, async (req, res) => {
  try {
    const organizationId = req.user.organizationId;
    const { id } = req.params;
    const updatedCategory = await accountingService.updateCategory(organizationId, id, req.body || {});
    return res.status(200).json({ message: 'Record updated successfully.', category: updatedCategory });
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Update Category Error:', error);
    return res.status(500).json({ error: error.message || 'Internal server error.' });
  }
});

router.delete('/:id', authenticate, async (req, res) => {
  try {
    const organizationId = req.user.organizationId;
    const { id } = req.params;

    await accountingService.deleteCategory(organizationId, id);
    return res.status(200).json({ message: 'Record deleted successfully.' });
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Delete Category Error:', error);
    return res.status(500).json({ error: error.message || 'Internal server error.' });
  }
});

export default router;

```

```js
// Full path: /home/luanngo/boss-dev/server/src/routes/api/accounting/close.js
import express from 'express';
import authenticate from '#middleware/auth.js';
import AccountingComplianceService from '#services/accounting/services/AccountingComplianceService.js';

const router = express.Router();
const complianceService = new AccountingComplianceService();

router.get('/workspace', authenticate, async (req, res) => {
  try {
    const organizationId = req.user.organizationId;
    const { startDate, endDate } = req.query;
    const workspace = await complianceService.getCloseWorkspace(organizationId, startDate, endDate);
    return res.status(200).json(workspace);
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Close workspace error:', error);
    return res.status(500).json({ error: error.message || 'Failed to load month-end close workspace.' });
  }
});

router.get('/periods', authenticate, async (req, res) => {
  try {
    const periods = await complianceService.listClosePeriods(req.user.organizationId);
    return res.status(200).json({ periods });
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('List close periods error:', error);
    return res.status(500).json({ error: error.message || 'Failed to list close periods.' });
  }
});

router.post('/periods', authenticate, async (req, res) => {
  try {
    const organizationId = req.user.organizationId;
    const payload = req.body || {};
    if (!payload.startDate || !payload.endDate) {
      return res.status(400).json({ error: 'startDate and endDate are required.' });
    }
    const period = await complianceService.upsertClosePeriod(organizationId, payload, {
      userId: req.user.id || req.user.userId || null,
      email: req.user.email || null,
    });
    return res.status(201).json({ period });
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Create close period error:', error);
    return res.status(500).json({ error: error.message || 'Failed to create close period.' });
  }
});

router.put('/periods/:periodId', authenticate, async (req, res) => {
  try {
    const organizationId = req.user.organizationId;
    const payload = {
      ...(req.body || {}),
      id: req.params.periodId,
    };
    const period = await complianceService.upsertClosePeriod(organizationId, payload, {
      userId: req.user.id || req.user.userId || null,
      email: req.user.email || null,
    });
    return res.status(200).json({ period });
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Update close period error:', error);
    return res.status(500).json({ error: error.message || 'Failed to update close period.' });
  }
});

export default router;

```

FILE: server/src/routes/api/accounting/formulas.js
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
```js
// Full path: /home/luanngo/boss-dev/server/src/routes/api/accounting/formulas.js
import express from "express";
import AccountingService from "#services/accounting/services/AccountingService.js";
import authenticate from "#middleware/auth.js";
import { v4 as uuidv4 } from "uuid";

const router = express.Router();
const accountingService = new AccountingService();

// Save a new formula
router.post("/", authenticate, async (req, res) => {
  const { name, sql } = req.body;
  const organizationId = req.user.organizationId;
  const createdBy = req.user.id;

  if (!name || !sql) {
    return res.status(400).json({ error: "Name and SQL are required." });
  }

  try {
    const newFormula = await accountingService.saveFormula(name, sql, organizationId, createdBy);
    return res.status(201).json({ message: "Formula saved successfully.", formula: newFormula });
  } catch (error) {
    console.error("Save Formula Error:", error);
    return res.status(500).json({ error: "Failed to save formula." });
  }
});

// Get all formulas
router.get("/", authenticate, async (req, res) => {
  const organizationId = req.user.organizationId;

  try {
    const formulas = await accountingService.getFormulas(organizationId);
    return res.status(200).json({ formulas });
  } catch (error) {
    console.error("Get Formulas Error:", error);
    return res.status(500).json({ error: "Failed to retrieve formulas." });
  }
});

// Get preview of transactions affected by a formula
router.get("/:id/preview", authenticate, async (req, res) => {
  const { id } = req.params;
  const organizationId = req.user.organizationId;

  try {
    const transactions = await accountingService.getFormulaPreview(id, organizationId);
    return res.status(200).json({ transactions });
  } catch (error) {
    console.error("Get Formula Preview Error:", error);
    return res.status(500).json({ error: "Failed to retrieve formula preview." });
  }
});

// Apply a formula to update HST
router.post("/:id/apply", authenticate, async (req, res) => {
  const { id } = req.params;
  const organizationId = req.user.organizationId;

  try {
    await accountingService.applyFormula(id, organizationId);
    return res.status(200).json({ message: "HST updated successfully using the formula." });
  } catch (error) {
    console.error("Apply Formula Error:", error);
    return res.status(500).json({ error: "Failed to apply formula." });
  }
});

// Delete a formula
router.delete("/:id", authenticate, async (req, res) => {
  const { id } = req.params;
  const organizationId = req.user.organizationId;

  try {
    const formula = await accountingService.prisma.formula.findUnique({
      where: { id },
    });

    if (!formula) {
      return res.status(404).json({ error: "Formula not found." });
    }

    if (formula.organizationId !== organizationId) {
      return res.status(403).json({ error: "Unauthorized to delete this formula." });
    }

    await accountingService.prisma.formula.delete({
      where: { id },
    });

    return res.status(200).json({ message: "Formula deleted successfully." });
  } catch (error) {
    console.error("Delete Formula Error:", error);
    return res.status(500).json({ error: "Failed to delete formula." });
  }
});

export default router;

```

FILE: server/src/routes/api/accounting/formulas/apply.js
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
```js
// Full path: /home/luanngo/boss-dev/server/src/routes/api/accounting/formulas/apply.js
import express from "express";
import prisma from "#shared/database/prismaClient.js";
import authenticate from "#middleware/auth.js";

const router = express.Router();

router.post("/", authenticate, async (req, res) => {
  const { sql } = req.body;
  if (!sql || typeof sql !== "string") {
    return res.status(400).json({ error: "SQL query is required." });
  }
  try {
    // For safety, you might validate or restrict the SQL further.
    await prisma.$executeRawUnsafe(sql);
    return res.status(200).json({ message: "Formula applied successfully." });
  } catch (error) {
    console.error("Apply Formula Error:", error);
    return res.status(500).json({ error: "Failed to apply formula." });
  }
});

export default router;

```

FILE: server/src/routes/api/accounting/importReceiptHST.js
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
```js
// Full path: /home/luanngo/boss-dev/server/src/routes/api/accounting/importReceiptHST.js
import express from "express";
import prisma from "#shared/database/prismaClient.js";
import authenticate from "#middleware/auth.js";
import AccountingService from "#services/accounting/services/AccountingService.js";

const router = express.Router();
const accountingService = new AccountingService();

const normalizePositiveTax = (value) => {
  if (value === null || value === undefined || value === '') return null;
  const numericValue = Number(value);
  if (!Number.isFinite(numericValue)) return null;
  return Math.abs(Number(numericValue.toFixed(2)));
};

router.post("/", authenticate, async (req, res) => {
  const organizationId = req.user.organizationId;

  try {
    const transactions = await prisma.bankTransaction.findMany({
      where: {
        organizationId,
        receiptId: { not: null },
      },
      include: {
        receipt: true,
        category: { select: { id: true, code: true, description: true } },
      },
      orderBy: { date: 'desc' },
    });

    let updated = 0;

    for (const transaction of transactions) {
      const receiptTax = normalizePositiveTax(transaction.receipt?.taxes);
      if (receiptTax === null) continue;

      const mergedNotes = accountingService.mergeReceiptHintsIntoNotes(transaction.notes, {
        normalizedVendor: transaction.receipt?.companyName || null,
        extractedTaxAmount: receiptTax,
        taxConfidence: transaction.receipt?.taxes != null ? 'RECEIPT_IMPORTED' : 'UNKNOWN',
        suggestedExpenseAccount: transaction.category
          ? {
              id: transaction.category.id,
              code: transaction.category.code,
              description: transaction.category.description,
            }
          : null,
      });

      await prisma.bankTransaction.update({
        where: { id: transaction.id },
        data: {
          taxes: receiptTax,
          notes: mergedNotes,
        },
      });

      updated += 1;
    }

    return res.status(200).json({
      message: 'Imported receipt taxes into bank transactions using positive-only tax storage.',
      updated,
    });
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Import Receipt taxes Error:', error);
    return res.status(500).json({ error: 'Failed to import receipt taxes.' });
  }
});

export default router;

```

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
FILE: server/src/routes/api/accounting/imports.js
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
```js
// Full path: /home/luanngo/boss-dev/server/src/routes/api/accounting/imports.js
// server/src/routes/api/accounting/imports.js

import express from 'express';
import formidable from 'formidable';
import fs from 'fs';
import path from 'path';
import { v4 as uuidv4 } from 'uuid';
import ImportService from '#services/accounting/services/ImportService.js';
import AccountingService from '#services/accounting/services/AccountingService.js';
import AccountingReceiptAiService from '#services/accounting/services/AccountingReceiptAiService.js';
import authenticate from '#middleware/auth.js';

const router = express.Router();
const importService = new ImportService();
const accountingService = new AccountingService();

function normalizeDescription(value) {
  return String(value || '').replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim();
}

function parseImportTransactions(importRecord) {
  try {
    const parsed = JSON.parse(importRecord?.transactions || '[]');
    return Array.isArray(parsed) ? parsed : [];
  } catch (error) {
    console.warn('Failed to parse stored import transactions:', error);
    return [];
  }
}

function normalizeOptionalId(value) {
  if (value === null || value === undefined) return null;
  const normalized = String(value).trim();
  return normalized || null;
}

function normalizeOptionalNumber(value, { absolute = false } = {}) {
  if (value === null || value === undefined || value === '') return null;
  const numericValue = Number(value);
  if (!Number.isFinite(numericValue)) return null;
  return absolute ? Math.abs(Number(numericValue.toFixed(2))) : Number(numericValue.toFixed(2));
}

function getFirstFieldValue(fields, name) {
  const value = fields[name];
  const firstValue = Array.isArray(value) ? value[0] : value;
  return firstValue === null || firstValue === undefined ? '' : String(firstValue).trim();
}

async function resolveImportSourceId({ fields, organizationId }) {
  const selectedSourceId = getFirstFieldValue(fields, 'sourceId');

  if (selectedSourceId) {
    const source = await importService.prisma.source.findFirst({
      where: {
        id: selectedSourceId,
        organizationId,
      },
      select: { id: true },
    });

    if (!source) {
      const error = new Error('Selected source was not found.');
      error.statusCode = 400;
      throw error;
    }

    return source.id;
  }

  const sourceName =
    getFirstFieldValue(fields, 'sourceName') ||
    getFirstFieldValue(fields, 'newSourceName') ||
    getFirstFieldValue(fields, 'name');

  if (!sourceName) {
    const error = new Error('Source name is required.');
    error.statusCode = 400;
    throw error;
  }

  return importService.manageSource({
    name: sourceName,
    organizationId,
    type: getFirstFieldValue(fields, 'type'),
    scriptPath: '',
  });
}

function inferNormalizedTypeAndAmount(transaction) {
  const rawAmount = Number(transaction.amount ?? 0);
  const normalizedType = String(transaction.type || '').toLowerCase();

  if (normalizedType === 'income') {
    return { type: 'income', amount: Math.abs(rawAmount) };
  }

  if (normalizedType === 'expense') {
    return { type: 'expense', amount: -Math.abs(rawAmount) };
  }

  if (rawAmount < 0) {
    return { type: 'expense', amount: -Math.abs(rawAmount) };
  }

  return { type: 'income', amount: Math.abs(rawAmount) };
}

function normalizeImportedTransaction(tx, { organizationId, userId, sourceId }) {
  const parsedDate = new Date(tx.date);
  if (Number.isNaN(parsedDate.getTime())) {
    throw new Error(`Invalid date format for transaction: ${JSON.stringify(tx)}`);
  }

  const { type, amount } = inferNormalizedTypeAndAmount(tx);

  return {
    date: parsedDate.toISOString(),
    description: normalizeDescription(tx.description),
    amount,
    taxes: normalizeOptionalNumber(tx.taxes, { absolute: true }),
    balance: normalizeOptionalNumber(tx.balance),
    type,
    organizationId,
    userId,
    sourceId,
    categoryId: normalizeOptionalId(tx.categoryId),
    receiptId: normalizeOptionalId(tx.receiptId),
    postingType: normalizeOptionalId(tx.postingType),
    receiptRequired:
      tx.receiptRequired === true || tx.receiptRequired === false
        ? tx.receiptRequired
        : undefined,
    notes: typeof tx.notes === 'string' && tx.notes.trim() ? tx.notes.trim() : null,
    receiptText: typeof tx.receiptText === 'string' ? tx.receiptText : null,
    receiptTotal: normalizeOptionalNumber(tx.receiptTotal, { absolute: true }),
    receiptSubtotal: normalizeOptionalNumber(tx.receiptSubtotal, { absolute: true }),
    merchantName: typeof tx.merchantName === 'string' ? tx.merchantName.trim() : null,
  };
}

function buildDuplicateKey(tx) {
  const txDate = new Date(tx.date);
  const dateKey = Number.isNaN(txDate.getTime()) ? 'invalid-date' : txDate.toISOString().slice(0, 10);
  const descriptionKey = normalizeDescription(tx.description).toLowerCase();
  const amountKey = Number(Number(tx.amount || 0)).toFixed(2);
  const typeKey = String(tx.type || '').toLowerCase();
  return `${dateKey}|${descriptionKey}|${amountKey}|${typeKey}`;
}

function hasReceiptImportHints(transaction) {
  return /\[\[accountingReceiptHints\]\][\s\S]*?\[\[\/accountingReceiptHints\]\]/i.test(
    String(transaction?.notes || '')
  );
}

function buildReceiptMatchCreateData(transaction) {
  if (transaction?.receiptRequired === false) {
    return {
      receiptMatchStatus: 'NO_MATCH_EXPECTED',
      receiptMatchReviewed: true,
    };
  }

  if (transaction?.receiptId) {
    return { receiptMatchStatus: 'MATCHED_APPROVED' };
  }

  return {};
}

async function fetchCategoryReferenceMap({ prisma, categoryReferences }) {
  if (!categoryReferences.length) {
    return {
      validCategoryIds: new Set(),
      categoryCodeToId: new Map(),
    };
  }

  const categories = await prisma.accountingCategory.findMany({
    select: { id: true, code: true },
  });

  const validCategoryIds = new Set(categories.map((category) => category.id));
  const categoryCodeToId = new Map(
    categories
      .filter((category) => category.code)
      .map((category) => [String(category.code).trim(), category.id])
  );

  return { validCategoryIds, categoryCodeToId };
}

async function fetchValidReceiptIds({ prisma, organizationId, receiptIds }) {
  if (!receiptIds.length) return new Set();

  const rows = await prisma.receipt.findMany({
    where: {
      organizationId,
      id: { in: receiptIds },
    },
    select: { id: true },
  });

  return new Set(rows.map((row) => row.id));
}

async function sanitizeReferencedIdsForInsert({ prisma, organizationId, transactions }) {
  const categoryReferences = Array.from(
    new Set(
      transactions.flatMap((tx) => [
        normalizeOptionalId(tx.categoryId),
        normalizeOptionalId(tx.aiSuggestedCategoryId),
        tx.aiSuggestedCategoryCode ? `CODE:${String(tx.aiSuggestedCategoryCode).trim()}` : null,
      ]).filter(Boolean)
    )
  );

  const receiptIds = Array.from(
    new Set(transactions.map((tx) => normalizeOptionalId(tx.receiptId)).filter(Boolean))
  );

  const [{ validCategoryIds, categoryCodeToId }, validReceiptIds] = await Promise.all([
    fetchCategoryReferenceMap({ prisma, categoryReferences }),
    fetchValidReceiptIds({ prisma, organizationId, receiptIds }),
  ]);

  const invalidCategoryIds = [];
  const invalidReceiptIds = [];

  const sanitizedTransactions = transactions.map((tx) => {
    let categoryId = normalizeOptionalId(tx.categoryId);
    const suggestedCategoryId = normalizeOptionalId(tx.aiSuggestedCategoryId);

    if (!categoryId && suggestedCategoryId && validCategoryIds.has(suggestedCategoryId)) {
      categoryId = suggestedCategoryId;
    }

    if (!categoryId && tx.aiSuggestedCategoryCode) {
      categoryId = categoryCodeToId.get(String(tx.aiSuggestedCategoryCode).trim()) || null;
    }

    if (categoryId && !validCategoryIds.has(categoryId)) {
      invalidCategoryIds.push(categoryId);
      categoryId = null;
    }

    let receiptId = normalizeOptionalId(tx.receiptId);
    if (receiptId && !validReceiptIds.has(receiptId)) {
      invalidReceiptIds.push(receiptId);
      receiptId = null;
    }

    return {
      ...tx,
      categoryId,
      receiptId,
    };
  });

  return {
    sanitizedTransactions,
    invalidCategoryIds: Array.from(new Set(invalidCategoryIds)),
    invalidReceiptIds: Array.from(new Set(invalidReceiptIds)),
  };
}

async function enrichTransactionsWithReceiptAi({ organizationId, transactions, force = false }) {
  if (!force && transactions.every((transaction) => hasReceiptImportHints(transaction))) {
    return transactions;
  }

  const receiptIds = Array.from(new Set(transactions.map((tx) => tx.receiptId).filter(Boolean)));
  const receipts = receiptIds.length
    ? await importService.prisma.receipt.findMany({
        where: {
          organizationId,
          id: { in: receiptIds },
        },
        select: {
          id: true,
          companyName: true,
          total: true,
          hst: true,
          text: true,
        },
      })
    : [];

  const receiptMap = new Map(receipts.map((receipt) => [receipt.id, receipt]));

  return Promise.all(
    transactions.map((transaction) => {
      if (!force && hasReceiptImportHints(transaction)) return transaction;

      return AccountingReceiptAiService.enrichImportedTransaction({
        organizationId,
        transaction,
        receipt: transaction.receiptId ? receiptMap.get(transaction.receiptId) || null : null,
      });
    })
  );
}

async function validateImportTransactions({ prisma, organizationId, importRecord, transactions }) {
  const rows = transactions.map((transaction, index) => {
    const parsedDate = new Date(transaction.date);
    const amount = Number(transaction.amount);
    const issues = [];
    const warnings = [];

    if (!transaction.description || !normalizeDescription(transaction.description)) {
      issues.push({ code: 'missing_description', message: 'Description is required.' });
    }

    if (!transaction.date || Number.isNaN(parsedDate.getTime())) {
      issues.push({ code: 'invalid_date', message: 'Date is missing or invalid.' });
    }

    if (transaction.amount === null || transaction.amount === undefined || !Number.isFinite(amount)) {
      issues.push({ code: 'invalid_amount', message: 'Amount is missing or invalid.' });
    }

    if (transaction.aiNeedsReview) {
      warnings.push({ code: 'ai_review', message: 'AI marked this row for review.' });
    }

    return {
      index,
      transaction,
      parsedDate,
      amount,
      duplicateKey: issues.length ? null : buildDuplicateKey(transaction),
      issues,
      warnings,
    };
  });

  if (!importRecord.sourceId) {
    rows.forEach((row) => {
      row.issues.push({ code: 'missing_source', message: 'Import source is missing.' });
    });
  }

  const categoryReferences = Array.from(
    new Set(
      rows.flatMap(({ transaction }) => [
        normalizeOptionalId(transaction.categoryId),
        normalizeOptionalId(transaction.aiSuggestedCategoryId),
        transaction.aiSuggestedCategoryCode ? `CODE:${String(transaction.aiSuggestedCategoryCode).trim()}` : null,
      ]).filter(Boolean)
    )
  );

  const receiptIds = Array.from(
    new Set(rows.map(({ transaction }) => normalizeOptionalId(transaction.receiptId)).filter(Boolean))
  );

  const [{ validCategoryIds, categoryCodeToId }, validReceiptIds] = await Promise.all([
    fetchCategoryReferenceMap({ prisma, categoryReferences }),
    fetchValidReceiptIds({ prisma, organizationId, receiptIds }),
  ]);

  rows.forEach((row) => {
    const categoryId = normalizeOptionalId(row.transaction.categoryId);
    const suggestedCategoryId = normalizeOptionalId(row.transaction.aiSuggestedCategoryId);
    const suggestedCategoryCode = row.transaction.aiSuggestedCategoryCode
      ? String(row.transaction.aiSuggestedCategoryCode).trim()
      : null;
    const receiptId = normalizeOptionalId(row.transaction.receiptId);

    if (categoryId && !validCategoryIds.has(categoryId)) {
      row.warnings.push({ code: 'invalid_category', message: 'Category will be cleared during import.' });
    }

    if (!categoryId && suggestedCategoryId && !validCategoryIds.has(suggestedCategoryId)) {
      row.warnings.push({ code: 'invalid_ai_category', message: 'AI category ID is not valid.' });
    }

    if (!categoryId && !suggestedCategoryId && suggestedCategoryCode && !categoryCodeToId.has(suggestedCategoryCode)) {
      row.warnings.push({ code: 'unknown_category_code', message: 'AI category code is not in the chart.' });
    }

    if (receiptId && !validReceiptIds.has(receiptId)) {
      row.warnings.push({ code: 'invalid_receipt', message: 'Receipt link will be cleared during import.' });
    }
  });

  const duplicateKeys = new Map();
  rows.forEach((row) => {
    if (!row.duplicateKey) return;
    const indexes = duplicateKeys.get(row.duplicateKey) || [];
    indexes.push(row.index);
    duplicateKeys.set(row.duplicateKey, indexes);
  });

  duplicateKeys.forEach((indexes) => {
    if (indexes.length < 2) return;
    indexes.forEach((index) => {
      rows[index].warnings.push({
        code: 'duplicate_in_import',
        message: `Duplicate of row(s) ${indexes.filter((value) => value !== index).map((value) => value + 1).join(', ')} in this import.`,
      });
    });
  });

  const validDates = rows
    .map((row) => row.parsedDate)
    .filter((date) => date && !Number.isNaN(date.getTime()));

  let existingDuplicateMap = new Map();
  if (validDates.length) {
    const minDate = new Date(Math.min(...validDates.map((date) => date.getTime())));
    const maxDate = new Date(Math.max(...validDates.map((date) => date.getTime())));
    minDate.setUTCHours(0, 0, 0, 0);
    maxDate.setUTCHours(23, 59, 59, 999);

    const existingTransactions = await prisma.bankTransaction.findMany({
      where: {
        organizationId,
        date: { gte: minDate, lte: maxDate },
      },
      select: {
        id: true,
        date: true,
        description: true,
        amount: true,
        type: true,
        sourceId: true,
      },
    });

    existingDuplicateMap = existingTransactions.reduce((map, transaction) => {
      const key = buildDuplicateKey(transaction);
      const matches = map.get(key) || [];
      matches.push(transaction);
      map.set(key, matches);
      return map;
    }, new Map());
  }

  rows.forEach((row) => {
    const matches = row.duplicateKey ? existingDuplicateMap.get(row.duplicateKey) || [] : [];
    if (!matches.length) return;

    row.warnings.push({
      code: 'possible_existing_duplicate',
      message: `Matches ${matches.length} existing transaction${matches.length === 1 ? '' : 's'}.`,
      matches,
    });
  });

  const normalizedRows = rows.map(({ parsedDate, duplicateKey, ...row }) => ({
    ...row,
    status: row.issues.length ? 'error' : row.warnings.length ? 'warning' : 'ready',
  }));

  const totalIncome = transactions.reduce((sum, tx) => {
    const amount = Number(tx.amount);
    return Number.isFinite(amount) && amount > 0 ? sum + amount : sum;
  }, 0);

  const totalExpenses = transactions.reduce((sum, tx) => {
    const amount = Number(tx.amount);
    return Number.isFinite(amount) && amount < 0 ? sum + Math.abs(amount) : sum;
  }, 0);

  const totalTax = transactions.reduce((sum, tx) => {
    const taxes = Number(tx.taxes);
    return Number.isFinite(taxes) ? sum + Math.abs(taxes) : sum;
  }, 0);

  return {
    importId: importRecord.id,
    status: normalizedRows.some((row) => row.status === 'error') ? 'blocked' : 'ready',
    summary: {
      totalRows: normalizedRows.length,
      readyRows: normalizedRows.filter((row) => row.status === 'ready').length,
      warningRows: normalizedRows.filter((row) => row.status === 'warning').length,
      errorRows: normalizedRows.filter((row) => row.status === 'error').length,
      totalIncome,
      totalExpenses,
      totalTax,
      dateFrom: validDates.length ? new Date(Math.min(...validDates.map((date) => date.getTime()))).toISOString() : null,
      dateTo: validDates.length ? new Date(Math.max(...validDates.map((date) => date.getTime()))).toISOString() : null,
    },
    rows: normalizedRows,
  };
}

router.get('/', authenticate, async (req, res) => {
  try {
    const organizationId = req.user.organizationId;

    const [importRecords, sources] = await Promise.all([
      importService.prisma.importRecord.findMany({
        where: { organizationId },
        include: {
          source: { select: { id: true, name: true, type: true } },
        },
        orderBy: { createdAt: 'desc' },
      }),
      importService.prisma.source.findMany({
        where: { organizationId },
        select: { id: true, name: true, type: true },
        orderBy: { name: 'asc' },
      }),
    ]);

    const sourceStatuses = await Promise.all(
      sources.map(async (source) => {
        const [latestTransaction, transactionCount] = await Promise.all([
          importService.prisma.bankTransaction.findFirst({
            where: { organizationId, sourceId: source.id },
            orderBy: [{ date: 'desc' }, { id: 'desc' }],
            select: { id: true, description: true, amount: true, date: true },
          }),
          importService.prisma.bankTransaction.count({
            where: { organizationId, sourceId: source.id },
          }),
        ]);

        return {
          sourceId: source.id,
          sourceName: source.name,
          sourceType: source.type,
          latestTransactionId: latestTransaction?.id ?? null,
          latestTransactionDescription: latestTransaction?.description ?? null,
          latestTransactionAmount: latestTransaction?.amount ?? null,
          latestTransactionDate: latestTransaction?.date ?? null,
          transactionCount,
        };
      })
    );

    return res.status(200).json({ importRecords, sourceStatuses });
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Error fetching import records:', error);
    return res.status(500).json({ error: 'Failed to fetch import records.' });
  }
});

router.post('/upload', authenticate, (req, res) => {
  const form = formidable({
    multiples: false,
    keepExtensions: true,
    maxFileSize: 10 * 1024 * 1024,
  });

  form.parse(req, async (error, fields, files) => {
    try {
      if (error) throw error;

      const upload = files.file || files.upload;
      if (!upload) {
        return res.status(400).json({ error: 'No file uploaded.' });
      }

      const organizationId = req.user.organizationId;
      const userId = req.user.id || req.user.userId;
      const uploadedFile = Array.isArray(upload) ? upload[0] : upload;
      const sourceId = await resolveImportSourceId({ fields, organizationId });

      const importsDir = path.join(process.cwd(), 'uploads', 'imports', organizationId);
      fs.mkdirSync(importsDir, { recursive: true });

      const extension = path.extname(uploadedFile.originalFilename || '') || '.csv';
      const targetFilePath = path.join(importsDir, `${uuidv4()}${extension}`);
      fs.copyFileSync(uploadedFile.filepath, targetFilePath);

      const importRecordId = await importService.createImportRecord({
        filePath: targetFilePath,
        scriptPath: null,
        jsonPath: null,
        organizationId,
        userId,
        sourceId,
      });

      const isPdf = extension.toLowerCase() === '.pdf' || uploadedFile.mimetype === 'application/pdf';

      if (isPdf) {
        await importService.processPdfImport({
          importId: importRecordId,
          userId,
          sessionId: importRecordId,
          organizationId,
          specialInstructions: getFirstFieldValue(fields, 'specialInstructions'),
        });
      } else {
        await importService.processImport({
          importId: importRecordId,
          userId,
          sessionId: importRecordId,
          specialInstructions: getFirstFieldValue(fields, 'specialInstructions'),
        });
      }

      const importRecord = await importService.prisma.importRecord.findFirst({
        where: { id: importRecordId, organizationId },
      });
      const parsedTransactions = importService.parseImportTransactions(importRecord);
      const enrichedTransactions = await importService.enrichTransactionsWithReceiptAi({
        organizationId,
        transactions: parsedTransactions,
        force: true,
      });
      await importService.prisma.importRecord.update({
        where: { id: importRecordId },
        data: { transactions: JSON.stringify(enrichedTransactions) },
      });
      const validationReport = await importService.validateImportTransactions({
        organizationId,
        importRecord: { ...importRecord, transactions: JSON.stringify(enrichedTransactions) },
        transactions: enrichedTransactions,
      });

      return res.status(201).json({
        message: 'File processed successfully.',
        importId: importRecordId,
        validationReport,
      });
    } catch (uploadError) {
      console.error('Import upload error:', uploadError);
      return res
        .status(uploadError.statusCode || 500)
        .json({ error: uploadError.message || 'Failed to upload import file.' });
    }
  });
});

router.get('/:id', authenticate, async (req, res) => {
  try {
    const organizationId = req.user.organizationId;
    const importRecord = await importService.prisma.importRecord.findFirst({
      where: {
        id: req.params.id,
        organizationId,
      },
      include: {
        source: { select: { id: true, name: true, type: true } },
      },
    });

    if (!importRecord) {
      return res.status(404).json({ error: 'Import record not found.' });
    }

    const transactions = importService.parseImportTransactions(importRecord);

    return res.status(200).json({
      importRecord,
      transactions,
    });
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Error fetching import record:', error);
    return res.status(500).json({ error: 'Failed to fetch import record.' });
  }
});

router.post('/:id/validate', authenticate, async (req, res) => {
  try {
    const organizationId = req.user.organizationId;
    const importRecord = await importService.prisma.importRecord.findFirst({
      where: {
        id: req.params.id,
        organizationId,
      },
      include: {
        source: { select: { id: true, name: true, type: true } },
      },
    });

    if (!importRecord) {
      return res.status(404).json({ error: 'Import record not found.' });
    }

    const transactions = importService.parseImportTransactions(importRecord);
    const validationReport = await importService.validateImportTransactions({
      organizationId,
      importRecord,
      transactions,
    });

    return res.status(200).json({ validationReport });
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Error validating import:', error);
    return res.status(500).json({ error: 'Failed to validate import.' });
  }
});

router.put('/:id/transactions', authenticate, async (req, res) => {
  try {
    const organizationId = req.user.organizationId;
    const importRecord = await importService.prisma.importRecord.findFirst({
      where: {
        id: req.params.id,
        organizationId,
      },
      include: {
        source: { select: { id: true, name: true, type: true } },
      },
    });

    if (!importRecord) {
      return res.status(404).json({ error: 'Import record not found.' });
    }

    if (importRecord.status === 'IMPORTED') {
      return res.status(400).json({ error: 'Imported records cannot be edited.' });
    }

    const transactions = Array.isArray(req.body?.transactions) ? req.body.transactions : null;
    if (!transactions) {
      return res.status(400).json({ error: 'transactions must be an array.' });
    }

    const cleanedTransactions = transactions.map((transaction) =>
      importService.cleanPreviewTransaction(transaction)
    );

    await importService.prisma.importRecord.update({
      where: { id: importRecord.id },
      data: { transactions: JSON.stringify(cleanedTransactions) },
    });

    const validationReport = await importService.validateImportTransactions({
      organizationId,
      importRecord,
      transactions: cleanedTransactions,
    });

    return res.status(200).json({
      message: 'Import preview saved.',
      transactions: cleanedTransactions,
      validationReport,
    });
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Error updating import preview transactions:', error);
    return res.status(500).json({ error: 'Failed to update import preview.' });
  }
});

router.post('/:id/revise', authenticate, async (req, res) => {
  try {
    const organizationId = req.user.organizationId;
    const importRecord = await importService.prisma.importRecord.findFirst({
      where: {
        id: req.params.id,
        organizationId,
      },
      include: {
        source: { select: { id: true, name: true, type: true } },
      },
    });

    if (!importRecord) {
      return res.status(404).json({ error: 'Import record not found.' });
    }

    const transactions = importService.parseImportTransactions(importRecord);

    const instructions = String(req.body.specialInstructions || '').trim();
    const instructionText = instructions.toLowerCase();
    const instructionRevisedTransactions = importService.applyRevisionInstructions({
      transactions,
      instructions,
      source: importRecord.source,
    });

    const revisedTransactions = instructionRevisedTransactions.map((tx) => {
      let taxes = tx.taxes;
      if (!taxes && instructionText.includes('prefer receipt tax')) {
        const noteHints = AccountingReceiptAiService.parseReceiptHintsFromNotes(tx.notes);
        taxes = noteHints?.extractedTax ?? taxes;
      }

      const receiptRequired =
        instructionText.includes('mark expenses as receipt required') && Number(tx.amount || 0) < 0
          ? true
          : tx.receiptRequired;

      return importService.cleanPreviewTransaction({
        ...tx,
        taxes,
        receiptRequired,
      });
    });

    const enrichedTransactions = await importService.enrichTransactionsWithReceiptAi({
      organizationId,
      transactions: revisedTransactions,
      force: true,
    });

    const validationReport = await importService.validateImportTransactions({
      organizationId,
      importRecord,
      transactions: enrichedTransactions,
    });

    await importService.prisma.importRecord.update({
      where: { id: importRecord.id },
      data: {
        transactions: JSON.stringify(enrichedTransactions),
      },
    });

    return res.status(200).json({
      message: 'Import revised successfully.',
      transactions: enrichedTransactions,
      validationReport,
    });
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Error revising import:', error);
    return res.status(500).json({ error: 'Failed to revise import.' });
  }
});

router.post('/:id/import', authenticate, async (req, res) => {
  try {
    const organizationId = req.user.organizationId;
    const userId = req.user.id || req.user.userId;

    const importRecord = await importService.prisma.importRecord.findFirst({
      where: {
        id: req.params.id,
        organizationId,
      },
      include: {
        source: { select: { id: true, name: true, type: true } },
      },
    });

    if (!importRecord) {
      return res.status(404).json({ error: 'Import record not found.' });
    }

    const rawTransactions = importService.parseImportTransactions(importRecord);

    const runRulesOnImport = req.body?.runRulesOnImport === true;
    const allowExistingDuplicates = req.body?.allowExistingDuplicates === true;
    const selectedIndexes = Array.isArray(req.body?.approvedRowIndexes)
      ? new Set(req.body.approvedRowIndexes.map((value) => Number(value)).filter(Number.isInteger))
      : null;

    const rowsForImport = rawTransactions
      .map((tx, index) => ({
        tx,
        index,
        approvedForImport: selectedIndexes ? selectedIndexes.has(index) : tx.approvedForImport !== false,
      }))
      .filter((row) => row.approvedForImport);

    const selectionSkippedRows = rawTransactions
      .map((tx, index) => ({ tx, index }))
      .filter(({ tx, index }) => (selectedIndexes ? !selectedIndexes.has(index) : tx.approvedForImport === false))
      .map(({ tx, index }) => ({
        index,
        reason: 'not_approved',
        transaction: tx,
      }));

    if (!rowsForImport.length) {
      return res.status(400).json({ error: 'No rows were approved for import.' });
    }

    const normalizedTransactions = await importService.enrichTransactionsWithReceiptAi({
      organizationId,
      transactions: rowsForImport.map(({ tx, index }) =>
        importService.normalizeImportedTransaction(
          {
            ...tx,
            approvedForImport: true,
            importRowIndex: index,
          },
          {
            organizationId,
            userId,
            sourceId: importRecord.sourceId || null,
          }
        )
      ),
    });

    const validationReport = await importService.validateImportTransactions({
      organizationId,
      importRecord,
      transactions: normalizedTransactions,
    });

    if (validationReport.summary.errorRows > 0) {
      return res.status(400).json({
        error: 'Import has validation errors. Fix the blocked rows before importing.',
        validationReport,
      });
    }

    const { rows: approvedRows, skippedRows: approvalSkippedRows } =
      importService.filterApprovedImportRows({
        transactions: normalizedTransactions,
        validationReport,
        allowExistingDuplicates,
      });

    const approvedTransactions = approvedRows.map((row) => ({
      ...row.transaction,
      importRowIndex: row.transaction.importRowIndex ?? row.index,
    }));

    const preparedTransactions = runRulesOnImport
      ? await accountingService.applyRulesToTransactions(
          approvedTransactions.map((tx) => ({
            ...tx,
            sourceType: importRecord?.source?.type || null,
          })),
          organizationId
        )
      : { modifiedTransactions: approvedTransactions, rulesAppliedCount: 0 };

    const dedupeSeen = new Set();
    const duplicateSkippedRows = [];
    const dedupedTransactions = preparedTransactions.modifiedTransactions.filter((tx) => {
      const key = importService.buildDuplicateKey(tx);
      if (dedupeSeen.has(key)) {
        duplicateSkippedRows.push({
          index: tx.importRowIndex ?? null,
          reason: 'duplicate_in_import',
          transaction: tx,
        });
        return false;
      }
      dedupeSeen.add(key);
      return true;
    });

    const { sanitizedTransactions, invalidCategoryIds, invalidReceiptIds } =
      await importService.sanitizeReferencedIdsForInsert({
        organizationId,
        transactions: dedupedTransactions,
      });

    const reportBase = {
      importId: importRecord.id,
      sourceId: importRecord.sourceId || null,
      sourceName: importRecord.source?.name || null,
      runRulesOnImport,
      allowExistingDuplicates,
      validationSummary: validationReport.summary,
      selectedRows: selectedIndexes ? selectedIndexes.size : validationReport.summary.approvedRows,
      approvedRows: approvedRows.length,
      skippedRows: [...selectionSkippedRows, ...approvalSkippedRows, ...duplicateSkippedRows],
      invalidCategoryIds,
      invalidReceiptIds,
      rulesAppliedCount: preparedTransactions.rulesAppliedCount || 0,
      createdAt: new Date().toISOString(),
    };

    const result = await importService.prisma.$transaction(async (prisma) => {
      const inserted = [];

      for (const transaction of sanitizedTransactions) {
        const created = await prisma.bankTransaction.create({
          data: {
            date: new Date(transaction.date),
            description: transaction.description,
            amount: transaction.amount,
            taxes: transaction.taxes,
            balance: transaction.balance,
            type: transaction.type,
            postingType: transaction.postingType || null,
            ...buildReceiptMatchCreateData(transaction),
            notes: transaction.notes || null,
            organization: { connect: { id: organizationId } },
            user: { connect: { id: userId } },
            ...(transaction.sourceId ? { source: { connect: { id: transaction.sourceId } } } : {}),
            ...(transaction.categoryId ? { category: { connect: { id: transaction.categoryId } } } : {}),
            ...(transaction.receiptId ? { receipt: { connect: { id: transaction.receiptId } } } : {}),
          },
          include: {
            category: true,
            source: true,
            receipt: true,
          },
        });

        inserted.push(created);
      }

      await prisma.importRecord.update({
        where: { id: importRecord.id },
        data: {
          status: 'IMPORTED',
          importedAt: new Date(),
          transactions: JSON.stringify(sanitizedTransactions),
        },
      });

      return inserted;
    });

    for (const transaction of result) {
      try {
        await accountingService.syncJournalWithBankTx(transaction.id, userId);
      } catch (syncError) {
        console.warn(`Failed to sync journal for imported transaction ${transaction.id}:`, syncError?.message || syncError);
      }
    }

    const importReport = {
      ...reportBase,
      insertedCount: result.length,
      insertedTransactionIds: result.map((transaction) => transaction.id),
      skippedCount: reportBase.skippedRows.length,
      duplicateSkippedCount: reportBase.skippedRows.filter((row) =>
        ['existing_duplicate', 'duplicate_in_import'].includes(row.reason)
      ).length,
      importedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
    };

    const reportPath = await importService.saveImportReport({
      organizationId,
      importId: importRecord.id,
      report: importReport,
    });

    await importService.prisma.importRecord.update({
      where: { id: importRecord.id },
      data: { jsonPath: reportPath },
    });

    return res.status(200).json({
      count: result.length,
      invalidCategoryIds,
      invalidReceiptIds,
      validationReport,
      importReport: {
        ...importReport,
        reportPath,
      },
      message: runRulesOnImport && preparedTransactions.rulesAppliedCount
        ? `Transactions imported successfully. Applied ${preparedTransactions.rulesAppliedCount} rule${preparedTransactions.rulesAppliedCount === 1 ? '' : 's'} during import.`
        : 'Transactions imported successfully.',
    });
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Error importing transactions:', error);
    return res.status(500).json({ error: error.message || 'Failed to import transactions.' });
  }
});

export default router;

```

```js
// Full path: /home/luanngo/boss-dev/server/src/routes/api/accounting/index.js
import express from 'express';
import transactionsRouter from './transactions.js';
import categoriesRouter from './categories.js';

import sourceIdRouter from './sources/sourceId.js';

  }
});
```

```js
// Full path: /home/luanngo/boss-dev/server/src/routes/api/accounting/journalEntries.js
// routes/api/accounting/journalEntries.js
import express from 'express';
import authenticate from '#middleware/auth.js';
import AccountingService from '#services/accounting/services/AccountingService.js';

const router = express.Router();
const svc = new AccountingService();

router.get('/', authenticate, async (req, res) => {
  try {
    const organizationId = req.user.organizationId;
    const page = Math.max(1, parseInt(req.query.page, 10) || 1);
    const pageSize = Math.min(100, parseInt(req.query.pageSize, 10) || 25);
    const search = req.query.search || '';
    const dateFrom = req.query.dateFrom ? new Date(req.query.dateFrom) : null;
    const dateTo = req.query.dateTo ? new Date(req.query.dateTo) : null;
    const source = req.query.source || '';
    const posted = req.query.posted === 'true' ? true : req.query.posted === 'false' ? false : null;
    const allowedKeys = ['date', 'memo'];
    const sortKey = allowedKeys.includes(req.query.sortKey) ? req.query.sortKey : 'date';
    const sortDir = req.query.sortDir === 'asc' ? 'asc' : 'desc';

    const result = await svc.getJournalEntries(
      organizationId,
      { page, pageSize, search, dateFrom, dateTo, source, posted, sortKey, sortDir }
    );

    const summary = await svc.getJournalSummary(organizationId);

    res.json({
      entries: result.entries,
      summary,
      pagination: { page, pageSize, total: result.total, totalPages: Math.ceil(result.total / pageSize) }
    });
  } catch (err) {
    console.error('GET /journal-entries error:', err);
    res.status(500).json({ error: err.message });
  }
});

// fetch single entry by id
router.get('/:id', authenticate, async (req, res) => {
  try {
    const organizationId = req.user.organizationId;
    const id = req.params.id;
    const entry = await svc.getJournalEntryById(id, organizationId);
    if (!entry) return res.status(404).json({ error: 'Not found' });
    res.json(entry);
  } catch (err) {
    console.error('GET /journal-entries/:id error:', err);
    res.status(500).json({ error: err.message });
  }
});

// create
router.post('/', authenticate, async (req, res) => {
  try {
    const orgId = req.user.organizationId;
    const userId = req.user.id || req.user.userId;;
    const { date, memo, lines } = req.body;
    const entry = await svc.createJournalEntry({
      date, memo, lines,
      organizationId: orgId, userId
    });
    res.status(201).json({ entry });
  } catch (err) {
    res.status(400).json({ error: err.message });
  }
});

// update
router.put('/:id', authenticate, async (req, res) => {
  try {
    const orgId = req.user.organizationId;
    const { date, memo, lines } = req.body;
    const entry = await svc.updateJournalEntry(
      req.params.id,
      { date, memo, lines },
      orgId
    );
    res.json({ entry });
  } catch (err) {
    res.status(400).json({ error: err.message });
  }
});

// delete
router.delete('/:id', authenticate, async (req, res) => {
  try {
    await svc.deleteJournalEntry(req.params.id, req.user.organizationId);
    res.json({ message: 'Deleted' });
  } catch (err) {
    res.status(400).json({ error: err.message });
  }
});

export default router;

```

```js
// Full path: /home/luanngo/boss-dev/server/src/routes/api/accounting/payroll-adjustments.js
import express from "express";
import authenticate from "#middleware/auth.js";
import prisma from "#shared/database/prismaClient.js";

const router = express.Router();

// Get adjustments for a given payroll record.
// Expects query parameter ?payrollRecordId=...
router.get("/", authenticate, async (req, res) => {
  try {
    const { payrollRecordId } = req.query;
    if (!payrollRecordId) {
      return res.status(400).json({ error: "Missing payrollRecordId parameter." });
    }
    const adjustments = await prisma.payrollAdjustment.findMany({
      where: { payrollRecordId },
      orderBy: { date: "asc" }
    });
    return res.status(200).json(adjustments);
  } catch (error) {
    console.error("Payroll Adjustments GET Error:", error.message);
    return res.status(500).json({ error: "Failed to fetch payroll adjustments." });
  }
});

// Create a new payroll adjustment.
router.post("/", authenticate, async (req, res) => {
  try {
    const { payrollRecordId, name, amount, date, notes } = req.body;
    if (!payrollRecordId || !name || amount === undefined || !date) {
      return res.status(400).json({ error: "Missing required fields." });
    }
    const adjustment = await prisma.payrollAdjustment.create({
      data: {
        payrollRecordId,
        name,
        amount: parseFloat(amount),
        date: new Date(date),
        notes: notes || ""
      }
    });
    return res.status(200).json(adjustment);
  } catch (error) {
    console.error("Create Payroll Adjustment Error:", error.message);
    return res.status(500).json({ error: "Failed to create payroll adjustment." });
  }
});

// Update an existing payroll adjustment.
router.put("/:id", authenticate, async (req, res) => {
  try {
    const { id } = req.params;
    const { name, amount, date, notes } = req.body;
    if (!name || amount === undefined || !date) {
      return res.status(400).json({ error: "Missing required fields." });
    }
    const adjustment = await prisma.payrollAdjustment.update({
      where: { id },
      data: {
        name,
        amount: parseFloat(amount),
        date: new Date(date),
        notes: notes || ""
      }
    });
    return res.status(200).json(adjustment);
  } catch (error) {
    console.error("Update Payroll Adjustment Error:", error.message);
    return res.status(500).json({ error: "Failed to update payroll adjustment." });
  }
});

// Delete a payroll adjustment.
router.delete("/:id", authenticate, async (req, res) => {
  try {
    const { id } = req.params;
    await prisma.payrollAdjustment.delete({
      where: { id }
    });
    return res.status(200).json({ message: "Payroll adjustment deleted successfully." });
  } catch (error) {
    console.error("Delete Payroll Adjustment Error:", error.message);
    return res.status(500).json({ error: "Failed to delete payroll adjustment." });
  }
});

export default router;

```
