```js
      'Open Receipt Matching.',
      'Approve exact or high-confidence matches after checking amount, date, and vendor.',
      'Review weak matches manually instead of auto-linking them.',
      'For transactions with no receipt candidate, upload or import the missing receipt.',
      'Refresh AI Manager to confirm missing and unmatched receipt counts decreased.',
    ],
    verifyIn: ['Receipt Matching', 'Transactions', 'AI Audit'],
  },
  PAYROLL: {
    toolName: 'Payroll',
    primaryTab: 'payroll',
    nextStep: 'Open Payroll and review zero-pay records and adjustments before changing payroll data.',
    steps: [
      'Open Payroll.',
      'Review the selected payroll schedule and zero-pay records.',
      'Confirm whether each zero-pay record is inactive, placeholder, or an error.',
      'Open adjustments and verify advances, tips, and manual corrections.',
      'Make payroll changes only after confirming source records.',
    ],
    verifyIn: ['Payroll'],
  },
};

const buildIssue = ({
  id,
  count,
  evidence,
  affectedRecords = [],
  recommendation,
  canGenerateProposals = false,
  estimateAvailable = false,
}) => ({
  id,
  ...actionMeta[id],
  severity: actionMeta[id].risk,
  count: Number(count || 0),
  evidence,
  recommendation,
  canGenerateProposals,
  estimateAvailable,
  fixGuide: fixGuides[id],
  affectedRecords: affectedRecords.filter((value) => value !== null && value !== undefined).slice(0, 25),
  requiresApproval: actionMeta[id].risk !== 'LOW' || estimateAvailable || actionMeta[id].automationLevel !== 'safe_auto_match_possible',
});

export default class AccountingAIManagerService {
  constructor() {
    this.auditService = new AccountingAuditService();
    this.accountingService = new AccountingService();
  }

  buildHstEstimates(facts) {
    const missingTaxRows = Array.isArray(facts?.bankTransactions?.missingTaxes)
      ? facts.bankTransactions.missingTaxes
      : [];

    return missingTaxRows
      .filter((tx) => Number(tx.amount || 0) < 0)
      .slice(0, 20)
      .map((tx) => {
        const grossAmount = Math.abs(Number(tx.amount || 0));
        const estimatedTaxIncluded = round2(grossAmount * 0.13 / 1.13);
        return {
          type: 'HST_AMOUNT',
          transactionId: tx.id,
          date: tx.date,
          description: tx.description,
          currentValue: tx.taxes ?? 0,
          estimatedValue: estimatedTaxIncluded,
          estimated: true,
          estimateMethod: '13% HST back-calculated from gross transaction amount when no transaction-specific tax evidence exists.',
          sourceBasis: [
            'Transaction amount is present.',
            'Stored tax amount is empty or zero.',
            'No receipt-specific tax evidence was available in the diagnostic sample.',
          ],
          confidence: 0.55,
          needsReview: true,
          warning: 'Use this as a review aid only. Confirm against receipt, vendor history, and tax treatment before filing.',
        };
      });
  }

  buildActionPlan(facts) {
    const metrics = facts?.overview?.closeInfo?.metrics || {};
    const issues = [];

    const unmappedAccounts = [
      ...(facts?.chartOfAccounts?.unmapped || []),
      ...(facts?.chartOfAccounts?.plWithoutStatementLine || []),
    ];
    const uniqueUnmappedAccounts = Array.from(new Map(unmappedAccounts.map((item) => [item.id, item])).values());
    if (uniqueUnmappedAccounts.length) {
      issues.push(buildIssue({
        id: 'CHART_MAPPING',
        count: uniqueUnmappedAccounts.length,
        evidence: `${uniqueUnmappedAccounts.length} account${uniqueUnmappedAccounts.length === 1 ? '' : 's'} need statement mapping or statement lines.`,
        affectedRecords: uniqueUnmappedAccounts.map((account) => account.id),
        recommendation: 'Use AI to suggest statement group and line from account code, description, current category, and transaction history. Apply only after review.',
      }));
    }

    if (Number(metrics.uncategorizedTransactions || 0) > 0) {
      issues.push(buildIssue({
        id: 'UNCATEGORIZED',
        count: metrics.uncategorizedTransactions,
        evidence: `${metrics.uncategorizedTransactions} bank transaction${metrics.uncategorizedTransactions === 1 ? '' : 's'} are missing categories.`,
        affectedRecords: (facts?.bankTransactions?.uncategorized || []).map((tx) => tx.id),
        recommendation: 'Generate AI proposals for a controlled batch, then approve or reject them from Manual Proposals.',
        canGenerateProposals: true,
      }));
    }

    const unreconciledCount = Number(metrics.unreconciledTransactions || metrics.unpostedBankTransactions || 0);
    if (unreconciledCount > 0) {
      issues.push(buildIssue({
        id: 'BANK_RECONCILIATION',
        count: unreconciledCount,
        evidence: `${unreconciledCount} bank transaction${unreconciledCount === 1 ? '' : 's'} are not reconciled or posted.`,
        affectedRecords: (facts?.bankTransactions?.missingJournal || []).map((tx) => tx.id),
        recommendation: 'Match transactions to existing journal entries where possible; otherwise generate review-required posting proposals.',
      }));
    }

    if ((facts?.journal?.unbalanced || []).length) {
      issues.push(buildIssue({
        id: 'JOURNAL_BALANCE',
        count: facts.journal.unbalanced.length,
        evidence: `${facts.journal.unbalanced.length} sampled journal entr${facts.journal.unbalanced.length === 1 ? 'y is' : 'ies are'} unbalanced.`,
        affectedRecords: facts.journal.unbalanced.map((entry) => entry.id),
        recommendation: 'Diagnose likely missing lines, reversed signs, or duplicated lines. Any balancing entry must be approved manually.',
      }));
    }

    if ((facts?.bankTransactions?.duplicateGroups || []).length) {
      issues.push(buildIssue({
        id: 'DUPLICATES',
        count: facts.bankTransactions.duplicateGroups.length,
        evidence: `${facts.bankTransactions.duplicateGroups.length} duplicate-looking transaction group${facts.bankTransactions.duplicateGroups.length === 1 ? '' : 's'} were found.`,
        affectedRecords: facts.bankTransactions.duplicateGroups.flatMap((group) => (group.sample || []).map((tx) => tx.id)),
        recommendation: 'Compare amount, date, source, import batch, and description. Recommend the record to keep, then require approval before hiding or deleting.',
      }));
    }

    const hstCount = Number(metrics.hstLinesNeedingReview || 0);
    const missingTaxCount = (facts?.bankTransactions?.missingTaxes || []).length;
    if (hstCount > 0 || missingTaxCount > 0) {
      issues.push(buildIssue({
        id: 'HST_REVIEW',
        count: hstCount || missingTaxCount,
        evidence: hstCount
          ? `${hstCount} HST worksheet line${hstCount === 1 ? '' : 's'} need review.`
          : `${missingTaxCount} sampled transaction${missingTaxCount === 1 ? '' : 's'} have empty or zero tax amounts.`,
        affectedRecords: (facts?.bankTransactions?.missingTaxes || []).map((tx) => tx.id),
        recommendation: 'Estimate missing tax only as a flagged review candidate. Confirm against receipts and vendor tax treatment before applying.',
        estimateAvailable: true,
      }));
    }

    const failedImports = Number(facts?.imports?.byStatus?.FAILED || 0);
    const gapCount = Number(facts?.imports?.possibleMissingPeriods?.length || 0);
    if (failedImports || gapCount) {
      issues.push(buildIssue({
        id: 'IMPORT_GAPS',
        count: failedImports + gapCount,
        evidence: `${failedImports} failed import${failedImports === 1 ? '' : 's'} and ${gapCount} possible source date gap${gapCount === 1 ? '' : 's'} were found.`,
        affectedRecords: (facts?.imports?.possibleMissingPeriods || [])
          .flatMap((gap) => [gap.previousTransactionId, gap.nextTransactionId]),
        recommendation: 'List missing statement periods by source and re-import only the missing ranges.',
      }));
    }

    const missingReceipts = Number(metrics.missingReceipts || 0);
    const unmatchedReceipts = Number(facts?.receipts?.unmatchedReceipts || 0);
    if (missingReceipts || unmatchedReceipts) {
      issues.push(buildIssue({
        id: 'RECEIPTS',
        count: missingReceipts + unmatchedReceipts,
        evidence: `${missingReceipts} expense transaction${missingReceipts === 1 ? '' : 's'} are missing receipts and ${unmatchedReceipts} receipt${unmatchedReceipts === 1 ? ' is' : 's are'} unmatched.`,
        affectedRecords: (facts?.bankTransactions?.missingReceipts || []).map((tx) => tx.id),
        recommendation: 'Auto-link exact/high-confidence receipt matches and queue weak matches for review.',
      }));
    }

    const zeroPayCount = Number((facts?.payroll?.zeroPayRecords || []).length);
    const adjustmentsCount = Number(facts?.payroll?.adjustmentsCount || 0);
    if (zeroPayCount || adjustmentsCount) {
      issues.push(buildIssue({
        id: 'PAYROLL',
        count: zeroPayCount + adjustmentsCount,
        evidence: `${zeroPayCount} sampled zero-pay record${zeroPayCount === 1 ? '' : 's'} and ${adjustmentsCount} payroll adjustment${adjustmentsCount === 1 ? '' : 's'} need review.`,
        affectedRecords: [
          ...(facts?.payroll?.zeroPayRecords || []).map((record) => record.id),
          ...(facts?.payroll?.recentAdjustments || []).map((adjustment) => adjustment.id),
        ],
        recommendation: 'Flag inactive or placeholder payroll records and review advances, tips, and manual adjustments with payroll context.',
      }));
    }

    return issues.sort((a, b) => {
      const severityDiff = severityRank[b.severity] - severityRank[a.severity];
      if (severityDiff) return severityDiff;
      return Number(b.count || 0) - Number(a.count || 0);
    });
  }

  buildFixQueue(issues) {
    return issues.map((issue, index) => ({
      rank: index + 1,
      issueId: issue.id,
      title: issue.title,
      tab: issue.fixGuide?.primaryTab || issue.tab,
      primaryTab: issue.fixGuide?.primaryTab || issue.tab,
      severity: issue.severity,
      nextAction: issue.fixGuide?.nextStep || (issue.canGenerateProposals
        ? 'Generate AI proposals for a small batch and review them before applying.'
        : issue.estimateAvailable
          ? 'Create estimate candidates, then confirm each item before applying.'
          : issue.recommendation),
      toolName: issue.fixGuide?.toolName || null,
      filterPreset: issue.fixGuide?.filterPreset || null,
      affectedRecords: issue.affectedRecords || [],
      toolActions: issue.fixGuide?.toolActions || [],
      steps: issue.fixGuide?.steps || [],
      verifyIn: issue.fixGuide?.verifyIn || [],
      approvalRequired: issue.requiresApproval,
    }));
  }

  buildSummary({ facts, issues, estimates }) {
    const high = issues.filter((issue) => issue.severity === 'HIGH').length;
    const medium = issues.filter((issue) => issue.severity === 'MEDIUM').length;
    const low = issues.filter((issue) => issue.severity === 'LOW').length;
    const estimatedExposure = estimates.reduce((sum, estimate) => sum + Number(estimate.estimatedValue || 0), 0);

    return {
      overallRisk: high ? 'HIGH' : medium ? 'MEDIUM' : 'LOW',
      issueCount: issues.length,
      severityCounts: { HIGH: high, MEDIUM: medium, LOW: low },
      transactionCount: facts?.bankTransactions?.count || 0,
      closeReadiness: facts?.overview?.closeInfo?.readiness || 'unknown',
      estimateCount: estimates.length,
      estimatedExposure,
      summaryText: issues.length
        ? `Found ${issues.length} accounting issue${issues.length === 1 ? '' : 's'}. Start with ${issues[0].area.toLowerCase()} because it has ${issues[0].severity.toLowerCase()} risk.`
        : 'No major accounting manager issues were found for this period.',
      estimateText: estimates.length
        ? `${estimates.length} missing tax estimate candidate${estimates.length === 1 ? '' : 's'} totaling ${formatCurrency(estimatedExposure)} require review.`
        : 'No estimate candidates were generated from the current diagnostic sample.',
    };
  }

  async buildManagerPlan({ organizationId, startDate, endDate }) {
    const facts = await this.auditService.buildAuditFacts(organizationId, startDate, endDate);
    const issues = this.buildActionPlan(facts);
    const estimates = this.buildHstEstimates(facts);

    return {
      period: {
        startDate: toDateOnly(startDate),
        endDate: toDateOnly(endDate),
      },
      generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
      summary: this.buildSummary({ facts, issues, estimates }),
      issues,
      fixQueue: this.buildFixQueue(issues),
      estimates,
      safeguards: [
        'Confirmed fixes require source evidence such as transaction data, receipt data, or an existing rule.',
        'Suggested fixes are routed to review queues before they affect closing workflows.',
        'Estimated values are always marked estimated, assigned confidence, and kept review-required.',
        'Journal, tax, payroll, duplicate removal, and large-dollar changes require human approval.',
      ],
      samples: {
        uncategorizedTransactions: facts?.bankTransactions?.uncategorized || [],
        duplicateGroups: facts?.bankTransactions?.duplicateGroups || [],
        importGaps: facts?.imports?.possibleMissingPeriods || [],
        unbalancedJournalEntries: facts?.journal?.unbalanced || [],
        receiptCandidates: facts?.receipts?.bestCandidates || [],
      },
    };
  }

  async generateCategorizationProposals({ organizationId, userId, sessionId, limit = 10 }) {
    const transactions = await this.accountingService.prisma.bankTransaction.findMany({
      where: {
        organizationId,
        categoryId: null,
      },
      select: { id: true },
      orderBy: { date: 'desc' },
      take: Math.min(Math.max(Number(limit || 10), 1), 25),
    });

    if (!transactions.length) {
      return { count: 0, items: [] };
    }

    const items = await this.accountingService.generateReviewQueueProposals(
      organizationId,
      transactions.map((tx) => tx.id),
      { userId, sessionId }
    );

    return { count: items.length, items };
  }
}

```

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
FILE: server/src/services/accounting/services/AccountingAuditService.js
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
```js
// Full path: /home/luanngo/boss-dev/server/src/services/accounting/services/AccountingAuditService.js
import prisma from '#shared/database/prismaClient.js';
import { llmClient } from '#integrations/ai/llm.js';
import AccountingComplianceService from '#services/accounting/services/AccountingComplianceService.js';
import AccountingAuditStore from '#services/accounting/services/AccountingAuditStore.js';

const round2 = (value) => Number(Number(value || 0).toFixed(2));

const toDate = (value, boundary = 'start') => {
  if (!value) return null;
  const date = value instanceof Date ? new Date(value) : new Date(String(value));
  if (Number.isNaN(date.getTime())) return null;
  if (boundary === 'end') date.setHours(23, 59, 59, 999);
  else date.setHours(0, 0, 0, 0);
  return date;
};

const formatDateOnly = (value) => {
  const date = toDate(value);
  return date ? date.toISOString().slice(0, 10) : null;
};

const safeJsonParse = (value) => {
  if (!value || typeof value !== 'string') return null;
  try {
    return JSON.parse(value);
  } catch {
    const fenced = value.match(/```json\s*([\s\S]*?)```/i);
    if (fenced?.[1]) {
      try {
        return JSON.parse(fenced[1]);
      } catch {
        return null;
      }
    }
    return null;
  }
};

const buildDateClause = (startDate, endDate) => {
  const start = toDate(startDate, 'start');
  const end = toDate(endDate, 'end');
  if (!start && !end) return {};
  return { date: { ...(start ? { gte: start } : {}), ...(end ? { lte: end } : {}) } };
};

const countByStatus = (rows = [], field = 'status') => rows.reduce((acc, row) => {
  const key = String(row?.[field] || 'UNKNOWN').toUpperCase();
  acc[key] = (acc[key] || 0) + 1;
  return acc;
}, {});

const daysBetween = (left, right) => {
  const leftDate = toDate(left, 'start');
  const rightDate = toDate(right, 'start');
  if (!leftDate || !rightDate) return 0;
  return Math.round((rightDate.getTime() - leftDate.getTime()) / 86400000);
};

const compactTransaction = (tx) => ({
  id: tx.id,
  date: formatDateOnly(tx.date),
  description: tx.description,
  amount: round2(tx.amount),
  taxes: tx.taxes === null || tx.taxes === undefined ? null : round2(tx.taxes),
  category: tx.category ? `${tx.category.code} ${tx.category.description}` : null,
  source: tx.source?.name || null,
  receiptId: tx.receiptId || null,
  postingType: tx.postingType || null,
});

const normalizeAuditReport = (value, fallback) => {
  const parsed = value && typeof value === 'object' ? value : null;
  if (!parsed) return fallback;

  const normalizeItems = (items, fallbackItems) => (
    Array.isArray(items) && items.length ? items : fallbackItems
  ).slice(0, 30);

  return {
    summary: String(parsed.summary || fallback.summary || '').trim(),
    overallRisk: String(parsed.overallRisk || fallback.overallRisk || 'MEDIUM').toUpperCase(),
    problems: normalizeItems(parsed.problems, fallback.problems).map((problem) => ({
      severity: String(problem?.severity || 'MEDIUM').toUpperCase(),
      area: String(problem?.area || 'Accounting').trim(),
      title: String(problem?.title || 'Accounting issue').trim(),
      evidence: String(problem?.evidence || '').trim(),
      affectedRecords: Array.isArray(problem?.affectedRecords) ? problem.affectedRecords.slice(0, 20) : [],
      whyItMatters: String(problem?.whyItMatters || '').trim(),
    })),
    todoList: normalizeItems(parsed.todoList, fallback.todoList).map((todo, index) => ({
      priority: String(todo?.priority || (index < 3 ? 'HIGH' : 'MEDIUM')).toUpperCase(),
      task: String(todo?.task || 'Review accounting item').trim(),
      reason: String(todo?.reason || '').trim(),
      actionLinkTarget: String(todo?.actionLinkTarget || '').trim() || null,
      estimatedEffort: String(todo?.estimatedEffort || '').trim() || null,
    })),
    followUpQuestions: Array.isArray(parsed.followUpQuestions)
      ? parsed.followUpQuestions.map((item) => String(item || '').trim()).filter(Boolean).slice(0, 10)
      : fallback.followUpQuestions,
  };
};

export default class AccountingAuditService {
  constructor() {
    this.prisma = prisma;
    this.complianceService = new AccountingComplianceService();
    this.store = new AccountingAuditStore();
    this.llmClient = llmClient;
  }

  async buildAuditFacts(organizationId, startDate, endDate) {
    const dateClause = buildDateClause(startDate, endDate);
    const bankWhere = { organizationId, ...dateClause };
    const journalWhere = { organizationId, ...dateClause };

    const [
      overview,
      trialBalance,
      bankTotals,
      bankTransactions,
      bankTransactionsForCoverage,
      salesSummary,
      journalEntries,
      categories,
      rules,
      proposals,
      ruleSuggestions,
      importRecords,
      sources,
      unmatchedReceipts,
      receiptMatchCandidates,
      payrollSchedules,
      payrollRecords,
      payrollAdjustments,
      bankFormulas,
      suggestionMemories,
    ] = await Promise.all([
      this.complianceService.getAccountingOverview(organizationId, startDate, endDate),
      this.complianceService.getTrialBalanceRange(organizationId, startDate, endDate),
      this.prisma.bankTransaction.aggregate({
        where: bankWhere,
        _count: { _all: true },
        _sum: { amount: true, taxes: true },
      }),
      this.prisma.bankTransaction.findMany({
        where: bankWhere,
        select: {
          id: true,
          date: true,
          description: true,
          amount: true,
          taxes: true,
          sourceId: true,
          categoryId: true,
          receiptId: true,
          postingType: true,
          notes: true,
          category: { select: { code: true, description: true, category: true, statementGroup: true } },
          source: { select: { name: true, type: true } },
          journalEntry: { select: { id: true, posted: true } },
        },
        orderBy: { date: 'desc' },
        take: 2000,
      }),
      this.prisma.bankTransaction.findMany({
        where: bankWhere,
        select: {
          id: true,
          date: true,
          sourceId: true,
          source: { select: { name: true, type: true } },
        },
        orderBy: [{ sourceId: 'asc' }, { date: 'asc' }],
      }),
      this.prisma.salesTransaction.aggregate({
        where: { organizationId, ...dateClause },
        _count: { _all: true },
        _sum: { total_money: true, tax_amount: true, processing_fee: true, refunded_money: true },
      }),
      this.prisma.journalEntry.findMany({
        where: journalWhere,
        select: {
          id: true,
          date: true,
          memo: true,
          source: true,
          bankTxId: true,
          salesTxId: true,
          posted: true,
          lines: { select: { debit: true, credit: true, account: { select: { code: true, description: true } } } },
        },
        orderBy: { date: 'desc' },
        take: 1000,
      }),
      this.prisma.accountingCategory.findMany({
        select: { id: true, code: true, description: true, category: true, statementGroup: true, statementLine: true, isPLAccount: true, normalSide: true },
        orderBy: [{ sortOrder: 'asc' }, { code: 'asc' }],
      }),
      this.prisma.accountingRule.findMany({
        where: { organizationId },
        select: { id: true, name: true, createdAt: true, updatedAt: true, categoryId: true },
      }),
      this.prisma.accountingProposal?.findMany
        ? this.prisma.accountingProposal.findMany({ where: { organizationId }, select: { id: true, transactionId: true, status: true, riskLevel: true, confidence: true, createdAt: true, updatedAt: true } })
        : Promise.resolve([]),
      this.prisma.accountingRuleSuggestion?.findMany
        ? this.prisma.accountingRuleSuggestion.findMany({ where: { organizationId }, select: { id: true, status: true, riskLevel: true, confidence: true, createdAt: true } })
        : Promise.resolve([]),
      this.prisma.importRecord.findMany({
        where: { organizationId },
        select: { id: true, sourceId: true, status: true, createdAt: true, importedAt: true, source: { select: { name: true, type: true } } },
        orderBy: { createdAt: 'desc' },
        take: 50,
      }),
      this.prisma.source.findMany({
        where: { organizationId },
        select: {
          id: true,
          name: true,
          type: true,
          bankTransactions: { select: { date: true, description: true, amount: true }, orderBy: { date: 'desc' }, take: 1 },
        },
        orderBy: { name: 'asc' },
      }),
      this.prisma.receipt.count({ where: { organizationId, active: true, bankTransactions: { none: {} } } }),
      this.prisma.receiptMatchCandidate.findMany({
        where: { organizationId, status: { in: ['CANDIDATE', 'REVIEW'] } },
        select: { id: true, status: true, confidence: true, confidenceLabel: true, receiptId: true, bankTransactionId: true },
        orderBy: { confidence: 'desc' },
        take: 100,
      }),
      this.prisma.payrollSchedule.findMany({ where: { organizationId }, select: { id: true, startWeek: true, endWeek: true, status: true }, orderBy: { startWeek: 'desc' }, take: 20 }),
      this.prisma.payrollRecord.findMany({
        where: { payrollSchedule: { organizationId } },
        select: { id: true, weekStart: true, weekEnd: true, totalPay: true, visible: true, payrollScheduleId: true },
        orderBy: { weekStart: 'desc' },
        take: 200,
      }),
      this.prisma.payrollAdjustment.findMany({
        where: { payrollRecord: { payrollSchedule: { organizationId } } },
        select: { id: true, name: true, amount: true, date: true, payrollRecordId: true },
        orderBy: { date: 'desc' },
        take: 100,
      }),
      this.prisma.bankFormula.findMany({
        where: { organizationId },
        select: { id: true, name: true, createdAt: true },
        orderBy: { createdAt: 'desc' },
        take: 50,
      }),
      this.prisma.accountingSuggestionMemory.findMany({
        where: { organizationId },
        select: {
          id: true,
          vendorNormalized: true,
          sourceType: true,
          descriptionPattern: true,
          accountCode: true,
          taxTreatment: true,
          transactionType: true,
          usageCount: true,
          updatedAt: true,
        },
        orderBy: [{ usageCount: 'desc' }, { updatedAt: 'desc' }],
        take: 50,
      }),
    ]);

    const duplicateGroups = Object.values(bankTransactions.reduce((acc, tx) => {
      const key = [
        tx.sourceId || 'unknown-source',
        formatDateOnly(tx.date),
        round2(tx.amount),
      ].join('|');
      if (!acc[key]) acc[key] = [];
      acc[key].push(tx);
      return acc;
    }, {})).filter((group) => group.length > 1).slice(0, 25);

    const transactionsBySource = bankTransactionsForCoverage.reduce((acc, tx) => {
      const key = tx.sourceId || 'unknown-source';
      if (!acc[key]) {
        acc[key] = {
          sourceId: tx.sourceId || null,
          sourceName: tx.source?.name || 'Unknown source',
          sourceType: tx.source?.type || null,
          transactions: [],
        };
      }
      acc[key].transactions.push(tx);
      return acc;
    }, {});

    const selectedStart = toDate(startDate, 'start');
    const selectedEnd = toDate(endDate, 'start');
    const possibleMissingPeriods = [
      ...sources
        .filter((source) => !transactionsBySource[source.id])
        .map((source) => ({
          sourceId: source.id,
          sourceName: source.name,
          sourceType: source.type,
          startDate: formatDateOnly(selectedStart),
          endDate: formatDateOnly(selectedEnd),
          gapDays: selectedStart && selectedEnd ? daysBetween(selectedStart, selectedEnd) : null,
          reason: 'No imported bank transactions were found in the selected period for this source.',
          boundary: 'FULL_PERIOD',
        })),
      ...Object.values(transactionsBySource)
        .flatMap((sourceGroup) => {
          const sorted = [...sourceGroup.transactions].sort((a, b) => new Date(a.date) - new Date(b.date));
          if (!sorted.length) return [];

          const gaps = [];
          const firstDate = sorted[0].date;
          const lastDate = sorted.at(-1).date;

          if (selectedStart && daysBetween(selectedStart, firstDate) > 7) {
            gaps.push({
              sourceId: sourceGroup.sourceId,
              sourceName: sourceGroup.sourceName,
              sourceType: sourceGroup.sourceType,
              startDate: formatDateOnly(selectedStart),
              endDate: formatDateOnly(firstDate),
              gapDays: daysBetween(selectedStart, firstDate),
              reason: 'No imported bank transactions near the beginning of the selected period for this source.',
              boundary: 'START',
            });
          }

          sorted.forEach((tx, index) => {
            const next = sorted[index + 1];
            if (!next) return;
            const gapDays = daysBetween(tx.date, next.date);
            if (gapDays > 7) {
              gaps.push({
                sourceId: sourceGroup.sourceId,
                sourceName: sourceGroup.sourceName,
                sourceType: sourceGroup.sourceType,
                startDate: formatDateOnly(tx.date),
                endDate: formatDateOnly(next.date),
                gapDays,
                previousTransactionId: tx.id,
                nextTransactionId: next.id,
                reason: 'There is a long date gap between imported bank transactions for this source.',
                boundary: 'MIDDLE',
              });
            }
          });

          if (selectedEnd && daysBetween(lastDate, selectedEnd) > 7) {
            gaps.push({
              sourceId: sourceGroup.sourceId,
              sourceName: sourceGroup.sourceName,
              sourceType: sourceGroup.sourceType,
              startDate: formatDateOnly(lastDate),
              endDate: formatDateOnly(selectedEnd),
              gapDays: daysBetween(lastDate, selectedEnd),
              reason: 'No imported bank transactions near the end of the selected period for this source.',
              boundary: 'END',
            });
          }

          return gaps;
        }),
    ]
      .sort((a, b) => Number(b.gapDays || 0) - Number(a.gapDays || 0))
      .slice(0, 25);

    const unbalancedJournalEntries = journalEntries
      .map((entry) => {
        const debit = round2(entry.lines.reduce((sum, line) => sum + Number(line.debit || 0), 0));
        const credit = round2(entry.lines.reduce((sum, line) => sum + Number(line.credit || 0), 0));
        return { ...entry, debit, credit, difference: round2(debit - credit) };
      })
      .filter((entry) => Math.abs(entry.difference) >= 0.01);

    const stalePendingDate = new Date();
    stalePendingDate.setDate(stalePendingDate.getDate() - 14);

    const facts = {
      period: { startDate: formatDateOnly(startDate), endDate: formatDateOnly(endDate) },
      overview,
      trialBalance: {
        rowCount: trialBalance.length,
        totalDebit: round2(trialBalance.reduce((sum, row) => sum + Number(row.debit || 0), 0)),
        totalCredit: round2(trialBalance.reduce((sum, row) => sum + Number(row.credit || 0), 0)),
        unmappedRows: trialBalance.filter((row) => String(row.statementGroup || row.category || '').toUpperCase() === 'UNMAPPED').slice(0, 20),
      },
      bankTransactions: {
        count: bankTotals._count?._all || 0,
        totalAmount: round2(bankTotals._sum?.amount || 0),
        totalTaxes: round2(bankTotals._sum?.taxes || 0),
        uncategorized: bankTransactions.filter((tx) => !tx.categoryId).map(compactTransaction).slice(0, 25),
        missingReceipts: bankTransactions.filter((tx) => Number(tx.amount || 0) < 0 && !tx.receiptId).map(compactTransaction).slice(0, 25),
        missingJournal: bankTransactions.filter((tx) => !tx.journalEntry?.id || tx.journalEntry?.posted !== true).map(compactTransaction).slice(0, 25),
        missingTaxes: bankTransactions.filter((tx) => tx.taxes === null || tx.taxes === undefined || Number(tx.taxes) === 0).map(compactTransaction).slice(0, 25),
        duplicateGroups: duplicateGroups.map((group) => ({
          count: group.length,
          sample: group.map(compactTransaction).slice(0, 5),
        })),
      },
      sales: {
        count: salesSummary._count?._all || 0,
        total: round2(salesSummary._sum?.total_money || 0),
        tax: round2(salesSummary._sum?.tax_amount || 0),
        processingFees: round2(salesSummary._sum?.processing_fee || 0),
        refunds: round2(salesSummary._sum?.refunded_money || 0),
      },
      journal: {
        count: journalEntries.length,
        unbalanced: unbalancedJournalEntries.slice(0, 25).map((entry) => ({
          id: entry.id,
          date: formatDateOnly(entry.date),
          memo: entry.memo,
          source: entry.source,
          debit: entry.debit,
          credit: entry.credit,
          difference: entry.difference,
        })),
        manualWithoutBankOrSales: journalEntries.filter((entry) => !entry.bankTxId && !entry.salesTxId).slice(0, 25).map((entry) => ({
          id: entry.id,
          date: formatDateOnly(entry.date),
          memo: entry.memo,
          source: entry.source,
        })),
      },
      chartOfAccounts: {
        count: categories.length,
        unmapped: categories.filter((account) => !account.statementGroup || account.statementGroup === 'UNMAPPED').slice(0, 50),
        plWithoutStatementLine: categories.filter((account) => account.isPLAccount && !account.statementLine).slice(0, 50),
      },
      automation: {
        rulesByStatus: countByStatus(rules),
        highRiskRules: rules.filter((rule) => rule.riskLevel === 'HIGH').slice(0, 25),
        proposalsByStatus: countByStatus(proposals),
        stalePendingProposals: proposals.filter((proposal) => proposal.status === 'PENDING' && new Date(proposal.createdAt) < stalePendingDate).slice(0, 25),
        ruleSuggestionsByStatus: countByStatus(ruleSuggestions),
        pendingRuleSuggestions: ruleSuggestions.filter((suggestion) => suggestion.status === 'PENDING').slice(0, 25),
        formulaCount: bankFormulas.length,
        recentFormulas: bankFormulas,
        suggestionMemoryCount: suggestionMemories.length,
        topSuggestionMemories: suggestionMemories,
      },
      imports: {
        byStatus: countByStatus(importRecords),
        recent: importRecords.slice(0, 10),
        possibleMissingPeriods,
        sources: sources.map((source) => ({
          id: source.id,
          name: source.name,
          type: source.type,
          latestTransaction: source.bankTransactions?.[0]
            ? compactTransaction({ ...source.bankTransactions[0], source })
            : null,
        })),
      },
      receipts: {
        unmatchedReceipts,
        openMatchCandidates: receiptMatchCandidates.length,
        bestCandidates: receiptMatchCandidates.slice(0, 20),
      },
      payroll: {
        schedules: payrollSchedules,
        recordsCount: payrollRecords.length,
        hiddenRecords: payrollRecords.filter((record) => !record.visible).length,
        zeroPayRecords: payrollRecords.filter((record) => Number(record.totalPay || 0) === 0).slice(0, 25),
        adjustmentsCount: payrollAdjustments.length,
        recentAdjustments: payrollAdjustments,
      },
    };

    return facts;
  }

  buildDeterministicReport(facts) {
    const problems = [];
    const todoList = [];
    const closeMetrics = facts.overview?.closeInfo?.metrics || {};

    const addProblem = ({ severity = 'MEDIUM', area, title, evidence, whyItMatters, affectedRecords = [], actionLinkTarget, task }) => {
      problems.push({ severity, area, title, evidence, whyItMatters, affectedRecords });
      todoList.push({
        priority: severity,
        task: task || title,
        reason: evidence,
        actionLinkTarget,
        estimatedEffort: affectedRecords.length > 10 ? '30-60 min' : '10-30 min',
      });
    };

    if (closeMetrics.uncategorizedTransactions > 0) {
      addProblem({
        severity: 'HIGH',
        area: 'Transactions',
        title: 'Uncategorized bank transactions',
        evidence: `${closeMetrics.uncategorizedTransactions} transactions are missing a category.`,
        affectedRecords: facts.bankTransactions.uncategorized.map((tx) => tx.id),
        whyItMatters: 'Uncategorized transactions make the P&L and tax reporting unreliable.',
        actionLinkTarget: 'transactions',
        task: 'Categorize uncategorized bank transactions.',
      });
    }

    if (closeMetrics.unpostedBankTransactions > 0 || closeMetrics.unreconciledTransactions > 0) {
      addProblem({
        severity: 'HIGH',
        area: 'Journal',
        title: 'Bank transactions are not posted to journal entries',
        evidence: `${closeMetrics.unpostedBankTransactions || closeMetrics.unreconciledTransactions} bank transactions are not posted or reconciled.`,
        affectedRecords: facts.bankTransactions.missingJournal.map((tx) => tx.id),
        whyItMatters: 'The ledger, trial balance, and financial statements only work when transactions are posted.',
        actionLinkTarget: 'review-queue',
        task: 'Post or approve journal entries for unposted bank transactions.',
      });
    }

    if (closeMetrics.missingReceipts > 0 || facts.receipts.unmatchedReceipts > 0) {
      addProblem({
        severity: 'MEDIUM',
        area: 'Receipts',
        title: 'Receipts need matching or supporting documents',
        evidence: `${closeMetrics.missingReceipts || 0} expense transactions are missing receipts and ${facts.receipts.unmatchedReceipts} active receipts are unmatched.`,
        affectedRecords: facts.bankTransactions.missingReceipts.map((tx) => tx.id),
        whyItMatters: 'Missing support weakens expense and HST claims.',
        actionLinkTarget: 'receipt-matching',
        task: 'Match receipts to bank transactions and upload missing support.',
      });
    }

    if (facts.journal.unbalanced.length > 0) {
      addProblem({
        severity: 'HIGH',
        area: 'Journal',
        title: 'Unbalanced journal entries',
        evidence: `${facts.journal.unbalanced.length} sampled journal entries do not balance.`,
        affectedRecords: facts.journal.unbalanced.map((entry) => entry.id),
        whyItMatters: 'Unbalanced entries can make accounting reports mathematically incorrect.',
        actionLinkTarget: 'journal',
        task: 'Review and correct unbalanced journal entries.',
      });
    }

    if (facts.bankTransactions.duplicateGroups.length > 0) {
      addProblem({
        severity: 'MEDIUM',
        area: 'Imports',
        title: 'Possible duplicate bank transactions',
        evidence: `${facts.bankTransactions.duplicateGroups.length} duplicate-looking groups were found in the sampled period.`,
        affectedRecords: facts.bankTransactions.duplicateGroups.flatMap((group) => group.sample.map((tx) => tx.id)).slice(0, 20),
        whyItMatters: 'Duplicate imports overstate revenue, expenses, cash movement, or taxes.',
        actionLinkTarget: 'transactions',
        task: 'Review possible duplicate bank transactions.',
      });
    }

    if (facts.imports.possibleMissingPeriods.length > 0) {
      addProblem({
        severity: 'MEDIUM',
        area: 'Imports',
        title: 'Possible missing transaction periods',
        evidence: `${facts.imports.possibleMissingPeriods.length} source date gap${facts.imports.possibleMissingPeriods.length === 1 ? '' : 's'} may need import review.`,
        affectedRecords: facts.imports.possibleMissingPeriods
          .flatMap((gap) => [gap.previousTransactionId, gap.nextTransactionId])
          .filter(Boolean)
          .slice(0, 20),
        whyItMatters: 'Missing statement periods can understate revenue, expenses, cash movement, or tax amounts.',
        actionLinkTarget: 'imports',
        task: 'Review bank imports for the flagged date gaps.',
      });
    }

    if (closeMetrics.hstLinesNeedingReview > 0) {
      addProblem({
        severity: 'MEDIUM',
        area: 'HST',
        title: 'HST lines need review',
        evidence: `${closeMetrics.hstLinesNeedingReview} HST lines were flagged by the worksheet.`,
        whyItMatters: 'HST filings depend on correct tax treatment for sales, purchases, and remittances.',
        actionLinkTarget: 'summary',
        task: 'Review HST worksheet lines flagged for attention.',
      });
    }

    if (facts.chartOfAccounts.unmapped.length > 0) {
      addProblem({
        severity: 'MEDIUM',
        area: 'Chart of Accounts',
        title: 'Accounts are unmapped for reporting',
        evidence: `${facts.chartOfAccounts.unmapped.length} accounts are missing statement group mapping.`,
        affectedRecords: facts.chartOfAccounts.unmapped.map((account) => account.id),
        whyItMatters: 'Unmapped accounts can land in the wrong report section or be excluded from useful views.',
        actionLinkTarget: 'transactions',
        task: 'Map accounts to statement groups and lines.',
      });
    }

    if ((facts.automation.proposalsByStatus.PENDING || 0) > 0 || (facts.automation.ruleSuggestionsByStatus.PENDING || 0) > 0) {
      addProblem({
        severity: 'LOW',
        area: 'AI Review Queue',
        title: 'Pending AI proposals need approval or rejection',
        evidence: `${facts.automation.proposalsByStatus.PENDING || 0} transaction proposals and ${facts.automation.ruleSuggestionsByStatus.PENDING || 0} rule suggestions are pending.`,
        affectedRecords: [
          ...facts.automation.stalePendingProposals.map((item) => item.id),
          ...facts.automation.pendingRuleSuggestions.map((item) => item.id),
        ].slice(0, 20),
        whyItMatters: 'Pending suggestions do not improve books until they are reviewed.',
        actionLinkTarget: 'review-queue',
        task: 'Approve, reject, or revise pending AI proposals.',
      });
    }

    if (!problems.length) {
      return {
        summary: 'No major accounting problems were found in the selected period. Keep reviewing imports, receipts, and proposals before closing.',
        overallRisk: 'LOW',
        problems: [],
        todoList: [{
          priority: 'LOW',
          task: 'Run a final close review for the selected period.',
          reason: 'The automated checks did not find major issues, but final human review is still useful before filing or closing.',
          actionLinkTarget: 'summary',
          estimatedEffort: '10-30 min',
        }],
        followUpQuestions: [],
      };
    }

    const highCount = problems.filter((problem) => problem.severity === 'HIGH').length;
    return {
      summary: `Found ${problems.length} accounting issue${problems.length === 1 ? '' : 's'} in the selected period. Start with posting, categorization, receipts, and any HST review items.`,
      overallRisk: highCount ? 'HIGH' : 'MEDIUM',
      problems,
      todoList,
      followUpQuestions: [],
    };
  }

  async generateAiReport({ facts, organizationId, userId, sessionId }) {
    const fallback = this.buildDeterministicReport(facts);

    try {
      const systemPrompt = `You are an accounting audit assistant for a Canadian small business bookkeeping app.
Return strict JSON only.
Use only the supplied facts. Do not invent totals, record ids, tax laws, or missing evidence.
Focus on practical bookkeeping problems and a prioritized to-do list.
Do not recommend database writes. Recommend review actions inside the app.
Allowed actionLinkTarget values: summary, transactions, receipt-matching, imports, review-queue, ai-rule-suggestions, ledger, journal, trial, sales, t2, payroll.`;

      const userPrompt = JSON.stringify({
        task: 'Audit the accounting data and identify problems plus a practical to-do list.',
        organizationId,
        facts,
        desiredShape: {
          summary: 'string',
          overallRisk: 'LOW|MEDIUM|HIGH',
          problems: [{ severity: 'LOW|MEDIUM|HIGH', area: 'string', title: 'string', evidence: 'string', affectedRecords: ['id'], whyItMatters: 'string' }],
          todoList: [{ priority: 'LOW|MEDIUM|HIGH', task: 'string', reason: 'string', actionLinkTarget: 'string', estimatedEffort: 'string' }],
          followUpQuestions: ['string'],
        },
      }, null, 2);

      const response = await this.llmClient.generateResponse(
        userPrompt,
        userId,
        sessionId,
        'TEXT_CHAT',
        'deepseek/deepseek-v4-flash',
        null,
        '',
        systemPrompt,
        { includeConversationHistory: false, storeConversation: false }
      );

      return {
        ...normalizeAuditReport(safeJsonParse(response), fallback),
        generatedBy: 'AI',
        fallbackUsed: false,
      };
    } catch (error) {
      console.warn('Accounting audit AI report failed, using deterministic report:', error.message);
      return {
        ...fallback,
        generatedBy: 'DETERMINISTIC',
        fallbackUsed: true,
      };
    }
  }

  async runAudit({ organizationId, userId, sessionId, startDate, endDate }) {
    const facts = await this.buildAuditFacts(organizationId, startDate, endDate);
    const report = await this.generateAiReport({ facts, organizationId, userId, sessionId });

    const result = {
      period: facts.period,
      generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
      report,
      facts,
    };

    return this.store.saveReport(organizationId, result);
  }

  async getLatestAudit(organizationId) {
    return this.store.getLatestReport(organizationId);
  }
}

```

FILE: server/src/services/accounting/services/AccountingAuditStore.js
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
```js
// Full path: /home/luanngo/boss-dev/server/src/services/accounting/services/AccountingAuditStore.js
import fs from 'fs/promises';
import path from 'path';
import { randomUUID } from 'crypto';

const DEFAULT_DATA = {
  version: 1,
  reports: [],
};

const cloneDefault = () => JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(DEFAULT_DATA));

export default class AccountingAuditStore {
  constructor(baseDir = path.join(process.cwd(), 'data', 'accounting-audits')) {
    this.baseDir = baseDir;
  }

  getOrgDir(organizationId) {
    return path.join(this.baseDir, String(organizationId));
  }

  getFilePath(organizationId) {
    return path.join(this.getOrgDir(organizationId), 'audits.json');
  }

  async ensureDir(organizationId) {
    await fs.mkdir(this.getOrgDir(organizationId), { recursive: true });
  }

  async load(organizationId) {
    if (!organizationId) throw new Error('organizationId is required.');
    const filePath = this.getFilePath(organizationId);
    try {
      const raw = await fs.readFile(filePath, 'utf8');
      const parsed = JSON.parse(raw);
      return {
        ...cloneDefault(),
        ...parsed,
        reports: Array.isArray(parsed?.reports) ? parsed.reports : [],
      };
    } catch (error) {
      if (error.code === 'ENOENT') {
        const seeded = cloneDefault();
        await this.save(organizationId, seeded);
        return seeded;
      }
      throw error;
    }
  }

  async save(organizationId, data) {
    await this.ensureDir(organizationId);
    await fs.writeFile(this.getFilePath(organizationId), JSON.stringify(data, null, 2), 'utf8');
    return data;
  }

  async saveReport(organizationId, report) {
    const data = await this.load(organizationId);
    const saved = {
      ...report,
      id: report.id || randomUUID(),
      savedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
    };

    data.reports = [
      saved,
      ...data.reports.filter((item) => item.id !== saved.id),
    ].slice(0, 20);

    await this.save(organizationId, data);
    return saved;
  }

  async getLatestReport(organizationId) {
    const data = await this.load(organizationId);
    return [...data.reports]
      .sort((a, b) => String(b.savedAt || b.generatedAt || '').localeCompare(String(a.savedAt || a.generatedAt || '')))
      .at(0) || null;
  }
}
```

```js
// Full path: /home/luanngo/boss-dev/server/src/services/accounting/services/AccountingComplianceService.js

import AccountingComplianceStore from '#services/accounting/services/AccountingComplianceStore.js';

const PROFIT_LOSS_GROUP_META = {
  REVENUE: { label: 'Revenue', sectionType: 'revenue', order: 10 },
  COST_OF_GOODS_SOLD: { label: 'Cost of Goods Sold', sectionType: 'expense', order: 20 },
  EXPENSES: { label: 'Expenses', sectionType: 'expense', order: 30 },
  OTHER_INCOME: { label: 'Other Income', sectionType: 'revenue', order: 40 },
  OTHER_EXPENSES: { label: 'Other Expenses', sectionType: 'expense', order: 50 },
  UNMAPPED: { label: 'Unmapped Accounts', sectionType: 'expense', order: 999 },
};

const PROFIT_LOSS_CATEGORY_FALLBACKS = ['REVENUE', 'EXPENSE', 'EXPENSES', 'COST OF GOODS SOLD', 'COGS'];

});

const lookupCCADescription = (classId) => CCA_CLASS_DEFINITIONS[String(classId)]?.description || 'Custom CCA class';

const DEFAULT_CLOSE_CHECKLIST = [
  { key: 'uncategorizedTransactions', label: 'Uncategorized transactions', target: 0 },
  { key: 'unreconciledTransactions', label: 'Unreconciled bank transactions', target: 0 },
  { key: 'unmatchedJournalEntries', label: 'Journal entries without bank match', target: 0 },

];

const TAX_CODE_DEFINITIONS = Object.freeze({
  SALES_TAX_PAYABLE: {
    code: 'SALES_TAX_PAYABLE',
    label: 'Sales tax payable',
    bucket: 'taxPayable',
    description: 'Use on GST/HST liability lines created from taxable sales.',
  },
  TAXABLE_SALE_STANDARD: {
    code: 'TAXABLE_SALE_STANDARD',

  ZERO_RATED_OR_EXEMPT_SALE: {

    itcRate: 1,
    description: 'Capital asset purchase with a full input tax credit.',
```
