```js
    label: 'Meals and entertainment (50% ITC)',
    bucket: 'itc',
    itcRate: 0.5,
    description: 'Meals and entertainment restriction.',
  },
  TAXABLE_PURCHASE_PARTIAL_ITC: {
    code: 'TAXABLE_PURCHASE_PARTIAL_ITC',
    label: 'Taxable purchase (partial ITC)',
    bucket: 'itc',
    itcRate: 0.5,
    description: 'Taxable purchase with a partial ITC rate. Override if your rate differs.',
  },
  TAXABLE_PURCHASE_NO_ITC: {
    code: 'TAXABLE_PURCHASE_NO_ITC',
    label: 'Taxable purchase (no ITC)',
    bucket: 'itcDenied',
    itcRate: 0,
    description: 'Tax was paid but cannot be claimed as an ITC.',
  },
  NON_TAXABLE_PURCHASE: {
    code: 'NON_TAXABLE_PURCHASE',
    label: 'Non-taxable purchase',
    bucket: 'nonTaxablePurchase',
    description: 'Purchase with no GST/HST component.',
  },
  HST_REMITTANCE: {
    code: 'HST_REMITTANCE',
    label: 'HST remittance/payment',
    bucket: 'paymentsRemittances',
    description: 'Payment or remittance reducing GST/HST payable.',
  },
  HST_ADJUSTMENT: {
    code: 'HST_ADJUSTMENT',
    label: 'HST adjustment',
    bucket: 'adjustments',
    description: 'Manual or filing adjustment affecting net tax.',
  },
  REVIEW_REQUIRED: {
    code: 'REVIEW_REQUIRED',
    label: 'Review required',
    bucket: 'review',
    description: 'The system could not classify this line confidently.',
  },
});

const round2 = (value) => Number(Number(value || 0).toFixed(2));
const abs2 = (value) => round2(Math.abs(Number(value || 0)));
const toDate = (value, boundary = 'start') => {
  if (!value) return null;
  const date = value instanceof Date ? new Date(value) : new Date(String(value));
  if (Number.isNaN(date.getTime())) return null;
  if (boundary === 'end') date.setHours(23, 59, 59, 999);
  else date.setHours(0, 0, 0, 0);
  return date;
};
const formatDateOnly = (value) => {
  const date = toDate(value, 'start');
  if (!date) return null;
  return date.toISOString().slice(0, 10);
};
const ensureArray = (value) => (Array.isArray(value) ? value : []);
const normalizeText = (value) => String(value || '').toLowerCase().replace(/[^a-z0-9\s]/g, ' ').replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim();
const unique = (items = []) => [...new Set(items.filter(Boolean))];
const sumAmounts = (items = []) => round2(items.reduce((sum, item) => sum + Number(item?.amount || 0), 0));

const parseMarkedJsonFromNotes = (notes, marker) => {
  if (!notes || typeof notes !== 'string') return null;
  const markerIndex = notes.indexOf(marker);
  const rawPayload = markerIndex >= 0 ? notes.slice(markerIndex + marker.length).trim() : null;
  if (!rawPayload) return null;
  try {
    const parsed = JSON.parse(rawPayload);
    return parsed && typeof parsed === 'object' ? parsed : null;
  } catch {
    return null;
  }
};

const parseAIProposalFromNotes = (notes) => parseMarkedJsonFromNotes(notes, '__aiProposal:');

const normalizeStatementGroup = (account = {}) => {
  const raw = String(account?.statementGroup || '').trim().toUpperCase();
  if (raw && raw !== 'UNMAPPED') return raw;
  const category = String(account?.category || '').trim().toUpperCase();
  if (category === 'REVENUE') return 'REVENUE';
  if (category === 'COST OF GOODS SOLD' || category === 'COGS') return 'COST_OF_GOODS_SOLD';
  if (category === 'EXPENSES' || category === 'EXPENSE') return 'EXPENSES';
  return 'UNMAPPED';
};

const normalizeStatementLine = (account = {}) => String(account?.statementLine || account?.description || account?.code || 'Unmapped').trim();

const normalizePLAmount = (line) => {
  const normalSide = String(line?.account?.normalSide || 'DEBIT').toUpperCase();
  const debit = Number(line?.debit || 0);
  const credit = Number(line?.credit || 0);
  return normalSide === 'CREDIT' ? credit - debit : debit - credit;
};

const normalizeBalanceAmount = (account = {}, debit = 0, credit = 0) => {
  const normalSide = String(account?.normalSide || 'DEBIT').toUpperCase();
  const numericDebit = Number(debit || 0);
  const numericCredit = Number(credit || 0);
  return normalSide === 'CREDIT' ? numericCredit - numericDebit : numericDebit - numericCredit;
};

const buildFiscalYearKey = (startDate, endDate) => `${formatDateOnly(startDate)}_${formatDateOnly(endDate)}`;

const buildDefaultGifiMapping = (account = {}) => {
  const category = String(account?.category || '').trim().toUpperCase();
  const description = String(account?.description || '').trim();
  const code = String(account?.code || '').trim();
  const lowerDescription = normalizeText(description);

  const mapping = {
    statementPresentation: null,
    taxReturnPresentation: null,
    gifiCode: null,
    gifiLabel: null,
  };

  if (category === 'ASSETS') {
    mapping.statementPresentation = 'Balance Sheet / Assets';
    mapping.taxReturnPresentation = 'Schedule 100 / Assets';
    if (lowerDescription.includes('cash')) mapping.gifiLabel = 'Cash and deposits';
    else if (lowerDescription.includes('receivable')) mapping.gifiLabel = 'Accounts receivable';
    else if (lowerDescription.includes('inventory') || lowerDescription.includes('raw materials')) mapping.gifiLabel = 'Inventory';
    else if (lowerDescription.includes('prepaid')) mapping.gifiLabel = 'Prepaids';
    else if (lowerDescription.includes('building') || lowerDescription.includes('land') || lowerDescription.includes('equipment') || lowerDescription.includes('fixture') || lowerDescription.includes('vehicle') || lowerDescription.includes('goodwill') || lowerDescription.includes('intangible')) {
      mapping.gifiLabel = 'Capital assets';
    } else {
      mapping.gifiLabel = 'Other assets';
    }
  } else if (category === 'LIABILITIES') {
    mapping.statementPresentation = 'Balance Sheet / Liabilities';
    mapping.taxReturnPresentation = 'Schedule 100 / Liabilities';
    if (lowerDescription.includes('payable') && lowerDescription.includes('account')) mapping.gifiLabel = 'Accounts payable';
    else if (lowerDescription.includes('tax')) mapping.gifiLabel = 'Taxes payable';
    else if (lowerDescription.includes('wage')) mapping.gifiLabel = 'Wages payable';
    else if (lowerDescription.includes('credit card')) mapping.gifiLabel = 'Credit card payable';
    else if (lowerDescription.includes('debt') || lowerDescription.includes('loan')) mapping.gifiLabel = 'Debt';
    else mapping.gifiLabel = 'Other liabilities';
  } else if (category === 'EQUITY') {
    mapping.statementPresentation = 'Balance Sheet / Equity';
    mapping.taxReturnPresentation = 'Schedule 100 / Equity';
    if (code === RETAINED_EARNINGS_CODE || lowerDescription.includes('retained')) mapping.gifiLabel = 'Retained earnings';
    else if (lowerDescription.includes('common shares')) mapping.gifiLabel = 'Common shares';
    else if (lowerDescription.includes('preferred shares')) mapping.gifiLabel = 'Preferred shares';
    else mapping.gifiLabel = 'Contributed surplus / other equity';
  } else if (category === 'REVENUE') {
    mapping.statementPresentation = 'Income Statement / Revenue';
    mapping.taxReturnPresentation = 'Schedule 125 / Revenue';
    mapping.gifiLabel = 'Business revenue';
  } else if (['EXPENSE', 'EXPENSES', 'COST OF GOODS SOLD', 'COGS'].includes(category)) {
    mapping.statementPresentation = category.includes('COST') || category === 'COGS'
      ? 'Income Statement / Cost of goods sold'
      : 'Income Statement / Operating expenses';
    mapping.taxReturnPresentation = 'Schedule 125 / Expenses';
    mapping.gifiLabel = category.includes('COST') || category === 'COGS' ? 'Cost of sales' : 'Operating expense';
  } else {
    mapping.statementPresentation = 'Unmapped';
    mapping.taxReturnPresentation = 'Review required';
    mapping.gifiLabel = 'Needs mapping';
  }

  return mapping;
};

export default class AccountingComplianceService {
  constructor() {
    this.prisma = prisma;
    this.store = new AccountingComplianceStore();
  }

  getTaxCodeDefinitions() {
    return Object.values(TAX_CODE_DEFINITIONS);
  }

  async getAccountMap() {
    const accounts = await this.prisma.accountingCategory.findMany({
      orderBy: [{ sortOrder: 'asc' }, { code: 'asc' }],
    });
    return new Map(accounts.map((account) => [String(account.id), account]));
  }

  async getJournalLinesForPeriod(organizationId, startDate, endDate) {
    const start = toDate(startDate, 'start');
    const end = toDate(endDate, 'end');
    const where = {
      entry: {
        organizationId,
        posted: true,
        ...(start || end ? { date: { ...(start ? { gte: start } : {}), ...(end ? { lte: end } : {}) } } : {}),
      },
    };

    const journalLines = await this.prisma.journalLine.findMany({
      where,
      include: {
        account: true,
        entry: {
          select: {
            id: true,
            date: true,
            memo: true,
            bankTxId: true,
            source: true,
            posted: true,
          },
        },
      },
      orderBy: [{ entry: { date: 'asc' } }, { debit: 'desc' }, { credit: 'desc' }],
    });

    const bankTxIds = unique(journalLines.map((line) => line?.entry?.bankTxId));
    const bankTransactions = bankTxIds.length
      ? await this.prisma.bankTransaction.findMany({
          where: { id: { in: bankTxIds } },
          include: {
            category: true,
            source: true,
          },
        })
      : [];
    const bankTxMap = new Map(bankTransactions.map((tx) => [String(tx.id), tx]));

    return journalLines.map((line) => ({
      ...line,
      bankTransaction: line?.entry?.bankTxId ? bankTxMap.get(String(line.entry.bankTxId)) || null : null,
    }));
  }

  async getProfitLossReport(organizationId, startDate, endDate) {
    const journalLines = await this.getJournalLinesForPeriod(organizationId, startDate, endDate);
    const relevantLines = journalLines.filter((line) => {
      const accountCategory = String(line?.account?.category || '').trim().toUpperCase();
      return Boolean(line?.account?.isPLAccount) || PROFIT_LOSS_CATEGORY_FALLBACKS.includes(accountCategory);
    });

    const sectionMap = new Map();
    const totals = { revenue: 0, cogs: 0, expenses: 0, otherIncome: 0, otherExpenses: 0, unmapped: 0, netIncome: 0 };

    for (const line of relevantLines) {
      const amount = round2(normalizePLAmount(line));
      if (Math.abs(amount) < 0.005) continue;
      const sectionKey = normalizeStatementGroup(line.account);
      const sectionMeta = PROFIT_LOSS_GROUP_META[sectionKey] || PROFIT_LOSS_GROUP_META.UNMAPPED;
      const statementLine = normalizeStatementLine(line.account);
      const sortOrder = Number(line?.account?.sortOrder ?? sectionMeta.order ?? 999);

      if (!sectionMap.has(sectionKey)) {
        sectionMap.set(sectionKey, {
          groupKey: sectionKey,
          label: sectionMeta.label,
          order: sectionMeta.order,
          sectionType: sectionMeta.sectionType,
          totalAmount: 0,
          lines: [],
        });
      }

      const section = sectionMap.get(sectionKey);
      let lineItem = section.lines.find((item) => item.statementLine === statementLine);
      if (!lineItem) {
        lineItem = {
          accountId: line.account?.id || null,
          accountCode: line.account?.code || '',
          statementLine,
          sortOrder,
          totalAmount: 0,
        };
        section.lines.push(lineItem);
      }

      lineItem.totalAmount = round2(lineItem.totalAmount + amount);
      section.totalAmount = round2(section.totalAmount + amount);

      switch (sectionKey) {
        case 'REVENUE':
          totals.revenue = round2(totals.revenue + amount);
          break;
        case 'COST_OF_GOODS_SOLD':
          totals.cogs = round2(totals.cogs + amount);
          break;
        case 'EXPENSES':
          totals.expenses = round2(totals.expenses + amount);
          break;
        case 'OTHER_INCOME':
          totals.otherIncome = round2(totals.otherIncome + amount);
          break;
        case 'OTHER_EXPENSES':
          totals.otherExpenses = round2(totals.otherExpenses + amount);
          break;
        default:
          totals.unmapped = round2(totals.unmapped + amount);
          break;
      }
    }

    const sections = Array.from(sectionMap.values())
      .map((section) => ({
        ...section,
        lines: section.lines
          .sort((a, b) => a.sortOrder - b.sortOrder || a.statementLine.localeCompare(b.statementLine))
          .map((line) => ({ ...line, totalAmount: round2(line.totalAmount) })),
        totalAmount: round2(section.totalAmount),
      }))
      .sort((a, b) => a.order - b.order || a.label.localeCompare(b.label));

    totals.netIncome = round2(
      totals.revenue + totals.otherIncome - totals.cogs - totals.expenses - totals.otherExpenses
    );

    return {
      from: formatDateOnly(startDate),
      to: formatDateOnly(endDate),
      sections,
      totals,
    };
  }

  async getTrialBalanceRange(organizationId, startDate, endDate) {
    const journalLines = await this.getJournalLinesForPeriod(organizationId, startDate, endDate);
    const rows = new Map();

    for (const line of journalLines) {
      const key = String(line.account?.id || line.account?.code || randomUUID());
      if (!rows.has(key)) {
        rows.set(key, {
          accountId: line.account?.id || null,
          code: line.account?.code || '',
          name: line.account?.description || '',
          category: line.account?.category || '',
          normalSide: line.account?.normalSide || 'DEBIT',
          debit: 0,
          credit: 0,
          balance: 0,
        });
      }

      const row = rows.get(key);
      row.debit = round2(row.debit + Number(line.debit || 0));
      row.credit = round2(row.credit + Number(line.credit || 0));
      row.balance = round2(normalizeBalanceAmount(line.account, row.debit, row.credit));
    }

    return Array.from(rows.values())
      .map((row) => ({
        ...row,
        debit: row.balance >= 0 ? row.balance : 0,
        credit: row.balance < 0 ? Math.abs(row.balance) : 0,
      }))
      .filter((row) => row.debit !== 0 || row.credit !== 0)
      .sort((a, b) => String(a.code).localeCompare(String(b.code)));
  }

  async getBalanceSheetReport(organizationId, startDate, endDate) {
    const trialBalance = await this.getTrialBalanceRange(organizationId, startDate, endDate);
    const sectionMap = new Map([
      ['ASSETS', { key: 'ASSETS', label: 'Assets', total: 0, lines: [] }],
      ['LIABILITIES', { key: 'LIABILITIES', label: 'Liabilities', total: 0, lines: [] }],
      ['EQUITY', { key: 'EQUITY', label: 'Equity', total: 0, lines: [] }],
    ]);

    for (const row of trialBalance) {
      const category = String(row.category || '').trim().toUpperCase();
      if (!sectionMap.has(category)) continue;
      const amount = round2(row.debit - row.credit);
      const section = sectionMap.get(category);
      section.lines.push({
        accountId: row.accountId,
        code: row.code,
        name: row.name,
        amount,
      });
      section.total = round2(section.total + amount);
    }

    const sections = Array.from(sectionMap.values()).map((section) => ({
      ...section,
      lines: section.lines.sort((a, b) => String(a.code).localeCompare(String(b.code))),
      total: round2(section.total),
    }));

    const totals = {
      assets: round2(sectionMap.get('ASSETS')?.total || 0),
      liabilities: round2(Math.abs(sectionMap.get('LIABILITIES')?.total || 0)),
      equity: round2(Math.abs(sectionMap.get('EQUITY')?.total || 0)),
    };

    return {
      asOf: formatDateOnly(endDate),
      sections,
      totals,
    };
  }

  async getCumulativeBalanceSheet(organizationId, asOfDate) {
    const balances = await this.getAccountBalancesAsOf(organizationId, asOfDate);
    const sectionMap = new Map([
      ['ASSETS', { key: 'ASSETS', label: 'Assets', total: 0, lines: [] }],
      ['LIABILITIES', { key: 'LIABILITIES', label: 'Liabilities', total: 0, lines: [] }],
      ['EQUITY', { key: 'EQUITY', label: 'Equity', total: 0, lines: [] }],
    ]);

    for (const [, row] of balances) {
      const category = String(row.category || '').trim().toUpperCase();
      if (!sectionMap.has(category)) continue;
      const amount = round2(row.balance);
      const section = sectionMap.get(category);
      section.lines.push({
        accountId: row.accountId,
        code: row.code,
        name: row.description,
        amount,
      });
      section.total = round2(section.total + amount);
    }

    const sections = Array.from(sectionMap.values()).map((section) => ({
      ...section,
      lines: section.lines.sort((a, b) => String(a.code).localeCompare(String(b.code))),
      total: round2(section.total),
    }));

    const totals = {
      assets: round2(sectionMap.get('ASSETS')?.total || 0),
      liabilities: round2(Math.abs(sectionMap.get('LIABILITIES')?.total || 0)),
      equity: round2(Math.abs(sectionMap.get('EQUITY')?.total || 0)),
    };

    return {
      asOf: formatDateOnly(asOfDate),
      sections,
      totals,
    };
  }

  async getCCASchedule(organizationId, fiscalYearKey = null) {
    const storeData = await this.store.load(organizationId);
    const pools = storeData.t2.ccaPools || {};
    const fyPrep = fiscalYearKey ? (storeData.t2.fiscalYears?.[fiscalYearKey] || {}) : {};
    const manualCca = ensureArray(fyPrep.ccaAdjustments).reduce((sum, item) => sum + Number(item?.amount || 0), 0);

    const poolList = Object.entries(pools).map(([key, pool]) => ({
      poolKey: key,
      ccaClass: pool.ccaClass || key,
      className: pool.description || lookupCCADescription(pool.ccaClass || key),
      rate: pool.rate || CCA_CLASS_DEFINITIONS[String(pool.ccaClass || key)]?.rate || 0,
      description: pool.description || '',
      openingUCC: round2(Number(pool.openingUCC || 0)),
      additions: round2(Number(pool.additions || 0)),
      disposals: round2(Number(pool.disposals || 0)),
      halfYear: pool.halfYear !== false,
      computedCCA: round2(Math.max(0,
        ((Number(pool.openingUCC || 0) + (pool.halfYear !== false ? Number(pool.additions || 0) * 0.5 : Number(pool.additions || 0))
          - Number(pool.disposals || 0)) * Number(pool.rate || 0))
      )),
      manualCCAOverride: round2(Number(pool.manualCCAOverride || 0)),
      closingUCC: round2(Math.max(0,
        Number(pool.openingUCC || 0) + Number(pool.additions || 0) - Number(pool.disposals || 0)
        - Math.max(round2(Math.max(0,
          ((Number(pool.openingUCC || 0) + (pool.halfYear !== false ? Number(pool.additions || 0) * 0.5 : Number(pool.additions || 0))
            - Number(pool.disposals || 0)) * Number(pool.rate || 0))
        )), Number(pool.manualCCAOverride || 0))
      )),
    }));

    const totalAutoCCA = round2(poolList.reduce((sum, p) => sum + p.computedCCA, 0));
    const totalManualCCA = round2(manualCca);
    const totalClaimedCCA = round2(totalAutoCCA + totalManualCCA);

    return {
      pools: poolList,
      totals: {
        autoCCA: totalAutoCCA,
        manualCCA: totalManualCCA,
        totalClaimedCCA,
      },
    };
  }

  async computeEstimatedTax(organizationId, taxableIncome) {
    const taxRates = await this.store.getTaxRates(organizationId);
    const income = Number(taxableIncome || 0);

    const federalSbdLimit = Number(taxRates.sbdLimit || 500000);
    const sbdIncome = Math.min(Math.max(0, income), federalSbdLimit);
    const generalIncome = Math.max(0, income - sbdIncome);

    const federalTax = round2(sbdIncome * Number(taxRates.federalSbdRate || 0.09) + generalIncome * Number(taxRates.federalGeneralRate || 0.15));
    const provincialTax = round2(sbdIncome * Number(taxRates.provincialSbdRate || 0.032) + generalIncome * Number(taxRates.provincialGeneralRate || 0.115));
    const totalTax = round2(federalTax + provincialTax);

    return {
      taxableIncome: income,
      sbdIncome: round2(sbdIncome),
      generalIncome: round2(generalIncome),
      federalTax,
      provincialTax,
      totalTax,
      province: String(taxRates.province || 'ON'),
      rates: {
        federalSbd: Number(taxRates.federalSbdRate || 0.09),
        federalGeneral: Number(taxRates.federalGeneralRate || 0.15),
        provincialSbd: Number(taxRates.provincialSbdRate || 0.032),
        provincialGeneral: Number(taxRates.provincialGeneralRate || 0.115),
        sbdLimit: Number(taxRates.sbdLimit || 500000),
      },
    };
  }

  async getStructuredSchedule1(organizationId, startDate, endDate, bookNetIncome = 0) {
    const fiscalYearKey = buildFiscalYearKey(startDate, endDate);
    const storeData = await this.store.load(organizationId);
    const prep = storeData.t2.fiscalYears?.[fiscalYearKey] || {};
    const lines = prep.schedule1Lines || {};

    const ccaSchedule = await this.getCCASchedule(organizationId, fiscalYearKey);
    const ccaAutoTotal = ccaSchedule.totals.autoCCA;
    const ccaManualTotal = ccaSchedule.totals.manualCCA;

    const scheduleLines = [
      { code: 'S1-01', label: 'Net income (loss) per financial statements', amount: round2(bookNetIncome), editable: false },
      { code: 'S1-02', label: 'Add: Meals & entertainment (50% non-deductible)', amount: round2(Number(lines['S1-02'] || 0)), editable: true, hint: '50% of meals and entertainment expenses', sign: 1 },
      { code: 'S1-03', label: 'Add: Charitable donations', amount: round2(Number(lines['S1-03'] || 0)), editable: true, hint: 'Donations claimed in the P&L', sign: 1 },
      { code: 'S1-04', label: 'Add: Political contributions', amount: round2(Number(lines['S1-04'] || 0)), editable: true, sign: 1 },
      { code: 'S1-05', label: 'Add: Club dues & recreational facilities', amount: round2(Number(lines['S1-05'] || 0)), editable: true, sign: 1 },
      { code: 'S1-06', label: 'Add: Penalties and fines', amount: round2(Number(lines['S1-06'] || 0)), editable: true, sign: 1 },
      { code: 'S1-07', label: 'Add: Non-deductible interest & penalties', amount: round2(Number(lines['S1-07'] || 0)), editable: true, sign: 1 },
      { code: 'S1-08', label: 'Add: Taxable capital gains (from Sch 6)', amount: round2(Number(lines['S1-08'] || 0)), editable: true, hint: '50% of capital gains are taxable', sign: 1 },
      { code: 'S1-09', label: 'Add: Recapture of CCA', amount: round2(Number(lines['S1-09'] || 0)), editable: true, sign: 1 },
      { code: 'S1-10', label: 'Add: Other permanent differences', amount: round2(Number(lines['S1-10'] || 0)), editable: true, sign: 1 },
      { code: 'S1-DIV', label: '--- DIVIDER ---', amount: 0, editable: false, divider: true, sign: 0 },
      { code: 'S1-11', label: 'Deduct: Capital Cost Allowance (CCA)', amount: round2(Number(lines['S1-11'] || 0) || -ccaAutoTotal), editable: true, hint: `Auto CCA: ${round2(ccaAutoTotal)}. Manual: ${round2(ccaManualTotal)}`, sign: -1 },
      { code: 'S1-12', label: 'Deduct: Non-taxable portion of capital gains', amount: round2(Number(lines['S1-12'] || 0)), editable: true, sign: -1 },
      { code: 'S1-13', label: 'Deduct: Dividends from taxable Canadian corps', amount: round2(Number(lines['S1-13'] || 0)), editable: true, sign: -1 },
      { code: 'S1-14', label: 'Deduct: Non-capital losses applied', amount: round2(Number(lines['S1-14'] || 0)), editable: true, hint: 'Limited to taxable income before losses', sign: -1 },
      { code: 'S1-15', label: 'Deduct: Net capital losses applied', amount: round2(Number(lines['S1-15'] || 0)), editable: true, sign: -1 },
      { code: 'S1-16', label: 'Deduct: Other allowable deductions', amount: round2(Number(lines['S1-16'] || 0)), editable: true, sign: -1 },
      { code: 'S1-17', label: 'Deduct: Temporary/timing differences', amount: round2(Number(lines['S1-17'] || 0)), editable: true, sign: -1 },
    ];

    const s1Total = round2(scheduleLines
      .filter(l => !l.divider && l.amount !== 0 && l.code !== 'S1-01')
      .reduce((sum, l) => sum + (l.amount || 0), 0));
    const taxableIncome = round2(bookNetIncome + s1Total);

    return {
      lines: scheduleLines,
      bookNetIncome: round2(bookNetIncome),
      adjustments: s1Total,
      taxableIncome,
    };
  }

  async getT2ExportPackage(organizationId, startDate, endDate) {
    const t2 = await this.getT2PrepReport(organizationId, startDate, endDate);
    const tax = await this.computeEstimatedTax(organizationId, t2.taxableIncomeBridge.taxableIncome);

    const rows = [];
    rows.push(['T2 CORPORATE TAX RETURN - WORKING PAPERS']);
    rows.push(['Taxation Year', `${formatDateOnly(startDate)} to ${formatDateOnly(endDate)}`]);
    rows.push([]);
    rows.push(['Schedule 125 — INCOME STATEMENT', '', '']);
    rows.push(['Section', 'Line', 'Amount']);

    for (const section of (t2.profitLoss?.sections || [])) {
      rows.push([section.label, '', '']);
      for (const line of (section.lines || [])) {
        rows.push(['', line.statementLine, Number(line.totalAmount || 0).toFixed(2)]);
      }
      rows.push(['', 'Section Total', Number(section.totalAmount || 0).toFixed(2)]);
    }
    rows.push(['Net Income (Loss)', '', Number(t2.bookNetIncome || 0).toFixed(2)]);
    rows.push([]);
    rows.push(['Schedule 100 — BALANCE SHEET', '', '']);
    rows.push(['Section', 'Account', 'Balance']);

    for (const section of (t2.balanceSheet?.sections || [])) {
      rows.push([section.label, '', '']);
      for (const line of (section.lines || [])) {
        rows.push(['', `${line.code} ${line.name}`, Number(line.amount || 0).toFixed(2)]);
      }
      rows.push(['', `${section.label} Total`, Number(section.total || 0).toFixed(2)]);
    }
    rows.push([]);
    rows.push(['Schedule 1 — RECONCILIATION', '', '']);
    rows.push(['', 'Book net income', Number(t2.bookNetIncome || 0).toFixed(2)]);

    const s1 = await this.getStructuredSchedule1(organizationId, startDate, endDate, t2.bookNetIncome);
    for (const line of s1.lines) {
      if (line.divider) continue;
      rows.push(['', line.label, Number(line.amount || 0).toFixed(2)]);
    }
    rows.push(['', 'Taxable Income', Number(s1.taxableIncome || 0).toFixed(2)]);
    rows.push([]);
    rows.push(['TAX CALCULATION', '', '']);
    rows.push(['', 'Taxable income', Number(tax.taxableIncome || 0).toFixed(2)]);
    rows.push(['', `Federal tax (SBD $${tax.sbdIncome})`, Number(tax.federalTax || 0).toFixed(2)]);
    rows.push(['', `Provincial tax (${tax.province})`, Number(tax.provincialTax || 0).toFixed(2)]);
    rows.push(['', 'Total estimated tax', Number(tax.totalTax || 0).toFixed(2)]);
    rows.push([]);
    rows.push(['GIFI EXPORT', '', '']);
    rows.push(['Code', 'Description', 'GIFI Label', 'Balance']);
    for (const item of (t2.gifiExport || [])) {
      rows.push([item.code || '', item.description || '', item.gifiLabel || '', Number(item.balance || 0).toFixed(2)]);
    }

    return {
      csv: rows.map((row) => row.map((cell) => `"${String(cell || '').replace(/"/g, '""')}"`).join(',')).join('\n'),
      fileName: `t2_${formatDateOnly(startDate)}_to_${formatDateOnly(endDate)}.csv`,
      rows,
    };
  }

  async getAccountBalancesAsOf(organizationId, asOfDate) {
    const end = toDate(asOfDate, 'end');
    const lines = await this.prisma.journalLine.findMany({
      where: {
        entry: {
          organizationId,
          posted: true,
          ...(end ? { date: { lte: end } } : {}),
        },
      },
      include: {
        account: true,
      },
    });

    const balances = new Map();
    for (const line of lines) {
      const key = String(line.account?.code || line.account?.id);
      if (!balances.has(key)) {
        balances.set(key, {
          accountId: line.account?.id || null,
          code: line.account?.code || '',
          description: line.account?.description || '',
          category: line.account?.category || '',
          normalSide: line.account?.normalSide || 'DEBIT',
          debit: 0,
          credit: 0,
          balance: 0,
        });
      }
      const row = balances.get(key);
      row.debit = round2(row.debit + Number(line.debit || 0));
      row.credit = round2(row.credit + Number(line.credit || 0));
      row.balance = round2(normalizeBalanceAmount(line.account, row.debit, row.credit));
    }
    return balances;
  }

  deriveBankTransactionMeta(bankTransaction = null) {
    const proposal = parseAIProposalFromNotes(bankTransaction?.notes) || {};
    const postingType = String(bankTransaction?.postingType || proposal?.likelyTransactionType || '').trim().toUpperCase() || null;
    const taxTreatment = String(proposal?.likelyTaxTreatment || '').trim().toUpperCase() || null;
    return { postingType, taxTreatment };
  }

  inferHstLineCode({ line, entryLines = [], bankTransaction = null, storeData = null }) {
    const lineOverride = storeData?.hst?.lineOverrides?.[String(line.id)] || null;
    if (lineOverride && TAX_CODE_DEFINITIONS[lineOverride]) return lineOverride;

    const accountOverride = line?.account?.id ? storeData?.hst?.accountTaxCodeOverrides?.[String(line.account.id)] || null : null;
    if (accountOverride && TAX_CODE_DEFINITIONS[accountOverride]) return accountOverride;

    const accountCode = String(line?.account?.code || '').trim();
    const accountCategory = String(line?.account?.category || '').trim().toUpperCase();
    const description = normalizeText(line?.account?.description || line?.entry?.memo || bankTransaction?.description || '');
    const amount = round2(normalizeBalanceAmount(line?.account, line?.debit, line?.credit));
    const absAmountValue = abs2(amount);
    const { postingType, taxTreatment } = this.deriveBankTransactionMeta(bankTransaction);

    if (!absAmountValue) return 'REVIEW_REQUIRED';

    if (accountCode === HST_PAYABLE_CODE) {
      if (postingType === 'TAX_REMITTANCE' && amount < 0) return 'HST_REMITTANCE';
      if (!bankTransaction) return 'HST_ADJUSTMENT';
      return amount >= 0 ? 'SALES_TAX_PAYABLE' : 'HST_ADJUSTMENT';
    }

    if (accountCode === HST_RECOVERABLE_CODE) {
      const counterpartText = normalizeText(entryLines
        .filter((entryLine) => String(entryLine.id) !== String(line.id))
        .map((entryLine) => entryLine.account?.description || '')
        .join(' '));

      if (/meal|entertainment|client meeting|conference/.test(counterpartText)) return 'TAXABLE_PURCHASE_MEALS_ITC_50';
      if (/building|equipment|fixture|computer|vehicle|goodwill|land|machinery|capital/.test(counterpartText)) {
        return 'TAXABLE_PURCHASE_CAPITAL_ITC_FULL';
      }
      if (postingType === 'OWNER_DRAW' || postingType === 'PAYROLL_PAYMENT') return 'TAXABLE_PURCHASE_NO_ITC';
      if (taxTreatment === 'INPUT_TAX_CREDIT') return 'TAXABLE_PURCHASE_ITC_FULL';
      return bankTransaction ? 'TAXABLE_PURCHASE_ITC_FULL' : 'HST_ADJUSTMENT';
    }

    if (accountCategory === 'REVENUE') {
      if (bankTransaction && (taxTreatment === 'SALES_TAX_PAYABLE' || Number(bankTransaction?.taxes || 0) > 0)) return 'TAXABLE_SALE_STANDARD';
      return 'ZERO_RATED_OR_EXEMPT_SALE';
    }

    if (['EXPENSE', 'EXPENSES', 'COST OF GOODS SOLD', 'COGS'].includes(accountCategory)) {
      if (/meal|entertainment|client meeting|conference/.test(description)) return 'TAXABLE_PURCHASE_MEALS_ITC_50';
      if (bankTransaction && Number(bankTransaction?.taxes || 0) > 0) return 'TAXABLE_PURCHASE_ITC_FULL';
      return 'NON_TAXABLE_PURCHASE';
    }

    return 'REVIEW_REQUIRED';
  }

  async getHstWorksheet(organizationId, startDate, endDate) {
    const storeData = await this.store.load(organizationId);
    const journalLines = await this.getJournalLinesForPeriod(organizationId, startDate, endDate);
    const linesByEntry = new Map();
    for (const line of journalLines) {
      const key = String(line.entry?.id || '');
      if (!linesByEntry.has(key)) linesByEntry.set(key, []);
      linesByEntry.get(key).push(line);
    }

    const lineDetails = [];
    const accountSummaryMap = new Map();
    const buckets = {
      taxableSales: 0,
      zeroRatedExemptSales: 0,
      hstCollected: 0,
      itcsClaimed: 0,
      deniedItc: 0,
      adjustments: 0,
      paymentsRemittances: 0,
    };

    for (const line of journalLines) {
      const entryLines = linesByEntry.get(String(line.entry?.id || '')) || [];
      const taxCode = this.inferHstLineCode({ line, entryLines, bankTransaction: line.bankTransaction, storeData });
      const definition = TAX_CODE_DEFINITIONS[taxCode] || TAX_CODE_DEFINITIONS.REVIEW_REQUIRED;
      const signedAmount = round2(normalizeBalanceAmount(line.account, line.debit, line.credit));
      const amount = abs2(signedAmount);
      const detail = {
        id: String(line.id),
        entryId: String(line.entry?.id || ''),
        date: line.entry?.date,
        memo: line.entry?.memo || '',
        accountId: line.account?.id || null,
        accountCode: line.account?.code || '',
        accountDescription: line.account?.description || '',
        signedAmount,
        amount,
        debit: Number(line.debit || 0),
        credit: Number(line.credit || 0),
        bankTxId: line.entry?.bankTxId || null,
        taxCode,
        taxCodeLabel: definition.label,
        bucket: definition.bucket,
        needsReview: taxCode === 'REVIEW_REQUIRED',
      };

      if (taxCode === 'TAXABLE_SALE_STANDARD') buckets.taxableSales = round2(buckets.taxableSales + amount);
      if (taxCode === 'ZERO_RATED_OR_EXEMPT_SALE') buckets.zeroRatedExemptSales = round2(buckets.zeroRatedExemptSales + amount);
      if (taxCode === 'SALES_TAX_PAYABLE' && signedAmount > 0) buckets.hstCollected = round2(buckets.hstCollected + amount);
      if (definition.bucket === 'itc') {
        const itcRate = Number(definition.itcRate ?? 1);
        buckets.itcsClaimed = round2(buckets.itcsClaimed + amount * itcRate);
        if (itcRate < 1) buckets.deniedItc = round2(buckets.deniedItc + amount * (1 - itcRate));
      }
      if (taxCode === 'TAXABLE_PURCHASE_NO_ITC') buckets.deniedItc = round2(buckets.deniedItc + amount);
      if (taxCode === 'HST_ADJUSTMENT') buckets.adjustments = round2(buckets.adjustments + signedAmount);
      if (taxCode === 'HST_REMITTANCE') buckets.paymentsRemittances = round2(buckets.paymentsRemittances + amount);

      const accountKey = String(line.account?.id || line.account?.code || 'unknown');
      if (!accountSummaryMap.has(accountKey)) {
        const defaultOverride = line.account?.id ? storeData?.hst?.accountTaxCodeOverrides?.[String(line.account.id)] || null : null;
        accountSummaryMap.set(accountKey, {
          accountId: line.account?.id || null,
          accountCode: line.account?.code || '',
          accountDescription: line.account?.description || '',
          lineCount: 0,
          reviewCount: 0,
          totalAmount: 0,
          defaultTaxCode: defaultOverride,
          defaultTaxCodeLabel: defaultOverride && TAX_CODE_DEFINITIONS[defaultOverride]
            ? TAX_CODE_DEFINITIONS[defaultOverride].label
            : null,
        });
      }
      const summary = accountSummaryMap.get(accountKey);
      summary.lineCount += 1;
      summary.totalAmount = round2(summary.totalAmount + amount);
      if (detail.needsReview) summary.reviewCount += 1;

      lineDetails.push(detail);
    }

    const startDateObj = toDate(startDate, 'start');
    const dayBeforeStart = startDateObj ? new Date(startDateObj.getTime() - 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000) : null;
    const openingBalances = await this.getAccountBalancesAsOf(organizationId, dayBeforeStart || startDate);
    const closingBalances = await this.getAccountBalancesAsOf(organizationId, endDate);

    const openingPayable = round2((openingBalances.get(HST_PAYABLE_CODE)?.balance || 0) - (openingBalances.get(HST_RECOVERABLE_CODE)?.balance || 0));
    const closingPayable = round2((closingBalances.get(HST_PAYABLE_CODE)?.balance || 0) - (closingBalances.get(HST_RECOVERABLE_CODE)?.balance || 0));
    const netTax = round2(buckets.hstCollected + buckets.adjustments - buckets.itcsClaimed);

    return {
      period: { startDate: formatDateOnly(startDate), endDate: formatDateOnly(endDate) },
      summary: {
        taxableSales: buckets.taxableSales,
        zeroRatedExemptSales: buckets.zeroRatedExemptSales,
        hstCollected: buckets.hstCollected,
        itcsClaimed: buckets.itcsClaimed,
        deniedItc: buckets.deniedItc,
        adjustments: buckets.adjustments,
        paymentsRemittances: buckets.paymentsRemittances,
        openingNetPayable: openingPayable,
        closingNetPayable: closingPayable,
        netTax,
      },
      filingWorksheet: [
        { lineCode: 'REV-TAXABLE', line: 'Taxable sales (feeds return revenue / tax lines)', amount: buckets.taxableSales },
        { lineCode: 'REV-ZERO', line: 'Zero-rated / exempt sales', amount: buckets.zeroRatedExemptSales },
        { lineCode: 'HST-COLLECTED', line: 'GST/HST collected or collectible', amount: buckets.hstCollected },
        { lineCode: 'HST-ADJUST', line: 'Adjustments', amount: buckets.adjustments },
        { lineCode: 'HST-ITC', line: 'Input tax credits claimed', amount: buckets.itcsClaimed },
        { lineCode: 'HST-NET', line: 'Net tax for period', amount: netTax },
        { lineCode: 'HST-REMIT', line: 'Payments / remittances', amount: buckets.paymentsRemittances },
        { lineCode: 'HST-OPEN', line: 'Opening net payable / recoverable', amount: openingPayable },
        { lineCode: 'HST-CLOSE', line: 'Closing net payable / recoverable', amount: closingPayable },
      ],
      taxCodes: this.getTaxCodeDefinitions(),
      accountSummaries: Array.from(accountSummaryMap.values()).sort((a, b) => String(a.accountCode).localeCompare(String(b.accountCode))),
      lineDetails,
    };
  }

  async getGifiMappings(organizationId) {
    const storeData = await this.store.load(organizationId);
    const accounts = await this.prisma.accountingCategory.findMany({
      orderBy: [{ sortOrder: 'asc' }, { code: 'asc' }, { description: 'asc' }],
    });

    return accounts.map((account) => ({
      accountId: account.id,
      code: account.code,
      description: account.description,
      category: account.category,
      normalSide: account.normalSide,
      statementLine: account.statementLine,
      ...(buildDefaultGifiMapping(account)),
      ...(storeData.gifi.accountOverrides?.[String(account.id)] || {}),
    }));
  }

  async updateGifiMapping(organizationId, accountId, payload = {}) {
    return this.store.setGifiOverride(organizationId, accountId, payload);
  }

  async getRetainedEarningsContinuity(organizationId, startDate, endDate, netIncome = null) {
    const start = toDate(startDate, 'start');
    const dayBeforeStart = start ? new Date(start.getTime() - 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000) : null;
    const openingBalances = await this.getAccountBalancesAsOf(organizationId, dayBeforeStart || startDate);
    const closingBalances = await this.getAccountBalancesAsOf(organizationId, endDate);
    const periodLines = await this.getJournalLinesForPeriod(organizationId, startDate, endDate);

    const openingRetainedEarnings = round2(openingBalances.get(RETAINED_EARNINGS_CODE)?.balance || 0);
    const closingRetainedEarnings = round2(closingBalances.get(RETAINED_EARNINGS_CODE)?.balance || 0);

    const ownerContributionLines = periodLines.filter((line) => String(line.account?.code || '') === OWNER_CONTRIBUTION_CODE);
    const ownerDrawLines = periodLines.filter((line) => /owner draw|shareholder draw|draw/i.test(String(line.account?.description || line.entry?.memo || '')));

    return {
      openingRetainedEarnings,
      currentYearNetIncome: round2(netIncome || 0),
      ownerContributions: round2(sumAmounts(ownerContributionLines.map((line) => ({ amount: normalizeBalanceAmount(line.account, line.debit, line.credit) })))),
      ownerDraws: round2(sumAmounts(ownerDrawLines.map((line) => ({ amount: Math.abs(normalizeBalanceAmount(line.account, line.debit, line.credit)) })))),
      closingRetainedEarnings,
      expectedClosingRetainedEarnings: round2(openingRetainedEarnings + Number(netIncome || 0)),
    };
  }

  async getT2PrepReport(organizationId, startDate, endDate) {
    const profitLoss = await this.getProfitLossReport(organizationId, startDate, endDate);
    const balanceSheet = await this.getCumulativeBalanceSheet(organizationId, endDate);
    const gifiMappings = await this.getGifiMappings(organizationId);
    const fiscalYearKey = buildFiscalYearKey(startDate, endDate);
    const storeData = await this.store.load(organizationId);
    const prep = storeData.t2.fiscalYears?.[fiscalYearKey] || {};
    const permanentDifferences = ensureArray(prep.permanentDifferences);
    const temporaryDifferences = ensureArray(prep.temporaryDifferences);
    const ccaAdjustments = ensureArray(prep.ccaAdjustments);

    const permanentTotal = round2(sumAmounts(permanentDifferences));
    const temporaryTotal = round2(sumAmounts(temporaryDifferences));
    const ccaTotal = round2(sumAmounts(ccaAdjustments));
    const bookNetIncome = round2(profitLoss.totals.netIncome || 0);

    const structuredSchedule1 = await this.getStructuredSchedule1(organizationId, startDate, endDate, bookNetIncome);
    const hasS1Data = prep.schedule1Lines && Object.values(prep.schedule1Lines).some(v => Number(v) !== 0);

    const taxableIncomeFromS1 = structuredSchedule1.taxableIncome;
    const taxableIncomeFromLegacy = round2(bookNetIncome + permanentTotal + temporaryTotal + ccaTotal + Number(prep?.overrides?.taxableIncomeAdjustment || 0));
    const taxableIncome = hasS1Data ? taxableIncomeFromS1 : taxableIncomeFromLegacy;

    const retainedEarnings = await this.getRetainedEarningsContinuity(organizationId, startDate, endDate, bookNetIncome);

    const accountBalances = await this.getAccountBalancesAsOf(organizationId, endDate);
    const gifiExport = gifiMappings
      .map((mapping) => ({
        ...mapping,
        balance: round2(accountBalances.get(String(mapping.code))?.balance || 0),
      }))
      .filter((item) => item.balance !== 0 || item.gifiCode || item.gifiLabel);

    const ccaSchedule = await this.getCCASchedule(organizationId, fiscalYearKey);
    const estimatedTax = await this.computeEstimatedTax(organizationId, taxableIncome);
    const lossCarryforwards = await this.store.getLossCarryforwards(organizationId);
    const taxRates = await this.store.getTaxRates(organizationId);
    const shareholders = await this.store.getShareholders(organizationId);
    const taxInstalments = await this.store.getTaxInstalments(organizationId);

    const instalmentsPaid = round2(taxInstalments.reduce((sum, i) => sum + Number(i?.amount || 0), 0));
    const taxBalanceDue = round2(estimatedTax.totalTax - instalmentsPaid);

    return {
      fiscalYear: {
        key: fiscalYearKey,
        startDate: formatDateOnly(startDate),
        endDate: formatDateOnly(endDate),
      },
      bookNetIncome,
      taxableIncomeBridge: {
        bookNetIncome,
        permanentDifferences,
        permanentTotal,
        temporaryDifferences,
        temporaryTotal,
        ccaAdjustments,
        ccaTotal,
        overrideAdjustment: round2(Number(prep?.overrides?.taxableIncomeAdjustment || 0)),
        taxableIncome,
      },
      structuredSchedule1,
      profitLoss,
      balanceSheet,
      retainedEarnings,
      gifiExport,
      ccaSchedule,
      estimatedTax,
      lossCarryforwards,
      taxRates,
      shareholders,
      taxInstalments,
      instalmentsPaid,
      taxBalanceDue,
      hasS1Data,
      reviewNotes: String(prep.reviewNotes || ''),
      overrides: prep.overrides || {},
    };
  }

  async saveT2Prep(organizationId, startDate, endDate, payload = {}) {
    const fiscalYearKey = buildFiscalYearKey(startDate, endDate);
    const prepResult = await this.store.saveFiscalYearPrep(organizationId, fiscalYearKey, {
      permanentDifferences: payload.permanentDifferences,
      temporaryDifferences: payload.temporaryDifferences,
      ccaAdjustments: payload.ccaAdjustments,
      reviewNotes: payload.reviewNotes,
      overrides: payload.overrides,
      schedule1Lines: payload.schedule1Lines,
    });

    if (payload.ccaPools) {
      await this.store.saveCCAPools(organizationId, payload.ccaPools);
    }
    if (payload.lossCarryforwards) {
      await this.store.saveLossCarryforwards(organizationId, payload.lossCarryforwards);
    }
    if (payload.taxRates) {
      await this.store.saveTaxRates(organizationId, payload.taxRates);
    }
    if (payload.shareholders) {
      await this.store.saveShareholders(organizationId, payload.shareholders);
    }
    if (payload.taxInstalments) {
      await this.store.saveTaxInstalments(organizationId, payload.taxInstalments);
    }

    return prepResult;
  }

  async getCloseWorkspace(organizationId, startDate, endDate) {
    const dateClause = startDate || endDate ? {
      date: {
        ...(startDate ? { gte: toDate(startDate, 'start') } : {}),
        ...(endDate ? { lte: toDate(endDate, 'end') } : {}),
      },
    } : {};

    const bankWhere = { organizationId, ...dateClause };
    const journalDateClause = startDate || endDate ? {
      date: {
        ...(startDate ? { gte: toDate(startDate, 'start') } : {}),
        ...(endDate ? { lte: toDate(endDate, 'end') } : {}),
      },
    } : {};

    const [uncategorizedTransactions, missingReceipts, bankTransactions, unmatchedJournalEntries, hstWorksheet, closePeriods] = await Promise.all([
      this.prisma.bankTransaction.count({ where: { ...bankWhere, categoryId: null } }),
      this.prisma.bankTransaction.count({ where: { ...bankWhere, amount: { lt: 0 }, receiptId: null } }),
      this.prisma.bankTransaction.findMany({
        where: bankWhere,
        select: {
          id: true,
          journalEntry: { select: { id: true, posted: true } },
        },
      }),
      this.prisma.journalEntry.count({
        where: {
          organizationId,
          posted: true,
          bankTxId: null,
          ...journalDateClause,
        },
      }),
      this.getHstWorksheet(organizationId, startDate, endDate),
      this.store.listClosePeriods(organizationId),
    ]);

    const reconciledTransactions = bankTransactions.filter((transaction) => transaction.journalEntry?.posted === true).length;
    const unreconciledTransactions = bankTransactions.length - reconciledTransactions;
    const unpostedBankTransactions = bankTransactions.filter((transaction) => !transaction.journalEntry || transaction.journalEntry.posted !== true).length;
    const hstLinesNeedingReview = hstWorksheet.lineDetails.filter((line) => line.needsReview).length;
    const bankReconciliationStatus = unreconciledTransactions === 0 && unmatchedJournalEntries === 0
      ? 'balanced'
      : (reconciledTransactions > 0 ? 'attention' : 'not-started');

    const metricValues = {
      uncategorizedTransactions,
      unreconciledTransactions,
      unpostedBankTransactions,
      missingReceipts,
      unmatchedJournalEntries,
      manualJournalEntriesToReview: unmatchedJournalEntries,
      hstLinesNeedingReview,
    };

    const checklist = DEFAULT_CLOSE_CHECKLIST.map((item) => ({
      ...item,
      value: metricValues[item.key] || 0,
      status: (metricValues[item.key] || 0) <= item.target ? 'ready' : 'attention',
    }));

    return {
      period: { startDate: formatDateOnly(startDate), endDate: formatDateOnly(endDate) },
      checklist,
      metrics: {
        ...metricValues,
        reconciledTransactions,
        bankReconciliationStatus,
      },
      readiness: checklist.every((item) => item.status === 'ready') && bankReconciliationStatus === 'balanced' ? 'ready' : 'attention',
      bankReconciliation: {
        status: bankReconciliationStatus,
        totalBankTransactions: bankTransactions.length,
        reconciledTransactions,
        unreconciledTransactions,
        unmatchedJournalEntries,
      },
      closePeriods,
    };
  }

  async listClosePeriods(organizationId) {
    return this.store.listClosePeriods(organizationId);
  }

  async upsertClosePeriod(organizationId, payload = {}, actor = {}) {
    const current = payload?.id ? await this.store.getClosePeriod(organizationId, payload.id) : null;
    const nextStatus = String(payload.status || current?.status || 'draft').toLowerCase();
    const base = {
      ...current,
      ...payload,
      status: nextStatus,
    };

    if (nextStatus === 'reviewed' && !base.reviewedAt) {
      base.reviewedAt = new Date().toISOString();
      base.reviewedBy = actor?.userId || actor?.email || null;
    }
    if (nextStatus === 'locked' && !base.lockedAt) {
      base.lockedAt = new Date().toISOString();
      base.lockedBy = actor?.userId || actor?.email || null;
    }

    return this.store.upsertClosePeriod(organizationId, base);
  }

  async setHstLineOverride(organizationId, lineId, code) {
    return this.store.setHstLineOverride(organizationId, lineId, code);
  }

  async setAccountTaxCodeOverride(organizationId, accountId, code) {
    return this.store.setAccountTaxCodeOverride(organizationId, accountId, code);
  }

  async getAccountingOverview(organizationId, startDate, endDate) {
    const [profitLoss, hstWorksheet, closeWorkspace, balanceSheet] = await Promise.all([
      this.getProfitLossReport(organizationId, startDate, endDate),
      this.getHstWorksheet(organizationId, startDate, endDate),
      this.getCloseWorkspace(organizationId, startDate, endDate),
      this.getBalanceSheetReport(organizationId, startDate, endDate),
    ]);

    const revenue = round2((profitLoss.totals.revenue || 0) + (profitLoss.totals.otherIncome || 0));
    const expenses = round2((profitLoss.totals.cogs || 0) + (profitLoss.totals.expenses || 0) + (profitLoss.totals.otherExpenses || 0));

    return {
      revenue: { totalRevenue: revenue },
      expenses: { totalExpenses: expenses },
      profitAndLoss: {
        revenue,
        expenses,
        profit: round2(profitLoss.totals.netIncome || 0),
        report: profitLoss,
      },
      taxInfo: {
        totalTax: round2(hstWorksheet.summary.netTax || 0),
        summary: hstWorksheet.summary,
        filingWorksheet: hstWorksheet.filingWorksheet,
      },
      closeInfo: {
        readiness: closeWorkspace.readiness,
        metrics: closeWorkspace.metrics,
        checklist: closeWorkspace.checklist,
        bankReconciliation: closeWorkspace.bankReconciliation,
        latestClosePeriod: closeWorkspace.closePeriods[0] || null,
      },
      balanceSheet: balanceSheet.totals,
    };
  }
}

```

```js
// Full path: /home/luanngo/boss-dev/server/src/services/accounting/services/AccountingComplianceStore.js
import fs from 'fs/promises';
import path from 'path';
import { randomUUID } from 'crypto';

const DEFAULT_DATA = {
  version: 1,
  closePeriods: [],
  hst: {
    filingFrequency: 'quarterly',
    lineOverrides: {},
    accountTaxCodeOverrides: {},
    reportingMethod: 'regular',
  },
  gifi: {
    accountOverrides: {},
  },
  t2: {
    fiscalYears: {},
    ccaPools: {},
    lossCarryforwards: {
      nonCapitalLosses: 0,
      netCapitalLosses: 0,
    },
    shareholders: [],
    taxInstalments: [],
    taxRates: {
      province: 'ON',
      federalSbdRate: 0.09,
      federalGeneralRate: 0.15,
      provincialSbdRate: 0.032,
      provincialGeneralRate: 0.115,
      sbdLimit: 500000,
      taxableCapitalGrindThreshold: 10000000,
    },
  },
};

const cloneDefault = () => JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(DEFAULT_DATA));

const deepMerge = (target, source) => {
  const result = { ...target };
  for (const key of Object.keys(source)) {
    if (source[key] && typeof source[key] === 'object' && !Array.isArray(source[key])) {
      result[key] = deepMerge(result[key] || {}, source[key]);
    } else {
      result[key] = source[key];
    }
  }
  return result;
};

export default class AccountingComplianceStore {
  constructor(baseDir = path.join(process.cwd(), 'data', 'accounting-compliance')) {
    this.baseDir = baseDir;
  }

  getOrgDir(organizationId) {
    return path.join(this.baseDir, String(organizationId));
  }

  getFilePath(organizationId) {
    return path.join(this.getOrgDir(organizationId), 'compliance.json');
  }

  async ensureDir(organizationId) {
    await fs.mkdir(this.getOrgDir(organizationId), { recursive: true });
  }

  async load(organizationId) {
    if (!organizationId) throw new Error('organizationId is required.');
    const filePath = this.getFilePath(organizationId);
    try {
      const raw = await fs.readFile(filePath, 'utf8');
      const parsed = JSON.parse(raw);
      return deepMerge(cloneDefault(), parsed);
    } catch (error) {
      if (error.code === 'ENOENT') {
        const seeded = cloneDefault();
        await this.save(organizationId, seeded);
        return seeded;
      }
      throw error;
    }
  }

  async save(organizationId, data) {
    await this.ensureDir(organizationId);
    const filePath = this.getFilePath(organizationId);
    const payload = JSON.stringify(data, null, 2);
    await fs.writeFile(filePath, payload, 'utf8');
    return data;
  }

  async listClosePeriods(organizationId) {
    const data = await this.load(organizationId);
    return [...data.closePeriods].sort((a, b) => String(b.endDate || '').localeCompare(String(a.endDate || '')));
  }

  async getClosePeriod(organizationId, periodId) {
    const periods = await this.listClosePeriods(organizationId);
    return periods.find((period) => period.id === periodId) || null;
  }

  async upsertClosePeriod(organizationId, payload = {}) {
    const data = await this.load(organizationId);
    const nextPeriod = {
      id: payload.id || randomUUID(),
      label: String(payload.label || '').trim() || null,
      startDate: payload.startDate,
      endDate: payload.endDate,
      status: String(payload.status || 'draft').toLowerCase(),
      checklistOverrides: payload.checklistOverrides && typeof payload.checklistOverrides === 'object'
        ? payload.checklistOverrides
        : {},
      reviewNotes: String(payload.reviewNotes || '').trim(),
      reviewedBy: payload.reviewedBy || null,
      reviewedAt: payload.reviewedAt || null,
      lockedBy: payload.lockedBy || null,
      lockedAt: payload.lockedAt || null,
      createdAt: payload.createdAt || new Date().toISOString(),
      updatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
    };

    const existingIndex = data.closePeriods.findIndex((period) => period.id === nextPeriod.id);
    if (existingIndex >= 0) {
      data.closePeriods[existingIndex] = {
        ...data.closePeriods[existingIndex],
        ...nextPeriod,
      };
    } else {
      data.closePeriods.push(nextPeriod);
    }

    await this.save(organizationId, data);
    return nextPeriod;
  }

  async setHstLineOverride(organizationId, lineId, code) {
    const data = await this.load(organizationId);
    if (!lineId) throw new Error('lineId is required.');
    if (!code) {
      delete data.hst.lineOverrides[String(lineId)];
    } else {
      data.hst.lineOverrides[String(lineId)] = String(code).trim().toUpperCase();
    }
    await this.save(organizationId, data);
    return data.hst.lineOverrides;
  }

  async setAccountTaxCodeOverride(organizationId, accountId, code) {
    const data = await this.load(organizationId);
    if (!accountId) throw new Error('accountId is required.');
    if (!code) {
      delete data.hst.accountTaxCodeOverrides[String(accountId)];
    } else {
      data.hst.accountTaxCodeOverrides[String(accountId)] = String(code).trim().toUpperCase();
    }
    await this.save(organizationId, data);
    return data.hst.accountTaxCodeOverrides;
  }

  async setGifiOverride(organizationId, accountId, override = {}) {
    const data = await this.load(organizationId);
    if (!accountId) throw new Error('accountId is required.');
    const normalized = Object.fromEntries(
      Object.entries({
        statementPresentation: override.statementPresentation ? String(override.statementPresentation).trim() : null,
        taxReturnPresentation: override.taxReturnPresentation ? String(override.taxReturnPresentation).trim() : null,
        gifiCode: override.gifiCode ? String(override.gifiCode).trim() : null,
        gifiLabel: override.gifiLabel ? String(override.gifiLabel).trim() : null,
      }).filter(([, value]) => value)
    );

    if (!Object.keys(normalized).length) {
      delete data.gifi.accountOverrides[String(accountId)];
    } else {
      data.gifi.accountOverrides[String(accountId)] = normalized;
    }

    await this.save(organizationId, data);
    return data.gifi.accountOverrides;
  }

  async saveFiscalYearPrep(organizationId, fiscalYearKey, payload = {}) {
    const data = await this.load(organizationId);
    const key = String(fiscalYearKey || '').trim();
    if (!key) throw new Error('fiscalYearKey is required.');

    data.t2.fiscalYears[key] = {
      ...(data.t2.fiscalYears[key] || {}),
      permanentDifferences: Array.isArray(payload.permanentDifferences)
        ? payload.permanentDifferences
        : (data.t2.fiscalYears[key]?.permanentDifferences || []),
      temporaryDifferences: Array.isArray(payload.temporaryDifferences)
        ? payload.temporaryDifferences
        : (data.t2.fiscalYears[key]?.temporaryDifferences || []),
      ccaAdjustments: Array.isArray(payload.ccaAdjustments)
        ? payload.ccaAdjustments
        : (data.t2.fiscalYears[key]?.ccaAdjustments || []),
      reviewNotes: payload.reviewNotes !== undefined
        ? String(payload.reviewNotes || '')
        : String(data.t2.fiscalYears[key]?.reviewNotes || ''),
      overrides: payload.overrides && typeof payload.overrides === 'object'
        ? payload.overrides
        : (data.t2.fiscalYears[key]?.overrides || {}),
      schedule1Lines: payload.schedule1Lines && typeof payload.schedule1Lines === 'object'
        ? payload.schedule1Lines
        : (data.t2.fiscalYears[key]?.schedule1Lines || {}),
      updatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
    };

    await this.save(organizationId, data);
    return data.t2.fiscalYears[key];
  }

  async getCCAPools(organizationId) {
    const data = await this.load(organizationId);
    return data.t2.ccaPools || {};
  }

  async saveCCAPools(organizationId, pools) {
    const data = await this.load(organizationId);
    data.t2.ccaPools = pools;
    await this.save(organizationId, data);
    return data.t2.ccaPools;
  }

  async getLossCarryforwards(organizationId) {
    const data = await this.load(organizationId);
    return data.t2.lossCarryforwards || { nonCapitalLosses: 0, netCapitalLosses: 0 };
  }

  async saveLossCarryforwards(organizationId, losses) {
    const data = await this.load(organizationId);
    data.t2.lossCarryforwards = { ...data.t2.lossCarryforwards, ...losses };
    await this.save(organizationId, data);
    return data.t2.lossCarryforwards;
  }

  async getTaxRates(organizationId) {
    const data = await this.load(organizationId);
    return data.t2.taxRates || DEFAULT_DATA.t2.taxRates;
  }

  async saveTaxRates(organizationId, rates) {
    const data = await this.load(organizationId);
    data.t2.taxRates = { ...data.t2.taxRates, ...rates };
    await this.save(organizationId, data);
    return data.t2.taxRates;
  }

  async getShareholders(organizationId) {
    const data = await this.load(organizationId);
    return data.t2.shareholders || [];
  }

  async saveShareholders(organizationId, shareholders) {
    const data = await this.load(organizationId);
    data.t2.shareholders = shareholders;
    await this.save(organizationId, data);
    return data.t2.shareholders;
  }

  async getTaxInstalments(organizationId) {
    const data = await this.load(organizationId);
    return data.t2.taxInstalments || [];
  }

  async saveTaxInstalments(organizationId, instalments) {
    const data = await this.load(organizationId);
    data.t2.taxInstalments = instalments;
    await this.save(organizationId, data);
    return data.t2.taxInstalments;
  }

  async saveT2Bulk(organizationId, bulk = {}) {
    const data = await this.load(organizationId);
    if (bulk.taxRates) data.t2.taxRates = { ...data.t2.taxRates, ...bulk.taxRates };
    if (bulk.ccaPools) data.t2.ccaPools = bulk.ccaPools;
    if (bulk.lossCarryforwards) data.t2.lossCarryforwards = { ...data.t2.lossCarryforwards, ...bulk.lossCarryforwards };
    if (bulk.shareholders) data.t2.shareholders = bulk.shareholders;
    if (bulk.taxInstalments) data.t2.taxInstalments = bulk.taxInstalments;
    await this.save(organizationId, data);
    return data.t2;
  }
}
```

```js
const formatAccountLabel = (account) => {
  if (!account) return null;
  const code = String(account?.code || '').trim();
  const description = String(account?.description || '').trim();
  if (code && description) return `${code} — ${description}`;
  return code || description || null;
};

const decorateAccount = (account) => account ? ({ ...account, label: formatAccountLabel(account) }) : null;

const PROPOSAL_VERSION = 2;
const VALID_TAX_TREATMENTS = Object.freeze(['NO_TAX', 'INPUT_TAX_CREDIT', 'SALES_TAX_PAYABLE']);
const FORCE_NO_TAX_POSTING_TYPES = new Set([
  'PAYROLL_FUNDING',
  'PAYROLL_PAYMENT',
  'PAYROLL_REMITTANCE',
  'TAX_REMITTANCE',

]);

const uniqueStrings = (values = []) => Array.from(new Set(
  values
    .map((value) => String(value || '').trim())
    .filter(Boolean)
));

const toTitleCase = (value) => String(value || '')
  .toLowerCase()
  .replace(/\b\w/g, (match) => match.toUpperCase());

const escapeSqlString = (value) => String(value || '').replace(/'/g, "''");

const buildJournalLine = (accountCode, accountDescription, debit, credit) => ({
  accountCode,
  accountDescription,
  label: formatAccountLabel({ code: accountCode, description: accountDescription }),
  debit,
  credit,
});

const buildRuleSqlAssignments = ({ categoryId = null, transactionType = null, requiredReceipt = false }) => {
  const assignments = [];
  if (categoryId) assignments.push(`"categoryId" = '${escapeSqlString(categoryId)}'`);
  if (transactionType) assignments.push(`"postingType" = '${escapeSqlString(transactionType)}'`);
  if (requiredReceipt) assignments.push(`"receiptMatchStatus" = 'UNMATCHED'`);
  return assignments;
};

const buildRuleSql = ({ categoryId = null, transactionType = null, requiredReceipt = false }) => {
  const assignments = buildRuleSqlAssignments({ categoryId, transactionType, requiredReceipt });
  if (!assignments.length) return '';
  return `UPDATE "BankTransaction" SET ${assignments.join(', ')}`;
};


const normalizeRuleJournalTemplateLines = (value = [], fallback = []) => {
  const source = Array.isArray(value) && value.length ? value : Array.isArray(fallback) ? fallback : [];
  return source
    .map((line) => {
      if (!line || typeof line !== 'object') return null;
      const accountCode = String(line.accountCode || line.code || line.account?.code || '').trim();
      const accountDescription = String(
        line.accountDescription ||
        line.description ||
        line.account?.description ||
        line.accountName ||
        line.account?.name ||
        ''
      ).trim();
      const debit = Number(line.debit || 0);
      const credit = Number(line.credit || 0);
      if ((!accountCode && !accountDescription) || !Number.isFinite(debit) || !Number.isFinite(credit)) return null;
      return buildJournalLine(accountCode || null, accountDescription || '', Number(debit.toFixed(2)), Number(credit.toFixed(2)));
    })
    .filter(Boolean);
};

const normalizeAmountDirection = (amount) => {
  if (Number(amount || 0) > 0) return 'INCOME';
  if (Number(amount || 0) < 0) return 'EXPENSE';
  return 'ANY';
};


const normalizeText = (value) =>
  String(value || '')
    .toLowerCase()
    .replace(/[^a-z0-9\s]/g, ' ')
    .replace(/\s+/g, ' ')
    .trim();

const extractDescriptionPattern = (value) =>
  normalizeText(value)
    .split(' ')
    .filter(Boolean)
    .slice(0, 6)
    .join(' ');


const jaccardSimilarity = (left, right) => {
  const leftTokens = new Set(normalizeText(left).split(' ').filter(Boolean));
  const rightTokens = new Set(normalizeText(right).split(' ').filter(Boolean));

  if (!leftTokens.size || !rightTokens.size) return 0;

  let intersection = 0;
  for (const token of leftTokens) {
    if (rightTokens.has(token)) intersection += 1;
  }

  const union = new Set([...leftTokens, ...rightTokens]).size;
  return union ? intersection / union : 0;
};

const inferTaxTreatmentFromTransaction = (transaction, postingType = null) => {
  const normalizedPostingType = String(postingType || transaction?.postingType || '').trim().toUpperCase();
  if (FORCE_NO_TAX_POSTING_TYPES.has(normalizedPostingType)) return 'NO_TAX';
  const taxValue = Number(transaction?.taxes || transaction?.receiptHints?.extractedTax || 0);
  const amount = Number(transaction?.amount || 0);
  if (taxValue <= 0) return 'NO_TAX';
  return amount > 0 ? 'SALES_TAX_PAYABLE' : 'INPUT_TAX_CREDIT';
};

const safeJsonParse = (value) => {
  if (!value || typeof value !== 'string') return null;

  try {
    return JSON.parse(value);
  } catch {
    const fenced = value.match(/```json\s*([\s\S]*?)```/i);
    if (fenced?.[1]) {
      try {
        return JSON.parse(fenced[1]);
      } catch {
        return null;
      }
    }
    return null;
  }
};

const clamp = (value, min = 0, max = 1) => Math.max(min, Math.min(max, Number(value) || 0));
```
