```js
const scoreStarterTemplate = (request, template) => {
  const haystack = normalizeText(request);
  if (!haystack) return 0;
  return template.match.reduce((score, term) => (haystack.includes(normalizeText(term)) ? score + 1 : score), 0);
};

const resolveUniqueCode = (rawCode, existingCodes = new Set()) => {
  const normalized = String(rawCode || '').trim().toUpperCase();
  if (!normalized) return normalized;
  if (!existingCodes.has(normalized)) return normalized;

  if (/^\d+$/.test(normalized)) {
    let next = Number(normalized);
    while (existingCodes.has(String(next))) next += 1;
    return String(next);
  }

  let suffix = 2;
  let next = `${normalized}-${suffix}`;
  while (existingCodes.has(next)) {
    suffix += 1;
    next = `${normalized}-${suffix}`;
  }
  return next;
};

const buildSimilarExistingItems = (existingItems = [], request = '') => {
  const tokens = normalizeText(request).split(' ').filter(Boolean);
  if (!tokens.length) return [];

  return existingItems
    .map((item) => {
      const haystack = normalizeText([item.code, item.description, item.category, item.statementLine].filter(Boolean).join(' '));
      const matches = tokens.reduce((count, token) => (haystack.includes(token) ? count + 1 : count), 0);
      return { item, matches };
    })
    .filter(({ matches }) => matches > 0)
    .sort((left, right) => right.matches - left.matches)
    .slice(0, 6)
    .map(({ item }) => ({
      id: item.id,
      code: item.code,
      description: item.description,
      category: item.category,
      normalSide: item.normalSide,
      statementLine: item.statementLine,
      isPLAccount: Boolean(item.isPLAccount),
      label: formatAccountLabel(item),
    }));
};

const buildFallbackChartSuggestion = ({ request, view, existingItems = [] }) => {
  const candidates = STARTER_CHART_TEMPLATES
    .filter((template) => template.view === 'both' || template.view === view)
    .map((template) => ({ template, score: scoreStarterTemplate(request, template) }))
    .sort((left, right) => right.score - left.score);

  const best = candidates.find((candidate) => candidate.score > 0)?.template
    || STARTER_CHART_TEMPLATES.find((template) => template.key === (view === 'accounts' ? 'operating-bank' : 'office-supplies'));

  const existingCodes = new Set(existingItems.map((item) => String(item.code || '').trim().toUpperCase()).filter(Boolean));
  const suggestedRecord = {
    ...best.record,
    code: resolveUniqueCode(best.record.code, existingCodes),
  };

  const starterAlternatives = candidates
    .filter((candidate) => candidate.template.key !== best.key)
    .slice(0, 4)
    .map(({ template }) => ({
      key: template.key,
      label: formatAccountLabel(template.record) || template.record.description,
      description: template.beginnerReason,
      prompt: `Create ${view === 'accounts' ? 'an account' : 'a category'} for ${template.record.description}`,
      record: {
        ...template.record,
        code: resolveUniqueCode(template.record.code, existingCodes),
      },
    }));

  return {
    suggestedRecord,
    beginnerReason: best.beginnerReason,
    whenToUse: best.whenToUse,
    whenNotToUse: best.whenNotToUse,
    bookkeepingTips: [
      'Keep owner money, taxes, transfers, and real business expenses in separate accounts.',
      'Use broad categories first. You can split them into finer detail after you have a few months of history.',
      'Review the wording and statement line before saving so reports stay easy to read later.',
    ],
    starterAlternatives,
    confidence: 0.62,
  };
};

const sanitizeChartRecord = (record, fallbackRecord, existingItems = []) => {
  const existingCodes = new Set(existingItems.map((item) => String(item.code || '').trim().toUpperCase()).filter(Boolean));
  const merged = {
    ...fallbackRecord,
    ...(record && typeof record === 'object' ? record : {}),
  };

  const category = String(merged.category || fallbackRecord.category || 'EXPENSES').trim().toUpperCase();
  const normalSide = String(merged.normalSide || fallbackRecord.normalSide || 'DEBIT').trim().toUpperCase() === 'CREDIT' ? 'CREDIT' : 'DEBIT';

  return {
    code: resolveUniqueCode(String(merged.code || fallbackRecord.code || '').trim().toUpperCase(), existingCodes),
    description: String(merged.description || fallbackRecord.description || '').trim(),
    category,
    normalSide,
    statementLine: merged.statementLine ? String(merged.statementLine).trim() : null,
    sortOrder: Number.isFinite(Number(merged.sortOrder)) ? Number(merged.sortOrder) : Number(fallbackRecord.sortOrder || 500),
    isPLAccount: typeof merged.isPLAccount === 'boolean'
      ? merged.isPLAccount
      : ['REVENUE', 'OTHER_INCOME', 'EXPENSES', 'EXPENSE', 'OTHER_EXPENSES', 'COST OF GOODS SOLD', 'COGS'].includes(category),
  };
};

class AccountingLLMService {
  constructor() {
    this.llmClient = llmClient;
  }

  async generateRuleSQL({ prompt, existingSql, organizationId, userId, sessionId }) {
    try {
      const accountingSchema = await fs.readFile("./prisma/schemas/accounting.prisma", "utf-8");
      const recentTransactions = await prisma.bankTransaction.findMany({
        where: { organizationId },
        orderBy: { date: 'desc' },
        take: 20,
        include: { category: true }
      });
      const categories = await prisma.accountingCategory.findMany({
        select: { id: true, description: true, code: true }
      });

      const context = `
Here is the relevant schema for the BankTransaction table:
${accountingSchema}

Here are some recent transactions for context:
${JSON.stringify(recentTransactions, null, 2)}

Here are the available categories:
${JSON.stringify(categories, null, 2)}
`;
      const user = await prisma.user.findUnique({ where: { id: userId } });
      if (!user) throw new Error("User not found for prompt fetching.");

      const systemPromptTemplate = await SettingsService.getPrompt(user.organizationId, 'accounting_generateRuleSQL_system');
      const systemPrompt = systemPromptTemplate.replace('{context}', context);

      const userPrompt = `
Instruction: "${prompt}"

${existingSql ? `Existing SQL to modify:
${existingSql}` : ''}

Generate the new SQL statement.
`;

      const response = await this.llmClient.generateResponse(
        userPrompt,
        userId,
        sessionId,
        "TEXT_CHAT",
        null,
        null,
        "",
        systemPrompt,
        { includeConversationHistory: false, storeConversation: true, context: 'ACCOUNTING', usageKey: 'ACCOUNTING_RULE_SQL' }
      );

      return response.replace(/```sql\s*([\s\S]*?)\s*```/, '$1').trim();
    } catch (error) {
      console.error("Error generating rule SQL:", error);
      throw error;
    }
  }

  async convertFormulaToSQL(plainTextFormula, userId, sessionId) {
    try {
      const accountingSchema = await fs.readFile("./prisma/schemas/accounting.prisma", "utf-8");
      const receiptSchema = await fs.readFile("./prisma/schemas/receipt.prisma", "utf-8");

      const user = await prisma.user.findUnique({ where: { id: userId } });
      if (!user) throw new Error("User not found for prompt fetching.");

      let systemPromptTemplate = await SettingsService.getPrompt(user.organizationId, 'accounting_convertFormulaToSQL_system');

      if (systemPromptTemplate && systemPromptTemplate.trim().toLowerCase().startsWith('select')) {
        try {
          const result = await prisma.$queryRawUnsafe(systemPromptTemplate);
          systemPromptTemplate = JSON.stringify(result, null, 2);
        } catch (e) {
          console.error(`Error executing SQL prompt for 'accounting_convertFormulaToSQL_system':`, e);
        }
      }

      const systemPrompt = systemPromptTemplate
        .replace('{accountingSchema}', accountingSchema)
        .replace('{receiptSchema}', receiptSchema);

      const userPrompt = `
Convert the following plain text formula into a SQL update query:
${plainTextFormula}
      `;

      const response = await this.llmClient.generateResponse(
        userPrompt,
        userId,
        sessionId,
        "STRUCTURED_OUTPUT",
        null,
        null,
        "",
        systemPrompt,
        { includeConversationHistory: true, storeConversation: true, context: 'ACCOUNTING', usageKey: 'ACCOUNTING_FORMULA_SQL' }
      );

      return typeof response === "string" ? JSON.parse(response) : response;
    } catch (error) {
      console.error("Error converting formula to SQL:", error);
      throw error;
    }
  }

  async convertCommandToSQL(command, userId, sessionId) {
    try {
      const accountingSchema = await fs.readFile("./prisma/schemas/accounting.prisma", "utf-8");
      const user = await prisma.user.findUnique({ where: { id: userId } });
      if (!user) throw new Error("User not found for prompt fetching.");

      let systemPromptTemplate = await SettingsService.getPrompt(user.organizationId, 'accounting_convertCommandToSQL_system');

      if (systemPromptTemplate && systemPromptTemplate.trim().toLowerCase().startsWith('select')) {
        try {
          const result = await prisma.$queryRawUnsafe(systemPromptTemplate);
          systemPromptTemplate = JSON.stringify(result, null, 2);
        } catch (e) {
          console.error(`Error executing SQL prompt for 'accounting_convertCommandToSQL_system':`, e);
        }
      }

      const systemPrompt = systemPromptTemplate.replace('{accountingSchema}', accountingSchema);
      const userPrompt = `
  Convert the following natural language command into a SQL query:
  ${command}
      `;

      const response = await this.llmClient.generateResponse(
        userPrompt,
        userId,
        sessionId,
        "TEXT_CHAT",
        null,
        null,
        "",
        systemPrompt,
        { includeConversationHistory: true, storeConversation: true, context: 'ACCOUNTING', usageKey: 'ACCOUNTING_COMMAND_SQL' }
      );

      return response.replace(/```sql\s*([\s\S]*?)\s*```/, '$1').trim();
    } catch (error) {
      console.error("Error converting command to SQL:", error);
      throw error;
    }
  }

  async guessCategory({ description, amount, categories = [], userId, sessionId }) {
    try {
      const user = await prisma.user.findUnique({ where: { id: userId } });
      if (!user) throw new Error("User not found for prompt fetching.");

      const availableCategories =
        categories.length > 0
          ? categories.map((cat) => `${cat.code}: ${cat.description}`).join("\n")
          : "REVENUE, EXPENSES, COST OF GOODS SOLD, TAXES";

      const promptTemplate = await SettingsService.getPrompt(user.organizationId, 'accounting_guessCategory_user');
      const prompt = promptTemplate
        .replace('{description}', description)
        .replace('{availableCategories}', availableCategories);

      const response = await this.llmClient.generateResponse(
        prompt,
        userId,
        sessionId,
        "TEXT_CHAT",
        null,
        null,
        "",
        "",
        { context: 'ACCOUNTING', usageKey: 'ACCOUNTING_CATEGORY_GUESS' }
      );

      return response.replace(/[\n\r`]/g, "").trim();
    } catch (error) {
      console.error("LLM guessCategory Error:", error);
      return amount >= 0 ? "REVENUE" : "EXPENSES";
    }
  }

  classifyTransactionTypeHeuristically(transaction) {
    const description = normalizeText(transaction?.description);
    const amount = Number(transaction?.amount || 0);
    const sourceType = String(transaction?.source?.type || '').toUpperCase();

    if (/owner draw|draw owner|shareholder draw|personal withdrawal/.test(description)) return 'OWNER_DRAW';
    if (/owner contribution|shareholder contribution|capital contribution/.test(description)) return 'OWNER_CONTRIBUTION';
    if (sourceType !== 'CREDIT_CARD' && amount < 0 && /\brise\s+cap\b/.test(description)) return 'TRANSFER';
    if (/payroll|adp|ceridian|paychex|wagepoint/.test(description)) return 'PAYROLL_PAYMENT';
    if (/gst|hst|cra|tax remittance|remit/.test(description)) return 'TAX_REMITTANCE';
    if (/credit card payment|visa payment|mastercard payment/.test(description)) return 'CREDIT_CARD_PAYMENT';
    if (/transfer|etransfer|e-transfer|internal move|from savings|to savings/.test(description)) return 'TRANSFER';
    if (/bank charge|service charge|monthly fee|nsf fee/.test(description)) return 'BANK_EXPENSE';
    if (amount > 0) return 'BANK_REVENUE';
    if (sourceType === 'CREDIT_CARD') return 'CREDIT_CARD_PAYMENT';
    return 'BANK_EXPENSE';
  }

  buildJournalLinesHeuristically(transaction, likelyAccount, options = {}) {
    const amount = Math.abs(Number(transaction?.amount || 0));
    const transactionType = String(options?.transactionType || this.classifyTransactionTypeHeuristically(transaction)).trim().toUpperCase();
    const rawTaxTreatment = String(options?.taxTreatment || inferTaxTreatmentFromTransaction(transaction, transactionType)).trim().toUpperCase();
    const taxTreatment = VALID_TAX_TREATMENTS.includes(rawTaxTreatment) ? rawTaxTreatment : 'NO_TAX';
    const shouldForceNoTax = FORCE_NO_TAX_POSTING_TYPES.has(transactionType);
    const tax = shouldForceNoTax ? 0 : Math.abs(Number(transaction?.taxes || transaction?.receiptHints?.extractedTax || 0));
    const net = Math.max(0, Number((amount - tax).toFixed(2)));
    const sourceCode = sourceTypeToAccountCode(transaction?.source?.type);
    const sourceAccount = SYSTEM_ACCOUNT_LOOKUP[sourceCode] || { code: sourceCode, description: '' };
    const taxReceivable = SYSTEM_ACCOUNT_LOOKUP['1066'];
    const taxPayable = SYSTEM_ACCOUNT_LOOKUP['2640'];
    const likelyExpenseAccount = likelyAccount
      ? { code: likelyAccount.code, description: likelyAccount.description || '' }
      : SYSTEM_ACCOUNT_LOOKUP[transaction?.category?.code || '1980'] || { code: transaction?.category?.code || '1980', description: transaction?.category?.description || '' };
    const offsetAccount = transactionType === 'TAX_REMITTANCE'
      ? (likelyExpenseAccount?.code ? likelyExpenseAccount : taxPayable)
      : likelyExpenseAccount;

    if (transactionType === 'PAYROLL_PAYMENT' || transactionType === 'TAX_REMITTANCE') {
      return [
        buildJournalLine(offsetAccount.code, offsetAccount.description, amount, 0),
        buildJournalLine(sourceAccount.code, sourceAccount.description, 0, amount),
      ];
    }

    const taxLine = taxTreatment === 'INPUT_TAX_CREDIT' && tax > 0
      ? buildJournalLine(taxReceivable.code, taxReceivable.description, tax, 0)
      : taxTreatment === 'SALES_TAX_PAYABLE' && tax > 0
        ? buildJournalLine(taxPayable.code, taxPayable.description, 0, tax)
        : null;

    if (transactionType === 'BANK_REVENUE' || Number(transaction?.amount || 0) > 0) {
      return [
        buildJournalLine(sourceAccount.code, sourceAccount.description, amount, 0),
        ...(taxLine ? [taxLine] : []),
        buildJournalLine(offsetAccount.code, offsetAccount.description, 0, net || amount),
      ];
    }

    return [
      buildJournalLine(offsetAccount.code, offsetAccount.description, net || amount, 0),
      ...(taxLine ? [taxLine] : []),
      buildJournalLine(sourceAccount.code, sourceAccount.description, 0, amount),
    ];
  }

  buildRuleDraftFallback({ prompt = '', transaction = null, proposal = null, categories = [], similarTransactions = [] }) {
    const vendor = String(
      transaction?.receiptHints?.normalizedVendor ||
      transaction?.receipt?.companyName ||
      transaction?.description ||
      ''
    ).trim();
    const normalizedPattern = extractDescriptionPattern(transaction?.description || prompt);
    const basePatterns = uniqueStrings([
      vendor,
      ...normalizedPattern.split(' ').filter((token) => token.length > 2),
    ]).slice(0, 6);

    const likelyAccountCode = proposal?.likelyAccount?.code || transaction?.category?.code || null;
    const likelyCategory = likelyAccountCode
      ? categories.find((category) => category.code === likelyAccountCode) || proposal?.likelyAccount || transaction?.category || null
      : null;
    const transactionType = proposal?.likelyTransactionType || this.classifyTransactionTypeHeuristically(transaction);
    const taxTreatment = String(proposal?.likelyTaxTreatment || inferTaxTreatmentFromTransaction(transaction, transactionType) || '').toUpperCase() || null;
    const amountDirection = normalizeAmountDirection(transaction?.amount);
    const group = transactionType === 'BANK_REVENUE'
      ? 'Revenue'
      : transactionType === 'CREDIT_CARD_PAYMENT'
        ? 'Credit Card Expenses'
        : vendor
          ? 'Vendors'
          : 'General';

    const readableVendor = vendor ? toTitleCase(vendor) : 'Transactions';
    const name = likelyCategory?.description
      ? `${readableVendor} -> ${likelyCategory.description}`
      : `${readableVendor} rule`;

    const notes = similarTransactions.length
      ? `Suggested from a manual proposal with ${similarTransactions.length} similar uncategorized transaction${similarTransactions.length === 1 ? '' : 's'} in the current queue.`
      : 'Suggested from a manual proposal in the review queue.';

    return {
      name,
      group,
      notes,
      patterns: basePatterns,
      enabled: true,
      matchMode: 'ANY',
      sourceType: String(transaction?.source?.type || '').toUpperCase() || null,
      transactionType: transactionType || null,
      taxTreatment,
      amountDirection,
      categoryId: likelyCategory?.id || proposal?.likelyAccount?.id || null,
      categoryCode: likelyCategory?.code || proposal?.likelyAccount?.code || null,
      categoryDescription: likelyCategory?.description || proposal?.likelyAccount?.description || '',
      autoCategory: Boolean(likelyCategory?.id || proposal?.likelyAccount?.id),
      autoApplyTaxes: taxTreatment === 'INPUT_TAX_CREDIT',
      requiredReceipt: false,
      llmSummary: proposal?.explanation || String(prompt || '').trim() || 'AI-assisted rule draft.',
      journalMode: Array.isArray(proposal?.likelyJournalLines) && proposal.likelyJournalLines.length ? 'PROPOSAL_HINT' : 'STANDARD',
      journalTemplateLines: normalizeRuleJournalTemplateLines(
        proposal?.likelyJournalLines || [],
        transaction
          ? this.buildJournalLinesHeuristically(transaction, likelyCategory || proposal?.likelyAccount || null, {
              transactionType,
              taxTreatment,
            })
          : []
      ),
      sql: buildRuleSql({
        categoryId: likelyCategory?.id || proposal?.likelyAccount?.id || null,
        transactionType,
        requiredReceipt: false,
      }),
    };
  }

  async draftRuleFromPrompt({ organizationId, userId, sessionId, prompt = '', existingRule = null, selectedTransactions = [] }) {
    const categories = await prisma.accountingCategory.findMany({
      select: { id: true, code: true, description: true, category: true, statementLine: true, normalSide: true, isPLAccount: true },
      orderBy: [{ sortOrder: 'asc' }, { code: 'asc' }],
    });

    const seedTransaction = selectedTransactions[0] || null;
    const fallback = this.buildRuleDraftFallback({ prompt, transaction: seedTransaction, categories, similarTransactions: selectedTransactions.slice(1) });

    try {
      const systemPrompt = `You draft bookkeeping automation rules.
Return strict JSON only.
Prefer safe rules that categorize transactions conservatively.
Never include destructive SQL.
Always think through the full journal treatment, not just category and tax.
Desired keys: name, group, notes, patterns, enabled, matchMode, sourceType, transactionType, taxTreatment, amountDirection, categoryCode, autoCategory, autoApplyTaxes, requiredReceipt, llmSummary, journalMode, journalTemplateLines.`;

      const userPrompt = JSON.stringify({
        task: 'Draft a bookkeeping rule that a human can review and save.',
        prompt,
        existingRule,
        selectedTransactions,
        categories,
        desiredShape: {
          name: 'string',
          group: 'string',
          notes: 'string',
          patterns: ['string'],
          enabled: true,
          matchMode: 'ANY',
          sourceType: 'CREDIT_CARD|CHEQUING_ACCOUNT|null',
          transactionType: 'BANK_EXPENSE|BANK_REVENUE|TRANSFER|CREDIT_CARD_PAYMENT|PAYROLL_PAYMENT|TAX_REMITTANCE|OWNER_DRAW|OWNER_CONTRIBUTION|null',
          taxTreatment: 'NO_TAX|INPUT_TAX_CREDIT|SALES_TAX_PAYABLE|null',
          amountDirection: 'EXPENSE|INCOME|ANY',
          categoryCode: 'string|null',
          autoCategory: true,
          autoApplyTaxes: false,
          requiredReceipt: false,
          llmSummary: 'string',
          journalMode: 'STANDARD|PROPOSAL_HINT',
          journalTemplateLines: [{ accountCode: 'string', accountDescription: 'string', debit: 0, credit: 0 }]
        }
      }, null, 2);

      const response = await this.llmClient.generateResponse(
        userPrompt,
        userId,
        sessionId,
        'TEXT_CHAT',
        null,
        null,
        '',
        systemPrompt,
        { includeConversationHistory: false, storeConversation: false, context: 'ACCOUNTING' }
      );

      const parsed = safeJsonParse(response);
      if (!parsed || typeof parsed !== 'object') return fallback;

      const matchedCategory = parsed.categoryCode
        ? categories.find((category) => category.code === parsed.categoryCode) || null
        : fallback.categoryId
          ? categories.find((category) => category.id === fallback.categoryId) || null
          : null;

      const nextDraft = {
        ...fallback,
        name: String(parsed.name || fallback.name || '').trim() || fallback.name,
        group: String(parsed.group || fallback.group || 'General').trim() || 'General',
        notes: String(parsed.notes || fallback.notes || '').trim(),
        patterns: uniqueStrings(Array.isArray(parsed.patterns) ? parsed.patterns : fallback.patterns),
        enabled: parsed.enabled !== false,
        matchMode: String(parsed.matchMode || fallback.matchMode || 'ANY').toUpperCase() === 'ALL' ? 'ALL' : 'ANY',
        sourceType: String(parsed.sourceType || fallback.sourceType || '').toUpperCase() || null,
        transactionType: String(parsed.transactionType || fallback.transactionType || '').toUpperCase() || null,
        taxTreatment: ['NO_TAX', 'INPUT_TAX_CREDIT', 'SALES_TAX_PAYABLE'].includes(String(parsed.taxTreatment || '').toUpperCase())
          ? String(parsed.taxTreatment).toUpperCase()
          : fallback.taxTreatment,
        amountDirection: ['EXPENSE', 'INCOME', 'ANY'].includes(String(parsed.amountDirection || '').toUpperCase())
          ? String(parsed.amountDirection).toUpperCase()
          : fallback.amountDirection,
        categoryId: matchedCategory?.id || fallback.categoryId || null,
        categoryCode: matchedCategory?.code || fallback.categoryCode || null,
        categoryDescription: matchedCategory?.description || fallback.categoryDescription || '',
        autoCategory: parsed.autoCategory !== false && Boolean(matchedCategory?.id || fallback.categoryId),
        autoApplyTaxes: Boolean(parsed.autoApplyTaxes),
        requiredReceipt: Boolean(parsed.requiredReceipt),
        llmSummary: String(parsed.llmSummary || fallback.llmSummary || '').trim(),
        journalMode: String(parsed.journalMode || fallback.journalMode || 'STANDARD').toUpperCase() === 'PROPOSAL_HINT' ? 'PROPOSAL_HINT' : 'STANDARD',
        journalTemplateLines: Array.isArray(parsed.journalTemplateLines) && parsed.journalTemplateLines.length
          ? normalizeRuleJournalTemplateLines(parsed.journalTemplateLines, null)
          : Array.isArray(fallback.journalTemplateLines)
            ? fallback.journalTemplateLines
            : [],
      };

      nextDraft.sql = buildRuleSql({
        categoryId: nextDraft.autoCategory ? nextDraft.categoryId : null,
        transactionType: nextDraft.transactionType,
        requiredReceipt: nextDraft.requiredReceipt,
      });
      return nextDraft;
    } catch (error) {
      console.warn('Failed to draft bookkeeping rule with AI, falling back:', error.message);
      return fallback;
    }
  }

  async draftRuleFromProposal({ organizationId, userId, sessionId, transaction, proposal, similarTransactions = [] }) {
    const prompt = `Create a bookkeeping rule from this approved-style proposal for ${transaction?.description || 'a transaction'}.`;
    return this.draftRuleFromPrompt({
      organizationId,
      userId,
      sessionId,
      prompt,
      existingRule: null,
      selectedTransactions: [
        {
          ...transaction,
          proposal,
        },
        ...similarTransactions,
      ],
    });
  }

  async getHistoricalCategorizationMatches({ organizationId, transaction }) {
    try {
      const receiptMerchant = normalizeText(
        transaction?.receiptHints?.normalizedVendor ||
        transaction?.receipt?.companyName ||
        ''
      );
      const descriptionPattern = extractDescriptionPattern(transaction?.description);
      const sourceType = String(transaction?.source?.type || '').toUpperCase();
      const amountSign = Math.sign(Number(transaction?.amount || 0));

      const candidates = await prisma.bankTransaction.findMany({
        where: {
          organizationId,
          categoryId: { not: null },
          ...(transaction?.id ? { id: { not: Number(transaction.id) } } : {}),
        },
        include: {
          category: { select: { id: true, code: true, description: true, statementLine: true } },
          receipt: { select: { id: true, companyName: true, total: true, hst: true, date: true } },
          source: { select: { id: true, name: true, type: true } },
        },
        orderBy: { date: 'desc' },
        take: 250,
      });

      const scored = candidates
        .map((candidate) => {
          const candidateVendor = normalizeText(candidate?.receipt?.companyName || candidate?.description || '');
          const vendorScore = receiptMerchant ? jaccardSimilarity(receiptMerchant, candidateVendor) : 0;
          const descriptionScore = jaccardSimilarity(descriptionPattern, extractDescriptionPattern(candidate?.description));
          const sourceScore = sourceType && String(candidate?.source?.type || '').toUpperCase() === sourceType ? 1 : 0;
          const signScore = Math.sign(Number(candidate?.amount || 0)) === amountSign ? 1 : 0;
          const amountAbs = Math.abs(Number(transaction?.amount || 0));
          const candidateAbs = Math.abs(Number(candidate?.amount || 0));
          const denominator = Math.max(amountAbs, 1);
          const amountScore = Math.max(0, 1 - Math.abs(amountAbs - candidateAbs) / denominator);
          const totalScore = Number((vendorScore * 0.35 + descriptionScore * 0.35 + sourceScore * 0.15 + signScore * 0.05 + amountScore * 0.10).toFixed(4));

          return {
            id: candidate.id,
            score: totalScore,
            description: candidate.description,
            amount: candidate.amount,
            date: candidate.date,
            category: candidate.category,
            source: candidate.source,
            receipt: candidate.receipt,
            taxTreatment: inferTaxTreatmentFromTransaction(candidate),
            transactionType: this.classifyTransactionTypeHeuristically(candidate),
          };
        })
        .filter((item) => item.score >= 0.3)
        .sort((a, b) => b.score - a.score)
        .slice(0, 12);

      return scored;
    } catch (error) {
      console.warn('Failed to fetch historical categorizations:', error.message);
      return [];
    }
  }

  async getProposalMemories({ organizationId, transaction }) {
    try {
      const vendorNormalized = normalizeText(transaction?.receiptHints?.normalizedVendor || transaction?.receipt?.companyName);
      const descriptionPattern = extractDescriptionPattern(transaction?.description);
      const sourceType = String(transaction?.source?.type || '').toUpperCase();

      const historicalMatches = await this.getHistoricalCategorizationMatches({ organizationId, transaction });
      const historicalMemories = historicalMatches.map((item) => ({
        vendorNormalized: normalizeText(item?.receipt?.companyName || item?.description),
        sourceType: String(item?.source?.type || '').toUpperCase() || null,
        descriptionPattern: extractDescriptionPattern(item?.description),
        accountCode: item?.category?.code || null,
        transactionType: item?.transactionType || null,
        taxTreatment: item?.taxTreatment || null,
        usageCount: Math.max(1, Math.round(item.score * 10)),
        supportScore: item.score,
        memorySource: 'HISTORICAL_CATEGORIZATION',
        exampleTransaction: {
          id: item.id,
          description: item.description,
          amount: item.amount,
          date: item.date,
          accountCode: item?.category?.code || null,
          accountDescription: item?.category?.description || null,
        },
      }));

      if (!prisma.accountingSuggestionMemory || typeof prisma.accountingSuggestionMemory.findMany !== 'function') {
        return historicalMemories;
      }

      const explicitMemories = await prisma.accountingSuggestionMemory.findMany({
        where: {
          organizationId,
          OR: [
            ...(vendorNormalized ? [{ vendorNormalized }] : []),
            ...(descriptionPattern ? [{ descriptionPattern }] : []),
            ...(sourceType ? [{ sourceType }] : []),
          ],
        },
        orderBy: [
          { usageCount: 'desc' },
          { updatedAt: 'desc' },
        ],
        take: 5,
      }).catch(() => []);

      return [...explicitMemories, ...historicalMemories];
    } catch (error) {
      console.warn('Failed to fetch accounting proposal memories:', error.message);
      return [];
    }
  }

  summarizeLearnedSignals(memories = []) {
    const accountVotes = new Map();
    const transactionTypeVotes = new Map();
    const taxTreatmentVotes = new Map();
    const supportingExamples = [];

    for (const memory of memories) {
      const weight = Number(memory?.supportScore || memory?.usageCount || 1);
      if (memory?.accountCode) {
        accountVotes.set(memory.accountCode, (accountVotes.get(memory.accountCode) || 0) + weight);
      }
      if (memory?.transactionType) {
        transactionTypeVotes.set(memory.transactionType, (transactionTypeVotes.get(memory.transactionType) || 0) + weight);
      }
      if (memory?.taxTreatment) {
        taxTreatmentVotes.set(memory.taxTreatment, (taxTreatmentVotes.get(memory.taxTreatment) || 0) + weight);
      }
      if (memory?.exampleTransaction) {
        supportingExamples.push({
          ...memory.exampleTransaction,
          supportScore: Number(weight.toFixed(4)),
        });
      }
    }

    const sortEntries = (map) => Array.from(map.entries()).sort((a, b) => b[1] - a[1]);

    return {
      accountVotes: sortEntries(accountVotes),
      transactionTypeVotes: sortEntries(transactionTypeVotes),
      taxTreatmentVotes: sortEntries(taxTreatmentVotes),
      supportingExamples: supportingExamples.slice(0, 5),
    };
  }

  
buildFallbackProposal({ transaction, categories = [], memories = [] }) {
    const learned = this.summarizeLearnedSignals(memories);
    const topAccountCode = learned.accountVotes[0]?.[0] || null;
    const topTransactionType = learned.transactionTypeVotes[0]?.[0] || null;
    const topTaxTreatment = learned.taxTreatmentVotes[0]?.[0] || null;

    const likelyAccountFromMemory = topAccountCode
      ? categories.find((category) => category.code === topAccountCode) || null
      : null;

    const suggestedCodeFromHints = transaction?.receiptHints?.suggestedExpenseAccount?.code || transaction?.receiptHints?.suggestedExpenseAccount || null;
    const likelyAccountFromHints = suggestedCodeFromHints
      ? categories.find((category) => category.code === suggestedCodeFromHints) || null
      : null;

    const likelyAccount =
      likelyAccountFromMemory ||
      likelyAccountFromHints ||
      transaction?.category ||
      categories.find((category) => String(category.category || '').toUpperCase().includes('EXPENSE')) ||
      null;

    const transactionType = topTransactionType || this.classifyTransactionTypeHeuristically(transaction);
    const taxTreatment = (VALID_TAX_TREATMENTS.includes(String(topTaxTreatment || '').trim().toUpperCase())
      ? String(topTaxTreatment).trim().toUpperCase()
      : inferTaxTreatmentFromTransaction(transaction, transactionType));

    const confidence = clamp(
      (likelyAccountFromMemory ? 0.86 : likelyAccountFromHints ? 0.76 : transaction?.category ? 0.68 : 0.54) +
      (learned.supportingExamples.length ? 0.06 : 0) +
      (transaction?.receiptId ? 0.04 : 0)
    );

    const alternativeAccounts = learned.accountVotes
      .slice(0, 3)
      .map(([accountCode, voteWeight]) => {
        const category = categories.find((item) => item.code === accountCode) || null;
        return category
          ? {
              id: category.id,
              code: category.code,
              description: category.description,
              supportWeight: Number(Number(voteWeight).toFixed(4)),
              label: formatAccountLabel(category),
            }
          : null;
      })
      .filter(Boolean);

    const proposalTone = learned.supportingExamples.length
      ? `Suggested from ${learned.supportingExamples.length} similar categorized transaction${learned.supportingExamples.length === 1 ? '' : 's'}.`
      : 'Suggested from transaction description, amount direction, source type, and receipt support.';

    return {
      version: PROPOSAL_VERSION,
      proposalMode: 'SUGGESTION_FIRST',
      transactionId: transaction.id,
      likelyTransactionType: transactionType,
      likelyAccount: likelyAccount
        ? { id: likelyAccount.id, code: likelyAccount.code, description: likelyAccount.description, label: formatAccountLabel(likelyAccount) }
        : null,
      likelyTaxTreatment: taxTreatment,
      likelyJournalLines: this.buildJournalLinesHeuristically(transaction, likelyAccount, {
        transactionType,
        taxTreatment,
      }),
      confidence: Number(confidence.toFixed(4)),
      explanation: proposalTone,
      reviewRequired: true,
      reasonCodes: learned.supportingExamples.length
        ? ['LEARNED_FROM_PREVIOUS_CATEGORIZATION', 'HEURISTIC_CLASSIFICATION']
        : ['HEURISTIC_CLASSIFICATION'],
      learnedSignals: memories.map((item) => ({
        vendorNormalized: item.vendorNormalized,
        sourceType: item.sourceType,
        descriptionPattern: item.descriptionPattern,
        accountCode: item.accountCode,
        transactionType: item.transactionType,
        taxTreatment: item.taxTreatment,
        usageCount: item.usageCount,
        supportScore: item.supportScore || null,
        memorySource: item.memorySource || 'APPROVAL_MEMORY',
      })),
      learnedFromHistory: {
        matchedCount: learned.supportingExamples.length,
        supportingExamples: learned.supportingExamples,
      },
      alternativeAccounts,
      shouldAutoPost: false,
    };
  }

  async generateTransactionProposal({ transaction, organizationId, userId, sessionId }) {
    const categories = await prisma.accountingCategory.findMany({
      select: { id: true, code: true, description: true, category: true, statementLine: true, normalSide: true, isPLAccount: true },
      orderBy: [{ sortOrder: 'asc' }, { code: 'asc' }],
    });

    const memories = await this.getProposalMemories({ organizationId, transaction });
    const fallback = this.buildFallbackProposal({ transaction, categories, memories });

    try {
      const accountingSchema = await fs.readFile("./prisma/schemas/accounting.prisma", "utf-8");
      const promptTemplate = await SettingsService.getPrompt(organizationId, 'accounting_review_queue_system').catch(() => null);

      const systemPromptTemplate = promptTemplate && promptTemplate.trim().length
        ? promptTemplate
        : `You create safe bookkeeping proposals for a human review queue.
Return strict JSON only.
Never emit SQL.
Prefer conservative confidence scores.
If something looks like a transfer, owner item, or card payment, classify it explicitly instead of forcing it into expense accounts.
Schema:
{accountingSchema}`;
      const systemPrompt = systemPromptTemplate.replace('{accountingSchema}', accountingSchema);

      const userPrompt = JSON.stringify({
        task: 'Create a structured bookkeeping proposal for a review queue item.',
        allowedTransactionTypes: [
          'BANK_EXPENSE',
          'BANK_REVENUE',
          'TRANSFER',
          'CREDIT_CARD_PAYMENT',
          'PAYROLL_PAYMENT',
          'TAX_REMITTANCE',
          'OWNER_DRAW',
          'OWNER_CONTRIBUTION'
        ],
        transaction,
        categories,
        learnedMemories: memories,
        desiredShape: {
          version: PROPOSAL_VERSION,
          likelyTransactionType: 'string',
          likelyAccountCode: 'string|null',
          likelyTaxTreatment: 'string',
          likelyJournalLines: [{ accountCode: 'string', accountDescription: 'string', label: 'string', debit: 0, credit: 0 }],
          confidence: 0.0,
          explanation: 'string',
          reasonCodes: ['string'],
          alternativeAccounts: [{ code: 'string', description: 'string', supportWeight: 0 }],
          learnedFromHistory: { matchedCount: 0, supportingExamples: [] },
          shouldAutoPost: false
        }
      }, null, 2);

      const response = await this.llmClient.generateResponse(
        userPrompt,
        userId,
        sessionId,
        'TEXT_CHAT',
        null,
        null,
        '',
        systemPrompt,
        { includeConversationHistory: false, storeConversation: false, context: 'ACCOUNTING', usageKey: 'ACCOUNTING_REVIEW_QUEUE' }
      );

      const parsed = safeJsonParse(response);
      if (!parsed || typeof parsed !== 'object') {
        return fallback;
      }

      const likelyAccount = parsed.likelyAccountCode
        ? categories.find((category) => category.code === parsed.likelyAccountCode) || fallback.likelyAccount
        : fallback.likelyAccount;

      return {
        version: PROPOSAL_VERSION,
        transactionId: transaction.id,
        likelyTransactionType: parsed.likelyTransactionType || fallback.likelyTransactionType,
        likelyAccount: decorateAccount(likelyAccount
          ? { id: likelyAccount.id, code: likelyAccount.code, description: likelyAccount.description }
          : null),
        likelyTaxTreatment: parsed.likelyTaxTreatment || fallback.likelyTaxTreatment,
        likelyJournalLines: Array.isArray(parsed.likelyJournalLines) && parsed.likelyJournalLines.length
          ? parsed.likelyJournalLines.map((line) => {
              const accountCode = String(line?.accountCode || '').trim();
              const accountDescription = String(
                line?.accountDescription ||
                line?.description ||
                (accountCode === likelyAccount?.code ? likelyAccount?.description : '') ||
                SYSTEM_ACCOUNT_LOOKUP[accountCode]?.description ||
                ''
              ).trim();
              return {
                accountCode,
                accountDescription,
                label: String(line?.label || formatAccountLabel({ code: accountCode, description: accountDescription }) || '').trim() || null,
                debit: Number(line?.debit || 0),
                credit: Number(line?.credit || 0),
              };
            })
          : fallback.likelyJournalLines,
        confidence: Number(clamp(parsed.confidence ?? fallback.confidence).toFixed(4)),
        explanation: parsed.explanation || fallback.explanation,
        reviewRequired: true,
        reasonCodes: Array.isArray(parsed.reasonCodes) && parsed.reasonCodes.length
          ? parsed.reasonCodes
          : fallback.reasonCodes,
        learnedSignals: fallback.learnedSignals,
        alternativeAccounts: Array.isArray(parsed.alternativeAccounts) && parsed.alternativeAccounts.length
          ? parsed.alternativeAccounts.map((item) => {
              const matched = categories.find((category) => category.code === item.code) || null;
              return {
                id: matched?.id || null,
                code: item.code,
                description: item.description || matched?.description || '',
                supportWeight: Number(clamp(item.supportWeight ?? 0, 0, 999).toFixed(4)),
                label: formatAccountLabel({ code: item.code, description: item.description || matched?.description || '' }),
              };
            })
          : fallback.alternativeAccounts,
        learnedFromHistory: parsed.learnedFromHistory && typeof parsed.learnedFromHistory === 'object'
          ? {
              matchedCount: Number(parsed.learnedFromHistory.matchedCount || fallback.learnedFromHistory?.matchedCount || 0),
              supportingExamples: Array.isArray(parsed.learnedFromHistory.supportingExamples) && parsed.learnedFromHistory.supportingExamples.length
                ? parsed.learnedFromHistory.supportingExamples
                : fallback.learnedFromHistory?.supportingExamples || [],
            }
          : fallback.learnedFromHistory,
        proposalMode: 'SUGGESTION_FIRST',
        shouldAutoPost: false,
      };
    } catch (error) {
      console.warn('Failed to generate AI bookkeeping proposal, falling back:', error.message);
      return fallback;
    }
  }


  async suggestChartOfAccountsEntry({ organizationId, userId, sessionId, view = 'categories', request = '' }) {
    const normalizedView = String(view || 'categories').toLowerCase() === 'accounts' ? 'accounts' : 'categories';
    const existingItems = await prisma.accountingCategory.findMany({
      select: {
        id: true,
        code: true,
        description: true,
        category: true,
        normalSide: true,
        statementLine: true,
        sortOrder: true,
        isPLAccount: true,
      },
      orderBy: [{ sortOrder: 'asc' }, { code: 'asc' }],
    });

    const fallback = buildFallbackChartSuggestion({ request, view: normalizedView, existingItems });
    const similarExisting = buildSimilarExistingItems(existingItems, request);

    if (!userId) {
      return {
        view: normalizedView,
        request,
        source: 'fallback',
        confidence: fallback.confidence,
        suggestedRecord: fallback.suggestedRecord,
        beginnerReason: fallback.beginnerReason,
        whenToUse: fallback.whenToUse,
        whenNotToUse: fallback.whenNotToUse,
        bookkeepingTips: fallback.bookkeepingTips,
        similarExisting,
        starterAlternatives: fallback.starterAlternatives,
      };
    }

    try {
      const user = await prisma.user.findUnique({ where: { id: userId } });
      if (!user) throw new Error('User not found for chart suggestion.');

      const systemPrompt = `You help a beginner small-business owner create bookkeeping accounts and categories.
Return strict JSON only.
Suggest one safe, conservative record for the chart of accounts.
Do not suggest personal accounts as business expenses.
Prefer plain-English descriptions.
If the request sounds like tax, owner money, transfers, bank, or credit cards, use balance-sheet style accounts instead of expense categories when appropriate.`;

      const userPrompt = JSON.stringify({
        task: 'Suggest one chart-of-accounts record for a beginner bookkeeper.',
        organizationId,
        view: normalizedView,
        request,
        fallback,
        existingItems: existingItems.slice(0, 80),
        desiredShape: {
          suggestedRecord: {
            code: 'string',
            description: 'string',
            category: 'string',
            normalSide: 'DEBIT|CREDIT',
            statementLine: 'string|null',
            sortOrder: 0,
            isPLAccount: true,
          },
          beginnerReason: 'string',
          whenToUse: 'string',
          whenNotToUse: 'string',
          bookkeepingTips: ['string'],
          confidence: 0.0,
        },
      }, null, 2).replace(/True/g, 'true');

      const response = await this.llmClient.generateResponse(
        userPrompt,
        userId,
        sessionId,
        'TEXT_CHAT',
        'deepseek/deepseek-v4-flash',
        null,
        '',
        systemPrompt,
        { includeConversationHistory: false, storeConversation: false }
      );

      const parsed = safeJsonParse(response);
      if (!parsed || typeof parsed !== 'object') throw new Error('Invalid AI response for chart suggestion.');

      return {
        view: normalizedView,
        request,
        source: 'ai',
        confidence: Number(clamp(parsed.confidence ?? fallback.confidence).toFixed(4)),
        suggestedRecord: sanitizeChartRecord(parsed.suggestedRecord, fallback.suggestedRecord, existingItems),
        beginnerReason: parsed.beginnerReason || fallback.beginnerReason,
        whenToUse: parsed.whenToUse || fallback.whenToUse,
        whenNotToUse: parsed.whenNotToUse || fallback.whenNotToUse,
        bookkeepingTips: Array.isArray(parsed.bookkeepingTips) && parsed.bookkeepingTips.length
          ? parsed.bookkeepingTips.map((item) => String(item).trim()).filter(Boolean).slice(0, 5)
          : fallback.bookkeepingTips,
        similarExisting,
        starterAlternatives: fallback.starterAlternatives,
      };
    } catch (error) {
      console.warn('Failed to generate AI chart suggestion, falling back:', error.message);
      return {
        view: normalizedView,
        request,
        source: 'fallback',
        confidence: fallback.confidence,
        suggestedRecord: fallback.suggestedRecord,
        beginnerReason: fallback.beginnerReason,
        whenToUse: fallback.whenToUse,
        whenNotToUse: fallback.whenNotToUse,
        bookkeepingTips: fallback.bookkeepingTips,
        similarExisting,
        starterAlternatives: fallback.starterAlternatives,
      };
    }
  }

  async suggestChartOfAccountsEntries({ organizationId, userId, sessionId, view = 'categories', request = '', count = 6 }) {
    const normalizedView = String(view || 'categories').toLowerCase() === 'accounts' ? 'accounts' : 'categories';
    const requestedCount = Math.max(1, Math.min(Number(count) || 6, 12));
    const existingItems = await prisma.accountingCategory.findMany({
      select: {
        id: true,
        code: true,
        description: true,
        category: true,
        normalSide: true,
        statementLine: true,
        sortOrder: true,
        isPLAccount: true,
      },
      orderBy: [{ sortOrder: 'asc' }, { code: 'asc' }],
    });

    const similarExisting = buildSimilarExistingItems(existingItems, request);
    const fallback = buildFallbackChartSuggestion({ request, view: normalizedView, existingItems });
    const existingCodes = new Set(existingItems.map((item) => String(item.code || '').trim().toUpperCase()).filter(Boolean));

    const sanitizeRecords = (records = []) => {
      const usedCodes = new Set(existingCodes);
      return records
        .filter((record) => record && typeof record === 'object')
        .map((record) => {
          const sanitized = sanitizeChartRecord(record, fallback.suggestedRecord, []);
          sanitized.code = resolveUniqueCode(sanitized.code, usedCodes);
          usedCodes.add(String(sanitized.code || '').trim().toUpperCase());
          return sanitized;
        })
        .filter((record) => record.code && record.description && record.category)
        .slice(0, requestedCount);
    };

    const fallbackRecords = sanitizeRecords([
      fallback.suggestedRecord,
      ...(fallback.starterAlternatives || []).map((item) => item.record),
    ]);

    if (!userId) {
      return {
        view: normalizedView,
        request,
        source: 'fallback',
        confidence: fallback.confidence,
        suggestedRecords: fallbackRecords,
        reasoning: fallback.beginnerReason,
        similarExisting,
      };
    }

    try {
      const user = await prisma.user.findUnique({ where: { id: userId } });
      if (!user) throw new Error('User not found for chart suggestions.');

      const systemPrompt = `You help a beginner small-business owner improve their chart of accounts.
Return strict JSON only.
Suggest multiple safe, conservative chart-of-accounts records.
Do not duplicate existing accounts or codes.
Prefer the existing numbering style and plain-English descriptions.
For P&L categories, use category values like REVENUE, EXPENSES, or COST OF GOODS SOLD and set isPLAccount true.
For balance-sheet accounts, use category values like ASSETS, LIABILITIES, or EQUITY and set isPLAccount false.
Do not suggest personal accounts as business expenses.`;

      const userPrompt = JSON.stringify({
        task: 'Suggest chart-of-accounts records for review before saving.',
        organizationId,
        view: normalizedView,
        request,
        requestedCount,
        existingItems: existingItems.slice(0, 200),
        similarExisting,
        fallbackExamples: fallbackRecords,
        desiredShape: {
          suggestedRecords: [{
            code: 'string',
            description: 'string',
            category: 'string',
            normalSide: 'DEBIT|CREDIT',
            statementLine: 'string|null',
            sortOrder: 0,
            isPLAccount: true,
            reason: 'string',
          }],
          reasoning: 'string',
          confidence: 0.0,
        },
      }, null, 2);

      const response = await this.llmClient.generateResponse(
        userPrompt,
        userId,
        sessionId,
        'TEXT_CHAT',
        'deepseek/deepseek-v4-flash',
        null,
        '',
        systemPrompt,
        { includeConversationHistory: false, storeConversation: false }
      );

      const parsed = safeJsonParse(response);
      if (!parsed || typeof parsed !== 'object') throw new Error('Invalid AI response for chart suggestions.');

      const suggestedRecords = sanitizeRecords(parsed.suggestedRecords);
      if (!suggestedRecords.length) throw new Error('AI returned no usable chart suggestions.');

      return {
        view: normalizedView,
        request,
        source: 'ai',
        confidence: Number(clamp(parsed.confidence ?? fallback.confidence).toFixed(4)),
        suggestedRecords,
        reasoning: parsed.reasoning || fallback.beginnerReason,
        similarExisting,
      };
    } catch (error) {
      console.warn('Failed to generate AI chart suggestions, falling back:', error.message);
      return {
        view: normalizedView,
        request,
        source: 'fallback',
        confidence: fallback.confidence,
        suggestedRecords: fallbackRecords,
        reasoning: fallback.beginnerReason,
        similarExisting,
      };
    }
  }

  async learnFromApproval({ organizationId, transaction, chosenAccount, chosenTransactionType, chosenTaxTreatment, userId }) {
    try {
      if (!prisma.accountingSuggestionMemory || typeof prisma.accountingSuggestionMemory.findFirst !== 'function') {
        return null;
      }

      const vendorNormalized = normalizeText(transaction?.receiptHints?.normalizedVendor || transaction?.receipt?.companyName || transaction?.description);
      const descriptionPattern = extractDescriptionPattern(transaction?.description);
      const sourceType = String(transaction?.source?.type || '').toUpperCase() || null;
      const receiptMerchant = normalizeText(transaction?.receipt?.companyName || transaction?.receiptHints?.normalizedVendor);

      const existing = await prisma.accountingSuggestionMemory.findFirst({
        where: {
          organizationId,
          vendorNormalized: vendorNormalized || null,
          sourceType,
          descriptionPattern: descriptionPattern || null,
          receiptMerchant: receiptMerchant || null,
          accountCode: chosenAccount?.code || null,
          taxTreatment: chosenTaxTreatment || null,
          transactionType: chosenTransactionType || null,
        },
      });

      if (existing) {
        return prisma.accountingSuggestionMemory.update({
          where: { id: existing.id },
          data: {
            usageCount: { increment: 1 },
            createdBy: userId,
          },
        });
      }

      return prisma.accountingSuggestionMemory.create({
        data: {
          organizationId,
          vendorNormalized: vendorNormalized || null,
          sourceType,
          descriptionPattern: descriptionPattern || null,
          receiptMerchant: receiptMerchant || null,
          accountCode: chosenAccount?.code || null,
          taxTreatment: chosenTaxTreatment || null,
          transactionType: chosenTransactionType || null,
          createdBy: userId,
          usageCount: 1,
        },
      });
    } catch (error) {
      console.warn('Failed to store accounting suggestion memory:', error.message);
      return null;
    }
  }
}

function sourceTypeToAccountCode(sourceType) {
  const normalized = String(sourceType || '').toUpperCase();
  if (normalized === 'CREDIT_CARD') return '2690';
  return '1001';
}

export default new AccountingLLMService();

```

FILE: server/src/services/accounting/services/AccountingReceiptAiService.js

```js
// Full path: /home/luanngo/boss-dev/server/src/services/accounting/services/AccountingReceiptAiService.js
import prisma from '#shared/database/prismaClient.js';
import { llmClient } from '#integrations/ai/llm.js';

const RECEIPT_HINTS_NOTE_KEY = 'accountingReceiptHints';

const normalizeText = (value) =>
  String(value || '')
    .toLowerCase()
    .replace(/[^a-z0-9\s&]/g, ' ')
    .replace(/\s+/g, ' ')
    .trim();

const clamp = (value, min = 0, max = 1) => Math.max(min, Math.min(max, Number(value) || 0));

const roundMoney = (value) => {
  const number = Number(value);
  if (!Number.isFinite(number)) return null;
  return Math.abs(Number(number.toFixed(2)));
};

const extractFirstAmount = (text, labelPatterns = []) => {
  const lines = String(text || '').split(/\r?\n/);
  for (const rawLine of lines) {
    const line = rawLine.trim();
    if (!line) continue;
    const normalizedLine = normalizeText(line);
    if (!labelPatterns.some((pattern) => normalizedLine.includes(pattern))) continue;
    const match = line.match(/(-?\$?\d[\d,]*\.?\d{0,2})/g);
    if (!match?.length) continue;
    const numeric = Number(match[match.length - 1].replace(/[$,\s]/g, ''));
    if (Number.isFinite(numeric)) return roundMoney(numeric);
  }
  return null;
};

const extractLikelyVendor = ({ receipt, receiptText, transactionDescription }) => {
  const fromReceipt = String(receipt?.companyName || '').trim();
  if (fromReceipt) return fromReceipt;

  const lines = String(receiptText || '').split(/\r?\n/).map((line) => line.trim()).filter(Boolean);
  const candidate = lines.find((line) => {
    const normalized = normalizeText(line);
    return normalized.length >= 3 && !/\d{2,}/.test(normalized) && normalized !== 'receipt';
  });
  if (candidate) return candidate;

  return String(transactionDescription || '').trim();
};

const buildNotePayload = (existingNotes, payload) => {
  const raw = String(existingNotes || '').trim();
  const block = `[[${RECEIPT_HINTS_NOTE_KEY}]]${JSON.stringify(payload)}[[/${RECEIPT_HINTS_NOTE_KEY}]]`;

  if (!raw) return block;

  const pattern = new RegExp(`\\[\\[${RECEIPT_HINTS_NOTE_KEY}\\]\\][\\s\\S]*?\\[\\[\\/${RECEIPT_HINTS_NOTE_KEY}\\]\\]`, 'i');
  if (pattern.test(raw)) {
    return raw.replace(pattern, block);
  }

  return `${raw}\n\n${block}`;
};

const parseNotePayload = (notes) => {
  const match = String(notes || '').match(new RegExp(`\\[\\[${RECEIPT_HINTS_NOTE_KEY}\\]\\]([\\s\\S]*?)\\[\\[\\/${RECEIPT_HINTS_NOTE_KEY}\\]\\]`, 'i'));
  if (!match?.[1]) return null;
  try {
    return JSON.parse(match[1]);
  } catch {
    return null;
  }
};

const FALLBACK_KEYWORDS = [
  { match: ['uber', 'lyft', 'taxi', 'parking', 'metro', 'ttc'], statementLine: 'Travel', topCategory: 'EXPENSES' },
  { match: ['costco', 'freshco', 'loblaws', 'no frills', 'grocery', 'produce', 'wholesale'], statementLine: 'Food and beverage purchases', topCategory: 'COST_OF_GOODS_SOLD' },
  { match: ['home depot', 'canadian tire', 'ikea', 'repair', 'maintenance', 'cleaning supplies'], statementLine: 'Repairs and maintenance', topCategory: 'EXPENSES' },
  { match: ['bell', 'rogers', 'telus', 'internet', 'phone'], statementLine: 'Telephone and internet', topCategory: 'EXPENSES' },
  { match: ['amazon', 'staples', 'office depot', 'printer'], statementLine: 'Office supplies', topCategory: 'EXPENSES' },
  { match: ['facebook', 'instagram', 'google ads', 'meta ads', 'advertis'], statementLine: 'Advertising and promotion', topCategory: 'EXPENSES' },
  { match: ['square', 'stripe', 'merchant fee', 'processing fee', 'bank fee'], statementLine: 'Bank charges', topCategory: 'EXPENSES' },
  { match: ['alcohol', 'wine', 'beer', 'spirits', 'liquor'], statementLine: 'Beverage purchases', topCategory: 'COST_OF_GOODS_SOLD' },
];

const normalizeCategoryForHints = (category) => {
  if (!category) return null;
  return {
    ...category,
    topCategory: category.topCategory || category.statementGroup || category.category || null,
  };
};

class AccountingReceiptAiService {
  async getCategories() {
    const categories = await prisma.accountingCategory.findMany({
      select: {
        id: true,
        code: true,
        description: true,
        category: true,
        statementGroup: true,
        statementLine: true,
      },
      orderBy: [{ category: 'asc' }, { code: 'asc' }],
    });

    return categories.map(normalizeCategoryForHints);
  }

  async getVendorHistory({ organizationId, vendorNormalized }) {
    if (!vendorNormalized) return [];

    return prisma.bankTransaction.findMany({
      where: {
        organizationId,
        OR: [
          { description: { contains: vendorNormalized.split(' ')[0] || vendorNormalized } },
          { notes: { contains: vendorNormalized } },
        ],
        categoryId: { not: null },
      },
      take: 8,
      orderBy: { date: 'desc' },
      include: {
        category: {
          select: {
            id: true,
            code: true,
            description: true,
            statementGroup: true,
            statementLine: true,
          },
        },
        receipt: {
          select: { companyName: true },
        },
      },
    });
  }

  inferTaxFromReceiptText({ receiptText, total, subtotal, explicitTax }) {
    const parsedExplicit = roundMoney(explicitTax);
    if (parsedExplicit && parsedExplicit > 0) {
      return {
        taxAmount: parsedExplicit,
        taxConfidence: 0.98,
        taxSource: 'explicit_field',
      };
    }

    const parsedTaxLine = extractFirstAmount(receiptText, ['hst', 'gst', 'pst', 'qst', 'tax', 'taxes']);
    if (parsedTaxLine && parsedTaxLine > 0) {
      return {
        taxAmount: parsedTaxLine,
        taxConfidence: 0.92,
        taxSource: 'receipt_line',
      };
    }

    const parsedSubtotal = roundMoney(subtotal) ?? extractFirstAmount(receiptText, ['subtotal', 'sub total']);
    const parsedTotal = roundMoney(total) ?? extractFirstAmount(receiptText, ['total', 'amount due', 'grand total']);

    if (parsedSubtotal && parsedTotal && parsedTotal >= parsedSubtotal) {
      const difference = roundMoney(parsedTotal - parsedSubtotal);
      if (difference && difference > 0 && difference <= parsedTotal) {
        return {
          taxAmount: difference,
          taxConfidence: 0.8,
          taxSource: 'difference_between_total_and_subtotal',
        };
      }
    }

    return {
      taxAmount: null,
      taxConfidence: 0.15,
      taxSource: 'not_found',
    };
  }

  scoreFallbackCategories({ transactionDescription, vendorName, receiptText, categories }) {
    const haystack = normalizeText([transactionDescription, vendorName, receiptText].filter(Boolean).join(' '));

    return FALLBACK_KEYWORDS.flatMap((keywordRule) => {
      const hitCount = keywordRule.match.filter((term) => haystack.includes(term)).length;
      if (!hitCount) return [];

      return categories
        .filter((category) => {
          const statementLine = normalizeText(category.statementLine || category.description);
          const topCategory = normalizeText(category.topCategory || category.category);
          return (
            statementLine.includes(normalizeText(keywordRule.statementLine)) ||
            topCategory === normalizeText(keywordRule.topCategory)
          );
        })
        .slice(0, 3)
        .map((category) => ({
          category,
          score: clamp(0.45 + hitCount * 0.15, 0, 0.88),
          source: 'keyword_heuristic',
          reason: `Matched ${hitCount} keyword${hitCount > 1 ? 's' : ''} for ${keywordRule.statementLine}.`,
        }));
    });
  }

  async suggestCategory({ organizationId, transactionDescription, vendorName, receiptText }) {
    const categories = await this.getCategories();
    const vendorNormalized = normalizeText(vendorName || transactionDescription);
    const vendorHistory = await this.getVendorHistory({ organizationId, vendorNormalized });

    const historyVotes = vendorHistory
      .filter((item) => item.category)
      .reduce((acc, item) => {
        const key = item.category.id;
        acc[key] ||= {
          category: normalizeCategoryForHints(item.category),
          score: 0,
          supportingExamples: [],
        };
        acc[key].score += 0.2;
        acc[key].supportingExamples.push({
          description: item.description,
          receiptMerchant: item.receipt?.companyName || null,
          date: item.date,
        });
        return acc;
      }, {});

    const heuristicSuggestions = this.scoreFallbackCategories({
      transactionDescription,
      vendorName,
      receiptText,
      categories,
    });

    const merged = [
      ...Object.values(historyVotes).map((entry) => ({
        category: entry.category,
        score: clamp(entry.score, 0, 0.9),
        source: 'vendor_history',
        reason: `Matched ${entry.supportingExamples.length} prior categorized transaction(s).`,
        supportingExamples: entry.supportingExamples,
      })),
      ...heuristicSuggestions,
    ];

    const bestLocal = merged.sort((a, b) => b.score - a.score)[0] || null;
    const localContext = merged.slice(0, 5).map((item) => ({
      code: item.category.code,
      description: item.category.description,
      topCategory: item.category.topCategory,
      statementLine: item.category.statementLine,
      score: item.score,
      source: item.source,
      reason: item.reason,
    }));

    try {
      const prompt = [
        'You are helping classify bookkeeping transactions.',
        'Return JSON only.',
        JSON.stringify({
          transactionDescription,
          vendorName,
          receiptText: String(receiptText || '').slice(0, 4000),
          categories: categories.slice(0, 250),
          localContext,
        }),
      ].join('\n\n');

      const responseSchema = {
          type: 'object',
          properties: {
            suggestedCategoryCode: { type: 'string' },
            confidence: { type: 'number' },
            reasoning: { type: 'string' },
          },
          required: ['suggestedCategoryCode', 'confidence', 'reasoning'],
        };

      const response = await llmClient.generateResponse(
        prompt,
        null,
        null,
        'STRUCTURED_OUTPUT',
        null,
        responseSchema,
        'AccountingReceiptCategorySuggestion',
        '',
        { storeConversation: false, jsonMode: true }
      );

      const parsed = typeof response === 'string' ? JSON.parse(response) : response;
      const llmCategory = categories.find((category) => category.code === parsed?.suggestedCategoryCode);
      if (llmCategory) {
        return {
          category: llmCategory,
          confidence: clamp(parsed.confidence, 0, 0.97),
          source: 'llm',
          reasoning: parsed.reasoning || 'AI suggestion.',
          localContext,
        };
      }
    } catch (error) {
      console.warn('Receipt AI category suggestion fell back to local logic:', error?.message || error);
    }

    if (!bestLocal) {
      return {
        category: null,
        confidence: 0,
        source: 'none',
        reasoning: 'No strong category signal found.',
        localContext,
      };
    }

    return {
      category: bestLocal.category,
      confidence: bestLocal.score,
      source: bestLocal.source,
      reasoning: bestLocal.reason,
      supportingExamples: bestLocal.supportingExamples || [],
      localContext,
    };
  }

  async buildReceiptImportHints({
    organizationId,
    transaction,
    receipt = null,
  }) {
    const receiptText = String(
      transaction?.receiptText ||
      receipt?.text ||
      receipt?.ocrText ||
      receipt?.rawText ||
      ''
    );

    const vendorName = extractLikelyVendor({
      receipt,
      receiptText,
      transactionDescription: transaction?.description,
    });

    const taxInfo = this.inferTaxFromReceiptText({
      receiptText,
      total: transaction?.receiptTotal ?? receipt?.total ?? null,
      subtotal: transaction?.receiptSubtotal ?? receipt?.subtotal ?? null,
      explicitTax: transaction?.taxes ?? receipt?.hst ?? receipt?.taxes ?? null,
    });

    const categorySuggestion = await this.suggestCategory({
      organizationId,
      transactionDescription: transaction?.description,
      vendorName,
      receiptText,
    });

    const needsReview =
      !categorySuggestion.category ||
      categorySuggestion.confidence < 0.72 ||
      (taxInfo.taxAmount == null && taxInfo.taxConfidence < 0.5);

    return {
      normalizedVendor: normalizeText(vendorName),
      vendorName,
      extractedTax: taxInfo.taxAmount,
      taxConfidence: taxInfo.taxConfidence,
      taxSource: taxInfo.taxSource,
      suggestedExpenseAccount: categorySuggestion.category
        ? {
            id: categorySuggestion.category.id,
            code: categorySuggestion.category.code,
            description: categorySuggestion.category.description,
            topCategory: categorySuggestion.category.topCategory,
            statementLine: categorySuggestion.category.statementLine,
          }
        : null,
      categoryConfidence: categorySuggestion.confidence,
      categorySource: categorySuggestion.source,
      categoryReasoning: categorySuggestion.reasoning,
      supportingExamples: categorySuggestion.supportingExamples || [],
      aiSignals: categorySuggestion.localContext || [],
      receiptEvidencePreview: receiptText.slice(0, 500),
      needsReview,
      reviewReasons: [
        !categorySuggestion.category ? 'No category suggested.' : null,
        categorySuggestion.category && categorySuggestion.confidence < 0.72 ? 'Low category confidence.' : null,
        taxInfo.taxAmount == null ? 'Tax not confidently identified.' : null,
      ].filter(Boolean),
    };
  }

  async enrichImportedTransaction({ organizationId, transaction, receipt = null }) {
    const hints = await this.buildReceiptImportHints({
      organizationId,
      transaction,
      receipt,
    });

    return {
      ...transaction,
      taxes: transaction?.taxes ?? hints.extractedTax ?? null,
      categoryId: transaction?.categoryId || hints?.suggestedExpenseAccount?.id || null,
      aiSuggestedCategoryId: hints?.suggestedExpenseAccount?.id || null,
      aiSuggestedCategoryCode: hints?.suggestedExpenseAccount?.code || null,
      aiSuggestedCategoryDescription: hints?.suggestedExpenseAccount?.description || null,
      aiCategoryConfidence: hints.categoryConfidence,
      aiNeedsReview: hints.needsReview,
      notes: buildNotePayload(transaction?.notes, hints),
    };
  }

  parseReceiptHintsFromNotes(notes) {
    return parseNotePayload(notes);
  }
}

export default new AccountingReceiptAiService();

```

```js
// Full path: /home/luanngo/boss-dev/server/src/services/accounting/services/AccountingService.js
// server/src/services/accounting/services/AccountingService.js

import prisma from "#shared/database/prismaClient.js";
import { parse } from "csv-parse/sync";
import { v4 as uuidv4 } from "uuid";
import moment from 'moment-timezone';
import AccountingLLMService from '#services/accounting/services/AccountingLLMService.js';

const SOURCE_ACCOUNT_MAP = {
  CHEQUING_ACCOUNT: '1001',
  CREDIT_CARD: '2690',
};

const PROFIT_LOSS_GROUP_META = {
  REVENUE: { label: 'Revenue', sectionType: 'revenue', order: 10 },
  COST_OF_GOODS_SOLD: { label: 'Cost of Goods Sold', sectionType: 'expense', order: 20 },
  EXPENSES: { label: 'Expenses', sectionType: 'expense', order: 30 },
  OTHER_INCOME: { label: 'Other Income', sectionType: 'revenue', order: 40 },
  OTHER_EXPENSES: { label: 'Other Expenses', sectionType: 'expense', order: 50 },
  UNMAPPED: { label: 'Unmapped Accounts', sectionType: 'expense', order: 999 },
};

const PROFIT_LOSS_CATEGORY_FALLBACKS = ['REVENUE', 'EXPENSE', 'EXPENSES', 'COST OF GOODS SOLD', 'COGS'];
const TAX_PAYABLE_ACCOUNT_CODE = '2640';
const TAX_RECOVERABLE_ACCOUNT_CODE = '1066';
const DEFAULT_UNCATEGORIZED_ACCOUNT_CODE = '1980';
const VALID_TAX_TREATMENTS = Object.freeze(['NO_TAX', 'INPUT_TAX_CREDIT', 'SALES_TAX_PAYABLE']);
const TAX_TREATMENT_ALIASES = Object.freeze({
  TAXABLE_SALE: 'SALES_TAX_PAYABLE',
  NO_ITC: 'NO_TAX',
  EXEMPT_PURCHASE: 'NO_TAX',
  ZERO_RATED: 'NO_TAX',
});
const FORCE_NO_TAX_POSTING_TYPES = new Set([
  'PAYROLL_FUNDING',
  'PAYROLL_PAYMENT',
  'PAYROLL_REMITTANCE',
  'TAX_REMITTANCE',
  'TRANSFER',
  'CREDIT_CARD_PAYMENT',
  'PAYMENT_PROCESSOR_PAYOUT',
  'PAYMENT_PROCESSOR_REVERSAL',
  'OWNER_DRAW',
  'OWNER_CONTRIBUTION',
]);
const RECEIPT_HINTS_MARKER = '__receiptHints:';
const AI_PROPOSAL_MARKER = '__aiProposal:';

const fallbackStatementGroup = (account) => {
  const raw = String(account?.category || '').trim().toUpperCase();
  if (raw === 'REVENUE') return 'REVENUE';
  if (raw === 'COST OF GOODS SOLD' || raw === 'COGS') return 'COST_OF_GOODS_SOLD';
  if (raw === 'EXPENSES' || raw === 'EXPENSE') return 'EXPENSES';
  return 'UNMAPPED';
};

const normalizeStatementGroup = (account) => {
  const raw = String(account?.statementGroup || '').trim().toUpperCase();
  return raw || fallbackStatementGroup(account);
};

const normalizeStatementLine = (account) => {
  return String(account?.statementLine || account?.description || account?.code || 'Unmapped').trim();
};

const normalizeAmountForProfitLoss = (journalLine) => {
  const normalSide = String(journalLine?.account?.normalSide || 'DEBIT').toUpperCase();
  const debit = Number(journalLine?.debit || 0);
  const credit = Number(journalLine?.credit || 0);
  return normalSide === 'CREDIT' ? credit - debit : debit - credit;
};

const toProfitLossDate = (value, boundary = 'start') => {
  const date = value instanceof Date ? new Date(value) : new Date(String(value || ''));
  if (Number.isNaN(date.getTime())) {
    throw new Error('Valid from and to dates are required.');
  }

  if (boundary === 'end') {
    date.setHours(23, 59, 59, 999);
  } else {
    date.setHours(0, 0, 0, 0);
  }

  return date;
};

const normalizeStoredTaxAmount = (value) => {
  if (value === null || value === undefined || value === '') return null;
  const numericValue = Number(value);
  if (!Number.isFinite(numericValue)) return null;
  return Math.abs(Number(numericValue.toFixed(2)));
};

const toRoundedAmount = (value) => Number(Number(value || 0).toFixed(2));

const normalizeTaxTreatmentValue = (value) => {
  const normalized = String(value || '').trim().toUpperCase();
  if (TAX_TREATMENT_ALIASES[normalized]) return TAX_TREATMENT_ALIASES[normalized];
  return VALID_TAX_TREATMENTS.includes(normalized) ? normalized : null;
};

const normalizePostingTypeValue = (value) => String(value || '').trim().toUpperCase() || null;

const inferTaxTreatmentFromValues = ({ taxAmount = 0, amount = 0, postingType = null, storedTaxTreatment = null }) => {
  const normalizedPostingType = normalizePostingTypeValue(postingType);
  const explicitTaxTreatment = normalizeTaxTreatmentValue(storedTaxTreatment);
  if (explicitTaxTreatment) return explicitTaxTreatment;
  if (FORCE_NO_TAX_POSTING_TYPES.has(normalizedPostingType)) return 'NO_TAX';
  const normalizedTaxAmount = normalizeStoredTaxAmount(taxAmount) || 0;
  if (normalizedTaxAmount <= 0) return 'NO_TAX';
  return Number(amount || 0) > 0 ? 'SALES_TAX_PAYABLE' : 'INPUT_TAX_CREDIT';
};

const normalizeText = (value) =>
  String(value || '')
    .normalize('NFD')
    .replace(/[\u0300-\u036f]/g, '')
    .toLowerCase()
    .replace(/[^a-z0-9\s]/g, ' ')
    .replace(/\s+/g, ' ')
    .trim();

const CREDIT_CARD_PAYMENT_DESCRIPTOR_RE = /\b(?:payment thank you|payment received|thank you for your payment|automatic payment|auto payment|online payment|pre authorized payment|payment from bank|credit card payment|visa payment|mastercard payment|amex payment)\b/;
const TAX_REMITTANCE_DESCRIPTOR_RE = /\b(?:canada txd|canada tax|canada revenue agency|cra|gst hst|hst payment|gst payment|tax remittance|hst remittance|gst remittance)\b/;

const isCreditCardPaymentDescriptor = (description) => CREDIT_CARD_PAYMENT_DESCRIPTOR_RE.test(normalizeText(description));
const isTaxRemittanceDescriptor = (description) => TAX_REMITTANCE_DESCRIPTOR_RE.test(normalizeText(description));

const parseMarkedJsonFromNotes = (notes, marker) => {
  if (!notes || typeof notes !== 'string') return null;
  const markerIndex = notes.indexOf(marker);
  const rawPayload = markerIndex >= 0
    ? notes.slice(markerIndex + marker.length).trim()
    : null;

  if (!rawPayload) return null;

  try {
    const parsed = JSON.parse(rawPayload);
    return parsed && typeof parsed === 'object' ? parsed : null;
  } catch {
    return null;
  }
};

const mergeMarkedJsonIntoNotes = (notes, marker, nextValue = {}) => {
  const currentValue = parseMarkedJsonFromNotes(notes, marker) || {};
  const mergedValue = Object.fromEntries(
    Object.entries({ ...currentValue, ...nextValue }).filter(([, value]) => value !== undefined)
  );

  const escapedMarker = marker.replace(/[.*+?^${}()|[\]\\]/g, '\\$&');
  const markerPattern = new RegExp(`\\n*${escapedMarker}[\\s\\S]*$`);
  const baseNotes = String(notes || '').replace(markerPattern, '').trimEnd();

  if (!Object.keys(mergedValue).length) {
    return baseNotes || null;
  }

  const serialized = `${marker}${JSON.stringify(mergedValue)}`;
  return baseNotes ? `${baseNotes}\n\n${serialized}` : serialized;
};

const stripMarkedJsonFromNotes = (notes, marker) => {
  if (!notes) return null;
  const escapedMarker = marker.replace(/[.*+?^${}()|[\]\\]/g, '\\$&');
  const markerPattern = new RegExp(`\\n*${escapedMarker}[\\s\\S]*$`);
  const cleaned = String(notes).replace(markerPattern, '').trim();
  return cleaned || null;
};

const parseReceiptHintsFromNotes = (notes) => parseMarkedJsonFromNotes(notes, RECEIPT_HINTS_MARKER);
const parseAIProposalFromNotes = (notes) => parseMarkedJsonFromNotes(notes, AI_PROPOSAL_MARKER);
const mergeReceiptHintsIntoNotes = (notes, nextHints = {}) => mergeMarkedJsonIntoNotes(notes, RECEIPT_HINTS_MARKER, nextHints);
const mergeAIProposalIntoNotes = (notes, nextProposal = {}) => mergeMarkedJsonIntoNotes(notes, AI_PROPOSAL_MARKER, nextProposal);
const stripReceiptHintsFromNotes = (notes) => stripMarkedJsonFromNotes(notes, RECEIPT_HINTS_MARKER);
const stripAIProposalFromNotes = (notes) => stripMarkedJsonFromNotes(notes, AI_PROPOSAL_MARKER);

const hydrateTransactionSupport = (transaction) => {
  const receiptHints = parseReceiptHintsFromNotes(transaction?.notes) || null;
  const parsedProposal = parseAIProposalFromNotes(transaction?.notes) || null;
  const aiProposal = normalizeStoredAIProposal(parsedProposal, transaction);

  return {
    ...transaction,
    receiptHints,
    aiProposal,
    postingType: aiProposal?.likelyTransactionType || transaction?.postingType || null,
    taxTreatment: inferTaxTreatmentFromValues({
      taxAmount: transaction?.taxes,
      amount: transaction?.amount,
      postingType: aiProposal?.likelyTransactionType || transaction?.postingType || null,
      storedTaxTreatment: aiProposal?.likelyTaxTreatment,
    }),
    needsReview: Boolean(aiProposal?.status !== 'APPROVED' && (receiptHints?.needsReview || aiProposal?.reviewRequired || transaction?.categoryId == null)),
    suggestedAccount: aiProposal?.likelyAccount || receiptHints?.suggestedExpenseAccount || transaction?.category || null,
  };
};

const formatAccountLabel = (account) => {
  if (!account) return null;
  const code = String(account?.code || '').trim();
  const description = String(account?.description || '').trim();
  if (code && description) return `${code} — ${description}`;
  return code || description || null;
};

const decorateAccount = (account) => account ? ({ ...account, label: formatAccountLabel(account) }) : null;

const SYSTEM_ACCOUNT_LOOKUP = Object.freeze({
  '1001': { code: '1001', description: 'Operating Bank Account' },
  '1066': { code: '1066', description: 'Expense Tax Clearing' },
  '1980': { code: '1980', description: 'Other Assets' },
  '2640': { code: '2640', description: 'GST/HST Payable' },
  '2690': { code: '2690', description: 'Credit Card Payable' },
});

const sourceTypeToAccountCode = (sourceType) => String(sourceType || '').toUpperCase() === 'CREDIT_CARD' ? '2690' : '1001';

const resolveStoredPostingPreferences = (transaction = null) => {
  const storedProposal = parseAIProposalFromNotes(transaction?.notes) || {};
  return {
    postingType: normalizePostingTypeValue(transaction?.postingType || storedProposal?.likelyTransactionType),
    taxTreatment: inferTaxTreatmentFromValues({
      taxAmount: transaction?.taxes,
      amount: transaction?.amount,
      postingType: transaction?.postingType || storedProposal?.likelyTransactionType,
      storedTaxTreatment: storedProposal?.likelyTaxTreatment,
    }),
  };
};

const resolveProposalJournalLineAccount = ({ line = {}, proposal = null, transaction = null }) => {
  const accountCode = String(line?.accountCode || line?.code || line?.account?.code || '').trim();
  const accountDescription = String(
    line?.accountDescription ||
    line?.description ||
    line?.account?.description ||
    line?.accountName ||
    line?.account?.name ||
    ''
  ).trim();

  if (accountCode && proposal?.likelyAccount?.code === accountCode) {
    return decorateAccount({
      id: proposal?.likelyAccount?.id || line?.accountId || line?.account?.id || null,
      code: accountCode,
      description: accountDescription || proposal?.likelyAccount?.description || '',
    });
  }

  if (accountCode && transaction?.category?.code === accountCode) {
    return decorateAccount({
      id: transaction?.category?.id || line?.accountId || line?.account?.id || null,
      code: accountCode,
      description: accountDescription || transaction?.category?.description || '',
    });
  }

  const sourceCode = sourceTypeToAccountCode(transaction?.source?.type);
  if (accountCode && sourceCode === accountCode) {
    const sourceFallback = SYSTEM_ACCOUNT_LOOKUP[sourceCode] || null;
    return decorateAccount({
      id: line?.accountId || line?.account?.id || null,
      code: accountCode,
      description: accountDescription || sourceFallback?.description || '',
    });
  }

  const matchedSystem = accountCode ? SYSTEM_ACCOUNT_LOOKUP[accountCode] || null : null;
  if (matchedSystem) {
    return decorateAccount({
      id: line?.accountId || line?.account?.id || null,
      code: matchedSystem.code,
      description: accountDescription || matchedSystem.description || '',
    });
  }

  if (!accountCode && !accountDescription) return null;
  return decorateAccount({
    id: line?.accountId || line?.account?.id || null,
    code: accountCode || null,
```
