```js
    description: accountDescription || '',
  });
};

const normalizeProposalJournalLines = (proposal = null, transaction = null) => {
  const rawLines = Array.isArray(proposal?.likelyJournalLines) ? proposal.likelyJournalLines : [];
  if (!rawLines.length) return [];

  return rawLines
    .map((line) => {
      if (!line || typeof line !== 'object') return null;
      const account = resolveProposalJournalLineAccount({ line, proposal, transaction });
      const debit = Number(line?.debit || 0);
      const credit = Number(line?.credit || 0);
      if (!Number.isFinite(debit) || !Number.isFinite(credit)) return null;
      return {
        accountId: account?.id || line?.accountId || line?.account?.id || null,
        accountCode: account?.code || line?.accountCode || line?.code || null,
        accountDescription: account?.description || line?.accountDescription || line?.description || line?.accountName || null,
        label: account?.label || line?.label || null,
        debit: Number(debit.toFixed(2)),
        credit: Number(credit.toFixed(2)),
      };
    })
    .filter(Boolean);
};


const normalizeRuleJournalTemplateLines = (rawLines = [], transaction = null) => {
  if (!Array.isArray(rawLines) || !rawLines.length) return [];
  return rawLines
    .map((line) => {
      if (!line || typeof line !== 'object') return null;
      const account = resolveProposalJournalLineAccount({ line, proposal: { likelyAccount: transaction?.category || null }, transaction });
      const debit = Number(line?.debit || 0);
      const credit = Number(line?.credit || 0);
      const side = String(line?.side || '').trim().toUpperCase();
      const amountFormula = String(line?.amountFormula || line?.formula || '').trim().toLowerCase();
      if ((!account?.code && !account?.description) || !Number.isFinite(debit) || !Number.isFinite(credit)) return null;
      return {
        accountId: account?.id || line?.accountId || null,
        accountCode: account?.code || line?.accountCode || line?.code || null,
        accountDescription: account?.description || line?.accountDescription || line?.description || null,
        label: account?.label || line?.label || null,
        debit: Number(debit.toFixed(2)),
        credit: Number(credit.toFixed(2)),
        ...(side === 'DEBIT' || side === 'CREDIT' ? { side } : {}),
        ...(amountFormula ? { amountFormula } : {}),
      };
    })
    .filter(Boolean);
};

const areJournalLinesBalanced = (lines = []) => {
  if (!Array.isArray(lines) || !lines.length) return false;
  const debitTotal = Number(lines.reduce((sum, line) => sum + Number(line?.debit || 0), 0).toFixed(2));
  const creditTotal = Number(lines.reduce((sum, line) => sum + Number(line?.credit || 0), 0).toFixed(2));
  return debitTotal > 0 && creditTotal > 0 && Math.abs(debitTotal - creditTotal) < 0.01;
};

const normalizeStoredAIProposal = (proposal = null, transaction = null) => {
  if (!proposal || typeof proposal !== 'object') return proposal;
  return {
    ...proposal,
    likelyAccount: decorateAccount(proposal?.likelyAccount || null),
    alternativeAccounts: Array.isArray(proposal?.alternativeAccounts)
      ? proposal.alternativeAccounts.map((item) => ({ ...item, label: item?.label || formatAccountLabel(item) }))
      : [],
    likelyJournalLines: normalizeProposalJournalLines(proposal, transaction),
  };
};

const deriveIsPLAccount = (input = {}) => {
  if (typeof input?.isPLAccount === 'boolean') return input.isPLAccount;
  const normalized = String(input?.category || '').trim().toUpperCase();
  return ['REVENUE', 'OTHER_INCOME', 'EXPENSES', 'EXPENSE', 'OTHER_EXPENSES', 'COST OF GOODS SOLD', 'COGS'].includes(normalized);
};

const normalizeRulePatternList = (value) => {
  if (!Array.isArray(value)) return [];
  return Array.from(new Set(value.map((item) => String(item || '').trim()).filter(Boolean)));
};

const parseRulePatternConfig = (rawValue) => {
  const defaultConfig = {
    patterns: [],
    group: 'General',
    notes: '',
    enabled: true,
    matchMode: 'ANY',
    sourceType: null,
    transactionType: null,
    taxTreatment: null,
    amountDirection: 'ANY',
    llmSummary: '',
    proposalSource: null,
    journalMode: 'STANDARD',
    journalTemplateLines: [],
    previousTaxRate: null,
    applyPreviousTaxRate: false,
  };

  if (!rawValue) return defaultConfig;

  try {
    const parsed = typeof rawValue === 'string' ? JSON.parse(rawValue) : rawValue;
    if (Array.isArray(parsed)) {
      return {
        ...defaultConfig,
        patterns: normalizeRulePatternList(parsed),
      };
    }

    if (parsed && typeof parsed === 'object') {
      return {
        ...defaultConfig,
        ...parsed,
        patterns: normalizeRulePatternList(parsed.patterns),
        group: String(parsed.group || defaultConfig.group).trim() || defaultConfig.group,
        notes: String(parsed.notes || '').trim(),
        enabled: parsed.enabled !== false,
        matchMode: String(parsed.matchMode || defaultConfig.matchMode).toUpperCase() === 'ALL' ? 'ALL' : 'ANY',
        sourceType: String(parsed.sourceType || '').toUpperCase() || null,
        transactionType: String(parsed.transactionType || '').toUpperCase() || null,
        taxTreatment: String(parsed.taxTreatment || '').toUpperCase() || null,
        amountDirection: ['ANY', 'EXPENSE', 'INCOME'].includes(String(parsed.amountDirection || '').toUpperCase())
          ? String(parsed.amountDirection || '').toUpperCase()
          : 'ANY',
        llmSummary: String(parsed.llmSummary || '').trim(),
        proposalSource: String(parsed.proposalSource || '').trim() || null,
        journalMode: String(parsed.journalMode || defaultConfig.journalMode).toUpperCase() === 'PROPOSAL_HINT' ? 'PROPOSAL_HINT' : 'STANDARD',
        journalTemplateLines: normalizeRuleJournalTemplateLines(parsed.journalTemplateLines, null),
        previousTaxRate: parsed.previousTaxRate && typeof parsed.previousTaxRate === 'object' ? parsed.previousTaxRate : null,
        applyPreviousTaxRate: Boolean(parsed.applyPreviousTaxRate),
      };
    }
  } catch (error) {
    console.warn('Invalid rule pattern config:', error.message);
  }

  return defaultConfig;
};

const serializeRulePatternConfig = (config = {}) => JSON.stringify({
  patterns: normalizeRulePatternList(config.patterns),
  group: String(config.group || 'General').trim() || 'General',
  notes: String(config.notes || '').trim(),
  enabled: config.enabled !== false,
  matchMode: String(config.matchMode || 'ANY').toUpperCase() === 'ALL' ? 'ALL' : 'ANY',
  sourceType: String(config.sourceType || '').toUpperCase() || null,
  transactionType: String(config.transactionType || '').toUpperCase() || null,
  taxTreatment: String(config.taxTreatment || '').toUpperCase() || null,
  amountDirection: ['ANY', 'EXPENSE', 'INCOME'].includes(String(config.amountDirection || '').toUpperCase())
    ? String(config.amountDirection || '').toUpperCase()
    : 'ANY',
  llmSummary: String(config.llmSummary || '').trim(),
  proposalSource: String(config.proposalSource || '').trim() || null,
  journalMode: String(config.journalMode || 'STANDARD').toUpperCase() === 'PROPOSAL_HINT' ? 'PROPOSAL_HINT' : 'STANDARD',
  journalTemplateLines: normalizeRuleJournalTemplateLines(config.journalTemplateLines || [], null),
  previousTaxRate: config.previousTaxRate && typeof config.previousTaxRate === 'object' ? config.previousTaxRate : null,
  applyPreviousTaxRate: Boolean(config.applyPreviousTaxRate),
});

const buildDescriptionSignature = (value) => normalizeText(value)
  .split(' ')
  .filter((token) => token.length > 2)
  .slice(0, 6)
  .join(' ');

const inferPatternFromRuleName = (name) => {
  const cleaned = String(name || '')
    .replace(/\s+-\s+(credit card|bank|cash)?\s*(expense|income|revenue|rule|transaction)s?.*$/i, '')
    .replace(/\s+rule$/i, '')
    .trim();
  const normalized = normalizeText(cleaned);
  return normalized.split(' ').length >= 2 ? cleaned : '';
};

const sameAmountDirection = (left, right) => {
  const a = Number(left || 0);
  const b = Number(right || 0);
  if (a === 0 || b === 0) return true;
  return (a > 0 && b > 0) || (a < 0 && b < 0);
};

const matchesRuleDescription = (description, patterns = [], matchMode = 'ANY', ruleName = '') => {
  const effectivePatterns = patterns.length ? patterns : (inferPatternFromRuleName(ruleName) ? [inferPatternFromRuleName(ruleName)] : []);
  if (!effectivePatterns.length) return false;
  const haystack = normalizeText(description);
  if (!haystack) return false;
  const normalizedPatterns = normalizeRulePatternList(effectivePatterns).map((item) => normalizeText(item));
  if (!normalizedPatterns.length) return false;
  if (matchMode === 'ALL') {
    return normalizedPatterns.every((pattern) => haystack.includes(pattern));
  }
  return normalizedPatterns.some((pattern) => haystack.includes(pattern));
};

const enrichRuleRecord = (rule) => {
  const meta = parseRulePatternConfig(rule?.patterns);
  const inferredPattern = meta.patterns.length ? '' : inferPatternFromRuleName(rule?.name);
  return {
    ...rule,
    meta: {
      ...meta,
      patterns: meta.patterns.length ? meta.patterns : (inferredPattern ? [inferredPattern] : []),
      inferredPattern: !meta.patterns.length && Boolean(inferredPattern),
    },
    patternList: meta.patterns,
  };
};

class AccountingService {
  constructor() {
    this.prisma = prisma;
  }

  classifyTransactionType(transaction) {
    const description = normalizeText(transaction?.description);
    const amount = Number(transaction?.amount || 0);
    const sourceType = String(transaction?.source?.type || '').toUpperCase();

    if (/owner draw|draw owner|shareholder draw|personal withdrawal/.test(description)) return 'OWNER_DRAW';
    if (/owner contribution|capital contribution|shareholder contribution/.test(description)) return 'OWNER_CONTRIBUTION';
    if (sourceType !== 'CREDIT_CARD' && amount < 0 && /\brise\s+cap\b/.test(description)) return 'TRANSFER';
    if (/payroll|adp|ceridian|paychex|wagepoint/.test(description)) return 'PAYROLL_PAYMENT';
    if (/gst|hst|cra|tax remittance|remit/.test(description) || isTaxRemittanceDescriptor(description)) return 'TAX_REMITTANCE';
    if (sourceType === 'CREDIT_CARD' && amount > 0 && isCreditCardPaymentDescriptor(description)) return 'CREDIT_CARD_PAYMENT';
    if (sourceType !== 'CREDIT_CARD' && amount < 0 && /credit card payment|visa payment|mastercard payment|amex payment/.test(description)) return 'CREDIT_CARD_PAYMENT';
    if (/transfer|etransfer|e-transfer|interac|internal move|from savings|to savings/.test(description)) return 'TRANSFER';
    if (/bank charge|service charge|monthly fee|nsf fee/.test(description)) return 'BANK_EXPENSE';
    if (amount > 0) return 'BANK_REVENUE';
    return 'BANK_EXPENSE';
  }

  async applyRulesToTransactions(transactions, organizationId) {
    if (!transactions || transactions.length === 0) {
      return { modifiedTransactions: [], rulesAppliedCount: 0 };
    }

    const rawRules = await this.prisma.accountingRule.findMany({
      where: { organizationId },
      include: { category: true },
      orderBy: { createdAt: 'desc' },
    });
    const rules = rawRules.map(enrichRuleRecord).filter((rule) => rule.meta.enabled !== false);

    if (rules.length === 0) {
      return { modifiedTransactions: transactions, rulesAppliedCount: 0 };
    }

    let rulesAppliedCount = 0;
    const modifiedTransactions = transactions.map((tx) => {
      let appliedRuleForTx = false;
      const newTx = { ...tx };

      for (const rule of rules) {
        if (appliedRuleForTx) break;

        const sourceType = String(newTx?.source?.type || newTx?.sourceType || '').toUpperCase();
        const amountDirection = Number(newTx?.amount || 0) > 0 ? 'INCOME' : Number(newTx?.amount || 0) < 0 ? 'EXPENSE' : 'ANY';
        if (rule.meta.sourceType && sourceType && rule.meta.sourceType !== sourceType) continue;
        if (rule.meta.amountDirection && rule.meta.amountDirection !== 'ANY' && rule.meta.amountDirection !== amountDirection) continue;
        if (!matchesRuleDescription(newTx.description, rule.meta.patterns, rule.meta.matchMode, rule.name)) continue;

        let hasChanged = false;

        if (rule.autoCategory && rule.categoryId && !newTx.categoryId) {
          newTx.categoryId = rule.categoryId;
          newTx.category = rule.category || newTx.category;
          hasChanged = true;
        }

        if (rule.meta.transactionType && !newTx.postingType) {
          newTx.postingType = rule.meta.transactionType;
          hasChanged = true;
        }

        if (rule.autoApplyTaxes && Number(newTx.amount || 0) < 0 && (newTx.taxes === null || newTx.taxes === undefined)) {
          const taxShareOfGross = Number(rule.meta.previousTaxRate?.taxShareOfGross || 0);
          const taxRate = taxShareOfGross > 0 ? taxShareOfGross : (0.13 / 1.13);
          const absAmount = Math.abs(Number(newTx.amount || 0));
          newTx.taxes = Number(((absAmount * taxRate) || 0).toFixed(2));
          hasChanged = true;
        }

        if (rule.requiredReceipt && !newTx.receiptRequired) {
          newTx.receiptRequired = true;
          hasChanged = true;
        }

        if (hasChanged) {
          rulesAppliedCount += 1;
          appliedRuleForTx = true;
        }
      }

      return newTx;
    });

    return { modifiedTransactions, rulesAppliedCount };
  }

  async findSimilarTransactionsForProposal(organizationId, transaction, proposal = {}, options = {}) {
    const { uncategorizedOnly = true, limit = 250 } = options || {};
    const descriptionSignature = buildDescriptionSignature(transaction?.description);
    const sourceId = transaction?.sourceId || transaction?.source?.id || null;
    const sourceType = String(transaction?.source?.type || '').toUpperCase();
    const targetPostingType = String(proposal?.likelyTransactionType || transaction?.postingType || this.classifyTransactionType(transaction) || '').toUpperCase();
    const targetAccountCode = String(proposal?.likelyAccount?.code || transaction?.category?.code || '').trim();

    const candidates = await this.prisma.bankTransaction.findMany({
      where: {
        organizationId,
        ...(transaction?.id ? { id: { not: Number(transaction.id) } } : {}),
        ...(sourceId ? { sourceId } : {}),
        ...(uncategorizedOnly ? { categoryId: null } : {}),
      },
      include: {
        category: { select: { id: true, code: true, description: true, statementLine: true } },
        receipt: true,
        source: { select: { id: true, name: true, type: true } },
        journalEntry: true,
      },
      orderBy: { date: 'desc' },
      take: Number(limit || 250),
    });

    return candidates.filter((candidate) => {
      if (!sameAmountDirection(candidate.amount, transaction?.amount)) return false;
      if (sourceType && String(candidate?.source?.type || '').toUpperCase() !== sourceType) return false;
      const candidateSignature = buildDescriptionSignature(candidate?.description);
      if (!candidateSignature) return false;
      const signatureMatches = descriptionSignature
        ? candidateSignature === descriptionSignature || candidateSignature.includes(descriptionSignature) || descriptionSignature.includes(candidateSignature)
        : false;
      if (!signatureMatches) return false;
      if (targetPostingType && candidate?.postingType && String(candidate.postingType || '').toUpperCase() !== targetPostingType) return false;
      if (uncategorizedOnly) return true;
      if (!targetAccountCode) return true;
      return String(candidate?.category?.code || '').trim() === targetAccountCode;
    });
  }

  async buildBatchProposalPreview(organizationId, transaction, proposal = {}) {
    const similarTransactions = await this.findSimilarTransactionsForProposal(organizationId, transaction, proposal, { uncategorizedOnly: true, limit: 250 });
    return {
      similarCount: similarTransactions.length,
      candidateIds: similarTransactions.map((item) => item.id),
      sampleTransactions: similarTransactions.slice(0, 8).map((item) => ({
        id: item.id,
        date: item.date,
        description: item.description,
        amount: item.amount,
        currentCategory: item.category ? decorateAccount(item.category) : null,
      })),
      descriptionSignature: buildDescriptionSignature(transaction?.description),
      proposedAccount: decorateAccount(proposal?.likelyAccount || transaction?.category || null),
      proposedTransactionType: proposal?.likelyTransactionType || transaction?.postingType || this.classifyTransactionType(transaction),
    };
  }


  async getEnabledRulesForOrganization(organizationId) {
    if (!organizationId) return [];
    const rules = await this.prisma.accountingRule.findMany({
      where: { organizationId },
      include: { category: true },
      orderBy: [{ updatedAt: 'desc' }, { createdAt: 'desc' }],
    });
    return rules.map(enrichRuleRecord).filter((rule) => rule.meta.enabled !== false);
  }

  async findMatchingRuleForTransaction(transaction, rules = null) {
    const candidateRules = Array.isArray(rules) ? rules : await this.getEnabledRulesForOrganization(transaction?.organizationId);
    const sourceType = String(transaction?.source?.type || transaction?.sourceType || '').toUpperCase();
    const amountDirection = Number(transaction?.amount || 0) > 0 ? 'INCOME' : Number(transaction?.amount || 0) < 0 ? 'EXPENSE' : 'ANY';
    return candidateRules.find((rule) => {
      if (rule.meta.sourceType && sourceType && rule.meta.sourceType !== sourceType) return false;
      if (rule.meta.amountDirection && rule.meta.amountDirection !== 'ANY' && rule.meta.amountDirection !== amountDirection) return false;
      return matchesRuleDescription(transaction?.description, rule.meta.patterns, rule.meta.matchMode, rule.name);
    }) || null;
  }

  async buildPreferredLinesFromStoredLines(lines = []) {
    if (!areJournalLinesBalanced(lines)) return null;
    const resolved = [];
    for (const line of lines) {
      const accountCode = String(line?.accountCode || line?.code || '').trim();
      const accountId = line?.accountId || (accountCode ? await this.getAccountIdByCode(accountCode) : null);
      if (!accountId) return null;
      resolved.push({ accountId, debit: Number(Number(line?.debit || 0).toFixed(2)), credit: Number(Number(line?.credit || 0).toFixed(2)) });
    }
    return areJournalLinesBalanced(resolved) ? resolved : null;
  }

  async buildPreferredLinesFromTemplate(lines = [], tx = null) {
    if (!Array.isArray(lines) || !lines.length) return null;
    const hasFormulaLines = lines.some((line) => line?.side || line?.amountFormula || line?.formula);
    if (!hasFormulaLines) return null;

    const gross = Math.abs(Number(tx?.amount || 0));
    const tax = normalizeStoredTaxAmount(tx?.taxes) || 0;
    const net = Math.max(0, toRoundedAmount(gross - tax));
    const { taxTreatment } = resolveStoredPostingPreferences(tx);
    const hasTaxFormulaLine = lines.some((line) => ['hst', 'tax'].includes(String(line?.amountFormula || line?.formula || '').trim().toLowerCase()));
    if (tax > 0 && ['INPUT_TAX_CREDIT', 'SALES_TAX_PAYABLE'].includes(taxTreatment) && !hasTaxFormulaLine) {
      return null;
    }

    const formulaAmount = (formula) => {
      const normalized = String(formula || '').trim().toLowerCase();
      if (normalized === 'net') return net;
      if (normalized === 'hst' || normalized === 'tax') return tax;
      return gross;
    };

    const resolved = [];
    for (const line of lines) {
      const accountCode = String(line?.accountCode || line?.code || '').trim();
      const accountId = line?.accountId || (accountCode ? await this.getAccountIdByCode(accountCode) : null);
      const side = String(line?.side || '').trim().toUpperCase();
      const amount = toRoundedAmount(formulaAmount(line?.amountFormula || line?.formula));
      if (!accountId || !amount || !['DEBIT', 'CREDIT'].includes(side)) continue;
      resolved.push({
        accountId,
        debit: side === 'DEBIT' ? amount : 0,
        credit: side === 'CREDIT' ? amount : 0,
      });
    }

    return areJournalLinesBalanced(resolved) ? resolved : null;
  }

  async buildPreferredLinesForTransaction(tx) {
    const proposal = parseAIProposalFromNotes(tx?.notes) || null;
    const proposalTemplateLines = await this.buildPreferredLinesFromTemplate(proposal?.likelyJournalLines || [], tx);
    if (proposalTemplateLines?.length) return proposalTemplateLines;

    const proposalLines = normalizeProposalJournalLines(proposal, tx);
    const explicitProposalLines = await this.buildPreferredLinesFromStoredLines(proposalLines);
    if (explicitProposalLines?.length) return explicitProposalLines;

    const matchingRule = await this.findMatchingRuleForTransaction(tx);
    const ruleTemplateLines = await this.buildPreferredLinesFromTemplate(matchingRule?.meta?.journalTemplateLines || [], tx);
    if (ruleTemplateLines?.length) return ruleTemplateLines;

    const ruleLines = normalizeRuleJournalTemplateLines(matchingRule?.meta?.journalTemplateLines || [], tx);
    const explicitRuleLines = await this.buildPreferredLinesFromStoredLines(ruleLines);
    if (explicitRuleLines?.length) return explicitRuleLines;

    const proto = this.buildLinesFromBankTx(tx);
    return Promise.all(proto.map(async (line) => ({ accountId: await this.getAccountIdByCode(line.account), debit: line.debit, credit: line.credit })));
  }

  buildLinesFromBankTx(tx) {
    const gross = Math.abs(Number(tx?.amount || 0));
    const proposal = parseAIProposalFromNotes(tx?.notes) || {};
    const { postingType, taxTreatment } = resolveStoredPostingPreferences(tx);
    const normalizedPostingType = postingType || this.classifyTransactionType(tx);
    const cashAcct = SOURCE_ACCOUNT_MAP[tx?.source?.type ?? ''] || '1001';
    const defaultOffsetAcct = tx?.category?.code || DEFAULT_UNCATEGORIZED_ACCOUNT_CODE;
    const offsetAcct = normalizedPostingType === 'TAX_REMITTANCE'
      ? (proposal?.taxRemittanceAccountCode || (String(tx?.category?.category || '').toUpperCase().includes('LIABIL') ? tx?.category?.code : null) || TAX_PAYABLE_ACCOUNT_CODE)
      : defaultOffsetAcct;

    const shouldForceNoTax = FORCE_NO_TAX_POSTING_TYPES.has(normalizedPostingType);
    const effectiveTaxTreatment = shouldForceNoTax ? 'NO_TAX' : taxTreatment;
    const tax = shouldForceNoTax ? 0 : normalizeStoredTaxAmount(tx?.taxes) || 0;
    const net = Math.max(0, toRoundedAmount(gross - tax));

    if (normalizedPostingType === 'CREDIT_CARD_PAYMENT') {
      const cardAccount = tx?.source?.type === 'CREDIT_CARD'
        ? cashAcct
        : (tx?.category?.code || proposal?.creditCardAccountCode || '2690');
      const bankAccount = proposal?.fundingBankAccountCode || (tx?.source?.type === 'CREDIT_CARD' ? '1001' : cashAcct);
      return [
        { account: cardAccount, debit: gross, credit: 0 },
        { account: bankAccount, debit: 0, credit: gross },
      ];
    }

    if (normalizedPostingType === 'PAYROLL_PAYMENT' || normalizedPostingType === 'TAX_REMITTANCE') {
      return [
        { account: offsetAcct, debit: gross, credit: 0 },
        { account: cashAcct, debit: 0, credit: gross },
      ];
    }

    const taxLine = effectiveTaxTreatment === 'INPUT_TAX_CREDIT' && tax > 0
      ? { account: TAX_RECOVERABLE_ACCOUNT_CODE, debit: tax, credit: 0 }
      : effectiveTaxTreatment === 'SALES_TAX_PAYABLE' && tax > 0
        ? { account: TAX_PAYABLE_ACCOUNT_CODE, debit: 0, credit: tax }
        : null;

    const isIncome = normalizedPostingType === 'BANK_REVENUE' || Number(tx?.amount || 0) > 0;

    if (isIncome) {
      return [
        { account: cashAcct, debit: gross, credit: 0 },
        ...(taxLine ? [taxLine] : []),
        { account: offsetAcct, debit: 0, credit: net || gross },
      ];
    }

    return [
      { account: offsetAcct, debit: net || gross, credit: 0 },
      ...(taxLine ? [taxLine] : []),
      { account: cashAcct, debit: 0, credit: gross },
    ];
  }

  async resolveJournalLinesForBankTransaction(tx) {
    const protoLines = this.buildLinesFromBankTx(tx);
    return Promise.all(
      protoLines.map(async (line) => ({
        accountId: await this.getAccountIdByCode(line.account),
        debit: Number(Number(line.debit || 0).toFixed(2)),
        credit: Number(Number(line.credit || 0).toFixed(2)),
      }))
    );
  }

  async importBankTransactionToJournal(bankTxId, userId) {
    const tx = await this.prisma.bankTransaction.findUnique({
      where: { id: bankTxId },
      include: { category: true, source: true }
    });
    if (!tx) throw new Error('Bank transaction not found');

    const lines = await this.resolveJournalLinesForBankTransaction(tx);

    await this.prisma.journalEntry.create({
      data: {
        date: tx.date,
        memo: tx.description,
        source: 'BANK_IMPORT',
        organizationId: tx.organizationId,
        bankTxId: tx.id,
        createdBy: userId,
        lines: { create: lines }
      }
    });
  }

  async importSalesTransactionToJournal(salesTxId, userId) {
    const sx = await this.prisma.salesTransaction.findUnique({ where: { id: salesTxId } });
    if (!sx) throw new Error('Sales transaction not found');

    const cashId = await this.getAccountIdByCode('1001');
    const taxId = await this.getAccountIdByCode('2640');
    const revId = await this.getAccountIdByCode('8089');

    const gross = sx.total_money;
    const tax = sx.tax_amount;
    const netSale = gross - tax;

    await this.prisma.journalEntry.create({
      data: {
        date: sx.date,
        memo: `Sale ${sx.id}`,
        source: 'SALES_IMPORT',
        organizationId: sx.organizationId,
        salesTxId: sx.id,
        createdBy: userId,
        lines: {
          create: [
            { accountId: cashId, debit: gross, credit: 0 },
            { accountId: taxId, debit: 0, credit: tax },
            { accountId: revId, debit: 0, credit: netSale }
          ]
        }
      }
    });
  }

  async postBankTransaction(bankTxId, userId) {
    const tx = await this.prisma.bankTransaction.findUnique({
      where: { id: bankTxId },
      include: { category: true, source: true }
    });
    if (!tx) throw new Error('Bank transaction not found');

    const existingEntry = await this.prisma.journalEntry.findUnique({ where: { bankTxId: tx.id } });
    if (existingEntry) return;

    const postingType = tx.postingType || this.classifyTransactionType(tx);
    if (!tx.postingType) {
      await this.prisma.bankTransaction.update({
        where: { id: tx.id },
        data: {
          postingType,
          notes: mergeAIProposalIntoNotes(tx.notes, {
            likelyTransactionType: postingType,
            status: 'CLASSIFIED',
            reviewRequired: tx.categoryId == null,
          }),
        },
      });
    }

    const lines = await this.resolveJournalLinesForBankTransaction(tx);

    await this.prisma.journalEntry.create({
      data: {
        date: tx.date,
        memo: tx.description,
        source: 'BANK_IMPORT',
        organizationId: tx.organizationId,
        bankTxId: tx.id,
        createdBy: userId,
        lines: { create: lines }
      }
    });
  }

  async getLedger(organizationId, code = null, from, to, options = {}) {
    const { sortBy = 'date', sortDir = 'asc', offset = 0, limit = 20, memo } = options;

    let categoryIds;
    if (code && code !== 'ALL') {
      const category = await this.prisma.accountingCategory.findUnique({ where: { code } });
      if (!category) return { rows: [], total: 0 };
      categoryIds = [category.id];
    } else {
      const categories = await this.prisma.accountingCategory.findMany({});
      categoryIds = categories.map(c => c.id);
    }

    const whereFilter = {
      accountId: { in: categoryIds },
      entry: {
        organizationId,
        date: { gte: from, lte: to },
        ...(memo ? { memo: { contains: memo } } : {})
      }
    };

    const total = await this.prisma.journalLine.count({ where: whereFilter });
    const orderByClause = sortBy === 'date' ? { entry: { date: sortDir } } : ['debit', 'credit'].includes(sortBy) ? { [sortBy]: sortDir } : { entry: { date: sortDir } };
    const lines = await this.prisma.journalLine.findMany({
      where: whereFilter,
      include: { entry: true },
      orderBy: orderByClause,
      skip: offset,
      take: limit
    });

    let runningBalance = 0;
    const rows = lines.map(l => {
      const debit = l.debit ?? 0;
      const credit = l.credit ?? 0;
      runningBalance += debit - credit;
      return {
        entryId: l.entryId,
        date: l.entry.date,
        memo: l.entry.memo,
        debit,
        credit,
        balance: runningBalance
      };
    });

    return { rows, total };
  }

  async getTrialBalance(orgId, endDate) {
    const rows = await this.prisma.$queryRaw`
      SELECT
        a.code,
        a.description,
        a."normalSide",
        SUM(l.debit)  AS debit,
        SUM(l.credit) AS credit
      FROM "JournalLine" l
      JOIN "JournalEntry" e ON e.id = l."entryId"
      JOIN "AccountingCategory" a ON a.id = l."accountId"
      WHERE e."organizationId" = ${orgId} AND e.date <= ${endDate}
      GROUP BY a.code, a.description, a."normalSide"
      ORDER BY a.code;
    `;

    return rows.map(r => ({
      code: r.code,
      name: r.description,
      debit: r.normalSide === 'DEBIT' ? r.debit - r.credit : r.credit - r.debit,
      credit: r.normalSide === 'CREDIT' ? r.credit - r.debit : r.debit - r.credit
    }));
  }

  async deleteTransaction(organizationId, transactionId) {
    const transaction = await this.prisma.bankTransaction.findUnique({ where: { id: transactionId } });
    if (!transaction) throw new Error('Transaction not found.');
    if (transaction.organizationId !== organizationId) throw new Error('Unauthorized to delete this transaction.');
    await this.prisma.bankTransaction.delete({ where: { id: transactionId } });
  }

  async findDuplicateTransactions(organizationId) {
    const transactions = await this.prisma.bankTransaction.findMany({ where: { organizationId } });
    transactions.sort((a, b) => new Date(a.date) - new Date(b.date));

    const duplicateGroups = [];
    const processed = new Set();

    for (let i = 0; i < transactions.length; i++) {
      const tx1 = transactions[i];
      if (processed.has(tx1.id)) continue;
      const group = [tx1];

      for (let j = i + 1; j < transactions.length; j++) {
        const tx2 = transactions[j];
        const sameCore = tx1.description === tx2.description && tx1.amount === tx2.amount && tx1.sourceId === tx2.sourceId;
        const dateDiff = Math.abs(new Date(tx1.date) - new Date(tx2.date));
        const withinOneMonth = dateDiff <= 15 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000;
        if (sameCore && withinOneMonth) {
          group.push(tx2);
          processed.add(tx2.id);
        }
      }

      if (group.length > 1) {
        duplicateGroups.push(group);
        processed.add(tx1.id);
      }
    }

    return duplicateGroups;
  }

  async proposeBankTxJournal(bankTxId) {
    const tx = await this.prisma.bankTransaction.findUnique({
      where: { id: bankTxId },
      include: { category: true, source: true }
    });
    if (!tx) throw new Error('Bank transaction not found');

    const lines = await this.resolveJournalLinesForBankTransaction(tx);

    return { date: tx.date, memo: tx.description, lines };
  }

  async getJournalEntries(organizationId, options = {}) {
    const { page = 1, pageSize = 100, search = '', dateFrom = null, dateTo = null, source = '', posted = null, sortKey = 'date', sortDir = 'desc' } = options;
    const conditions = [{ organizationId }];

    if (search) {
      conditions.push({
        OR: [
          { memo: { contains: search } },
          { createdBy: { contains: search } },
        ]
      });
    }
    if (dateFrom) conditions.push({ date: { gte: dateFrom } });
    if (dateTo) conditions.push({ date: { lte: dateTo } });
    if (source) {
      if (source === 'MANUAL') {
        conditions.push({ source: { in: [null, ''] } });
      } else {
        conditions.push({ source });
      }
    }
    if (posted !== null) conditions.push({ posted });

    const where = { AND: conditions };
    const total = await this.prisma.journalEntry.count({ where });

    let orderBy;
    if (sortKey === 'memo') {
      orderBy = { memo: sortDir };
    } else if (sortKey === 'lines') {
      orderBy = { lines: { _count: sortDir } };
    } else {
      orderBy = { date: sortDir };
    }

    const raw = await this.prisma.journalEntry.findMany({
      where,
      include: { lines: { include: { account: true } } },
      orderBy,
      skip: (page - 1) * pageSize,
      take: pageSize
    });

    const entries = raw.map(e => {
      const totalDebit = e.lines.reduce((s, l) => s + (l.debit || 0), 0);
      const totalCredit = e.lines.reduce((s, l) => s + (l.credit || 0), 0);
      const difference = Math.abs(totalDebit - totalCredit);
      return {
        ...e,
        totalDebit: Math.round(totalDebit * 100) / 100,
        totalCredit: Math.round(totalCredit * 100) / 100,
        isBalanced: difference < 0.005,
        difference: Math.round(difference * 100) / 100,
      };
    });

    return { entries, total };
  }

  async getJournalSummary(organizationId) {
    const total = await this.prisma.journalEntry.count({ where: { organizationId } });
    const drafts = await this.prisma.journalEntry.count({ where: { organizationId, posted: false } });
    const unbalancedRaw = await this.prisma.journalEntry.findMany({
      where: { organizationId },
      select: {
        id: true,
        lines: { select: { debit: true, credit: true } }
      }
    });
    let unbalanced = 0;
    for (const e of unbalancedRaw) {
      const td = e.lines.reduce((s, l) => s + (l.debit || 0), 0);
      const tc = e.lines.reduce((s, l) => s + (l.credit || 0), 0);
      if (Math.abs(td - tc) >= 0.005) unbalanced++;
    }

    const dateRange = await this.prisma.journalEntry.aggregate({
      where: { organizationId },
      _min: { date: true },
      _max: { date: true },
    });

    return {
      total,
      drafts,
      unbalanced,
      dateMin: dateRange._min.date,
      dateMax: dateRange._max.date,
    };
  }

  async createJournalEntry({ date, memo, lines, organizationId, userId }) {
    return this.prisma.journalEntry.create({
      data: {
        date: new Date(date),
        memo,
        organizationId,
        createdBy: userId,
        lines: { create: lines.map(l => ({ accountId: l.accountId, debit: l.debit, credit: l.credit })) }
      },
      include: { lines: true }
    });
  }

  async updateJournalEntry(id, { date, memo, lines }) {
    await this.prisma.journalLine.deleteMany({ where: { entryId: id } });
    return this.prisma.journalEntry.update({
      where: { id },
      data: {
        date: new Date(date),
        memo,
        lines: { create: lines.map(l => ({ accountId: l.accountId, debit: l.debit, credit: l.credit })) }
      },
      include: { lines: true }
    });
  }

  async deleteJournalEntry(id) {
    return this.prisma.journalEntry.delete({ where: { id } });
  }

  async getProfitLossReport(organizationId, from, to) {
    if (!organizationId) throw new Error('Missing required parameter: organizationId');

    const start = toProfitLossDate(from, 'start');
    const end = toProfitLossDate(to, 'end');

    const journalLines = await this.prisma.journalLine.findMany({
      where: { entry: { organizationId, posted: true, date: { gte: start, lte: end } } },
      include: { account: true, entry: { select: { id: true, date: true, memo: true } } },
      orderBy: [{ entry: { date: 'asc' } }, { debit: 'desc' }, { credit: 'desc' }],
    });

    const relevantLines = journalLines.filter((line) => {
      const accountCategory = String(line?.account?.category || '').trim().toUpperCase();
      return Boolean(line?.account?.isPLAccount) || PROFIT_LOSS_CATEGORY_FALLBACKS.includes(accountCategory);
    });

    const sectionMap = new Map();
    const totals = { revenue: 0, cogs: 0, expenses: 0, otherIncome: 0, otherExpenses: 0, unmapped: 0, netIncome: 0 };

    for (const line of relevantLines) {
      const amount = Number(normalizeAmountForProfitLoss(line).toFixed(2));
      if (Math.abs(amount) < 0.005) continue;
      const sectionKey = normalizeStatementGroup(line.account);
      const sectionMeta = PROFIT_LOSS_GROUP_META[sectionKey] || PROFIT_LOSS_GROUP_META.UNMAPPED;
      const statementLine = normalizeStatementLine(line.account);
      const sortOrder = Number(line?.account?.sortOrder ?? sectionMeta.order ?? 999);

      if (!sectionMap.has(sectionKey)) {
        sectionMap.set(sectionKey, { groupKey: sectionKey, label: sectionMeta.label, order: sectionMeta.order, sectionType: sectionMeta.sectionType, totalAmount: 0, lines: [] });
      }

      const section = sectionMap.get(sectionKey);
      let lineItem = section.lines.find((item) => item.statementLine === statementLine);
      if (!lineItem) {
        lineItem = { accountId: line.account?.id || null, accountCode: line.account?.code || '', statementLine, sortOrder, totalAmount: 0 };
        section.lines.push(lineItem);
      }

      lineItem.totalAmount = Number((lineItem.totalAmount + amount).toFixed(2));
      section.totalAmount = Number((section.totalAmount + amount).toFixed(2));

      switch (sectionKey) {
        case 'REVENUE': totals.revenue = Number((totals.revenue + amount).toFixed(2)); break;
        case 'COST_OF_GOODS_SOLD': totals.cogs = Number((totals.cogs + amount).toFixed(2)); break;
        case 'EXPENSES': totals.expenses = Number((totals.expenses + amount).toFixed(2)); break;
        case 'OTHER_INCOME': totals.otherIncome = Number((totals.otherIncome + amount).toFixed(2)); break;
        case 'OTHER_EXPENSES': totals.otherExpenses = Number((totals.otherExpenses + amount).toFixed(2)); break;
        default: totals.unmapped = Number((totals.unmapped + amount).toFixed(2)); break;
      }
    }

    const sections = Array.from(sectionMap.values())
      .map((section) => ({
        ...section,
        lines: section.lines.sort((a, b) => a.sortOrder - b.sortOrder || a.statementLine.localeCompare(b.statementLine)).map((line) => ({ ...line, totalAmount: Number(line.totalAmount.toFixed(2)) })),
        totalAmount: Number(section.totalAmount.toFixed(2)),
      }))
      .sort((a, b) => a.order - b.order || a.label.localeCompare(b.label));

    totals.netIncome = Number((totals.revenue + totals.otherIncome - totals.cogs - totals.expenses - totals.otherExpenses).toFixed(2));
    return { from: start.toISOString(), to: end.toISOString(), sections, totals };
  }

  async getT2Report(organizationId, startDate, endDate) {
    const tz = 'America/New_York';
    const start = moment.tz(startDate, 'YYYY-MM-DD', tz).startOf('day').toDate();
    const end = moment.tz(endDate, 'YYYY-MM-DD', tz).endOf('day').toDate();
    const salesTransactions = await this.prisma.salesTransaction.findMany({ where: { status: 'COMPLETED', date: { gte: start, lte: end } } });
    const tip = salesTransactions.reduce((sum, tx) => sum + (tx.tip_money || 0), 0);
    const revenueAgg = await this.prisma.bankTransaction.aggregate({ where: { organizationId, date: { gte: start, lte: end }, category: { is: { category: 'REVENUE' } } }, _sum: { amount: true, taxes: true } });
    let salesTax = salesTransactions.reduce((sum, tx) => sum + (tx.tax_amount || 0), 0);
    salesTax += revenueAgg._sum.taxes || 0;
    const grossIncome = revenueAgg._sum.amount || 0;
    const netIncome = grossIncome - tip - salesTax;
    const expenseTransactions = await this.prisma.bankTransaction.findMany({ where: { organizationId, date: { gte: start, lte: end }, category: { is: { category: 'EXPENSES' } } } });
    const grossExpenses = expenseTransactions.reduce((sum, tx) => sum + tx.amount, 0);
    const expenseTaxes = expenseTransactions.reduce((sum, tx) => sum + (tx.taxes || 0), 0);
    const netExpenses = grossExpenses - expenseTaxes;
    const cogsTransactions = await this.prisma.bankTransaction.findMany({ where: { organizationId, date: { gte: start, lte: end }, category: { is: { category: 'COST OF GOODS SOLD' } } } });
    const grossCOGS = cogsTransactions.reduce((sum, tx) => sum + tx.amount, 0);
    const cogsTaxes = cogsTransactions.reduce((sum, tx) => sum + (tx.taxes || 0), 0);
    const netCOGS = grossCOGS - cogsTaxes;
    const profit = netIncome + (netExpenses + netCOGS);
    return { income: { gross: grossIncome, tips: tip, taxes: salesTax, net: netIncome }, expenses: { gross: grossExpenses, taxes: expenseTaxes, net: netExpenses }, costOfGoodsSold: { gross: grossCOGS, taxes: cogsTaxes, net: netCOGS }, profit };
  }

  async getT2Transactions(organizationId, categoryFilter, startDate, endDate) {
    return this.prisma.bankTransaction.findMany({
      where: { organizationId, date: { gte: new Date(startDate), lte: new Date(endDate) }, category: { is: { category: categoryFilter.toUpperCase() } } },
      orderBy: { date: 'asc' }
    });
  }

  async getBankTransactionsWithPagination(organizationId, filters = {}, page = 1, pageSize = 100, sortOptions = {}) {
    const { categoryId, topCategory, type, sourceId, date, search, notes, amountMin, amountMax, unmatchedOnly, noTaxes, unmatchedReceipts, postingType } = filters;
    const where = { organizationId };

    if (topCategory) where.category = { is: { category: topCategory.toUpperCase() } };
    else if (categoryId === null) where.categoryId = null;
    else if (categoryId != null) where.categoryId = categoryId;

    if (type) where.type = type;
    if (sourceId) where.sourceId = sourceId;
    if (postingType) where.postingType = postingType;

    if (date) {
      if (typeof date === 'object' && (date.gte || date.lte)) {
        where.date = {};
        if (date.gte) where.date.gte = date.gte;
        if (date.lte) where.date.lte = date.lte;
      } else {
        const d = new Date(date);
        if (!isNaN(d)) where.date = { equals: d };
      }
    }

    if (search) where.OR = [{ description: { contains: search } }, { receipt: { companyName: { contains: search } } }];
    if (notes) where.notes = { contains: notes };
    if (amountMin || amountMax) where.amount = { ...(amountMin && { gte: amountMin }), ...(amountMax && { lte: amountMax }) };
    if (unmatchedOnly === true || unmatchedOnly === 'true' || unmatchedReceipts === true || unmatchedReceipts === 'true') where.receiptId = null;
    if (noTaxes === true || noTaxes === 'true') where.AND = [...(where.AND || []), { OR: [{ taxes: null }, { taxes: 0 }] }];

    const orderBy = Object.keys(sortOptions).length ? sortOptions : { date: 'desc' };
    const [transactions, totalCount, aggregateResult] = await Promise.all([
      this.prisma.bankTransaction.findMany({
        where,
        include: {
          category: { select: { id: true, code: true, description: true, category: true, statementLine: true } },
          receipt: true,
          source: { select: { id: true, name: true, type: true } }
        },
        orderBy,
        skip: (page - 1) * pageSize,
        take: pageSize
      }),
      this.prisma.bankTransaction.count({ where }),
      this.prisma.bankTransaction.aggregate({ _sum: { amount: true, taxes: true }, where })
    ]);

    return {
      transactions: transactions.map((tx) => {
        const hydrated = hydrateTransactionSupport(tx);
        return {
          ...hydrated,
          postingType: hydrated.postingType || this.classifyTransactionType(hydrated),
        };
      }),
      totalCount,
      totalSum: aggregateResult._sum.amount || 0,
      totalTaxes: aggregateResult._sum.taxes || 0,
    };
  }

  async getAccountIdByCode(code) {
    const cat = await this.prisma.accountingCategory.findUnique({ where: { code } });
    if (!cat) throw new Error(`GL account code not found: ${code}`);
    return cat.id;
  }

  async getTrialBalanceRange(organizationId, fromDate, toDate) {
    const endRows = await this.prisma.$queryRaw`
      SELECT
        a.code,
        a.description,
        a.category,
        a."normalSide",
        SUM(l.debit)  AS debit,
        SUM(l.credit) AS credit
      FROM "JournalLine" l
      JOIN "JournalEntry" e ON e.id = l."entryId"
      JOIN "AccountingCategories" a ON a.id = l."accountId"
      WHERE e."organizationId" = ${organizationId} AND e.date <= ${toDate}
      GROUP BY a.code, a.description, a.category, a."normalSide"
      ORDER BY a.code;
    `;

    const startRows = await this.prisma.$queryRaw`
      SELECT
        a.code,
        a.description,
        a.category,
        a."normalSide",
        SUM(l.debit)  AS debit,
        SUM(l.credit) AS credit
      FROM "JournalLine" l
      JOIN "JournalEntry" e ON e.id = l."entryId"
      JOIN "AccountingCategories" a ON a.id = l."accountId"
      WHERE e."organizationId" = ${organizationId} AND e.date < ${fromDate}
      GROUP BY a.code, a.description, a.category, a."normalSide"
      ORDER BY a.code;
    `;

    return endRows
      .map(endRow => {
        const startRow = startRows.find(r => r.code === endRow.code) || {};
        const normalize = (row) => {
          const d = row.debit || 0;
          const c = row.credit || 0;
          return row.normalSide === 'DEBIT' ? d - c : c - d;
        };
        const diff = normalize(endRow) - normalize(startRow);
        return { code: endRow.code, name: endRow.description, category: endRow.category, debit: diff >= 0 ? diff : 0, credit: diff < 0 ? -diff : 0 };
      })
      .filter(r => r.debit !== 0 || r.credit !== 0);
  }

  async getJournalEntryById(id, organizationId) {
    const entry = await this.prisma.journalEntry.findFirst({ where: { id, organizationId }, include: { lines: { include: { account: true } } } });
    if (!entry) return null;
    return { id: entry.id, date: entry.date, memo: entry.memo, lines: entry.lines.map(l => ({ id: l.id, account: { id: l.account.id, code: l.account.code, description: l.account.description }, description: l.description, debit: l.debit, credit: l.credit })) };
  }

  async importBankTransactions(organizationId, userId, csvBuffer) {
    if (!organizationId || !userId || !csvBuffer) throw new Error('Missing required parameters: organizationId, userId, or csvBuffer');
    const records = parse(csvBuffer, { columns: true, skip_empty_lines: true });
    if (!records || records.length === 0) throw new Error('CSV file is empty or incorrectly formatted.');
    const transactions = records.map((record) => {
      if (!record.Date || !record.Description || !record.Amount) throw new Error('CSV row is missing required fields: Date, Description, or Amount.');
      return { id: uuidv4(), date: new Date(record.Date), description: record.Description, amount: parseFloat(record.Amount), type: parseFloat(record.Amount) >= 0 ? 'income' : 'expense', organizationId, userId };
    });
    const createdTransactions = await this.prisma.bankTransaction.createMany({ data: transactions });
    return { count: createdTransactions.count };
  }

  async getBankTransactions(organizationId, filters = {}) {
    const { categoryId, type, date, search, sourceId } = filters;
    const where = { organizationId, ...(categoryId && { categoryId }), ...(type && { type }), ...(sourceId && { sourceId }), ...(date && { date }), ...(search && { OR: [{ description: { contains: search } }, { receipt: { companyName: { contains: search } } }] }) };
    return this.prisma.bankTransaction.findMany({ where, include: { category: true, receipt: true }, orderBy: { date: 'desc' } });
  }

  async assignCategory(transactionId, categoryId) {
    if (!transactionId || !categoryId) throw new Error('Missing required parameters: transactionId or categoryId');
    return this.prisma.bankTransaction.update({ where: { id: transactionId }, data: { category: { connect: { id: categoryId } } } });
  }

  async getCategories(_organizationId, options = {}) {
    const view = String(options?.view || 'all').toLowerCase();
    const search = String(options?.search || '').trim();

    const where = {};

    if (view === 'categories') {
      where.OR = [
        { isPLAccount: true },
        { category: { in: ['REVENUE', 'OTHER_INCOME', 'EXPENSES', 'EXPENSE', 'OTHER_EXPENSES', 'COST OF GOODS SOLD', 'COGS'] } },
      ];
    }

    if (search) {
      where.AND = [
        ...(where.AND || []),
        {
          OR: [
            { id: { contains: search } },
            { code: { contains: search.toUpperCase() } },
            { description: { contains: search } },
            { category: { contains: search.toUpperCase() } },
            { statementLine: { contains: search } },
          ],
        },
      ];
    }

    return this.prisma.accountingCategory.findMany({
      where,
      orderBy: [{ sortOrder: 'asc' }, { code: 'asc' }, { description: 'asc' }],
    });
  }

  async createCategory(_organizationId, payload = {}) {
    const description = String(payload?.description || '').trim();
    const code = String(payload?.code || '').trim().toUpperCase();
    const category = String(payload?.category || '').trim().toUpperCase();

    if (!description || !code || !category) throw new Error('Missing required fields: description, code and category are all required.');

    return this.prisma.accountingCategory.create({
      data: {
        description,
        code,
        category,
        normalSide: String(payload?.normalSide || 'DEBIT').toUpperCase(),
        statementLine: payload?.statementLine ? String(payload.statementLine).trim() : null,
        sortOrder: Number.isFinite(Number(payload?.sortOrder)) ? Number(payload.sortOrder) : 500,
        isPLAccount: deriveIsPLAccount(payload),
      },
    });
  }

  async updateCategory(_organizationId, categoryId, payload = {}) {
    if (!categoryId) throw new Error('Category id is required.');
    const existing = await this.prisma.accountingCategory.findUnique({ where: { id: categoryId } });
    if (!existing) throw new Error('Account not found.');

    const nextCategory = String(payload?.category || existing.category || '').trim().toUpperCase();

    return this.prisma.accountingCategory.update({
      where: { id: categoryId },
      data: {
        description: payload?.description != null ? String(payload.description).trim() : existing.description,
        code: payload?.code != null ? String(payload.code).trim().toUpperCase() : existing.code,
        category: nextCategory || existing.category,
        normalSide: payload?.normalSide != null ? String(payload.normalSide).trim().toUpperCase() : existing.normalSide,
        statementLine: payload?.statementLine !== undefined
          ? (payload.statementLine ? String(payload.statementLine).trim() : null)
          : existing.statementLine,
        sortOrder: payload?.sortOrder !== undefined && Number.isFinite(Number(payload.sortOrder))
          ? Number(payload.sortOrder)
          : existing.sortOrder,
        isPLAccount: typeof payload?.isPLAccount === 'boolean' ? payload.isPLAccount : deriveIsPLAccount({ category: nextCategory || existing.category, isPLAccount: existing.isPLAccount }),
      },
    });
  }

  async deleteCategory(_organizationId, categoryId) {
    if (!categoryId) throw new Error('Category id is required.');

    const [transactionCount, journalLineCount, ruleCount] = await Promise.all([
      this.prisma.bankTransaction.count({ where: { categoryId } }),
      this.prisma.journalLine.count({ where: { accountId: categoryId } }),
      this.prisma.accountingRule.count({ where: { categoryId } }).catch(() => 0),
    ]);

    if (transactionCount || journalLineCount || ruleCount) {
      throw new Error('This account is in use and cannot be deleted yet. Reassign linked transactions, journal lines, and rules first.');
    }

    await this.prisma.accountingCategory.delete({ where: { id: categoryId } });
    return true;
  }


  async createCategoriesBatch(_organizationId, payload = []) {
    const items = Array.isArray(payload) ? payload : [];
    if (!items.length) throw new Error('At least one category payload is required.');
    return this.prisma.$transaction(items.map((item) => this.prisma.accountingCategory.create({
      data: {
        description: String(item?.description || '').trim(),
        code: String(item?.code || '').trim().toUpperCase(),
        category: String(item?.category || '').trim().toUpperCase(),
        normalSide: String(item?.normalSide || 'DEBIT').trim().toUpperCase(),
        statementLine: item?.statementLine ? String(item.statementLine).trim() : null,
        sortOrder: Number.isFinite(Number(item?.sortOrder)) ? Number(item.sortOrder) : 500,
        isPLAccount: typeof item?.isPLAccount === 'boolean' ? item.isPLAccount : deriveIsPLAccount(item),
      },
    })));
  }

  async deleteAllCategories(_organizationId) {
    const categories = await this.prisma.accountingCategory.findMany({ select: { id: true } });
    if (!categories.length) return { deletedCount: 0, blockedCount: 0 };
    const ids = categories.map((item) => item.id);
    const [usedByTransactions, usedByJournalLines, usedByRules] = await Promise.all([
      this.prisma.bankTransaction.findMany({ where: { categoryId: { in: ids } }, select: { categoryId: true } }),
      this.prisma.journalLine.findMany({ where: { accountId: { in: ids } }, select: { accountId: true } }),
      this.prisma.accountingRule.findMany({ where: { categoryId: { in: ids } }, select: { categoryId: true } }).catch(() => []),
    ]);
    const blocked = new Set([
      ...usedByTransactions.map((item) => item.categoryId),
      ...usedByJournalLines.map((item) => item.accountId),
      ...usedByRules.map((item) => item.categoryId),
    ].filter(Boolean));
    const deletableIds = ids.filter((id) => !blocked.has(id));
    if (!deletableIds.length && blocked.size) {
      throw new Error('No categories could be deleted because all categories are referenced by transactions, journal lines, or rules.');
    }
    const result = deletableIds.length
      ? await this.prisma.accountingCategory.deleteMany({ where: { id: { in: deletableIds } } })
      : { count: 0 };
    return { deletedCount: result.count || 0, blockedCount: blocked.size, blockedIds: Array.from(blocked) };
  }

  async getRevenue(organizationId) {
    const income = await this.prisma.bankTransaction.aggregate({ _sum: { amount: true }, where: { organizationId, type: 'income' } });
    return { totalRevenue: income._sum.amount || 0 };
  }

  async getExpenses(organizationId) {
    const expenses = await this.prisma.bankTransaction.aggregate({ _sum: { amount: true }, where: { organizationId, type: 'expense' } });
    return { totalExpenses: Math.abs(expenses._sum.amount) || 0 };
  }

  async getProfitAndLoss(organizationId) {
    const [revenueData, expensesData] = await Promise.all([this.getRevenue(organizationId), this.getExpenses(organizationId)]);
    return { revenue: revenueData.totalRevenue, expenses: expensesData.totalExpenses, profit: revenueData.totalRevenue - expensesData.totalExpenses };
  }

  async getTaxInfo(organizationId) {
    const expenses = await this.prisma.bankTransaction.aggregate({ _sum: { amount: true }, where: { organizationId, type: 'expense' } });
    const totalExpenses = Math.abs(expenses._sum.amount || 0);
    const totalTax = totalExpenses * 0.15;
    return { totalTax: totalTax.toFixed(2), breakdown: [{ type: 'Federal Tax', amount: (totalTax * 0.6).toFixed(2) }, { type: 'Provincial Tax', amount: (totalTax * 0.4).toFixed(2) }] };
  }

  async updateTaxes(transactionId, taxes) {
    const transaction = await this.prisma.bankTransaction.findUnique({ where: { id: transactionId } });
    if (!transaction) throw new Error('Transaction not found.');
    await this.prisma.bankTransaction.update({ where: { id: transactionId }, data: { taxes: normalizeStoredTaxAmount(taxes) } });
  }

  async bulkUpdateHST(sqlQuery) {
    await this.prisma.$transaction(async (prisma) => {
      const transactionsToUpdate = await prisma.$queryRawUnsafe(`SELECT * FROM "BankTransaction" WHERE ${sqlQuery}`);
      if (!transactionsToUpdate || transactionsToUpdate.length === 0) throw new Error('No transactions matched the provided criteria.');
      await prisma.$executeRawUnsafe(sqlQuery);
    });
  }

  async saveFormula(name, sql, organizationId, createdBy) {
    return this.prisma.formula.create({ data: { id: uuidv4(), name: name.trim(), sql: sql.trim(), organizationId, createdBy } });
  }

  async getFormulas(organizationId) {
    return this.prisma.bankFormula.findMany({ where: { organizationId }, orderBy: { createdAt: 'desc' } });
  }

  async syncJournalWithBankTx(bankTxId, userId) {
    const tx = await this.prisma.bankTransaction.findUnique({ where: { id: bankTxId }, include: { category: true, source: true, journalEntry: { include: { lines: true } } } });
    if (!tx) return;

    const normalizedTx = { ...tx, taxes: normalizeStoredTaxAmount(tx.taxes) };
    const lines = await this.buildPreferredLinesForTransaction(normalizedTx);

    if (!tx.journalEntry) {
      await this.prisma.journalEntry.create({ data: { date: tx.date, memo: tx.description, source: 'BANK_IMPORT', organizationId: tx.organizationId, bankTxId: tx.id, createdBy: userId, lines: { create: lines } } });
    } else {
      await this.prisma.$transaction([
        this.prisma.journalLine.deleteMany({ where: { entryId: tx.journalEntry.id } }),
        this.prisma.journalLine.createMany({ data: lines.map(l => ({ ...l, entryId: tx.journalEntry.id })) }),
        this.prisma.journalEntry.update({ where: { id: tx.journalEntry.id }, data: { date: tx.date, memo: tx.description } })
      ]);
    }
  }

  async getFormulaPreview(formulaId, organizationId) {
    const formula = await this.prisma.formula.findUnique({ where: { id: formulaId } });
    if (!formula) throw new Error('Formula not found.');
    if (formula.organizationId !== organizationId) throw new Error('Unauthorized to access this formula.');
    return this.prisma.$queryRawUnsafe(formula.sql);
  }

  async applyFormula(formulaId, organizationId) {
    const formula = await this.prisma.formula.findUnique({ where: { id: formulaId } });
    if (!formula) throw new Error('Formula not found.');
    if (formula.organizationId !== organizationId) throw new Error('Unauthorized to apply this formula.');
    await this.bulkUpdateHST(formula.sql);
  }

  async getReviewQueue(organizationId, { limit = 25 } = {}) {
    const transactions = await this.prisma.bankTransaction.findMany({
      where: {
        organizationId,
        notes: { contains: AI_PROPOSAL_MARKER },
      },
      include: {
        category: { select: { id: true, code: true, description: true, statementLine: true } },
        receipt: true,
        source: { select: { id: true, name: true, type: true } },
        journalEntry: true,
      },
      orderBy: { date: 'desc' },
      take: Number(limit || 25),
    });

    const items = transactions
      .map((transaction) => {
        const hydrated = hydrateTransactionSupport(transaction);
        const proposal = hydrated.aiProposal;
        if (!proposal) return null;
        if (proposal.status && proposal.status !== 'PROPOSED') return null;

        return {
          transactionId: transaction.id,
          transaction: {
            ...hydrated,
            postingType: proposal?.likelyTransactionType || hydrated.postingType || this.classifyTransactionType(hydrated),
          },
          receiptEvidence: transaction.receipt
            ? {
                id: transaction.receipt.id,
                companyName: transaction.receipt.companyName,
                total: transaction.receipt.total,
                taxes: transaction.receipt.hst ?? transaction.receipt.taxes ?? null,
                date: transaction.receipt.date,
              }
            : null,
          proposal: {
            ...(proposal || {}),
            status: proposal?.status || 'PROPOSED',
            likelyAccount: decorateAccount(proposal?.likelyAccount || null),
            alternativeAccounts: Array.isArray(proposal?.alternativeAccounts)
              ? proposal?.alternativeAccounts.map((item) => ({ ...item, label: item?.label || formatAccountLabel(item) }))
              : [],
            likelyJournalLines: normalizeProposalJournalLines(proposal, hydrated),
            batchPreview: proposal?.batchPreview || null,
          },
          hasJournalEntry: Boolean(transaction.journalEntry),
        };
      })
      .filter(Boolean);

    return items;
  }

  async generateReviewQueueProposals(organizationId, transactionIds = [], authContext = {}) {
    const normalizedIds = Array.from(
      new Set(
        (Array.isArray(transactionIds) ? transactionIds : [])
          .map((value) => Number(value))
          .filter((value) => Number.isFinite(value))
      )
    );

    if (!normalizedIds.length) {
      throw new Error('transactionIds must contain at least one valid transaction id.');
    }

    const transactions = await this.prisma.bankTransaction.findMany({
      where: {
        organizationId,
        id: { in: normalizedIds },
      },
      include: {
        category: { select: { id: true, code: true, description: true, statementLine: true } },
        receipt: true,
        source: { select: { id: true, name: true, type: true } },
        journalEntry: true,
      },
      orderBy: { date: 'desc' },
    });

    const items = [];
    for (const transaction of transactions) {
      const hydrated = hydrateTransactionSupport(transaction);

      const proposal = await AccountingLLMService.generateTransactionProposal({
        transaction: {
          ...hydrated,
          receiptHints: hydrated.receiptHints,
          postingType: hydrated.postingType || this.classifyTransactionType(hydrated),
        },
        organizationId,
        userId: authContext.userId,
        sessionId: authContext.sessionId,
      });

      const batchPreview = await this.buildBatchProposalPreview(organizationId, transaction, proposal);
      const proposedAccountId = proposal?.likelyAccount?.id || transaction.categoryId || null;

      const savedTransaction = await this.prisma.bankTransaction.update({
        where: { id: transaction.id },
        data: {
          ...(proposedAccountId ? { categoryId: proposedAccountId } : {}),
          notes: mergeAIProposalIntoNotes(transaction.notes, {
            ...proposal,
            likelyAccount: decorateAccount(proposal?.likelyAccount || null),
            alternativeAccounts: Array.isArray(proposal?.alternativeAccounts)
              ? proposal.alternativeAccounts.map((item) => ({ ...item, label: item?.label || formatAccountLabel(item) }))
              : [],
            status: 'PROPOSED',
            generatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
            generatedBy: authContext.userId || null,
            likelyJournalLines: normalizeProposalJournalLines(proposal, transaction),
            batchPreview,
          }),
        },
        include: {
          category: { select: { id: true, code: true, description: true, statementLine: true } },
          receipt: true,
          source: { select: { id: true, name: true, type: true } },
          journalEntry: true,
        },
      });

      const nextHydrated = hydrateTransactionSupport(savedTransaction);
      items.push({
        transactionId: savedTransaction.id,
        transaction: {
          ...nextHydrated,
          postingType: proposal?.likelyTransactionType || nextHydrated.postingType || this.classifyTransactionType(nextHydrated),
        },
        receiptEvidence: savedTransaction.receipt
          ? {
              id: savedTransaction.receipt.id,
              companyName: savedTransaction.receipt.companyName,
              total: savedTransaction.receipt.total,
              taxes: savedTransaction.receipt.hst ?? savedTransaction.receipt.taxes ?? null,
              date: savedTransaction.receipt.date,
            }
          : null,
        proposal: {
          ...(proposal || {}),
          status: 'PROPOSED',
          likelyAccount: decorateAccount(proposal?.likelyAccount || null),
          alternativeAccounts: Array.isArray(proposal?.alternativeAccounts)
            ? proposal.alternativeAccounts.map((item) => ({ ...item, label: item?.label || formatAccountLabel(item) }))
            : [],
          likelyJournalLines: normalizeProposalJournalLines(proposal, nextHydrated),
          batchPreview,
        },
        hasJournalEntry: Boolean(savedTransaction.journalEntry),
      });
    }

    return items;
  }

  async approveReviewQueueItem(organizationId, transactionId, payload = {}, authContext = {}) {
    const transaction = await this.prisma.bankTransaction.findFirst({
      where: { id: Number(transactionId), organizationId },
      include: { category: true, receipt: true, source: true, journalEntry: true },
    });
    if (!transaction) throw new Error('Transaction not found.');

    const storedProposal = parseAIProposalFromNotes(transaction.notes) || {};
    const chosenTransactionType = payload.transactionType || storedProposal.likelyTransactionType || this.classifyTransactionType(transaction);
    const chosenTaxTreatment = payload.taxTreatment || storedProposal.likelyTaxTreatment || 'NO_TAX';

    let chosenAccount = null;
    if (payload.accountId) {
      chosenAccount = await this.prisma.accountingCategory.findUnique({ where: { id: payload.accountId } });
    } else if (payload.accountCode || storedProposal?.likelyAccount?.code) {
      chosenAccount = await this.prisma.accountingCategory.findUnique({ where: { code: payload.accountCode || storedProposal.likelyAccount.code } });
    } else if (transaction.categoryId) {
      chosenAccount = transaction.category;
    }

    const chosenJournalLines = Array.isArray(payload.journalLines) && payload.journalLines.length
      ? normalizeRuleJournalTemplateLines(payload.journalLines, { ...transaction, category: chosenAccount || transaction.category })
      : normalizeProposalJournalLines({ ...storedProposal, likelyAccount: chosenAccount || storedProposal?.likelyAccount || null }, { ...transaction, category: chosenAccount || transaction.category });

    const nextProposal = {
      ...storedProposal,
      likelyTransactionType: chosenTransactionType,
      likelyTaxTreatment: chosenTaxTreatment,
      likelyAccount: chosenAccount ? { id: chosenAccount.id, code: chosenAccount.code, description: chosenAccount.description, label: formatAccountLabel(chosenAccount) } : null,
      status: 'APPROVED',
      approvedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
      approvedBy: authContext.userId || null,
      reviewRequired: false,
      confidence: Number(storedProposal.confidence || 0.95),
      likelyJournalLines: chosenJournalLines,
      batchPreview: storedProposal?.batchPreview || null,
    };

    const updated = await this.prisma.bankTransaction.update({
      where: { id: transaction.id },
      data: {
        postingType: chosenTransactionType || null,
        ...(chosenAccount ? { categoryId: chosenAccount.id } : {}),
        notes: mergeAIProposalIntoNotes(transaction.notes, nextProposal),
      },
      include: { category: true, receipt: true, source: true },
    });

    await AccountingLLMService.learnFromApproval({
      organizationId,
      transaction: hydrateTransactionSupport(updated),
      chosenAccount,
      chosenTransactionType,
      chosenTaxTreatment,
      userId: authContext.userId,
    });

    await this.syncJournalWithBankTx(updated.id, authContext.userId);
    return hydrateTransactionSupport(updated);
  }

  async rejectReviewQueueItem(organizationId, transactionId, payload = {}) {
    const transaction = await this.prisma.bankTransaction.findFirst({ where: { id: Number(transactionId), organizationId } });
    if (!transaction) throw new Error('Transaction not found.');
    const storedProposal = parseAIProposalFromNotes(transaction.notes) || {};
    const updated = await this.prisma.bankTransaction.update({
      where: { id: transaction.id },
      data: {
        notes: mergeAIProposalIntoNotes(transaction.notes, {
          ...storedProposal,
          status: 'REJECTED',
          rejectedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
          rejectionReason: payload.reason || null,
          reviewRequired: true,
        }),
      },
      include: { category: true, receipt: true, source: true },
    });
    return hydrateTransactionSupport(updated);
  }

  getReceiptHintsFromNotes(notes) {
    return parseReceiptHintsFromNotes(notes);
  }

  getAIProposalFromNotes(notes) {
    return parseAIProposalFromNotes(notes);
  }

  mergeReceiptHintsIntoNotes(notes, hints = {}) {
    return mergeReceiptHintsIntoNotes(notes, hints);
  }

  mergeAIProposalIntoNotes(notes, proposal = {}) {
    return mergeAIProposalIntoNotes(notes, proposal);
  }

  stripReceiptHintsFromNotes(notes) {
    return stripReceiptHintsFromNotes(notes);
  }

  stripAIProposalFromNotes(notes) {
    return stripAIProposalFromNotes(notes);
  }
}

export default AccountingService;

```

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
FILE: server/src/services/accounting/services/ImportService.js
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
```js
// Full path: /home/luanngo/boss-dev/server/src/services/accounting/services/ImportService.js
// --- File: services/accounting/services/ImportService.js ---
import fs from 'fs';
import path from 'path';
import { promisify } from 'util';
import { execFile } from 'child_process';
import { v4 as uuidv4 } from 'uuid';
import { llmClient } from '#integrations/ai/llm.js';
import { BankTransactionResponseSchema } from '../schemas/BankTransactionResponseSchema.js';
import { PdfImportSchema } from '../schemas/PdfImportSchema.js';
import prisma from '#shared/database/prismaClient.js';
import readline from 'readline';
import AccountingReceiptAiService from './AccountingReceiptAiService.js';
import ReceiptsManager from '#services/receipt/services/ReceiptsManager.js';

const execFileAsync = promisify(execFile);

function normalizeDescription(value) {
  return String(value || '').replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim();
}

function normalizeOptionalId(value) {
  if (value === null || value === undefined) return null;
  const normalized = String(value).trim();
  return normalized || null;
}

function normalizeOptionalNumber(value, { absolute = false } = {}) {
  if (value === null || value === undefined || value === '') return null;
  const numericValue = Number(value);
  if (!Number.isFinite(numericValue)) return null;
  return absolute ? Math.abs(Number(numericValue.toFixed(2))) : Number(numericValue.toFixed(2));
}

function inferNormalizedTypeAndAmount(transaction) {
  const rawAmount = Number(transaction.amount ?? 0);
  const normalizedType = String(transaction.type || '').toLowerCase();

  if (normalizedType === 'income') return { type: 'income', amount: Math.abs(rawAmount) };
  if (normalizedType === 'expense') return { type: 'expense', amount: -Math.abs(rawAmount) };
  if (rawAmount < 0) return { type: 'expense', amount: -Math.abs(rawAmount) };
  return { type: 'income', amount: Math.abs(rawAmount) };
}

function normalizeInstructionText(value) {
  return String(value || '').toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim();
}

function isCreditCardLikeSource(source) {
  const sourceType = String(source?.type || '').toUpperCase();
  const sourceName = String(source?.name || '').toLowerCase();

  return (
    sourceType === 'CREDIT_CARD' ||
    /\b(credit|card|visa|mastercard|amex|american express|tdcc)\b/i.test(sourceName)
  );
}

function looksLikeCreditCardCredit(transaction) {
  const description = normalizeDescription(transaction?.description).toLowerCase();
  const postingType = String(transaction?.postingType || '').toLowerCase();

  return /\b(payment|refund|credit|reversal|cashback|cash back|adjustment)\b/.test(description) ||
    /\b(payment|refund|credit)\b/.test(postingType);
}

function hasReceiptImportHints(transaction) {
  return /\[\[accountingReceiptHints\]\][\s\S]*?\[\[\/accountingReceiptHints\]\]/i.test(
    String(transaction?.notes || '')
  );
}

class ImportService {
  constructor() {
    this.prisma = prisma;
  }

  getPythonBin() {
    const configuredBin = process.env.ACCOUNTING_IMPORT_PYTHON_BIN || process.env.PYTHON_BIN;
    if (configuredBin && configuredBin.trim()) {
      return configuredBin.trim();
    }

    return process.platform === 'win32' ? 'python' : 'python3';
  }

  ensureDirectories(organizationId) {
    const uploadDir = path.join(process.cwd(), 'uploads', organizationId, 'imports');
    const scriptsDir = path.join(uploadDir, 'scripts');

    [uploadDir, scriptsDir].forEach((dir) => {
      if (!fs.existsSync(dir)) {
        fs.mkdirSync(dir, { recursive: true });
      }
    });

    return { uploadDir, scriptsDir };
  }

  writePythonScript(scriptPath, content) {
    fs.writeFileSync(scriptPath, content, 'utf-8');
    console.log(`Saved Python script at: ${scriptPath}`);
  }

  cleanupFiles(paths) {
    paths.forEach((filePath) => {
      if (filePath && fs.existsSync(filePath)) {
        fs.unlinkSync(filePath);
        console.log(`Deleted file: ${filePath}`);
      }
    });
  }

  async executePythonScript(scriptPath, inputPath, outputPath) {
    const pythonBin = this.getPythonBin();

    try {
      const { stdout, stderr } = await execFileAsync(pythonBin, [scriptPath, inputPath, outputPath], {
        maxBuffer: 10 * 1024 * 1024,
      });
      return { stdout, stderr };
    } catch (execError) {
      const stderr =
        execError.code === 'ENOENT'
          ? `Python interpreter not found: ${pythonBin}. Set ACCOUNTING_IMPORT_PYTHON_BIN to a valid Python 3 executable.`
          : execError.stderr || execError.message || '';

      throw {
        ...execError,
        stdout: execError.stdout || '',
        stderr,
      };
    }
  }

  validateTransactionsJson(transactionsJson) {
    if (!Array.isArray(transactionsJson)) {
      throw new Error('Output JSON is not an array.');
    }

    for (const tx of transactionsJson) {
      if (!tx || typeof tx !== 'object') {
        throw new Error('Each parsed transaction must be an object.');
      }

      if (!tx.date || !tx.description || tx.amount === undefined || tx.amount === null) {
        throw new Error(`Transaction is missing required fields: ${JSON.stringify(tx)}`);
      }

      const parsedDate = new Date(tx.date);
      if (Number.isNaN(parsedDate.getTime())) {
        throw new Error(`Invalid transaction date: ${JSON.stringify(tx)}`);
      }

      if (Number.isNaN(Number(tx.amount))) {
        throw new Error(`Invalid transaction amount: ${JSON.stringify(tx)}`);
      }

      if (tx.taxes !== undefined && tx.taxes !== null && tx.taxes !== '' && Number.isNaN(Number(tx.taxes))) {
        throw new Error(`Invalid transaction taxes: ${JSON.stringify(tx)}`);
      }

      if (tx.balance !== undefined && tx.balance !== null && tx.balance !== '' && Number.isNaN(Number(tx.balance))) {
        throw new Error(`Invalid transaction balance: ${JSON.stringify(tx)}`);
      }
    }
  }

  normalizeTransaction(tx) {
    const rawAmount = Number(tx.amount ?? 0);
    let type = String(tx.type || '').toLowerCase();

    if (type !== 'income' && type !== 'expense') {
      type = rawAmount < 0 ? 'expense' : 'income';
    }

    const normalizedAmount = type === 'income' ? Math.abs(rawAmount) : -Math.abs(rawAmount);

    return {
      ...tx,
      description: String(tx.description || '').replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim(),
      amount: normalizedAmount,
      type,
      taxes:
        tx.taxes === null || tx.taxes === undefined || tx.taxes === ''
          ? null
          : Math.abs(Number(tx.taxes)),
      balance:
        tx.balance === null || tx.balance === undefined || tx.balance === ''
          ? null
          : Number(tx.balance),
    };
  }

  applyRevisionInstructions({ transactions, instructions = '', source = null }) {
    const normalizedInstructions = normalizeInstructionText(instructions);
    const wantsExpenseAmountsNegative =
      /\bexpense(s)?\b/.test(normalizedInstructions) &&
      /\bnegative\b/.test(normalizedInstructions);

    if (!wantsExpenseAmountsNegative) {
      return transactions;
    }

    const creditCardSource = isCreditCardLikeSource(source);

    return transactions.map((transaction) => {
      const currentType = String(transaction.type || '').toLowerCase();
      const numericAmount = Number(transaction.amount);
      const shouldTreatAsExpense =
        currentType === 'expense' ||
        numericAmount < 0 ||
        (creditCardSource && currentType !== 'income') ||
        (creditCardSource && !looksLikeCreditCardCredit(transaction));

      if (!Number.isFinite(numericAmount) || !shouldTreatAsExpense) {
        return transaction;
      }

      return {
        ...transaction,
        amount: -Math.abs(numericAmount),
        type: 'expense',
      };
    });
  }

  parseImportTransactions(importRecord) {
    try {
      const parsed = JSON.parse(importRecord?.transactions || '[]');
      return Array.isArray(parsed) ? parsed : [];
    } catch (error) {
      console.warn('Failed to parse stored import transactions:', error);
      return [];
    }
  }

  buildDuplicateKey(tx) {
    const txDate = new Date(tx.date);
    const dateKey = Number.isNaN(txDate.getTime()) ? 'invalid-date' : txDate.toISOString().slice(0, 10);
    const descriptionKey = normalizeDescription(tx.description).toLowerCase();
    const amountKey = Number(Number(tx.amount || 0)).toFixed(2);
    const typeKey = String(tx.type || '').toLowerCase();
    return `${dateKey}|${descriptionKey}|${amountKey}|${typeKey}`;
  }

  normalizeImportedTransaction(tx, { organizationId, userId, sourceId }) {
    const parsedDate = new Date(tx.date);
    if (Number.isNaN(parsedDate.getTime())) {
      throw new Error(`Invalid date format for transaction: ${JSON.stringify(tx)}`);
    }

    const { type, amount } = inferNormalizedTypeAndAmount(tx);

    return {
      date: parsedDate.toISOString(),
      description: normalizeDescription(tx.description),
      amount,
      taxes: normalizeOptionalNumber(tx.taxes, { absolute: true }),
      balance: normalizeOptionalNumber(tx.balance),
      type,
      organizationId,
      userId,
      sourceId,
      categoryId: normalizeOptionalId(tx.categoryId),
      receiptId: normalizeOptionalId(tx.receiptId),
      postingType: normalizeOptionalId(tx.postingType),
      receiptRequired:
        tx.receiptRequired === true || tx.receiptRequired === false
          ? tx.receiptRequired
          : undefined,
      notes: typeof tx.notes === 'string' && tx.notes.trim() ? tx.notes.trim() : null,
      receiptText: typeof tx.receiptText === 'string' ? tx.receiptText : null,
      receiptTotal: normalizeOptionalNumber(tx.receiptTotal, { absolute: true }),
      receiptSubtotal: normalizeOptionalNumber(tx.receiptSubtotal, { absolute: true }),
      merchantName: typeof tx.merchantName === 'string' ? tx.merchantName.trim() : null,
      approvedForImport: tx.approvedForImport !== false,
      importRowIndex: Number.isInteger(tx.importRowIndex) ? tx.importRowIndex : null,
    };
  }

  cleanPreviewTransaction(tx) {
    const { type, amount } = inferNormalizedTypeAndAmount(tx);

    return {
      ...tx,
      description: normalizeDescription(tx.description),
      date: tx.date,
      amount: tx.amount === '' || tx.amount === null || tx.amount === undefined ? null : amount,
      taxes: normalizeOptionalNumber(tx.taxes, { absolute: true }),
      balance: normalizeOptionalNumber(tx.balance),
      type,
```
