```js
      categoryId: normalizeOptionalId(tx.categoryId),
      receiptId: normalizeOptionalId(tx.receiptId),
      approvedForImport: tx.approvedForImport !== false,
    };
  }

  async fetchCategoryReferenceMap(categoryReferences = []) {
    if (!categoryReferences.length) {
      return {
        validCategoryIds: new Set(),
        categoryCodeToId: new Map(),
      };
    }

    const categories = await this.prisma.accountingCategory.findMany({
      select: { id: true, code: true },
    });

    const validCategoryIds = new Set(categories.map((category) => category.id));
    const categoryCodeToId = new Map(
      categories
        .filter((category) => category.code)
        .map((category) => [String(category.code).trim(), category.id])
    );

    return { validCategoryIds, categoryCodeToId };
  }

  async fetchValidReceiptIds({ organizationId, receiptIds }) {
    if (!receiptIds.length) return new Set();

    const rows = await this.prisma.receipt.findMany({
      where: {
        organizationId,
        id: { in: receiptIds },
      },
      select: { id: true },
    });

    return new Set(rows.map((row) => row.id));
  }

  async sanitizeReferencedIdsForInsert({ organizationId, transactions }) {
    const categoryReferences = Array.from(
      new Set(
        transactions.flatMap((tx) => [
          normalizeOptionalId(tx.categoryId),
          normalizeOptionalId(tx.aiSuggestedCategoryId),
          tx.aiSuggestedCategoryCode ? `CODE:${String(tx.aiSuggestedCategoryCode).trim()}` : null,
        ]).filter(Boolean)
      )
    );

    const receiptIds = Array.from(
      new Set(transactions.map((tx) => normalizeOptionalId(tx.receiptId)).filter(Boolean))
    );

    const [{ validCategoryIds, categoryCodeToId }, validReceiptIds] = await Promise.all([
      this.fetchCategoryReferenceMap(categoryReferences),
      this.fetchValidReceiptIds({ organizationId, receiptIds }),
    ]);

    const invalidCategoryIds = [];
    const invalidReceiptIds = [];

    const sanitizedTransactions = transactions.map((tx) => {
      let categoryId = normalizeOptionalId(tx.categoryId);
      const suggestedCategoryId = normalizeOptionalId(tx.aiSuggestedCategoryId);

      if (!categoryId && suggestedCategoryId && validCategoryIds.has(suggestedCategoryId)) {
        categoryId = suggestedCategoryId;
      }

      if (!categoryId && tx.aiSuggestedCategoryCode) {
        categoryId = categoryCodeToId.get(String(tx.aiSuggestedCategoryCode).trim()) || null;
      }

      if (categoryId && !validCategoryIds.has(categoryId)) {
        invalidCategoryIds.push(categoryId);
        categoryId = null;
      }

      let receiptId = normalizeOptionalId(tx.receiptId);
      if (receiptId && !validReceiptIds.has(receiptId)) {
        invalidReceiptIds.push(receiptId);
        receiptId = null;
      }

      return {
        ...tx,
        categoryId,
        receiptId,
      };
    });

    return {
      sanitizedTransactions,
      invalidCategoryIds: Array.from(new Set(invalidCategoryIds)),
      invalidReceiptIds: Array.from(new Set(invalidReceiptIds)),
    };
  }

  async enrichTransactionsWithReceiptAi({ organizationId, transactions, force = false }) {
    if (!force && transactions.every((transaction) => hasReceiptImportHints(transaction))) {
      return transactions;
    }

    const receiptIds = Array.from(new Set(transactions.map((tx) => tx.receiptId).filter(Boolean)));
    const receipts = receiptIds.length
      ? await this.prisma.receipt.findMany({
          where: {
            organizationId,
            id: { in: receiptIds },
          },
          select: {
            id: true,
            companyName: true,
            total: true,
            hst: true,
            text: true,
          },
        })
      : [];

    const receiptMap = new Map(receipts.map((receipt) => [receipt.id, receipt]));

    return Promise.all(
      transactions.map((transaction) => {
        if (!force && hasReceiptImportHints(transaction)) return transaction;

        return AccountingReceiptAiService.enrichImportedTransaction({
          organizationId,
          transaction,
          receipt: transaction.receiptId ? receiptMap.get(transaction.receiptId) || null : null,
        });
      })
    );
  }

  async validateImportTransactions({ organizationId, importRecord, transactions }) {
    const rows = transactions.map((transaction, index) => {
      const parsedDate = new Date(transaction.date);
      const amount = Number(transaction.amount);
      const issues = [];
      const warnings = [];

      if (!transaction.description || !normalizeDescription(transaction.description)) {
        issues.push({ code: 'missing_description', message: 'Description is required.' });
      }

      if (!transaction.date || Number.isNaN(parsedDate.getTime())) {
        issues.push({ code: 'invalid_date', message: 'Date is missing or invalid.' });
      }

      if (transaction.amount === null || transaction.amount === undefined || !Number.isFinite(amount)) {
        issues.push({ code: 'invalid_amount', message: 'Amount is missing or invalid.' });
      }

      if (transaction.approvedForImport === false) {
        warnings.push({ code: 'not_approved', message: 'Row is not approved for import.' });
      }

      if (transaction.aiNeedsReview) {
        warnings.push({ code: 'ai_review', message: 'AI marked this row for review.' });
      }

      return {
        index,
        transaction,
        parsedDate,
        amount,
        duplicateKey: issues.length ? null : this.buildDuplicateKey(transaction),
        issues,
        warnings,
      };
    });

    if (!importRecord.sourceId) {
      rows.forEach((row) => {
        row.issues.push({ code: 'missing_source', message: 'Import source is missing.' });
      });
    }

    const categoryReferences = Array.from(
      new Set(
        rows.flatMap(({ transaction }) => [
          normalizeOptionalId(transaction.categoryId),
          normalizeOptionalId(transaction.aiSuggestedCategoryId),
          transaction.aiSuggestedCategoryCode ? `CODE:${String(transaction.aiSuggestedCategoryCode).trim()}` : null,
        ]).filter(Boolean)
      )
    );

    const receiptIds = Array.from(
      new Set(rows.map(({ transaction }) => normalizeOptionalId(transaction.receiptId)).filter(Boolean))
    );

    const [{ validCategoryIds, categoryCodeToId }, validReceiptIds] = await Promise.all([
      this.fetchCategoryReferenceMap(categoryReferences),
      this.fetchValidReceiptIds({ organizationId, receiptIds }),
    ]);

    rows.forEach((row) => {
      const categoryId = normalizeOptionalId(row.transaction.categoryId);
      const suggestedCategoryId = normalizeOptionalId(row.transaction.aiSuggestedCategoryId);
      const suggestedCategoryCode = row.transaction.aiSuggestedCategoryCode
        ? String(row.transaction.aiSuggestedCategoryCode).trim()
        : null;
      const receiptId = normalizeOptionalId(row.transaction.receiptId);

      if (categoryId && !validCategoryIds.has(categoryId)) {
        row.warnings.push({ code: 'invalid_category', message: 'Category will be cleared during import.' });
      }

      if (!categoryId && suggestedCategoryId && !validCategoryIds.has(suggestedCategoryId)) {
        row.warnings.push({ code: 'invalid_ai_category', message: 'AI category ID is not valid.' });
      }

      if (!categoryId && !suggestedCategoryId && suggestedCategoryCode && !categoryCodeToId.has(suggestedCategoryCode)) {
        row.warnings.push({ code: 'unknown_category_code', message: 'AI category code is not in the chart.' });
      }

      if (receiptId && !validReceiptIds.has(receiptId)) {
        row.warnings.push({ code: 'invalid_receipt', message: 'Receipt link will be cleared during import.' });
      }
    });

    const duplicateKeys = new Map();
    rows.forEach((row) => {
      if (!row.duplicateKey) return;
      const indexes = duplicateKeys.get(row.duplicateKey) || [];
      indexes.push(row.index);
      duplicateKeys.set(row.duplicateKey, indexes);
    });

    duplicateKeys.forEach((indexes) => {
      if (indexes.length < 2) return;
      indexes.forEach((index) => {
        rows[index].warnings.push({
          code: 'duplicate_in_import',
          message: `Duplicate of row(s) ${indexes.filter((value) => value !== index).map((value) => value + 1).join(', ')} in this import.`,
        });
      });
    });

    const validDates = rows
      .map((row) => row.parsedDate)
      .filter((date) => date && !Number.isNaN(date.getTime()));

    let existingDuplicateMap = new Map();
    if (validDates.length) {
      const minDate = new Date(Math.min(...validDates.map((date) => date.getTime())));
      const maxDate = new Date(Math.max(...validDates.map((date) => date.getTime())));
      minDate.setUTCHours(0, 0, 0, 0);
      maxDate.setUTCHours(23, 59, 59, 999);

      const existingTransactions = await this.prisma.bankTransaction.findMany({
        where: {
          organizationId,
          date: { gte: minDate, lte: maxDate },
        },
        select: {
          id: true,
          date: true,
          description: true,
          amount: true,
          type: true,
          sourceId: true,
        },
      });

      existingDuplicateMap = existingTransactions.reduce((map, transaction) => {
        const key = this.buildDuplicateKey(transaction);
        const matches = map.get(key) || [];
        matches.push(transaction);
        map.set(key, matches);
        return map;
      }, new Map());
    }

    rows.forEach((row) => {
      const matches = row.duplicateKey ? existingDuplicateMap.get(row.duplicateKey) || [] : [];
      if (!matches.length) return;

      row.warnings.push({
        code: 'possible_existing_duplicate',
        message: `Matches ${matches.length} existing transaction${matches.length === 1 ? '' : 's'}.`,
        matches,
      });
    });

    const normalizedRows = rows.map(({ parsedDate, duplicateKey, ...row }) => ({
      ...row,
      existingDuplicateCount: duplicateKey ? (existingDuplicateMap.get(duplicateKey) || []).length : 0,
      status: row.issues.length ? 'error' : row.warnings.length ? 'warning' : 'ready',
    }));

    const approvedRows = normalizedRows.filter((row) => row.transaction.approvedForImport !== false);
    const totalIncome = transactions.reduce((sum, tx) => {
      const amount = Number(tx.amount);
      return Number.isFinite(amount) && amount > 0 ? sum + amount : sum;
    }, 0);

    const totalExpenses = transactions.reduce((sum, tx) => {
      const amount = Number(tx.amount);
      return Number.isFinite(amount) && amount < 0 ? sum + Math.abs(amount) : sum;
    }, 0);

    const totalTax = transactions.reduce((sum, tx) => {
      const taxes = Number(tx.taxes);
      return Number.isFinite(taxes) ? sum + Math.abs(taxes) : sum;
    }, 0);

    return {
      importId: importRecord.id,
      status: normalizedRows.some((row) => row.status === 'error') ? 'blocked' : 'ready',
      summary: {
        totalRows: normalizedRows.length,
        approvedRows: approvedRows.length,
        skippedRows: normalizedRows.length - approvedRows.length,
        readyRows: normalizedRows.filter((row) => row.status === 'ready').length,
        warningRows: normalizedRows.filter((row) => row.status === 'warning').length,
        errorRows: normalizedRows.filter((row) => row.status === 'error').length,
        duplicateRows: normalizedRows.filter((row) => row.existingDuplicateCount > 0).length,
        duplicateInImportRows: normalizedRows.filter((row) => row.warnings.some((warning) => warning.code === 'duplicate_in_import')).length,
        totalIncome,
        totalExpenses,
        totalTax,
        approvedIncome: approvedRows.reduce((sum, row) => {
          const amount = Number(row.transaction.amount);
          return Number.isFinite(amount) && amount > 0 ? sum + amount : sum;
        }, 0),
        approvedExpenses: approvedRows.reduce((sum, row) => {
          const amount = Number(row.transaction.amount);
          return Number.isFinite(amount) && amount < 0 ? sum + Math.abs(amount) : sum;
        }, 0),
        approvedTax: approvedRows.reduce((sum, row) => {
          const taxes = Number(row.transaction.taxes);
          return Number.isFinite(taxes) ? sum + Math.abs(taxes) : sum;
        }, 0),
        dateFrom: validDates.length ? new Date(Math.min(...validDates.map((date) => date.getTime()))).toISOString() : null,
        dateTo: validDates.length ? new Date(Math.max(...validDates.map((date) => date.getTime()))).toISOString() : null,
      },
      rows: normalizedRows,
    };
  }

  filterApprovedImportRows({ transactions, validationReport, allowExistingDuplicates = false }) {
    const validationByIndex = new Map((validationReport?.rows || []).map((row) => [row.index, row]));
    const skippedRows = [];
    const rows = [];

    transactions.forEach((transaction, index) => {
      const validationRow = validationByIndex.get(index);
      const reportIndex = transaction.importRowIndex ?? index;

      if (transaction.approvedForImport === false) {
        skippedRows.push({ index: reportIndex, reason: 'not_approved', transaction });
        return;
      }

      if (validationRow?.status === 'error') {
        skippedRows.push({ index: reportIndex, reason: 'validation_error', transaction });
        return;
      }

      if (!allowExistingDuplicates && validationRow?.existingDuplicateCount > 0) {
        skippedRows.push({ index: reportIndex, reason: 'existing_duplicate', transaction, matches: validationRow.warnings.flatMap((warning) => warning.matches || []) });
        return;
      }

      rows.push({ index, transaction });
    });

    return { rows, skippedRows };
  }

  async saveImportReport({ organizationId, importId, report }) {
    const { uploadDir } = this.ensureDirectories(organizationId);
    const reportPath = path.join(uploadDir, `${importId}_import_report.json`);
    fs.writeFileSync(reportPath, JSON.stringify(report, null, 2), 'utf-8');
    return reportPath;
  }

  async generateAndTestScript({ prompt, userId, sessionId, scriptPath, filePath, testJsonPath }) {
    const systemPrompt = `
You are an AI assistant specialized in generating Python scripts for accounting import parsing.
Return only valid Python code with no markdown fences and no explanation.
`;

    let pythonScript = await llmClient.generateResponse(
      prompt,
      userId,
      sessionId,
      'TEXT_CHAT',
      'gemini-flash-latest',
      null,
      '',
      systemPrompt
    );

    pythonScript = pythonScript.replace(/```python/g, '').replace(/```/g, '').trim();

    if (!pythonScript || !pythonScript.length) {
      throw new Error('Invalid Python script generated by LLM.');
    }

    this.writePythonScript(scriptPath, pythonScript);

    let testStdout = '';
    let testStderr = '';

    try {
      const { stdout, stderr } = await this.executePythonScript(scriptPath, filePath, testJsonPath);
      testStdout = stdout;
      testStderr = stderr;
    } catch (error) {
      testStdout = error.stdout || '';
      testStderr = error.stderr || '';
    }

    return { pythonScript, testStdout, testStderr };
  }

  async maybeReviseScript({ pythonScript, testStdout, testStderr, userId, sessionId, scriptPath, filePath, testJsonPath }) {
    const combinedOutput = `${testStdout}\n${testStderr}`.toLowerCase();
    if (!combinedOutput.includes('error') && !combinedOutput.includes('traceback') && !combinedOutput.includes('exception')) {
      return pythonScript;
    }

    const validationPrompt = `
You are an AI assistant specialized in debugging Python accounting import scripts.

Python script:
${pythonScript}

Test stdout:
${testStdout}

Test stderr:
${testStderr}

Return a corrected Python script only. Do not include markdown fences or explanations.
`;

    const systemPrompt = `
You debug Python import scripts for CSV and bank statements.
Return only valid Python code.
`;

    let revisedScript = await llmClient.generateResponse(
      validationPrompt,
      userId,
      sessionId,
      'TEXT_CHAT',
      'gemini-flash-latest',
      null,
      '',
      systemPrompt
    );

    revisedScript = revisedScript.replace(/```python/g, '').replace(/```/g, '').trim();
    this.writePythonScript(scriptPath, revisedScript);

    const { stdout, stderr } = await this.executePythonScript(scriptPath, filePath, testJsonPath);
    const revisedCombinedOutput = `${stdout}\n${stderr}`.toLowerCase();

    if (revisedCombinedOutput.includes('traceback') || revisedCombinedOutput.includes('exception')) {
      throw new Error(`Failed to execute revised Python script. Reason: ${stderr || stdout}`);
    }

    return revisedScript;
  }

  async processImport({ importId, userId, sessionId, specialInstructions = '', isRevise = false }) {
    const importRecord = await this.prisma.importRecord.findUnique({
      where: { id: importId },
      include: { source: true },
    });
    if (!importRecord) throw new Error('Import record not found.');

    const organization = await this.prisma.organization.findUnique({
      where: { id: importRecord.organizationId },
      select: { id: true, name: true },
    });
    if (!organization) throw new Error('Organization not found.');

    const { uploadDir, scriptsDir } = this.ensureDirectories(organization.id);

    let scriptPath = importRecord.scriptPath;
    if (!scriptPath || isRevise || !fs.existsSync(scriptPath)) {
      const baseName = importRecord.source?.name?.trim() || `import_${importId}`;
      const sanitizedSource = baseName.replace(/[^a-zA-Z0-9_-]/g, '_');
      const scriptFilename = `${sanitizedSource}_ImportBank.py`;
      scriptPath = path.join(scriptsDir, scriptFilename);
    }

    const filePath = importRecord.filePath;
    if (!fs.existsSync(filePath)) {
      throw new Error('Original CSV file not found.');
    }

    const first30Lines = await this.getFilePreview(filePath, 30);

    let pythonScript = '';
    let testStdout = '';
    let testStderr = '';

    if (!fs.existsSync(scriptPath) || isRevise) {
      const prompt = `
You are writing a Python parser for accounting transaction imports.

Input preview:
${first30Lines}

BankTransaction schema:
${JSON.stringify(BankTransactionResponseSchema, null, 2)}

Special instructions:
${specialInstructions}

Requirements:
1. Read input file path from argv[1] and output json path from argv[2].
2. Parse the full file and save a JSON array.
3. Use dateparser for dates.
4. Include basic error handling.
5. Print useful progress logs.
6. If there are row-level parsing errors, write them to {output}_errors.csv.
7. Parse amounts with commas, currency symbols, and parentheses.
8. Income must always be positive.
9. Expenses must always be negative.
10. The script must determine and enforce the correct sign even if the raw file is inconsistent.
11. Set type to "income" for positive transactions and "expense" for negative transactions.
12. Do not include markdown fences. Return only Python code.
`;

      const testJsonFilename = `${uuidv4()}_test_import.json`;
      const testJsonPath = path.join(uploadDir, testJsonFilename);

      const generated = await this.generateAndTestScript({
        prompt,
        userId,
        sessionId,
        scriptPath,
        filePath,
        testJsonPath,
      });

      pythonScript = generated.pythonScript;
      testStdout = generated.testStdout;
      testStderr = generated.testStderr;

      try {
        pythonScript = await this.maybeReviseScript({
          pythonScript,
          testStdout,
          testStderr,
          userId,
          sessionId,
          scriptPath,
          filePath,
          testJsonPath,
        });
      } catch (error) {
        this.cleanupFiles([testJsonPath]);
        await this.prisma.importRecord.update({
          where: { id: importId },
          data: {
            status: 'FAILED',
            scriptPath,
          },
        });
        throw new Error(`Script Revision Failed: ${error.message}`);
      }

      if (fs.existsSync(testJsonPath)) {
        try {
          const testJsonData = fs.readFileSync(testJsonPath, 'utf-8');
          const parsedTestJson = JSON.parse(testJsonData);
          this.validateTransactionsJson(parsedTestJson);
        } catch (error) {
          this.cleanupFiles([testJsonPath]);
          await this.prisma.importRecord.update({
            where: { id: importId },
            data: {
              status: 'FAILED',
              scriptPath,
            },
          });
          throw new Error(`Generated test JSON was invalid: ${error.message}`);
        }
        fs.unlinkSync(testJsonPath);
      }
    } else {
      pythonScript = fs.readFileSync(scriptPath, 'utf-8');
    }

    const finalJsonFilename = `${uuidv4()}_import.json`;
    const finalJsonPath = path.join(uploadDir, finalJsonFilename);

    let finalStdout = '';
    let finalStderr = '';

    try {
      const { stdout, stderr } = await this.executePythonScript(scriptPath, filePath, finalJsonPath);
      finalStdout = stdout;
      finalStderr = stderr;
    } catch (error) {
      finalStdout = error.stdout || '';
      finalStderr = error.stderr || '';
      this.cleanupFiles([finalJsonPath]);
      await this.prisma.importRecord.update({
        where: { id: importId },
        data: {
          status: 'FAILED',
          scriptPath,
        },
      });
      throw new Error(`Failed to execute the Python script on the dataset: ${finalStderr || finalStdout}`);
    }

    if (!fs.existsSync(finalJsonPath)) {
      await this.prisma.importRecord.update({
        where: { id: importId },
        data: {
          status: 'FAILED',
          scriptPath,
        },
      });
      throw new Error('JSON output file not found after script execution.');
    }

    let transactionsJson;
    try {
      const jsonData = fs.readFileSync(finalJsonPath, 'utf-8');
      transactionsJson = JSON.parse(jsonData);
      this.validateTransactionsJson(transactionsJson);
      transactionsJson = transactionsJson.map((tx) => this.normalizeTransaction(tx));
    } catch (parseError) {
      this.cleanupFiles([finalJsonPath]);
      await this.prisma.importRecord.update({
        where: { id: importId },
        data: {
          status: 'FAILED',
          scriptPath,
        },
      });
      throw new Error(`Invalid JSON format in the output file. ${parseError.message}`);
    }

    if (fs.existsSync(finalJsonPath)) {
      fs.unlinkSync(finalJsonPath);
    }

    const sanitizedTransactions = transactionsJson.map((tx) => {
      const date = new Date(tx.date);
      if (Number.isNaN(date.getTime())) {
        throw new Error(`Invalid date format for transaction: ${tx.date}`);
      }

      const { id: _unused, ...rest } = tx;

      return {
        ...rest,
        date: date.toISOString(),
        sourceId: importRecord.sourceId,
        organizationId: importRecord.organizationId,
        userId: importRecord.userId,
      };
    });

    await this.prisma.importRecord.update({
      where: { id: importId },
      data: {
        status: 'PENDING_VERIFICATION',
        transactions: JSON.stringify(sanitizedTransactions),
        scriptPath,
      },
    });

    return {
      transactionsJson: sanitizedTransactions,
      pythonScript,
      testStdout,
      testStderr,
      finalStdout,
      finalStderr,
      scriptPath,
    };
  }

  async getFilePreview(filePath, lineCount = 200) {
    return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
      const fileStream = fs.createReadStream(filePath, { encoding: 'utf-8' });
      const rl = readline.createInterface({ input: fileStream });

      const lines = [];
      rl.on('line', (line) => {
        lines.push(line);
        if (lines.length === lineCount) {
          rl.close();
        }
      });

      rl.on('close', () => resolve(lines.join('\n')));
      rl.on('error', (err) => reject(err));
    });
  }

  async manageSource({ name, organizationId, scriptPath = '', type = '' }) {
    let source = await this.prisma.source.findFirst({
      where: {
        name: name.trim(),
        organizationId,
      },
    });

    const normalizedType = String(type || '').trim().toUpperCase();
    const validTypes = new Set(['CREDIT_CARD', 'CHEQUING_ACCOUNT', 'SAVINGS_ACCOUNT']);

    if (!source) {
      source = await this.prisma.source.create({
        data: {
          name: name.trim(),
          type: validTypes.has(normalizedType) ? normalizedType : '',
          scriptPath,
          organizationId,
        },
      });
    } else if (!source.type && validTypes.has(normalizedType)) {
      source = await this.prisma.source.update({
        where: { id: source.id },
        data: { type: normalizedType },
      });
    }
    return source.id;
  }

  async processPdfImport({ importId, userId, sessionId, organizationId, specialInstructions = '' }) {
    const importRecord = await this.prisma.importRecord.findUnique({
      where: { id: importId },
    });
    if (!importRecord) throw new Error('Import record not found.');

    const filePath = importRecord.filePath;
    if (!fs.existsSync(filePath)) {
      throw new Error('Original PDF file not found.');
    }

    const pdfBuffer = fs.readFileSync(filePath);
    const pdfText = await ReceiptsManager.extractTextFromPDF(pdfBuffer);
    if (!pdfText || !pdfText.trim()) {
      throw new Error('No text could be extracted from the PDF.');
    }

    const prompt = `Extract all bank transactions from the bank statement text below.

Rules:
- Extract every transaction listed in the statement.
- date must be in ISO format (YYYY-MM-DD). If only a partial date is shown, infer the best possible date.
- description should be the merchant name or transaction description exactly as it appears.
- amount must be a number. Expenses must be negative, income must be positive.
- type must be "expense" for negative amounts and "income" for positive amounts.
- If taxes (HST/GST) are explicitly listed, extract them; otherwise return null.
- If a running balance is shown, extract it; otherwise return null.
- If a merchant name is clearly identifiable, extract it separately.
- Ignore boilerplate, disclaimers, and page headers/footers.
- Do not infer or invent transactions that are not explicitly present.

${specialInstructions ? `Special instructions: ${specialInstructions}` : ''}

Bank statement text:
${pdfText}`;

    const systemPrompt = `You extract structured bank transaction data from bank statement PDFs.
Return only the structured response.
Extract every transaction listed.
Never guess or invent transactions.`;

    let result;
    try {
      result = await llmClient.generateResponse(
        prompt,
        userId,
        sessionId,
        'STRUCTURED_OUTPUT',
        'deepseek/deepseek-v4-flash',
        PdfImportSchema,
        'PdfImport',
        systemPrompt
      );
    } catch (error) {
      await this.prisma.importRecord.update({
        where: { id: importId },
        data: { status: 'FAILED' },
      });
      throw new Error(`LLM extraction failed: ${error.message}`);
    }

    const transactions = Array.isArray(result?.transactions) ? result.transactions : [];
    if (!transactions.length) {
      await this.prisma.importRecord.update({
        where: { id: importId },
        data: { status: 'FAILED' },
      });
      throw new Error('No transactions could be extracted from the PDF.');
    }

    this.validateTransactionsJson(transactions);
    const sanitizedTransactions = transactions.map((tx) => this.normalizeTransaction(tx)).map((tx) => ({
      ...tx,
      sourceId: importRecord.sourceId,
      organizationId: importRecord.organizationId,
      userId: importRecord.userId,
    }));

    await this.prisma.importRecord.update({
      where: { id: importId },
      data: {
        status: 'PENDING_VERIFICATION',
        transactions: JSON.stringify(sanitizedTransactions),
      },
    });

    return { transactionsJson: sanitizedTransactions };
  }

  async createImportRecord({ filePath, scriptPath, jsonPath, organizationId, userId, sourceId }) {
    const importRecord = await this.prisma.importRecord.create({
      data: {
        filePath,
        scriptPath,
        jsonPath,
        transactions: JSON.stringify([]),
        organizationId,
        userId,
        status: 'PENDING_VERIFICATION',
        sourceId,
      },
    });
    return importRecord.id;
  }
}

export default ImportService;

```

```js
// Full path: /home/luanngo/boss-dev/server/src/services/accounting/services/PayrollService.js
// server/src/services/accounting/services/PayrollService.js
import prisma from "#shared/database/prismaClient.js";
import { addDays, format, parseISO } from "date-fns";
import moment from "moment-timezone";
import { differenceInMinutes } from "date-fns";

// Map numeric day to weekday names matching your JSON
const dayMap = ["Sunday", "Monday", "Tuesday", "Wednesday", "Thursday", "Friday", "Saturday"];

// Helper to determine time range based on a moment object
function getTimeRange(m) {
  const hr = m.hour();
  if (hr >= 0 && hr < 6) return "00:00-05:59";
  if (hr >= 6 && hr < 12) return "06:00-11:59";
  if (hr >= 12 && hr < 18) return "12:00-17:59";
  return "18:00-23:59";
}

class PayrollService {
  constructor() {
    this.localTimeZone = "America/New_York"; // Consider making this configurable per organization
    this.prisma = prisma;
  }

  // Helper method to calculate duration in hours.
  calculateDuration(startTime, endTime) {
    const start = new Date(startTime);
    const end = new Date(endTime);
    let diff = end - start;
    if (diff < 0) diff += 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000;
    return diff / (1000 * 60 * 60);
  }

  // Retrieve all payroll schedules for the organization.
  async getPayrollSchedules(organizationId) {
    return await this.prisma.payrollSchedule.findMany({
      where: { organizationId },
      orderBy: { startWeek: "desc" }
    });
  }

  async getPayrollSchedule(organizationId, scheduleId) {
    return await this.prisma.payrollSchedule.findFirst({
      where: { id: scheduleId, organizationId },
    });
  }

  // UPDATED: No longer generating hours in payroll data since hours are imported from weekly schedule.
  async generatePayrollSchedule(organizationId, startWeekUTC, endWeekUTC, status, notes) {
    const overlapping = await this.prisma.payrollSchedule.findFirst({
      where: {
        organizationId,
        AND: [
          { startWeek: { lt: startWeekUTC } },
          { endWeek: { gt: endWeekUTC } }
        ]
      }
    });
    if (overlapping) {
      throw new Error("New payroll schedule overlaps with an existing schedule.");
    }

    const schedule = await this.prisma.payrollSchedule.create({
      data: {
        organizationId,
        startWeek: startWeekUTC,
        endWeek: endWeekUTC,
        status,
        notes
      }
    });

    const activeUsers = await this.prisma.user.findMany({
      where: { organizationId, active: true },
      select: { id: true, pay: true }
    });

    await Promise.all(
      activeUsers.map(async (user) => {
        const hourlyWage = user.pay || 0;
        await this.prisma.payrollRecord.create({
          data: {
            userId: user.id,
            payrollScheduleId: schedule.id,
            weekStart: startWeekUTC,
            weekEnd: endWeekUTC,
            hourlyWage,
            allowableHours: 0,  // These values will be updated/imported later
            bonus: 0,
            tips: 0,
            notes: ""
          }
        });
      })
    );

    return schedule;
  }

  // Delete a payroll schedule and cascade delete its payroll records.
  async deletePayrollSchedule(organizationId, scheduleId) {
    await this.prisma.payrollSchedule.deleteMany({
      where: { id: scheduleId, organizationId }
    });
  }

  async genPayrollData(organizationId, periodStartISO, periodEndISO, scheduleId = null) {
    const periodStart = new Date(periodStartISO);
    // Make periodEnd exclusive by adding one day
    const periodEnd = addDays(new Date(periodEndISO), 1);

    const users = await this.prisma.user.findMany({
      where: { organizationId, active: true },
      select: { id: true, firstName: true, lastName: true, rank: true, pay: true, payType: true, username: true }
    });

    const allShifts = await this.prisma.shift.findMany({
      where: {
        employee: { organizationId },
        OR: [
          { startTime: { gte: periodStart, lt: periodEnd } },
          { endTime: { gte: periodStart, lt: periodEnd } },
          {
            AND: [
              { startTime: { lt: periodStart } },
              { endTime: { gt: periodEnd } }
            ]
          }
        ]
      },
      include: { employee: { select: { id: true } } }
    });

    // Build a map of shifts for each user.
    const userShiftsMap = users.reduce((acc, u) => ({ ...acc, [u.id]: [] }), {});
    for (const shift of allShifts) {
      const shiftStartLocal = moment.tz(shift.startTime, this.localTimeZone);
      const shiftEndLocal = moment.tz(shift.endTime, this.localTimeZone);
      const periodStartLocal = moment.tz(periodStart, this.localTimeZone);
      const periodEndLocal = moment.tz(periodEnd, this.localTimeZone);
      // Check if any part of the shift overlaps the payroll period (in local time)
      if (shiftStartLocal.isBefore(periodEndLocal) && shiftEndLocal.isAfter(periodStartLocal)) {
        // Save the local times for later use
        shift.localStart = shiftStartLocal;
        shift.localEnd = shiftEndLocal;
        if (userShiftsMap[shift.employeeId]) {
          userShiftsMap[shift.employeeId].push(shift);
        }
      }
    }
    let existingPayrollRecordsMap = {};
    if (scheduleId) {
      const existingRecords = await this.prisma.payrollRecord.findMany({
        where: { payrollScheduleId: scheduleId, userId: { in: users.map(u => u.id) } }
      });
      existingRecords.forEach(rec => {
        existingPayrollRecordsMap[rec.userId] = rec;
      });
    } else {
      console.warn("getPayrollData called without scheduleId, may not load existing record values accurately.");
    }

    const tipsMap = await this.calculateTipsForWeek(organizationId, periodStart, periodEnd, users, userShiftsMap);

    // Instead of calculating hours from shifts, use existing imported values (or default to 0)
    const payrollData = users.map(user => {
      const existingRecord = existingPayrollRecordsMap[user.id];
      const scheduledHours = existingRecord ? parseFloat(existingRecord.scheduledHours) : 0;
      const actualHours = existingRecord ? parseFloat(existingRecord.actualHours) : 0;

      const hourlyWage = existingRecord ? existingRecord.hourlyWage : (user.pay || 0);
      const bonus = existingRecord ? existingRecord.bonus : 0;
      const notes = existingRecord ? existingRecord.notes : "";
      const recordId = existingRecord ? existingRecord.id : null;
      const tips = existingRecord && existingRecord.tips !== null ? existingRecord.tips : (tipsMap[user.id] || 0);
      const basePay = actualHours * parseFloat(hourlyWage);
      const totalPay = basePay + parseFloat(tips) + parseFloat(bonus) 

      return {
        id: recordId,
        userId: user.id,
        name: `${user.firstName || ""} ${user.lastName || ""}`.trim() || "Unnamed",
        hourlyWage: parseFloat(hourlyWage),
        allowableHours: existingRecord ? existingRecord.allowableHours : 0,
        scheduledHours: scheduledHours.toFixed(2),
        actualHours: actualHours.toFixed(2),
        bonus: parseFloat(bonus).toFixed(2),
        tips: parseFloat(tips).toFixed(2),
        totalPay: totalPay.toFixed(2),
        notes: notes,
        adjustments: []
      };
    });

    return payrollData;
  }

  async calculateTipsForWeek(organizationId, weekStart, weekEnd, users, userShiftsMap) {
    const CASH_TIP_ADJUSTMENT = 1.04;  // +4%

    const tipShareSetting = await this.prisma.settings.findFirst({
      where: { organizationId, settingName: "tipShare" }
    });
    if (!tipShareSetting) {
      console.warn("No tipShare setting found.");
      return {};
    }
    let tipShare;
    try {
      tipShare = JSON.parse(tipShareSetting.settingValue);
    } catch (err) {
      console.error("Error parsing tipShare JSON:", err);
      return {};
    }
    const salesWithTips = await this.prisma.salesTransaction.findMany({
      where: { date: { gte: weekStart, lt: weekEnd }, tip_money: { gt: 0 } },
      orderBy: { date: "asc" }
    });
    const userTips = {};
    for (const u of users) {
      userTips[u.id] = 0;
    }
    for (const tx of salesWithTips) {
      let tipAmount = tx.tip_money * CASH_TIP_ADJUSTMENT;   // adjust here

      if (!tipAmount || tipAmount <= 0) continue;
      const txLocal = moment.tz(tx.date, "America/New_York");
      const weekday = txLocal.format("dddd");
      const timeRange = getTimeRange(txLocal);
      if (!tipShare[weekday] || !tipShare[weekday][timeRange]) {
        console.warn(`Missing tip share data for ${weekday} ${timeRange}`);
        continue;
      }
      const { ServerShare, KitchenShare, SupportShare } = tipShare[weekday][timeRange];
      const serverFrac = (ServerShare || 0) / 100;
      const cookFrac = (KitchenShare || 0) / 100;
      const supportFrac = (SupportShare || 0) / 100;
      const onShiftRecords = [];
      for (const u of users) {
        const shifts = userShiftsMap[u.id] || [];
        for (const shift of shifts) {
          // ALLOWED: tip transaction can occur anytime after shift start and up to 3 hours after shift.end
          if (tipAmount>100 && txLocal.isAfter(shift.localStart) && txLocal.isBefore(moment(shift.localEnd).add(3, 'hours'))) {
            onShiftRecords.push({ user: u, role: shift.shiftType.toLowerCase() });
            break;
          }
        }
      }
      if (onShiftRecords.length === 0) continue;
      const roleGroups = { server: [], cook: [], support: [] };
      onShiftRecords.forEach(record => {
        if (record.role === "server") roleGroups.server.push(record.user.id);
        else if (record.role === "cook") roleGroups.cook.push(record.user.id);
        else if (record.role === "support") roleGroups.support.push(record.user.id);
      });
      const addTipForGroup = (group, fraction) => {
        if (group.length === 0) return;
        const tipPortion = tipAmount * fraction / group.length;
        group.forEach(userId => {
          userTips[userId] = (userTips[userId] || 0) + tipPortion;
        });
      };
      addTipForGroup(roleGroups.server, serverFrac);
      addTipForGroup(roleGroups.cook, cookFrac);
      addTipForGroup(roleGroups.support, supportFrac);
    }
    return userTips;
  }

  async _getProcessedTipTransactions(organizationId, utcStart, utcEnd) {
    const CASH_TIP_ADJUSTMENT = 1.04;  // +4%
    
    // 1. Fetch Settings
    const tipShareSetting = await this.prisma.settings.findFirst({
      where: { organizationId, settingName: "tipShare" }
    });
    if (!tipShareSetting?.settingValue) {
      console.warn(`No tipShare setting found for organizationId: ${organizationId}`);
      return { tipShare: null, transactions: [], users: [], shifts: [], userMap: {}, userShiftsMap: {} };
    }
    let tipShare;
    try {
      tipShare = JSON.parse(tipShareSetting.settingValue);
    } catch (err) {
      console.error("Error parsing tipShare JSON:", err);
      return { tipShare: null, transactions: [], users: [], shifts: [], userMap: {}, userShiftsMap: {} };
    }
    // shift start should be less a day of utcStart
    // 2. Fetch Transactions

    const transactions = await this.prisma.salesTransaction.findMany({
      where: {
        organizationId,
        date: { gte: utcStart, lt: utcEnd },
        tip_money: { gt: 0 },
        status: 'COMPLETED'
      },
      orderBy: { date: "asc" }
    });
  
    // 3. Fetch Users
    const users = await this.prisma.user.findMany({
      where: { organizationId, active: true },
      select: { id: true, firstName: true, lastName: true, rank: true }
    });
    const userMap = users.reduce((acc, u) => {
      acc[u.id] = `${u.firstName || ""} ${u.lastName || ""}`.trim() || "Unnamed";
      return acc;
    }, {});
  
    const adjustedUtcStart = moment(utcStart).subtract(1, 'day').toDate();

    // 4. Fetch Shifts
    const shifts = await this.prisma.shift.findMany({
      where: {
        employee: { organizationId },
        AND: [
          { startTime: { lt: utcEnd } },
          { endTime: { gte: adjustedUtcStart } }
        ]
      },
    });
  
    // --- UPDATED: Build User Shift Map Using Local Times ---
    const userShiftsMap = users.reduce((acc, u) => ({ ...acc, [u.id]: [] }), {});
    for (const shift of shifts) {
      const rawStartTime = shift.startTime;
      const rawEndTime = shift.endTime;
      // Compute local start and end times based on the configured timezone
      shift.localStart = moment.tz(rawStartTime, this.localTimeZone);
      shift.localEnd = moment.tz(rawEndTime, this.localTimeZone);
      // Adjust for shifts that span midnight – if local end is before local start, add one day to the end
      if (shift.localEnd.isBefore(shift.localStart)) {
        console.log(`Adjusting local end time for midnight crossing shift: ID ${shift.id}, User ${shift.employeeId}`);
        shift.localEnd.add(1, 'day');
      }
      if (!shift.localEnd.isAfter(shift.localStart)) {
        console.warn(`Shift ID ${shift.id} still invalid after local adjustment (start: ${shift.localStart.format()}, end: ${shift.localEnd.format()}). Skipping.`);
        continue;
      }
      if (userShiftsMap[shift.employeeId]) {
        userShiftsMap[shift.employeeId].push(shift);
      }
    }
  
    // 5. Process Transactions with Updated Matching Logic
    const processedTransactions = [];
    for (const tx of transactions) {
      let tipAmount = tx.tip_money * CASH_TIP_ADJUSTMENT;   // adjust here too
      if (tipAmount <= 0) continue;
      const txUTC = moment.utc(tx.date);
      // Convert transaction time to local time using the configured timezone
      const txLocal = txUTC.clone().tz(this.localTimeZone);
      const localWeekday = txLocal.format("dddd");
      const localTimeRange = getTimeRange(txLocal);
      let originalRule = { ServerShare: 0, KitchenShare: 0, SupportShare: 0, ruleKey: `${localWeekday}-${localTimeRange}` };
      if (tipShare[localWeekday] && tipShare[localWeekday][localTimeRange]) {
        originalRule = { ...tipShare[localWeekday][localTimeRange], ruleKey: `${localWeekday}-${localTimeRange}` };
      } else {
        console.warn(`_process: Missing rule for ${localWeekday} ${localTimeRange} (Local) TxID: ${tx.id}`);
      }
      let initialServerFrac = (originalRule.ServerShare || 0) / 100;
      let initialCookFrac = (originalRule.KitchenShare || 0) / 100;
      let initialSupportFrac = (originalRule.SupportShare || 0) / 100;
      const onShiftRoleGroups = { server: [], cook: [], support: [] };
  
      // --- UPDATED: Loop through users and compare using local shift times
      for (const user of users) {
        const userShifts = userShiftsMap[user.id] || [];
        for (const shift of userShifts) {
          const shiftStartLocal = shift.localStart;
          // Clone local end time so we can safely add additional hours if needed
          const shiftEndLocal = shift.localEnd.clone();
          // Extend the shift end by 3 hours if the tip amount exceeds 100 (as per your business rule)
          if (tipAmount > 100) {
            shiftEndLocal.add(3, 'hours');
          }
          // Use the tip transaction’s local time for the comparison
          if (txLocal.isSameOrAfter(shiftStartLocal) && txLocal.isBefore(shiftEndLocal)) {
            const role = (shift.shiftType.toLowerCase() === 'serving') ? 'server' : shift.shiftType.toLowerCase();
            if (onShiftRoleGroups[role]) {
              onShiftRoleGroups[role].push(user.id);
            } else {
              console.warn(`_process: Unexpected role '${shift.shiftType}' for user ${user.id}, mapping to support.`);
              onShiftRoleGroups.support.push(user.id);
            }
            break;
          }
        }
      }
  
      // Continue processing tip distribution as before.
      let finalServerFrac = initialServerFrac;
      let finalCookFrac = initialCookFrac;
      let finalSupportFrac = initialSupportFrac;
      let undistributedFrac = 0;
      const supportStaffPresent = onShiftRoleGroups.support.length > 0;
      const serversPresent = onShiftRoleGroups.server.length > 0;
      const cooksPresent = onShiftRoleGroups.cook.length > 0;
      if (!supportStaffPresent && initialSupportFrac > 0) {
        const combinedServerCookOriginalFrac = (serversPresent ? initialServerFrac : 0) + (cooksPresent ? initialCookFrac : 0);
        if (combinedServerCookOriginalFrac > 0) {
          const serverRedistribution = serversPresent ? (initialServerFrac / combinedServerCookOriginalFrac) * initialSupportFrac : 0;
          const cookRedistribution = cooksPresent ? (initialCookFrac / combinedServerCookOriginalFrac) * initialSupportFrac : 0;
          finalServerFrac += serverRedistribution;
          finalCookFrac += cookRedistribution;
          finalSupportFrac = 0;
        } else {
          undistributedFrac += initialSupportFrac;
          finalSupportFrac = 0;
          console.log(`TX_ID ${tx.id}: Support share became undistributed (no servers/cooks).`);
        }
      }
      if (!serversPresent && finalServerFrac > 0) {
        undistributedFrac += finalServerFrac;
        console.log(`TX_ID ${tx.id}: Server share became undistributed (no servers).`);
        finalServerFrac = 0;
      }
      if (!cooksPresent && finalCookFrac > 0) {
        undistributedFrac += finalCookFrac;
        console.log(`TX_ID ${tx.id}: Cook share became undistributed (no cooks).`);
        finalCookFrac = 0;
      }
      if (!supportStaffPresent && finalSupportFrac > 0) {
        undistributedFrac += finalSupportFrac;
        console.log(`TX_ID ${tx.id}: Support share became undistributed (no support staff).`);
        finalSupportFrac = 0;
      }
      const initialTotalFrac = initialServerFrac + initialCookFrac + initialSupportFrac;
      if (initialTotalFrac < 0.999) {
        undistributedFrac += (1 - initialTotalFrac);
      }
      finalServerFrac = Math.max(0, finalServerFrac);
      finalCookFrac = Math.max(0, finalCookFrac);
      finalSupportFrac = Math.max(0, finalSupportFrac);
      undistributedFrac = Math.max(0, undistributedFrac);
      const finalTotalCheck = finalServerFrac + finalCookFrac + finalSupportFrac + undistributedFrac;
      if (Math.abs(finalTotalCheck - 1) > 0.01) {
        console.warn(`TX_ID ${tx.id}: Final fractions sum (${finalTotalCheck.toFixed(3)}) is not close to 1.`);
      }
      processedTransactions.push({
        tx,
        txLocal,
        tipAmount,
        ruleApplied: originalRule,
        onShiftRoleGroups,
        distributionFractions: {
          server: finalServerFrac,
          cook: finalCookFrac,
          support: finalSupportFrac,
          undistributed: undistributedFrac
        }
      });
    }
  
    return {
      tipShare, transactions, users, shifts, userMap, userShiftsMap, processedTransactions
    };
  }
  
  async getTipBreakdownForWeek(organizationId, periodStartParam, periodEndParam) {
    const periodStartUTC = new Date(parseInt(periodStartParam) * 1000);
    const periodEndExclusiveUTC = addDays(new Date(parseInt(periodEndParam) * 1000), 1);
  
    const { userMap, processedTransactions, users } = await this._getProcessedTipTransactions(
      organizationId,
      periodStartUTC,
      periodEndExclusiveUTC
    );
  
    if (!users || users.length === 0) {
      console.log("No active users found for tip breakdown.");
      return { breakdown: [], totals: {}, periodDates: [] };
    }
    if (processedTransactions.length === 0) {
      console.log("No processed tip transactions found for the period.");
    }
  
    // Create a breakdown map for each user and include user.rank in the mapping.
    const breakdownMap = {};
    users.forEach(user => {
      breakdownMap[user.id] = {
        name: userMap[user.id] || 'Unnamed',
        userId: user.id,
        // Store the rank so that we can reference it later when distributing tips.
        rank: user.rank || 0
      };
    });
  
    // Iterate over the processed transactions to build a daily breakdown.
    for (const processed of processedTransactions) {
      const { tx, txLocal, tipAmount, distributionFractions, onShiftRoleGroups } = processed;
      const localDateKey = txLocal.format('YYYY-MM-DD');
  
      // Update the distributeToMap function to use user.rank for weighted distribution.
      const distributeToMap = (userIds, fraction) => {
        if (!userIds || userIds.length === 0 || fraction <= 0) return;
        const tipPortion = tipAmount * fraction;
        // Calculate the total rank for the current group.
        const totalRank = userIds.reduce((sum, userId) => sum + (breakdownMap[userId].rank || 0), 0);
        
        if (totalRank === 0) {
          // Fallback: if all users have zero rank, distribute equally.
          const amountPerPerson = tipPortion / userIds.length;
          userIds.forEach(userId => {
            breakdownMap[userId][localDateKey] = (breakdownMap[userId][localDateKey] || 0) + amountPerPerson;
          });
        } else {
          // Distribute proportionally based on each user's rank.
          userIds.forEach(userId => {
            const userRank = breakdownMap[userId].rank || 0;
            const userShare = (userRank / totalRank) * tipPortion;
            breakdownMap[userId][localDateKey] = (breakdownMap[userId][localDateKey] || 0) + userShare;
          });
        }
      };
  
      distributeToMap(onShiftRoleGroups.server, distributionFractions.server);
      distributeToMap(onShiftRoleGroups.cook, distributionFractions.cook);
      distributeToMap(onShiftRoleGroups.support, distributionFractions.support);
    }
  
    const periodDatesLocal = [];
    let currentDateLocal = moment.tz(periodStartUTC, this.localTimeZone).startOf('day');
    const endDateLocalMoment = moment.tz(new Date(parseInt(periodEndParam) * 1000), this.localTimeZone).startOf('day');
    while (currentDateLocal.isSameOrBefore(endDateLocalMoment)) {
      periodDatesLocal.push(currentDateLocal.clone());
      currentDateLocal.add(1, 'day');
    }
    const formattedPeriodDates = periodDatesLocal.map(date => date.format('YYYY-MM-DD'));
  
    const pivotArray = Object.keys(breakdownMap).map(userId => {
      const userRow = { name: breakdownMap[userId].name, userId: breakdownMap[userId].userId };
      let totalUserTips = 0;
      formattedPeriodDates.forEach(dateKey => {
        const dailyTip = breakdownMap[userId][dateKey] || 0;
        userRow[dateKey] = dailyTip;
        totalUserTips += dailyTip;
      });
      userRow.Total = totalUserTips;
      return userRow;
    }).sort((a, b) => a.name.localeCompare(b.name));
  
    const totalsRow = { name: "Total" };
    let grandTotal = 0;
    formattedPeriodDates.forEach(dateKey => {
      let dailyTotal = 0;
      pivotArray.forEach(row => { dailyTotal += row[dateKey] || 0; });
      totalsRow[dateKey] = dailyTotal;
      grandTotal += dailyTotal;
    });
    totalsRow.Total = grandTotal;
  
    const formatRowValues = (row) => {
      const formattedRow = { name: row.name, userId: row.userId };
      formattedPeriodDates.forEach(dateKey => {
        formattedRow[dateKey] = (row[dateKey] || 0).toFixed(2);
      });
      formattedRow.Total = (row.Total || 0).toFixed(2);
      return formattedRow;
    };
  
    const formattedPivotArray = pivotArray.map(formatRowValues);
    const formattedTotalsRow = formatRowValues(totalsRow);
  
    return {
      breakdown: formattedPivotArray,
      totals: formattedTotalsRow,
      periodDates: formattedPeriodDates
    };
  }
  
  // --- REFACTORED: getDetailedTipBreakdownForDay ---
  async getDetailedTipBreakdownForDay(organizationId, localDateString) {
    const dayStartLocal = moment.tz(localDateString, 'YYYY-MM-DD', this.localTimeZone).startOf('day');
    const dayEndExclusiveUTC = dayStartLocal.clone().add(1, 'day').utc().toDate();
    const dayStartUTC = dayStartLocal.utc().toDate();

    const { userMap, processedTransactions } = await this._getProcessedTipTransactions(organizationId, dayStartUTC, dayEndExclusiveUTC);

    const detailedBreakdown = [];

    for (const processed of processedTransactions) {
      const { tx, txLocal, tipAmount, ruleApplied, onShiftRoleGroups } = processed;

      const serverFrac = (ruleApplied.ServerShare || 0) / 100;
      const cookFrac = (ruleApplied.KitchenShare || 0) / 100;
      const supportFrac = (ruleApplied.SupportShare || 0) / 100;

      const distributionDetails = [];
      let totalDistributed = 0;

      const calculateDistribution = (userIds, fraction) => {
        if (!userIds || userIds.length === 0 || fraction <= 0) return;
        const tipPortion = tipAmount * fraction;
        const amountPerPerson = tipPortion / userIds.length;
        totalDistributed += tipPortion;

        userIds.forEach(userId => {
          if (userMap[userId]) {
            let role = 'unknown';
            if (onShiftRoleGroups.server.includes(userId)) role = 'server';
            else if (onShiftRoleGroups.cook.includes(userId)) role = 'cook';
            else if (onShiftRoleGroups.support.includes(userId)) role = 'support';

            distributionDetails.push({
              userId: userId,
              name: userMap[userId],
              role: role,
              amountReceived: amountPerPerson
            });
          }
        });
      };

      calculateDistribution(onShiftRoleGroups.server, serverFrac);
      calculateDistribution(onShiftRoleGroups.cook, cookFrac);
      calculateDistribution(onShiftRoleGroups.support, supportFrac);

      const undistributed = Math.max(0, tipAmount - totalDistributed);
      const undistributedAmount = (undistributed < 0.001) ? 0 : undistributed;

      detailedBreakdown.push({
        transactionId: tx.id,
        transactionTimeUTC: tx.date.toISOString(),
        transactionTimeLocal: txLocal.format(),
        totalTip: tipAmount,
        ruleApplied: {
          server: (serverFrac * 100).toFixed(1),
          kitchen: (cookFrac * 100).toFixed(1),
          support: (supportFrac * 100).toFixed(1),
          ruleKey: ruleApplied.ruleKey
        },
        distribution: distributionDetails,
        undistributedAmount: undistributedAmount
      });
    }

    return detailedBreakdown;
  }

  distributeTipIntoBreakdown(userIds, portion, breakdownMap, day, userMap) {
    if (portion <= 0 || userIds.length === 0) return;
    const each = portion / userIds.length;
    userIds.forEach(userId => {
      if (!breakdownMap[day]) breakdownMap[day] = {};
      if (!breakdownMap[day][userId]) {
        breakdownMap[day][userId] = { name: userMap[userId] || "Unnamed", tip: 0 };
      }
      breakdownMap[day][userId].tip += each;
    });
  }

  distributeTipAmongUsers(usersArray, portion, userTipsMap) {
    if (portion <= 0 || usersArray.length === 0) return;
    const totalRank = usersArray.reduce((sum, user) => sum + (user.rank || 0), 0);
    if (totalRank === 0) {
      const equalShare = portion / usersArray.length;
      usersArray.forEach(user => {
        userTipsMap[user.id] += equalShare;
      });
    } else {
      usersArray.forEach(user => {
        const weight = (user.rank || 0) / totalRank;
        userTipsMap[user.id] += portion * weight;
      });
    }
  }

  async updatePayrollRecord({ organizationId, userId, payrollScheduleId, hourlyWage, allowableHours, bonus, tips,  notes, scheduledHours, actualHours, visible }) {
    const schedule = await this.prisma.payrollSchedule.findUnique({
      where: { id: payrollScheduleId }
    });
    if (!schedule || schedule.organizationId !== organizationId) {
      throw new Error("Payroll schedule not found or access denied");
    }

    const dataToUpdate = {
      hourlyWage: parseFloat(hourlyWage) || 0,
      allowableHours: parseFloat(allowableHours) || 0,
      bonus: parseFloat(bonus) || 0,
      tips: parseFloat(tips) || 0,
      notes: notes || "",
      scheduledHours: scheduledHours !== undefined ? parseFloat(scheduledHours) : undefined,
      actualHours: actualHours !== undefined ? parseFloat(actualHours) : undefined,
    };
    if (visible !== undefined) {
      dataToUpdate.visible = visible;
    }
    const weekStartDate = new Date(schedule.startWeek);
    const weekEndDate = new Date(schedule.endWeek);

    const record = await this.prisma.payrollRecord.upsert({
      where: { userId_weekStart: { userId, weekStart: weekStartDate } },
      update: dataToUpdate,
      create: {
        userId,
        payrollScheduleId,
        weekStart: weekStartDate,
        weekEnd: weekEndDate,
        ...dataToUpdate
      }
    });
    return record;
  }
}

export default PayrollService;

```

FILE: server/src/services/accounting/services/RuleSuggestionService.js
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
```js
// Full path: /home/luanngo/boss-dev/server/src/services/accounting/services/RuleSuggestionService.js
import prisma from '#shared/database/prismaClient.js';
import { llmClient } from '#integrations/ai/llm.js';
import SettingsService from '#services/settings/SettingsService.js';
import { randomUUID } from 'node:crypto';
import TransactionGroupService from './TransactionGroupService.js';

const normalizeText = (value) =>
  String(value || '')
    .normalize('NFD')
    .replace(/[\u0300-\u036f]/g, '')
    .toLowerCase()
    .replace(/[^a-z0-9\s]/g, ' ')
    .replace(/\s+/g, ' ')
    .trim();

const inferPatternFromRuleName = (name) => {
  const cleaned = String(name || '')
    .replace(/\s+-\s+(credit card|bank|cash)?\s*(expense|income|revenue|rule|transaction)s?.*$/i, '')
    .replace(/\s+rule$/i, '')
    .trim();
  const normalized = normalizeText(cleaned);
  return normalized.split(' ').length >= 2 ? cleaned : '';
};

const normalizePatternList = (value) => {
  if (!Array.isArray(value)) return [];
  return Array.from(new Set(value.map((item) => String(item || '').trim()).filter(Boolean)));
};

const extractVendorTokens = (description) => {
  const normalized = normalizeText(description);
  return normalized.split(' ').filter((t) => t.length > 2).slice(0, 4).join(' ');
};

const safeJsonParse = (value) => {
  if (!value) return null;
  try { return JSON.parse(value); } catch { return null; }
};

const SOURCE_WITH_LEDGER_SELECT = {
  id: true,
  name: true,
  type: true,
  ledgerAccountId: true,
  ledgerAccount: { select: { id: true, code: true, description: true, category: true, normalSide: true } },
};

const roundMoney = (value) => Number(Number(value || 0).toFixed(2));

const median = (values) => {
  const sorted = values.filter((value) => Number.isFinite(value)).sort((a, b) => a - b);
  if (!sorted.length) return null;
  const middle = Math.floor(sorted.length / 2);
  return sorted.length % 2 ? sorted[middle] : (sorted[middle - 1] + sorted[middle]) / 2;
};

const inferTaxTreatmentFromTransaction = (tx) => {
  const tax = Math.abs(Number(tx?.taxes || 0));
  const amount = Number(tx?.amount || 0);
  if (tax <= 0) return amount < 0 ? 'NO_ITC' : 'NO_TAX';
  return amount > 0 ? 'TAXABLE_SALE' : 'INPUT_TAX_CREDIT';
};

const isNoTaxTreatment = (value) => {
  const normalized = String(value || '').trim().toUpperCase();
  return normalized === 'NO_TAX' || normalized === 'NO_ITC' || normalized === 'EXEMPT_PURCHASE' || normalized === 'ZERO_RATED';
};

const NO_TAX_POSTING_TYPES = new Set([
  'PAYROLL_FUNDING',
  'PAYROLL_PAYMENT',
  'PAYROLL_REMITTANCE',
  'TAX_REMITTANCE',
  'TRANSFER',
  'CREDIT_CARD_PAYMENT',
  'PAYMENT_PROCESSOR_PAYOUT',
  'PAYMENT_PROCESSOR_REVERSAL',
  'OWNER_DRAW',
  'OWNER_CONTRIBUTION',
]);

const isDuplicateZeroedTransaction = (transaction) => {
  const text = `${transaction?.notes || ''} ${transaction?.journalEntry?.memo || ''}`.toLowerCase();
  return text.includes('duplicate import') && text.includes('zeroed');
};

const isTransferLikeTransaction = (transaction) => {
  const postingType = String(transaction?.postingType || '').trim().toUpperCase();
  const categoryCode = String(transaction?.category?.code || transaction?.currentCategoryCode || '').trim();
  const categoryType = String(transaction?.category?.category || '').trim().toUpperCase();
  return (
    NO_TAX_POSTING_TYPES.has(postingType) ||
    categoryCode === '0000' ||
    categoryType === 'TRANSFER' ||
    isDuplicateZeroedTransaction(transaction)
  );
};

const transactionNeedsReceiptForRule = (transaction, suggestedRule = {}) => {
  if (!suggestedRule.requiredReceipt) return false;
  if (Number(transaction?.amount || 0) >= 0) return false;
  if (transaction?.receipt || transaction?.receiptId) return false;
  if (isTransferLikeTransaction(transaction)) return false;
  return true;
};

const transactionNeedsTaxForRule = (transaction, ruleMeta = {}) => {
  if (isTransferLikeTransaction(transaction)) return false;
  if (Math.abs(Number(transaction?.taxes || 0)) > 0) return false;
  if (isNoTaxTreatment(ruleMeta?.taxTreatment)) return false;

  const storedProposal = safeJsonParse(transaction?.notes)?.aiProposal || safeJsonParse(transaction?.notes) || {};
  if (isNoTaxTreatment(storedProposal?.likelyTaxTreatment)) return false;

  const postingType = String(transaction?.postingType || storedProposal?.likelyTransactionType || ruleMeta?.transactionType || '').trim().toUpperCase();
  if (NO_TAX_POSTING_TYPES.has(postingType)) return false;

  return Number(transaction?.amount || 0) < 0;
};

const transactionMatchesRule = (tx, suggestedRule = {}) => {
  const amountDirection = suggestedRule.amountDirection || 'ANY';
  const direction = Number(tx.amount || 0) > 0 ? 'INCOME' : 'EXPENSE';
  if (amountDirection !== 'ANY' && amountDirection !== direction) return false;

  const sourceType = String(suggestedRule.sourceType || '').toUpperCase();
  if (sourceType) {
    const txSource = String(tx.source?.type || '').toUpperCase();
    if (txSource && txSource !== sourceType) return false;
  }

  const patterns = Array.isArray(suggestedRule.patterns) ? suggestedRule.patterns : [];
  const effectivePatterns = patterns.length ? patterns : (inferPatternFromRuleName(suggestedRule.name) ? [inferPatternFromRuleName(suggestedRule.name)] : []);
  if (!effectivePatterns.length) return false;

  const haystack = normalizeText(tx.description);
  const normalizedPatterns = effectivePatterns.map((pattern) => normalizeText(pattern));
  return suggestedRule.matchMode === 'ALL'
    ? normalizedPatterns.every((pattern) => haystack.includes(pattern))
    : normalizedPatterns.some((pattern) => haystack.includes(pattern));
};

const formatRuleMatchedTransaction = (tx, suggestedRule = {}) => ({
  id: tx.id,
  date: tx.date,
  description: tx.description,
  amount: tx.amount,
  taxes: tx.taxes,
  source: tx.source?.type || null,
  sourceId: tx.source?.id || null,
  sourceName: tx.source?.name || null,
  sourceLedgerAccountId: tx.source?.ledgerAccountId || null,
  sourceLedgerAccountCode: tx.source?.ledgerAccount?.code || null,
  sourceLedgerAccountDescription: tx.source?.ledgerAccount?.description || null,
  categoryId: tx.categoryId || null,
  currentCategoryCode: tx.category?.code || null,
  currentCategoryDescription: tx.category?.description || null,
  inferredTaxTreatment: tx.categoryId ? inferTaxTreatmentFromTransaction(tx) : null,
  matchedReceiptSummary: tx.receipt?.companyName || null,
  receiptId: tx.receiptId || null,
  hasReceipt: Boolean(tx.receipt),
  hasJournalEntry: Boolean(tx.journalEntry?.id && tx.journalEntry?.posted === true),
  journalEntryId: tx.journalEntry?.id || null,
  journalPosted: tx.journalEntry?.posted === true,
  postingType: tx.postingType || null,
  incompleteReasons: [
    !tx.categoryId ? 'missing_category' : null,
    transactionNeedsTaxForRule(tx, suggestedRule) ? 'missing_tax' : null,
    transactionNeedsReceiptForRule(tx, suggestedRule) ? 'missing_receipt' : null,
    !tx.journalEntry?.id || tx.journalEntry?.posted !== true ? 'unposted_journal' : null,
  ].filter(Boolean),
});

const summarizeRuleMatchesForGroup = (group, suggestedRule, allTransactions = []) => {
  const matchedRows = allTransactions
    .filter((tx) => transactionMatchesRule(tx, suggestedRule))
    .map((tx) => formatRuleMatchedTransaction(tx, suggestedRule));

  const uncategorizedTransactions = matchedRows.filter((tx) => !tx.categoryId && !tx.currentCategoryCode);
  const missingTaxTransactions = matchedRows.filter((tx) => tx.incompleteReasons.includes('missing_tax'));
  const missingReceiptTransactions = matchedRows.filter((tx) => tx.incompleteReasons.includes('missing_receipt'));
  const unpostedTransactions = matchedRows.filter((tx) => tx.incompleteReasons.includes('unposted_journal'));
  const incompleteTransactions = matchedRows.filter((tx) => tx.incompleteReasons.length > 0);
  const dates = matchedRows.map((tx) => new Date(tx.date).getTime()).filter(Number.isFinite);

  return {
    ...group,
    suggestedRule,
    transactionCount: matchedRows.length,
    incompleteCount: incompleteTransactions.length,
    uncategorizedCount: uncategorizedTransactions.length,
    missingTaxCount: missingTaxTransactions.length,
    missingReceiptCount: missingReceiptTransactions.length,
    unpostedCount: unpostedTransactions.length,
    categorizedCount: matchedRows.length - uncategorizedTransactions.length,
    amountTotal: Number(matchedRows.reduce((sum, tx) => sum + Math.abs(Number(tx.amount || 0)), 0).toFixed(2)),
    totalTax: Number(matchedRows.reduce((sum, tx) => sum + Math.abs(Number(tx.taxes || 0)), 0).toFixed(2)),
    dateRange: dates.length
      ? { from: new Date(Math.min(...dates)), to: new Date(Math.max(...dates)) }
      : group.dateRange,
    completedTransactionSamples: matchedRows.filter((tx) => !tx.incompleteReasons.length).slice(0, 6),
    uncategorizedTransactionSamples: uncategorizedTransactions.slice(0, 6),
    incompleteTransactionSamples: incompleteTransactions.slice(0, 10),
    sampleTransactions: matchedRows.slice(0, 3),
    transactions: matchedRows,
    transactionIds: matchedRows.map((tx) => tx.id),
  };
};

export const getTaxRateEvidence = (transactions) => {
  const taxable = transactions
    .filter((tx) => {
      const tax = Math.abs(Number(tx.taxes || 0));
      return tx.categoryId && tax > 0 && Math.abs(Number(tx.amount || 0)) > tax;
    })
    .map((tx) => {
      const gross = Math.abs(Number(tx.amount || 0));
      const tax = Math.abs(Number(tx.taxes || 0));
      return {
        gross,
        tax,
        inclusiveRate: tax / Math.max(gross - tax, 0.01),
        taxShareOfGross: tax / gross,
      };
    });

  if (!taxable.length) return null;

  const inclusiveRate = median(taxable.map((item) => item.inclusiveRate));
  const taxShareOfGross = median(taxable.map((item) => item.taxShareOfGross));
  if (!Number.isFinite(inclusiveRate) || !Number.isFinite(taxShareOfGross)) return null;

  return {
    source: 'categorized_history',
    sampleCount: taxable.length,
    inclusiveRate: Number(inclusiveRate.toFixed(6)),
    taxShareOfGross: Number(taxShareOfGross.toFixed(6)),
    ratePercent: Number((inclusiveRate * 100).toFixed(2)),
  };
};

const countBy = (items, getKey) => {
  const counts = new Map();
  for (const item of items) {
    const key = getKey(item);
    if (!key) continue;
    counts.set(key, (counts.get(key) || 0) + 1);
  }
  return Array.from(counts.entries())
    .map(([value, count]) => ({ value, count }))
    .sort((a, b) => b.count - a.count || String(a.value).localeCompare(String(b.value)));
};

export const buildHistoricalPrecedentEvidence = (transactions) => {
  const categorized = transactions.filter((tx) => tx.categoryId);
  if (!categorized.length) return null;

  const accountCounts = countBy(categorized, (tx) => tx.category?.code || null);
  const taxTreatmentCounts = countBy(categorized, inferTaxTreatmentFromTransaction);
  const sourceTypeCounts = countBy(categorized, (tx) => tx.source?.type || null);
  const dominantAccount = accountCounts[0] || null;
  const dominantTaxTreatment = taxTreatmentCounts[0] || null;
  const taxRateEvidence = getTaxRateEvidence(categorized);

  return {
    source: 'merchant_history',
    sampleCount: categorized.length,
    taxableSampleCount: taxRateEvidence?.sampleCount || 0,
    dominantAccountCode: dominantAccount?.value || null,
    dominantAccountConfidence: dominantAccount ? Number((dominantAccount.count / categorized.length).toFixed(4)) : 0,
    dominantTaxTreatment: dominantTaxTreatment?.value || null,
    dominantTaxTreatmentConfidence: dominantTaxTreatment ? Number((dominantTaxTreatment.count / categorized.length).toFixed(4)) : 0,
    taxRateEvidence,
    accountCounts,
    taxTreatmentCounts,
    sourceTypeCounts,
    samples: categorized.slice(0, 8).map((tx) => ({
      id: tx.id,
      date: tx.date,
      description: tx.description,
      amount: tx.amount,
      taxes: tx.taxes,
      source: tx.source?.type || null,
      currentCategoryCode: tx.category?.code || null,
      currentCategoryDescription: tx.category?.description || null,
      inferredTaxTreatment: inferTaxTreatmentFromTransaction(tx),
    })),
  };
};

const normalizePreviousTaxRate = (value) => {
  if (!value || typeof value !== 'object') return null;
  const ratePercent = Number(value.ratePercent);
  if (!Number.isFinite(ratePercent) || ratePercent < 0) return null;
  const inclusiveRate = ratePercent / 100;
  return {
    source: value.source || 'manual_edit',
    sampleCount: Number(value.sampleCount || 0),
    inclusiveRate: Number(inclusiveRate.toFixed(6)),
    taxShareOfGross: Number((inclusiveRate / (1 + inclusiveRate)).toFixed(6)),
    ratePercent: Number(ratePercent.toFixed(2)),
  };
};

const CREDIT_CARD_PAYMENT_PATTERNS = Object.freeze([
  'payment thank you',
  'payment received',
  'thank you for your payment',
  'automatic payment',
  'auto payment',
  'online payment',
  'pre authorized payment',
  'payment from bank',
  'credit card payment',
  'visa payment',
  'mastercard payment',
  'amex payment',
]);

const TAX_REMITTANCE_PATTERNS = Object.freeze([
  'canada txd',
  'canada tax',
  'canada revenue agency',
  'cra',
  'gst hst',
  'hst payment',
  'gst payment',
  'tax remittance',
  'hst remittance',
  'gst remittance',
]);

const SQUARE_PATTERNS = Object.freeze([
  'square',
  'square inc',
  'square canada',
  'square msp',
  'square inc msp',
  'square canada msp',
  'tns square',
]);

const PAYROLL_FUNDING_PATTERNS = Object.freeze([
  'rise cap',
]);

const SOURCE_TYPE_ALIASES = Object.freeze({
  CHEQUING_ACCOUNT: 'BANK',
  CHECKING_ACCOUNT: 'BANK',
  BANK_ACCOUNT: 'BANK',
  CREDIT_CARD: 'CREDIT_CARD',
});

const normalizeSourceClass = (value) => {
  const normalized = String(value || '').trim().toUpperCase();
  return SOURCE_TYPE_ALIASES[normalized] || normalized;
};

export const isCreditCardPaymentDescriptor = (description) => {
  const normalized = normalizeText(description);
  if (!normalized) return false;
  return CREDIT_CARD_PAYMENT_PATTERNS.some((pattern) => normalized.includes(pattern));
};

export const isCreditCardPaymentGroup = (group = {}) => {
  const sourceClass = normalizeSourceClass(group.sourceType);
  if (sourceClass !== 'CREDIT_CARD') return false;
  if (String(group.direction || '').toUpperCase() !== 'INCOME') return false;
  const transactions = Array.isArray(group.transactions) ? group.transactions : [];
  if (!transactions.length) return isCreditCardPaymentDescriptor(group.normalizedMerchant);
  return transactions.some((tx) => Number(tx.amount || 0) > 0 && isCreditCardPaymentDescriptor(tx.description));
};

export const isTaxRemittanceDescriptor = (description) => {
  const normalized = normalizeText(description);
  if (!normalized) return false;
  return TAX_REMITTANCE_PATTERNS.some((pattern) => normalized.includes(pattern));
};

export const isTaxRemittanceGroup = (group = {}) => {
  const sourceClass = normalizeSourceClass(group.sourceType);
  if (!['BANK', 'CREDIT_CARD'].includes(sourceClass)) return false;
  if (String(group.direction || '').toUpperCase() !== 'EXPENSE') return false;
  const transactions = Array.isArray(group.transactions) ? group.transactions : [];
  if (!transactions.length) return isTaxRemittanceDescriptor(group.normalizedMerchant);
  return transactions.some((tx) => Number(tx.amount || 0) < 0 && isTaxRemittanceDescriptor(tx.description));
};

export const isSquareDescriptor = (description) => {
  const normalized = normalizeText(description);
  if (!normalized) return false;
  return SQUARE_PATTERNS.some((pattern) => normalized.includes(pattern));
};

export const isSquarePayoutGroup = (group = {}) => {
  const sourceClass = normalizeSourceClass(group.sourceType);
  if (sourceClass !== 'BANK') return false;
  const transactions = Array.isArray(group.transactions) ? group.transactions : [];
  if (!transactions.length) return isSquareDescriptor(group.normalizedMerchant);
  return transactions.some((tx) => isSquareDescriptor(tx.description));
};

export const isPayrollFundingDescriptor = (description) => {
  const normalized = normalizeText(description);
  if (!normalized) return false;
  return PAYROLL_FUNDING_PATTERNS.some((pattern) => normalized.includes(pattern));
};

export const isPayrollFundingGroup = (group = {}) => {
  const sourceClass = normalizeSourceClass(group.sourceType);
  if (sourceClass !== 'BANK') return false;
  if (String(group.direction || '').toUpperCase() !== 'EXPENSE') return false;
  const transactions = Array.isArray(group.transactions) ? group.transactions : [];
  if (!transactions.length) return isPayrollFundingDescriptor(group.normalizedMerchant);
  return transactions.some((tx) => Number(tx.amount || 0) < 0 && isPayrollFundingDescriptor(tx.description));
};

const PURCHASE_ITC_TREATMENTS = new Set(['INPUT_TAX_CREDIT']);
const SALES_TAX_TREATMENTS = new Set(['TAXABLE_SALE']);
const TAX_REMITTANCE_TREATMENTS = new Set(['HST_REMITTANCE']);

const normalizeAmountFormula = (value, fallback = 'gross') => {
  const normalized = String(value || '').trim().toLowerCase();
  return ['gross', 'net', 'hst'].includes(normalized) ? normalized : fallback;
};

const resolveJournalTemplateAccount = (line, accounts = []) => {
  const accountCode = String(line?.accountCode || line?.code || '').trim();
  const accountId = String(line?.accountId || '').trim();

  return accounts.find((account) =>
    (accountCode && String(account.code) === accountCode) ||
    (accountCode && String(account.id) === accountCode) ||
    (accountId && String(account.id) === accountId)
  ) || null;
};

const findAccountByCode = (accounts = [], code) =>
  accounts.find((account) => String(account.code) === String(code)) || null;

const accountText = (account = {}) => normalizeText([
  account.code,
  account.name,
  account.description,
  account.category,
  account.statementLine,
].filter(Boolean).join(' '));

const accountCategory = (account = {}) => String(account.category || '').trim().toUpperCase();

const scoreAccount = (account, tests = []) =>
  tests.reduce((score, test) => score + Number(test(account) || 0), 0);

export const resolveCreditCardLiabilityAccount = (accounts = [], source = null) => {
  const sourceText = normalizeText([source?.name, source?.type].filter(Boolean).join(' '));
  const candidates = accounts
    .map((account) => {
      const text = accountText(account);
      return {
        account,
        score: scoreAccount(account, [
          (a) => accountCategory(a).includes('LIABIL') ? 40 : 0,
          () => /\bcredit card\b|card payable|visa payable|mastercard payable|amex payable|american express payable|credit card payable/.test(text) ? 40 : 0,
          () => /\bvisa\b|\bmastercard\b|\bamex\b|\bamerican express\b/.test(text) ? 20 : 0,
          () => sourceText && text && sourceText.split(' ').filter((token) => token.length > 2).some((token) => text.includes(token)) ? 15 : 0,
          (a) => String(a.normalSide || '').toUpperCase() === 'CREDIT' ? 5 : 0,
        ]),
      };
    })
    .filter((item) => item.score >= 40)
    .sort((a, b) => b.score - a.score || String(a.account.code).localeCompare(String(b.account.code)));

  return candidates[0]?.account || null;
};

export const resolveBankLedgerAccount = (accounts = [], source = null) => {
  const sourceText = normalizeText([source?.name, source?.type].filter(Boolean).join(' '));
  const candidates = accounts
    .map((account) => {
      const text = accountText(account);
      return {
        account,
        score: scoreAccount(account, [
          (a) => accountCategory(a).includes('ASSET') ? 35 : 0,
          () => /\bbank\b|\bcash\b|\bchequing\b|\bchecking\b|operating account|operating bank|deposit account/.test(text) ? 40 : 0,
          () => sourceText && text && sourceText.split(' ').filter((token) => token.length > 2).some((token) => text.includes(token)) ? 15 : 0,
          (a) => String(a.normalSide || '').toUpperCase() === 'DEBIT' ? 5 : 0,
        ]),
      };
    })
    .filter((item) => item.score >= 40)
    .sort((a, b) => b.score - a.score || String(a.account.code).localeCompare(String(b.account.code)));

  return candidates[0]?.account || null;
};

const resolveSourceAccount = (accounts = [], context = {}) => {
  if (context.sourceAccountCode) return findAccountByCode(accounts, context.sourceAccountCode);
  if (context.sourceAccountId) return accounts.find((account) => String(account.id) === String(context.sourceAccountId)) || null;
  if (context.source?.ledgerAccountCode) return findAccountByCode(accounts, context.source.ledgerAccountCode);
  if (context.source?.ledgerAccountId) return accounts.find((account) => String(account.id) === String(context.source.ledgerAccountId)) || null;
  const sourceType = normalizeSourceClass(context.sourceType);
  if (sourceType === 'CREDIT_CARD') return resolveCreditCardLiabilityAccount(accounts, context.source);
  if (sourceType === 'BANK') return resolveBankLedgerAccount(accounts, context.source);
  return null;
};

const findExpenseTaxAccount = (accounts = []) =>
  accounts
    .map((account) => ({
      account,
      score: scoreAccount(account, [
        () => /expense tax clearing|input tax credit clearing|itc clearing|hst recoverable|gst hst recoverable/.test(accountText(account)) ? 50 : 0,
        (a) => accountCategory(a).includes('ASSET') ? 20 : 0,
        (a) => String(a.normalSide || '').toUpperCase() === 'DEBIT' ? 5 : 0,
        (a) => String(a.code || '') === '1066' ? 10 : 0,
      ]),
    }))
    .filter((item) => item.score >= 50)
    .sort((a, b) => b.score - a.score || String(a.account.code).localeCompare(String(b.account.code)))[0]?.account ||
  null;

const findSalesTaxAccount = (accounts = []) =>
  accounts
    .map((account) => ({
      account,
      score: scoreAccount(account, [
        () => /taxes payable|gst hst payable|hst payable|gst payable|sales tax payable/.test(accountText(account)) ? 50 : 0,
        (a) => accountCategory(a).includes('LIABIL') ? 20 : 0,
        (a) => String(a.normalSide || '').toUpperCase() === 'CREDIT' ? 5 : 0,
        (a) => String(a.code || '') === '2640' ? 10 : 0,
      ]),
    }))
    .filter((item) => item.score >= 50)
    .sort((a, b) => b.score - a.score || String(a.account.code).localeCompare(String(b.account.code)))[0]?.account ||
  null;

const findSquareClearingAccount = (accounts = []) =>
  accounts
    .map((account) => ({
      account,
      score: scoreAccount(account, [
        () => /square clearing/.test(accountText(account)) ? 70 : 0,
```
