        () => /undeposited funds|clearing|merchant clearing|payment clearing/.test(accountText(account)) ? 55 : 0,
        (a) => accountCategory(a).includes('ASSET') ? 20 : 0,
        (a) => String(a.normalSide || '').toUpperCase() === 'DEBIT' ? 5 : 0,
        (a) => String(a.code || '') === '1091' ? 15 : 0,
        (a) => String(a.code || '') === '1090' ? 10 : 0,
      ]),
    }))
    .filter((item) => item.score >= 55)
    .sort((a, b) => b.score - a.score || String(a.account.code).localeCompare(String(b.account.code)))[0]?.account ||
  null;

const findSquareSalesAccount = (accounts = []) =>
  accounts
    .map((account) => ({
      account,
      score: scoreAccount(account, [
        () => /sales of goods and services|restaurant sales|food sales|drink sales|event sales|catering sales/.test(accountText(account)) ? 60 : 0,
        (a) => accountCategory(a).includes('REVENUE') ? 25 : 0,
        (a) => String(a.normalSide || '').toUpperCase() === 'CREDIT' ? 5 : 0,
        (a) => String(a.code || '') === '8089' ? 10 : 0,
      ]),
    }))
    .filter((item) => item.score >= 60)
    .sort((a, b) => b.score - a.score || String(a.account.code).localeCompare(String(b.account.code)))[0]?.account ||
  null;

const findTipsPayableAccount = (accounts = []) =>
  accounts
    .map((account) => ({
      account,
      score: scoreAccount(account, [
        () => /tips payable|gratuities payable|employee tips/.test(accountText(account)) ? 65 : 0,
        (a) => accountCategory(a).includes('LIABIL') ? 20 : 0,
        (a) => String(a.normalSide || '').toUpperCase() === 'CREDIT' ? 5 : 0,
        (a) => String(a.code || '') === '2621' ? 10 : 0,
      ]),
    }))
    .filter((item) => item.score >= 65)
    .sort((a, b) => b.score - a.score || String(a.account.code).localeCompare(String(b.account.code)))[0]?.account ||
  null;

const findSurchargeRevenueAccount = (accounts = []) =>
  accounts
    .map((account) => ({
      account,
      score: scoreAccount(account, [
        () => /credit card surcharge revenue|surcharge revenue|card surcharge|other income/.test(accountText(account)) ? 60 : 0,
        (a) => accountCategory(a).includes('REVENUE') ? 25 : 0,
        (a) => String(a.normalSide || '').toUpperCase() === 'CREDIT' ? 5 : 0,
        (a) => String(a.code || '') === '8090' ? 15 : 0,
        (a) => String(a.code || '') === '8290' ? 10 : 0,
      ]),
    }))
    .filter((item) => item.score >= 60)
    .sort((a, b) => b.score - a.score || String(a.account.code).localeCompare(String(b.account.code)))[0]?.account ||
  null;

const findPaymentProcessingFeesAccount = (accounts = []) =>
  accounts
    .map((account) => ({
      account,
      score: scoreAccount(account, [
        () => /merchant.*processing fees|payment processing fees|square fees|bank charges|merchant fees/.test(accountText(account)) ? 60 : 0,
        (a) => accountCategory(a).includes('EXPENSE') ? 25 : 0,
        (a) => String(a.normalSide || '').toUpperCase() === 'DEBIT' ? 5 : 0,
        (a) => String(a.code || '') === '8851' ? 15 : 0,
        (a) => String(a.code || '') === '8850' ? 10 : 0,
      ]),
    }))
    .filter((item) => item.score >= 60)
    .sort((a, b) => b.score - a.score || String(a.account.code).localeCompare(String(b.account.code)))[0]?.account ||
  null;

const findPayrollClearingAccount = (accounts = []) =>
  accounts
    .map((account) => ({
      account,
      score: scoreAccount(account, [
        () => /payroll clearing|payroll funding clearing|payroll processor clearing/.test(accountText(account)) ? 75 : 0,
        () => /clearing/.test(accountText(account)) && /payroll|wage/.test(accountText(account)) ? 60 : 0,
        (a) => accountCategory(a).includes('ASSET') ? 20 : 0,
        (a) => String(a.normalSide || '').toUpperCase() === 'DEBIT' ? 5 : 0,
        (a) => String(a.code || '') === '1091' ? 12 : 0,
        (a) => String(a.code || '') === '1070' ? 4 : 0,
      ]),
    }))
    .filter((item) => item.score >= 60)
    .sort((a, b) => b.score - a.score || String(a.account.code).localeCompare(String(b.account.code)))[0]?.account ||
  null;

const findPayrollProcessingFeesAccount = (accounts = []) =>
  accounts
    .map((account) => ({
      account,
      score: scoreAccount(account, [
        () => /payroll processing fees|payroll processor fees|rise fees|payroll service fees/.test(accountText(account)) ? 70 : 0,
        () => /other charge/.test(accountText(account)) ? 35 : 0,
        (a) => accountCategory(a).includes('EXPENSE') ? 25 : 0,
        (a) => String(a.normalSide || '').toUpperCase() === 'DEBIT' ? 5 : 0,
        (a) => String(a.code || '') === '6310' ? 12 : 0,
        (a) => String(a.code || '') === '6300' ? 5 : 0,
      ]),
    }))
    .filter((item) => item.score >= 60)
    .sort((a, b) => b.score - a.score || String(a.account.code).localeCompare(String(b.account.code)))[0]?.account ||
  null;

const findGrossWagesAccount = (accounts = []) =>
  accounts
    .map((account) => ({
      account,
      score: scoreAccount(account, [
        () => /salaries and wages|gross wages|wages expense/.test(accountText(account)) ? 65 : 0,
        (a) => accountCategory(a).includes('EXPENSE') ? 25 : 0,
        (a) => String(a.normalSide || '').toUpperCase() === 'DEBIT' ? 5 : 0,
        (a) => String(a.code || '') === '9060' ? 10 : 0,
      ]),
    }))
    .filter((item) => item.score >= 65)
    .sort((a, b) => b.score - a.score || String(a.account.code).localeCompare(String(b.account.code)))[0]?.account ||
  null;

const findNetPayrollAccount = (accounts = []) =>
  accounts.find((account) => String(account.code || '') === '6200') ||
  accounts.find((account) => /net payroll/.test(accountText(account))) ||
  null;

const findEmployerCppAccount = (accounts = []) =>
  accounts.find((account) => String(account.code || '') === '6100') ||
  accounts.find((account) => /employer cpp/.test(accountText(account))) ||
  null;

const findEmployerEiAccount = (accounts = []) =>
  accounts.find((account) => String(account.code || '') === '6110') ||
  accounts.find((account) => /employer ei/.test(accountText(account))) ||
  null;

const findWsibPayableAccount = (accounts = []) =>
  accounts
    .map((account) => ({
      account,
      score: scoreAccount(account, [
        () => /wsib payable|workers compensation payable|workplace safety insurance payable/.test(accountText(account)) ? 70 : 0,
        () => /accrued liabilities/.test(accountText(account)) ? 35 : 0,
        (a) => accountCategory(a).includes('LIABIL') ? 25 : 0,
        (a) => String(a.normalSide || '').toUpperCase() === 'CREDIT' ? 5 : 0,
        (a) => String(a.code || '') === '2670' ? 12 : 0,
        (a) => String(a.code || '') === '2660' ? 4 : 0,
      ]),
    }))
    .filter((item) => item.score >= 60)
    .sort((a, b) => b.score - a.score || String(a.account.code).localeCompare(String(b.account.code)))[0]?.account ||
  null;

const findUnexplainedAccount = (accounts = []) =>
  accounts.find((account) => String(account.code || '') === '9999') ||
  accounts.find((account) => /unexplained|suspense|unidentified/.test(accountText(account))) ||
  null;

export const resolveTaxPayableAccount = (accounts = []) =>
  findSalesTaxAccount(accounts) ||
  accounts
    .map((account) => ({
      account,
      score: scoreAccount(account, [
        (a) => accountCategory(a).includes('LIABIL') ? 40 : 0,
        () => /gst hst payable|hst payable|gst payable|tax payable|sales tax payable|taxes payable/.test(accountText(account)) ? 50 : 0,
        (a) => String(a.normalSide || '').toUpperCase() === 'CREDIT' ? 5 : 0,
      ]),
    }))
    .filter((item) => item.score >= 50)
    .sort((a, b) => b.score - a.score || String(a.account.code).localeCompare(String(b.account.code)))[0]?.account ||
  null;

const buildTemplateLine = (account, side, amountFormula) => ({
  accountId: account?.id || null,
  accountCode: account?.code || null,
  accountDescription: account?.description || '',
  side,
  amountFormula,
});

const serializeAccountCandidate = (account, resolution = '') =>
  account
    ? {
      id: account.id || null,
      code: account.code || null,
      description: account.description || '',
      category: account.category || null,
      normalSide: account.normalSide || null,
      isPLAccount: Boolean(account.isPLAccount),
      resolution,
    }
    : null;

const summarizeDescriptorSignals = (group = {}) => ({
  creditCardPaymentDescriptor: isCreditCardPaymentDescriptor([
    group.normalizedMerchant,
    ...(group.transactions || []).map((tx) => tx.description),
  ].filter(Boolean).join(' ')),
  creditCardPaymentSupportedBySourceAndDirection: isCreditCardPaymentGroup(group),
  taxRemittanceDescriptor: isTaxRemittanceDescriptor([
    group.normalizedMerchant,
    ...(group.transactions || []).map((tx) => tx.description),
  ].filter(Boolean).join(' ')),
  taxRemittanceSupportedBySourceAndDirection: isTaxRemittanceGroup(group),
  squareDescriptor: isSquareDescriptor([
    group.normalizedMerchant,
    ...(group.transactions || []).map((tx) => tx.description),
  ].filter(Boolean).join(' ')),
  squarePayoutSupportedBySourceAndDirection: isSquarePayoutGroup(group),
  payrollFundingDescriptor: isPayrollFundingDescriptor([
    group.normalizedMerchant,
    ...(group.transactions || []).map((tx) => tx.description),
  ].filter(Boolean).join(' ')),
  payrollFundingSupportedBySourceAndDirection: isPayrollFundingGroup(group),
});

export const buildRuleSuggestionPromptContext = ({
  organizationId,
  group = {},
  accounts = [],
  existingRules = [],
  accountingPolicies = [],
  transferMatching = null,
} = {}) => {
  const sample = group.sampleTransactions?.[0] || group.transactions?.[0] || {};
  const source = {
    id: sample.sourceId || sample.source?.id || null,
    name: sample.sourceName || sample.source?.name || null,
    type: group.sourceType || sample.sourceType || sample.source?.type || null,
    ledgerAccountId: sample.sourceLedgerAccountId || sample.source?.ledgerAccountId || null,
    ledgerAccountCode: sample.sourceLedgerAccountCode || sample.source?.ledgerAccount?.code || null,
    ledgerAccountDescription: sample.sourceLedgerAccountDescription || sample.source?.ledgerAccount?.description || null,
  };

  const sourceAccount = resolveSourceAccount(accounts, {
    sourceType: group.sourceType,
    source,
  });
  const creditCardLiabilityAccount = resolveCreditCardLiabilityAccount(accounts, source);
  const bankLedgerAccount = resolveBankLedgerAccount(accounts, source);
  const taxPayableAccount = resolveTaxPayableAccount(accounts);
  const expenseTaxClearingAccount = findExpenseTaxAccount(accounts);
  const salesTaxPayableAccount = findSalesTaxAccount(accounts);
  const squareClearingAccount = findSquareClearingAccount(accounts);
  const squareSalesAccount = findSquareSalesAccount(accounts);
  const tipsPayableAccount = findTipsPayableAccount(accounts);
  const surchargeRevenueAccount = findSurchargeRevenueAccount(accounts);
  const paymentProcessingFeesAccount = findPaymentProcessingFeesAccount(accounts);
  const payrollClearingAccount = findPayrollClearingAccount(accounts);
  const payrollProcessingFeesAccount = findPayrollProcessingFeesAccount(accounts);
  const grossWagesAccount = findGrossWagesAccount(accounts);
  const netPayrollAccount = findNetPayrollAccount(accounts);
  const employerCppAccount = findEmployerCppAccount(accounts);
  const employerEiAccount = findEmployerEiAccount(accounts);
  const wsibPayableAccount = findWsibPayableAccount(accounts);
  const unexplainedAccount = findUnexplainedAccount(accounts);

  const relatedExistingRules = (existingRules || [])
    .map((rule) => ({ rule, score: scoreRuleForGroup(rule, group) }))
    .filter((item) => item.score > 0)
    .sort((a, b) => b.score - a.score)
    .slice(0, 8)
    .map((item) => serializeExistingRuleForGroup(item.rule));

  return {
    organization: {
      id: organizationId,
    },
    groupSummary: {
      normalizedMerchant: group.normalizedMerchant,
      transactionCount: group.transactionCount,
      uncategorizedCount: group.uncategorizedCount,
      incompleteCount: group.incompleteCount,
      amountRange: Number.isFinite(group.amountMin) && Number.isFinite(group.amountMax)
        ? `${group.amountMin.toFixed(2)} to ${group.amountMax.toFixed(2)}`
        : null,
      totalAmount: group.amountTotal,
      sourceType: group.sourceType,
      sourceClass: normalizeSourceClass(group.sourceType),
      direction: group.direction,
      dateRange: group.dateRange,
    },
    sourceAccountContext: {
      source,
      currentSourceLedgerAccountCandidate: serializeAccountCandidate(sourceAccount, 'resolved from source type and source name'),
      creditCardLiabilityAccountCandidate: serializeAccountCandidate(creditCardLiabilityAccount, 'credit card liability candidate from available chart accounts'),
      bankLedgerAccountCandidate: serializeAccountCandidate(bankLedgerAccount, 'bank/cash candidate from available chart accounts'),
      fundingBankAccountSelectionRequiredWhenUnknown: true,
      schemaNote: 'Prefer Source.ledgerAccountId when set; otherwise use availableAccounts and source context to infer the source ledger account.',
    },
    taxAccountContext: {
      hstPayableAccountCandidate: serializeAccountCandidate(taxPayableAccount, 'GST/HST or sales tax payable liability candidate'),
      expenseTaxClearingAccountCandidate: serializeAccountCandidate(expenseTaxClearingAccount, 'ITC/expense tax clearing asset candidate'),
      salesTaxPayableAccountCandidate: serializeAccountCandidate(salesTaxPayableAccount, 'sales tax payable candidate'),
    },
    squareAccountContext: {
      clearingAccountCandidate: serializeAccountCandidate(squareClearingAccount, 'Square clearing or undeposited funds candidate'),
      salesAccountCandidate: serializeAccountCandidate(squareSalesAccount, 'restaurant goods/services sales candidate'),
      hstPayableAccountCandidate: serializeAccountCandidate(taxPayableAccount, 'HST collected payable candidate for Square sales reports'),
      tipsPayableAccountCandidate: serializeAccountCandidate(tipsPayableAccount, 'employee tips payable candidate'),
      surchargeRevenueAccountCandidate: serializeAccountCandidate(surchargeRevenueAccount, 'separately disclosed credit-card surcharge revenue candidate'),
      paymentProcessingFeesAccountCandidate: serializeAccountCandidate(paymentProcessingFeesAccount, 'Square merchant/payment processing fees candidate'),
      unexplainedAccountCandidate: serializeAccountCandidate(unexplainedAccount, 'temporary unexplained or suspense account candidate'),
      bankPayoutRule: 'For ordinary positive Square deposits into a bank source, debit the source bank ledger account and credit Square clearing/undeposited funds. Do not categorize the bank deposit directly to sales revenue.',
      negativePayoutRule: 'For negative Square withdrawals or payout reversals from a bank source, debit Square clearing/undeposited funds and credit the source bank ledger account until the reversal/refund/chargeback/fee is identified.',
    },
    payrollAccountContext: {
      payrollFundingSupportedBySourceAndDirection: isPayrollFundingGroup(group),
      payrollClearingAccountCandidate: serializeAccountCandidate(payrollClearingAccount, 'Rise payroll funding clearing asset candidate'),
      grossWagesAccountCandidate: serializeAccountCandidate(grossWagesAccount, 'gross wages expense candidate for payroll-provider reports only'),
      netPayrollAccountCandidate: serializeAccountCandidate(netPayrollAccount, 'legacy/summary-only net payroll account; do not use as principal Rise CAP bank category'),
      employerCppAccountCandidate: serializeAccountCandidate(employerCppAccount, 'employer CPP expense candidate for payroll-provider reports only'),
      employerEiAccountCandidate: serializeAccountCandidate(employerEiAccount, 'employer EI expense candidate for payroll-provider reports only'),
      payrollProcessingFeesAccountCandidate: serializeAccountCandidate(payrollProcessingFeesAccount, 'payroll processing fee expense candidate for payroll-provider reports only'),
      wsibPayableAccountCandidate: serializeAccountCandidate(wsibPayableAccount, 'WSIB payable liability candidate'),
      bankFundingRule: 'For outgoing Rise CAP transactions from a bank source, debit Payroll Clearing and credit the source bank ledger account. Use NO_TAX and do not classify the full bank withdrawal as wages, net payroll, CPP/EI, HST, ITC, or ordinary expense.',
      reportAllocationRule: 'Detailed gross wages, employer CPP/EI, payroll processing fees, separately reported HST on fees, and WSIB must come from the Rise payroll report or summary-journal workflow, not from the bank descriptor alone.',
      cutoffRule: 'Unsupported or prior-period Rise withdrawals remain in Payroll Clearing until payroll-run or opening-liability support is found.',
    },
    descriptorSignals: summarizeDescriptorSignals(group),
    completedTransactionSamples: group.completedTransactionSamples || [],
    uncategorizedTransactionSamples: group.uncategorizedTransactionSamples || [],
    incompleteTransactionSamples: group.incompleteTransactionSamples || [],
    sampleTransactions: group.sampleTransactions || [],
    taxRateEvidenceFromCompletedTransactions: group.taxRateSuggestion || null,
    historicalPrecedent: group.historicalPrecedent || null,
    organizationAccountingPolicies: accountingPolicies,
    relatedExistingRules,
    transferMatching,
    availableAccounts: accounts.slice(0, 150).map((a) => ({
      id: a.id,
      code: a.code,
      description: a.description,
      category: a.category,
      normalSide: a.normalSide,
      isPLAccount: a.isPLAccount,
      statementLine: a.statementLine,
    })),
  };
};

const inferTemplateSide = (line = {}) => {
  const explicitSide = String(line?.side || line?.entryType || line?.type || '').trim().toUpperCase();
  if (explicitSide === 'CREDIT' || explicitSide === 'DEBIT') return explicitSide;

  const debit = Number(line?.debit || 0);
  const credit = Number(line?.credit || 0);
  if (Number.isFinite(credit) && credit > 0 && credit >= debit) return 'CREDIT';
  return 'DEBIT';
};

export const normalizeJournalTemplateLines = (lines, accounts = [], context = {}) => {
  if (!Array.isArray(lines)) return [];

  const normalizedLines = lines
    .map((line) => {
      if (!line || typeof line !== 'object') return null;
      const account = resolveJournalTemplateAccount(line, accounts);
      if (!account) return null;
      const accountCode = account.code;

      return {
        ...line,
        accountId: account.id || line.accountId || null,
        accountCode,
        accountDescription: account.description || line.accountDescription || line.description || '',
        side: inferTemplateSide(line),
        amountFormula: normalizeAmountFormula(line?.amountFormula || line?.formula),
      };
    })
    .filter(Boolean);

  const sourceAccount = resolveSourceAccount(accounts, context);
  const primaryAccount = findAccountByCode(accounts, context.suggestedAccountCode) || null;
  const taxTreatment = String(context.taxTreatment || '').toUpperCase();
  const amountDirection = String(context.amountDirection || '').toUpperCase();
  const isIncome = amountDirection === 'INCOME' || SALES_TAX_TREATMENTS.has(taxTreatment);
  const expenseTaxAccount = findExpenseTaxAccount(accounts);
  const salesTaxAccount = findSalesTaxAccount(accounts);

  const withoutPrimaryAndSystem = normalizedLines.filter((line) => {
    const code = String(line.accountCode || '');
    return code !== String(primaryAccount?.code || '') &&
      code !== String(sourceAccount?.code || '') &&
      code !== String(expenseTaxAccount?.code || '') &&
      code !== String(salesTaxAccount?.code || '') &&
      code !== '1066' &&
      code !== '1240' &&
      code !== '2640';
  });

  if (!primaryAccount || !sourceAccount) return normalizedLines;

  const taxAccount = PURCHASE_ITC_TREATMENTS.has(taxTreatment)
    ? expenseTaxAccount
    : SALES_TAX_TREATMENTS.has(taxTreatment)
      ? salesTaxAccount
      : null;

  if (TAX_REMITTANCE_TREATMENTS.has(taxTreatment)) {
    const payableAccount = salesTaxAccount || primaryAccount;
    return [
      buildTemplateLine(payableAccount, 'DEBIT', 'gross'),
      ...withoutPrimaryAndSystem,
      buildTemplateLine(sourceAccount, 'CREDIT', 'gross'),
    ].filter((line) => line.accountCode);
  }

  const transactionType = String(context.transactionType || '').toUpperCase();
  if (context.payrollFunding || transactionType === 'PAYROLL_FUNDING') {
    const payrollClearingAccount = findPayrollClearingAccount(accounts) || primaryAccount;
    return [
      buildTemplateLine(payrollClearingAccount, 'DEBIT', 'gross'),
      buildTemplateLine(sourceAccount, 'CREDIT', 'gross'),
    ].filter((line) => line.accountCode);
  }

  if (isIncome) {
    return [
      buildTemplateLine(sourceAccount, 'DEBIT', 'gross'),
      ...withoutPrimaryAndSystem,
      buildTemplateLine(primaryAccount, 'CREDIT', taxAccount ? 'net' : 'gross'),
      ...(taxAccount ? [buildTemplateLine(taxAccount, 'CREDIT', 'hst')] : []),
    ].filter((line) => line.accountCode);
  }

  return [
    buildTemplateLine(primaryAccount, 'DEBIT', taxAccount ? 'net' : 'gross'),
    ...(taxAccount ? [buildTemplateLine(taxAccount, 'DEBIT', 'hst')] : []),
    ...withoutPrimaryAndSystem,
    buildTemplateLine(sourceAccount, 'CREDIT', 'gross'),
  ].filter((line) => line.accountCode);
};

const FORMULA_AMOUNTS = Object.freeze({
  gross: 1,
  net: 0.8849557522,
  hst: 0.1150442478,
});

export const validateJournalTemplateLines = (lines = [], accounts = [], context = {}) => {
  const errors = [];
  if (!Array.isArray(lines) || !lines.length) errors.push('journal_template_missing');

  const accountByCode = new Map(accounts.map((account) => [String(account.code), account]));
  let debit = 0;
  let credit = 0;
  let hstLines = 0;
  let revenueOrExpenseLines = 0;

  for (const line of Array.isArray(lines) ? lines : []) {
    const account = accountByCode.get(String(line?.accountCode || ''));
    if (!account) {
      errors.push(`account_not_found:${line?.accountCode || ''}`);
      continue;
    }

    const side = String(line?.side || '').toUpperCase();
    if (side !== 'DEBIT' && side !== 'CREDIT') errors.push(`invalid_side:${line?.accountCode}`);

    const formula = normalizeAmountFormula(line?.amountFormula || line?.formula);
    const amount = FORMULA_AMOUNTS[formula] ?? FORMULA_AMOUNTS.gross;
    if (side === 'DEBIT') debit += amount;
    if (side === 'CREDIT') credit += amount;
    if (formula === 'hst') hstLines += 1;

    const category = accountCategory(account);
    if (category.includes('REVENUE') || category.includes('EXPENSE') || category.includes('COST')) {
      revenueOrExpenseLines += 1;
    }
  }

  const taxTreatment = String(context.taxTreatment || '').toUpperCase();
  const transactionType = String(context.transactionType || '').toUpperCase();
  if (Math.abs(debit - credit) > 0.0001) errors.push('journal_template_unbalanced');
  if (taxTreatment === 'NO_TAX' && hstLines > 0) errors.push('no_tax_has_tax_line');
  if (taxTreatment === 'HST_REMITTANCE' && hstLines > 0) errors.push('tax_remittance_has_tax_line');
  if (['CREDIT_CARD_PAYMENT', 'TRANSFER', 'TAX_REMITTANCE', 'PAYROLL_FUNDING', 'PAYROLL_REMITTANCE', 'PAYMENT_PROCESSOR_PAYOUT', 'PAYMENT_PROCESSOR_REVERSAL'].includes(transactionType)) {
    if (revenueOrExpenseLines > 0) errors.push('transfer_has_revenue_or_expense_account');
  }

  return {
    valid: errors.length === 0,
    errors,
    debitFormulaTotal: Number(debit.toFixed(6)),
    creditFormulaTotal: Number(credit.toFixed(6)),
  };
};

const RISK_KEYWORDS = {
  HIGH: ['cra', 'payroll', 'owner', 'shareholder', 'loan', 'insurance', 'legal', 'settlement', 'draw', 'contribution'],
  MEDIUM: ['transfer', 'payment', 'visa', 'mastercard', 'amex', 'interac'],
};

const inferRiskLevel = (description, amount) => {
  const normalized = normalizeText(description);
  for (const keyword of RISK_KEYWORDS.HIGH) {
    if (normalized.includes(keyword)) return 'HIGH';
  }
  if (Math.abs(Number(amount || 0)) > 5000) return 'HIGH';
  for (const keyword of RISK_KEYWORDS.MEDIUM) {
    if (normalized.includes(keyword)) return 'MEDIUM';
  }
  return 'LOW';
};

const groupTransactions = (transactions) => {
  const groups = new Map();

  for (const tx of transactions) {
    const vendorKey = extractVendorTokens(tx.description);
    const direction = Number(tx.amount || 0) >= 0 ? 'INCOME' : 'EXPENSE';
    const sourceType = String(tx.source?.type || 'UNKNOWN').toUpperCase();
    const groupKey = `${vendorKey}||${direction}||${sourceType}`;

    if (!groups.has(groupKey)) {
      groups.set(groupKey, {
        normalizedMerchant: vendorKey,
        direction,
        sourceType,
        transactions: [],
        amounts: [],
        dates: [],
      });
    }

    const group = groups.get(groupKey);
    group.transactions.push(tx);
    group.amounts.push(Math.abs(Number(tx.amount || 0)));
    group.dates.push(tx.date);
  }

  return Array.from(groups.values())
    .filter((g) => g.transactions.length >= 2)
    .map((g) => {
      const amounts = g.amounts.sort((a, b) => a - b);
      const totalAmount = amounts.reduce((sum, v) => sum + v, 0);
      const categorizedTransactions = g.transactions.filter((tx) => tx.categoryId);
      const uncategorizedTransactions = g.transactions.filter((tx) => !tx.categoryId);
      const missingTaxTransactions = g.transactions.filter((tx) => transactionNeedsTaxForRule(tx));
      const missingReceiptTransactions = g.transactions.filter((tx) =>
        Number(tx.amount || 0) < 0 &&
        !tx.receiptId &&
        !isTransferLikeTransaction(tx)
      );
      const unpostedTransactions = g.transactions.filter((tx) =>
        !tx.journalEntry?.id || tx.journalEntry?.posted !== true
      );
      const uncategorized = uncategorizedTransactions.length;
      const incompleteTransactionIds = new Set([
        ...uncategorizedTransactions.map((tx) => tx.id),
        ...missingTaxTransactions.map((tx) => tx.id),
        ...missingReceiptTransactions.map((tx) => tx.id),
        ...unpostedTransactions.map((tx) => tx.id),
      ]);
      const riskLevel = inferRiskLevel(g.normalizedMerchant, amounts[amounts.length - 1]);
      const sampleTx = g.transactions.slice(0, 3);
      const taxRateSuggestion = getTaxRateEvidence(g.transactions);

      const formatTxSample = (tx) => ({
        id: tx.id,
        date: tx.date,
        description: tx.description,
        amount: tx.amount,
        taxes: tx.taxes,
        source: tx.source?.type || null,
        sourceId: tx.source?.id || null,
        sourceName: tx.source?.name || null,
        sourceLedgerAccountId: tx.source?.ledgerAccountId || null,
        sourceLedgerAccountCode: tx.source?.ledgerAccount?.code || null,
        sourceLedgerAccountDescription: tx.source?.ledgerAccount?.description || null,
        categoryId: tx.categoryId || null,
        currentCategoryCode: tx.category?.code || null,
        currentCategoryDescription: tx.category?.description || null,
        inferredTaxTreatment: tx.categoryId ? inferTaxTreatmentFromTransaction(tx) : null,
        matchedReceiptSummary: tx.receipt?.companyName || null,
        receiptId: tx.receiptId || null,
        hasJournalEntry: Boolean(tx.journalEntry?.id && tx.journalEntry?.posted === true),
        journalEntryId: tx.journalEntry?.id || null,
        journalPosted: tx.journalEntry?.posted === true,
        incompleteReasons: [
          !tx.categoryId ? 'missing_category' : null,
          transactionNeedsTaxForRule(tx) ? 'missing_tax' : null,
          Number(tx.amount || 0) < 0 && !tx.receiptId && !isTransferLikeTransaction(tx) ? 'missing_receipt' : null,
          !tx.journalEntry?.id || tx.journalEntry?.posted !== true ? 'unposted_journal' : null,
        ].filter(Boolean),
      });

      return {
        groupKey: `${g.normalizedMerchant}||${g.direction}||${g.sourceType}`,
        normalizedMerchant: g.normalizedMerchant,
        direction: g.direction,
        sourceType: g.sourceType,
        transactionCount: g.transactions.length,
        incompleteCount: incompleteTransactionIds.size,
        uncategorizedCount: uncategorized,
        missingTaxCount: missingTaxTransactions.length,
        missingReceiptCount: missingReceiptTransactions.length,
        unpostedCount: unpostedTransactions.length,
        categorizedCount: categorizedTransactions.length,
        amountMin: amounts[0],
        amountMax: amounts[amounts.length - 1],
        amountTotal: Number(totalAmount.toFixed(2)),
        dateRange: {
          from: new Date(Math.min(...g.dates.map((d) => new Date(d).getTime()))),
          to: new Date(Math.max(...g.dates.map((d) => new Date(d).getTime()))),
        },
        riskLevel,
        completedTransactionSamples: categorizedTransactions.slice(0, 6).map(formatTxSample),
        uncategorizedTransactionSamples: uncategorizedTransactions.slice(0, 6).map(formatTxSample),
        incompleteTransactionSamples: g.transactions
          .filter((tx) => incompleteTransactionIds.has(tx.id))
          .slice(0, 10)
          .map(formatTxSample),
        transactions: g.transactions.map(formatTxSample),
        taxRateSuggestion,
        sampleTransactions: sampleTx.map(formatTxSample),
        transactionIds: g.transactions.map((tx) => tx.id),
      };
    })
    .filter((g) => g.incompleteCount > 0 || g.uncategorizedCount > 0)
    .sort((a, b) =>
      b.incompleteCount - a.incompleteCount ||
      b.uncategorizedCount - a.uncategorizedCount ||
      b.unpostedCount - a.unpostedCount ||
      b.missingReceiptCount - a.missingReceiptCount ||
      b.missingTaxCount - a.missingTaxCount ||
      b.transactionCount - a.transactionCount
    );
};

const normalizeRuleMatchText = (value) =>
  normalizeText(value)
    .split(' ')
    .filter((token) => token && token !== 's' && token.length > 1)
    .join(' ');

const tokenizeRuleMatchText = (value) =>
  normalizeRuleMatchText(value).split(' ').filter(Boolean);

const getRuleMeta = (rule) => {
  const meta = safeJsonParse(rule?.patterns) || {};
  const rawPatterns = Array.isArray(meta.patterns)
    ? meta.patterns
    : Array.isArray(meta.descriptionContainsAny)
      ? meta.descriptionContainsAny
      : [];
  const patterns = rawPatterns.map((pattern) => String(pattern || '').trim()).filter(Boolean);
  const inferredPattern = patterns.length ? '' : inferPatternFromRuleName(rule?.name);

  return {
    ...meta,
    patterns: patterns.length ? patterns : (inferredPattern ? [inferredPattern] : []),
    inferredPattern: !patterns.length && Boolean(inferredPattern),
    enabled: meta.enabled !== false,
    matchMode: String(meta.matchMode || 'ANY').toUpperCase(),
    sourceType: meta.sourceType ? String(meta.sourceType).toUpperCase() : null,
    amountDirection: meta.amountDirection ? String(meta.amountDirection).toUpperCase() : null,
  };
};

const rulePatternMatchesGroup = (pattern, group, groupText) => {
  const normalizedPattern = normalizeRuleMatchText(pattern);
  if (!normalizedPattern) return false;

  const patternTokens = tokenizeRuleMatchText(normalizedPattern);
  const groupTokens = new Set(tokenizeRuleMatchText(groupText));
  if (patternTokens.length && patternTokens.every((token) => groupTokens.has(token))) return true;
  if (normalizedPattern.length > 3 && (groupText.includes(normalizedPattern) || normalizedPattern.includes(groupText))) return true;

  const descriptionTokens = new Set(tokenizeRuleMatchText((group.transactions || []).map((tx) => tx.description).join(' ')));
  return patternTokens.length > 0 && patternTokens.every((token) => descriptionTokens.has(token));
};

const scoreRuleForGroup = (rule, group) => {
  const meta = getRuleMeta(rule);
  if (!meta.enabled) return 0;
  if (rule.status && rule.status !== 'ACTIVE') return 0;

  const groupText = normalizeRuleMatchText(group.normalizedMerchant);
  let score = 0;

  if (groupText) {
    const patterns = meta.patterns;
    if (patterns.length) {
      const patternMatches = patterns.filter((pattern) => rulePatternMatchesGroup(pattern, group, groupText));
      if (patternMatches.length) score = 100 + patternMatches.length;
    }
    if (score === 0) {
      const ruleNameText = normalizeRuleMatchText(rule.name);
      const groupTokens = tokenizeRuleMatchText(groupText);
      if (groupTokens.length >= 2 && groupTokens.every((token) => ruleNameText.includes(token))) {
        score = 50 + groupTokens.length;
      }
    }
  }

  if (meta.amountDirection && meta.amountDirection !== 'ANY' && meta.amountDirection !== group.direction) {
    score = 0;
  }
  if (meta.sourceType && meta.sourceType !== group.sourceType) {
    score = 0;
  }

  if (score === 0 && rule.categoryId && meta.patterns.length === 0) {
    const txs = group.transactions || [];
    const matchingTxs = txs.filter((tx) => tx.categoryId === rule.categoryId);
    const categorizedTxs = txs.filter((tx) => tx.categoryId);
    if (matchingTxs.length > 0 && categorizedTxs.length > 0) {
      const share = matchingTxs.length / categorizedTxs.length;
      if (share >= 0.8) {
        score = 30 + Math.min(matchingTxs.length, 5);
      }
    }
  }

  return score;
};

const serializeExistingRuleForGroup = (rule) => {
  const meta = getRuleMeta(rule);
  return {
    id: rule.id,
    name: rule.name,
    patterns: meta.patterns,
    group: meta.group || 'General',
    notes: meta.notes || '',
    enabled: meta.enabled !== false,
    matchMode: meta.matchMode || 'ANY',
    sourceType: meta.sourceType,
    amountDirection: meta.amountDirection,
    transactionType: meta.transactionType || null,
    taxTreatment: meta.taxTreatment || null,
    previousTaxRate: meta.previousTaxRate || null,
    applyPreviousTaxRate: Boolean(meta.applyPreviousTaxRate),
    requiredReceipt: Boolean(rule.requiredReceipt),
    autoCategory: Boolean(rule.autoCategory),
    autoApplyTaxes: Boolean(rule.autoApplyTaxes),
    llmSummary: meta.llmSummary || '',
    proposalSource: meta.proposalSource || null,
    journalMode: meta.journalMode || 'STANDARD',
    journalTemplateLines: Array.isArray(meta.journalTemplateLines) ? meta.journalTemplateLines : [],
    suggestedAccountId: rule.category?.id || rule.categoryId || null,
    suggestedAccountCode: rule.category?.code || null,
    suggestedAccountDescription: rule.category?.description || '',
    ruleStatus: rule.status || 'ACTIVE',
  };
};

const recomputeGroupWorkForRule = (group, suggestedRule) => {
  if (!suggestedRule) return group;

  const suppressMissingTax = isNoTaxTreatment(suggestedRule.taxTreatment);
  const requiresReceipt = Boolean(suggestedRule.requiredReceipt);
  const transactions = Array.isArray(group.transactions) ? group.transactions : [];
  const isMissingCategory = (tx) => !tx.categoryId && !tx.currentCategoryCode;
  const isMissingTax = (tx) =>
    !suppressMissingTax &&
    transactionNeedsTaxForRule(tx, suggestedRule);
  const isMissingReceipt = (tx) =>
    requiresReceipt &&
    Number(tx.amount || 0) < 0 &&
    !tx.receiptId &&
    !tx.hasReceipt &&
    !isTransferLikeTransaction(tx);
  const isUnposted = (tx) => !tx.hasJournalEntry && tx.journalPosted !== true;

  const withReasons = transactions.map((tx) => ({
    ...tx,
    incompleteReasons: [
      isMissingCategory(tx) ? 'missing_category' : null,
      isMissingTax(tx) ? 'missing_tax' : null,
      isMissingReceipt(tx) ? 'missing_receipt' : null,
      isUnposted(tx) ? 'unposted_journal' : null,
    ].filter(Boolean),
  }));

  const uncategorizedTransactions = withReasons.filter(isMissingCategory);
  const missingTaxTransactions = withReasons.filter(isMissingTax);
  const missingReceiptTransactions = withReasons.filter(isMissingReceipt);
  const unpostedTransactions = withReasons.filter(isUnposted);
  const incompleteIds = new Set(
    withReasons
      .filter((tx) => tx.incompleteReasons.length > 0)
      .map((tx) => tx.id)
  );
  const incompleteTransactions = withReasons.filter((tx) => incompleteIds.has(tx.id));

  return {
    ...group,
    transactions: withReasons,
    completedTransactionSamples: withReasons.filter((tx) => !isMissingCategory(tx)).slice(0, 6),
    uncategorizedTransactionSamples: uncategorizedTransactions.slice(0, 6),
    incompleteTransactionSamples: incompleteTransactions.slice(0, 10),
    sampleTransactions: withReasons.slice(0, 3),
    incompleteCount: incompleteIds.size,
    uncategorizedCount: uncategorizedTransactions.length,
    missingTaxCount: missingTaxTransactions.length,
    missingReceiptCount: missingReceiptTransactions.length,
    unpostedCount: unpostedTransactions.length,
    categorizedCount: withReasons.length - uncategorizedTransactions.length,
  };
};

const attachExistingRulesToGroups = (groups, rules, allTransactions = []) =>
  groups.map((group) => {
    const best = rules
      .map((rule) => ({ rule, score: scoreRuleForGroup(rule, group) }))
      .filter((item) => item.score > 0)
      .sort((a, b) => b.score - a.score || String(a.rule.name || '').localeCompare(String(b.rule.name || '')))[0];

    if (!best) return group;

    const suggestedRule = serializeExistingRuleForGroup(best.rule);
    return recomputeGroupWorkForRule({ ...group, suggestedRule }, suggestedRule);
  }).filter((group) => group.incompleteCount > 0 || group.uncategorizedCount > 0);

const DSL_OPERATORS = Object.freeze({
  containsAny: (fieldValue, values) =>
    values.some((v) => normalizeText(fieldValue).includes(normalizeText(v))),
  containsAll: (fieldValue, values) =>
    values.every((v) => normalizeText(fieldValue).includes(normalizeText(v))),
  equals: (fieldValue, value) =>
    String(fieldValue || '').toUpperCase() === String(value || '').toUpperCase(),
  lessThan: (fieldValue, value) => Number(fieldValue || 0) < Number(value || 0),
  greaterThan: (fieldValue, value) => Number(fieldValue || 0) > Number(value || 0),
  between: (fieldValue, [min, max]) =>
    Number(fieldValue || 0) >= Number(min || 0) && Number(fieldValue || 0) <= Number(max || 0),
});

export function matchesDslConditions(transaction, conditions = [], matchMode = 'ALL') {
  const test = (condition) => {
    const operator = DSL_OPERATORS[condition.operator];
    if (!operator) return true;
    const fieldMap = {
      descriptionNormalized: normalizeText(transaction.description),
      amount: transaction.amount,
      sourceType: String(transaction.source?.type || '').toUpperCase(),
      categoryCode: transaction.category?.code || '',
    };
    const fieldValue = fieldMap[condition.field];
    if (fieldValue === undefined) return true;
    return operator(fieldValue, condition.value);
  };

  return matchMode === 'ALL' ? conditions.every(test) : conditions.some(test);
}

export function compileDslToPrismaWhere(conditions = [], matchMode = 'ALL') {
  const clauses = conditions.map((condition) => {
    switch (condition.field) {
      case 'descriptionNormalized': {
        if (condition.operator === 'containsAny') {
          return { OR: condition.value.map((v) => ({ description: { contains: v, mode: 'insensitive' } })) };
        }
        if (condition.operator === 'containsAll') {
          return { AND: condition.value.map((v) => ({ description: { contains: v, mode: 'insensitive' } })) };
        }
        return {};
      }
      case 'amount': {
        if (condition.operator === 'lessThan') return { amount: { lt: Number(condition.value) } };
        if (condition.operator === 'greaterThan') return { amount: { gt: Number(condition.value) } };
        if (condition.operator === 'between') return { amount: { gte: Number(condition.value[0]), lte: Number(condition.value[1]) } };
        return {};
      }
      case 'sourceType': {
        if (condition.operator === 'equals') return { source: { type: condition.value } };
        return {};
      }
      default:
        return {};
    }
  }).filter((c) => Object.keys(c).length > 0);

  if (!clauses.length) return {};
  return matchMode === 'ALL' ? { AND: clauses } : { OR: clauses };
}

class RuleSuggestionService {
  async getUncategorizedGroups(organizationId, { limit = 3000 } = {}) {
    const [transactions, allTransactions, existingRules] = await Promise.all([
      prisma.bankTransaction.findMany({
        where: {
          organizationId,
          OR: [
            { categoryId: null },
            { receiptId: null, amount: { lt: 0 } },
            { amount: { lt: 0 }, OR: [{ taxes: null }, { taxes: 0 }] },
            { journalEntry: null },
            { journalEntry: { posted: false } },
          ],
        },
        include: {
          category: { select: { id: true, code: true, description: true } },
          source: { select: SOURCE_WITH_LEDGER_SELECT },
          receipt: { select: { id: true, companyName: true } },
          journalEntry: { select: { id: true, posted: true } },
        },
        orderBy: { date: 'desc' },
        take: limit,
      }),
      prisma.bankTransaction.findMany({
        where: { organizationId },
        include: {
          category: { select: { id: true, code: true, description: true } },
          source: { select: SOURCE_WITH_LEDGER_SELECT },
          receipt: { select: { id: true, companyName: true } },
          journalEntry: { select: { id: true, posted: true } },
        },
        orderBy: { date: 'desc' },
      }),
      prisma.accountingRule.findMany({
        where: { organizationId, status: 'ACTIVE' },
        include: { category: { select: { id: true, code: true, description: true } } },
      }),
    ]);

    const grouped = TransactionGroupService.groupTransactions(transactions);
    return attachExistingRulesToGroups(grouped, existingRules, allTransactions);
  }

  async generateSuggestionsFromGroups(organizationId, userId, sessionId, { maxGroups = 10, groupKeys = null } = {}) {
    const groups = await this.getUncategorizedGroups(organizationId, { limit: 3000 });
    const requestedGroupKeys = Array.isArray(groupKeys) ? new Set(groupKeys.map(String)) : null;
    const candidateGroups = groups
      .filter((g) => !requestedGroupKeys || requestedGroupKeys.has(g.groupKey))
      .slice(0, maxGroups);

    if (!candidateGroups.length) {
      return { message: 'No transaction groups found.', suggestions: [] };
    }

    const persistentGroups = await TransactionGroupService.persistGroups(organizationId, candidateGroups);
    const groupByKey = new Map(persistentGroups.map((g) => [g.groupKey, g]));

    const accounts = await prisma.accountingCategory.findMany({
      select: { id: true, code: true, description: true, category: true, normalSide: true, isPLAccount: true, statementLine: true },
      orderBy: [{ sortOrder: 'asc' }, { code: 'asc' }],
    });

    const existingRules = await prisma.accountingRule.findMany({
      where: { organizationId },
      select: { id: true, name: true, patterns: true },
    });

    const suggestions = [];

    for (const group of candidateGroups) {
      try {
        const enrichedGroup = await this._enrichGroupWithHistoricalPrecedent(organizationId, group);
        const suggestion = await this._suggestRuleForGroup(enrichedGroup, accounts, existingRules, organizationId, userId, sessionId);
        if (suggestion) {
          const pg = groupByKey.get(group.groupKey);
          suggestion.transactionGroupId = pg?.id || null;
          suggestions.push(suggestion);
        }
      } catch (err) {
        console.warn(`Rule suggestion failed for group "${group.normalizedMerchant}":`, err.message);
      }
    }

    const saved = await Promise.all(
      suggestions.map((s) =>
        this._createSuggestionRow({
          organizationId,
          suggestedRuleJson: JSON.stringify(s.rule),
          matchedTransactionIdsJson: JSON.stringify(s.matchedTransactionIds),
          impactSummaryJson: JSON.stringify(s.impact),
          confidence: s.confidence,
          riskLevel: s.riskLevel,
          reason: s.reason,
          status: 'PENDING',
          transactionGroupId: s.transactionGroupId,
        })
      )
    );

    return {
      message: `Generated ${saved.length} rule suggestion(s).`,
      suggestions: saved.map((row, i) => ({
        ...row,
        suggestedRule: suggestions[i].rule,
        impactSummary: suggestions[i].impact,
        matchedTransactionIds: suggestions[i].matchedTransactionIds,
      })),
    };
  }

  async _enrichGroupWithHistoricalPrecedent(organizationId, group) {
    const merchantTokens = normalizeText(group.normalizedMerchant).split(' ').filter(Boolean);
    const primaryToken = merchantTokens[0];
    if (!primaryToken) return group;

    const recentCategorized = await prisma.bankTransaction.findMany({
      where: {
        organizationId,
        categoryId: { not: null },
        description: { contains: primaryToken },
      },
      include: {
        category: { select: { id: true, code: true, description: true } },
        source: { select: SOURCE_WITH_LEDGER_SELECT },
      },
      orderBy: { date: 'desc' },
      take: 200,
    });

    const filtered = recentCategorized.filter((tx) => {
      const normalizedDescription = normalizeText(tx.description);
      if (!merchantTokens.every((token) => normalizedDescription.includes(token))) return false;

      const direction = Number(tx.amount || 0) >= 0 ? 'INCOME' : 'EXPENSE';
      if (direction !== group.direction) return false;

      const txSourceType = String(tx.source?.type || 'UNKNOWN').toUpperCase();
      return txSourceType === group.sourceType;
    });

    const historicalPrecedent = buildHistoricalPrecedentEvidence(filtered);
    if (!historicalPrecedent) return group;

    return {
      ...group,
      historicalPrecedent,
      taxRateSuggestion: group.taxRateSuggestion || historicalPrecedent.taxRateEvidence || null,
    };
  }

  async _loadOrganizationAccountingPolicies(organizationId) {
    const rows = await prisma.accountingSuggestionMemory.findMany({
      where: { organizationId },
      orderBy: { updatedAt: 'desc' },
      take: 100,
    });

    return rows
      .map((row) => {
        const policy = safeJsonParse(row.descriptionPattern) || {};
        return {
          id: row.id,
          vendorNormalized: row.vendorNormalized,
          sourceType: row.sourceType,
          descriptionPattern: row.descriptionPattern,
          policy,
          enabled: policy.enabled !== false,
          accountCode: row.accountCode,
          taxTreatment: row.taxTreatment,
          transactionType: row.transactionType,
          usageCount: row.usageCount,
        };
      })
      .filter((row) => row.enabled !== false);
  }

  async _findCreditCardPaymentMatchCandidates(organizationId, group, { dateWindowDays = 7 } = {}) {
    const groupTransactions = (group.transactions || [])
      .filter((tx) => Number(tx.amount || 0) > 0)
      .map((tx) => ({
        id: Number(tx.id),
        date: new Date(tx.date),
        amount: Math.abs(Number(tx.amount || 0)),
        sourceId: tx.sourceId || tx.source?.id || null,
      }))
      .filter((tx) => Number.isInteger(tx.id) && Number.isFinite(tx.amount) && tx.amount > 0 && !Number.isNaN(tx.date.getTime()));

    if (!groupTransactions.length) {
      return { matchedTransfers: [], ambiguousTransfers: [], unmatchedCardTransactionIds: [] };
    }

    const from = new Date(Math.min(...groupTransactions.map((tx) => tx.date.getTime())));
    const to = new Date(Math.max(...groupTransactions.map((tx) => tx.date.getTime())));
    from.setDate(from.getDate() - dateWindowDays);
    to.setDate(to.getDate() + dateWindowDays);

    const bankCandidates = await prisma.bankTransaction.findMany({
      where: {
        organizationId,
        amount: { lt: 0 },
        date: { gte: from, lte: to },
        source: { is: { type: { not: 'CREDIT_CARD' } } },
      },
      include: {
        source: { select: SOURCE_WITH_LEDGER_SELECT },
        journalEntry: { select: { id: true, posted: true } },
      },
      orderBy: { date: 'asc' },
      take: 500,
    });

    const matchedTransfers = [];
    const ambiguousTransfers = [];
    const unmatchedCardTransactionIds = [];

    for (const cardTx of groupTransactions) {
      const candidates = bankCandidates
        .filter((bankTx) => Math.abs(Math.abs(Number(bankTx.amount || 0)) - cardTx.amount) < 0.01)
        .map((bankTx) => {
          const dayDelta = Math.round(Math.abs(new Date(bankTx.date).getTime() - cardTx.date.getTime()) / 86400000);
          const description = normalizeText(bankTx.description);
          const keywordBonus = /payment|visa|mastercard|amex|credit card|card|online|automatic|pre authorized/.test(description) ? 0.15 : 0;
          const score = Number(Math.max(0.1, 0.95 - (dayDelta * 0.08) + keywordBonus).toFixed(2));
          return {
            bankTransactionId: bankTx.id,
            bankDate: bankTx.date,
            bankDescription: bankTx.description,
            bankAmount: bankTx.amount,
            bankSourceId: bankTx.source?.id || null,
            bankSourceName: bankTx.source?.name || null,
            bankSourceType: bankTx.source?.type || null,
            bankSourceLedgerAccountId: bankTx.source?.ledgerAccountId || null,
            bankSourceLedgerAccountCode: bankTx.source?.ledgerAccount?.code || null,
            bankSourceLedgerAccountDescription: bankTx.source?.ledgerAccount?.description || null,
            dayDelta,
            confidence: Math.min(score, 0.99),
            alreadyJournaled: Boolean(bankTx.journalEntry?.id),
          };
        })
        .filter((candidate) => candidate.dayDelta <= dateWindowDays)
        .sort((a, b) => b.confidence - a.confidence || a.dayDelta - b.dayDelta);

      const transfer = {
        cardTransactionId: cardTx.id,
        cardDate: cardTx.date,
        cardAmount: cardTx.amount,
        candidates,
      };

      if (candidates.length === 1 && candidates[0].confidence >= 0.7) {
        matchedTransfers.push({ ...transfer, selectedBankTransactionId: candidates[0].bankTransactionId, status: 'MATCHED_CANDIDATE' });
      } else if (candidates.length > 1) {
        ambiguousTransfers.push({ ...transfer, status: 'AMBIGUOUS_CANDIDATES' });
      } else {
        unmatchedCardTransactionIds.push(cardTx.id);
      }
    }

    return { matchedTransfers, ambiguousTransfers, unmatchedCardTransactionIds };
  }

  async clearSuggestions(organizationId) {
    const deleted = await prisma.$executeRaw`
      DELETE FROM "AccountingRuleSuggestion"
      WHERE "organizationId" = ${organizationId}
    `;

    return { deletedCount: Number(deleted || 0) };
  }

  async _suggestRuleForGroup(group, accounts, existingRules, organizationId, userId, sessionId) {
    const defaultSystemPrompt = `You are a Canadian bookkeeping expert building recurring accounting rules.
Return strict JSON only. No SQL. No comments. One rule per response.
The rule will be validated against real transactions before being shown to a user.
Use only the provided context, organization policies, historical transactions, and availableAccounts.
Choose account codes only from availableAccounts.
Journal templates must be complete and balanced by formula using amountFormula values only: gross, net, hst.
For ordinary Square payout deposits in a bank feed, use a clearing/undeposited funds transfer with NO_TAX instead of direct sales revenue.
For outgoing payroll-processor funding withdrawals such as Rise CAP from a bank feed, use a Payroll Clearing transfer with NO_TAX. Do not debit wages, net payroll, employer CPP/EI, HST, or ITC from the bank transaction alone; detailed payroll allocations must come from the payroll-provider report.`;
    const configuredSystemPrompt = await SettingsService.getPrompt(organizationId, 'accounting_suggestRuleForGroup_system');
    const systemPrompt = configuredSystemPrompt?.trim() || defaultSystemPrompt;
    const accountingPolicies = await this._loadOrganizationAccountingPolicies(organizationId);
    const transferMatching = isCreditCardPaymentGroup(group)
      ? await this._findCreditCardPaymentMatchCandidates(organizationId, group).catch(() => null)
      : null;
    const promptContext = buildRuleSuggestionPromptContext({
      organizationId,
      group,
      accounts,
      existingRules,
      accountingPolicies,
      transferMatching,
    });

    const userPrompt = JSON.stringify({
      task: 'Suggest an accounting rule for this group of similar transactions.',
      context: promptContext,
      desiredShape: {
        ruleName: 'string',
        matchConditions: {
          descriptionContainsAny: ['string'],
          amountDirection: 'EXPENSE|INCOME',
          sourceType: 'CREDIT_CARD|CHEQUING_ACCOUNT|null',
        },
        suggestedAccountCode: 'string',
        transactionType: 'BANK_EXPENSE|BANK_REVENUE|TRANSFER|CREDIT_CARD_PAYMENT|PAYROLL_PAYMENT|TAX_REMITTANCE|OWNER_DRAW|OWNER_CONTRIBUTION',
        taxTreatment: 'INPUT_TAX_CREDIT|NO_ITC|EXEMPT_PURCHASE|ZERO_RATED|TAXABLE_SALE|HST_REMITTANCE|NO_TAX',
        requiredReceipt: false,
        applyPreviousTaxRate: false,
        taxRatePercent: 'number|null',
        confidence: 0.0,
        riskLevel: 'LOW|MEDIUM|HIGH',
        reason: 'short summary string',
        reasoning: 'detailed explanation using completed samples, uncategorized targets, tax evidence, and account choice',
        journalTemplateLines: [{ accountCode: 'account code, not id', side: 'DEBIT|CREDIT', amountFormula: 'gross|net|hst' }],
      },
    }, null, 2);

    const response = await llmClient.generateResponse(
      userPrompt,
      userId,
      sessionId,
      'TEXT_CHAT',
      null,
      null,
      '',
      systemPrompt,
      { includeConversationHistory: false, storeConversation: false, context: 'ACCOUNTING', usageKey: 'ACCOUNTING_RULE_SUGGESTION' }
    );

    const parsed = this._parseAndValidateLLMResponse(response, accounts);
    if (!parsed) return null;

    this._applyHistoricalPrecedent(parsed, group, accounts);
    if (isPayrollFundingGroup(group)) {
      const payrollClearingAccount = findPayrollClearingAccount(accounts);
      if (payrollClearingAccount?.code) {
        parsed.suggestedAccountCode = payrollClearingAccount.code;
      }
      parsed.transactionType = 'TRANSFER';
      parsed.taxTreatment = 'NO_TAX';
      parsed.applyPreviousTaxRate = false;
      parsed.taxRatePercent = 0;
      parsed.requiredReceipt = false;
      parsed.ruleName = parsed.ruleName && /rise|payroll/i.test(parsed.ruleName)
        ? parsed.ruleName
        : 'Rise payroll funding to Payroll Clearing';
      const guardrailReason = 'Rise CAP is an outgoing bank payroll-funding transfer. Debit Payroll Clearing and credit the source TD Chequing ledger. Detailed wage, employer CPP/EI, payroll-fee, and HST allocation must come from the Rise payroll report, not from the bank withdrawal.';
      parsed.reason = guardrailReason;
      parsed.reasoning = parsed.reasoning ? `${parsed.reasoning} ${guardrailReason}` : guardrailReason;
      parsed.journalTemplateLines = [
        payrollClearingAccount ? buildTemplateLine(payrollClearingAccount, 'DEBIT', 'gross') : null,
        buildTemplateLine(resolveSourceAccount(accounts, {
          sourceType: group.sourceType,
          source: group.sampleTransactions?.[0]?.sourceId || group.sampleTransactions?.[0]?.sourceName
            ? {
              id: group.sampleTransactions?.[0]?.sourceId || null,
              name: group.sampleTransactions?.[0]?.sourceName || null,
              type: group.sourceType,
              ledgerAccountId: group.sampleTransactions?.[0]?.sourceLedgerAccountId || null,
              ledgerAccountCode: group.sampleTransactions?.[0]?.sourceLedgerAccountCode || null,
            }
            : null,
        }), 'CREDIT', 'gross'),
      ].filter(Boolean);
    }

    const matchedAccount = accounts.find((a) => a.code === parsed.suggestedAccountCode) || null;
    const journalTemplateLines = normalizeJournalTemplateLines(parsed.journalTemplateLines, accounts, {
      suggestedAccountCode: matchedAccount?.code || parsed.suggestedAccountCode,
      taxTreatment: parsed.taxTreatment,
      transactionType: parsed.transactionType,
      payrollFunding: isPayrollFundingGroup(group),
      sourceType: parsed.matchConditions?.sourceType || group.sourceType,
      source: group.sampleTransactions?.[0]?.sourceId || group.sampleTransactions?.[0]?.sourceName
        ? {
          id: group.sampleTransactions?.[0]?.sourceId || null,
          name: group.sampleTransactions?.[0]?.sourceName || null,
          type: group.sourceType,
          ledgerAccountId: group.sampleTransactions?.[0]?.sourceLedgerAccountId || null,
          ledgerAccountCode: group.sampleTransactions?.[0]?.sourceLedgerAccountCode || null,
        }
        : null,
      amountDirection: parsed.matchConditions?.amountDirection || group.direction,
    });
    const journalValidation = validateJournalTemplateLines(journalTemplateLines, accounts, {
      taxTreatment: parsed.taxTreatment,
      transactionType: parsed.transactionType,
    });
    if (!journalValidation.valid) {
      parsed.confidence = Math.min(Number(parsed.confidence || 0.7), 0.45);
      parsed.reasoning = `${parsed.reasoning || parsed.reason || ''} Journal template requires review: ${journalValidation.errors.join(', ')}.`.trim();
    }

    const conditions = [
      ...(parsed.matchConditions?.descriptionContainsAny?.length
        ? [{ field: 'descriptionNormalized', operator: 'containsAny', value: parsed.matchConditions.descriptionContainsAny }]
        : []),
      ...(parsed.matchConditions?.amountDirection === 'EXPENSE'
        ? [{ field: 'amount', operator: 'lessThan', value: 0 }]
        : parsed.matchConditions?.amountDirection === 'INCOME'
          ? [{ field: 'amount', operator: 'greaterThan', value: 0 }]
          : []),
      ...(parsed.matchConditions?.sourceType
        ? [{ field: 'sourceType', operator: 'equals', value: parsed.matchConditions.sourceType }]
        : []),
    ];

    const impact = await this._computeImpact(organizationId, group, matchedAccount);
    impact.aiPromptContext = {
      descriptorSignals: promptContext.descriptorSignals,
      sourceAccountContext: promptContext.sourceAccountContext,
      taxAccountContext: promptContext.taxAccountContext,
      squareAccountContext: promptContext.squareAccountContext,
      relatedExistingRules: promptContext.relatedExistingRules,
      organizationAccountingPolicies: promptContext.organizationAccountingPolicies,
    };
    if (transferMatching) impact.transferMatching = transferMatching;
    if (promptContext.descriptorSignals.creditCardPaymentSupportedBySourceAndDirection) {
      impact.requiresFundingAccountSelection = !journalTemplateLines.some((line) =>
        line.side === 'CREDIT' &&
        accountCategory(accounts.find((account) => String(account.code) === String(line.accountCode)) || {}).includes('ASSET')
      );
      impact.historicalReview = await this.findHistoricalCreditCardPaymentReviewItems(organizationId, { limit: 50 }).catch(() => []);
    }
    if (promptContext.descriptorSignals.taxRemittanceSupportedBySourceAndDirection) {
      impact.historicalReview = await this.findHistoricalTaxRemittanceReviewItems(organizationId, { limit: 50 }).catch(() => []);
    }
    if (promptContext.descriptorSignals.squarePayoutSupportedBySourceAndDirection) {
      impact.squarePayoutGuidance = {
        bankPayoutRule: promptContext.squareAccountContext.bankPayoutRule,
        negativePayoutRule: promptContext.squareAccountContext.negativePayoutRule,
        clearingAccountCandidate: promptContext.squareAccountContext.clearingAccountCandidate,
      };
    }

    return {
      rule: {
        name: parsed.ruleName,
        matchConditions: parsed.matchConditions,
        conditions,
        matchMode: 'ALL',
        suggestedAccountCode: parsed.suggestedAccountCode,
        suggestedAccountId: matchedAccount?.id || null,
        suggestedAccountDescription: matchedAccount?.description || '',
        transactionType: parsed.transactionType,
        taxTreatment: parsed.taxTreatment,
        requiredReceipt: Boolean(parsed.requiredReceipt),
        applyPreviousTaxRate: Boolean(group.taxRateSuggestion && parsed.applyPreviousTaxRate !== false),
        previousTaxRate: group.taxRateSuggestion,
        journalTemplateLines,
        patterns: parsed.matchConditions?.descriptionContainsAny || [],
        amountDirection: parsed.matchConditions?.amountDirection || group.direction,
        sourceType: parsed.matchConditions?.sourceType || group.sourceType || null,
        group: 'AI Suggestion',
        enabled: true,
        matchMode: 'ANY',
        autoCategory: Boolean(matchedAccount?.id),
        autoApplyTaxes: String(parsed.taxTreatment || '') === 'INPUT_TAX_CREDIT',
        reasoning: parsed.reasoning || parsed.reason || `Recurring pattern: ${group.normalizedMerchant}`,
        journalValidation,
      },
      matchedTransactionIds: group.transactionIds,
      impact,
      confidence: Number(parsed.confidence) || 0.7,
      riskLevel: parsed.riskLevel || group.riskLevel,
      reason: parsed.reason || parsed.reasoning || `Recurring pattern: ${group.normalizedMerchant}`,
    };
  }

  async findHistoricalCreditCardPaymentReviewItems(organizationId, { limit = 100 } = {}) {
    const rows = await prisma.bankTransaction.findMany({
      where: {
        organizationId,
        amount: { gt: 0 },
        source: { is: { type: 'CREDIT_CARD' } },
      },
      include: {
        category: { select: { code: true, description: true, category: true } },
        source: { select: SOURCE_WITH_LEDGER_SELECT },
        journalEntry: {
          select: {
            id: true,
            posted: true,
            lines: {
              select: {
                debit: true,
                credit: true,
                account: { select: { code: true, description: true, category: true } },
              },
            },
          },
        },
      },
      orderBy: { date: 'desc' },
      take: 500,
    });

    return rows
      .filter((tx) => isCreditCardPaymentDescriptor(tx.description))
      .filter((tx) => {
        const lines = tx.journalEntry?.lines || [];
        return tx.postingType !== 'CREDIT_CARD_PAYMENT' ||
          tx.category?.category === 'REVENUE' ||
          lines.some((line) => ['REVENUE', 'EXPENSES', 'EXPENSE', 'COST OF GOODS SOLD'].includes(String(line.account?.category || '').toUpperCase()));
      })
      .slice(0, limit)
      .map((tx) => ({
        organizationId: tx.organizationId,
        transactionId: tx.id,
        date: tx.date,
        description: tx.description,
        amount: tx.amount,
        source: tx.source ? { id: tx.source.id, name: tx.source.name, type: tx.source.type } : null,
        currentAccount: tx.category ? { code: tx.category.code, description: tx.category.description, category: tx.category.category } : null,
        postingType: tx.postingType || null,
        journalEntryId: tx.journalEntry?.id || null,
        journalPosted: tx.journalEntry?.posted === true,
        currentJournal: (tx.journalEntry?.lines || []).map((line) => ({
          accountCode: line.account?.code || null,
          accountDescription: line.account?.description || null,
          accountCategory: line.account?.category || null,
          debit: line.debit,
          credit: line.credit,
        })),
        proposedCorrection: {
          transactionType: 'CREDIT_CARD_PAYMENT',
          taxTreatment: 'NO_TAX',
          debit: 'resolved credit-card liability account',
          credit: 'matched or selected funding bank account',
          note: tx.journalEntry?.posted ? 'Posted entry: review manually; not changed automatically.' : 'Pending/unposted item can be updated after approval.',
        },
      }));
  }

  async findHistoricalTaxRemittanceReviewItems(organizationId, { limit = 100 } = {}) {
    const rows = await prisma.bankTransaction.findMany({
      where: {
        organizationId,
        amount: { lt: 0 },
      },
      include: {
        category: { select: { code: true, description: true, category: true } },
        source: { select: SOURCE_WITH_LEDGER_SELECT },
        journalEntry: {
          select: {
            id: true,
            posted: true,
            lines: {
              select: {
                debit: true,
                credit: true,
                account: { select: { code: true, description: true, category: true } },
              },
            },
          },
        },
      },
      orderBy: { date: 'desc' },
      take: 500,
    });

    return rows
      .filter((tx) => isTaxRemittanceDescriptor(tx.description))
      .filter((tx) => {
        const lines = tx.journalEntry?.lines || [];
        return tx.postingType !== 'TAX_REMITTANCE' ||
          tx.category?.category === 'REVENUE' ||
          tx.category?.category === 'EXPENSES' ||
          tx.category?.category === 'EXPENSE' ||
          lines.some((line) => ['REVENUE', 'EXPENSES', 'EXPENSE', 'COST OF GOODS SOLD'].includes(String(line.account?.category || '').toUpperCase()));
      })
      .slice(0, limit)
      .map((tx) => ({
        organizationId: tx.organizationId,
        transactionId: tx.id,
        date: tx.date,
        description: tx.description,
        amount: tx.amount,
        source: tx.source ? { id: tx.source.id, name: tx.source.name, type: tx.source.type } : null,
        currentAccount: tx.category ? { code: tx.category.code, description: tx.category.description, category: tx.category.category } : null,
        postingType: tx.postingType || null,
        journalEntryId: tx.journalEntry?.id || null,
        journalPosted: tx.journalEntry?.posted === true,
        currentJournal: (tx.journalEntry?.lines || []).map((line) => ({
          accountCode: line.account?.code || null,
          accountDescription: line.account?.description || null,
          accountCategory: line.account?.category || null,
          debit: line.debit,
          credit: line.credit,
        })),
        proposedCorrection: {
          transactionType: 'TAX_REMITTANCE',
          taxTreatment: 'HST_REMITTANCE',
          debit: 'resolved GST/HST payable liability account',
          credit: 'source bank or credit-card ledger account',
          note: tx.journalEntry?.posted ? 'Posted entry: review manually; not changed automatically.' : 'Pending/unposted item can be updated after approval.',
        },
      }));
  }

  _parseAndValidateLLMResponse(response, accounts) {
    try {
      let parsed = null;
      try { parsed = JSON.parse(response); } catch {
        const match = response.match(/```json\s*([\s\S]*?)```/i);
        if (match?.[1]) {
          try { parsed = JSON.parse(match[1]); } catch { return null; }
        } else {
          return null;
        }
      }

      if (!parsed || typeof parsed !== 'object') return null;
      parsed.ruleName = String(parsed.ruleName || parsed.name || '').trim();
      parsed.suggestedAccountCode = String(
        parsed.suggestedAccountCode ||
        parsed.categoryCode ||
        parsed.accountCode ||
        ''
      ).trim();

      const rawMatch = parsed.matchConditions && typeof parsed.matchConditions === 'object'
        ? parsed.matchConditions
        : {};
      const descriptorPatterns = [
        ...(Array.isArray(rawMatch.descriptionContainsAny) ? rawMatch.descriptionContainsAny : []),
        ...(Array.isArray(rawMatch.requiredDescriptors) ? rawMatch.requiredDescriptors : []),
        ...(Array.isArray(parsed.patterns) ? parsed.patterns : []),
      ].map((item) => String(item || '').trim()).filter(Boolean);
      const directionAlias = String(rawMatch.amountDirection || rawMatch.direction || parsed.amountDirection || '').trim().toUpperCase();
      const amountDirection = directionAlias === 'OUTGOING' || directionAlias === 'OUTFLOW' || directionAlias === 'DEBIT'
        ? 'EXPENSE'
        : directionAlias === 'INCOMING' || directionAlias === 'INFLOW' || directionAlias === 'CREDIT'
          ? 'INCOME'
          : directionAlias;
      const sourceType = String(
        rawMatch.sourceType ||
        (Array.isArray(rawMatch.sourceAccountTypes) ? rawMatch.sourceAccountTypes[0] : '') ||
        parsed.sourceType ||
        ''
      ).trim().toUpperCase();

      parsed.matchConditions = {
        ...rawMatch,
        descriptionContainsAny: descriptorPatterns,
        amountDirection: ['EXPENSE', 'INCOME', 'ANY'].includes(amountDirection) ? amountDirection : undefined,
        sourceType: sourceType || undefined,
      };
      parsed.patterns = descriptorPatterns;
      parsed.taxTreatment = String(parsed.taxTreatment || '').trim().toUpperCase();
      if (parsed.taxTreatment === 'TAXABLE_PURCHASE_ITC') parsed.taxTreatment = 'INPUT_TAX_CREDIT';
      if (parsed.taxTreatment === 'NON_TAXABLE' || parsed.taxTreatment === 'NO_HST') parsed.taxTreatment = 'NO_TAX';
      if (Array.isArray(parsed.journalTemplateLines)) {
        parsed.journalTemplateLines = parsed.journalTemplateLines.map((line) => ({
          ...line,
          side: String(line?.side || line?.entryType || line?.type || '').trim().toUpperCase() || line?.side,
          amountFormula: normalizeAmountFormula(line?.amountFormula || line?.formula),
        }));
      }

      if (!parsed.ruleName || !parsed.suggestedAccountCode) return null;

      const confidence = Math.max(0, Math.min(1, Number(parsed.confidence) || 0.7));
      parsed.confidence = confidence;

      const validRiskLevels = ['LOW', 'MEDIUM', 'HIGH'];
      if (!validRiskLevels.includes(String(parsed.riskLevel || '').toUpperCase())) {
        parsed.riskLevel = 'MEDIUM';
      } else {
        parsed.riskLevel = String(parsed.riskLevel).toUpperCase();
      }

      return parsed;
    } catch {
      return null;
    }
  }

  _applyHistoricalPrecedent(parsed, group, accounts = []) {
    const precedent = group?.historicalPrecedent || null;
    if (!precedent || Number(precedent.sampleCount || 0) < 2) return parsed;
    if (isCreditCardPaymentGroup(group) || isTaxRemittanceGroup(group) || isSquarePayoutGroup(group) || isPayrollFundingGroup(group)) {
      const reason = 'Historical categorized samples were treated as context only because this group matches a special transfer/remittance policy.';
      parsed.reasoning = parsed.reasoning
        ? `${parsed.reasoning} ${reason}`
        : reason;
      return parsed;
    }

    const accountConfidence = Number(precedent.dominantAccountConfidence || 0);
    const dominantAccountCode = String(precedent.dominantAccountCode || '').trim();
    if (dominantAccountCode && accountConfidence >= 0.6 && accounts.some((account) => account.code === dominantAccountCode)) {
      parsed.suggestedAccountCode = dominantAccountCode;
    }

    const taxConfidence = Number(precedent.dominantTaxTreatmentConfidence || 0);
    const dominantTaxTreatment = String(precedent.dominantTaxTreatment || '').trim().toUpperCase();
    const currentTaxTreatment = String(parsed.taxTreatment || '').trim().toUpperCase();
    const currentIsNoTaxClaim = !currentTaxTreatment || currentTaxTreatment === 'NO_ITC' || currentTaxTreatment === 'NO_TAX';
    const precedentHasTaxRate = Number(precedent.taxRateEvidence?.taxShareOfGross || 0) > 0;

    if (dominantTaxTreatment && taxConfidence >= 0.6 && (currentIsNoTaxClaim || precedentHasTaxRate)) {
      parsed.taxTreatment = dominantTaxTreatment;
      parsed.applyPreviousTaxRate = precedentHasTaxRate;
      parsed.taxRatePercent = precedent.taxRateEvidence?.ratePercent ?? parsed.taxRatePercent ?? null;

      const reason = `Historical categorized ${group.normalizedMerchant} transactions used ${dominantTaxTreatment}`;
      parsed.reasoning = parsed.reasoning
        ? `${parsed.reasoning} ${reason}.`
        : `${reason}.`;
    }

    return parsed;
  }

  async _computeImpact(organizationId, group, matchedAccount) {
    const txIds = group.transactionIds;
    const transactions = await prisma.bankTransaction.findMany({
      where: { id: { in: txIds }, organizationId },
      select: { id: true, amount: true, taxes: true, categoryId: true, date: true },
    });

    const totalGross = transactions.reduce((sum, tx) => sum + Math.abs(Number(tx.amount || 0)), 0);
    const totalHST = transactions.reduce((sum, tx) => sum + Math.abs(Number(tx.taxes || 0)), 0);
    const estimatedHSTFromPriorRate = Number(group.taxRateSuggestion?.taxShareOfGross || 0) > 0
      ? transactions.reduce((sum, tx) => {
        const storedTax = Math.abs(Number(tx.taxes || 0));
        if (storedTax > 0) return sum + storedTax;
        return sum + Math.abs(Number(tx.amount || 0)) * Number(group.taxRateSuggestion.taxShareOfGross);
      }, 0)
      : totalHST;
    const alreadyCategorized = transactions.filter((tx) => tx.categoryId).length;
    const uncategorized = transactions.length - alreadyCategorized;

    const dates = transactions.map((tx) => new Date(tx.date).getTime()).filter(Boolean);
    const dateRange = dates.length
      ? { from: new Date(Math.min(...dates)), to: new Date(Math.max(...dates)) }
      : null;

    return {
      matchedCount: transactions.length,
      uncategorizedCount: uncategorized,
      alreadyCategorizedCount: alreadyCategorized,
      totalGross: Number(totalGross.toFixed(2)),
      totalHST: Number(totalHST.toFixed(2)),
      estimatedHST: Number(estimatedHSTFromPriorRate.toFixed(2)),
      dateRange,
      completedTransactionSamples: group.completedTransactionSamples || [],
      historicalPrecedent: group.historicalPrecedent || null,
      uncategorizedTransactionSamples: group.uncategorizedTransactionSamples || [],
      transactions: group.transactions || [],
      previousTaxRate: group.taxRateSuggestion,
      suggestedAccount: matchedAccount
        ? { code: matchedAccount.code, description: matchedAccount.description }
        : null,
    };
  }

  async previewRuleImpact(organizationId, ruleData) {
    const meta = safeJsonParse(ruleData.patterns) || {};
    const storedPatterns = Array.isArray(meta.patterns) ? meta.patterns : [];
    const patterns = storedPatterns.length
      ? storedPatterns
      : (inferPatternFromRuleName(ruleData.name) ? [inferPatternFromRuleName(ruleData.name)] : []);
    const matchMode = meta.matchMode || 'ANY';
    const amountDirection = meta.amountDirection || 'ANY';
    const sourceType = meta.sourceType || null;

    const transactions = await prisma.bankTransaction.findMany({
      where: { organizationId },
      include: {
        category: { select: { id: true, code: true, description: true } },
        source: { select: { id: true, type: true } },
        journalEntry: { select: { id: true } },
      },
      orderBy: { date: 'desc' },
      take: 1000,
    });

    const normalizeStr = (v) =>
      String(v || '').toLowerCase().replace(/[^a-z0-9\s]/g, ' ').replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim();

    const matched = transactions.filter((tx) => {
      const direction = Number(tx.amount || 0) > 0 ? 'INCOME' : 'EXPENSE';
      if (amountDirection !== 'ANY' && amountDirection !== direction) return false;
      if (sourceType) {
        const txSource = String(tx.source?.type || '').toUpperCase();
        if (txSource && txSource !== sourceType) return false;
      }
      if (!patterns.length) return false;
      const haystack = normalizeStr(tx.description);
      const normalizedPatterns = patterns.map(normalizeStr);
      return matchMode === 'ALL'
        ? normalizedPatterns.every((p) => haystack.includes(p))
        : normalizedPatterns.some((p) => haystack.includes(p));
    });

    const uncategorized = matched.filter((tx) => !tx.categoryId);
    const alreadyCategorized = matched.filter((tx) => tx.categoryId);
    const alreadyJournaled = matched.filter((tx) => tx.journalEntry);
    const totalGross = matched.reduce((sum, tx) => sum + Math.abs(Number(tx.amount || 0)), 0);
    const totalTax = matched.reduce((sum, tx) => sum + Math.abs(Number(tx.taxes || 0)), 0);
    const dates = matched.map((tx) => new Date(tx.date).getTime());
    const dateRange = dates.length ? { from: new Date(Math.min(...dates)), to: new Date(Math.max(...dates)) } : null;

    const conflictingRules = await this._detectConflicts(organizationId, ruleData, matched.map((tx) => tx.id));

    return {
      matchedCount: matched.length,
      uncategorizedCount: uncategorized.length,
      alreadyCategorizedCount: alreadyCategorized.length,
      alreadyJournaledCount: alreadyJournaled.length,
      totalGross: Number(totalGross.toFixed(2)),
      totalHST: Number(totalTax.toFixed(2)),
      dateRange,
      sampleMatches: matched.slice(0, 10).map((tx) => ({
        id: tx.id,
        date: tx.date,
        description: tx.description,
        amount: tx.amount,
        currentCategory: tx.category ? `${tx.category.code} — ${tx.category.description}` : null,
        hasJournalEntry: Boolean(tx.journalEntry),
      })),
      conflicts: conflictingRules,
    };
  }

  async _detectConflicts(organizationId, newRuleData, matchedIds = []) {
    if (!matchedIds.length) return [];

    const existingRules = await prisma.accountingRule.findMany({
      where: { organizationId },
      include: { category: { select: { id: true, code: true, description: true } } },
    });

    const normalizeStr = (v) =>
      String(v || '').toLowerCase().replace(/[^a-z0-9\s]/g, ' ').replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim();

    const newMeta = safeJsonParse(newRuleData.patterns) || {};
    const newPatterns = Array.isArray(newMeta.patterns) ? newMeta.patterns.map(normalizeStr) : [];
    const newCategoryId = newRuleData.categoryId || null;

    const conflicts = [];

    for (const rule of existingRules) {
      if (rule.id === newRuleData.id) continue;
      const rMeta = safeJsonParse(rule.patterns) || {};
      const rPatterns = Array.isArray(rMeta.patterns) ? rMeta.patterns.map(normalizeStr) : [];

      const patternOverlap = newPatterns.some((p) => rPatterns.includes(p));
      const categoryConflict = newCategoryId && rule.categoryId && newCategoryId !== rule.categoryId;

      if (patternOverlap && categoryConflict) {
        conflicts.push({
          ruleId: rule.id,
          ruleName: rule.name,
          overlappingPatterns: newPatterns.filter((p) => rPatterns.includes(p)),
          conflictType: 'DIFFERENT_CATEGORY',
          existingCategory: rule.category
            ? `${rule.category.code} — ${rule.category.description}`
            : null,
        });
      }
    }

    return conflicts;
  }

  async listSuggestions(organizationId, { status = 'PENDING', limit = 50 } = {}) {
    const rows = await prisma.$queryRaw`
      SELECT *
      FROM "AccountingRuleSuggestion"
      WHERE "organizationId" = ${organizationId}
        AND "status" = ${status}
      ORDER BY "createdAt" DESC
      LIMIT ${limit}
    `;

    return Promise.all(rows.map((row) => this._hydrateSuggestionRow(row, organizationId)));
  }

  async _hydrateSuggestionRow(row, organizationId) {
    const impactSummary = safeJsonParse(row.impactSummaryJson) || {};
    const matchedTransactionIds = safeJsonParse(row.matchedTransactionIdsJson) || [];

    if (!Array.isArray(impactSummary.transactions) || !impactSummary.transactions.length) {
      const ids = matchedTransactionIds.map((id) => Number(id)).filter((id) => Number.isInteger(id));
      if (ids.length) {
        const transactions = await prisma.bankTransaction.findMany({
          where: { id: { in: ids }, organizationId },
          include: {
            category: { select: { code: true, description: true } },
            source: { select: { type: true } },
          },
          orderBy: { date: 'desc' },
        });
        impactSummary.transactions = transactions.map((tx) => ({
          id: tx.id,
          date: tx.date,
