```js
          description: tx.description,
          amount: tx.amount,
          taxes: tx.taxes,
          source: tx.source?.type || null,
          currentCategoryCode: tx.category?.code || null,
          currentCategoryDescription: tx.category?.description || null,
        }));
      }
    }

    return {
      ...row,
      suggestedRule: safeJsonParse(row.suggestedRuleJson),
      impactSummary,
      matchedTransactionIds,
    };
  }

  async updateSuggestion(organizationId, suggestionId, payload = {}) {
    const [suggestion] = await prisma.$queryRaw`
      SELECT *
      FROM "AccountingRuleSuggestion"
      WHERE "id" = ${suggestionId}
      LIMIT 1
    `;

    if (!suggestion || suggestion.organizationId !== organizationId) {
      throw Object.assign(new Error('Suggestion not found.'), { statusCode: 404 });
    }

    if (suggestion.status !== 'PENDING') {
      await prisma.$executeRaw`
        UPDATE "AccountingRuleSuggestion"
        SET status = 'PENDING',
            "approvedRuleId" = NULL,
            "approvedAt" = NULL,
            "approvedByUserId" = NULL
        WHERE id = ${suggestionId}
      `;
    }

    const currentRule = safeJsonParse(suggestion.suggestedRuleJson) || {};
    const patch = payload.suggestedRule && typeof payload.suggestedRule === 'object'
      ? payload.suggestedRule
      : payload;

    let selectedAccount = null;
    const requestedAccountId = patch.suggestedAccountId ?? currentRule.suggestedAccountId ?? null;
    const requestedAccountCode = patch.suggestedAccountCode ?? currentRule.suggestedAccountCode ?? null;
    if (requestedAccountId) {
      selectedAccount = await prisma.accountingCategory.findUnique({ where: { id: String(requestedAccountId) } });
    }
    if (!selectedAccount && requestedAccountCode) {
      selectedAccount = await prisma.accountingCategory.findUnique({ where: { code: String(requestedAccountCode) } });
    }

    const accounts = await prisma.accountingCategory.findMany({
      select: { id: true, code: true, description: true },
    });
    const accountByCode = new Map(accounts.map((account) => [account.code, account]));

    const patterns = Array.isArray(patch.patterns)
      ? patch.patterns.map((item) => String(item || '').trim()).filter(Boolean)
      : currentRule.patterns || [];

    const previousTaxRate = Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(patch, 'previousTaxRate')
      ? normalizePreviousTaxRate(patch.previousTaxRate)
      : currentRule.previousTaxRate || null;

    const rawJournalTemplateLines = Array.isArray(patch.journalTemplateLines)
      ? patch.journalTemplateLines
        .map((line) => {
          const accountCode = String(line?.accountCode || '').trim();
          if (!accountCode) return null;
          const account = accountByCode.get(accountCode) || null;
          return {
            accountCode,
            accountDescription: line?.accountDescription || account?.description || '',
            side: inferTemplateSide(line),
            amountFormula: normalizeAmountFormula(line?.amountFormula || line?.formula),
          };
        })
        .filter(Boolean)
      : currentRule.journalTemplateLines || [];

    const nextTaxTreatment = String(patch.taxTreatment ?? currentRule.taxTreatment ?? '').trim() || null;
    const nextAmountDirection = patch.amountDirection ?? currentRule.amountDirection ?? currentRule.matchConditions?.amountDirection ?? null;
    const nextSourceType = patch.sourceType ?? currentRule.sourceType ?? currentRule.matchConditions?.sourceType ?? null;
    const journalTemplateLines = normalizeJournalTemplateLines(rawJournalTemplateLines, accounts, {
      suggestedAccountCode: selectedAccount?.code || requestedAccountCode,
      taxTreatment: nextTaxTreatment,
      transactionType: patch.transactionType ?? currentRule.transactionType ?? null,
      sourceType: nextSourceType,
      amountDirection: nextAmountDirection,
    });

    const nextRule = {
      ...currentRule,
      name: String(patch.name ?? currentRule.name ?? 'AI Suggested Rule').trim() || 'AI Suggested Rule',
      suggestedAccountId: selectedAccount?.id || null,
      suggestedAccountCode: selectedAccount?.code || requestedAccountCode || null,
      suggestedAccountDescription: selectedAccount?.description || patch.suggestedAccountDescription || currentRule.suggestedAccountDescription || '',
      transactionType: String(patch.transactionType ?? currentRule.transactionType ?? '').trim() || null,
      taxTreatment: nextTaxTreatment,
      requiredReceipt: Boolean(patch.requiredReceipt ?? currentRule.requiredReceipt),
      reasoning: String(patch.reasoning ?? currentRule.reasoning ?? '').trim(),
      applyPreviousTaxRate: Boolean(patch.applyPreviousTaxRate ?? currentRule.applyPreviousTaxRate),
      previousTaxRate,
      patterns,
      matchConditions: {
        ...(currentRule.matchConditions || {}),
        descriptionContainsAny: patterns,
        amountDirection: nextAmountDirection,
        sourceType: nextSourceType,
      },
      amountDirection: nextAmountDirection,
      sourceType: nextSourceType,
      journalTemplateLines,
      autoCategory: Boolean(selectedAccount?.id),
      autoApplyTaxes: Boolean((patch.autoApplyTaxes ?? currentRule.autoApplyTaxes) || patch.applyPreviousTaxRate),
    };

    const currentImpact = safeJsonParse(suggestion.impactSummaryJson) || {};
    const nextImpact = {
      ...currentImpact,
      previousTaxRate,
      suggestedAccount: selectedAccount
        ? { code: selectedAccount.code, description: selectedAccount.description }
        : currentImpact.suggestedAccount || null,
    };

    const nextConfidence = Number.isFinite(Number(payload.confidence)) ? Number(payload.confidence) : suggestion.confidence;
    const nextRiskLevel = ['LOW', 'MEDIUM', 'HIGH'].includes(String(payload.riskLevel || '').toUpperCase())
      ? String(payload.riskLevel).toUpperCase()
      : suggestion.riskLevel;
    const nextReason = payload.reason == null ? suggestion.reason : String(payload.reason);

    await prisma.$executeRaw`
      UPDATE "AccountingRuleSuggestion"
      SET "suggestedRuleJson" = ${JSON.stringify(nextRule)},
          "impactSummaryJson" = ${JSON.stringify(nextImpact)},
          "confidence" = ${nextConfidence},
          "riskLevel" = ${nextRiskLevel},
          "reason" = ${nextReason}
      WHERE "id" = ${suggestionId}
    `;

    const [updated] = await prisma.$queryRaw`
      SELECT *
      FROM "AccountingRuleSuggestion"
      WHERE "id" = ${suggestionId}
      LIMIT 1
    `;

    return this._hydrateSuggestionRow(updated, organizationId);
  }

  async reviseSuggestionWithLLM(organizationId, suggestionId, userId, sessionId, instructions) {
    const [suggestion] = await prisma.$queryRaw`
      SELECT *
      FROM "AccountingRuleSuggestion"
      WHERE "id" = ${suggestionId}
      LIMIT 1
    `;

    if (!suggestion || suggestion.organizationId !== organizationId) {
      throw Object.assign(new Error('Suggestion not found.'), { statusCode: 404 });
    }

    if (suggestion.status !== 'PENDING') {
      await prisma.$executeRaw`
        UPDATE "AccountingRuleSuggestion"
        SET status = 'PENDING',
            "approvedRuleId" = NULL,
            "approvedAt" = NULL,
            "approvedByUserId" = NULL
        WHERE id = ${suggestionId}
      `;
    }

    const currentRule = safeJsonParse(suggestion.suggestedRuleJson) || {};
    const impactSummary = safeJsonParse(suggestion.impactSummaryJson) || {};
    const accounts = await prisma.accountingCategory.findMany({
      select: { id: true, code: true, description: true, category: true, normalSide: true, isPLAccount: true, statementLine: true },
      orderBy: [{ sortOrder: 'asc' }, { code: 'asc' }],
    });

    const configuredSystemPrompt = await SettingsService.getPrompt(organizationId, 'accounting_suggestRuleForGroup_system');
    const systemPrompt = `${configuredSystemPrompt || ''}

You are revising an existing pending accounting-rule suggestion.
Return strict JSON only. No SQL. No comments.
Respect the user's revision instructions and output a fresh full rule, not a patch.
If the user's correction conflicts with the current suggestion, prioritize the correction when it is supported by the provided accounting context.
Use validationErrors from the current suggestion as defects to fix.`;

    const txSamples = (impactSummary.completedTransactionSamples || []).slice(0, 10);
    const uncategorizedSamples = (impactSummary.uncategorizedTransactionSamples || []).slice(0, 10);
    const accountingPolicies = await this._loadOrganizationAccountingPolicies(organizationId);
    const existingRules = await prisma.accountingRule.findMany({
      where: { organizationId },
      include: { category: { select: { id: true, code: true, description: true } } },
    });
    const revisionGroup = {
      normalizedMerchant: currentRule.patterns?.[0] || currentRule.matchConditions?.descriptionContainsAny?.[0] || '',
      direction: currentRule.amountDirection || currentRule.matchConditions?.amountDirection || null,
      sourceType: currentRule.sourceType || currentRule.matchConditions?.sourceType || null,
      transactionCount: impactSummary.matchedCount || impactSummary.transactionCount || impactSummary.transactions?.length || 0,
      uncategorizedCount: impactSummary.uncategorizedCount,
      incompleteCount: impactSummary.incompleteCount,
      amountMin: undefined,
      amountMax: undefined,
      amountTotal: impactSummary.totalGross,
      dateRange: impactSummary.dateRange,
      completedTransactionSamples: txSamples,
      uncategorizedTransactionSamples: uncategorizedSamples,
      incompleteTransactionSamples: impactSummary.incompleteTransactionSamples || [],
      sampleTransactions: (impactSummary.transactions || uncategorizedSamples || txSamples || []).slice(0, 3),
      transactions: impactSummary.transactions || [],
      taxRateSuggestion: impactSummary.previousTaxRate || currentRule.previousTaxRate || null,
      historicalPrecedent: impactSummary.historicalPrecedent || null,
    };
    const transferMatching = isCreditCardPaymentGroup(revisionGroup)
      ? await this._findCreditCardPaymentMatchCandidates(organizationId, revisionGroup).catch(() => impactSummary.transferMatching || null)
      : impactSummary.transferMatching || null;
    const promptContext = buildRuleSuggestionPromptContext({
      organizationId,
      group: revisionGroup,
      accounts,
      existingRules,
      accountingPolicies,
      transferMatching,
    });

    const userPrompt = JSON.stringify({
      task: 'Revise this pending accounting rule suggestion.',
      revisionInstructions: instructions,
      currentSuggestion: currentRule,
      currentReason: suggestion.reason,
      impactSummary,
      validationErrors: currentRule.journalValidation?.errors || [],
      context: promptContext,
      previousTaxRate: impactSummary.previousTaxRate || currentRule.previousTaxRate || null,
      desiredShape: {
        ruleName: 'string',
        matchConditions: {
          descriptionContainsAny: ['string'],
          amountDirection: 'EXPENSE|INCOME',
          sourceType: 'CREDIT_CARD|CHEQUING_ACCOUNT|null',
        },
        suggestedAccountCode: 'string',
        transactionType: 'BANK_EXPENSE|BANK_REVENUE|TRANSFER|CREDIT_CARD_PAYMENT|PAYROLL_PAYMENT|TAX_REMITTANCE|OWNER_DRAW|OWNER_CONTRIBUTION',
        taxTreatment: 'INPUT_TAX_CREDIT|NO_ITC|EXEMPT_PURCHASE|ZERO_RATED|TAXABLE_SALE|HST_REMITTANCE|NO_TAX',
        requiredReceipt: false,
        applyPreviousTaxRate: false,
        taxRatePercent: 'number|null',
        confidence: 0.0,
        riskLevel: 'LOW|MEDIUM|HIGH',
        reason: 'short summary string',
        reasoning: 'detailed explanation of why the revised rule is appropriate',
        journalTemplateLines: [{ accountCode: 'account code, not id', side: 'DEBIT|CREDIT', amountFormula: 'gross|net|hst' }],
      },
    }, null, 2);

    const response = await llmClient.generateResponse(
      userPrompt,
      userId,
      sessionId,
      'TEXT_CHAT',
      null,
      null,
      '',
      systemPrompt,
      { includeConversationHistory: false, storeConversation: false, context: 'ACCOUNTING', usageKey: 'ACCOUNTING_RULE_SUGGESTION' }
    );

    const parsed = this._parseAndValidateLLMResponse(response, accounts);
    if (!parsed) {
      console.error('[RuleSuggestionService] LLM revise response failed validation. Raw response:', response?.slice(0, 2000));
      throw Object.assign(new Error('AI did not return a valid revised suggestion.'), { statusCode: 502 });
    }

    const matchedAccount = accounts.find((account) => account.code === parsed.suggestedAccountCode) || null;
    const journalTemplateLines = normalizeJournalTemplateLines(parsed.journalTemplateLines, accounts, {
      suggestedAccountCode: matchedAccount?.code || parsed.suggestedAccountCode,
      taxTreatment: parsed.taxTreatment,
      transactionType: parsed.transactionType,
      sourceType: parsed.matchConditions?.sourceType || currentRule.sourceType,
      amountDirection: parsed.matchConditions?.amountDirection || currentRule.amountDirection,
      source: promptContext.sourceAccountContext?.source || null,
    });
    const journalValidation = validateJournalTemplateLines(journalTemplateLines, accounts, {
      taxTreatment: parsed.taxTreatment,
      transactionType: parsed.transactionType,
    });
    if (!journalValidation.valid) {
      parsed.confidence = Math.min(Number(parsed.confidence || 0.7), 0.45);
      parsed.reasoning = `${parsed.reasoning || parsed.reason || ''} Journal template requires review: ${journalValidation.errors.join(', ')}.`.trim();
    }

    const taxRatePercent = Number(parsed.taxRatePercent);
    const previousTaxRate = Number.isFinite(taxRatePercent) && taxRatePercent >= 0
      ? normalizePreviousTaxRate({
        ...(currentRule.previousTaxRate || impactSummary.previousTaxRate || {}),
        source: 'llm_revision',
        ratePercent: taxRatePercent,
      })
      : currentRule.previousTaxRate || impactSummary.previousTaxRate || null;

    return this.updateSuggestion(organizationId, suggestionId, {
      suggestedRule: {
        ...currentRule,
        name: parsed.ruleName,
        suggestedAccountId: matchedAccount?.id || null,
        suggestedAccountCode: matchedAccount?.code || parsed.suggestedAccountCode,
        suggestedAccountDescription: matchedAccount?.description || '',
        transactionType: parsed.transactionType,
        taxTreatment: parsed.taxTreatment,
        requiredReceipt: Boolean(parsed.requiredReceipt),
        applyPreviousTaxRate: Boolean(previousTaxRate && parsed.applyPreviousTaxRate !== false),
        previousTaxRate,
        patterns: parsed.matchConditions?.descriptionContainsAny || currentRule.patterns || [],
        amountDirection: parsed.matchConditions?.amountDirection || currentRule.amountDirection || null,
        sourceType: parsed.matchConditions?.sourceType || currentRule.sourceType || null,
        journalTemplateLines,
        reasoning: parsed.reasoning || parsed.reason || '',
        journalValidation,
        autoApplyTaxes: String(parsed.taxTreatment || '') === 'INPUT_TAX_CREDIT',
      },
      confidence: parsed.confidence,
      riskLevel: parsed.riskLevel,
      reason: parsed.reason || parsed.reasoning || suggestion.reason,
    });
  }

  async approveSuggestion(organizationId, suggestionId, userId, { applyToMatches = false, applyPreviousTaxRate = false } = {}) {
    const [suggestion] = await prisma.$queryRaw`
      SELECT *
      FROM "AccountingRuleSuggestion"
      WHERE "id" = ${suggestionId}
      LIMIT 1
    `;

    if (!suggestion || suggestion.organizationId !== organizationId) {
      throw Object.assign(new Error('Suggestion not found.'), { statusCode: 404 });
    }

    if (suggestion.status === 'APPLIED' && applyToMatches) {
      const ruleData = safeJsonParse(suggestion.suggestedRuleJson) || {};
      const matchedIds = safeJsonParse(suggestion.matchedTransactionIdsJson) || [];
      const appliedToCount = await this._applySuggestionToMatchedTransactions(organizationId, matchedIds, ruleData, { applyPreviousTaxRate });

      const newMatchIds = await this._findMatchingUncategorizedIds(organizationId, ruleData, matchedIds);
      let newAppliedCount = 0;
      if (newMatchIds.length) {
        newAppliedCount = await this._applySuggestionToMatchedTransactions(organizationId, newMatchIds, ruleData, { applyPreviousTaxRate });
      }

      const mergedIds = [...matchedIds, ...newMatchIds];
      await this._updateImpactSummaryAfterApply(organizationId, suggestionId, mergedIds);

      if (newMatchIds.length) {
        await prisma.$executeRaw`
          UPDATE "AccountingRuleSuggestion"
          SET "matchedTransactionIdsJson" = ${JSON.stringify(mergedIds)}
          WHERE "id" = ${suggestionId}
        `;
      }

      const [rule] = suggestion.approvedRuleId
        ? await prisma.$queryRaw`
            SELECT *
            FROM "AccountingRules"
            WHERE "id" = ${suggestion.approvedRuleId}
            LIMIT 1
          `
        : [null];

      return { rule, appliedToCount: appliedToCount + newAppliedCount };
    }

    if (suggestion.status === 'APPROVED' && applyToMatches) {
      const ruleData = safeJsonParse(suggestion.suggestedRuleJson) || {};
      const matchedIds = safeJsonParse(suggestion.matchedTransactionIdsJson) || [];
      const appliedToCount = await this._applySuggestionToMatchedTransactions(organizationId, matchedIds, ruleData, { applyPreviousTaxRate });
      await prisma.$executeRaw`
        UPDATE "AccountingRuleSuggestion"
        SET "status" = 'APPLIED'
        WHERE "id" = ${suggestionId}
      `;

      await this._updateImpactSummaryAfterApply(organizationId, suggestionId, matchedIds);

      const [rule] = suggestion.approvedRuleId
        ? await prisma.$queryRaw`
            SELECT *
            FROM "AccountingRules"
            WHERE "id" = ${suggestion.approvedRuleId}
            LIMIT 1
          `
        : [null];

      return { rule, appliedToCount };
    }

    if (suggestion.status === 'APPROVED' || suggestion.status === 'APPLIED') {
      const [rule] = suggestion.approvedRuleId
        ? await prisma.$queryRaw`
            SELECT *
            FROM "AccountingRules"
            WHERE "id" = ${suggestion.approvedRuleId}
              AND "organizationId" = ${organizationId}
            LIMIT 1
          `
        : [null];

      return { rule, appliedToCount: 0 };
    }

    if (suggestion.status === 'APPLIED') {
      throw Object.assign(new Error('Suggestion has already been applied.'), { statusCode: 400 });
    }

    if (suggestion.status !== 'PENDING') {
      throw Object.assign(new Error('Suggestion is not pending.'), { statusCode: 400 });
    }

    const ruleData = safeJsonParse(suggestion.suggestedRuleJson) || {};
    const matchedIds = safeJsonParse(suggestion.matchedTransactionIdsJson) || [];

    const suggestionTransactionGroupId = suggestion.transactionGroupId || null;
    let sourceGroupKey = null;
    let sourceGroupTransactionIds = [];

    if (suggestionTransactionGroupId) {
      try {
        const group = await prisma.transactionGroup.findUnique({
          where: { id: suggestionTransactionGroupId },
          select: { groupKey: true, members: { select: { bankTransactionId: true } } },
        });
        if (group) {
          sourceGroupKey = group.groupKey;
          sourceGroupTransactionIds = group.members.map((m) => m.bankTransactionId);
        }
      } catch (_) {}
    }

    const rulePatterns = normalizePatternList(ruleData.patterns || []);
    const sourceGroupMerchant = String(sourceGroupKey || '').split('||')[0]?.replace(/_/g, ' ').trim();
    const fallbackPattern = sourceGroupMerchant || inferPatternFromRuleName(ruleData.name);

    const patternsMeta = {
      patterns: rulePatterns.length ? rulePatterns : (fallbackPattern ? [fallbackPattern] : []),
      group: ruleData.group || 'AI Suggestion',
      enabled: true,
      matchMode: ruleData.matchMode || 'ANY',
      sourceType: ruleData.sourceType || null,
      transactionType: ruleData.transactionType || null,
      taxTreatment: ruleData.taxTreatment || null,
      amountDirection: ruleData.amountDirection || 'ANY',
      previousTaxRate: ruleData.previousTaxRate || null,
      applyPreviousTaxRate: Boolean(ruleData.applyPreviousTaxRate),
      llmSummary: ruleData.reason || '',
      proposalSource: 'AI_RULE_SUGGESTION',
      journalMode: ruleData.journalTemplateLines?.length ? 'PROPOSAL_HINT' : 'STANDARD',
      journalTemplateLines: ruleData.journalTemplateLines || [],
      sourceGroupKey,
      sourceGroupTransactionIds,
      sourceGroupMemberCount: sourceGroupTransactionIds.length,
    };

    const ruleId = randomUUID();
    const now = new Date();
    let approvedRuleId = ruleId;
    let existingGroupRule = null;

    if (suggestionTransactionGroupId) {
      const [ruleByGroup] = await prisma.$queryRaw`
        SELECT *
        FROM "AccountingRules"
        WHERE "organizationId" = ${organizationId}
          AND "transactionGroupId" = ${suggestionTransactionGroupId}
        LIMIT 1
      `;
      existingGroupRule = ruleByGroup || null;

      if (!existingGroupRule) {
        const [linkedGroup] = await prisma.$queryRaw`
          SELECT "linkedRuleId"
          FROM "TransactionGroups"
          WHERE "id" = ${suggestionTransactionGroupId}
            AND "organizationId" = ${organizationId}
          LIMIT 1
        `;

        if (linkedGroup?.linkedRuleId) {
          const [linkedRule] = await prisma.$queryRaw`
            SELECT *
            FROM "AccountingRules"
            WHERE "id" = ${linkedGroup.linkedRuleId}
              AND "organizationId" = ${organizationId}
            LIMIT 1
          `;
          existingGroupRule = linkedRule || null;
        }
      }
    }

    if (existingGroupRule) {
      approvedRuleId = existingGroupRule.id;
      await prisma.$executeRaw`
        UPDATE "AccountingRules"
        SET "name" = ${ruleData.name || existingGroupRule.name || 'AI Suggested Rule'},
            "sql" = '',
            "patterns" = ${JSON.stringify(patternsMeta)},
            "autoCategory" = ${Boolean(ruleData.suggestedAccountId)},
            "autoApplyTaxes" = ${Boolean(ruleData.autoApplyTaxes || ruleData.applyPreviousTaxRate)},
            "requiredReceipt" = ${Boolean(ruleData.requiredReceipt)},
            "categoryId" = ${ruleData.suggestedAccountId || null},
            "status" = 'ACTIVE',
            "riskLevel" = ${suggestion.riskLevel || existingGroupRule.riskLevel || 'MEDIUM'},
            "confidence" = ${suggestion.confidence || existingGroupRule.confidence || null},
            "transactionGroupId" = ${suggestionTransactionGroupId},
            "updatedAt" = ${now}
        WHERE "id" = ${approvedRuleId}
          AND "organizationId" = ${organizationId}
      `;
    } else {
      await prisma.$executeRaw`
        INSERT INTO "AccountingRules" (
          "id", "organizationId", "name", "sql", "patterns", "autoCategory",
          "autoApplyTaxes", "requiredReceipt", "categoryId", "status", "riskLevel",
          "confidence", "transactionGroupId", "createdAt", "updatedAt"
        )
        VALUES (
          ${approvedRuleId}, ${organizationId}, ${ruleData.name || 'AI Suggested Rule'}, '',
          ${JSON.stringify(patternsMeta)}, ${Boolean(ruleData.suggestedAccountId)},
          ${Boolean(ruleData.autoApplyTaxes || ruleData.applyPreviousTaxRate)}, ${Boolean(ruleData.requiredReceipt)},
          ${ruleData.suggestedAccountId || null}, 'ACTIVE', ${suggestion.riskLevel || 'MEDIUM'},
          ${suggestion.confidence || null}, ${suggestionTransactionGroupId}, ${now}, ${now}
        )
      `;
    }

    if (suggestionTransactionGroupId) {
      await prisma.$executeRaw`
        UPDATE "TransactionGroups"
        SET "linkedRuleId" = ${approvedRuleId}, "linkedSuggestionId" = ${suggestionId}
        WHERE "id" = ${suggestionTransactionGroupId}
      `;
    }

    await prisma.$executeRaw`
      UPDATE "AccountingRuleSuggestion"
      SET "status" = ${applyToMatches ? 'APPLIED' : 'APPROVED'},
          "approvedAt" = ${now},
          "approvedRuleId" = ${approvedRuleId}
      WHERE "id" = ${suggestionId}
    `;

    if (suggestionTransactionGroupId) {
      await TransactionGroupService.refreshAffectedGroups(organizationId, []);
    }

    const appliedToCount = applyToMatches
      ? await this._applySuggestionToMatchedTransactions(organizationId, matchedIds, ruleData, { applyPreviousTaxRate })
      : 0;

    if (applyToMatches) {
      await this._updateImpactSummaryAfterApply(organizationId, suggestionId, matchedIds);
    }

    const newRule = {
      id: approvedRuleId,
      organizationId,
      name: ruleData.name || existingGroupRule?.name || 'AI Suggested Rule',
      sql: '',
      patterns: JSON.stringify(patternsMeta),
      meta: patternsMeta,
      autoCategory: Boolean(ruleData.suggestedAccountId),
      autoApplyTaxes: Boolean(ruleData.autoApplyTaxes || ruleData.applyPreviousTaxRate),
      requiredReceipt: Boolean(ruleData.requiredReceipt),
      categoryId: ruleData.suggestedAccountId || null,
      status: 'ACTIVE',
      riskLevel: suggestion.riskLevel || 'MEDIUM',
      confidence: suggestion.confidence || null,
      createdAt: now,
      updatedAt: now,
    };

    return { rule: newRule, appliedToCount };
  }

  async _applySuggestionToMatchedTransactions(organizationId, matchedIds, ruleData, { applyPreviousTaxRate = false } = {}) {
    const numericIds = matchedIds.map((id) => Number(id)).filter((id) => Number.isInteger(id));
    if (!numericIds.length) return 0;

    const transactions = await prisma.bankTransaction.findMany({
      where: { id: { in: numericIds }, organizationId },
      select: { id: true, amount: true, taxes: true, categoryId: true, postingType: true, notes: true },
    });

    const previousTaxRate = ruleData.previousTaxRate || null;
    const canApplyTaxRate = applyPreviousTaxRate && Number(previousTaxRate?.taxShareOfGross || 0) > 0;
    let changedCount = 0;

    for (const tx of transactions) {
      if (tx.categoryId) continue;

      const updateData = {};

      if (ruleData.suggestedAccountId) {
        updateData.categoryId = ruleData.suggestedAccountId;
      }

      if (!tx.postingType && ruleData.transactionType) {
        updateData.postingType = ruleData.transactionType;
      }

      if (canApplyTaxRate && Number(tx.amount || 0) < 0 && (tx.taxes === null || tx.taxes === undefined || Number(tx.taxes || 0) === 0)) {
        const taxAmount = roundMoney(Math.abs(Number(tx.amount || 0)) * Number(previousTaxRate.taxShareOfGross));
        updateData.taxes = -taxAmount;
      }

      if (ruleData.transactionType || ruleData.taxTreatment || Array.isArray(ruleData.journalTemplateLines)) {
        updateData.notes = this._mergeProposalIntoNotes(tx.notes, {
          ...(ruleData.transactionType ? { likelyTransactionType: ruleData.transactionType } : {}),
          ...(ruleData.taxTreatment ? { likelyTaxTreatment: ruleData.taxTreatment } : {}),
          ...(Array.isArray(ruleData.journalTemplateLines) ? { likelyJournalLines: ruleData.journalTemplateLines } : {}),
        });
      }

      if (!Object.keys(updateData).length) continue;
      await prisma.bankTransaction.update({ where: { id: tx.id }, data: updateData, select: { id: true } });
      changedCount += 1;
    }

    return changedCount;
  }

  async _findMatchingUncategorizedIds(organizationId, ruleData, excludeIds = []) {
    const excludeSet = new Set(excludeIds.map(Number));
    const patterns = ruleData.patterns || [];
    const matchMode = ruleData.matchMode || 'ANY';
    const amountDirection = ruleData.amountDirection || 'ANY';
    const ruleSourceType = ruleData.sourceType || null;

    if (!patterns.length && !ruleSourceType && (!amountDirection || amountDirection === 'ANY')) {
      return [];
    }

    const transactions = await prisma.bankTransaction.findMany({
      where: { organizationId, categoryId: null },
      select: { id: true, description: true, amount: true, source: { select: { type: true } } },
    });

    return transactions
      .filter((tx) => {
        if (excludeSet.has(Number(tx.id))) return false;

        const txDirection = Number(tx.amount || 0) > 0 ? 'INCOME' : Number(tx.amount || 0) < 0 ? 'EXPENSE' : 'ANY';
        if (amountDirection && amountDirection !== 'ANY' && amountDirection !== txDirection) return false;

        if (ruleSourceType) {
          const txSourceType = String(tx.source?.type || '').toUpperCase();
          if (txSourceType && ruleSourceType.toUpperCase() !== txSourceType) return false;
        }

        if (patterns.length) {
          const haystack = normalizeText(tx.description);
          if (!haystack) return false;
          const normalizedPatterns = patterns.map((p) => normalizeText(String(p))).filter(Boolean);
          if (normalizedPatterns.length) {
            if (matchMode === 'ALL') {
              if (!normalizedPatterns.every((p) => haystack.includes(p))) return false;
            } else {
              if (!normalizedPatterns.some((p) => haystack.includes(p))) return false;
            }
          }
        }

        return true;
      })
      .map((tx) => tx.id);
  }

  _mergeProposalIntoNotes(notes, proposalPatch) {
    const marker = '__aiProposal:';
    const text = String(notes || '');
    const lines = text.split('\n');
    const existingIndex = lines.findIndex((line) => line.trim().startsWith(marker));
    const existing = existingIndex >= 0 ? safeJsonParse(lines[existingIndex].trim().slice(marker.length)) || {} : {};
    const nextLine = `${marker}${JSON.stringify({ ...existing, ...proposalPatch })}`;

    if (existingIndex >= 0) {
      lines[existingIndex] = nextLine;
      return lines.join('\n');
    }

    return text ? `${text}\n${nextLine}` : nextLine;
  }

  async rejectSuggestion(organizationId, suggestionId) {
    const [suggestion] = await prisma.$queryRaw`
      SELECT *
      FROM "AccountingRuleSuggestion"
      WHERE "id" = ${suggestionId}
      LIMIT 1
    `;

    if (!suggestion || suggestion.organizationId !== organizationId) {
      throw Object.assign(new Error('Suggestion not found.'), { statusCode: 404 });
    }

    await prisma.$executeRaw`
      UPDATE "AccountingRuleSuggestion"
      SET "status" = 'REJECTED', "rejectedAt" = ${new Date()}
      WHERE "id" = ${suggestionId}
    `;

    const [updated] = await prisma.$queryRaw`
      SELECT *
      FROM "AccountingRuleSuggestion"
      WHERE "id" = ${suggestionId}
      LIMIT 1
    `;
    return updated;
  }

  async deleteApprovedSuggestionRule(organizationId, suggestionId) {
    const [suggestion] = await prisma.$queryRaw`
      SELECT *
      FROM "AccountingRuleSuggestion"
      WHERE "id" = ${suggestionId}
      LIMIT 1
    `;

    if (!suggestion || suggestion.organizationId !== organizationId) {
      throw Object.assign(new Error('Suggestion not found.'), { statusCode: 404 });
    }

    if (suggestion.status !== 'APPROVED' && suggestion.status !== 'APPLIED') {
      throw Object.assign(new Error('Only approved or applied suggestions can be deleted here.'), { statusCode: 400 });
    }

    const approvedRuleId = suggestion.approvedRuleId || null;
    if (approvedRuleId) {
      const [rule] = await prisma.$queryRaw`
        SELECT *
        FROM "AccountingRules"
        WHERE "id" = ${approvedRuleId}
        LIMIT 1
      `;

      if (!rule || rule.organizationId !== organizationId) {
        throw Object.assign(new Error('Approved rule not found.'), { statusCode: 404 });
      }
    }

    await prisma.$transaction(async (tx) => {
      if (approvedRuleId) {
        await tx.$executeRaw`
          UPDATE "AccountingRuleSuggestion"
          SET "approvedRuleId" = NULL
          WHERE "organizationId" = ${organizationId}
            AND "approvedRuleId" = ${approvedRuleId}
        `;
      }

      await tx.$executeRaw`
        DELETE FROM "AccountingRuleSuggestion"
        WHERE "id" = ${suggestionId}
          AND "organizationId" = ${organizationId}
      `;

      if (approvedRuleId) {
        await tx.$executeRaw`
          DELETE FROM "AccountingRules"
          WHERE "id" = ${approvedRuleId}
            AND "organizationId" = ${organizationId}
        `;
      }
    });

    return { deletedSuggestionId: suggestionId, deletedRuleId: approvedRuleId };
  }

  async _createSuggestionRow({
    organizationId,
    suggestedRuleJson,
    matchedTransactionIdsJson,
    impactSummaryJson,
    confidence,
    riskLevel,
    reason,
    status = 'PENDING',
    transactionGroupId = null,
  }) {
    const id = randomUUID();
    await prisma.$executeRaw`
      INSERT INTO "AccountingRuleSuggestion" (
        "id", "organizationId", "status", "suggestedRuleJson",
        "matchedTransactionIdsJson", "impactSummaryJson", "confidence",
        "riskLevel", "reason", "transactionGroupId", "createdAt"
      )
      VALUES (
        ${id}, ${organizationId}, ${status}, ${suggestedRuleJson},
        ${matchedTransactionIdsJson}, ${impactSummaryJson}, ${confidence},
        ${riskLevel}, ${reason}, ${transactionGroupId}, ${new Date()}
      )
    `;

    const [row] = await prisma.$queryRaw`
      SELECT *
      FROM "AccountingRuleSuggestion"
      WHERE "id" = ${id}
      LIMIT 1
    `;
    return row;
  }

  async _updateImpactSummaryAfterApply(organizationId, suggestionId, matchedIds) {
    const numericIds = matchedIds.map((id) => Number(id)).filter((id) => Number.isInteger(id));
    if (!numericIds.length) return;

    const transactions = await prisma.bankTransaction.findMany({
      where: { id: { in: numericIds }, organizationId },
      select: { id: true, categoryId: true },
    });

    const categorizedCount = transactions.filter((tx) => tx.categoryId).length;
    const uncategorizedCount = transactions.length - categorizedCount;

    const [row] = await prisma.$queryRaw`
      SELECT "impactSummaryJson" FROM "AccountingRuleSuggestion"
      WHERE "id" = ${suggestionId}
      LIMIT 1
    `;
    const impact = safeJsonParse(row?.impactSummaryJson) || {};
    impact.uncategorizedCount = uncategorizedCount;
    impact.alreadyCategorizedCount = categorizedCount;
    impact.matchedCount = transactions.length;

    if (uncategorizedCount === 0) {
      impact.uncategorizedTransactionSamples = [];
    }

    await prisma.$executeRaw`
      UPDATE "AccountingRuleSuggestion"
      SET "impactSummaryJson" = ${JSON.stringify(impact)}
      WHERE "id" = ${suggestionId}
    `;
  }
}

export default new RuleSuggestionService();

```

```js
// Full path: /home/luanngo/boss-dev/server/src/services/accounting/services/tests/AccountingService.test.js
import { describe, expect, it } from 'vitest';
import AccountingService from '../AccountingService.js';

const accountingService = new AccountingService();

describe('AccountingService deterministic posting classification', () => {
  it('classifies PAYMENT - THANK YOU on a credit-card statement as a no-tax credit-card payment', () => {
    const tx = {
      description: 'PAYMENT - THANK YOU',
      amount: 459.62,
      source: { type: 'CREDIT_CARD' },
    };

    expect(accountingService.classifyTransactionType(tx)).toBe('CREDIT_CARD_PAYMENT');
    expect(accountingService.buildLinesFromBankTx(tx)).toEqual([
      { account: '2690', debit: 459.62, credit: 0 },
      { account: '1001', debit: 0, credit: 459.62 },
    ]);
  });

  it('does not classify ordinary negative credit-card purchases as card payments', () => {
    expect(accountingService.classifyTransactionType({
      description: 'OFFICE DEPOT',
      amount: -123.45,
      source: { type: 'CREDIT_CARD' },
    })).toBe('BANK_EXPENSE');
  });

  it('classifies CANADA TXD as an HST tax remittance and ignores stale P&L categories for posting', () => {
    const tx = {
      description: 'CANADA TXD',
      amount: -8779.72,
      source: { type: 'CREDIT_CARD' },
      category: {
        code: '8810',
        category: 'EXPENSES',
      },
    };

    expect(accountingService.classifyTransactionType(tx)).toBe('TAX_REMITTANCE');
    expect(accountingService.buildLinesFromBankTx(tx)).toEqual([
      { account: '2640', debit: 8779.72, credit: 0 },
      { account: '2690', debit: 0, credit: 8779.72 },
    ]);
  });
});
```

```js
// Full path: /home/luanngo/boss-dev/server/src/services/accounting/services/tests/ImportService.test.js
import { describe, expect, it } from 'vitest';
import ImportService from '../ImportService.js';

describe('ImportService import preparation helpers', () => {
  const service = new ImportService();

  it('uses python3 by default for import scripts on non-Windows servers', () => {
    const originalBin = process.env.ACCOUNTING_IMPORT_PYTHON_BIN;
    const originalPythonBin = process.env.PYTHON_BIN;
    delete process.env.ACCOUNTING_IMPORT_PYTHON_BIN;
    delete process.env.PYTHON_BIN;

    try {
      expect(service.getPythonBin()).toBe(process.platform === 'win32' ? 'python' : 'python3');
    } finally {
      if (originalBin === undefined) {
        delete process.env.ACCOUNTING_IMPORT_PYTHON_BIN;
      } else {
        process.env.ACCOUNTING_IMPORT_PYTHON_BIN = originalBin;
      }

      if (originalPythonBin === undefined) {
        delete process.env.PYTHON_BIN;
      } else {
        process.env.PYTHON_BIN = originalPythonBin;
      }
    }
  });

  it('allows accounting import Python executable override', () => {
    const originalBin = process.env.ACCOUNTING_IMPORT_PYTHON_BIN;
    process.env.ACCOUNTING_IMPORT_PYTHON_BIN = '/custom/python3';

    try {
      expect(service.getPythonBin()).toBe('/custom/python3');
    } finally {
      if (originalBin === undefined) {
        delete process.env.ACCOUNTING_IMPORT_PYTHON_BIN;
      } else {
        process.env.ACCOUNTING_IMPORT_PYTHON_BIN = originalBin;
      }
    }
  });

  it('normalizes preview rows while preserving approval state', () => {
    const row = service.cleanPreviewTransaction({
      date: '2026-02-01',
      description: '  Fuel   Station  ',
      amount: '42.50',
      taxes: '4.89',
      balance: '',
      type: 'expense',
      categoryId: ' category-1 ',
      receiptId: '',
      approvedForImport: false,
    });

    expect(row).toMatchObject({
      description: 'Fuel Station',
      amount: -42.5,
      taxes: 4.89,
      balance: null,
      type: 'expense',
      categoryId: 'category-1',
      receiptId: null,
      approvedForImport: false,
    });
  });

  it('skips unapproved, invalid, and existing duplicate rows before insertion', () => {
    const transactions = [
      { description: 'Ready', approvedForImport: true, importRowIndex: 4 },
      { description: 'Skipped manually', approvedForImport: false, importRowIndex: 5 },
      { description: 'Blocked', approvedForImport: true, importRowIndex: 6 },
      { description: 'Duplicate', approvedForImport: true, importRowIndex: 7 },
    ];

    const validationReport = {
      rows: [
        { index: 0, status: 'ready', existingDuplicateCount: 0, warnings: [] },
        { index: 1, status: 'warning', existingDuplicateCount: 0, warnings: [] },
        { index: 2, status: 'error', existingDuplicateCount: 0, warnings: [] },
        {
          index: 3,
          status: 'warning',
          existingDuplicateCount: 1,
          warnings: [{ code: 'possible_existing_duplicate', matches: [{ id: 123 }] }],
        },
      ],
    };

    const result = service.filterApprovedImportRows({
      transactions,
      validationReport,
      allowExistingDuplicates: false,
    });

    expect(result.rows).toHaveLength(1);
    expect(result.rows[0].transaction.description).toBe('Ready');
    expect(result.skippedRows.map((row) => [row.index, row.reason])).toEqual([
      [5, 'not_approved'],
      [6, 'validation_error'],
      [7, 'existing_duplicate'],
    ]);
  });

  it('allows existing duplicates only when explicitly requested', () => {
    const transactions = [{ description: 'Duplicate', approvedForImport: true, importRowIndex: 2 }];
    const validationReport = {
      rows: [{ index: 0, status: 'warning', existingDuplicateCount: 1, warnings: [] }],
    };

    const result = service.filterApprovedImportRows({
      transactions,
      validationReport,
      allowExistingDuplicates: true,
    });

    expect(result.rows).toHaveLength(1);
    expect(result.skippedRows).toHaveLength(0);
  });

  it('keeps receipt requirement as transient import metadata', () => {
    const row = service.normalizeImportedTransaction(
      {
        date: '2026-02-01',
        description: 'No receipt needed',
        amount: '-20',
        receiptRequired: false,
      },
      {
        organizationId: 'org-1',
        userId: 'user-1',
        sourceId: 'source-1',
      },
    );

    expect(row.receiptRequired).toBe(false);
    expect(row).not.toHaveProperty('receiptMatchStatus');
  });

  it('revises expense rows to negative amounts when instructed', () => {
    const rows = service.applyRevisionInstructions({
      instructions: 'all expenses should be negative amounts',
      transactions: [
        { description: 'Fuel', amount: 42.5, type: 'expense' },
        { description: 'Deposit', amount: 100, type: 'income' },
      ],
    });

    expect(rows[0]).toMatchObject({ amount: -42.5, type: 'expense' });
    expect(rows[1]).toMatchObject({ amount: 100, type: 'income' });
  });

  it('revises credit card charges mislabeled as income to negative expenses', () => {
    const rows = service.applyRevisionInstructions({
      instructions: 'expenses should be negative amounts',
      source: { name: 'TD Visa', type: 'CREDIT_CARD' },
      transactions: [
        { description: 'Restaurant', amount: 25.98, type: 'income' },
        { description: 'Payment received thank you', amount: 500, type: 'income' },
      ],
    });

    expect(rows[0]).toMatchObject({ amount: -25.98, type: 'expense' });
    expect(rows[1]).toMatchObject({ amount: 500, type: 'income' });
  });
});
```

```js
// Full path: /home/luanngo/boss-dev/server/src/services/accounting/services/tests/RuleSuggestionService.test.js
import { describe, expect, it } from 'vitest';
import {
  buildRuleSuggestionPromptContext,
  buildHistoricalPrecedentEvidence,
  getTaxRateEvidence,
  isCreditCardPaymentDescriptor,
  isCreditCardPaymentGroup,
  isSquareDescriptor,
  isSquarePayoutGroup,
  isPayrollFundingDescriptor,
  isPayrollFundingGroup,
  isTaxRemittanceDescriptor,
  isTaxRemittanceGroup,
  normalizeJournalTemplateLines,
  resolveBankLedgerAccount,
  resolveCreditCardLiabilityAccount,
  resolveTaxPayableAccount,
  validateJournalTemplateLines,
} from '../RuleSuggestionService.js';
import RuleSuggestionService from '../RuleSuggestionService.js';

describe('RuleSuggestionService tax history evidence', () => {
  const travelAccount = {
    id: 'travel',
    code: '9040',
    description: 'Travel expenses (flights, hotels, per diem)',
  };

  it('uses negative expense HST as taxable purchase precedent', () => {
    const transactions = [
      {
        id: 1,
        date: new Date('2025-09-02T00:00:00.000Z'),
        description: 'Uber',
        amount: -3,
        taxes: -0.345132743362832,
        categoryId: travelAccount.id,
        category: travelAccount,
        source: { type: 'CREDIT_CARD' },
      },
      {
        id: 2,
        date: new Date('2025-09-02T00:00:00.000Z'),
        description: 'Uber',
        amount: -19.87,
        taxes: -2.28592920353982,
        categoryId: travelAccount.id,
        category: travelAccount,
        source: { type: 'CREDIT_CARD' },
      },
      {
        id: 3,
        date: new Date('2025-09-02T00:00:00.000Z'),
        description: 'Uber',
        amount: -40.47,
        taxes: -4.6558407079646,
        categoryId: travelAccount.id,
        category: travelAccount,
        source: { type: 'CREDIT_CARD' },
      },
    ];

    const taxEvidence = getTaxRateEvidence(transactions);
    expect(taxEvidence.sampleCount).toBe(3);
    expect(taxEvidence.ratePercent).toBeCloseTo(13, 1);

    const precedent = buildHistoricalPrecedentEvidence(transactions);
    expect(precedent.dominantAccountCode).toBe('9040');
    expect(precedent.dominantTaxTreatment).toBe('INPUT_TAX_CREDIT');
    expect(precedent.taxableSampleCount).toBe(3);
  });
});

describe('RuleSuggestionService CRA/HST remittance suggestions', () => {
  const accounts = [
    {
      id: 'hst-payable',
      code: 'L-HST',
      description: 'GST/HST Payable',
      category: 'LIABILITIES',
      normalSide: 'CREDIT',
    },
    {
      id: 'visa-payable',
      code: 'L-CC-VISA',
      description: 'Visa Payable - Business card',
      category: 'LIABILITIES',
      normalSide: 'CREDIT',
    },
    {
      id: 'operating-chequing',
      code: 'A-BANK-OPERATING',
      description: 'Operating Chequing Account',
      category: 'ASSETS',
      normalSide: 'DEBIT',
    },
    {
      id: 'office',
      code: 'E-OFFICE',
      description: 'Office expenses',
      category: 'EXPENSES',
      normalSide: 'DEBIT',
    },
    {
      id: 'revenue',
      code: 'R-SALES',
      description: 'Sales revenue',
      category: 'REVENUE',
      normalSide: 'CREDIT',
    },
    {
      id: 'itc',
      code: '1066',
      description: 'Expense Tax Clearing',
      category: 'ASSETS',
      normalSide: 'DEBIT',
    },
  ];

  it('detects CANADA TXD as a tax remittance only with payment direction and bank/card source context', () => {
    expect(isTaxRemittanceDescriptor('CANADA TXD')).toBe(true);
    expect(isTaxRemittanceGroup({
      sourceType: 'CREDIT_CARD',
      direction: 'EXPENSE',
      normalizedMerchant: 'canada txd',
      transactions: [{ amount: -8779.72, description: 'CANADA TXD' }],
    })).toBe(true);
    expect(isTaxRemittanceGroup({
      sourceType: 'CREDIT_CARD',
      direction: 'INCOME',
      normalizedMerchant: 'canada txd',
      transactions: [{ amount: 8779.72, description: 'CANADA TXD' }],
    })).toBe(false);
  });

  it('resolves GST/HST payable without hard-coded account codes', () => {
    expect(resolveTaxPayableAccount(accounts)).toEqual(expect.objectContaining({ code: 'L-HST' }));
  });

  it('validates CRA/HST remittance as debit HST payable and credit source account with no expense, revenue, ITC, or HST formula line', () => {
    const lines = [
      { accountCode: 'L-HST', side: 'DEBIT', amountFormula: 'gross' },
      { accountCode: 'L-CC-VISA', side: 'CREDIT', amountFormula: 'gross' },
    ];

    expect(validateJournalTemplateLines(lines, accounts, {
      taxTreatment: 'HST_REMITTANCE',
      transactionType: 'TAX_REMITTANCE',
    })).toEqual(expect.objectContaining({
      valid: true,
      debitFormulaTotal: 1,
      creditFormulaTotal: 1,
    }));
  });

  it('rejects office/revenue/ITC style remittance templates', () => {
    const validation = validateJournalTemplateLines([
      { accountCode: 'E-OFFICE', side: 'DEBIT', amountFormula: 'gross' },
      { accountCode: 'R-SALES', side: 'CREDIT', amountFormula: 'gross' },
      { accountCode: '1066', side: 'DEBIT', amountFormula: 'hst' },
    ], accounts, {
      taxTreatment: 'HST_REMITTANCE',
      transactionType: 'TAX_REMITTANCE',
    });

    expect(validation.valid).toBe(false);
    expect(validation.errors).toContain('transfer_has_revenue_or_expense_account');
    expect(validation.errors).toContain('tax_remittance_has_tax_line');
    expect(validation.errors).toContain('journal_template_unbalanced');
  });

  it('puts CRA/HST remittance guidance into LLM context instead of requiring a deterministic suggestion branch', () => {
    const context = buildRuleSuggestionPromptContext({
      organizationId: 'org-1',
      group: {
        normalizedMerchant: 'canada txd',
        sourceType: 'CREDIT_CARD',
        direction: 'EXPENSE',
        transactionCount: 2,
        uncategorizedCount: 0,
        amountMin: 22.91,
        amountMax: 8779.72,
        amountTotal: 8802.63,
        transactions: [
          { id: 1, amount: -8779.72, description: 'CANADA TXD', sourceName: 'Business Visa', sourceId: 'src-card' },
          { id: 2, amount: -22.91, description: 'CANADA TXD', sourceName: 'Business Visa', sourceId: 'src-card' },
        ],
        sampleTransactions: [
          { id: 1, amount: -8779.72, description: 'CANADA TXD', sourceName: 'Business Visa', sourceId: 'src-card' },
        ],
      },
      accounts,
    });

    expect(context.descriptorSignals.taxRemittanceDescriptor).toBe(true);
    expect(context.descriptorSignals.taxRemittanceSupportedBySourceAndDirection).toBe(true);
    expect(context.taxAccountContext.hstPayableAccountCandidate).toEqual(expect.objectContaining({ code: 'L-HST' }));
    expect(context.sourceAccountContext.currentSourceLedgerAccountCandidate).toEqual(expect.objectContaining({ code: 'L-CC-VISA' }));
    expect(context.availableAccounts.map((account) => account.code)).toContain('L-HST');
  });
});

describe('RuleSuggestionService Square payout suggestions', () => {
  const accounts = [
    {
      id: 'cash',
      code: '1001',
      description: 'Cash',
      category: 'ASSETS',
      normalSide: 'DEBIT',
      isPLAccount: false,
    },
    {
      id: 'undeposited',
      code: '1090',
      description: 'Undeposited Funds',
      category: 'ASSETS',
      normalSide: 'DEBIT',
      isPLAccount: false,
    },
    {
      id: 'sales',
      code: '8089',
      description: 'Sales of goods and services',
      category: 'REVENUE',
      normalSide: 'CREDIT',
      isPLAccount: true,
    },
    {
      id: 'hst',
      code: '2640',
      description: 'Taxes payable',
      category: 'LIABILITIES',
      normalSide: 'CREDIT',
      isPLAccount: false,
    },
    {
      id: 'tips',
      code: '2621',
      description: 'Tips payable',
      category: 'LIABILITIES',
      normalSide: 'CREDIT',
      isPLAccount: false,
    },
    {
      id: 'surcharge',
      code: '8290',
      description: 'Other income',
      category: 'REVENUE',
      normalSide: 'CREDIT',
      isPLAccount: true,
    },
    {
      id: 'fees',
      code: '8850',
      description: 'Bank charges',
      category: 'EXPENSES',
      normalSide: 'DEBIT',
      isPLAccount: true,
    },
    {
      id: 'unexplained',
      code: '9999',
      description: 'Unexplained',
      category: 'EXPENSES',
      normalSide: 'DEBIT',
      isPLAccount: true,
    },
  ];

  it('detects Square bank payout groups only with bank source context', () => {
    expect(isSquareDescriptor('SQUARE INC MSP')).toBe(true);
    expect(isSquarePayoutGroup({
      sourceType: 'CHEQUING_ACCOUNT',
      direction: 'INCOME',
      normalizedMerchant: 'square inc msp',
      transactions: [{ amount: 661000.50, description: 'SQUARE INC MSP' }],
    })).toBe(true);
    expect(isSquarePayoutGroup({
      sourceType: 'CREDIT_CARD',
      direction: 'INCOME',
      normalizedMerchant: 'square inc msp',
      transactions: [{ amount: 661000.50, description: 'SQUARE INC MSP' }],
    })).toBe(false);
  });

  it('puts Square clearing and component account candidates into LLM context', () => {
    const context = buildRuleSuggestionPromptContext({
      organizationId: 'org-1',
      group: {
        normalizedMerchant: 'square inc msp',
        sourceType: 'CHEQUING_ACCOUNT',
        direction: 'INCOME',
        transactionCount: 3,
        amountTotal: 1000,
        transactions: [
          {
            id: 1,
            amount: 1000,
            description: 'SQUARE INC MSP',
            sourceId: 'src-bank',
            sourceName: 'Operating bank',
            sourceLedgerAccountId: 'cash',
            sourceLedgerAccountCode: '1001',
          },
        ],
        sampleTransactions: [
          {
            id: 1,
            amount: 1000,
            description: 'SQUARE INC MSP',
            sourceId: 'src-bank',
            sourceName: 'Operating bank',
            sourceLedgerAccountId: 'cash',
            sourceLedgerAccountCode: '1001',
          },
        ],
      },
      accounts,
    });

    expect(context.descriptorSignals.squareDescriptor).toBe(true);
    expect(context.descriptorSignals.squarePayoutSupportedBySourceAndDirection).toBe(true);
    expect(context.sourceAccountContext.currentSourceLedgerAccountCandidate).toEqual(expect.objectContaining({ code: '1001' }));
    expect(context.squareAccountContext.clearingAccountCandidate).toEqual(expect.objectContaining({ code: '1090' }));
    expect(context.squareAccountContext.salesAccountCandidate).toEqual(expect.objectContaining({ code: '8089' }));
    expect(context.squareAccountContext.hstPayableAccountCandidate).toEqual(expect.objectContaining({ code: '2640' }));
    expect(context.squareAccountContext.tipsPayableAccountCandidate).toEqual(expect.objectContaining({ code: '2621' }));
    expect(context.squareAccountContext.surchargeRevenueAccountCandidate).toEqual(expect.objectContaining({ code: '8290' }));
    expect(context.squareAccountContext.paymentProcessingFeesAccountCandidate).toEqual(expect.objectContaining({ code: '8850' }));
  });

  it('normalizes ordinary positive Square payout deposits as bank-to-clearing transfers', () => {
    const lines = normalizeJournalTemplateLines([
      { accountCode: '1001', side: 'DEBIT', amountFormula: 'gross' },
      { accountCode: '1090', side: 'CREDIT', amountFormula: 'gross' },
    ], accounts, {
      suggestedAccountCode: '1090',
      taxTreatment: 'NO_TAX',
      sourceType: 'CHEQUING_ACCOUNT',
      source: { ledgerAccountId: 'cash', ledgerAccountCode: '1001', type: 'CHEQUING_ACCOUNT' },
      amountDirection: 'INCOME',
    });

    expect(lines).toEqual([
      expect.objectContaining({ accountCode: '1001', side: 'DEBIT', amountFormula: 'gross' }),
      expect.objectContaining({ accountCode: '1090', side: 'CREDIT', amountFormula: 'gross' }),
    ]);
    expect(validateJournalTemplateLines(lines, accounts, {
      taxTreatment: 'NO_TAX',
      transactionType: 'TRANSFER',
    })).toEqual(expect.objectContaining({ valid: true }));
  });

  it('does not let bad historical Square deposit categorization override clearing treatment', () => {
    const parsed = {
      suggestedAccountCode: '1090',
      taxTreatment: 'NO_TAX',
      reasoning: 'Square bank deposits should clear against undeposited funds.',
    };

    RuleSuggestionService._applyHistoricalPrecedent(parsed, {
      normalizedMerchant: 'square inc msp',
      sourceType: 'CHEQUING_ACCOUNT',
      direction: 'INCOME',
      transactions: [{ amount: 1000, description: 'SQUARE INC MSP' }],
      historicalPrecedent: {
        sampleCount: 3,
        dominantAccountCode: '8089',
        dominantAccountConfidence: 1,
        dominantTaxTreatment: 'TAXABLE_SALE',
        dominantTaxTreatmentConfidence: 1,
      },
    }, accounts);

    expect(parsed.suggestedAccountCode).toBe('1090');
    expect(parsed.taxTreatment).toBe('NO_TAX');
  });
});

describe('RuleSuggestionService Rise payroll funding suggestions', () => {
  const accounts = [
    {
      id: 'td-chequing',
      code: '1001',
      description: 'TD Chequing / Operating Bank Account',
      category: 'ASSETS',
      normalSide: 'DEBIT',
      isPLAccount: false,
    },
    {
      id: 'payroll-clearing',
      code: '1091',
      description: 'Payroll Clearing',
      category: 'ASSETS',
      normalSide: 'DEBIT',
      isPLAccount: false,
    },
    {
      id: 'expense-tax',
      code: '1066',
      description: 'Expense Tax Clearing',
      category: 'ASSETS',
      normalSide: 'DEBIT',
      isPLAccount: false,
    },
    {
      id: 'wages',
      code: '9060',
      description: 'Salaries and wages (excluding subcontractors)',
      category: 'EXPENSES',
      normalSide: 'DEBIT',
      isPLAccount: true,
    },
    {
      id: 'employer-cpp',
      code: '6100',
      description: 'Employer CPP',
      category: 'EXPENSES',
      normalSide: 'DEBIT',
      isPLAccount: true,
    },
    {
      id: 'employer-ei',
      code: '6110',
      description: 'Employer EI',
      category: 'EXPENSES',
      normalSide: 'DEBIT',
      isPLAccount: true,
    },
    {
      id: 'net-payroll',
      code: '6200',
      description: 'Net Payroll',
      category: 'EXPENSES',
      normalSide: 'DEBIT',
      isPLAccount: true,
    },
    {
      id: 'payroll-fees',
      code: '6310',
      description: 'Payroll Processing Fees',
      category: 'EXPENSES',
      normalSide: 'DEBIT',
      isPLAccount: true,
    },
    {
      id: 'wsib-payable',
      code: '2670',
      description: 'WSIB Payable',
      category: 'LIABILITIES',
      normalSide: 'CREDIT',
      isPLAccount: false,
    },
  ];

  it('detects outgoing Rise CAP from a bank source as payroll funding', () => {
    expect(isPayrollFundingDescriptor('Rise             CAP')).toBe(true);
    expect(isPayrollFundingGroup({
      sourceType: 'CHEQUING_ACCOUNT',
      direction: 'EXPENSE',
      normalizedMerchant: 'rise cap',
      transactions: [{ amount: -15333.58, description: 'Rise             CAP' }],
    })).toBe(true);
    expect(isPayrollFundingGroup({
      sourceType: 'CREDIT_CARD',
      direction: 'EXPENSE',
      normalizedMerchant: 'rise cap',
      transactions: [{ amount: -15333.58, description: 'Rise CAP' }],
    })).toBe(false);
    expect(isPayrollFundingGroup({
      sourceType: 'CHEQUING_ACCOUNT',
      direction: 'INCOME',
      normalizedMerchant: 'rise cap',
      transactions: [{ amount: 15333.58, description: 'Rise CAP' }],
    })).toBe(false);
  });

  it('puts payroll clearing and report-only payroll accounts into LLM context', () => {
    const context = buildRuleSuggestionPromptContext({
      organizationId: 'tacotaco',
      group: {
        normalizedMerchant: 'rise cap',
        sourceType: 'CHEQUING_ACCOUNT',
        direction: 'EXPENSE',
        transactionCount: 28,
        amountTotal: 307416.37,
        transactions: [{
          id: 7897,
          amount: -15333.58,
          description: 'Rise             CAP',
          sourceId: 'td_cheque',
          sourceName: 'td_cheque',
          sourceLedgerAccountId: 'td-chequing',
          sourceLedgerAccountCode: '1001',
        }],
        sampleTransactions: [{
          id: 7897,
          amount: -15333.58,
          description: 'Rise             CAP',
          sourceId: 'td_cheque',
          sourceName: 'td_cheque',
          sourceLedgerAccountId: 'td-chequing',
          sourceLedgerAccountCode: '1001',
        }],
      },
      accounts,
    });

    expect(context.descriptorSignals.payrollFundingDescriptor).toBe(true);
    expect(context.descriptorSignals.payrollFundingSupportedBySourceAndDirection).toBe(true);
    expect(context.sourceAccountContext.currentSourceLedgerAccountCandidate).toEqual(expect.objectContaining({ code: '1001' }));
    expect(context.payrollAccountContext.payrollClearingAccountCandidate).toEqual(expect.objectContaining({ code: '1091' }));
    expect(context.payrollAccountContext.grossWagesAccountCandidate).toEqual(expect.objectContaining({ code: '9060' }));
    expect(context.payrollAccountContext.netPayrollAccountCandidate).toEqual(expect.objectContaining({ code: '6200' }));
    expect(context.payrollAccountContext.payrollProcessingFeesAccountCandidate).toEqual(expect.objectContaining({ code: '6310' }));
    expect(context.payrollAccountContext.wsibPayableAccountCandidate).toEqual(expect.objectContaining({ code: '2670' }));
  });

  it('normalizes Rise bank funding to debit Payroll Clearing and credit TD Chequing with no tax lines', () => {
    const lines = normalizeJournalTemplateLines([
      { accountCode: '9060', side: 'DEBIT', amountFormula: 'gross' },
      { accountCode: '1001', side: 'CREDIT', amountFormula: 'gross' },
    ], accounts, {
      suggestedAccountCode: '1091',
      taxTreatment: 'NO_TAX',
      transactionType: 'PAYROLL_FUNDING',
      payrollFunding: true,
      sourceType: 'CHEQUING_ACCOUNT',
      source: {
        type: 'CHEQUING_ACCOUNT',
        ledgerAccountId: 'td-chequing',
        ledgerAccountCode: '1001',
      },
      amountDirection: 'EXPENSE',
    });

    expect(lines).toEqual([
      expect.objectContaining({ accountCode: '1091', side: 'DEBIT', amountFormula: 'gross' }),
      expect.objectContaining({ accountCode: '1001', side: 'CREDIT', amountFormula: 'gross' }),
    ]);
    expect(lines.map((line) => line.accountCode)).not.toContain('9060');
    expect(lines.map((line) => line.accountCode)).not.toContain('6200');
    expect(lines.map((line) => line.accountCode)).not.toContain('1066');
    expect(validateJournalTemplateLines(lines, accounts, {
      taxTreatment: 'NO_TAX',
      transactionType: 'PAYROLL_FUNDING',
    })).toEqual(expect.objectContaining({ valid: true }));
  });

  it('does not let historical direct-wage Rise categorization override Payroll Clearing', () => {
    const parsed = {
      suggestedAccountCode: '1091',
      taxTreatment: 'NO_TAX',
      reasoning: 'Rise bank withdrawals should clear through Payroll Clearing.',
    };

    RuleSuggestionService._applyHistoricalPrecedent(parsed, {
      normalizedMerchant: 'rise cap',
      sourceType: 'CHEQUING_ACCOUNT',
      direction: 'EXPENSE',
      transactions: [{ amount: -15333.58, description: 'Rise CAP' }],
      historicalPrecedent: {
        sampleCount: 9,
        dominantAccountCode: '9060',
        dominantAccountConfidence: 1,
        dominantTaxTreatment: 'NO_ITC',
        dominantTaxTreatmentConfidence: 1,
      },
    }, accounts);

    expect(parsed.suggestedAccountCode).toBe('1091');
    expect(parsed.taxTreatment).toBe('NO_TAX');
  });

  it('verifies deduplicated 28-run Rise report controls and annual payroll allocation journal amounts', () => {
    const grossWages = 238187.88 + 14842.31 + 4103.48 + 27995.96;
    const matchedFunding = 285129.63 + 14842.31 + 5744.91 + 1504.00 + 195.52;
    const hstOnFees = 1504.00 * 0.13;
    expect(Number(grossWages.toFixed(2))).toBe(285129.63);
    expect(Number(matchedFunding.toFixed(2))).toBe(307416.37);
    expect(Number(hstOnFees.toFixed(2))).toBe(195.52);

    const journal = [
      { code: '9060', debit: 285129.63, credit: 0 },
      { code: '6100', debit: 14842.31, credit: 0 },
      { code: '6110', debit: 5744.91, credit: 0 },
      { code: '6310', debit: 1504.00, credit: 0 },
      { code: '1066', debit: 195.52, credit: 0 },
      { code: '1091', debit: 0, credit: 307416.37 },
    ];
    const debits = journal.reduce((sum, line) => sum + line.debit, 0);
    const credits = journal.reduce((sum, line) => sum + line.credit, 0);
    expect(Number(debits.toFixed(2))).toBe(307416.37);
    expect(Number(credits.toFixed(2))).toBe(307416.37);
    expect(journal.map((line) => line.code)).not.toContain('6200');
    expect(journal.map((line) => line.code)).not.toContain('4080');
    expect(journal.map((line) => line.code)).not.toContain('4090');
    expect(journal.map((line) => line.code)).not.toContain('4100');
  });

  it('allocates the March 10 payroll run and leaves Payroll Clearing at zero', () => {
    const march10Funding = 13975.27 + 738.36 + 320.87 + 134.00 + 17.42;
    expect(Number(march10Funding.toFixed(2))).toBe(15185.92);
    expect(Number((307416.37 - 307416.37).toFixed(2))).toBe(0);
  });

  it('accrues WSIB separately and applies payments without duplicating expense', () => {
    const wsibAccrual = [
      { code: '9080', debit: 2566.18, credit: 0 },
      { code: '2670', debit: 0, credit: 2566.18 },
    ];
    const wsibPayments = [
      { code: '2670', debit: 400.67, credit: 0 },
      { code: '2670', debit: 702.20, credit: 0 },
      { code: '2670', debit: 31.18, credit: 0 },
    ];
    const paymentDebit = wsibPayments.reduce((sum, line) => sum + line.debit, 0);
    expect(Number(paymentDebit.toFixed(2))).toBe(1134.05);
    expect(Number((2566.18 - paymentDebit).toFixed(2))).toBe(1432.13);
    expect(wsibAccrual.filter((line) => line.code === '9080')).toHaveLength(1);
  });
});

describe('RuleSuggestionService journal template normalization', () => {
  const accounts = [
    { id: 'raw-materials', code: '8320', description: 'Purchases of raw materials' },
    { id: 'expense-tax-clearing', code: '1066', description: 'Expense Tax Clearing' },
    { id: 'credit-card-payable', code: '2690', description: 'Credit Card Payable' },
  ];

  it('splits ITC purchase templates into net expense, expense tax clearing, and gross source credit', () => {
    const lines = normalizeJournalTemplateLines([
      { accountCode: '8320', accountDescription: 'Purchases of raw materials', debit: 1, credit: 0 },
      { accountCode: '2690', accountDescription: 'Credit Card Payable', debit: 0, credit: 1 },
      { accountCode: '0000', accountDescription: 'Transfer', debit: 0, credit: 0 },
    ], accounts, {
      suggestedAccountCode: '8320',
      taxTreatment: 'INPUT_TAX_CREDIT',
      sourceType: 'CREDIT_CARD',
      amountDirection: 'EXPENSE',
    });

    expect(lines).toEqual([
      expect.objectContaining({ accountCode: '8320', side: 'DEBIT', amountFormula: 'net' }),
      expect.objectContaining({ accountCode: '1066', side: 'DEBIT', amountFormula: 'hst' }),
      expect.objectContaining({ accountCode: '2690', side: 'CREDIT', amountFormula: 'gross' }),
    ]);
  });

  it('keeps non-ITC purchase templates gross without a tax asset line', () => {
    const lines = normalizeJournalTemplateLines([
      { accountCode: '8320', side: 'DEBIT', amountFormula: 'gross' },
      { accountCode: '2690', side: 'CREDIT', amountFormula: 'gross' },
    ], accounts, {
      suggestedAccountCode: '8320',
      taxTreatment: 'NO_TAX',
      sourceType: 'CREDIT_CARD',
      amountDirection: 'EXPENSE',
    });

    expect(lines).toEqual([
      expect.objectContaining({ accountCode: '8320', side: 'DEBIT', amountFormula: 'gross' }),
      expect.objectContaining({ accountCode: '2690', side: 'CREDIT', amountFormula: 'gross' }),
    ]);
  });
});

describe('RuleSuggestionService credit-card payment suggestions', () => {
  const customAccounts = [
    {
      id: 'visa-payable',
      code: 'L-CC-VISA',
      description: 'Visa Payable - Business card',
      category: 'LIABILITIES',
      normalSide: 'CREDIT',
    },
    {
      id: 'operating-chequing',
      code: 'A-BANK-OPERATING',
      description: 'Operating Chequing Account',
      category: 'ASSETS',
      normalSide: 'DEBIT',
    },
    {
      id: 'sales-revenue',
      code: 'R-SALES',
      description: 'Sales Revenue',
      category: 'REVENUE',
      normalSide: 'CREDIT',
    },
    {
      id: 'meals',
      code: 'E-MEALS',
      description: 'Meals and entertainment',
      category: 'EXPENSES',
      normalSide: 'DEBIT',
    },
    {
      id: 'hst',
      code: 'A-HST',
      description: 'Expense Tax Clearing',
      category: 'ASSETS',
      normalSide: 'DEBIT',
    },
  ];

  it('detects credit-card statement payment descriptions with normalization', () => {
    expect(isCreditCardPaymentDescriptor('PAYMENT - THANK YOU')).toBe(true);
    expect(isCreditCardPaymentDescriptor('Pre-Authorized   Payment')).toBe(true);
    expect(isCreditCardPaymentDescriptor('THANK YOU FOR YOUR PAYMENT')).toBe(true);
  });

  it('requires credit-card source and payment direction before treating PAYMENT RECEIVED as a card payment', () => {
    const cardGroup = {
      sourceType: 'CREDIT_CARD',
      direction: 'INCOME',
      normalizedMerchant: 'payment received',
      transactions: [{ amount: 459.62, description: 'PAYMENT RECEIVED' }],
    };
    const bankDepositGroup = {
      sourceType: 'CHEQUING_ACCOUNT',
      direction: 'INCOME',
      normalizedMerchant: 'payment received',
      transactions: [{ amount: 459.62, description: 'PAYMENT RECEIVED' }],
    };

    expect(isCreditCardPaymentGroup(cardGroup)).toBe(true);
    expect(isCreditCardPaymentGroup(bankDepositGroup)).toBe(false);
  });

  it('resolves non-hard-coded credit-card liability and funding bank accounts', () => {
    expect(resolveCreditCardLiabilityAccount(customAccounts, { name: 'Visa card', type: 'CREDIT_CARD' }))
      .toEqual(expect.objectContaining({ code: 'L-CC-VISA' }));
    expect(resolveBankLedgerAccount(customAccounts, { name: 'Operating chequing', type: 'CHEQUING_ACCOUNT' }))
      .toEqual(expect.objectContaining({ code: 'A-BANK-OPERATING' }));
  });

  it('supports Visa, Mastercard, Amex, and generic credit-card payable account names', () => {
    for (const description of ['Visa Payable', 'Mastercard Payable', 'Amex Payable', 'Credit Card Payable']) {
      expect(resolveCreditCardLiabilityAccount([
        { id: description, code: description, description, category: 'LIABILITIES', normalSide: 'CREDIT' },
      ])).toEqual(expect.objectContaining({ description }));
    }
  });

  it('builds and validates a balanced no-tax transfer journal without revenue, expense, or HST lines', () => {
    const lines = [
      { accountCode: 'L-CC-VISA', side: 'DEBIT', amountFormula: 'gross' },
      { accountCode: 'A-BANK-OPERATING', side: 'CREDIT', amountFormula: 'gross' },
    ];

    expect(validateJournalTemplateLines(lines, customAccounts, {
      taxTreatment: 'NO_TAX',
      transactionType: 'CREDIT_CARD_PAYMENT',
    })).toEqual(expect.objectContaining({
      valid: true,
      debitFormulaTotal: 1,
      creditFormulaTotal: 1,
    }));
  });

  it('rejects revenue, expense, HST, unbalanced, and unavailable-account transfer templates', () => {
    const badLines = [
      { accountCode: 'L-CC-VISA', side: 'DEBIT', amountFormula: 'gross' },
      { accountCode: 'R-SALES', side: 'CREDIT', amountFormula: 'gross' },
      { accountCode: 'A-HST', side: 'DEBIT', amountFormula: 'hst' },
    ];

    const validation = validateJournalTemplateLines(badLines, customAccounts, {
      taxTreatment: 'NO_TAX',
      transactionType: 'CREDIT_CARD_PAYMENT',
    });

    expect(validation.valid).toBe(false);
    expect(validation.errors).toContain('transfer_has_revenue_or_expense_account');
    expect(validation.errors).toContain('no_tax_has_tax_line');
    expect(validation.errors).toContain('journal_template_unbalanced');

    expect(validateJournalTemplateLines([
      { accountCode: 'OTHER-ORG-BANK', side: 'CREDIT', amountFormula: 'gross' },
    ], customAccounts, {
      taxTreatment: 'NO_TAX',
      transactionType: 'CREDIT_CARD_PAYMENT',
    }).errors).toContain('account_not_found:OTHER-ORG-BANK');
  });

  it('normalizes purchase ITC lines to the resolved credit-card liability account from account meaning', () => {
    const lines = normalizeJournalTemplateLines([
      { accountCode: 'E-MEALS', side: 'DEBIT', amountFormula: 'gross' },
      { accountCode: 'L-CC-VISA', side: 'CREDIT', amountFormula: 'gross' },
    ], customAccounts, {
      suggestedAccountCode: 'E-MEALS',
      taxTreatment: 'INPUT_TAX_CREDIT',
      sourceType: 'CREDIT_CARD',
      amountDirection: 'EXPENSE',
    });

    expect(lines).toEqual([
      expect.objectContaining({ accountCode: 'E-MEALS', side: 'DEBIT', amountFormula: 'net' }),
      expect.objectContaining({ accountCode: 'A-HST', side: 'DEBIT', amountFormula: 'hst' }),
      expect.objectContaining({ accountCode: 'L-CC-VISA', side: 'CREDIT', amountFormula: 'gross' }),
    ]);
  });

  it('puts card-payment source/direction signals and transfer matching into LLM context', () => {
    const context = buildRuleSuggestionPromptContext({
      organizationId: 'org-1',
      group: {
        normalizedMerchant: 'payment thank you',
        sourceType: 'CREDIT_CARD',
        direction: 'INCOME',
        transactionCount: 1,
        uncategorizedCount: 1,
        amountMin: 459.62,
        amountMax: 459.62,
        amountTotal: 459.62,
        transactions: [{ id: 10, amount: 459.62, description: 'PAYMENT - THANK YOU', sourceName: 'Visa card', sourceId: 'src-card' }],
        sampleTransactions: [{ id: 10, amount: 459.62, description: 'PAYMENT - THANK YOU', sourceName: 'Visa card', sourceId: 'src-card' }],
      },
      accounts: customAccounts,
      transferMatching: {
        matchedTransfers: [{ cardTransactionId: 10, selectedBankTransactionId: 20 }],
        ambiguousTransfers: [],
        unmatchedCardTransactionIds: [],
      },
    });

    expect(context.descriptorSignals.creditCardPaymentDescriptor).toBe(true);
    expect(context.descriptorSignals.creditCardPaymentSupportedBySourceAndDirection).toBe(true);
    expect(context.sourceAccountContext.creditCardLiabilityAccountCandidate).toEqual(expect.objectContaining({ code: 'L-CC-VISA' }));
    expect(context.transferMatching.matchedTransfers).toHaveLength(1);
  });

  it('prefers explicit source ledger mapping over heuristic source-account resolution', () => {
    const mappedAccount = {
      id: 'mapped-card-liability',
      code: 'L-MAPPED-CARD',
      description: 'Mapped card liability',
      category: 'LIABILITIES',
      normalSide: 'CREDIT',
    };
    const context = buildRuleSuggestionPromptContext({
      organizationId: 'org-1',
      group: {
        normalizedMerchant: 'office depot',
        sourceType: 'CREDIT_CARD',
        direction: 'EXPENSE',
        transactionCount: 1,
        transactions: [{
          id: 11,
          amount: -100,
          description: 'OFFICE DEPOT',
          sourceName: 'Visa card',
          sourceId: 'src-card',
          sourceLedgerAccountId: mappedAccount.id,
          sourceLedgerAccountCode: mappedAccount.code,
        }],
        sampleTransactions: [{
          id: 11,
          amount: -100,
          description: 'OFFICE DEPOT',
          sourceName: 'Visa card',
          sourceId: 'src-card',
          sourceLedgerAccountId: mappedAccount.id,
          sourceLedgerAccountCode: mappedAccount.code,
        }],
      },
      accounts: [mappedAccount, ...customAccounts],
    });

    expect(context.sourceAccountContext.currentSourceLedgerAccountCandidate)
      .toEqual(expect.objectContaining({ code: 'L-MAPPED-CARD' }));
  });
});

```

FILE: server/src/services/accounting/services/TransactionGroupService.js
