```js
// Full path: /home/luanngo/boss-dev/server/src/services/accounting/services/TransactionGroupService.js
import prisma from '#shared/database/prismaClient.js';

const normalizeText = (value) =>
  String(value || '')
    .normalize('NFD')
    .replace(/[\u0300-\u036f]/g, '')
    .toLowerCase()
    .replace(/[^a-z0-9\s]/g, ' ')
    .replace(/\s+/g, ' ')
    .trim();

const safeJsonParse = (value) => {
  if (!value) return null;
  try {
    return typeof value === 'string' ? JSON.parse(value) : value;
  } catch {
    return null;
  }
};

const formatLinkedRule = (rule) => {
  if (!rule) return null;
  const meta = safeJsonParse(rule.patterns) || {};
  return {
    ...rule,
    meta,
    categoryCode: rule.category?.code || meta.suggestedAccountCode || meta.categoryCode || null,
    categoryDescription: rule.category?.description || meta.suggestedAccountDescription || meta.categoryDescription || '',
  };
};

const CREDIT_CARD_PAYMENT_PATTERNS = Object.freeze([
  'payment thank you', 'payment received', 'thank you for your payment',
  'automatic payment', 'auto payment', 'online payment', 'pre authorized payment',
  'payment from bank', 'credit card payment', 'visa payment', 'mastercard payment',
  'amex payment',
]);

const TAX_REMITTANCE_PATTERNS = Object.freeze([
  'canada txd', 'canada tax', 'canada revenue agency', 'cra',
  'gst hst', 'hst payment', 'gst payment', 'tax remittance',
  'hst remittance', 'gst remittance',
]);

const SQUARE_PATTERNS = Object.freeze([
  'square', 'square inc', 'square canada', 'square msp',
  'square inc msp', 'square canada msp', 'tns square',
]);

const SOURCE_CLASS_ALIASES = Object.freeze({
  CHEQUING_ACCOUNT: 'BANK', CHECKING_ACCOUNT: 'BANK',
  BANK_ACCOUNT: 'BANK', CREDIT_CARD: 'CREDIT_CARD',
});

const normalizeSourceClass = (value) => {
  const normalized = String(value || '').trim().toUpperCase();
  return SOURCE_CLASS_ALIASES[normalized] || normalized;
};

const detectSemanticType = (descriptions = [], sourceType, direction) => {
  const text = descriptions.map((d) => normalizeText(d)).join(' ');
  const sourceClass = normalizeSourceClass(sourceType);

  if (direction === 'EXPENSE' && sourceClass === 'BANK' &&
    TAX_REMITTANCE_PATTERNS.some((p) => text.includes(p))) {
    return 'TAX_REMITTANCE';
  }
  if (direction === 'INCOME' && sourceClass === 'CREDIT_CARD' &&
    CREDIT_CARD_PAYMENT_PATTERNS.some((p) => text.includes(p))) {
    return 'CREDIT_CARD_PAYMENT';
  }
  if (direction === 'INCOME' && sourceClass === 'BANK' &&
    SQUARE_PATTERNS.some((p) => text.includes(p))) {
    return 'SQUARE_PAYOUT';
  }
  if (direction === 'EXPENSE' && /payroll|pay roll|salary|wages?|employee/.test(text)) {
    return 'PAYROLL_FUNDING';
  }
  if (direction === 'EXPENSE' && /insurance|insur/.test(text)) {
    return 'INSURANCE';
  }
  if (direction === 'EXPENSE' && /rent|lease/.test(text)) {
    return 'RENT_LEASE';
  }
  if (direction === 'EXPENSE' && /utility|hydro|electric|gas|water|internet|phone|bell|rogers|telus/.test(text)) {
    return 'UTILITY';
  }
  if (direction === 'EXPENSE' && /subscription|membership|software|saas|monthly fee/.test(text)) {
    return 'SUBSCRIPTION';
  }
  if (direction === 'EXPENSE' && /loan|mortgage|financing|borrow/.test(text)) {
    return 'LOAN_PAYMENT';
  }
  if (direction === 'EXPENSE' && /dividend|owner draw|drawing|distribution/.test(text)) {
    return 'OWNER_DRAW';
  }
  if (direction === 'INCOME' && /interest|deposit|dividend|refund|rebate/.test(text)) {
    return 'INCOME_DEPOSIT';
  }
  return null;
};

const normalizeDescriptor = (description) => {
  const normalized = normalizeText(description);
  const tokens = normalized.split(' ').filter((t) => t.length > 2);
  return tokens.slice(0, 6).join(' ');
};

const buildMerchantSignature = (description) => {
  const normalized = normalizeText(description);
  const tokens = normalized.split(' ').filter((t) => t.length > 2);
  const stopWords = new Set(['payment', 'online', 'preauthorized', 'automatic', 'auto',
    'thank', 'you', 'your', 'for', 'the', 'and', 'with', 'from', 'this', 'that']);
  const significant = tokens.filter((t) => !stopWords.has(t));
  if (!significant.length) return tokens.join('_');
  return significant.join('_');
};

const buildGroupKey = (tx) => {
  const merchantSig = buildMerchantSignature(tx.description);
  const direction = Number(tx.amount || 0) >= 0 ? 'INCOME' : 'EXPENSE';
  const sourceId = tx.sourceId || tx.source?.id || normalizeSourceClass(tx.source?.type || 'UNKNOWN');
  const sourceClass = normalizeSourceClass(tx.source?.type || 'UNKNOWN');
  const amountSign = Number(tx.amount || 0) >= 0 ? 'POS' : 'NEG';
  const amountStep = Math.round(Math.abs(Number(tx.amount || 0)) / 100) * 100;

  const semanticHints = [];
  const raw = String(tx.description || '').toLowerCase();
  if (CREDIT_CARD_PAYMENT_PATTERNS.some((p) => raw.includes(p))) semanticHints.push('CC_PAYMENT');
  if (TAX_REMITTANCE_PATTERNS.some((p) => raw.includes(p))) semanticHints.push('TAX');
  if (SQUARE_PATTERNS.some((p) => raw.includes(p))) semanticHints.push('SQUARE');
  if (/payroll|salary|wages/.test(raw)) semanticHints.push('PAYROLL');
  if (/insurance/.test(raw)) semanticHints.push('INSURANCE');

  const semanticTag = semanticHints.length ? semanticHints.join('_') : 'GENERAL';
  const postingClass = tx.postingType || 'NONE';

  return `${merchantSig}||${direction}||${sourceId}||${sourceClass}||${postingClass}||${amountSign}||${amountStep}||${semanticTag}`;
};

const inferRiskLevel = (description, amount) => {
  const normalized = typeof description === 'string' ? normalizeText(description) : '';
  const HIGH_KEYWORDS = ['cra', 'payroll', 'owner', 'shareholder', 'loan', 'insurance', 'legal', 'settlement', 'draw', 'contribution'];
  const MEDIUM_KEYWORDS = ['transfer', 'payment', 'visa', 'mastercard', 'amex', 'interac'];
  for (const keyword of HIGH_KEYWORDS) {
    if (normalized.includes(keyword)) return 'HIGH';
  }
  if (Math.abs(Number(amount || 0)) > 5000) return 'HIGH';
  for (const keyword of MEDIUM_KEYWORDS) {
    if (normalized.includes(keyword)) return 'MEDIUM';
  }
  return 'LOW';
};

const inferTaxTreatmentFromTransaction = (tx) => {
  const tax = Math.abs(Number(tx?.taxes || 0));
  const amount = Number(tx?.amount || 0);
  if (tax <= 0) return amount < 0 ? 'NO_ITC' : 'NO_TAX';
  return amount > 0 ? 'TAXABLE_SALE' : 'INPUT_TAX_CREDIT';
};

const computeGroupStats = (transactions) => {
  const amounts = transactions.map((tx) => Math.abs(Number(tx.amount || 0))).sort((a, b) => a - b);
  const totalAmount = amounts.reduce((sum, v) => sum + v, 0);
  const dates = transactions.map((tx) => new Date(tx.date));
  const dateStarts = dates.map((d) => d.getTime());

  const categorizedTransactions = transactions.filter((tx) => tx.categoryId);
  const uncategorizedTransactions = transactions.filter((tx) => !tx.categoryId);
  const missingTaxTransactions = transactions.filter((tx) =>
    Number(tx.amount || 0) < 0 && (tx.taxes === null || tx.taxes === undefined || Number(tx.taxes || 0) === 0)
  );
  const missingReceiptTransactions = transactions.filter((tx) =>
    Number(tx.amount || 0) < 0 && !tx.receiptId
  );
  const unpostedTransactions = transactions.filter((tx) =>
    !tx.journalEntry?.id || tx.journalEntry?.posted !== true
  );
  const postedJournalCount = transactions.filter((tx) =>
    tx.journalEntry?.id && tx.journalEntry?.posted === true
  ).length;
  const incompleteTransactionIds = new Set([
    ...uncategorizedTransactions.map((tx) => tx.id),
    ...missingTaxTransactions.map((tx) => tx.id),
    ...missingReceiptTransactions.map((tx) => tx.id),
    ...unpostedTransactions.map((tx) => tx.id),
  ]);

  const semanticType = detectSemanticType(
    transactions.map((tx) => tx.description),
    transactions[0]?.source?.type,
    Number(transactions[0]?.amount || 0) >= 0 ? 'INCOME' : 'EXPENSE'
  );

  return {
    transactionCount: transactions.length,
    incompleteCount: incompleteTransactionIds.size,
    uncategorizedCount: uncategorizedTransactions.length,
    missingTaxCount: missingTaxTransactions.length,
    missingReceiptCount: missingReceiptTransactions.length,
    unpostedCount: unpostedTransactions.length,
    postedJournalCount,
    categorizedCount: categorizedTransactions.length,
    amountMin: amounts[0] || 0,
    amountMax: amounts[amounts.length - 1] || 0,
    totalAmount: Number(totalAmount.toFixed(2)),
    dateRangeStart: dateStarts.length ? new Date(Math.min(...dateStarts)) : null,
    dateRangeEnd: dateStarts.length ? new Date(Math.max(...dateStarts)) : null,
    semanticType,
  };
};

class TransactionGroupService {
  async getOrCreateGroups(organizationId, { limit = 3000, includeCompleted = false } = {}) {
    const where = includeCompleted
      ? { organizationId }
      : {
        organizationId,
        OR: [
          { categoryId: null },
          { receiptId: null, amount: { lt: 0 } },
          { amount: { lt: 0 }, OR: [{ taxes: null }, { taxes: 0 }] },
          { journalEntry: null },
          { journalEntry: { posted: false } },
        ],
      };

    const transactions = await prisma.bankTransaction.findMany({
      where,
      include: {
        category: { select: { id: true, code: true, description: true } },
        source: { select: { id: true, name: true, type: true } },
        receipt: { select: { id: true, companyName: true } },
        journalEntry: { select: { id: true, posted: true } },
      },
      orderBy: { date: 'desc' },
      take: limit,
    });

    return this.groupTransactions(transactions);
  }

  groupTransactions(transactions) {
    const groups = new Map();

    for (const tx of transactions) {
      const groupKey = buildGroupKey(tx);
      if (!groups.has(groupKey)) {
        const descriptor = normalizeDescriptor(tx.description);
        const merchantSig = buildMerchantSignature(tx.description);
        const direction = Number(tx.amount || 0) >= 0 ? 'INCOME' : 'EXPENSE';
        const amountSign = Number(tx.amount || 0) >= 0 ? 'POS' : 'NEG';
        const sourceType = String(tx.source?.type || 'UNKNOWN').toUpperCase();
        const sourceId = tx.sourceId || tx.source?.id || null;

        groups.set(groupKey, {
          groupKey,
          normalizedMerchant: descriptor,
          direction,
          sourceType,
          sourceId,
          amountSign,
          transactions: [],
        });
      }
      groups.get(groupKey).transactions.push(tx);
    }

    const result = [];
    for (const [, raw] of groups) {
      if (raw.transactions.length < 2) continue;
      const stats = computeGroupStats(raw.transactions);
      const sampleTx = raw.transactions.slice(0, 3);

      const formatTxSample = (tx) => ({
        id: tx.id,
        date: tx.date,
        description: tx.description,
        amount: tx.amount,
        taxes: tx.taxes,
        source: tx.source?.type || null,
        sourceId: tx.source?.id || null,
        sourceName: tx.source?.name || null,
        sourceLedgerAccountId: tx.source?.ledgerAccountId || null,
        sourceLedgerAccountCode: tx.source?.ledgerAccount?.code || null,
        sourceLedgerAccountDescription: tx.source?.ledgerAccount?.description || null,
        categoryId: tx.categoryId || null,
        currentCategoryCode: tx.category?.code || null,
        currentCategoryDescription: tx.category?.description || null,
        inferredTaxTreatment: tx.categoryId ? inferTaxTreatmentFromTransaction(tx) : null,
        matchedReceiptSummary: tx.receipt?.companyName || null,
        receiptId: tx.receiptId || null,
        hasJournalEntry: Boolean(tx.journalEntry?.id && tx.journalEntry?.posted === true),
        journalEntryId: tx.journalEntry?.id || null,
        journalPosted: tx.journalEntry?.posted === true,
        postingType: tx.postingType || null,
        incompleteReasons: [
          !tx.categoryId ? 'missing_category' : null,
          Number(tx.amount || 0) < 0 && (tx.taxes === null || tx.taxes === undefined || Number(tx.taxes || 0) === 0) ? 'missing_tax' : null,
          Number(tx.amount || 0) < 0 && !tx.receiptId ? 'missing_receipt' : null,
          !tx.journalEntry?.id || tx.journalEntry?.posted !== true ? 'unposted_journal' : null,
        ].filter(Boolean),
      });

      const categorizedTransactions = raw.transactions.filter((tx) => tx.categoryId);
      const uncategorizedTransactions = raw.transactions.filter((tx) => !tx.categoryId);
      const riskLevel = inferRiskLevel(raw.normalizedMerchant, stats.amountMax);

      result.push({
        groupKey: raw.groupKey,
        normalizedMerchant: raw.normalizedMerchant,
        direction: raw.direction,
        sourceType: raw.sourceType,
        sourceId: raw.sourceId,
        amountSign: raw.amountSign,
        ...stats,
        riskLevel,
        dateRange: {
          from: stats.dateRangeStart,
          to: stats.dateRangeEnd,
        },
        completedTransactionSamples: categorizedTransactions.slice(0, 6).map(formatTxSample),
        uncategorizedTransactionSamples: uncategorizedTransactions.slice(0, 6).map(formatTxSample),
        incompleteTransactionSamples: raw.transactions
          .filter((tx) => {
            const reasons = [
              !tx.categoryId,
              Number(tx.amount || 0) < 0 && (tx.taxes === null || tx.taxes === undefined || Number(tx.taxes || 0) === 0),
              Number(tx.amount || 0) < 0 && !tx.receiptId,
              !tx.journalEntry?.id || tx.journalEntry?.posted !== true,
            ];
            return reasons.some(Boolean);
          })
          .slice(0, 10)
          .map(formatTxSample),
        transactions: raw.transactions.map(formatTxSample),
        taxRateSuggestion: null,
        sampleTransactions: sampleTx.map(formatTxSample),
        transactionIds: raw.transactions.map((tx) => tx.id),
      });
    }

    return result
      .filter((g) => g.incompleteCount > 0 || g.uncategorizedCount > 0)
      .sort((a, b) =>
        b.incompleteCount - a.incompleteCount ||
        b.uncategorizedCount - a.uncategorizedCount ||
        b.unpostedCount - a.unpostedCount ||
        b.missingReceiptCount - a.missingReceiptCount ||
        b.missingTaxCount - a.missingTaxCount ||
        b.transactionCount - a.transactionCount
      );
  }

  async persistGroups(organizationId, computedGroups) {
    const existing = await prisma.transactionGroup.findMany({
      where: { organizationId },
      select: { id: true, groupKey: true, lastComputedAt: true },
    });
    const existingByKey = new Map(existing.map((g) => [g.groupKey, g]));

    const persisted = [];

    for (const group of computedGroups) {
      const existingGroup = existingByKey.get(group.groupKey);

      if (existingGroup) {
        await prisma.transactionGroup.update({
          where: { id: existingGroup.id },
          data: {
            normalizedMerchant: group.normalizedMerchant,
            sourceId: group.sourceId,
            sourceType: group.sourceType,
            direction: group.direction,
            amountSign: group.amountSign,
            transactionCount: group.transactionCount,
            incompleteCount: group.incompleteCount,
            totalAmount: group.totalAmount,
            dateRangeStart: group.dateRangeStart,
            dateRangeEnd: group.dateRangeEnd,
            semanticType: group.semanticType,
            lastComputedAt: new Date(),
          },
        });

        await this.syncGroupMembers(existingGroup.id, group.transactionIds);
        persisted.push(existingGroup);
      } else {
        const created = await prisma.transactionGroup.create({
          data: {
            organizationId,
            groupKey: group.groupKey,
            normalizedMerchant: group.normalizedMerchant,
            sourceId: group.sourceId,
            sourceType: group.sourceType,
            direction: group.direction,
            amountSign: group.amountSign,
            transactionCount: group.transactionCount,
            incompleteCount: group.incompleteCount,
            totalAmount: group.totalAmount,
            dateRangeStart: group.dateRangeStart,
            dateRangeEnd: group.dateRangeEnd,
            semanticType: group.semanticType,
            status: 'ACTIVE',
            lastComputedAt: new Date(),
          },
        });

        await this.syncGroupMembers(created.id, group.transactionIds);
        persisted.push(created);
      }
    }

    return persisted;
  }

  async syncGroupMembers(groupId, transactionIds) {
    await prisma.transactionGroupMember.deleteMany({
      where: { transactionGroupId: groupId },
    });

    if (!transactionIds.length) return;

    await prisma.transactionGroupMember.createMany({
      data: transactionIds.map((txId) => ({
        transactionGroupId: groupId,
        bankTransactionId: Number(txId),
        matchConfidence: 1.0,
      })),
    });
  }

  async refreshAffectedGroups(organizationId, transactionIds) {
    const memberGroups = await prisma.transactionGroupMember.findMany({
      where: { bankTransactionId: { in: transactionIds.map(Number) } },
      select: { transactionGroupId: true },
      distinct: ['transactionGroupId'],
    });

    const groupIds = memberGroups.map((m) => m.transactionGroupId);
    const groups = await prisma.transactionGroup.findMany({
      where: { id: { in: groupIds }, organizationId },
      include: {
        members: {
          include: {
            transaction: {
              include: {
                category: { select: { id: true, code: true, description: true } },
                source: { select: { id: true, name: true, type: true } },
                journalEntry: { select: { id: true, posted: true } },
                receipt: { select: { id: true } },
              },
            },
          },
        },
      },
    });

    for (const group of groups) {
      const txs = group.members.map((m) => m.transaction).filter(Boolean);
      const stats = computeGroupStats(txs);

      await prisma.transactionGroup.update({
        where: { id: group.id },
        data: {
          transactionCount: stats.transactionCount,
          incompleteCount: stats.incompleteCount,
          totalAmount: stats.totalAmount,
          dateRangeStart: stats.dateRangeStart,
          dateRangeEnd: stats.dateRangeEnd,
          semanticType: stats.semanticType,
          lastComputedAt: new Date(),
        },
      });
    }

    return groups.length;
  }

  async getGroupAlignment(organizationId) {
    const groups = await prisma.transactionGroup.findMany({
      where: { organizationId, status: 'ACTIVE' },
      include: {
        linkedRule: {
          select: {
            id: true,
            name: true,
            sql: true,
            organizationId: true,
            patterns: true,
            autoApplyTaxes: true,
            requiredReceipt: true,
            autoCategory: true,
            categoryId: true,
            status: true,
            priority: true,
            riskLevel: true,
            confidence: true,
            transactionGroupId: true,
            createdAt: true,
            updatedAt: true,
            category: { select: { id: true, code: true, description: true } },
          },
        },
        suggestions: {
          where: { status: { in: ['PENDING', 'APPROVED', 'APPLIED'] } },
          select: { id: true, status: true, confidence: true, createdAt: true },
          orderBy: { createdAt: 'desc' },
          take: 5,
        },
        members: {
          select: { bankTransactionId: true, matchConfidence: true },
        },
      },
    });

    const results = [];
    for (const group of groups) {
      let alignment = 'NO_RULE';
      let existingRule = null;
      let pendingSuggestion = null;
      let latestSuggestion = null;
      let needsRefresh = false;

      if (group.suggestions.length > 0) {
        latestSuggestion = group.suggestions[0];
        pendingSuggestion = group.suggestions.find((suggestion) => suggestion.status === 'PENDING') || null;
      }

      if (group.linkedRule) {
        existingRule = group.linkedRule;
        const memberIds = new Set(group.members.map((m) => m.bankTransactionId));
        const ruleMatches = await this._countRuleMatches(existingRule, memberIds);
        if (pendingSuggestion?.status === 'PENDING') {
          alignment = 'PENDING_SUGGESTION';
        } else if (ruleMatches.groupCoverage >= 0.95) {
          alignment = 'ACTIVE_RULE_MATCHES';
        } else if (ruleMatches.groupCoverage > 0) {
          alignment = 'RULE_PARTIAL_COVERAGE';
        } else {
          alignment = 'RULE_MISMATCH';
        }
      } else if (group.suggestions.length > 0) {
        alignment = pendingSuggestion ? 'PENDING_SUGGESTION' : 'HAS_SUGGESTION';
      }

      if (group.linkedRule && typeof group.linkedRule.updatedAt === 'string') {
        const ruleUpdated = new Date(group.linkedRule.updatedAt).getTime();
        const groupComputed = new Date(group.lastComputedAt).getTime();
        if (groupComputed < ruleUpdated) needsRefresh = true;
      }
      if ((pendingSuggestion || latestSuggestion)?.createdAt) {
        const suggCreated = new Date((pendingSuggestion || latestSuggestion).createdAt).getTime();
        const groupComputed = new Date(group.lastComputedAt).getTime();
        if (groupComputed < suggCreated) needsRefresh = true;
      }
      if (group.transactionCount > 0 && group.incompleteCount > 0) {
        const lastComputed = new Date(group.lastComputedAt).getTime();
        const hourAgo = Date.now() - 3600000;
        if (lastComputed < hourAgo) needsRefresh = true;
      }

      results.push({
        groupId: group.id,
        groupKey: group.groupKey,
        normalizedMerchant: group.normalizedMerchant,
        direction: group.direction,
        sourceType: group.sourceType,
        semanticType: group.semanticType,
        transactionCount: group.transactionCount,
        incompleteCount: group.incompleteCount,
        totalAmount: group.totalAmount,
        alignment,
        existingRule: formatLinkedRule(existingRule),
        pendingSuggestion: pendingSuggestion || null,
        latestSuggestion: latestSuggestion && !pendingSuggestion ? latestSuggestion : null,
        needsRefresh,
        lastComputedAt: group.lastComputedAt,
      });
    }
    return results;
  }

  async _countRuleMatches(rule, memberIds) {
    try {
      const meta = JSON.parse(rule.patterns || '{}');
      const patterns = Array.isArray(meta.patterns) ? meta.patterns.filter((p) => p && String(p).trim()) : [];
      if (!patterns.length) {
        const categorized = await prisma.bankTransaction.count({
          where: { id: { in: [...memberIds] }, categoryId: rule.categoryId || undefined, categoryId2: null },
        });
        return { hasPatterns: false, groupSize: memberIds.size, groupCoverage: 0, matchedCount: 0 };
      }

      const sourceType = meta.sourceType ? String(meta.sourceType).toUpperCase() : null;
      const amountDirection = meta.amountDirection ? String(meta.amountDirection).toUpperCase() : null;
      const matchMode = meta.matchMode || 'ANY';

      const matched = [];
      for (const txId of memberIds) {
        const tx = await prisma.bankTransaction.findUnique({
          where: { id: txId },
          select: { id: true, description: true, amount: true, source: { select: { type: true } } },
        });
        if (!tx) continue;

        const direction = Number(tx.amount || 0) > 0 ? 'INCOME' : 'EXPENSE';
        if (amountDirection && amountDirection !== 'ANY' && amountDirection !== direction) continue;

        if (sourceType) {
          const txSource = String(tx.source?.type || '').toUpperCase();
          if (txSource && txSource !== sourceType) continue;
        }

        const haystack = normalizeText(tx.description);
        const normalizedPatterns = patterns.map((p) => normalizeText(p));
        const matches = matchMode === 'ALL'
          ? normalizedPatterns.every((p) => haystack.includes(p))
          : normalizedPatterns.some((p) => haystack.includes(p));

        if (matches) matched.push(txId);
      }

      const groupSize = memberIds.size;
      const groupCoverage = groupSize > 0 ? matched.length / groupSize : 0;

      return { hasPatterns: true, groupSize, groupCoverage, matchedCount: matched.length };
    } catch {
      return { hasPatterns: false, groupSize: memberIds.size, groupCoverage: 0, matchedCount: 0 };
    }
  }

  async getRuleCoveragePreview(organizationId, ruleData, groupId) {
    const group = await prisma.transactionGroup.findUnique({
      where: { id: groupId },
      include: {
        members: { select: { bankTransactionId: true } },
      },
    });

    if (!group || group.organizationId !== organizationId) {
      throw Object.assign(new Error('Group not found.'), { statusCode: 404 });
    }

    const meta = (() => {
      try { return JSON.parse(ruleData.patterns || '{}'); } catch { return {}; }
    })();
    const patterns = Array.isArray(meta.patterns) ? meta.patterns : [];
    const matchMode = meta.matchMode || 'ANY';
    const amountDirection = meta.amountDirection || 'ANY';
    const sourceType = meta.sourceType ? String(meta.sourceType).toUpperCase() : null;
    const normalizeStr = (v) => String(v || '').toLowerCase().replace(/[^a-z0-9\s]/g, ' ').replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim();

    const groupMemberIds = new Set(group.members.map((m) => m.bankTransactionId));

    const transactions = await prisma.bankTransaction.findMany({
      where: { organizationId },
      include: {
        category: { select: { id: true, code: true, description: true } },
        source: { select: { id: true, type: true } },
      },
      orderBy: { date: 'desc' },
      take: 2000,
    });

    const inGroup = [];
    const outOfGroup = [];
    const groupNotMatched = [];

    for (const tx of transactions) {
      const direction = Number(tx.amount || 0) > 0 ? 'INCOME' : 'EXPENSE';
      let matches = true;

      if (amountDirection !== 'ANY' && amountDirection !== direction) matches = false;
      if (matches && sourceType) {
        const txSource = String(tx.source?.type || '').toUpperCase();
        if (txSource && txSource !== sourceType) matches = false;
      }
      if (matches && patterns.length) {
        const haystack = normalizeStr(tx.description);
        const normalizedPatterns = patterns.map(normalizeStr);
        matches = matchMode === 'ALL'
          ? normalizedPatterns.every((p) => haystack.includes(p))
          : normalizedPatterns.some((p) => haystack.includes(p));
      }

      if (matches && groupMemberIds.has(tx.id)) {
        inGroup.push(tx);
      } else if (matches && !groupMemberIds.has(tx.id)) {
        outOfGroup.push(tx);
      } else if (!matches && groupMemberIds.has(tx.id)) {
        groupNotMatched.push(tx);
      }
    }

    return {
      groupId: group.id,
      groupKey: group.groupKey,
      groupTotalTransactions: group.members.length,
      inGroup: {
        count: inGroup.length,
        totalAmount: inGroup.reduce((s, tx) => s + Math.abs(Number(tx.amount || 0)), 0),
        samples: inGroup.slice(0, 10).map((tx) => ({
          id: tx.id, date: tx.date, description: tx.description,
          amount: tx.amount, category: tx.category?.code || null,
        })),
      },
      outOfGroup: {
        count: outOfGroup.length,
        totalAmount: outOfGroup.reduce((s, tx) => s + Math.abs(Number(tx.amount || 0)), 0),
        samples: outOfGroup.slice(0, 10).map((tx) => ({
          id: tx.id, date: tx.date, description: tx.description,
          amount: tx.amount, category: tx.category?.code || null,
        })),
      },
      groupNotMatched: {
        count: groupNotMatched.length,
        totalAmount: groupNotMatched.reduce((s, tx) => s + Math.abs(Number(tx.amount || 0)), 0),
        samples: groupNotMatched.slice(0, 10).map((tx) => ({
          id: tx.id, date: tx.date, description: tx.description,
          amount: tx.amount, category: tx.category?.code || null,
        })),
      },
    };
  }

  async previewGroupFilters(organizationId, filters = {}) {
    const merchantSig = normalizeText(filters.merchantSig || filters.normalizedMerchant || '');
    const merchantTokens = merchantSig.split(' ').filter(Boolean);
    const directionFilter = String(filters.direction || '').toUpperCase();
    const sourceTypeFilter = normalizeSourceClass(filters.sourceType || '');
    const semanticTypeFilter = String(filters.semanticType || '').toUpperCase();
    const limit = Math.min(Math.max(Number(filters.limit || 5000), 1), 5000);

    const transactions = await prisma.bankTransaction.findMany({
      where: { organizationId },
      include: {
        category: { select: { id: true, code: true, description: true } },
        source: { select: { id: true, name: true, type: true, ledgerAccountId: true, ledgerAccount: { select: { code: true, description: true } } } },
        receipt: { select: { id: true, companyName: true } },
        journalEntry: { select: { id: true, posted: true } },
      },
      orderBy: { date: 'desc' },
      take: limit,
    });

    const matched = transactions.filter((tx) => {
      const direction = Number(tx.amount || 0) >= 0 ? 'INCOME' : 'EXPENSE';
      if (directionFilter && directionFilter !== direction) return false;

      const sourceType = normalizeSourceClass(tx.source?.type || 'UNKNOWN');
      if (sourceTypeFilter && sourceTypeFilter !== sourceType) return false;

      if (merchantTokens.length) {
        const description = normalizeText(tx.description);
        if (!merchantTokens.every((token) => description.includes(token))) return false;
      }

      if (semanticTypeFilter) {
        const semanticType = detectSemanticType([tx.description], tx.source?.type, direction);
        if (semanticType !== semanticTypeFilter) return false;
      }

      return true;
    });

    const stats = computeGroupStats(matched);
    const sourceTypes = Array.from(new Set(matched.map((tx) => normalizeSourceClass(tx.source?.type || 'UNKNOWN')).filter(Boolean)));
    const sourceIds = Array.from(new Set(matched.map((tx) => tx.sourceId || tx.source?.id).filter(Boolean)));
    const normalizedMerchant = merchantSig || normalizeDescriptor(matched[0]?.description || '');
    const direction = directionFilter || (Number(matched[0]?.amount || 0) >= 0 ? 'INCOME' : 'EXPENSE');
    const sourceType = sourceTypeFilter || (sourceTypes.length === 1 ? sourceTypes[0] : 'MIXED');
    const sourceId = sourceIds.length === 1 ? sourceIds[0] : null;

    const formatTxSample = (tx) => ({
      id: tx.id,
      date: tx.date,
      description: tx.description,
      amount: tx.amount,
      taxes: tx.taxes,
      source: tx.source?.type || null,
      sourceId: tx.source?.id || null,
      sourceName: tx.source?.name || null,
      sourceLedgerAccountId: tx.source?.ledgerAccountId || null,
      sourceLedgerAccountCode: tx.source?.ledgerAccount?.code || null,
      sourceLedgerAccountDescription: tx.source?.ledgerAccount?.description || null,
      categoryId: tx.categoryId || null,
      currentCategoryCode: tx.category?.code || null,
      currentCategoryDescription: tx.category?.description || null,
      inferredTaxTreatment: tx.categoryId ? inferTaxTreatmentFromTransaction(tx) : null,
      matchedReceiptSummary: tx.receipt?.companyName || null,
      receiptId: tx.receiptId || null,
      hasReceipt: Boolean(tx.receipt),
      hasJournalEntry: Boolean(tx.journalEntry?.id && tx.journalEntry?.posted === true),
      journalEntryId: tx.journalEntry?.id || null,
      journalPosted: tx.journalEntry?.posted === true,
      postingType: tx.postingType || null,
      receiptRequired: Number(tx.amount || 0) < 0,
      needsTax: Number(tx.amount || 0) < 0 && (tx.taxes === null || tx.taxes === undefined || Number(tx.taxes || 0) === 0),
      incompleteReasons: [
        !tx.categoryId ? 'missing_category' : null,
        Number(tx.amount || 0) < 0 && (tx.taxes === null || tx.taxes === undefined || Number(tx.taxes || 0) === 0) ? 'missing_tax' : null,
        Number(tx.amount || 0) < 0 && !tx.receiptId ? 'missing_receipt' : null,
        !tx.journalEntry?.id || tx.journalEntry?.posted !== true ? 'unposted_journal' : null,
      ].filter(Boolean),
    });

    const formatted = matched.map(formatTxSample);
    return {
      groupKey: `${normalizedMerchant}||${direction}||${sourceType}||PREVIEW`,
      normalizedMerchant,
      direction,
      sourceType,
      sourceId,
      amountSign: direction === 'INCOME' ? 'POS' : 'NEG',
      ...stats,
      amountTotal: stats.totalAmount,
      dateRange: {
        from: stats.dateRangeStart,
        to: stats.dateRangeEnd,
      },
      completedTransactionSamples: formatted.filter((tx) => !tx.incompleteReasons?.length).slice(0, 6),
      uncategorizedTransactionSamples: formatted.filter((tx) => !tx.categoryId).slice(0, 6),
      incompleteTransactionSamples: formatted.filter((tx) =>
        !tx.categoryId || tx.needsTax || !tx.hasReceipt || !tx.hasJournalEntry
      ).slice(0, 10),
      sampleTransactions: formatted.slice(0, 5),
      transactions: formatted,
      transactionIds: formatted.map((tx) => tx.id),
      previewOnly: true,
    };
  }

  async deleteGroup(organizationId, groupId) {
    const group = await prisma.transactionGroup.findUnique({ where: { id: groupId } });
    if (!group || group.organizationId !== organizationId) {
      throw Object.assign(new Error('Group not found.'), { statusCode: 404 });
    }
    await prisma.transactionGroup.delete({ where: { id: groupId } });
    return { deleted: true };
  }

  async rebuildAllGroups(organizationId) {
    const computed = await this.getOrCreateGroups(organizationId, { includeCompleted: true, limit: 5000 });
    await this.persistGroups(organizationId, computed);
    return { groupsCount: computed.length };
  }
}

export default new TransactionGroupService();

```
